if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertApplyDailyDisplayCaps')) {
    function mylottoexpertApplyDailyDisplayCaps(array $result)
    {
        $pickSize = (int)($result['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $rankLimit = ($pickSize >= 2 && $pickSize <= 5) ? $pickSize : 5;

        $comboStrings = array();
        foreach ((array)($result['combo_strings'] ?? array()) as $__combo) {
            $__combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$__combo);
            if ($__combo === '') { continue; }
            if ($pickSize > 0 && strlen($__combo) > $pickSize) {
                $__combo = substr($__combo, 0, $pickSize);
            }
            if ($__combo !== '' && !in_array($__combo, $comboStrings, true)) {
                $comboStrings[] = $__combo;
            }
            if (count($comboStrings) >= 5) { break; }
        }
        $result['combo_strings'] = array_slice($comboStrings, 0, 5);

        $withBonus = array();
        foreach ((array)($result['combo_strings_with_bonus'] ?? array()) as $__comboBonus) {
            $__comboBonus = trim((string)$__comboBonus);
            if ($__comboBonus === '') { continue; }
            if (!in_array($__comboBonus, $withBonus, true)) { $withBonus[] = $__comboBonus; }
            if (count($withBonus) >= 5) { break; }
        }
        $result['combo_strings_with_bonus'] = array_slice($withBonus, 0, 5);

        $result['ranked_digits'] = array_slice(array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($result['ranked_digits'] ?? array())))), 0, $rankLimit);
        $result['primary_combo_digits'] = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($result['primary_combo_digits'] ?? array()))), 0, ($pickSize > 0 ? $pickSize : 5));
        $result['extra_digits'] = array_slice(array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($result['extra_digits'] ?? array())))), 0, 3);
        $result['bonus_digits'] = array_slice(array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($result['bonus_digits'] ?? array())))), 0, 3);
        $result['top_extras'] = array_slice(array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($result['top_extras'] ?? array())))), 0, 3);

        if (empty($result['primary_combo_digits']) && !empty($result['combo_strings'])) {
            $__firstCombo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$result['combo_strings'][0]);
            $result['primary_combo_digits'] = array_map('intval', str_split($__firstCombo));
        }

        if (!empty($result['bonus_digits'])) {
            $result['bonus_digits_display'] = array_map('strval', array_slice($result['bonus_digits'], 0, 3));
        } elseif (!empty($result['extra_digits'])) {
            $result['bonus_digits_display'] = array_map('strval', array_slice($result['extra_digits'], 0, 3));
        } else {
            $result['bonus_digits_display'] = array_slice(array_values(array_map('strval', (array)($result['bonus_digits_display'] ?? array()))), 0, 3);
        }

        if (empty($result['combo_strings_with_bonus']) && !empty($result['combo_strings'])) {
            $result['combo_strings_with_bonus'] = $result['combo_strings'];
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCanLoadJsAsset')) {
    function mylottoexpertCanLoadJsAsset($assetPath)
    {
        if (!is_file($assetPath) || filesize($assetPath) <= 0 || !is_readable($assetPath)) {
            return false;
        }

        $sample = '';
        $handle = @fopen($assetPath, 'rb');
        if ($handle !== false) {
            $sample = (string)fread($handle, 256);
            fclose($handle);
        }

        $sample = ltrim($sample, "\xEF\xBB\xBF\x00\x09\x0A\x0D\x20");
        if ($sample !== '' && substr($sample, 0, 1) === '<') {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }
}

        . "if(window.__MLE_VISUAL_SCORING_LAZY_LOADER__){return;}"

        . "var loaded=false,loading=false;"
        . "function loadVisual(reason){"
        . "if(loaded||loading){return;}"
        . "loading=true;"
        . "var s=document.createElement('script');"
        . "s.src=src+(src.indexOf('?')===-1?'?':'&')+'v='+(new Date()).getTime();"
        . "s.async=true;s.defer=true;"
        . "s.onload=function(){loaded=true;loading=false;try{window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mle:visual-scoring-loaded',{detail:{reason:reason||'unknown'}}));}catch(e){}};"
        . "s.onerror=function(){loading=false;};"
        . "(document.head||document.documentElement).appendChild(s);"
        . "}"
        . "window.mleLoadVisualScoring=loadVisual;"
        . "document.addEventListener('click',function(ev){"
        . "var t=ev.target&&ev.target.closest?ev.target.closest('a,button,[role=button],[data-target-section],[data-target-panel],[aria-controls]'):null;"
        . "if(!t){return;}"
        . "var hay=((t.textContent||'')+' '+(t.getAttribute('href')||'')+' '+(t.getAttribute('data-href')||'')+' '+(t.getAttribute('data-target-section')||'')+' '+(t.getAttribute('data-target-panel')||'')+' '+(t.getAttribute('aria-controls')||'')).toLowerCase();"
        . "if(hay.indexOf('visual')!==-1||hay.indexOf('comparison')!==-1||hay.indexOf('evidence')!==-1||hay.indexOf('scored')!==-1||hay.indexOf('history')!==-1){loadVisual('interaction');}"
        . "},true);"

        . "window.__MLE_VISUAL_SCORING_INTERACTION_ONLY__=true;"
        . "if(String((location.search||'')).indexOf('mle_visual_auto=1')!==-1){var idleLoad=function(){loadVisual('explicit-auto');};if('requestIdleCallback' in window){requestIdleCallback(idleLoad,{timeout:6500});}else{setTimeout(idleLoad,5200);}}"
        . "})();"
    );
}

        . "window.addEventListener('mle:visual-scoring-loaded',function(e){summary('visual scoring loaded '+(e&&e.detail&&e.detail.reason?e.detail.reason:''));});"
        . "if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){summary('DOMContentLoaded');});}else{summary('already ready');}"
        . "window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(function(){summary('window load + 800ms');},800);});"
        . "})();"

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertSendNoCacheHeaders')) {
    function mylottoexpertSendNoCacheHeaders($app)
    {
        try {
            $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
            $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);
            $app->setHeader('Expires', 'Wed, 11 Jan 1984 05:00:00 GMT', true);
            $app->setHeader('X-MyLottoExpert-Cache-Guard', 'no-store', true);
            if (method_exists($app, 'allowCache')) { $app->allowCache(false); }
        } catch (\Throwable $__mleNoStaleEx) { }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveAuthenticatedUser')) {
    function mylottoexpertResolveAuthenticatedUser($app, $currentUser)
    {
        if (is_object($currentUser) && empty($currentUser->guest) && (int)$currentUser->id > 0) {
            return $currentUser;
        }

        try {
            if (is_object($app) && method_exists($app, 'getIdentity')) {
                $identity = $app->getIdentity();
                if (is_object($identity) && empty($identity->guest) && (int)$identity->id > 0) {
                    return $identity;
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__mleIdentityEx) { }

        try {
            $session = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getSession();
            if (is_object($session)) {
                $sessionUser = $session->get('user');
                if (is_object($sessionUser) && !empty($sessionUser->id)) {
                    $sessionUserId = (int)$sessionUser->id;
                    if ($sessionUserId > 0) {
                        $resolved = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser($sessionUserId);
                        if (is_object($resolved) && empty($resolved->guest) && (int)$resolved->id > 0) {
                            return $resolved;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__mleSessionEx) { }

        try {
            $refreshed = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
            if (is_object($refreshed) && empty($refreshed->guest) && (int)$refreshed->id > 0) {
                return $refreshed;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__mleRefreshEx) { }

        return $currentUser;
    }
}

        $app->redirect($__mleLoginUrl);
        exit;
    }
}

}

if (!function_exists('mlePhase60ResolveAjaxMode')) {
    function mlePhase60ResolveAjaxMode($rawMode) {
        $mode = strtolower(trim((string)$rawMode));
        $allowed = array(
            'visual_comparison',
            'saved_history',
            'scored_evidence',
            'batch_history',
            'older_batches',
            'admin_audit',
            'learning_diagnostics'
        );
        return in_array($mode, $allowed, true) ? $mode : '';
    }
}

$__mleAjaxMode = mlePhase60ResolveAjaxMode($app->input->getString('mle_ajax', ''));
$__mleAjaxLotteryId = (int)$app->input->getInt('lottery_id', (int)$app->input->getInt('mle_lottery_id', 0));
$__mleAjaxPage = (int)$app->input->getInt('page', 1);
if ($__mleAjaxPage < 1) { $__mleAjaxPage = 1; }
$__mleAjaxPageSize = (int)$app->input->getInt('page_size', 20);
if ($__mleAjaxPageSize <= 0) { $__mleAjaxPageSize = 20; }
if ($__mleAjaxPageSize > 20) { $__mleAjaxPageSize = 20; }
$__mleAjaxOffset = ($__mleAjaxPage - 1) * $__mleAjaxPageSize;
$__mleAjaxAdminModes = array('admin_audit', 'learning_diagnostics');
$__mleAjaxLotteryModes = array('visual_comparison', 'saved_history', 'scored_evidence', 'batch_history', 'older_batches');
if ($__mleAjaxMode !== '') {
    if (in_array($__mleAjaxMode, $__mleAjaxAdminModes, true) && !$__mleIsCoreAdmin) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', true); } catch (\Throwable $__mleAjaxHdrEx) { }
        echo 'Access denied for this request mode.';
        exit;
    }
    if (in_array($__mleAjaxMode, $__mleAjaxLotteryModes, true) && $__mleAjaxLotteryId <= 0) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', true); } catch (\Throwable $__mleAjaxHdrEx2) { }
        echo 'A valid lottery id is required for this request mode.';
        exit;
    }
    if (in_array($__mleAjaxMode, $__mleAjaxLotteryModes, true) && $__mleAjaxLotteryId > 0) {
        $__mleAjaxOwnerOk = false;
        try {
            $__mleOwnerQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('COUNT(*)')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$__mleAjaxLotteryId)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($__mleOwnerQ);
            $__mleAjaxOwnerOk = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $__mleOwnerEx) {
            $__mleAjaxOwnerOk = false;
        }
        if (!$__mleAjaxOwnerOk) {
            try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8', true); } catch (\Throwable $__mleAjaxHdrEx3) { }
            echo 'The requested lottery is not available for your account.';
            exit;
        }
        unset($__mleOwnerQ, $__mleAjaxOwnerOk, $__mleOwnerEx);
    }
}
$GLOBALS['mle_phase60_ajax_mode'] = $__mleAjaxMode;
$GLOBALS['mle_phase60_ajax_page'] = $__mleAjaxPage;
$GLOBALS['mle_phase60_ajax_page_size'] = $__mleAjaxPageSize;
$GLOBALS['mle_phase60_ajax_offset'] = $__mleAjaxOffset;
$GLOBALS['mle_phase60_ajax_lottery_id'] = $__mleAjaxLotteryId;

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertWorkNoticePath')) {
    function mylottoexpertWorkNoticePath()
    {
        return JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR . '/logs/mylottoexpert_work_notice.json';
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertWorkNoticeDefaultState')) {
    function mylottoexpertWorkNoticeDefaultState()
    {
        return array(
            'enabled' => 0,
            'message' => 'We are currently improving the MyLottoExpert workspace. You may notice some sections changing, refreshing, or being adjusted while we complete updates. Your saved predictions, results, and history remain intact.',
            'updated_at' => '',
            'updated_by' => 0
        );
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertWorkNoticeRead')) {
    function mylottoexpertWorkNoticeRead()
    {
        $state = mylottoexpertWorkNoticeDefaultState();
        $path = mylottoexpertWorkNoticePath();
        if (is_file($path)) {
            $raw = (string)@file_get_contents($path);
            $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
            if (is_array($decoded)) {
                $state = array_merge($state, $decoded);
            }
        }
        $state['enabled'] = !empty($state['enabled']) ? 1 : 0;
        $state['message'] = trim((string)($state['message'] ?? ''));
        if ($state['message'] === '') {
            $state['message'] = mylottoexpertWorkNoticeDefaultState()['message'];
        }
        return $state;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertWorkNoticeWrite')) {
    function mylottoexpertWorkNoticeWrite(array $state)
    {
        $path = mylottoexpertWorkNoticePath();
        $dir = dirname($path);
        if (!is_dir($dir)) {
            @mkdir($dir, 0755, true);
        }
        $payload = json_encode($state, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        if ($payload === false) {
            return false;
        }
        return @file_put_contents($path, $payload, LOCK_EX) !== false;
    }
}

$__mleWorkNoticeIsAdmin = (!$user->guest && $user->authorise('core.admin'));
$__mleWorkNoticeState = mylottoexpertWorkNoticeRead();
$__mleWorkNoticeAction = '';
if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) === 'POST') {
    $__mleWorkNoticeAction = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('mle_work_notice_action', '')));
}

if ($__mleWorkNoticeAction !== '') {
    if (!$__mleWorkNoticeIsAdmin) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('You are not authorized to change the MyLottoExpert work notice.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        exit;
    }

    $msg = trim((string)$app->input->post->get('mle_work_notice_message', '', 'RAW'));
    $msg = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]+/', ' ', $msg);
    $msg = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $msg);
    $msg = substr($msg, 0, 500);
    if ($msg === '') {
        $msg = mylottoexpertWorkNoticeDefaultState()['message'];
    }

    if ($__mleWorkNoticeAction === 'enable') {
        $__mleWorkNoticeState['enabled'] = 1;
        $__mleWorkNoticeState['message'] = $msg;
    } elseif ($__mleWorkNoticeAction === 'disable') {
        $__mleWorkNoticeState['enabled'] = 0;
        $__mleWorkNoticeState['message'] = $msg;
    }
    $__mleWorkNoticeState['updated_at'] = gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $__mleWorkNoticeState['updated_by'] = (int)$user->id;

    if (mylottoexpertWorkNoticeWrite($__mleWorkNoticeState)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage($__mleWorkNoticeAction === 'enable' ? 'MyLottoExpert work notice is ON.' : 'MyLottoExpert work notice is OFF.', 'message');
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('MyLottoExpert work notice could not be saved. Check administrator/logs folder permissions.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    exit;
}

if (!empty($__mleWorkNoticeState['enabled'])) {
    echo '<div class="mle-work-notice-banner" role="status" aria-live="polite">';
    echo '<strong>MyLottoExpert workspace update in progress</strong>';
    echo '<span>' . htmlspecialchars((string)$__mleWorkNoticeState['message'], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
    echo '</div>';
}

if ($__mleWorkNoticeIsAdmin && $__mleAdminToolsRequested) {
    echo '<details class="mle-work-notice-admin">';
    echo '<summary>Admin Only - MyLottoExpert Work Notice</summary>';
    echo '<p>This notice is informational only. It does not disable MyLottoExpert buttons, predictions, saved runs, review tools, or SKAI bridge actions.</p>';

    echo '<label for="mle-work-notice-message"><strong>User notice message</strong></label>';

    echo '<div class="mle-work-notice-actions">';
    echo '<button type="submit" name="mle_work_notice_action" value="enable" class="mle-work-notice-on">Turn Notice ON</button>';
    echo '<button type="submit" name="mle_work_notice_action" value="disable" class="mle-work-notice-off">Turn Notice OFF</button>';
    echo '<span class="mle-work-notice-status">Status: ' . (!empty($__mleWorkNoticeState['enabled']) ? 'ON' : 'OFF') . '</span>';
    if (!empty($__mleWorkNoticeState['updated_at'])) {
        echo '<span class="mle-work-notice-status">Updated: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$__mleWorkNoticeState['updated_at'], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . ' UTC</span>';
    }
    echo '</div>';
    echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
    echo '</form>';
    echo '</details>';
} elseif ($__mleWorkNoticeIsAdmin) {
    $__mleWorkNoticeAdminUri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
    $__mleWorkNoticeAdminUri->setVar('mle_work_notice_admin', '1');
    echo '<div class="mle-work-notice-admin-link"><a href="' . htmlspecialchars($__mleWorkNoticeAdminUri->toString(), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '">Manage MyLottoExpert work notice</a></div>';
}

$__mleForceMaintenance = ((int)$app->input->getInt('mle_maintenance', 0) === 1);
$__mleAllowMaintenance = (!$user->guest && $user->authorise('core.admin') && $__mleForceMaintenance);

$__mleRequestAction = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->getString('mle_action', '')));
if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) === 'POST') {
    $__mleRequestActionPost = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('mle_action', '')));
    if ($__mleRequestActionPost !== '') { $__mleRequestAction = $__mleRequestActionPost; }
}
$__mleIsActionRequest = ($__mleRequestAction !== '');

$__mlePerformanceProfile = null;

if ($__mleAllowMaintenance) {

    mylottoexpertEnsureUserSavedNumbersPlayColumns($db);
    try { mylottoexpertBackfillHeatmapPlayRows($db, $workspaceUserId); } catch (\Throwable $_mleHeatmapBackfillE) {   }

    try {
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV122EnsureHiveContractColumns')) {
            mylottoexpertV122EnsureHiveContractColumns($db, $user);
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $_mleV122SchemaEx) {
        error_log('[MLE V122] Hive contract schema bootstrap failed: ' . $_mleV122SchemaEx->getMessage());
    }
    try { mylottoexpertBackfillAnalysisMethodIdentity($db); } catch (\Throwable $_mleMethodBackfillE) {   }

    mylottoexpertEnsureWheelFavoritesTable($db);

    if (empty($_SESSION['_mle_wf_purged'])) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "DELETE FROM " . $db->quoteName($db->getPrefix() . 'user_wheeling_preferences')
              . " WHERE " . $db->quoteName('system_id') . " = " . $db->quote('')
              . "    OR " . $db->quoteName('system_id') . " = " . $db->quote('0')
            );
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $_mleCleanE) {   }
        $_SESSION['_mle_wf_purged'] = 1;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertGetUserPref($db, $userId, $key, $default = '1') {
    $userId = (int) $userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return (string) $default;
    }

    $query = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select($db->quoteName('profile_value'))
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
        ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.' . $key))
        ->order($db->quoteName('ordering') . ' ASC')
        ->setLimit(1);

    $db->setQuery($query);
    $val = $db->loadResult();

    if ($val === null || $val === '') {
        return $default;
    }

    $decoded = json_decode($val, true);
    if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
        return (string) ($decoded ?? $default);
    }

    return (string) $val;
}
function mylottoexpertSetUserPref($db, $userId, $key, $value) {
    $userId = (int) $userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return false;
    }

    $value = (string) $value;

    $query = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select('COUNT(*)')
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
        ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.' . $key));

    $db->setQuery($query);
    $exists = (int) $db->loadResult() > 0;

    if ($exists) {
        $query = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('profile_value') . ' = ' . $db->quote(json_encode($value)))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.' . $key));
    } else {
        $columns = ['user_id','profile_key','profile_value','ordering'];
        $values  = [
            $userId,
            $db->quote('mylotto.' . $key),
            $db->quote(json_encode($value)),
            0
        ];
        $query = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
            ->columns(array_map([$db,'quoteName'], $columns))
            ->values(implode(',', $values));
    }

    $db->setQuery($query);
    $db->execute();

    return true;
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList')) {
    function mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($value)
    {
        if (is_string($value)) {
            $decoded = json_decode($value, true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                $value = $decoded;
            } else {
                $value = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $value);
            }
        }
        $out = array();
        foreach ((array)$value as $v) {
            $id = (int)$v;
            if ($id > 0) { $out[$id] = $id; }
        }
        ksort($out);
        return array_values($out);
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds')) {
    function mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId)
    {
        $raw = mylottoexpertGetUserPref($db, (int)$userId, 'hidden_lottery_ids', '[]');
        return mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($raw);
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds')) {
    function mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId, array $ids)
    {
        return mylottoexpertSetUserPref($db, (int)$userId, 'hidden_lottery_ids', json_encode(mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($ids)));
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin')) {
    function mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin()
    {
        try {
            $u = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
            return (!$u->guest && $u->authorise('core.admin'));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertWatchedLotteryLimit')) {
    function mylottoexpertWatchedLotteryLimit()
    {
        return mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin() ? 0 : 12;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertLotteryBucketActivityStamp')) {
    function mylottoexpertLotteryBucketActivityStamp(array $bucket)
    {
        $latest = 0;
        foreach ((array)($bucket['rows'] ?? array()) as $row) {
            foreach (array('generated_at','date_saved','next_draw_date','target_draw_date') as $k) {
                $v = '';
                if (is_array($row) && isset($row[$k])) { $v = (string)$row[$k]; }
                elseif (is_object($row) && isset($row->$k)) { $v = (string)$row->$k; }
                if ($v !== '') {
                    $ts = strtotime($v);
                    if ($ts !== false && $ts > $latest) { $latest = $ts; }
                }
            }
        }
        return $latest;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertApplyWorkspaceLotteryVisibility')) {
    function mylottoexpertApplyWorkspaceLotteryVisibility($db, $userId, array $lotteries)
    {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        $hiddenIds = mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId);
        $hiddenMap = array();
        foreach ($hiddenIds as $id) { $hiddenMap[(int)$id] = true; }

        $visible = array();
        $manualHidden = array();
        foreach ($lotteries as $lid => $bucket) {
            $lid = (int)$lid;
            if ($lid <= 0) { continue; }
            if (!empty($hiddenMap[$lid])) {
                $manualHidden[$lid] = $bucket;
                continue;
            }
            $visible[$lid] = $bucket;
        }

        uasort($visible, function($a, $b) {
            $at = mylottoexpertLotteryBucketActivityStamp((array)$a);
            $bt = mylottoexpertLotteryBucketActivityStamp((array)$b);
            if ($bt === $at) { return strcmp((string)($a['lottery_name'] ?? ''), (string)($b['lottery_name'] ?? '')); }
            return ($bt > $at) ? 1 : -1;
        });

        $limit = mylottoexpertWatchedLotteryLimit();
        $capped = array();
        if ($limit > 0 && count($visible) > $limit) {
            $kept = array();
            $i = 0;
            foreach ($visible as $lid => $bucket) {
                if ($i < $limit) { $kept[$lid] = $bucket; }
                else { $capped[$lid] = $bucket; }
                $i++;
            }
            $visible = $kept;
        }

        $GLOBALS['mle_workspace_lottery_visibility'] = array(
            'limit' => (int)$limit,
            'is_admin' => mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin() ? 1 : 0,
            'visible_count' => count($visible),
            'manual_hidden_count' => count($manualHidden),
            'auto_capped_count' => count($capped),
            'total_before_filters' => count($lotteries),
            'manual_hidden_ids' => array_keys($manualHidden),
            'auto_capped_ids' => array_keys($capped)
        );

        return $visible;
    }
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertAdminResearchWorkspaceExcluded')) {
    function mylottoexpertAdminResearchWorkspaceExcluded($app)
    {
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin') || !mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin()) { return false; }
        try {
            $in = $app->input;
            if ((int)$in->getInt('mle_full_workspace', 0) === 1) { return false; }
            if ((int)$in->getInt('mle_show_admin_research', 0) === 1) { return false; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        return true;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertIsAdminResearchSavedRow')) {
    function mylottoexpertIsAdminResearchSavedRow(array $row)
    {
        foreach (array('hive_assignment_id','hive_queue_id') as $key) {
            if (isset($row[$key]) && (int)$row[$key] > 0) { return true; }
        }
        foreach (array('hive_research_type','hive_setting_key','hive_settings_fingerprint') as $key) {
            if (trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
        }
        $markers = array('admin_client_research','global_hive_research_batch','global_hive_research_scheduler','global_research','global_starting_prior','v150_admin_sweep');
        foreach (array('skai_run_mode','focus_profile','origin_source','source_batch_type','batch_type','analysis_track_label') as $key) {
            $value = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')));
            if ($value === '') { continue; }
            foreach ($markers as $marker) {
                if (strpos($value, $marker) !== false) { return true; }
            }
        }
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings') as $jsonKey) {
            $raw = strtolower((string)($row[$jsonKey] ?? ''));
            if ($raw === '') { continue; }
            foreach ($markers as $marker) {
                if (strpos($raw, $marker) !== false) { return true; }
            }
            if (strpos($raw, '_mle_research_type') !== false || strpos($raw, '_mle_global_learning_objective') !== false || strpos($raw, '_mle_research_index') !== false) { return true; }
        }
        return false;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertPhase52LoadAdminResearchSummary')) {
    function mylottoexpertPhase52LoadAdminResearchSummary($db, $user, $limit = 8)
    {
        $out = array('ok'=>false,'total'=>0,'queued'=>0,'running'=>0,'saved'=>0,'failed'=>0,'recent'=>array());
        try {
            if (!is_object($user) || (int)$user->id <= 0 || !method_exists($user, 'authorise') || !$user->authorise('core.admin')) { return $out; }
            if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe') || !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments')) { return $out; }
            if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_lottery_research_queue')) { return $out; }
            $uid = (int)$user->id;
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $uid);
            $out['total'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('queued') . ') AS status_key, COUNT(*) AS c FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $uid . ' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('queued') . ')');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $row) {
                $k = strtolower(trim((string)($row['status_key'] ?? 'queued')));
                $c = (int)($row['c'] ?? 0);
                if (in_array($k, array('queued','assigned','retry'), true)) { $out['queued'] += $c; }
                elseif ($k === 'running') { $out['running'] += $c; }
                elseif (in_array($k, array('saved','completed'), true)) { $out['saved'] += $c; }
                elseif ($k === 'failed') { $out['failed'] += $c; }
            }
            $limit = max(1, min(12, (int)$limit));
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array('q.campaign_uuid','q.campaign_label','q.lottery_id','q.game_id','q.target_draw_date','COUNT(a.id) AS assignment_count','SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status IN (' . $db->quote('saved') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved_count','SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('failed') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count','MAX(COALESCE(a.runner_saved_at,a.runner_started_at,a.assigned_at)) AS last_activity'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
                ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
                ->where('a.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $uid)
                ->group('q.campaign_uuid,q.campaign_label,q.lottery_id,q.game_id,q.target_draw_date')
                ->order('last_activity DESC')
                ->setLimit($limit);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) { $out['recent'] = $rows; }
            $out['ok'] = true;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['ok'] = false; }
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildPerformanceProfile')) {
    function mylottoexpertBuildPerformanceProfile($app)
    {
        $isAdmin = mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin() ? 1 : 0;
        $fullRequested = false;
        try {
            $fullRequested = ((int)$app->input->getInt('mle_full_workspace', 0) === 1);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $fullRequested = false;
        }
        $fullWorkspace = ($isAdmin && $fullRequested) ? 1 : 0;

        return array(
            'is_admin' => $isAdmin,
            'full_workspace' => $fullWorkspace,
            'performance_mode' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 1,
            'saved_prediction_limit' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 600,
            'play_set_limit' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 300,
            'draw_results_per_lottery' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 12,
            'batch_history_limit' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 15,
            'admin_audit_limit' => $fullWorkspace ? 0 : 0
        );
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertApplyQueryLimit')) {
    function mylottoexpertApplyQueryLimit($query, $limit)
    {
        $limit = (int)$limit;
        if ($limit > 0 && is_object($query) && method_exists($query, 'setLimit')) {
            $query->setLimit($limit);
        }
        return $query;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($value)
{
    if ($value === null || $value === '') {
        return '';
    }

    $value = round((float)$value, 1);

    if (abs($value - round($value)) < 0.05) {
        return (string)((int)round($value));
    }

    return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($value, 1, '.', ''), '0'), '.');
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($value)
{
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
    return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
}

function mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($value)
{
    if ($value === null || $value === '') {
        return null;
    }

    $value = (float)$value;
    if ($value > 0.0 && $value < 1.0) {
        $value = $value * 100.0;
    }
    if ($value < 0.0) {
        $value = 0.0;
    }
    if ($value > 100.0) {
        $value = 100.0;
    }

    return $value;
}

function mylottoexpertResolveBlendStrategyLabel($strategyKey, $ai)
{
    $canonicalMap = array(
        'skip pattern boost' => 'Skip Pattern Boost',
        'skip pattern'       => 'Skip Pattern Boost',
        'skip forward'       => 'Skip Pattern Boost',
        'skip heavy'         => 'Skip Pattern Boost',
        'skip boost'         => 'Skip Pattern Boost',
        'balanced mix'       => 'Balanced Mix',
        'balanced'           => 'Balanced Mix',
        'ai forward'         => 'AI-Forward',
        'ai heavy'           => 'AI-Forward',
        'ai forward blend'   => 'AI-Forward'
    );

    if ($strategyKey !== '' && isset($canonicalMap[$strategyKey])) {
        return $canonicalMap[$strategyKey];
    }

    if ($ai !== null) {
        if ($ai >= 70) {
            return 'AI-Forward';
        }
        if ($ai <= 30) {
            return 'Skip Pattern Boost';
        }
        return 'Balanced Mix';
    }

    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertResolveBlendExplanation($strategyLabel)
{
    if ($strategyLabel === 'AI-Forward') {
        return 'stronger model influence with lighter skip weighting.';
    }
    if ($strategyLabel === 'Balanced Mix') {
        return 'A steady AI / pattern blend.';
    }
    if ($strategyLabel === 'Skip Pattern Boost') {
        return 'Heavier weight on overdue and long-pattern behavior.';
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($value)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') {
        return '';
    }
    $value = str_replace(array('_', '-'), ' ', $value);
    return ucwords($value);
}

function mylottoexpertBuildSimpleBlendLabel(array $blendInfo)
{

    $aiRaw = $blendInfo['ai'] ?? null;
    $strategy = trim((string)($blendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? ''));

    if ($aiRaw !== null) {
        $aiValue = (float)$aiRaw;
        $aiText  = mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($aiValue);
        return $aiText . '%';
    }

    if ($strategy === 'AI-Forward') {
        return 'AI-Forward';
    }
    if ($strategy === 'Skip Pattern Boost') {
        return 'Skip Pattern Boost';
    }
    if ($strategy === 'Balanced Mix') {
        return 'Balanced Mix';
    }

    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($row, $settings)
{
    $skip = null;
    $ai   = null;

    if (is_array($settings)) {
        $settingsPairs = array(

            array('signal_blend_skip_pct', 'signal_blend_ai_pct'),
            array('core_ai_skip_pct', 'core_ai_ai_pct'),
            array('skai_blend_skip_pct', 'skai_blend_ai_pct'),
            array('blend_skip_pct', 'blend_ai_pct'),
            array('skip_pct', 'ai_pct')
        );

        foreach ($settingsPairs as $pair) {
            if ($skip === null && array_key_exists($pair[0], $settings) && $settings[$pair[0]] !== '' && $settings[$pair[0]] !== null) {
                $skip = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($settings[$pair[0]]);
            }
            if ($ai === null && array_key_exists($pair[1], $settings) && $settings[$pair[1]] !== '' && $settings[$pair[1]] !== null) {
                $ai = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($settings[$pair[1]]);
            }
        }
    }

    if ($skip === null) {
        foreach (array('signal_blend_skip_pct', 'core_ai_skip_pct', 'skai_blend_skip_pct', 'blend_skip_pct', 'skip_pct') as $rowKey) {
            $rowSkip = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $rowKey);
            if ($rowSkip !== null && $rowSkip !== '') {
                $skip = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($rowSkip);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    if ($ai === null) {
        foreach (array('signal_blend_ai_pct', 'core_ai_ai_pct', 'skai_blend_ai_pct', 'blend_ai_pct', 'ai_pct') as $rowKey) {
            $rowAi = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $rowKey);
            if ($rowAi !== null && $rowAi !== '') {
                $ai = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($rowAi);
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    $strategyKey = '';
    if (is_array($settings)) {
        if (!empty($settings['strategy'])) {
            $strategyKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($settings['strategy']);
        } elseif (!empty($settings['signal_blend_label'])) {
            $strategyKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($settings['signal_blend_label']);
        } elseif (!empty($settings['blend'])) {
            $strategyKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($settings['blend']);
        }
    }

    if ($strategyKey === '') {
        $rowStrategy = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'strategy');
        $rowBlend = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'blend');
        if ($rowStrategy !== null && $rowStrategy !== '') {
            $strategyKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($rowStrategy);
        } elseif ($rowBlend !== null && $rowBlend !== '') {
            $strategyKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeBlendKey($rowBlend);
        }
    }

    if ($skip === null && $ai === null && $strategyKey !== '') {
        $presetMap = array(
            'skip pattern boost' => array(75.0, 25.0),
            'skip pattern'       => array(75.0, 25.0),
            'skip forward'       => array(75.0, 25.0),
            'skip heavy'         => array(75.0, 25.0),
            'skip boost'         => array(75.0, 25.0),
            'balanced mix'       => array(45.0, 55.0),
            'balanced'           => array(45.0, 55.0),
            'ai forward'         => array(25.0, 75.0),
            'ai heavy'           => array(25.0, 75.0),
            'ai forward blend'   => array(25.0, 75.0)
        );
        if (isset($presetMap[$strategyKey])) {
            $skip = $presetMap[$strategyKey][0];
            $ai   = $presetMap[$strategyKey][1];
        }
    }

    if ($skip === null && $ai !== null) {
        $derivedSkip = 100.0 - (float)$ai;
        if ($derivedSkip >= 0 && $derivedSkip <= 100) {
            $skip = $derivedSkip;
        }
    }
    if ($ai === null && $skip !== null) {
        $derivedAi = 100.0 - (float)$skip;
        if ($derivedAi >= 0 && $derivedAi <= 100) {
            $ai = $derivedAi;
        }
    }

    $strategyLabel = mylottoexpertResolveBlendStrategyLabel($strategyKey, $ai);
    $aiText = mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($ai);
    $primary = '';
    if ($aiText !== '') {
        $primary = $aiText . '%';
    } elseif ($strategyLabel !== '') {
        $primary = $strategyLabel;
    }
    $technical = '';
    if ($ai !== null) {
        $technical = mylottoexpertFormatPrecisePercent($ai) . '%';
    }

    return array(
        'skip' => $skip,
        'ai' => $ai,
        'strategy_key' => $strategyKey,
        'strategy_label' => $strategyLabel,
        'explanation' => mylottoexpertResolveBlendExplanation($strategyLabel),
        'primary' => $primary,
        'technical' => $technical
    );
}

function mylottoexpertResolveBlendPair($row, $settings)
{
    $blendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($row, $settings);
    return array($blendInfo['skip'], $blendInfo['ai']);
}

function mylottoexpertBuildSkaiBlendLabel($row)
{
    $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row);
    $blendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($row, $settings);
    return (string)$blendInfo['primary'];
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($value)
{
    $value = (string)$value;
    $value = strtolower(trim($value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
    $value = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
    return $value;
}

function mylottoexpertIsEuroMillionsLottery($stateName, $gameName)
{
    $stateKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($stateName);
    $gameKey  = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($gameName);
    $comboKey = trim($stateKey . ' ' . $gameKey);

    return ($gameKey === 'euromillions'
        || $gameKey === 'euro millions'
        || $comboKey === 'euromillions'
        || $comboKey === 'euro millions'
        || $stateKey === 'euromillions'
        || $stateKey === 'euro millions');
}

function mylottoexpertBuildEuroMillionsLogoPath($gameName)
{
    $gameName = (string)$gameName;
    $candidates = array(
        '/images/lottodb/us/uk/euromillions.png',
        '/images/lottodb/us/UK/euromillions.png'
    );

    foreach ($candidates as $rel) {
        if ($rel !== '' && is_file(JPATH_ROOT . $rel)) {
            return array(
                'path'   => $rel,
                'exists' => true,
                'alt'    => ($gameName !== '' ? $gameName : 'EuroMillions') . ' logo'
            );
        }
    }

    return array(
        'path'   => $candidates[0],
        'exists' => false,
        'alt'    => ($gameName !== '' ? $gameName : 'EuroMillions') . ' logo'
    );
}

function mylottoexpertIsMillionaireForLifeLottery($lotteryName, $gameId = '', $stateName = '')
{
    $lotteryKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($lotteryName);
    $gameKey    = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($gameId);
    $stateKey   = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($stateName);
    $combo      = trim($lotteryKey . ' ' . $gameKey . ' ' . $stateKey);

    return (
        strpos(' ' . $combo . ' ', ' millionaire for life ') !== false
        || strpos(' ' . $combo . ' ', ' millionaire 4 life ') !== false
        || strpos(' ' . $combo . ' ', ' millionaire4life ') !== false
        || $lotteryKey === 'mfl'
        || $gameKey === 'mfl'
    );
}

function mylottoexpertIsKnownMultiStateLottery($lotteryName, $gameId = '', $stateName = '')
{
    $lotteryKey = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($lotteryName);
    $gameKey    = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($gameId);
    $stateKey   = mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryKey($stateName);
    $combo      = trim($lotteryKey . ' ' . $gameKey . ' ' . $stateKey);
    $haystack   = ' ' . $combo . ' ';

    $multiStatePhrases = array(
        ' powerball ',
        ' mega millions ',
        ' megamillions ',
        ' lotto america ',
        ' millionaire for life ',
        ' millionaire 4 life ',
        ' millionaire4life '
    );

    foreach ($multiStatePhrases as $phrase) {
        if (strpos($haystack, $phrase) !== false) {
            return true;
        }
    }

    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta($stateName, $countryName, $lotteryName, $gameId = '')
{
    $stateName   = trim((string)$stateName);
    $countryName = trim((string)$countryName);
    $lotteryName = trim((string)$lotteryName);
    $gameId      = trim((string)$gameId);

    if (mylottoexpertIsEuroMillionsLottery($stateName, $lotteryName)) {
        $countryName = 'Multi-Country';
        $stateName   = '';
    } elseif (mylottoexpertIsKnownMultiStateLottery($lotteryName, $gameId, $stateName)
        || mylottoexpertIsMillionaireForLifeLottery($lotteryName, $gameId, $stateName)) {
        if ($countryName === '') {
            $countryName = 'United States';
        }
        $stateName = 'Multi-State';
    }

    return array(
        'state'   => $stateName,
        'country' => $countryName,
        'lottery' => $lotteryName,
        'game_id' => $gameId
    );
}

function mylottoexpertBuildLotteryLocationParts($stateName, $countryName, $lotteryName = '', $gameId = '')
{
    $meta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta($stateName, $countryName, $lotteryName, $gameId);
    $parts = array();

    if ($meta['country'] !== '') {
        $parts[] = (string)$meta['country'];
    }
    if ($meta['state'] !== '' && strtolower((string)$meta['state']) !== 'lottery') {
        $parts[] = (string)$meta['state'];
    }
    if ($meta['lottery'] !== '') {
        $parts[] = (string)$meta['lottery'];
    }

    return $parts;
}

function mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine($stateName, $countryName, $lotteryName = '', $gameId = '', $separator = ' | ')
{
    $parts = mylottoexpertBuildLotteryLocationParts($stateName, $countryName, $lotteryName, $gameId);
    return implode((string)$separator, $parts);
}

function mylottoexpertIsValidSavedLabel($label)
{
    $label = trim((string)$label);
    if ($label === '') {
        return false;
    }

    return !in_array(strtolower($label), array('default', 'n/a', 'na', '-', '--', 'null'), true);
}

function mylottoexpertFormatPrecisePercent($value)
{
    if ($value === null || $value === '') {
        return '';
    }
    return number_format((float)$value, 2, '.', '');
}

function mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $key)
{
    if (is_array($row)) {
        return array_key_exists($key, $row) ? $row[$key] : null;
    }
    if (is_object($row)) {
        return isset($row->$key) ? $row->$key : null;
    }
    return null;
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession($value)
{
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', '_', $value);
    return trim((string)$value, '_');
}

function mylottoexpertBuildPredictionTarget(array $args)
{
    $timezoneId  = trim((string)($args['timezone_id'] ?? 'America/New_York'));
    $gameId      = trim((string)($args['game_id'] ?? ''));
    $lotteryId   = (int)($args['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $drawDate    = trim((string)($args['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    $drawAtRaw   = trim((string)($args['draw_at'] ?? ''));
    $drawSession = mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession($args['draw_session'] ?? '');
    $family      = strtolower(trim((string)($args['prediction_family'] ?? 'regular')));
    $type        = strtolower(trim((string)($args['prediction_type'] ?? $family)));
    $pickSize    = (int)($args['pick_size'] ?? 0);
    $extraCount  = (int)($args['extra_count'] ?? 0);

    $drawAtSql = null;
    if ($drawAtRaw !== '') {
        try {
            $drawAtSql = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date($drawAtRaw, $timezoneId))->toSql();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $drawAtSql = null;
        }
    }

    $keyLottery = $lotteryId > 0 ? (string)$lotteryId : '0';
    $keyType    = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '-', ($type !== '' ? $type : 'regular'));
    $keyDate    = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', ($drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : 'undated'));
    $keySession = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '-', ($drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : 'unspecified'));
    $canonicalKey = strtolower(trim($keyLottery . '-' . $keyType . '-' . $keyDate . '-' . $keySession, '-'));
    if ($canonicalKey === '') {
        $canonicalKey = '0-regular-undated-unspecified';
    }
    $targetId = 'ptg_' . substr(hash('sha256', $canonicalKey), 0, 40);

    return array(
        'prediction_target_id'     => $targetId,
        'prediction_target_key'    => $canonicalKey,
        'prediction_target_json'   => json_encode(array(
            'prediction_target_id' => $targetId,
            'canonical_key'        => $canonicalKey,
            'game_id'              => $gameId !== '' ? $gameId : null,
            'lottery_id'           => $lotteryId > 0 ? $lotteryId : null,
            'draw_date'            => $drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : null,
            'draw_at'              => $drawAtSql,
            'draw_session'         => $drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : null,
            'timezone_id'          => $timezoneId !== '' ? $timezoneId : null,
            'prediction_family'    => $family !== '' ? $family : null,
            'prediction_type'      => $type !== '' ? $type : null,
            'pick_size'            => $pickSize > 0 ? $pickSize : null,
            'extra_count'          => $extraCount >= 0 ? $extraCount : 0,
        ), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
        'target_game_id'           => $gameId !== '' ? $gameId : null,
        'target_lottery_id'        => $lotteryId > 0 ? $lotteryId : null,
        'target_draw_date'         => $drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : null,
        'target_draw_at'           => $drawAtSql,
        'target_draw_session'      => $drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : null,
        'target_timezone_id'       => $timezoneId !== '' ? $timezoneId : null,
        'target_prediction_family' => $family !== '' ? $family : null,
        'target_prediction_type'   => $type !== '' ? $type : null,
        'target_pick_size'         => $pickSize > 0 ? $pickSize : null,
        'target_extra_count'       => $extraCount >= 0 ? $extraCount : 0,
    );
}

function mylottoexpertResolvePredictionTargetMeta($row)
{
    $predictionTargetId = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'prediction_target_id') ?? ''));
    $predictionTargetKey = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'prediction_target_key') ?? ''));
    $targetGameId = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_game_id') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'game_id') ?? ''));
    $targetLotteryId = (int)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_lottery_id') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'lottery_id') ?? 0);
    $targetDrawDate = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_draw_date') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'next_draw_date') ?? ''));

    if ($targetDrawDate !== '' && strncmp($targetDrawDate, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) {
        $targetDrawDate = '';
    }
    if ($targetDrawDate !== '') {
        $ts = strtotime($targetDrawDate);
        if ($ts !== false && $ts > 0) {
            $targetDrawDate = date('Y-m-d', $ts);
        } else {

            $targetDrawDate = '';
        }
    }
    $targetDrawAt = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_draw_at') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'next_draw_at') ?? ''));
    $targetDrawSession = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_draw_session') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'draw_session') ?? ''));
    $targetDrawSession = mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession($targetDrawSession);
    $targetTimezoneId = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_timezone_id') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'timezone_id') ?? 'America/New_York'));
    $targetPredictionFamily = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_prediction_family') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'prediction_family') ?? 'regular'));
    $targetPredictionType = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_prediction_type') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'prediction_type') ?? $targetPredictionFamily));
    $targetPickSize = (int)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_pick_size') ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'daily_pick_size') ?? 0);
    $targetExtraCount = (int)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'target_extra_count') ?? 0);

    if ($predictionTargetId === '' || $predictionTargetKey === '') {
        $fallbackTarget = mylottoexpertBuildPredictionTarget(array(
            'game_id'           => $targetGameId,
            'lottery_id'        => $targetLotteryId,
            'draw_date'         => $targetDrawDate,
            'draw_at'           => $targetDrawAt,
            'draw_session'      => $targetDrawSession,
            'timezone_id'       => $targetTimezoneId,
            'prediction_family' => $targetPredictionFamily !== '' ? $targetPredictionFamily : 'regular',
            'prediction_type'   => $targetPredictionType !== '' ? $targetPredictionType : ($targetPredictionFamily !== '' ? $targetPredictionFamily : 'regular'),
            'pick_size'         => $targetPickSize,
            'extra_count'       => $targetExtraCount,
        ));
        if ($predictionTargetId === '') {
            $predictionTargetId = (string)($fallbackTarget['prediction_target_id'] ?? '');
        }
        if ($predictionTargetKey === '') {
            $predictionTargetKey = (string)($fallbackTarget['prediction_target_key'] ?? '');
        }
    }

    return array(
        'prediction_target_id'     => $predictionTargetId,
        'prediction_target_key'    => $predictionTargetKey,
        'target_game_id'           => $targetGameId,
        'target_lottery_id'        => $targetLotteryId,
        'target_draw_date'         => $targetDrawDate,
        'target_draw_at'           => $targetDrawAt,
        'target_draw_session'      => $targetDrawSession,
        'target_timezone_id'       => $targetTimezoneId,
        'target_prediction_family' => $targetPredictionFamily,
        'target_prediction_type'   => $targetPredictionType,
        'target_pick_size'         => $targetPickSize,
        'target_extra_count'       => $targetExtraCount,
    );
}

function mleResolveSavedRowGameIdentity($db, array $row)
{
    static $__mleIdentityByGame = array();
    static $__mleIdentityByLottery = array();
    static $__mleLotCols = null;

    $resolveRowName = function(array $__r) {
        foreach (array('lottery_name','lottery','name','game_name','title') as $__k) {
            if (array_key_exists($__k, $__r)) {
                $__v = trim((string)$__r[$__k]);
                if ($__v !== '') { return $__v; }
            }
        }
        return '';
    };

    $resolveColumns = function() use ($db, &$__mleLotCols) {
        if ($__mleLotCols !== null) { return $__mleLotCols; }
        $__cols = function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe') ? mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries') : array();
        $__mleLotCols = is_array($__cols) ? $__cols : array();
        return $__mleLotCols;
    };

    $buildIdentity = function(array $__lotteryRow) use ($resolveRowName) {
        $__lotteryId = 0;
        if (isset($__lotteryRow['lottery_id']) && (int)$__lotteryRow['lottery_id'] > 0) {
            $__lotteryId = (int)$__lotteryRow['lottery_id'];
        } elseif (isset($__lotteryRow['id']) && (int)$__lotteryRow['id'] > 0) {
            $__lotteryId = (int)$__lotteryRow['id'];
        }
        $__gameId = trim((string)($__lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $__lotteryName = trim((string)($__lotteryRow['lottery_name'] ?? $__lotteryRow['name'] ?? ''));
        if ($__lotteryName === '') { $__lotteryName = $resolveRowName($__lotteryRow); }

        return array(
            'effective_game_id' => $__gameId,
            'effective_lottery_id' => $__lotteryId,
            'display_lottery_name' => $__lotteryName,
            'display_state_name' => trim((string)($__lotteryRow['state_name'] ?? $__lotteryRow['mle_state_name'] ?? '')),
            'display_country_name' => trim((string)($__lotteryRow['country_name'] ?? $__lotteryRow['mle_country_name'] ?? '')),
            'is_resolved' => ($__lotteryId > 0 || $__gameId !== '')
        );
    };

    $lookupByGameId = function($gameId) use ($db, $resolveColumns, $buildIdentity) {
        $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
        if ($gameId === '') { return array(); }
        $__cols = $resolveColumns();
        if (empty($__cols) || !in_array('game_id', $__cols, true)) { return array(); }

        $__lotteryIdCol = in_array('lottery_id', $__cols, true) ? 'lottery_id' : (in_array('id', $__cols, true) ? 'id' : '');
        $__nameCol = in_array('name', $__cols, true) ? 'name' : (in_array('lottery_name', $__cols, true) ? 'lottery_name' : '');
        $__hasStateId = in_array('state_id', $__cols, true);
        if ($__lotteryIdCol === '') { return array(); }

        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array(
                    'l.' . $db->quoteName($__lotteryIdCol, 'lottery_id'),
                    'l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id'),
                    $__nameCol !== '' ? ('l.' . $db->quoteName($__nameCol, 'lottery_name')) : $db->quote('', 'lottery_name'),
                    $__hasStateId ? ('s.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'state_name')) : $db->quote('', 'state_name'),
                    $__hasStateId ? ('c.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'country_name')) : $db->quote('', 'country_name')
                ))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'));
            if ($__hasStateId) {
                $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'))
                  ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON s.' . $db->quoteName('country_id') . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName('country_id'));
            }
            $q->where('TRIM(COALESCE(l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
              ->order('l.' . $db->quoteName($__lotteryIdCol) . ' ASC');

            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            return is_array($row) ? $buildIdentity($row) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return array();
        }
    };

    $lookupByLotteryId = function($lotteryId) use ($db, $resolveColumns, $buildIdentity) {
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        if ($lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
        $__cols = $resolveColumns();
        if (empty($__cols)) { return array(); }

        $__hasLotteryId = in_array('lottery_id', $__cols, true);
        $__hasId = in_array('id', $__cols, true);
        if (!$__hasLotteryId && !$__hasId) { return array(); }

        $__nameCol = in_array('name', $__cols, true) ? 'name' : (in_array('lottery_name', $__cols, true) ? 'lottery_name' : '');
        $__hasStateId = in_array('state_id', $__cols, true);

        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array(
                    $__hasLotteryId ? 'l.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id', 'lottery_id') : 'l.' . $db->quoteName('id', 'lottery_id'),
                    in_array('game_id', $__cols, true) ? 'l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') : $db->quote('', 'game_id'),
                    $__nameCol !== '' ? ('l.' . $db->quoteName($__nameCol, 'lottery_name')) : $db->quote('', 'lottery_name'),
                    $__hasStateId ? ('s.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'state_name')) : $db->quote('', 'state_name'),
                    $__hasStateId ? ('c.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'country_name')) : $db->quote('', 'country_name')
                ))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'));
            if ($__hasStateId) {
                $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'))
                  ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON s.' . $db->quoteName('country_id') . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName('country_id'));
            }

            $__where = array();
            if ($__hasLotteryId) { $__where[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId; }
            if ($__hasId) { $__where[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId; }
            $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $__where) . ')');

            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            return is_array($row) ? $buildIdentity($row) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return array();
        }
    };

    $targetGameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
    $savedGameId = trim((string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''));
    $joinedGameId = trim((string)($row['mle_lottery_game_id'] ?? ''));
    $targetLotteryId = (int)($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $lotteryId = (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0);

    $effectiveGameId = '';
    foreach (array($targetGameId, $savedGameId, $joinedGameId) as $__gid) {
        $__gid = trim((string)$__gid);
        if ($__gid !== '') { $effectiveGameId = $__gid; break; }
    }

    $effectiveLotteryId = 0;
    foreach (array($targetLotteryId, $lotteryId) as $__lid) {
        $__lid = (int)$__lid;
        if ($__lid > 0) { $effectiveLotteryId = $__lid; break; }
    }

    $identity = array(
        'effective_game_id' => $effectiveGameId,
        'effective_lottery_id' => $effectiveLotteryId,
        'display_lottery_name' => trim((string)($row['lottery_name'] ?? '')),
        'display_state_name' => trim((string)($row['mle_state_name'] ?? '')),
        'display_country_name' => trim((string)($row['mle_country_name'] ?? '')),
        'is_resolved' => ($effectiveLotteryId > 0 || $effectiveGameId !== '')
    );

    if ($identity['effective_game_id'] !== '') {
        $__gidKeyPrime = strtolower($identity['effective_game_id']);
        if (!array_key_exists($__gidKeyPrime, $__mleIdentityByGame)) {
            $__mleIdentityByGame[$__gidKeyPrime] = $lookupByGameId($identity['effective_game_id']);
        }
        $__gameIdentityPrime = $__mleIdentityByGame[$__gidKeyPrime];
        if (!empty($__gameIdentityPrime)) {
            if ((int)($__gameIdentityPrime['effective_lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) {
                $identity['effective_lottery_id'] = (int)$__gameIdentityPrime['effective_lottery_id'];
                $effectiveLotteryId = (int)$identity['effective_lottery_id'];
            }
            if ((string)($__gameIdentityPrime['effective_game_id'] ?? '') !== '') {
                $identity['effective_game_id'] = (string)$__gameIdentityPrime['effective_game_id'];
                $effectiveGameId = (string)$identity['effective_game_id'];
            }
            if ((string)($__gameIdentityPrime['display_lottery_name'] ?? '') !== '') { $identity['display_lottery_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentityPrime['display_lottery_name']; }
            if ((string)($__gameIdentityPrime['display_state_name'] ?? '') !== '') { $identity['display_state_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentityPrime['display_state_name']; }
            if ((string)($__gameIdentityPrime['display_country_name'] ?? '') !== '') { $identity['display_country_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentityPrime['display_country_name']; }
        }
    }

    if ($effectiveLotteryId > 0) {
        if (!array_key_exists($effectiveLotteryId, $__mleIdentityByLottery)) {
            $__mleIdentityByLottery[$effectiveLotteryId] = $lookupByLotteryId($effectiveLotteryId);
        }
        $__lotIdentity = $__mleIdentityByLottery[$effectiveLotteryId];
        if (!empty($__lotIdentity)) {
            if ($identity['effective_lottery_id'] <= 0) { $identity['effective_lottery_id'] = (int)$__lotIdentity['effective_lottery_id']; }
            if ($identity['effective_game_id'] === '') { $identity['effective_game_id'] = (string)$__lotIdentity['effective_game_id']; }
            if ($identity['display_lottery_name'] === '') { $identity['display_lottery_name'] = (string)$__lotIdentity['display_lottery_name']; }
            if ($identity['display_state_name'] === '') { $identity['display_state_name'] = (string)$__lotIdentity['display_state_name']; }
            if ($identity['display_country_name'] === '') { $identity['display_country_name'] = (string)$__lotIdentity['display_country_name']; }
        }
    }

    if ($identity['effective_game_id'] !== '') {
        $__gidKey = strtolower($identity['effective_game_id']);
        if (!array_key_exists($__gidKey, $__mleIdentityByGame)) {
            $__mleIdentityByGame[$__gidKey] = $lookupByGameId($identity['effective_game_id']);
        }
        $__gameIdentity = $__mleIdentityByGame[$__gidKey];
        if (!empty($__gameIdentity)) {
            if ($identity['effective_lottery_id'] <= 0) { $identity['effective_lottery_id'] = (int)$__gameIdentity['effective_lottery_id']; }
            if ($identity['display_lottery_name'] === '') { $identity['display_lottery_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentity['display_lottery_name']; }
            if ($identity['display_state_name'] === '') { $identity['display_state_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentity['display_state_name']; }
            if ($identity['display_country_name'] === '') { $identity['display_country_name'] = (string)$__gameIdentity['display_country_name']; }
        }
    }

    if ($identity['display_lottery_name'] === '' && $identity['effective_lottery_id'] > 0) {
        $identity['display_lottery_name'] = 'Lottery ID ' . (int)$identity['effective_lottery_id'];
    }

    $identity['is_resolved'] = ((int)$identity['effective_lottery_id'] > 0) || trim((string)$identity['effective_game_id']) !== '';
    return $identity;
}

function mylottoexpertResolveRunLineageMeta($row)
{
    $rowId = (int)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'id') ?? 0);
    $runUuid = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'run_uuid') ?? ''));
    $snapshotRunUuid = trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'snapshot_run_uuid') ?? ''));

    $runUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', $runUuid);
    $snapshotRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', $snapshotRunUuid);

    $effectiveRunUuid = $runUuid !== '' ? $runUuid : $snapshotRunUuid;
    $identityKey = '';
    if ($effectiveRunUuid !== '') {
        $identityKey = 'runuuid:' . strtolower($effectiveRunUuid);
    } elseif ($rowId > 0) {
        $identityKey = 'rowid:' . $rowId;
    }

    return array(
        'row_id'             => $rowId,
        'run_uuid'           => $runUuid,
        'snapshot_run_uuid'  => $snapshotRunUuid,
        'effective_run_uuid' => $effectiveRunUuid,
        'run_identity_key'   => $identityKey,
    );
}

function mylottoexpertGenerateRunUuid()
{
    try {
        return sprintf(
            '%04x%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x%04x%04x',
            random_int(0, 0xffff), random_int(0, 0xffff), random_int(0, 0xffff),
            random_int(0, 0x0fff) | 0x4000, random_int(0, 0x3fff) | 0x8000,
            random_int(0, 0xffff), random_int(0, 0xffff), random_int(0, 0xffff)
        );
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return uniqid('mle_run_', true);
    }
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureUserSavedNumbersPlayColumns($db)
{
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';

        'save_intent'       => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `save_intent` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source`",

        'strategy_profile'               => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `strategy_profile` VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'focus_profile'                  => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `focus_profile` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'signal_blend_ai_pct'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `signal_blend_ai_pct` DECIMAL(5,2) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'signal_blend_skip_pct'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `signal_blend_skip_pct` DECIMAL(5,2) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'signal_blend_label'             => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `signal_blend_label` VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'prediction_target_id'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_target_id` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'prediction_target_key'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_target_key` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'prediction_target_json'         => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_target_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'target_game_id'                 => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'target_lottery_id'              => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_lottery_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
        'target_draw_date'               => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL",
        'target_draw_at'                 => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL",
        'target_draw_session'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_session` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'target_timezone_id'             => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_timezone_id` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'target_prediction_family'       => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_prediction_family` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'target_prediction_type'         => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_prediction_type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'target_pick_size'               => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_pick_size` INT(11) DEFAULT NULL",
        'target_extra_count'             => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_extra_count` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",

        'prediction_uid'                 => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_uid` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'comparison_group_key'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `comparison_group_key` VARCHAR(160) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'evaluation_status'              => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evaluation_status` VARCHAR(24) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'",
        'actual_draw_date'               => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `actual_draw_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL",
        'actual_main_numbers'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `actual_main_numbers` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'actual_extra_numbers'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `actual_extra_numbers` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'main_hits_count'                => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `main_hits_count` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
        'extra_hits_count'               => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `extra_hits_count` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
        'learning_score'                 => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `learning_score` DECIMAL(14,8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
        'evaluation_json'                => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evaluation_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'evaluated_at'                   => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evaluated_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL",

        'analysis_method_key'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_method_key` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'analysis_engine_label'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_engine_label` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'analysis_track_label'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_track_label` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'analysis_source_page'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_source_page` VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'analysis_schema_version'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_schema_version` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1'"
    );

    foreach ($requiredCols as $colName => $alterSql) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
              . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
              . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
              . "   AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote($colName)
            );
            if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (Exception $e) {
        }
    }

    $requiredIndexes = array(
        'idx_mle_core_ai_batch_uuid' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_core_ai_batch_uuid` (`batch_uuid`)",
        'idx_mle_core_ai_batch_user' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_core_ai_batch_user` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`batch_uuid`)",
        'idx_mle_core_ai_model_family' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_core_ai_model_family` (`model_family`,`origin_source`)",
        'idx_mle_core_ai_target_draw' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_core_ai_target_draw` (`target_game_id`,`target_draw_date`)",
        'idx_mle_mcmc_prediction_uid' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_mcmc_prediction_uid` (`prediction_uid`)",
        'idx_mle_mcmc_compare_group' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_mcmc_compare_group` (`comparison_group_key`)",
        'idx_mle_mcmc_method_target' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_mcmc_method_target` (`analysis_method_key`,`target_game_id`,`target_draw_date`)"
    );
    foreach ($requiredIndexes as $indexName => $alterSql) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS"
              . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
              . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
              . "   AND INDEX_NAME = " . $db->quote($indexName)
            );
            if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (Exception $e) {
        }
    }

    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertBackfillAnalysisMethodIdentity($db, $limit = 600)
{
    $limit = max(50, min(1000, (int)$limit));
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $savedTable = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
    try {
        $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($savedTable));
        $cols = $db->loadColumn();
        $cols = is_array($cols) ? array_flip($cols) : array();
        if (!isset($cols['analysis_method_key'])) { return false; }
        $selectCols = array('id','source','analysis_method_key');
        foreach (array('analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','analysis_source_page','origin_source','model_family','batch_type','settings_json','settings','label','template_name','skai_run_mode','risk_profile','strategy_profile','focus_profile','signal_blend_label') as $c) {
            if (isset($cols[$c]) && !in_array($c, $selectCols, true)) { $selectCols[] = $c; }
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $selectCols))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)')
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit($limit);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return true; }
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) : mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? '');
            $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method));
            if ($method === '' || $method === 'unknown') { continue; }
            $labels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method) : array('', '');
            $sets = array(
                $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote($method),
                $db->quoteName('analysis_schema_version') . ' = ' . $db->quote('1')
            );
            if (isset($cols['analysis_engine_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' IS NULL THEN ' . $db->quote((string)$labels[0]) . ' ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' END'; }
            if (isset($cols['analysis_track_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' IS NULL THEN ' . $db->quote((string)$labels[1]) . ' ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' END'; }
            $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->set($sets)
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id'])
                ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)');
            $db->setQuery($q2);
            $db->execute();
        }
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertBackfillPerformanceAnalysisMethodIdentity($db, $limit = 1000)
{
    $limit = max(50, min(2000, (int)$limit));
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $perfTable = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
    try {
        $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($perfTable));
        $cols = $db->loadColumn();
        $cols = is_array($cols) ? array_flip($cols) : array();
        if (!isset($cols['analysis_method_key'])) { return false; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array($db->quoteName('id'), $db->quoteName('source'), $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key')))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
            ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)')
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit($limit);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return true; }
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $src = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
