            if (in_array($src, array('ai_prediction','ai','neural_ai','neural'), true)) {
                $method = 'skai';
            } else {
                $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? '') : '';
                $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method) : $method;
            }
            if ($method === '' || $method === 'unknown') { continue; }
            $labels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method) : array('', '');
            $sets = array($db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote($method));
            if (isset($cols['analysis_engine_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$labels[0]); }
            if (isset($cols['analysis_track_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$labels[1]); }
            $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->update($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
                ->set($sets)
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id'])
                ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)');
            $db->setQuery($q2);
            $db->execute();
        }
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureWheelFavoritesTable($db)
{
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_wheeling_preferences';

    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
        );
        $tableExists = (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }

    if (!$tableExists) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$rawName}` ("
              . "  `id`               INT          NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,"
              . "  `user_id`          INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . "  `system_id`        VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
              . "  `created_at`       DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,"
              . "  `date_saved`       DATETIME         NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
              . "  `source`           VARCHAR(32)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'json_catalog',"
              . "  `status`           VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',"
              . "  `last_verified_at` DATETIME         NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
              . "  `notes`            TEXT             NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
              . "  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),"
              . "  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_system` (`user_id`, `system_id`),"
              . "  KEY `idx_user_id`   (`user_id`),"
              . "  KEY `idx_system_id` (`system_id`)"
              . ") ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
            );
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    }

    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT"
          . "  FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
        );
        $colMeta = $db->loadAssocList('COLUMN_NAME');
        if (!is_array($colMeta)) {
            $colMeta = array();
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $colMeta = array();
    }

    $coreColsToAdd = array(
        'user_id'    => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `user_id`    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
        'system_id'  => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `system_id`  VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
        'created_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `created_at` DATETIME     NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP",
        'date_saved' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `date_saved` DATETIME         NULL DEFAULT NULL",
    );
    foreach ($coreColsToAdd as $colName => $alterSql) {
        if (!isset($colMeta[$colName])) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
                $colMeta[$colName] = true;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            }
        }
    }

    if (isset($colMeta['system_id'])) {
        $sysIdType = strtolower(trim(is_array($colMeta['system_id']) ? ($colMeta['system_id']['DATA_TYPE'] ?? '') : ''));
        $numericTypes = array('int', 'tinyint', 'smallint', 'mediumint', 'bigint', 'integer');
        if (in_array($sysIdType, $numericTypes, true)) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery(
                    "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` MODIFY COLUMN `system_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''"
                );
                $db->execute();

                $colMeta['system_id'] = true;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            }
        }
    }

    $legacyDefaults = array(
        'pick_size'         => array('sql' => "MODIFY COLUMN `pick_size`         INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",         'type' => 'int'),
        'number_range'      => array('sql' => "MODIFY COLUMN `number_range`      INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",         'type' => 'int'),
        'assurance_level'   => array('sql' => "MODIFY COLUMN `assurance_level`   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",       'type' => 'varchar'),
        'numbers_to_wheel'  => array('sql' => "MODIFY COLUMN `numbers_to_wheel`  TEXT             NULL DEFAULT NULL",     'type' => 'text'),
        'pool_numbers_json' => array('sql' => "MODIFY COLUMN `pool_numbers_json` LONGTEXT         NULL DEFAULT NULL",     'type' => 'longtext'),
    );
    foreach ($legacyDefaults as $colName => $info) {
        if (!isset($colMeta[$colName])) {
            continue;
        }

        if (!is_array($colMeta[$colName])) {
            continue;
        }
        $isNullable    = strtoupper(trim($colMeta[$colName]['IS_NULLABLE'] ?? 'YES'));
        $colDefault    = $colMeta[$colName]['COLUMN_DEFAULT'];
        if ($isNullable === 'NO' && $colDefault === null) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` " . $info['sql']);
                $db->execute();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            }
        }
    }

    $optionalCols = array(
        'source'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source`           VARCHAR(32)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'json_catalog'",
        'status'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `status`           VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'",
        'last_verified_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `last_verified_at` DATETIME         NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'notes'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `notes`            TEXT             NULL DEFAULT NULL",
    );
    foreach ($optionalCols as $colName => $alterSql) {
        if (!isset($colMeta[$colName])) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
                $colMeta[$colName] = true;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            }
        }
    }

    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT INDEX_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
          . "   AND NON_UNIQUE = 1"
        );
        $existingIndexes = $db->loadColumn();
        $existingIndexes = is_array($existingIndexes) ? array_flip($existingIndexes) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $existingIndexes = array();
    }
    if (!isset($existingIndexes['idx_user_id']) && isset($colMeta['user_id'])) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_user_id` (`user_id`)");
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        }
    }
    if (!isset($existingIndexes['idx_system_id']) && isset($colMeta['system_id'])) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_system_id` (`system_id`)");
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        }
    }

    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
          . "   AND INDEX_NAME = 'uq_user_system'"
        );
        $uniqueExists = (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $uniqueExists = true;
    }

    if (!$uniqueExists) {

        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "DELETE d FROM `{$rawName}` d"
              . " INNER JOIN ("
              . "   SELECT MAX(id) AS keep_id, user_id, system_id"
              . "   FROM `{$rawName}`"
              . "   GROUP BY user_id, system_id"
              . "   HAVING COUNT(*) > 1"
              . " ) AS dupes"
              . " ON  d.user_id   = dupes.user_id"
              . " AND d.system_id = dupes.system_id"
              . " AND d.id        < dupes.keep_id"
            );
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {

            return true;
        }
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_system` (`user_id`, `system_id`)"
            );
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        }
    }

    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertGetWheelPrefCols($db)
{
    static $cache = null;
    if ($cache !== null) {
        return $cache;
    }
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_wheeling_preferences';
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
        );
        $cols  = $db->loadColumn();
        $cache = is_array($cols) ? array_flip($cols) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $cache = array();
    }
    return $cache;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromJson()
{
    static $__wfCatalogCache = null;
    if ($__wfCatalogCache !== null) {
        return $__wfCatalogCache;
    }
    $path = JPATH_ROOT . '/media/lottoexpert/wheels/wheels-index.json';
    if (!is_file($path)) {
        $__wfCatalogCache = array();
        return $__wfCatalogCache;
    }
    $raw = @file_get_contents($path);
    if ($raw === false || trim($raw) === '') {
        $__wfCatalogCache = array();
        return $__wfCatalogCache;
    }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE || !is_array($decoded)) {
        $__wfCatalogCache = array();
        return $__wfCatalogCache;
    }
    $items = isset($decoded['items']) && is_array($decoded['items']) ? $decoded['items'] : array();
    $catalog = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        if (!is_array($item)) {
            continue;
        }
        $normalized = mylottoexpertNormalizeWheelCatalogItem($item);
        if ($normalized === null) {
            continue;
        }
        $catalog[$normalized['system_id']] = $normalized;
    }
    $__wfCatalogCache = $catalog;
    return $__wfCatalogCache;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromDb($db)
{
    try {
        $prefix    = $db->getPrefix();
        $tableName = $prefix . 'wheeling_systems';
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($tableName)
        );
        if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) {
            return array();
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('system_id, pick_size, number_range, assurance, games')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__wheeling_systems'));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) {
            return array();
        }
        $catalog = array();
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $sid = trim((string)($row['system_id'] ?? ''));
            if ($sid === '') {
                continue;
            }
            $pickSize    = (int)($row['pick_size']    ?? 0);
            $numberRange = (int)($row['number_range'] ?? 0);
            if ($pickSize <= 0 || $numberRange <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            $catalog[$sid] = array(
                'system_id'    => $sid,
                'pick_size'    => $pickSize,
                'number_range' => $numberRange,
                'assurance'    => trim((string)($row['assurance'] ?? '')),
                'games'        => (int)($row['games'] ?? 0),
            );
        }
        return $catalog;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertLoadEffectiveCatalog($db)
{
    $catalog = mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromJson();
    if (empty($catalog)) {
        $catalog = mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromDb($db);
        return $catalog;
    }

    $dbCatalog = mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromDb($db);
    foreach ($dbCatalog as $sid => $item) {
        if (!isset($catalog[$sid])) {
            $catalog[$sid] = $item;
        }
    }
    return $catalog;
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeWheelCatalogItem($item)
{
    if (!is_array($item)) {
        return null;
    }

    $systemId = '';
    if (isset($item['system_id']) && (string)$item['system_id'] !== '') {
        $systemId = (string)$item['system_id'];
    } elseif (isset($item['id']) && (string)$item['id'] !== '') {
        $systemId = (string)$item['id'];
    }
    $systemId = trim($systemId);
    if ($systemId === '') {
        return null;
    }

    $pickSize = 0;
    if (isset($item['pickSize'])) {
        $pickSize = (int)$item['pickSize'];
    } elseif (isset($item['pick_size'])) {
        $pickSize = (int)$item['pick_size'];
    }
    if ($pickSize <= 0) {
        return null;
    }

    $numberRange = 0;
    if (isset($item['numberRange'])) {
        $numberRange = (int)$item['numberRange'];
    } elseif (isset($item['requiredSelections'])) {
        $numberRange = (int)$item['requiredSelections'];
    } elseif (isset($item['number_range'])) {
        $numberRange = (int)$item['number_range'];
    }
    if ($numberRange <= 0) {
        return null;
    }

    $assurance = '';
    if (isset($item['assurance']) && trim((string)$item['assurance']) !== '') {
        $assurance = trim((string)$item['assurance']);
    } elseif (isset($item['assuranceText']) && trim((string)$item['assuranceText']) !== '') {
        $assurance = trim((string)$item['assuranceText']);
    } elseif (isset($item['assurance_text']) && trim((string)$item['assurance_text']) !== '') {
        $assurance = trim((string)$item['assurance_text']);
    }

    $games = 0;
    if (isset($item['games'])) {
        $games = (int)$item['games'];
    } elseif (isset($item['combinationsCount'])) {
        $games = (int)$item['combinationsCount'];
    } elseif (isset($item['combinations_count'])) {
        $games = (int)$item['combinations_count'];
    }

    return array(
        'system_id'    => $systemId,
        'pick_size'    => $pickSize,
        'number_range' => $numberRange,
        'assurance'    => $assurance,
        'games'        => $games,
    );
}

function mylottoexpertSanitizeWheelSystemId($value)
{
    $sanitized = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_.\-]/', '', trim((string)$value));

    if (strpos($sanitized, '..') !== false || strlen($sanitized) > 191) {
        return '';
    }
    return $sanitized;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $userId)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return array();
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('system_id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_wheeling_preferences'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadColumn();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertLoadHydratedWheelFavorites($db, $userId)
{
    $ids     = mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $userId);

    $catalog = mylottoexpertLoadEffectiveCatalog($db);

    $catalogLoaded = !empty($catalog);
    $available = array();
    $missing   = array();
    foreach ($ids as $sid) {
        $sid = (string)$sid;
        if (isset($catalog[$sid])) {
            $available[] = $catalog[$sid];
        } elseif ($catalogLoaded) {
            $missing[] = $sid;
        }
    }
    return array(
        'available'      => $available,
        'missing'        => $missing,
        'ids'            => $ids,
        'catalog_loaded' => $catalogLoaded,
    );
}

function mylottoexpertRenderWheelFavoriteCard($item, $csrfField, $endpointUrl)
{
    $sid        = htmlspecialchars($item['system_id'],    ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $sidRaw     = $item['system_id'];
    $pickSize   = (int)$item['pick_size'];
    $numRange   = (int)$item['number_range'];
    $assurance  = $item['assurance'] !== '' ? htmlspecialchars($item['assurance'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : 'Not specified';
    $games      = (int)$item['games'];
    $builderUrl = htmlspecialchars('/wheel-builder1?system_id=' . rawurlencode($sidRaw), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $endUrl     = htmlspecialchars($endpointUrl, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

    return '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-card">'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-meta">'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-id">System ' . $sid . '</div>'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-detail"><strong>Pick:</strong> ' . $pickSize . '</div>'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-detail"><strong>Numbers to Play:</strong> ' . $numRange . '</div>'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-detail"><strong>Assurance:</strong> ' . $assurance . '</div>'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-detail"><strong>Lines/Games:</strong> ' . ($games > 0 ? $games : 'N/A') . '</div>'
        . '</div>'
        . '<div class="mle-wheel-fav-actions">'
        . '<a href="' . $builderUrl . '" class="mle-wheel-fav-btn mle-wheel-fav-btn--open" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open in Wheel Builder</a>'
        . '<form method="post" action="' . $endUrl . '" style="display:inline">'
        . '<input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="remove_wheel_favorite">'
        . '<input type="hidden" name="system_id" value="' . $sid . '">'
        . $csrfField
        . '<button type="submit" class="mle-wheel-fav-btn mle-wheel-fav-btn--remove">Remove Favorite</button>'
        . '</form>'
        . '</div>'
        . '</div>';
}

function mylottoexpertJsonResponse($payload)
{
    $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
    $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);
    echo json_encode($payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    exit;
}

function mylottoexpertEnsurePrintManifestTable($db)
{
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'mle_prediction_print_manifest';
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$rawName}` ("
          . " `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,"
          . " `user_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
          . " `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
          . " `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `target_draw_label` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `batch_uuid` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `prediction_target_id` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `prediction_target_key` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `analysis_method_key` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `manifest_hash` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
          . " `row_ids_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
          . " `run_uuids_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
          . " `manifest_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
          . " `printed_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,"
          . " `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,"
          . " PRIMARY KEY (`id`),"
          . " KEY `idx_mle_print_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`printed_at`),"
          . " KEY `idx_mle_print_game` (`game_id`),"
          . " KEY `idx_mle_print_batch` (`batch_uuid`),"
          . " KEY `idx_mle_print_target` (`prediction_target_id`),"
          . " KEY `idx_mle_print_hash` (`manifest_hash`)"
          . ") ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
        );
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizePrintManifestIdList($value)
{
    $out = array();
    if (is_string($value) && trim($value) !== '') {
        $decoded = json_decode($value, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
            $value = $decoded;
        }
    }
    if (is_array($value)) {
        foreach ($value as $v) {
            $v = trim((string)$v);
            if ($v !== '' && !in_array($v, $out, true)) {
                $out[] = $v;
            }
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($csv, $allowZero = false)
{
    $csv = (string)$csv;

    if ($csv !== '' && $csv[0] === '[') {
        $j = json_decode($csv, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($j)) {
            $csv = implode(',', $j);
        }
    }
    $raw = array_filter(explode(',', $csv), 'strlen');
    $out = array();
    foreach ($raw as $part) {
        $n = (int)trim((string)$part);
        if ($allowZero ? ($n < 0) : ($n <= 0)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!in_array($n, $out, true)) {
            $out[] = $n;
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($value, $allowZero = false)
{
    $out = array();
    if (is_string($value)) {
        $trimmed = trim($value);
        if ($trimmed !== '' && ($trimmed[0] === '[' || $trimmed[0] === '{')) {
            $decoded = json_decode($trimmed, true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                $value = $decoded;
            }
        }
    }
    if (is_array($value)) {
        foreach ($value as $k => $v) {
            if (is_array($v)) {
                foreach (mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($v, $allowZero) as $nestedNum) {
                    if (!in_array($nestedNum, $out, true)) { $out[] = $nestedNum; }
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (is_object($v)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (is_string($v) && strpos($v, ',') !== false) {
                foreach (mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($v, $allowZero) as $csvNum) {
                    if (!in_array($csvNum, $out, true)) { $out[] = $csvNum; }
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (is_string($v) && preg_match('/^\d+(?:\s+\d+)+$/', trim($v))) {
                foreach (preg_split('/\s+/', trim($v)) as $spaceNum) {
                    $n = (int)$spaceNum;
                    if (($allowZero ? $n >= 0 : $n > 0) && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (is_numeric($v)) {
                $n = (int)$v;
                if (($allowZero ? $n >= 0 : $n > 0) && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
            }
        }
        return $out;
    }
    if (is_string($value) && trim($value) !== '') {
        return mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($value, $allowZero);
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($gameId)
{
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $empty = array(
        'has_config' => false,
        'is_daily' => false,
        'main_min' => 1,
        'main_max' => 0,
        'extra_min' => 1,
        'extra_max' => 0,
        'has_extra' => false,
        'extra_count' => 0,
        'pick_size' => 0
    );
    if ($gameId === '' || !function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
        return $empty;
    }
    $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($gameId);
    $cfg = isset($spec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($spec['lotteryConfig']) ? $spec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
    if (empty($cfg)) {
        return $empty;
    }
    $isDaily = !empty($cfg['is_daily']);
    $mainMax = (int)($cfg['max_main_ball_number'] ?? 0);
    $extraMax = (int)($cfg['max_extra_ball_number'] ?? 0);
    $pickSize = (int)($cfg['pick_size'] ?? $cfg['daily_pick_size'] ?? $cfg['num_main_balls_drawn'] ?? 0);
    $extraCols = array();
    if (!empty($cfg['extra_ball_columns']) && is_array($cfg['extra_ball_columns'])) {
        foreach ($cfg['extra_ball_columns'] as $ec) {
            $ec = trim((string)$ec);
            if ($ec !== '' && !in_array($ec, $extraCols, true)) { $extraCols[] = $ec; }
        }
    }
    foreach (array('extra_ball_column','extra_ball_column_2') as $k) {
        if (!empty($cfg[$k])) {
            $ec = trim((string)$cfg[$k]);
            if ($ec !== '' && !in_array($ec, $extraCols, true)) { $extraCols[] = $ec; }
        }
    }
    $extraCount = max(count($extraCols), (int)($cfg['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? 0));
    if (!$isDaily && empty($extraCols)) {
        $extraCount = 0;
    }
    return array(
        'has_config' => true,
        'is_daily' => $isDaily,
        'main_min' => $isDaily ? 0 : 1,
        'main_max' => $mainMax,
        'extra_min' => $isDaily ? 0 : 1,
        'extra_max' => $extraMax,
        'has_extra' => $extraCount > 0,
        'extra_count' => $extraCount,
        'pick_size' => $pickSize
    );
}

function mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange(array $numbers, array $guard, $kind)
{
    $kind = strtolower(trim((string)$kind));
    $min = ($kind === 'extra') ? (int)$guard['extra_min'] : (int)$guard['main_min'];
    $max = ($kind === 'extra') ? (int)$guard['extra_max'] : (int)$guard['main_max'];
    $out = array();
    $bad = array();
    foreach ($numbers as $v) {
        if ($v === '' || $v === null || is_array($v) || is_object($v)) { continue; }
        $n = (int)$v;
        if ($max > 0 && $n >= $min && $n <= $max) {
            if (!in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
        } else {
            if (!in_array($n, $bad, true)) { $bad[] = $n; }
        }
    }
    return array('valid' => $out, 'invalid' => $bad);
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeJsonNumberFieldForGameRange($value, array $guard, $kind)
{
    $numbers = mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($value, true);
    return mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($numbers, $guard, $kind);
}

function mylottoexpertScrubSavedPredictionRowToGameRange($row, $gameId)
{
    if (!is_object($row)) { return $row; }
    $guard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($gameId);
    if (empty($guard['has_config']) || (int)$guard['main_max'] <= 0) {
        return $row;
    }

    $row->__mle_range_guard_applied = 1;
    $row->__mle_range_invalid = 0;
    $row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers = array();

    $mainCheck = mylottoexpertNormalizeJsonNumberFieldForGameRange((string)($row->main_numbers ?? ''), $guard, 'main');
    if (!empty($mainCheck['invalid'])) {
        $row->__mle_range_invalid = 1;
        $row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers = array_merge((array)$row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers, $mainCheck['invalid']);
        $row->__mle_original_main_numbers = (string)($row->main_numbers ?? '');
        $row->main_numbers = implode(',', $mainCheck['valid']);
    }

    foreach (array('regular_main_numbers_json','ranked_main_numbers_json','main_display_json','canonical_main_display') as $field) {
        if (isset($row->$field) && $row->$field !== '' && $row->$field !== null) {
            $chk = mylottoexpertNormalizeJsonNumberFieldForGameRange($row->$field, $guard, 'main');
            if (!empty($chk['invalid'])) {
                $row->__mle_range_invalid = 1;
                $row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers = array_merge((array)$row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers, $chk['invalid']);
                if ($field === 'canonical_main_display') {
                    $row->$field = implode(',', $chk['valid']);
                } else {
                    $row->$field = json_encode(array_values($chk['valid']), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if (empty($guard['has_extra'])) {
        if (!empty($row->extra_ball_numbers)) {
            $row->__mle_range_invalid = 1;
            $row->__mle_original_extra_ball_numbers = (string)$row->extra_ball_numbers;
            $row->extra_ball_numbers = '';
        }
        foreach (array('regular_extra_numbers_json','ranked_extra_numbers_json','extra_display_json','canonical_extra_display') as $field) {
            if (isset($row->$field) && $row->$field !== '' && $row->$field !== null) {
                $row->$field = ($field === 'canonical_extra_display') ? '' : json_encode(array(), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            }
        }
    } elseif ((int)$guard['extra_max'] > 0) {
        $extraCheck = mylottoexpertNormalizeJsonNumberFieldForGameRange((string)($row->extra_ball_numbers ?? ''), $guard, 'extra');
        if (!empty($extraCheck['invalid'])) {
            $row->__mle_range_invalid = 1;
            $row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers = array_merge((array)$row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers, $extraCheck['invalid']);
            $row->__mle_original_extra_ball_numbers = (string)($row->extra_ball_numbers ?? '');
            $row->extra_ball_numbers = implode(',', $extraCheck['valid']);
        }
    }

    if (!empty($row->__mle_range_invalid)) {
        $row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)$row->__mle_range_invalid_numbers)));
        $row->__mle_range_invalid_reason = 'Saved prediction contains numbers outside the configured range for ' . $gameId . '. The invalid values were removed from normal display.';
        $row->__method_key = 'unknown';
        $row->source = 'unknown';
        $row->label = 'Range mismatch review required' . (!empty($row->label) ? ' - ' . (string)$row->label : '');
    }
    return $row;
}

function mylottoexpertResolveRowGameIdForRangeGuard($row)
{
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id','mle_lottery_game_id') as $key) {
        $value = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $key);
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value !== '') { return $value; }
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertScrubSavedPredictionArrayToGameRange(array $row, $gameId)
{
    $obj = (object)$row;
    $obj = mylottoexpertScrubSavedPredictionRowToGameRange($obj, $gameId);
    return (array)$obj;
}

function mylottoexpertApplyRegularViewRangeGuard(array $result, $row)
{
    $gameId = mylottoexpertResolveRowGameIdForRangeGuard($row);
    if ($gameId === '') {
        $result['range_guard_applied'] = false;
        $result['range_invalid'] = false;
        $result['range_invalid_numbers'] = array();
        return $result;
    }
    $guard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($gameId);
    if (empty($guard['has_config']) || (int)$guard['main_max'] <= 0) {
        $result['range_guard_applied'] = false;
        $result['range_invalid'] = false;
        $result['range_invalid_numbers'] = array();
        return $result;
    }
    $mainCheck = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange((array)($result['main'] ?? array()), $guard, 'main');
    if (!empty($guard['has_extra'])) {
        $extraCheck = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange((array)($result['extra'] ?? array()), $guard, 'extra');
    } else {
        $extraCheck = array('valid' => array(), 'invalid' => array_values((array)($result['extra'] ?? array())));
    }
    $result['main'] = array_values($mainCheck['valid']);
    $result['extra'] = array_values($extraCheck['valid']);
    $result['main_count'] = count($result['main']);
    $result['extra_count'] = count($result['extra']);
    $result['range_guard_applied'] = true;
    $result['range_invalid'] = (!empty($mainCheck['invalid']) || !empty($extraCheck['invalid']));
    $result['range_invalid_numbers'] = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', array_merge((array)$mainCheck['invalid'], (array)$extraCheck['invalid']))));
    $result['range_guard_game_id'] = $gameId;
    return $result;
}

function mylottoexpertFilterActualPartsForGameRange($gameId, array $main, array $extra)
{
    $guard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($gameId);
    if (empty($guard['has_config']) || (int)$guard['main_max'] <= 0) {
        return array('main' => array_values(array_map('intval', $main)), 'extra' => array_values(array_map('intval', $extra)), 'range_invalid' => false, 'invalid' => array());
    }
    $mainCheck = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($main, $guard, 'main');
    if (!empty($guard['has_extra'])) {
        $extraCheck = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($extra, $guard, 'extra');
    } else {
        $extraCheck = array('valid' => array(), 'invalid' => array_values($extra));
    }
    return array(
        'main' => array_values($mainCheck['valid']),
        'extra' => array_values($extraCheck['valid']),
        'range_invalid' => (!empty($mainCheck['invalid']) || !empty($extraCheck['invalid'])),
        'invalid' => array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', array_merge((array)$mainCheck['invalid'], (array)$extraCheck['invalid']))))
    );
}

function mylottoexpertValueFromArrayPath(array $data, array $path)
{
    $cur = $data;
    foreach ($path as $part) {
        if (!is_array($cur) || !array_key_exists($part, $cur)) {
            return null;
        }
        $cur = $cur[$part];
    }
    return $cur;
}

function mylottoexpertFindRankedMainCandidatesFromPayload(array $payload, array $settings, array $fallbackMain)
{
    $paths = array(
        array('ranked_main_numbers'),
        array('main_ranked_numbers'),
        array('ranked_numbers'),
        array('predicted_ranking'),
        array('predicted_ranking_main'),
        array('predicted_main_ranking'),
        array('top20_numbers'),
        array('top_20_numbers'),
        array('top_20_main_numbers'),
        array('top_numbers'),
        array('top_n_numbers'),
        array('skai_top_numbers'),
        array('skai_top_n_numbers'),
        array('main_candidates'),
        array('candidate_numbers'),
        array('main_pool'),
        array('pool_numbers'),
        array('numbers_pool'),
        array('regular_main_numbers'),
        array('regular_main_numbers_json'),
        array('main_display'),
        array('main_display_json'),
        array('display', 'main'),
        array('display', 'main_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'ranked_main_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'ranked_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'top20_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'top_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'main_candidates'),
        array('prediction', 'main_pool'),
        array('skai', 'ranked_main_numbers'),
        array('skai', 'ranked_numbers'),
        array('skai', 'top20_numbers'),
        array('skai', 'top_numbers'),
        array('skai', 'main_candidates')
    );

    foreach ($paths as $path) {
        $candidate = mylottoexpertValueFromArrayPath($payload, $path);
        $numbers = mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($candidate, true);
        if (count($numbers) >= 6) {
            return array_slice($numbers, 0, 20);
        }
    }

    $topCombs = isset($payload['top_combos_json']) ? $payload['top_combos_json'] : (isset($payload['top_combos']) ? $payload['top_combos'] : null);
    if (is_string($topCombs) && trim($topCombs) !== '') {
        $decoded = json_decode($topCombs, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) { $topCombs = $decoded; }
    }
    if (is_array($topCombs)) {
        foreach (array('ranked_main_numbers','top20_numbers','top_numbers','main_candidates','main_pool') as $k) {
            if (isset($topCombs[$k])) {
                $numbers = mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($topCombs[$k], true);
                if (count($numbers) >= 6) { return array_slice($numbers, 0, 20); }
            }
        }
    }

    foreach (array('skai_top_n_numbers','top_n_numbers') as $settingsKey) {
        if (isset($settings[$settingsKey]) && is_array($settings[$settingsKey])) {
            $numbers = mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($settings[$settingsKey], true);
            if (count($numbers) >= 6) { return array_slice($numbers, 0, 20); }
        }
    }

    return array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $fallbackMain)), 0, 20);
}

function mylottoexpertFindRankedExtraCandidatesFromPayload(array $payload, array $settings, array $fallbackExtra)
{
    $paths = array(
        array('ranked_extra_numbers'),
        array('extra_ranked_numbers'),
        array('ranked_bonus_numbers'),
        array('bonus_ranked_numbers'),
        array('extra_candidates'),
        array('bonus_candidates'),
        array('extra_pool'),
        array('bonus_pool'),
        array('regular_extra_numbers'),
        array('regular_extra_numbers_json'),
        array('extra_display'),
        array('extra_display_json'),
        array('display', 'extra'),
        array('display', 'extra_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'ranked_extra_numbers'),
        array('prediction', 'extra_candidates'),
        array('skai', 'ranked_extra_numbers'),
        array('skai', 'extra_candidates')
    );
    foreach ($paths as $path) {
        $candidate = mylottoexpertValueFromArrayPath($payload, $path);
        $numbers = mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($candidate, true);
        if (!empty($numbers)) { return array_slice($numbers, 0, 5); }
    }
    return array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $fallbackExtra)), 0, 5);
}

function mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($value, $pickSize = 0)
{
    if (is_array($value)) {
        if (isset($value['display'])) {
            return mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($value['display'], $pickSize);
        }
        if (isset($value['combo'])) {
            return mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($value['combo'], $pickSize);
        }
        if (isset($value['values'])) {
            return mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($value['values'], $pickSize);
        }
        $digits = array();
        foreach ($value as $v) {
            if (is_array($v) || is_object($v)) { continue; }
            $raw = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$v);
            if ($raw === '') { continue; }
            if (strlen($raw) > 1 && $pickSize > 0 && strlen($raw) === (int)$pickSize) {
                return $raw;
            }
            $digits[] = $raw;
        }
        $combo = implode('', $digits);
    } else {
        $combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$value);
    }
    if ($combo === '') { return ''; }
    if ($pickSize > 0 && strlen($combo) > (int)$pickSize) {
        $combo = substr($combo, 0, (int)$pickSize);
    }
    return $combo;
}

function mylottoexpertCollectDailyCombosFromBatchValue($value, $pickSize = 0)
{
    $out = array();
    if (is_string($value)) {
        $trimmed = trim($value);
        if ($trimmed !== '' && ($trimmed[0] === '[' || $trimmed[0] === '{')) {
            $decoded = json_decode($trimmed, true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                $value = $decoded;
            }
        }
    }
    if (is_array($value)) {
        foreach ($value as $item) {
            if (is_array($item) && isset($item['values']) && is_array($item['values'])) {
                $combo = mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($item['values'], $pickSize);
            } elseif (is_array($item) && isset($item['combo']) && is_array($item['combo'])) {
                $combo = mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($item['combo'], $pickSize);
            } else {
                $combo = mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($item, $pickSize);
            }
            if ($combo !== '' && !in_array($combo, $out, true)) {
                $out[] = $combo;
            }
            if (count($out) >= 5) { break; }
        }
    } else {
        $combo = mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($value, $pickSize);
        if ($combo !== '') { $out[] = $combo; }
    }
    return array_slice($out, 0, 5);
}

function mylottoexpertIsDailyBatchOutputContext($lotteryRow, array $settings = array(), array $payload = array())
{
    $family = strtolower(trim((string)($payload['target_prediction_family'] ?? $payload['prediction_family'] ?? $settings['target_prediction_family'] ?? $settings['prediction_family'] ?? '')));
    $type = strtolower(trim((string)($payload['target_prediction_type'] ?? $payload['prediction_type'] ?? $settings['target_prediction_type'] ?? $settings['prediction_type'] ?? '')));
    if ($family === 'daily' || strpos($type, 'daily') !== false || strpos($type, 'pick') !== false) {
        return true;
    }
    $gameId = '';
    if (is_array($lotteryRow)) {
        $gameId = (string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? '');
    } elseif (is_object($lotteryRow)) {
        $gameId = (string)($lotteryRow->game_id ?? '');
    }
    if ($gameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
        $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($gameId);
        $cfg = isset($spec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($spec['lotteryConfig']) ? $spec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
        if (!empty($cfg['is_daily'])) { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertResolveBatchShapePickSize($lotteryRow, array $settings = array(), array $payload = array(), array $fallbackMain = array())
{
    foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $key) {
        if (isset($payload[$key]) && (int)$payload[$key] > 0) { return (int)$payload[$key]; }
        if (isset($settings[$key]) && (int)$settings[$key] > 0) { return (int)$settings[$key]; }
    }
    $gameId = '';
    if (is_array($lotteryRow)) {
        $gameId = (string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? '');
    } elseif (is_object($lotteryRow)) {
        $gameId = (string)($lotteryRow->game_id ?? '');
    }
    if ($gameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
        $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($gameId);
        $cfg = isset($spec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($spec['lotteryConfig']) ? $spec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
        foreach (array('pick_size','daily_pick_size','num_main_balls_drawn') as $key) {
            if (isset($cfg[$key]) && (int)$cfg[$key] > 0) { return (int)$cfg[$key]; }
        }
    }
    return count($fallbackMain) > 0 ? count($fallbackMain) : 0;
}

function mylottoexpertApplyBatchOutputShapeSettings(array $settings)
{
    $settings['skai_top_n_numbers'] = max(20, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_numbers'] ?? $settings['top_n_numbers'] ?? 20));
    $settings['top_n_numbers'] = max(20, (int)($settings['top_n_numbers'] ?? $settings['skai_top_n_numbers'] ?? 20));

    $settings['skai_top_n_extra_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? $settings['top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? 5));
    $settings['top_n_extra_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? $settings['skai_top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? 5));
    $settings['skai_top_n_bonus_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_bonus_numbers'] ?? $settings['top_n_bonus_numbers'] ?? 5));
    $settings['top_n_bonus_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['top_n_bonus_numbers'] ?? $settings['skai_top_n_bonus_numbers'] ?? 5));

    $settings['skai_top_n_combos'] = max(5, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_combos'] ?? $settings['top_n_combos'] ?? 5));
    $settings['top_n_combos'] = max(5, (int)($settings['top_n_combos'] ?? $settings['skai_top_n_combos'] ?? 5));
    $settings['daily_top_n_combos'] = max(5, (int)($settings['daily_top_n_combos'] ?? 5));
    $settings['daily_top_n_bonus_digits'] = max(3, (int)($settings['daily_top_n_bonus_digits'] ?? 3));
    $settings['daily_top_n_extra_digits'] = max(3, (int)($settings['daily_top_n_extra_digits'] ?? 3));

    $settings['_mle_batch_output_shape'] = 'regular_top20_extra5_daily5_bonus3';
    return $settings;
}

function mylottoexpertFindDailyComboCandidatesFromPayload(array $payload, array $settings, array $fallbackMain, $pickSize = 0)
{
    $paths = array(
        array('daily_combo_strings'),
        array('daily_top_picks'),
        array('daily_top_picks_json'),
        array('daily_top_combos'),
        array('daily_chosen_combos'),
        array('top_combos'),
        array('top_combos_json'),
        array('aiPredictedNumbers'),
        array('prediction', 'daily_combo_strings'),
        array('prediction', 'daily_top_combos'),
        array('skai', 'daily_combo_strings'),
        array('skai', 'daily_top_combos')
    );
    foreach ($paths as $path) {
        $candidate = mylottoexpertValueFromArrayPath($payload, $path);
        $combos = mylottoexpertCollectDailyCombosFromBatchValue($candidate, $pickSize);
        if (!empty($combos)) { return array_slice($combos, 0, 5); }
    }
    foreach (array('daily_combo_strings','daily_top_picks','daily_top_combos','daily_chosen_combos','top_combos_json','top_combos') as $key) {
        if (isset($settings[$key])) {
            $combos = mylottoexpertCollectDailyCombosFromBatchValue($settings[$key], $pickSize);
            if (!empty($combos)) { return array_slice($combos, 0, 5); }
        }
    }
    $combo = mylottoexpertNormalizeDailyComboStringForBatchShape($fallbackMain, $pickSize);
    return $combo !== '' ? array($combo) : array();
}

function mylottoexpertBuildDailyBatchDisplayPayload(array $comboStrings, array $rankedDigits, array $extraDigits, $pickSize = 0)
{
    $comboStrings = array_slice(array_values(array_unique(array_map('strval', $comboStrings))), 0, 5);
    $rankedDigits = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $rankedDigits)), 0, 20);
    $extraDigits = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $extraDigits)), 0, 3);
    $primaryDigits = array();
    if (!empty($comboStrings)) {
        $primaryDigits = mylottoexpertDigitStringToArray($comboStrings[0]);
    }
    return array(
        'predictionMode' => 'daily_digit',
        'renderer_hint' => 'daily_combos',
        'daily_pick_size' => (int)$pickSize,
        'daily_combo_strings' => $comboStrings,
        'daily_top_combos' => $comboStrings,
        'daily_chosen_combos' => array_map(function($combo) {
            return array('display' => (string)$combo, 'values' => mylottoexpertDigitStringToArray($combo));
        }, $comboStrings),
        'daily_ranked_digits' => $rankedDigits,
        'daily_primary_combo_digits' => $primaryDigits,
        'daily_top_extras' => $extraDigits,
        'daily_bonus_digits' => $extraDigits
    );
}

function mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($source)
{
    $source = strtolower(trim((string)$source));
    $source = str_replace(array('-', ' '), '_', $source);
    return in_array($source, array(
        'heatmap_manual',
        'manual_heatmap',
        'heatmap',
        'heat_map',
        'frequency_heatmap',
        'frequency_map'
    ), true);
}

function mylottoexpertBackfillHeatmapPlayRows($db, $userId = 0)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
    try {
        $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName));
        $colsRaw = $db->loadColumn();
        $cols = is_array($colsRaw) ? array_flip($colsRaw) : array();
        if (!isset($cols['source'])) { return false; }

        $lotteriesRaw = $prefix . 'lotteries';
        $lotteryCols = array();
        try {
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($lotteriesRaw));
            $lotteryColsRaw = $db->loadColumn();
            $lotteryCols = is_array($lotteryColsRaw) ? array_flip($lotteryColsRaw) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $_mleHeatmapLotColEx) {
            $lotteryCols = array();
        }
        $lotteryIdCol = isset($lotteryCols['lottery_id']) ? 'lottery_id' : (isset($lotteryCols['id']) ? 'id' : '');
        $canResolveGameIdFromLottery = ($lotteryIdCol !== '' && isset($lotteryCols['game_id']));

        $heatmapSources = array('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map');
        $quotedSources = array();
        foreach ($heatmapSources as $src) { $quotedSources[] = $db->quote($src); }

        $sets = array();
        if (isset($cols['save_intent'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('save_intent') . ' = ' . $db->quote('custom_play');
        }
        if (isset($cols['origin_source'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('origin_source') . ' = ' . $db->quote('heatmap_manual');
        }
        if (isset($cols['play_status'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('play_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('ready');
        }
        if (isset($cols['user_editable'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('user_editable') . ' = 1';
        }
        if (isset($cols['analysis_method_key'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('frequency');
        }
        if (isset($cols['analysis_engine_label'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Frequency Heatmap');
        }
        if (isset($cols['analysis_track_label'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Manual Heatmap Picks');
        }
        if (isset($cols['analysis_source_page'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_source_page') . ' = ' . $db->quote('heatmap');
        }
        if (isset($cols['game_id']) && isset($cols['lottery_id']) && $canResolveGameIdFromLottery) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('game_id')
                . ' = CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('')
                . ' THEN COALESCE((SELECT l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id')
                . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName($lotteriesRaw) . ' l'
                . ' WHERE l.' . $db->quoteName($lotteryIdCol) . ' = ' . $db->quoteName($rawName) . '.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id')
                . ' LIMIT 1), ' . $db->quote('') . ') ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' END';
        }
        if (isset($cols['target_game_id']) && isset($cols['game_id'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' = CASE WHEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ' THEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' END';
        }
        if (isset($cols['target_lottery_id']) && isset($cols['lottery_id'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ' = CASE WHEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ', 0) = 0 THEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', 0) ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ' END';
        }
        if (isset($cols['canonical_main_display']) && isset($cols['main_numbers'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('canonical_main_display') . ' = CASE WHEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('canonical_main_display') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ' THEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('main_numbers') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('canonical_main_display') . ' END';
        }
        if (isset($cols['canonical_extra_display']) && isset($cols['extra_ball_numbers'])) {
            $sets[] = $db->quoteName('canonical_extra_display') . ' = CASE WHEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('canonical_extra_display') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ' THEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('extra_ball_numbers') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('canonical_extra_display') . ' END';
        }
        if (empty($sets)) { return true; }

        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->set($sets)
            ->where('LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('heatmap_manual'));
        if (isset($cols['analysis_method_key'])) {
            $q->where('LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('core_ai'));
        }
        if ($userId > 0 && isset($cols['user_id'])) {
            $q->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId);
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE HEATMAP] Could not backfill heatmap play rows: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertResolvePlayIntentMeta($row)
{
    $saveIntent   = strtolower(trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'save_intent') ?? '')));
    $originSource = strtolower(trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'origin_source') ?? '')));
    $playStatus   = strtolower(trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'play_status') ?? '')));
    $source       = strtolower(trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'source') ?? '')));

    $isHeatmapSavedSource = function_exists('mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource')
        ? mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($source)
        : in_array($source, array('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map'), true);

    if ($saveIntent === '') {
        if ($source === 'strategy_set') {
            $saveIntent = 'play_set';
        } elseif ($isHeatmapSavedSource) {

            $saveIntent = 'custom_play';
        } else {
            $saveIntent = 'prediction_archive';
        }
    }

    if ($originSource === '') {
        if ($source === 'strategy_set') {
            $originSource = 'strategy_builder';
        } elseif ($isHeatmapSavedSource) {
            $originSource = 'heatmap_manual';
        } elseif ($saveIntent === 'custom_play') {
            $originSource = 'manual';
        } else {
            $originSource = 'skai_prediction';
        }
    }

    if ($playStatus === '') {
        $playStatus = ($saveIntent === 'prediction_archive') ? 'archived' : 'ready';
    }

    return array(
        'save_intent'   => $saveIntent,
        'origin_source' => $originSource,
        'play_status'   => $playStatus
    );
}

function mylottoexpertResolvePlaySourceBadge($originSource, $saveIntent)
{
    $originSource = strtolower(trim((string)$originSource));
    $saveIntent   = strtolower(trim((string)$saveIntent));

    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource') && mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($originSource)) {
        return 'From Heatmap';
    }
    if ($originSource === 'mle_precision_lock_batch') {
        return 'Precision Focus Batch';
    }
    if ($originSource === 'strategy_builder') {
        return 'From Strategy Builder';
    }
    if ($originSource === 'manual' || $saveIntent === 'custom_play') {
        return 'Custom Selection';
    }
    if ($originSource === 'imported') {
        return 'Imported';
    }
    return 'From Prediction';
}

function mylottoexpertBuildGroupIdentity(array $targetMeta)
{
    $predictionTargetId = trim((string)($targetMeta['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
    if ($predictionTargetId !== '') {
        return 'target:' . $predictionTargetId;
    }
    $gameId = trim((string)($targetMeta['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
    $lotteryId = (int)($targetMeta['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $drawDate = trim((string)($targetMeta['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
    $drawAt = trim((string)($targetMeta['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
    $drawSession = trim((string)($targetMeta['target_draw_session'] ?? ''));
    return 'legacy:' . strtolower(implode('|', array(
        $gameId !== '' ? $gameId : '0',
        $lotteryId > 0 ? (string)$lotteryId : '0',
        $drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : 'undated',
        $drawAt !== '' ? $drawAt : 'no-time',
        $drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : 'no-session',
    )));
}

function mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row)
{
    $settings = array();
    $jsonCandidates = array('settings_json', 'settings', 'params_json', 'params', 'digit_probabilities');

    foreach ($jsonCandidates as $jsonKey) {
        $rawJson = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $jsonKey);
        if ($rawJson === null || $rawJson === '') {
            continue;
        }
        $decoded = json_decode((string)$rawJson, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) {
            $settings = $decoded;
            break;
        }
    }

    if (!is_array($settings)) {
        $settings = array();
    }

    $dbFallbackKeys = array(
        'label','skai_run_mode','pure_mode','model_family','origin_source',
        'focus_profile','risk_profile','strategy_profile','batch_type','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total',
        'signal_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_label',
        'skai_blend_skip_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct',
        'blend_skip_pct','blend_ai_pct','skip_pct','ai_pct',
        'epochs','batch_size','dropout_rate','learning_rate',
        'activation_function','hidden_layers','recency_decay',
        'walks','burn_in','laplace_k','decay','chain_len',
        'draws_analyzed','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight',
        'draws_used','skip_window','auto_tune','tune_used','best_window',
        'sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale',
        'skai_window_size','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos',
        'profile','training_style','risk_profile','strategy','blend','blend_percent'
    );

    foreach ($dbFallbackKeys as $key) {
        if (!array_key_exists($key, $settings) || $settings[$key] === '' || $settings[$key] === null) {
            $dbVal = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, $key);
            if ($dbVal !== null && $dbVal !== '') {
                $settings[$key] = $dbVal;
            }
        }
    }

    return $settings;
}

function mylottoexpertBuildPreciseBlendDisplay($row, $settings)
{
    $blendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($row, $settings);
    return (string)$blendInfo['technical'];
}

function mylottoexpertExtractMcmcEvidenceSummary($row, array $settings = array())
{
    if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }
    $batch = array();
    if (isset($settings['batch_learning']) && is_array($settings['batch_learning'])) {
        $batch = $settings['batch_learning'];
    }
    $handoff = array();
    if (isset($settings['mle_handoff']) && is_array($settings['mle_handoff'])) {
        $handoff = $settings['mle_handoff'];
    }
    $adaptive = array();
    if (isset($settings['adaptive_v17_learning']) && is_array($settings['adaptive_v17_learning'])) {
        $adaptive = $settings['adaptive_v17_learning'];
    } elseif (isset($batch['adaptive_v17_learning']) && is_array($batch['adaptive_v17_learning'])) {
        $adaptive = $batch['adaptive_v17_learning'];
    } elseif (isset($handoff['adaptive_v17_learning']) && is_array($handoff['adaptive_v17_learning'])) {
        $adaptive = $handoff['adaptive_v17_learning'];
    }
    $winner = array();
    if (isset($handoff['winner']) && is_array($handoff['winner'])) { $winner = $handoff['winner']; }
    elseif (isset($adaptive['final_winner']) && is_array($adaptive['final_winner'])) { $winner = $adaptive['final_winner']; }
    elseif (isset($batch['best_profile']) && is_array($batch['best_profile'])) { $winner = $batch['best_profile']; }
    elseif (isset($settings['winning_profile']) && is_array($settings['winning_profile'])) { $winner = $settings['winning_profile']; }

    $profilesTested = 0;
    foreach (array($handoff, $adaptive, $batch) as $src) {
        if (isset($src['profiles_tested'])) { $profilesTested = max($profilesTested, (int)$src['profiles_tested']); }
        if (isset($src['total_profiles'])) { $profilesTested = max($profilesTested, (int)$src['total_profiles']); }
        if (isset($src['profiles']) && is_array($src['profiles'])) { $profilesTested = max($profilesTested, count($src['profiles'])); }
    }
    $batchType = (string)($handoff['batch_type'] ?? $settings['batch_type'] ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'batch_type') ?? 'mcmc_adaptive_learning');
    $mode = (string)($handoff['mode'] ?? $adaptive['mode'] ?? ($batchType === 'mcmc_extreme_research_learning' ? 'extreme' : 'standard'));
    $winnerName = trim((string)($handoff['winner_name'] ?? $winner['name'] ?? $winner['profile'] ?? mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'strategy_profile') ?? 'Adaptive MCMC Winner'));
    $score = null;
    foreach (array('winner_score','finalScore','score') as $k) {
        if (isset($handoff[$k]) && is_numeric($handoff[$k])) { $score = (float)$handoff[$k]; break; }
        if (isset($winner[$k]) && is_numeric($winner[$k])) { $score = (float)$winner[$k]; break; }
    }
    $stability = null;
    if (isset($handoff['winner_stability']) && is_numeric($handoff['winner_stability'])) { $stability = (float)$handoff['winner_stability']; }
    elseif (isset($winner['stability']) && is_numeric($winner['stability'])) { $stability = (float)$winner['stability']; }
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'evaluation_status') ?? '')));
    if ($status === '') { $status = 'pending'; }
    return array(
        'is_mcmc' => true,
        'engine' => 'MCMC Learning Engine',
        'track' => 'Adaptive MCMC Evidence Track',
        'batch_type' => $batchType,
        'mode' => $mode,
        'profiles_tested' => $profilesTested,
        'winner_name' => $winnerName,
        'winner_score' => $score,
        'winner_stability' => $stability,
        'evaluation_status' => $status,
        'comparison_group_key' => (string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'comparison_group_key') ?? ''),
        'prediction_uid' => (string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'prediction_uid') ?? ''),
        'post_draw_note' => 'After the draw posts, MyLottoExpert scores this official MCMC prediction against the other analysis methods for the same target draw.'
    );
}

function mylottoexpertBuildMcmcEvidenceLabelHtml(array $summary)
{
    $profiles = (int)($summary['profiles_tested'] ?? 0);
    $winner = trim((string)($summary['winner_name'] ?? 'Adaptive MCMC Winner'));
    $mode = strtolower(trim((string)($summary['mode'] ?? 'standard')));
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($summary['evaluation_status'] ?? 'pending')));
    $parts = array();
    $parts[] = 'Engine: <strong>MCMC Learning Engine</strong>';
    $parts[] = 'Track: <strong>Adaptive MCMC Evidence Track</strong>';
    if ($profiles > 0) { $parts[] = 'Profiles tested: <strong>' . (int)$profiles . '</strong>'; }
    if ($winner !== '') { $parts[] = 'Winning profile: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars($winner, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>'; }
    if ($mode !== '') { $parts[] = 'Mode: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $mode)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>'; }
    $parts[] = 'Post-draw status: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $status)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>';
    return implode('<br>', $parts);
}

function mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($row, array $methodLabels)
{
    $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row);
    $src = (string)(mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'source') ?: '');
    $methodKey = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) : mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($src);

    $methodDisplayMap = array('skai' => 'SKAI Model', 'ai' => 'Core AI', 'mcmc' => 'MCMC Learning Engine', 'skip_hit' => 'SKIP Model', 'frequency' => 'Frequency Map', 'heatmap' => 'Frequency Map');
    $baseLabel = isset($methodDisplayMap[$methodKey])
        ? (string)$methodDisplayMap[$methodKey]
        : (isset($methodLabels[$src]) ? (string)$methodLabels[$src] : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $src)));

    $savedLabel = '';
    if (isset($settings['label']) && mylottoexpertIsValidSavedLabel($settings['label'])) {
        $savedLabel = trim((string)$settings['label']);
    } else {
        $rowLabel = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'label');
        if (mylottoexpertIsValidSavedLabel($rowLabel)) {
            $savedLabel = trim((string)$rowLabel);
        }
    }

    $runModeRaw = '';
    if (!empty($settings['skai_run_mode'])) {
        $runModeRaw = (string)$settings['skai_run_mode'];
    } else {
        $rowRunMode = mylottoexpertResolveRowValue($row, 'skai_run_mode');
        if (!empty($rowRunMode)) {
            $runModeRaw = (string)$rowRunMode;
        }
    }

    $runMode = $runModeRaw !== '' ? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $runModeRaw)) : '';
    $blendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($row, $settings);

    $trainingStyle = '';
    if (!empty($settings['profile'])) {
        $trainingStyle = (string)$settings['profile'];
    } elseif (!empty($settings['training_style'])) {
        $trainingStyle = (string)$settings['training_style'];
    } elseif (!empty($settings['risk_profile'])) {
        $trainingStyle = (string)$settings['risk_profile'];
    }

    $simpleModeLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($trainingStyle !== '' ? $trainingStyle : $runMode);
    $simpleBlendLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleBlendLabel($blendInfo);

    $modeDisplay = $simpleModeLabel !== '' ? 'Mode: ' . $simpleModeLabel : '';
    $modeDisplayHtml = $simpleModeLabel !== '' ? 'Mode: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars($simpleModeLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>' : '';

    $effectiveLabel = $savedLabel !== '' ? $savedLabel : ($runMode !== '' ? $runMode : $baseLabel);
    $effectiveLabelHtml = htmlspecialchars($effectiveLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

    if ($methodKey === 'skai') {
        $labelPartsPlain = array();
        $labelPartsHtml  = array();

        if ($modeDisplay !== '') {
            $labelPartsPlain[] = $modeDisplay;
            $labelPartsHtml[]  = $modeDisplayHtml;
        }
        if ($simpleBlendLabel !== '') {
            $labelPartsPlain[] = 'Blend Strategy: ' . $simpleBlendLabel;
            $labelPartsHtml[]  = 'Blend Strategy: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars($simpleBlendLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>';
        }

        if (!empty($labelPartsPlain)) {
            $effectiveLabel = implode(' | ', $labelPartsPlain);
            $effectiveLabelHtml = implode('<br>', $labelPartsHtml);
        }
    }

    if ($methodKey === 'mcmc') {
        $mcmcSummary = mylottoexpertExtractMcmcEvidenceSummary($row, $settings);
        $effectiveLabel = 'MCMC Learning Engine';
        $effectiveLabelHtml = mylottoexpertBuildMcmcEvidenceLabelHtml($mcmcSummary);
        $simpleModeLabel = (string)($mcmcSummary['mode'] ?? 'Adaptive');
        $modeDisplay = 'Mode: ' . ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $simpleModeLabel));
        $modeDisplayHtml = 'Mode: <strong>' . htmlspecialchars(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $simpleModeLabel)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>';
    }

    return array(
        'base_label'        => $baseLabel,
        'label'             => $effectiveLabel,
        'label_html'        => $effectiveLabelHtml,
        'saved_label'       => $savedLabel,
        'mode'              => $modeDisplay,
        'mode_html'         => $modeDisplayHtml,
        'run_mode'          => $runMode,
        'blend_display'     => $simpleBlendLabel,
        'blend_technical'   => (string)$blendInfo['technical'],
        'blend_strategy'    => (string)$blendInfo['strategy_label'],
        'blend_explainer'   => (string)$blendInfo['explanation'],
        'source'            => $src,
        'method_key'        => $methodKey,
        'settings'          => $settings,
        'mcmc_evidence_summary' => ($methodKey === 'mcmc' ? mylottoexpertExtractMcmcEvidenceSummary($row, $settings) : array())
    );
}

function mylottoexpertBuildBestSettingsSummary(array $row, array $methodLabels)
{
    $disp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($row, $methodLabels);
    $label = (string)$disp['base_label'];

    $templateName = '';
    if (isset($row['template_name']) && $row['template_name'] !== null && $row['template_name'] !== '') {
        $templateName = (string)$row['template_name'];
    } elseif (isset($row['settings_template_name']) && $row['settings_template_name'] !== null && $row['settings_template_name'] !== '') {
        $templateName = (string)$row['settings_template_name'];
    }
    if ($templateName !== '') {
        return $label . ' - ' . $templateName;
    }

    if ((string)$disp['source'] === 'skai_prediction') {
        $modeLabel = (string)$disp['mode'];
        if ($modeLabel === '') {
            $modeLabel = 'Default';
        }
        return $label . ' - ' . $modeLabel;
    }

    if ($disp['saved_label'] !== '' && $disp['saved_label'] !== $label) {
        return $disp['saved_label'];
    }

    return $label;
}

function mylottoexpertBuildActionTweakFromSettings(array $settings)
{
    $src = isset($settings['source']) ? (string)$settings['source'] : '';
    $action = 'Add more saved runs before making a setting change recommendation.';
    $stable = 'Keep the current setup the same until you have enough repeated history to test one variable clearly.';

    if ($methodKey === 'skai') {
        $bestWindowOn = (!empty($settings['best_window']) && (string)$settings['best_window'] !== '0');
        $windowSize   = isset($settings['skai_window_size']) ? (float)$settings['skai_window_size'] : 0.0;
        $autoTuneOn   = (!empty($settings['auto_tune']) && (string)$settings['auto_tune'] !== '0');
        $divPenalty   = isset($settings['diversity_penalty']) ? (float)$settings['diversity_penalty'] : 0.0;

        if (!$bestWindowOn) {
            $action = 'Turn on Best Window before changing anything else. That is the cleanest next test for this SKAI setup.';
            $stable = 'Keep the current run mode, blend, and window size unchanged while you test Best Window.';
        } elseif ($windowSize > 50) {
            $action = 'Reduce the SKAI window slightly to tighten the pool and see whether overlap improves.';
            $stable = 'Keep the current run mode and blend stable while you test a smaller window.';
        } elseif (!$autoTuneOn) {
            $action = 'Enable Auto-tune next so the setup can adapt without changing the current mode or blend.';
            $stable = 'Do not change the run mode, blend, or Best Window at the same time.';
        } elseif ($divPenalty > 0.65) {
            $action = 'Reduce diversity penalty one step to see whether the repeated-number cluster becomes tighter.';
            $stable = 'Hold the current run mode, blend, and window size steady during that test.';
        } else {
            $action = 'Increase or decrease diversity penalty one step at a time to refine clustering without breaking the current signal.';
            $stable = 'Keep the current run mode, blend, window size, and Best Window setting stable.';
        }
    } elseif ($src === 'skip_hit') {
        $skipWeight = isset($settings['skip_weight']) ? (float)$settings['skip_weight'] : 1.0;
        $histWeight = isset($settings['hist_weight']) ? (float)$settings['hist_weight'] : 1.0;
        if ($skipWeight > ($histWeight * 1.3)) {
            $action = 'Increase historical weight slightly so history has more influence against the current skip bias.';
            $stable = 'Keep draws analyzed stable while you test weighting.';
        } else {
            $action = 'Increase or decrease draws analyzed by about 20 while keeping the weight balance unchanged.';
            $stable = 'Hold skip weight and historical weight steady for the next test.';
        }
    } elseif ($src === 'mcmc_prediction') {
        $action = 'Increase or decrease chain length next while keeping the decay rate unchanged.';
        $stable = 'Keep recency decay stable so you can isolate the effect of chain length.';
    } elseif ($src === 'ai_prediction') {
        $action = 'Adjust recency decay slightly before you touch epochs or architecture.';
        $stable = 'Keep epochs, hidden layers, and dropout unchanged during that test.';
    }

    return array('action' => $action, 'stable' => $stable);
}

function mylottoexpertRenderModuleById($moduleId, $style = 'none') {
    $moduleId = (int) $moduleId;
    if ($moduleId <= 0) {
        return '';
    }

    $module = \Joomla\CMS\Helper\ModuleHelper::getModuleById($moduleId);

    if (empty($module) || empty($module->module)) {
        return '';
    }

    return \Joomla\CMS\Helper\ModuleHelper::renderModule($module, ['style' => (string) $style]);
}

function skaiCalcWinningRankMetrics(array $rankedNumbers, array $drawnNumbers)
{

    $positionMap = array();
    foreach ($rankedNumbers as $idx => $num) {
        $num = (int)$num;
        if ($num > 0 && !isset($positionMap[$num])) {
            $positionMap[$num] = $idx + 1;
        }
    }

    $ranks        = array();
    $missingCount = 0;
    foreach ($drawnNumbers as $drawn) {
        $drawn = (int)$drawn;
        if ($drawn <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        if (isset($positionMap[$drawn])) {
            $ranks[] = $positionMap[$drawn];
        } else {
            $missingCount++;
        }
    }

    if (empty($ranks)) {
        return array(
            'ranks'          => array(),
            'avg_rank'       => null,
            'best_rank'      => null,
            'worst_rank'     => null,
            'median_rank'    => null,
            'weighted_score' => 0.0,
            'top10_hits'     => 0,
            'top20_hits'     => 0,
            'top30_hits'     => 0,
            'top50_hits'     => 0,
            'missing_count'  => $missingCount,
            'found_count'    => 0,
        );
    }

    $count   = count($ranks);
    $sum     = array_sum($ranks);
    $avgRank = round($sum / $count, 2);

    $bestRank  = min($ranks);
    $worstRank = max($ranks);

    $sorted = $ranks;
    sort($sorted);
    $mid = (int)floor($count / 2);
    if ($count % 2 === 0) {
        $medianRank = round(($sorted[$mid - 1] + $sorted[$mid]) / 2.0, 2);
    } else {
        $medianRank = (float)$sorted[$mid];
    }

    $weightedScore = 0.0;
    foreach ($ranks as $r) {
        if ($r > 0) {
            $weightedScore += 1.0 / (float)$r;
        }
    }
    $weightedScore = round($weightedScore, 6);

    $top10Hits = 0;
    $top20Hits = 0;
    $top30Hits = 0;
    $top50Hits = 0;
    foreach ($ranks as $r) {
        if ($r <= 10) { $top10Hits++; }
        if ($r <= 20) { $top20Hits++; }
        if ($r <= 30) { $top30Hits++; }
        if ($r <= 50) { $top50Hits++; }
    }

    return array(
        'ranks'          => $ranks,
        'avg_rank'       => $avgRank,
        'best_rank'      => $bestRank,
        'worst_rank'     => $worstRank,
        'median_rank'    => $medianRank,
        'weighted_score' => $weightedScore,
        'top10_hits'     => $top10Hits,
        'top20_hits'     => $top20Hits,
        'top30_hits'     => $top30Hits,
        'top50_hits'     => $top50Hits,
        'missing_count'  => $missingCount,
        'found_count'    => $count,
    );
}

function skaiEnsurePerformanceTable($db)
{
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $tblName = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
    $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$tblName}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_name` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `draw_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `run_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `run_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `run_uuid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `snapshot_run_uuid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `run_identity_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `prediction_target_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `prediction_target_key` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_game_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `target_draw_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_draw_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `target_draw_session` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_timezone_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_prediction_family` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_prediction_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `actual_numbers_json` mediumtext,
  `predicted_ranking_json` mediumtext,
  `avg_winning_rank` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `best_winning_rank` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `worst_winning_rank` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `median_winning_rank` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `weighted_quality_score` decimal(10,6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `top10_hits` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `top20_hits` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `top30_hits` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `top50_hits` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `missing_hits_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `combo_hit_summary_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `tail_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `tail_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `tail_promoted_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `tail_promoted_hit_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `calibration_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `calibration_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `shared_learning_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `pairwise_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `gibbs_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `live_tuning_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `confidence_level` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'insufficient_data',
  `trend_bucket` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
  `notes_json` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
