  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_draw_date` (`draw_date`),
  KEY `idx_run_identity_key` (`run_identity_key`),
  KEY `idx_prediction_target_id` (`prediction_target_id`),
  KEY `idx_target_game_draw` (`target_game_id`,`target_draw_date`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_run_draw_source` (`user_id`,`run_id`,`draw_date`,`source`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_lineage_draw_source` (`user_id`,`run_identity_key`,`draw_date`,`source`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try {
        $db->setQuery($sql);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function skaiEnsurePerformanceTableSchema($db)
{
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';

    $requiredCols = array(
        'run_uuid' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `run_uuid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `run_id`",
        'snapshot_run_uuid' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `snapshot_run_uuid` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `run_uuid`",
        'run_identity_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `run_identity_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `snapshot_run_uuid`",
        'prediction_target_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_target_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `run_identity_key`",
        'prediction_target_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `prediction_target_key` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `prediction_target_id`",
        'target_game_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_game_id` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `prediction_target_key`",
        'target_lottery_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `target_game_id`",
        'target_draw_date' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_date` date DEFAULT NULL AFTER `target_lottery_id`",
        'target_draw_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL AFTER `target_draw_date`",
        'target_draw_session' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_session` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `target_draw_at`",
        'target_timezone_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_timezone_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `target_draw_session`",
        'target_prediction_family' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_prediction_family` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `target_timezone_id`",
        'target_prediction_type' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `target_prediction_type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `target_prediction_family`",
        'analysis_method_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_method_key` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source`",
        'analysis_engine_label' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_engine_label` varchar(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `analysis_method_key`",
        'analysis_track_label' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `analysis_track_label` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `analysis_engine_label`"
    );

    foreach ($requiredCols as $colName => $alterSql) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
              . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
              . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
              . "   AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote($colName)
            );
            if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (Exception $e) {
        }
    }

    $requiredIndexes = array(
        'idx_run_identity_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_run_identity_key` (`run_identity_key`)",
        'idx_prediction_target_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_prediction_target_id` (`prediction_target_id`)",
        'idx_target_game_draw' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_target_game_draw` (`target_game_id`,`target_draw_date`)",
        'idx_mle_perf_method' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_perf_method` (`analysis_method_key`)",
        'idx_mle_perf_method_draw' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_perf_method_draw` (`analysis_method_key`,`draw_date`)",
        'uq_user_lineage_draw_source' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_lineage_draw_source` (`user_id`,`run_identity_key`,`draw_date`,`source`)"
    );

    foreach ($requiredIndexes as $indexName => $alterSql) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS"
              . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
              . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
              . "   AND INDEX_NAME = " . $db->quote($indexName)
            );
            if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) {
                $db->setQuery($alterSql);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (Exception $e) {
        }
    }

    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertIsSuperUserForSchema($user)
{
    try {
        if (is_object($user) && method_exists($user, 'authorise') && $user->authorise('core.admin')) {
            return true;
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawName)
{
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
        );
        return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, $columnName)
{
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
          . "   AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote($columnName)
        );
        return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertIndexExistsSafe($db, $rawName, $indexName)
{
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
          . "   AND INDEX_NAME = " . $db->quote($indexName)
        );
        return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureSharedSkaiLearningProfilesTable($db, $currentUser)
{
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'skai_shared_learning_profiles';
    $isSuper = mylottoexpertIsSuperUserForSchema($currentUser);
    $status = array(
        'success' => true,
        'ready' => false,
        'created_or_updated' => false,
        'needs_super_user' => false,
        'message' => ''
    );

    $exists = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawName);
    if (!$exists && !$isSuper) {
        $status['success'] = false;
        $status['needs_super_user'] = true;
        $status['message'] = 'Shared SKAI learning setup is waiting for an administrator to run this page once.';
        return $status;
    }

    if (!$exists && $isSuper) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$rawName}` ("
              . " `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,"
              . " `game_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',"
              . " `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `method_key` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'skai',"
              . " `profile_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'history_window',"
              . " `recommended_window_min` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `recommended_window_max` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `recommended_window_center` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `sweet_window_min` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `sweet_window_max` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `evidence_users` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `evidence_runs` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `evidence_draws` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `confidence_score` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `stability_score` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `baseline_lift` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,"
              . " `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'collecting',"
              . " `last_scored_draw_date` date DEFAULT NULL,"
              . " `profile_json` mediumtext NULL DEFAULT NULL,"
              . " `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,"
              . " `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,"
              . " `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,"
              . " PRIMARY KEY (`id`),"
              . " UNIQUE KEY `uq_skai_shared_game_profile` (`game_id`,`lottery_id`,`method_key`,`profile_type`),"
              . " KEY `idx_skai_shared_lottery` (`lottery_id`,`method_key`,`profile_type`),"
              . " KEY `idx_skai_shared_status` (`status`,`confidence_score`),"
              . " KEY `idx_skai_shared_updated` (`updated_at`)"
              . ") ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
            );
            $db->execute();
            $status['created_or_updated'] = true;
            $exists = true;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $status['success'] = false;
            $status['message'] = 'Shared SKAI learning table could not be created.';
            return $status;
        }
    }

    if ($exists) {
        $requiredCols = array(
            'game_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `game_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `id`",
            'lottery_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `game_id`",
            'method_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `method_key` varchar(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'skai' AFTER `lottery_id`",
            'profile_type' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `profile_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'history_window' AFTER `method_key`",
            'recommended_window_min' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `recommended_window_min` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'recommended_window_max' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `recommended_window_max` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'recommended_window_center' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `recommended_window_center` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'sweet_window_min' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `sweet_window_min` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'sweet_window_max' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `sweet_window_max` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'evidence_users' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evidence_users` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'evidence_runs' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evidence_runs` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'evidence_draws' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `evidence_draws` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'confidence_score' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `confidence_score` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'stability_score' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `stability_score` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'baseline_lift' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `baseline_lift` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
            'status' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'collecting'",
            'last_scored_draw_date' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `last_scored_draw_date` date DEFAULT NULL",
            'profile_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `profile_json` mediumtext NULL DEFAULT NULL",
            'historical_backfill_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `historical_backfill_json` mediumtext NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `profile_json`",
            'last_backfill_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `last_backfill_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL AFTER `historical_backfill_json`",
            'is_active' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1",
            'created_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `created_at` datetime NOT NULL",
            'updated_at' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL"
        );
        $missing = array();
        foreach ($requiredCols as $colName => $alterSql) {
            if (!mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, $colName)) {
                $missing[$colName] = $alterSql;
            }
        }
        if (!empty($missing) && !$isSuper) {
            $status['success'] = false;
            $status['needs_super_user'] = true;
            $status['message'] = 'Shared SKAI learning columns need administrator setup.';
            return $status;
        }
        foreach ($missing as $alterSql) {
            try { $db->setQuery($alterSql); $db->execute(); $status['created_or_updated'] = true; }
            catch (\Throwable $e) { $status['success'] = false; $status['message'] = 'Shared SKAI learning columns could not be updated.'; return $status; }
        }
        $requiredIndexes = array(
            'uq_skai_shared_game_profile' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD UNIQUE KEY `uq_skai_shared_game_profile` (`game_id`,`lottery_id`,`method_key`,`profile_type`)",
            'idx_skai_shared_lottery' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_skai_shared_lottery` (`lottery_id`,`method_key`,`profile_type`)",
            'idx_skai_shared_status' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_skai_shared_status` (`status`,`confidence_score`)",
            'idx_skai_shared_updated' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_skai_shared_updated` (`updated_at`)"
        );
        foreach ($requiredIndexes as $idxName => $alterSql) {
            if (!mylottoexpertIndexExistsSafe($db, $rawName, $idxName)) {
                if (!$isSuper) { continue; }
                try { $db->setQuery($alterSql); $db->execute(); $status['created_or_updated'] = true; }
                catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
            }
        }
        $status['ready'] = true;
    }
    return $status;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiLearningTableReady($db)
{
    $rawName = $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_shared_learning_profiles';
    return mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawName)
        && mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, 'recommended_window_min')
        && mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, 'profile_json')
        && mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, 'historical_backfill_json')
        && mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, 'last_backfill_at');
}

function mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery($db, $lotteryId, array $rows = array())
{
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id','mle_lottery_game_id') as $key) {
            $value = trim((string)($row[$key] ?? ''));
            if ($value !== '') { return preg_replace('/[^A-Za-z0-9_\-]/', '', $value); }
        }
    }
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) { return ''; }
    try {
        $cols = function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe') ? mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries') : array();
        if (!is_array($cols) || !in_array('game_id', $cols, true)) { return ''; }
        $idCol = in_array('lottery_id', $cols, true) ? 'lottery_id' : (in_array('id', $cols, true) ? 'id' : '');
        if ($idCol === '') { return ''; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('game_id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where($db->quoteName($idCol) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
            ->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        return preg_replace('/[^A-Za-z0-9_\-]/', '', trim((string)$db->loadResult()));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return '';
    }
}

function mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings(array $base, array $add)
{
    foreach ($add as $key => $value) {
        if (!array_key_exists($key, $base) || $base[$key] === '' || $base[$key] === null) {
            $base[$key] = $value;
        } elseif (is_array($base[$key]) && is_array($value)) {
            $base[$key] = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($base[$key], $value);
        }
    }
    return $base;
}

function mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow(array $row)
{
    $settings = array();
    foreach (array('settings_json','settings','params_json','params','notes_json','profile_json','parameter_json','best_params_json','metric_json','payload_json','summary_json','full_settings_json','batch_run_full_settings_json','batch_full_settings_json','batch_settings_json','prediction_target_json') as $key) {
        if (!empty($row[$key])) {
            $decoded = json_decode((string)$row[$key], true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) {
                $settings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $decoded);
                foreach (array('settings','skai','batch','profile','selected_profile','history_window','evidence','run_settings','saved_settings','params','parameter','parameter_set','best_settings','metric_json','shared_learning','tracking','source_tracking','mle_tracking') as $nestedKey) {
                    if (isset($decoded[$nestedKey]) && is_array($decoded[$nestedKey])) {
                        $settings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $decoded[$nestedKey]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    foreach (array('skai_window_size','skai_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed','skip_window','best_window','tuned_window','selected_window','history_window','history_window_size','lookback_window','lookback_draws','window_draws','test_value','range_min','range_max','window_size','source_batch_test_variable','source_batch_test_value','batch_run_test_variable','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_test_variable','batch_header_recommended_value','range_min','range_max','batch_header_range_min','batch_header_range_max','source_batch_test_value','source_batch_type','source_batch_run_order','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','recommended_value','source_batch_recommended_value','batch_run_test_variable','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_test_variable','batch_header_recommended_value','batch_header_range_min','batch_header_range_max') as $directKey) {
        if (isset($row[$directKey]) && $row[$directKey] !== '' && $row[$directKey] !== null && !isset($settings[$directKey])) {
            $settings[$directKey] = $row[$directKey];
        }
    }
    return $settings;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiKnownColumns($db, $rawName)
{
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS"
          . " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . "   AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName)
        );
        $cols = $db->loadColumn();
        return is_array($cols) ? array_values(array_map('strval', $cols)) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSet(array $cols)
{
    $set = array();
    foreach ($cols as $c) { $set[(string)$c] = true; }
    return $set;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue(array $row, array $keys, $default = '')
{
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && $row[$key] !== '') {
            return $row[$key];
        }
    }
    return $default;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($value)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '' || strncmp($value, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { return ''; }
    $ts = strtotime($value);
    if ($ts === false || $ts <= 0) { return ''; }
    return date('Y-m-d', $ts);
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiExtractDrawDateFromRow(array $row)
{
    foreach (array(
        'target_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date','next_draw_date','draw_date',
        'target_draw_at','next_draw_at','evaluated_at','last_scored_draw_date'
    ) as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key])) {
            $date = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($row[$key]);
            if ($date !== '') { return $date; }
        }
    }
    foreach (array('prediction_target_json','evaluation_json','settings_json','settings') as $jsonKey) {
        if (empty($row[$jsonKey])) { continue; }
        $decoded = json_decode((string)$row[$jsonKey], true);
        if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE || !is_array($decoded)) { continue; }
        $stack = array($decoded);
        while (!empty($stack)) {
            $cur = array_pop($stack);
            if (!is_array($cur)) { continue; }
            foreach (array('target_draw_date','actual_draw_date','draw_date','next_draw_date','date','target_date','scheduled_date','target_draw_at','draw_at') as $dk) {
                if (isset($cur[$dk])) {
                    $date = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($cur[$dk]);
                    if ($date !== '') { return $date; }
                }
            }
            foreach ($cur as $v) {
                if (is_array($v)) { $stack[] = $v; }
            }
        }
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildIdentityWhere($db, array $colSet, $lotteryId, $gameId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $parts = array();
    foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id','saved_lottery_id') as $col) {
        if (isset($colSet[$col]) && $lotteryId > 0) {
            $parts[] = $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . $lotteryId;
        }
    }
    foreach (array('game_id','target_game_id','saved_game_id','lottery_game_id') as $col) {
        if (isset($colSet[$col]) && $gameId !== '') {
            $parts[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName($col) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId);
        }
    }
    return $parts;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchGenericTableRows($db, $tableName, $lotteryId, $gameId, $limit)
{
    $limit = max(100, min(5000, (int)$limit));
    $rawName = $db->getPrefix() . $tableName;
    $result = array(
        'exists' => false,
        'scanned' => 0,
        'rows' => array(),
        'columns' => array(),
        'identity_filter_used' => false,
        'read_error' => false
    );
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawName)) {
        return $result;
    }
    $result['exists'] = true;
    $cols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiKnownColumns($db, $rawName);
    $result['columns'] = $cols;
    $colSet = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSet($cols);
    $identityParts = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildIdentityWhere($db, $colSet, $lotteryId, $gameId);
    $dateOrder = '';
    foreach (array('draw_date','target_draw_date','run_date','created_at','updated_at','date_created','timestamp') as $dateCol) {
        if (isset($colSet[$dateCol])) { $dateOrder = $dateCol; break; }
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__' . $tableName))
            ->setLimit($limit);
        if (!empty($identityParts)) {
            $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $identityParts) . ')');
            $result['identity_filter_used'] = true;
        }
        if ($dateOrder !== '') {
            $q->order($db->quoteName($dateOrder) . ' DESC');
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }
        foreach ($rows as &$row) {
            if (is_array($row)) {
                $row['_mle_shared_source_table'] = $tableName;
                $row['_mle_shared_identity_filter_used'] = $result['identity_filter_used'] ? 1 : 0;
            }
        }
        unset($row);
        $result['rows'] = $rows;
        $result['scanned'] = count($rows);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $result['read_error'] = true;
        $result['rows'] = array();
        $result['scanned'] = 0;
    }
    return $result;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow(array $row)
{
    $table = strtolower(trim((string)($row['_mle_shared_source_table'] ?? '')));

    $skaiOwned = array('skai_backtest_summary','skai_backtest_metrics','skai_parameter_sets','skai_run_log','skai_shared_learning','skai_tail_recovery_summary','skai_best_settings');
    if (in_array($table, $skaiOwned, true)) { return true; }
    foreach (array('analysis_method_key','saved_analysis_method_key','method_key','method','engine','model_family','analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','analysis_source_page','skai_run_mode','batch_type','source_batch_type','source_batch_origin') as $key) {
        $v = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')));
        if ($v === 'skai' || $v === 'skai_prediction' || $v === 'skai_model' || $v === 'skai_batch' || strpos($v, 'skai') !== false) { return true; }
    }
    foreach (array('source','saved_source','origin_source','save_intent','label') as $key) {
        $v = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')));
        if ($v === 'skai_prediction' || $v === 'skai' || $v === 'skai_batch' || $v === 'mle_precision_lock_batch' || strpos($v, 'skai') !== false) { return true; }
    }
    foreach (array('skai_window_size','skai_blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos') as $key) {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return true; }
    }
    foreach (array('settings_json','settings','prediction_target_json','evaluation_json') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiTextContainsAny($row[$key], array('skai','skai_window','history_window','blend_ai','mle_precision','source_batch','snapshot_run_uuid'))) { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIdentityMatches(array $row, $lotteryId, $gameId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id','saved_lottery_id','saved_target_lottery_id') as $key) {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && (int)$row[$key] === $lotteryId && $lotteryId > 0) { return true; }
    }
    if ($gameId !== '') {
        foreach (array('game_id','target_game_id','saved_game_id','saved_target_game_id','lottery_game_id') as $key) {
            if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && trim((string)$row[$key]) === $gameId) { return true; }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiParseWindowNumber($value)
{
    if (is_array($value)) { return 0; }
    $raw = trim((string)$value);
    if ($raw === '') { return 0; }
    if (is_numeric($raw)) {
        $num = (int)round((float)$raw);
        return ($num >= 1 && $num <= 10000) ? $num : 0;
    }
    if (preg_match('/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)\s*(?:-|to|through)\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)/i', $raw, $m)) {
        $min = (int)round((float)$m[1]);
        $max = (int)round((float)$m[2]);
        if ($min >= 1 && $max >= $min && $max <= 10000) { return (int)round(($min + $max) / 2); }
    }
    if (preg_match('/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?)/', $raw, $m)) {
        $num = (int)round((float)$m[1]);
        return ($num >= 1 && $num <= 10000) ? $num : 0;
    }
    return 0;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiLooksLikeWindowVariable($value)
{
    $v = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    if ($v === '') { return false; }
    return (strpos($v, 'window') !== false || strpos($v, 'draw') !== false || strpos($v, 'history') !== false || strpos($v, 'lookback') !== false || strpos($v, 'sample') !== false);
}

function mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo(array $settings)
{
    $keys = array(
        'draws_used','draws_analyzed','skai_window','skai_window_size','skip_window','best_window','tuned_window','selected_window','selected_window_size','history_window','history_window_size','history_draws','window_draws','lookback_draws','lookback_window','draw_window','sample_window','training_window','window','window_size','test_value','source_batch_test_value','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_recommended_value','batch_test_value','source_batch_recommended_value','recommended_value','source_batch_window','mle_window_value'
    );
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        if (isset($settings[$key])) {
            $value = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiParseWindowNumber($settings[$key]);
            if ($value >= 25 && $value <= 1000) { return array('window'=>$value,'key'=>$key,'mode'=>'single'); }
        }
    }
    foreach (array('source_batch_test_variable','batch_run_test_variable','batch_header_test_variable','test_variable','batch_test_variable','source_batch_type','batch_header_batch_type','batch_type') as $varKey) {
        if (isset($settings[$varKey]) && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiLooksLikeWindowVariable($settings[$varKey])) {
            foreach (array('source_batch_test_value','test_value','batch_test_value','recommended_value','source_batch_recommended_value','batch_run_test_variable','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_test_variable','batch_header_recommended_value','batch_header_range_min','batch_header_range_max') as $valKey) {
                if (isset($settings[$valKey])) {
                    $value = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiParseWindowNumber($settings[$valKey]);
                    if ($value >= 25 && $value <= 1000) { return array('window'=>$value,'key'=>$varKey . '+' . $valKey,'mode'=>'batch_test_value'); }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    $rangePairs = array(
        array('range_min','range_max'),
        array('batch_header_range_min','batch_header_range_max'),
        array('window_min','window_max'),
        array('history_window_min','history_window_max'),
        array('recommended_window_min','recommended_window_max'),
        array('sweet_window_min','sweet_window_max'),
        array('skai_window_min','skai_window_max'),
        array('min_window','max_window'),
        array('start_window','end_window'),
        array('min_draws','max_draws'),
        array('source_batch_range_min','source_batch_range_max'),
        array('batch_range_min','batch_range_max')
    );
    foreach ($rangePairs as $pair) {
        if (isset($settings[$pair[0]]) && isset($settings[$pair[1]])) {
            $min = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiParseWindowNumber($settings[$pair[0]]);
            $max = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiParseWindowNumber($settings[$pair[1]]);
            if ($min >= 25 && $max <= 1000 && $max >= $min) {
                return array('window'=>(int)round(($min + $max) / 2),'key'=>$pair[0] . '+' . $pair[1],'mode'=>'range','min'=>$min,'max'=>$max);
            }
        }
    }
    foreach (array('settings','skai','batch','history_window','best_window','window','profile','selected_profile','params','evidence','run_settings','saved_settings','profile_json','summary','recommendation','shared_learning') as $nestedKey) {
        if (isset($settings[$nestedKey]) && is_array($settings[$nestedKey])) {
            $nested = mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($settings[$nestedKey]);
            if (!empty($nested['window'])) {
                $nested['key'] = $nestedKey . '.' . (string)($nested['key'] ?? 'window');
                return $nested;
            }
        }
    }
    return array('window'=>0,'key'=>'','mode'=>'none');
}

function mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowValue(array $settings)
{
    $info = mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($settings);
    return (int)($info['window'] ?? 0);
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowScore(array $row)
{
    $score = 0.0;
    foreach (array('final_score','score','quality_score','weighted_quality_score','learning_score','stability_score','confidence_score','baseline_lift','avg_rank_lift','penalized_rank_lift') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) {
            $value = (float)$row[$key];
            if ($key === 'weighted_quality_score') { $score += $value * 4.0; }
            elseif ($key === 'avg_rank_lift') { $score += $value * 8.0; }
            elseif ($key === 'penalized_rank_lift') { $score += $value * 10.0; }
            else { $score += $value; }
        }
    }
    $top10 = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('top10_hits','top_10_hits'), 0);
    $top20 = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('top20_hits','top_20_hits'), 0);
    $hits = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('main_hits_count','main_hit_count','extra_hits_count','bonus_matches','main_matches','hit_count','hits','total_hits'), 0);
    $avgRankRaw = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('avg_winning_rank','average_rank','avg_rank'), null);
    $score += ($top10 * 0.80) + ($top20 * 0.35) + ($hits * 0.60);
    if ($avgRankRaw !== null && is_numeric($avgRankRaw)) {
        $score -= min(8.0, max(0.0, (float)$avgRankRaw) * 0.04);
    }
    if ($score == 0.0) { $score = 0.01; }
    return $score;
}

function mylottoexpertV79FirstNonEmpty(array $settings, array $row, array $keys, $default = '')
{
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        if (isset($settings[$key]) && trim((string)$settings[$key]) !== '') { return $settings[$key]; }
        if (isset($row[$key]) && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return $row[$key]; }
    }
    return $default;
}

function mylottoexpertV79NormalizeSettingValue($value)
{
    if (is_bool($value)) { return $value ? 'on' : 'off'; }
    if (is_array($value) || is_object($value)) { $value = json_encode($value, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES); }
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') { return ''; }
    $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $value);
    if (is_numeric($value)) {
        $f = (float)$value;
        if (abs($f - round($f)) < 0.000001) { return (string)((int)round($f)); }
        return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($f, 4, '.', ''), '0'), '.');
    }
    $value = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value);
    return substr($value, 0, 80);
}

function mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingSignals(array $row, array $settings)
{
    $defs = array(
        'history_window' => array('label'=>'History Window','keys'=>array('skai_window_size','skai_window','history_window','window_size','best_window','tuned_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed')),
        'skip_window' => array('label'=>'Skip Window','keys'=>array('skip_window')),
        'ai_blend' => array('label'=>'AI Blend','keys'=>array('skai_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct')),
        'skip_blend' => array('label'=>'Skip Blend','keys'=>array('skai_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','blend_skip_pct')),
        'main_frequency_weight' => array('label'=>'Main Frequency Weight','keys'=>array('freq_weight','frequency_weight')),
        'main_skip_weight' => array('label'=>'Main Skip Weight','keys'=>array('skip_weight')),
        'main_history_weight' => array('label'=>'Main Historical Weight','keys'=>array('hist_weight','history_weight')),
        'extra_frequency_weight' => array('label'=>'Extra Frequency Weight','keys'=>array('pb_freq_weight','extra_freq_weight')),
        'extra_skip_weight' => array('label'=>'Extra Skip Weight','keys'=>array('pb_skip_weight','extra_skip_weight')),
        'extra_history_weight' => array('label'=>'Extra Historical Weight','keys'=>array('pb_hist_weight','extra_hist_weight')),
        'risk_profile' => array('label'=>'Risk Profile','keys'=>array('risk_profile')),
        'strategy' => array('label'=>'Strategy','keys'=>array('strategy')),
        'strategy_profile' => array('label'=>'Strategy Profile','keys'=>array('strategy_profile')),
        'focus_profile' => array('label'=>'Focus Profile','keys'=>array('focus_profile')),
        'model_family' => array('label'=>'Model Family','keys'=>array('model_family')),
        'batch_type' => array('label'=>'Batch Type','keys'=>array('batch_type','source_batch_type','batch_header_batch_type')),
        'batch_test_variable' => array('label'=>'Controlled Test Variable','keys'=>array('source_batch_test_variable','batch_run_test_variable','batch_header_test_variable')),
        'batch_test_value' => array('label'=>'Controlled Test Value','keys'=>array('source_batch_test_value','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_recommended_value','recommended_value')),
        'sampling_temperature' => array('label'=>'Sampling Temperature','keys'=>array('sampling_temperature')),
        'diversity_penalty' => array('label'=>'Diversity Penalty','keys'=>array('diversity_penalty')),
        'gap_scale' => array('label'=>'Gap Scale','keys'=>array('gap_scale')),
        'laplace_k' => array('label'=>'Laplace Smoothing','keys'=>array('laplace_k')),
        'epochs' => array('label'=>'Epochs','keys'=>array('epochs')),
        'batch_size' => array('label'=>'Batch Size','keys'=>array('batch_size')),
        'top_n_numbers' => array('label'=>'Top N Numbers','keys'=>array('skai_top_n_numbers','top_n_numbers')),
        'top_n_combos' => array('label'=>'Top N Combos','keys'=>array('skai_top_n_combos','top_n_combos')),
        'mcmc_walks' => array('label'=>'MCMC Walks','keys'=>array('walks')),
        'mcmc_burn_in' => array('label'=>'MCMC Burn In','keys'=>array('burn_in')),
        'mcmc_chain_len' => array('label'=>'MCMC Chain Length','keys'=>array('chain_len')),
        'auto_tune' => array('label'=>'Auto Tune','keys'=>array('auto_tune')),
        'tune_used' => array('label'=>'Tune Used','keys'=>array('tune_used'))
    );
    $signals = array();
    foreach ($defs as $family => $def) {
        $value = mylottoexpertV79FirstNonEmpty($settings, $row, (array)$def['keys'], '');
        $value = mylottoexpertV79NormalizeSettingValue($value);
        if ($value === '') { continue; }
        $signals[$family] = array('family'=>$family,'label'=>(string)$def['label'],'value'=>$value);
    }
    return $signals;
}

function mylottoexpertV79DecodeJsonArraySafe($value)
{
    if (is_array($value)) { return $value; }
    $raw = trim((string)$value);
    if ($raw === '') { return array(); }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : array();
}

function mylottoexpertV79OutcomeMetrics(array $row, $score)
{
    $mainHits = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('main_hits_count','main_matches','main_hit_count','main_hits'), 0);
    $extraHits = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('extra_hits_count','bonus_matches','extra_hit_count','extra_hits'), 0);
    $learningScore = (float)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('learning_score','quality_score','weighted_quality_score'), 0.0);
    $evaluation = mylottoexpertV79DecodeJsonArraySafe((string)($row['evaluation_json'] ?? ''));
    $top10 = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('top10_hits','top_10_hits'), 0);
    $top20 = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('top20_hits','top_20_hits'), 0);
    if ($top10 <= 0 && isset($evaluation['top10_hits'])) { $top10 = (int)$evaluation['top10_hits']; }
    if ($top20 <= 0 && isset($evaluation['top20_hits'])) { $top20 = (int)$evaluation['top20_hits']; }
    $totalHits = $mainHits + $extraHits;
    $outlierHelp = 0.0;
    if (isset($evaluation['outlier_hits']) && is_numeric($evaluation['outlier_hits'])) { $outlierHelp += (float)$evaluation['outlier_hits'] * 2.0; }
    if (isset($evaluation['long_skip_hits']) && is_numeric($evaluation['long_skip_hits'])) { $outlierHelp += (float)$evaluation['long_skip_hits'] * 1.5; }
    if (isset($evaluation['tail_hits']) && is_numeric($evaluation['tail_hits'])) { $outlierHelp += (float)$evaluation['tail_hits'] * 1.5; }

    $outlierHelp += ($totalHits * 0.35) + min(3.0, max(0.0, $learningScore) * 0.25);
    return array(
        'main_hits' => $mainHits,
        'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
        'total_hits' => $totalHits,
        'top10_hits' => $top10,
        'top20_hits' => $top20,
        'learning_score' => $learningScore,
        'score' => (float)$score,
        'outlier_recovery_score' => (float)$outlierHelp
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingsEvidenceRow(array $row, array $settings, $drawDate, $table, $rowId)
{
    $score = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowScore($row);
    $edge = function_exists('mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow') ? mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row) : array();
    if (!empty($edge)) {
        $score += ((float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0) * 8.0) + ((float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0) * 10.0);
    }
    return array(
        'table' => (string)$table,
        'row_id' => (int)$rowId,
        'user_id' => (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('user_id','saved_user_id','created_by','owner_id'), 0),
        'draw_date' => (string)$drawDate,
        'settings' => mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingSignals($row, $settings),
        'outcome' => mylottoexpertV79OutcomeMetrics($row, $score),
        'run_identity' => (string)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','analysis_run_uuid','batch_uuid','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','prediction_uid'), '')
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingsIntelligence(array $evidenceRows)
{
    $out = array(
        'version' => 'v80_global_learning_batch_intelligence',
        'objective' => 'Learn complete per-lottery SKAI settings patterns from every valid saved and scored run. History Window is one setting family, not the main learning objective.',
        'usable_rows' => count($evidenceRows),
        'users' => 0,
        'draws' => 0,
        'families' => array(),
        'top_setting_patterns' => array(),
        'strong_settings' => array(),
        'promising_settings' => array(),
        'unstable_settings' => array(),
        'weak_settings' => array(),
        'outlier_recovery_settings' => array(),
        'next_controlled_test' => array(),
        'learning_posture' => 'collecting'
    );
    if (empty($evidenceRows)) { return $out; }
    $users = array(); $draws = array(); $scores = array();
    foreach ($evidenceRows as $er) {
        $uid = (int)($er['user_id'] ?? 0); if ($uid > 0) { $users[$uid] = true; }
        $dd = (string)($er['draw_date'] ?? ''); if ($dd !== '') { $draws[$dd] = true; }
        $scores[] = (float)($er['outcome']['score'] ?? 0.0);
    }
    $avgScore = !empty($scores) ? array_sum($scores) / count($scores) : 0.0;
    $familyMap = array();
    foreach ($evidenceRows as $er) {
        $score = (float)($er['outcome']['score'] ?? 0.0);
        $hits = (int)($er['outcome']['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $outlier = (float)($er['outcome']['outlier_recovery_score'] ?? 0.0);
        foreach ((array)($er['settings'] ?? array()) as $family => $sig) {
            $value = (string)($sig['value'] ?? '');
            if ($family === '' || $value === '') { continue; }
            if (!isset($familyMap[$family])) {
                $familyMap[$family] = array('family'=>$family,'label'=>(string)($sig['label'] ?? $family),'values'=>array());
            }
            if (!isset($familyMap[$family]['values'][$value])) {
                $familyMap[$family]['values'][$value] = array('value'=>$value,'runs'=>0,'users'=>array(),'draws'=>array(),'score_sum'=>0.0,'hit_sum'=>0,'outlier_sum'=>0.0,'good_runs'=>0,'bad_runs'=>0);
            }
            $bucket =& $familyMap[$family]['values'][$value];
            $bucket['runs']++;
            $uid = (int)($er['user_id'] ?? 0); if ($uid > 0) { $bucket['users'][$uid] = true; }
            $dd = (string)($er['draw_date'] ?? ''); if ($dd !== '') { $bucket['draws'][$dd] = true; }
            $bucket['score_sum'] += $score;
            $bucket['hit_sum'] += $hits;
            $bucket['outlier_sum'] += $outlier;
            if ($score >= $avgScore) { $bucket['good_runs']++; } else { $bucket['bad_runs']++; }
            unset($bucket);
        }
    }
    $patterns = array();
    foreach ($familyMap as $family => &$fdata) {
        $valueRows = array();
        foreach ($fdata['values'] as $value => $v) {
            $runs = max(1, (int)$v['runs']);
            $uCount = count($v['users']);
            $dCount = count($v['draws']);
            $avg = (float)($v['score_sum'] / $runs);
            $avgHits = (float)($v['hit_sum'] / $runs);
            $consistency = (float)((int)$v['good_runs'] / $runs);
            $outlierAvg = (float)($v['outlier_sum'] / $runs);
            $support = min(1.0, ($runs / 30.0) * 0.50 + ($dCount / 8.0) * 0.30 + ($uCount / 3.0) * 0.20);
            $reliability = max(0.0, min(1.0, ($support * 0.45) + ($consistency * 0.35) + (min(1.0, max(0.0, $avg - $avgScore) / 5.0) * 0.20)));
            $status = 'collecting';
            if ($runs >= 8 && $dCount >= 2 && $reliability >= 0.58) { $status = 'promising'; }
            if ($runs >= 15 && $dCount >= 3 && $reliability >= 0.68) { $status = 'strong'; }
            if ($runs >= 6 && $consistency < 0.35 && $avg < $avgScore) { $status = 'weak'; }
            if ($runs >= 6 && $consistency >= 0.35 && $consistency < 0.55) { $status = 'unstable'; }
            $row = array(
                'family'=>$family,
                'label'=>(string)$fdata['label'],
                'value'=>$value,
                'runs'=>$runs,
                'users'=>$uCount,
                'draws'=>$dCount,
                'avg_score'=>round($avg, 4),
                'avg_hits'=>round($avgHits, 4),
                'consistency_score'=>round($consistency, 4),
                'reliability_score'=>round($reliability, 4),
                'outlier_recovery_score'=>round($outlierAvg, 4),
                'status'=>$status
            );
            $valueRows[] = $row;
            $patterns[] = $row;
        }
        usort($valueRows, function($a,$b){ return ($b['reliability_score'] <=> $a['reliability_score']) ?: ($b['runs'] <=> $a['runs']); });
        $fdata['values'] = array_slice($valueRows, 0, 8);
    }
    unset($fdata);
    usort($patterns, function($a,$b){ return ($b['reliability_score'] <=> $a['reliability_score']) ?: ($b['outlier_recovery_score'] <=> $a['outlier_recovery_score']) ?: ($b['runs'] <=> $a['runs']); });
    $strong = array(); $promising = array(); $unstable = array(); $weak = array(); $outlierRows = $patterns;
    foreach ($patterns as $r) {
        if ($r['status'] === 'strong') { $strong[] = $r; }
        elseif ($r['status'] === 'promising') { $promising[] = $r; }
        elseif ($r['status'] === 'unstable') { $unstable[] = $r; }
        elseif ($r['status'] === 'weak') { $weak[] = $r; }
    }
    usort($outlierRows, function($a,$b){ return ($b['outlier_recovery_score'] <=> $a['outlier_recovery_score']) ?: ($b['reliability_score'] <=> $a['reliability_score']); });
    $candidate = !empty($promising) ? $promising[0] : (!empty($strong) ? $strong[0] : (!empty($patterns) ? $patterns[0] : array()));
    $hold = array_slice($strong, 0, 5);
    $out['users'] = count($users);
    $out['draws'] = count($draws);
    $out['families'] = array_values($familyMap);
    $out['top_setting_patterns'] = array_slice($patterns, 0, 15);
    $out['strong_settings'] = array_slice($strong, 0, 12);
    $out['promising_settings'] = array_slice($promising, 0, 12);
    $out['unstable_settings'] = array_slice($unstable, 0, 12);
    $out['weak_settings'] = array_slice($weak, 0, 12);
    $out['outlier_recovery_settings'] = array_slice($outlierRows, 0, 12);
    $out['learning_posture'] = (count($evidenceRows) >= 30 && count($draws) >= 5) ? 'active' : 'building';
    if (!empty($candidate)) {
        $out['next_controlled_test'] = array(
            'setting_family' => (string)$candidate['family'],
            'setting_label' => (string)$candidate['label'],
            'test_value' => (string)$candidate['value'],
            'reason' => 'Test one setting family that has the best current reliability/outlier signal while holding stronger settings stable.',
            'hold_constant' => $hold,
            'validation_rule' => 'Use only saved predictions scored after the official draw. Pending runs do not count.'
        );
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV80ControlledSettingFamilyMap()
{
    return array(
        'history_window' => array('key'=>'skai_window_size','label'=>'History Window','aliases'=>array('skai_window_size','draws_used','draws_analyzed','window_size'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>25,'max'=>1000),
        'skip_window' => array('key'=>'skip_window','label'=>'Skip Window','aliases'=>array('skip_window'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>25,'max'=>1000),
        'ai_blend' => array('key'=>'skai_blend_ai_pct','label'=>'AI Blend','aliases'=>array('skai_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'skip_blend' => array('key'=>'skai_blend_skip_pct','label'=>'Skip Blend','aliases'=>array('skai_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','blend_skip_pct'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'main_frequency_weight' => array('key'=>'freq_weight','label'=>'Main Frequency Weight','aliases'=>array('freq_weight','frequency_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'main_skip_weight' => array('key'=>'skip_weight','label'=>'Main Skip Weight','aliases'=>array('skip_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'main_history_weight' => array('key'=>'hist_weight','label'=>'Main Historical Weight','aliases'=>array('hist_weight','history_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'extra_frequency_weight' => array('key'=>'pb_freq_weight','label'=>'Extra Frequency Weight','aliases'=>array('pb_freq_weight','extra_freq_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'extra_skip_weight' => array('key'=>'pb_skip_weight','label'=>'Extra Skip Weight','aliases'=>array('pb_skip_weight','extra_skip_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'extra_history_weight' => array('key'=>'pb_hist_weight','label'=>'Extra Historical Weight','aliases'=>array('pb_hist_weight','extra_hist_weight'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>100),
        'sampling_temperature' => array('key'=>'sampling_temperature','label'=>'Sampling Temperature','aliases'=>array('sampling_temperature'),'type'=>'decimal','min'=>0,'max'=>1),
        'diversity_penalty' => array('key'=>'diversity_penalty','label'=>'Diversity Penalty','aliases'=>array('diversity_penalty'),'type'=>'decimal','min'=>0,'max'=>1),
        'gap_scale' => array('key'=>'gap_scale','label'=>'Gap Scale','aliases'=>array('gap_scale'),'type'=>'decimal','min'=>0,'max'=>1),
        'laplace_k' => array('key'=>'laplace_k','label'=>'Laplace Smoothing','aliases'=>array('laplace_k'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>1,'max'=>20),
        'epochs' => array('key'=>'epochs','label'=>'Epochs','aliases'=>array('epochs'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>1,'max'=>500),
        'batch_size' => array('key'=>'batch_size','label'=>'Batch Size','aliases'=>array('batch_size'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>1,'max'=>512),
        'top_n_numbers' => array('key'=>'skai_top_n_numbers','label'=>'Top N Numbers','aliases'=>array('skai_top_n_numbers','top_n_numbers'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>5,'max'=>80),
        'top_n_combos' => array('key'=>'skai_top_n_combos','label'=>'Top N Combos','aliases'=>array('skai_top_n_combos','top_n_combos'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>1,'max'=>25),
        'mcmc_walks' => array('key'=>'walks','label'=>'MCMC Walks','aliases'=>array('walks'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>50,'max'=>5000),
        'mcmc_burn_in' => array('key'=>'burn_in','label'=>'MCMC Burn In','aliases'=>array('burn_in'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>10,'max'=>1000),
        'mcmc_chain_len' => array('key'=>'chain_len','label'=>'MCMC Chain Length','aliases'=>array('chain_len'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>50,'max'=>10000),
        'auto_tune' => array('key'=>'auto_tune','label'=>'Auto Tune','aliases'=>array('auto_tune'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>1),
        'tune_used' => array('key'=>'tune_used','label'=>'Tune Used','aliases'=>array('tune_used'),'type'=>'integer','min'=>0,'max'=>1)
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV80IsNumericCandidateValue($value)
{
    $v = trim((string)$value);
    if ($v === '') { return false; }
    if (is_numeric($v)) { return true; }
    if (preg_match('/-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?/', $v)) { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertV80NumericCandidateValue($value)
{
    $v = trim((string)$value);
    if ($v === '') { return null; }
    if (is_numeric($v)) { return (float)$v; }
    if (preg_match('/-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?/', $v, $m)) { return (float)$m[0]; }
    return null;
}

function mylottoexpertV80FindFamilyStats(array $globalIntel, $family)
{
    foreach ((array)($globalIntel['families'] ?? array()) as $f) {
        if ((string)($f['family'] ?? '') === (string)$family) { return is_array($f) ? $f : array(); }
    }
    return array();
}

function mylottoexpertV80BuildRangeForFamily(array $globalIntel, $family, array $def, $centerValue)
{
    $minLimit = isset($def['min']) ? (float)$def['min'] : null;
    $maxLimit = isset($def['max']) ? (float)$def['max'] : null;
    $center = is_numeric($centerValue) ? (float)$centerValue : 0.0;
    $vals = array();
    $familyStats = mylottoexpertV80FindFamilyStats($globalIntel, $family);
    foreach ((array)($familyStats['values'] ?? array()) as $vrow) {
        $nv = mylottoexpertV80NumericCandidateValue($vrow['value'] ?? '');
        if ($nv !== null) { $vals[] = (float)$nv; }
    }
    if (!empty($vals)) {
        $lo = min($vals); $hi = max($vals);
        if (abs($hi - $lo) > 0.000001) {
            $pad = max(($hi - $lo) * 0.20, ((string)($def['type'] ?? 'integer') === 'decimal') ? 0.04 : 2.0);
            $lo -= $pad; $hi += $pad;
        } else {
            $span = ((string)($def['type'] ?? 'integer') === 'decimal') ? 0.12 : 8.0;
            $lo = $center - ($span / 2.0); $hi = $center + ($span / 2.0);
        }
    } else {
        $span = ((string)($def['type'] ?? 'integer') === 'decimal') ? 0.12 : 8.0;
        if (preg_match('/(weight|blend|percent|pct)/i', (string)($def['key'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($def['label'] ?? ''))) { $span = 16.0; }
        if ((string)($family ?? '') === 'history_window' || (string)($family ?? '') === 'skip_window') { $span = 300.0; }
        $lo = $center - ($span / 2.0); $hi = $center + ($span / 2.0);
    }
    if ($minLimit !== null) { $lo = max($minLimit, $lo); }
    if ($maxLimit !== null) { $hi = min($maxLimit, $hi); }
    if ($hi < $lo) { $t = $lo; $lo = $hi; $hi = $t; }
    if (abs($hi - $lo) < 0.000001) {
        $span = ((string)($def['type'] ?? 'integer') === 'decimal') ? 0.12 : 8.0;
        $lo = $center - ($span / 2.0); $hi = $center + ($span / 2.0);
        if ($minLimit !== null) { $lo = max($minLimit, $lo); }
        if ($maxLimit !== null) { $hi = min($maxLimit, $hi); }
    }
    return array('min'=>$lo,'max'=>$hi);
}

function mylottoexpertV80BuildSettingsAdviceFromGlobalIntel(array $existingAdvice, array $globalIntel)
{
    $map = mylottoexpertV80ControlledSettingFamilyMap();
    $candidates = array();
    if (!empty($globalIntel['next_controlled_test']) && is_array($globalIntel['next_controlled_test'])) { $candidates[] = $globalIntel['next_controlled_test']; }
    foreach (array('promising_settings','outlier_recovery_settings','strong_settings','top_setting_patterns') as $listKey) {
        foreach ((array)($globalIntel[$listKey] ?? array()) as $row) { if (is_array($row)) { $candidates[] = $row; } }
    }
    $chosen = array(); $family = '';
    foreach ($candidates as $cand) {
        $family = (string)($cand['setting_family'] ?? $cand['family'] ?? '');
        if ($family === '' || !isset($map[$family])) { continue; }
        $value = (string)($cand['test_value'] ?? $cand['value'] ?? '');
        if (!mylottoexpertV80IsNumericCandidateValue($value)) { continue; }
        $chosen = $cand;
        break;
    }
    if (empty($chosen) || $family === '') { return $existingAdvice; }
    $def = $map[$family];
    $center = mylottoexpertV80NumericCandidateValue((string)($chosen['test_value'] ?? $chosen['value'] ?? ''));
    if ($center === null) { return $existingAdvice; }
    $range = mylottoexpertV80BuildRangeForFamily($globalIntel, $family, $def, $center);
    $label = (string)($def['label'] ?? ($chosen['setting_label'] ?? $chosen['label'] ?? $family));
    $reason = 'Global lottery learning selected this setting from scored SKAI evidence for this exact lottery. The 9-run batch brackets the setting across eight sections while holding stronger settings stable.';
    if (!empty($chosen['reason'])) { $reason .= ' ' . (string)$chosen['reason']; }
    return array(
        'has_advice' => true,
        'setting' => (string)$def['key'],
        'setting_label' => $label,
        'current_value' => (string)$center,
        'suggested_value' => (string)$center,
        'reason' => $reason,
        'try_next' => 'Create a global-learning 9-run batch for this lottery. Run 1 is the control. Runs 2 through 9 test ' . $label . ' across a bracketed range.',
        'why' => $reason,
        'best_recipe_desc' => (string)($existingAdvice['best_recipe_desc'] ?? ''),
        'keep_same_list' => 'Hold the strongest repeated settings stable and test only ' . $label . ' in this batch.',
        'proof_level' => 'Global scored SKAI evidence',
        'setting_key_aliases' => (array)($def['aliases'] ?? array()),
        'batch_range_min' => (float)$range['min'],
        'batch_range_max' => (float)$range['max'],
        'batch_variable_type' => (string)($def['type'] ?? 'integer'),
        '_mle_v80_global_settings_advice' => true,
        '_mle_v80_setting_family' => $family,
        '_mle_v80_source_rows' => (int)($globalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0),
        '_mle_v80_source_users' => (int)($globalIntel['users'] ?? 0),
        '_mle_v80_source_draws' => (int)($globalIntel['draws'] ?? 0)
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV97CleanKey($value, $maxLen = 80)
{
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '_', (string)$value);
    return substr($value, 0, max(1, (int)$maxLen));
}

function mylottoexpertV97ResolveLotteryDisplayName($db, $lotteryId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) { return ''; }
    try {
        $cols = function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe') ? mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries') : array();
        if (empty($cols)) { return 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId; }
        $nameCol = '';
        foreach (array('name','lottery_name','game_name','title') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $nameCol = $c; break; } }
        if ($nameCol === '') { return 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($db->quoteName($nameCol))->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        $name = trim((string)$db->loadResult());
        return $name !== '' ? $name : ('Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV97GlobalIntelHasUsableEvidence(array $globalIntel)
{
    return ((int)($globalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0) > 0)
        || !empty($globalIntel['next_controlled_test'])
        || !empty($globalIntel['promising_settings'])
        || !empty($globalIntel['strong_settings'])
        || !empty($globalIntel['top_setting_patterns']);
}

function mylottoexpertV97BuildBaselineSettingsAdvice(array $globalIntel = array())
{
    $rows = (int)($globalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0);
    $users = (int)($globalIntel['users'] ?? 0);
    $draws = (int)($globalIntel['draws'] ?? 0);
    $reason = 'No mature personal settings evidence exists yet, so LottoExpert is assigning a safe global discovery batch. This starts or continues the shared exact-lottery research plan without pretending that one user has personal locked settings.';
    if ($rows > 0) {
        $reason = 'Global exact-lottery learning exists, but the strongest numeric setting was not clean enough to bracket. LottoExpert is assigning a safe blend discovery batch so the next scored draw still improves the shared research plan.';
    }
    return array(
        'has_advice' => true,
        'setting' => 'skai_blend_ai_pct',
        'setting_label' => 'AI Blend',
        'current_value' => '50',
        'suggested_value' => '50',
        'reason' => $reason,
        'try_next' => 'Run the controlled 9-run global discovery batch and save the results before the draw.',
        'why' => $reason,
        'best_recipe_desc' => '',
        'keep_same_list' => 'Keep safe SKAI defaults stable while the AI Blend range is tested.',
        'proof_level' => $rows > 0 ? 'Global exact-lottery learning fallback' : 'Safe discovery baseline',
        'setting_key_aliases' => array('skai_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct'),
        'batch_range_min' => 20.0,
        'batch_range_max' => 80.0,
        'batch_variable_type' => 'integer',
        '_mle_v97_global_research_advice' => true,
        '_mle_v97_source_rows' => $rows,
        '_mle_v97_source_users' => $users,
        '_mle_v97_source_draws' => $draws,
        '_mle_v80_global_settings_advice' => ($rows > 0),
        '_mle_v80_setting_family' => 'ai_blend',
        '_mle_v80_source_rows' => $rows,
        '_mle_v80_source_users' => $users,
        '_mle_v80_source_draws' => $draws
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV97BuildGlobalPriorBaseSettings(array $skaiMeta, array $settingsAdv, array $plan)
{
    $settingKey = mylottoexpertV97CleanKey((string)($plan['setting_key'] ?? ($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? 'skai_blend_ai_pct')));
    $control = (string)($plan['batch_run_values'][0] ?? ($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? '50'));
    $base = array(
        'skai_run_mode' => 'global_hive_research_batch',
        'profile' => 'balanced',
        'training_style' => 'balanced',
        'risk_profile' => 'balanced',
        'strategy_profile' => 'balanced',
        'strategy' => 'hybrid',
        'focus_profile' => 'global_research',
        'model_family' => 'skai',
        'skai_window_size' => '100',
        'draws_used' => '100',
        'skip_window' => '100',
        'window_size' => '100',
        'skai_blend_ai_pct' => '50',
        'signal_blend_ai_pct' => '50',
        'blend_ai_pct' => '50',
        'ai_pct' => '50',
        'gameId' => (string)($skaiMeta['gameId'] ?? ''),
        'st' => (string)($skaiMeta['st'] ?? ''),
        'stn' => (string)($skaiMeta['stn'] ?? ''),
        'gm' => (string)($skaiMeta['gm'] ?? ''),
        '_mle_base_settings_fallback' => 'v97_global_hive_starting_prior',
        '_mle_global_learning_scope' => 'exact_lottery_only',
        '_mle_global_learning_objective' => 'global_hive_research_scheduler',
        '_mle_research_mode' => 'global_starting_prior'
    );
    if ($settingKey !== '' && $control !== '') { $base[$settingKey] = $control; }
    foreach ((array)($settingsAdv['setting_key_aliases'] ?? array()) as $alias) {
        $alias = mylottoexpertV97CleanKey((string)$alias);
        if ($alias !== '' && $control !== '') { $base[$alias] = $control; }
    }
    return $base;
}

function mylottoexpertV97NormalizeFingerprintValue($value)
{
    if (is_bool($value)) { return $value ? '1' : '0'; }
    if (is_array($value) || is_object($value)) { $value = json_encode($value, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES); }
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $value);
    if (is_numeric($value)) {
        $f = (float)$value;
        if (abs($f - round($f)) < 0.000001) { return (string)((int)round($f)); }
        return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($f, 6, '.', ''), '0'), '.');
    }
    return strtolower(substr($value, 0, 120));
}

function mylottoexpertV97BuildSettingsFingerprint(array $settings, $lotteryId, $gameId, $targetDrawDate = '', array $extra = array())
{
    $keys = array('history_window','skai_window_size','skai_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed','window_size','skip_window','skai_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','blend_skip_pct','risk_profile','strategy','strategy_profile','focus_profile','model_family','batch_type','calibration_enabled','tail_recovery_enabled','pairwise_enabled','mcmc_enabled','gibbs_enabled','sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','laplace_k','epochs','batch_size','top_n_numbers','top_n_combos','walks','burn_in','chain_len','auto_tune','tune_used');
    $parts = array('lottery_id'=>(int)$lotteryId,'game_id'=>(string)$gameId,'target_draw_date'=>(string)$targetDrawDate);
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $settings)) { $parts[$key] = mylottoexpertV97NormalizeFingerprintValue($settings[$key]); }
    }
    foreach ($extra as $k=>$v) {
        $ck = mylottoexpertV97CleanKey((string)$k);
        if ($ck !== '') { $parts['extra_' . $ck] = mylottoexpertV97NormalizeFingerprintValue($v); }
    }
    ksort($parts);
    $json = json_encode($parts, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    return array('hash'=>hash('sha256', (string)$json),'json'=>(string)$json,'parts'=>$parts);
}

function mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db)
{
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $queue = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
    $assign = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
    $sql1 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$queue}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `game_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `target_draw_date` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `research_status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  `research_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'global_starting_prior',
  `setting_family` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `setting_key` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `control_value` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `test_values_json` mediumtext,
  `hold_constant_json` mediumtext,
  `settings_fingerprint` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `settings_fingerprint_json` mediumtext,
  `priority_score` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `assignment_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `max_assignments` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `replication_needed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `assigned_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `scored_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `result_status` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `result_json` mediumtext,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_lottery_status` (`lottery_id`,`research_status`),
  KEY `idx_fingerprint` (`settings_fingerprint`),
  KEY `idx_game` (`game_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    $sql2 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$assign}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `queue_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `game_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_uuid` varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_header_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `assigned_status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'assigned',
  `assigned_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `opened_in_skai_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `saved_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `scored_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `completed_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_queue` (`queue_id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`assigned_status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try { $db->setQuery($sql1); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V97] queue table create failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    try { $db->setQuery($sql2); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V97] assignment table create failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
}

function mylottoexpertV97FindExistingResearchQueueItem($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $fingerprintHash)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $fingerprintHash = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9]/', '', strtolower((string)$fingerprintHash));
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 || $fingerprintHash === '') { return 0; }
    try {
        mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db);
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('id')->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('settings_fingerprint') . ' = ' . $db->quote($fingerprintHash))
            ->where($db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('open') . ',' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('saved') . ',' . $db->quote('waiting_for_draw') . ')')
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '') { $q->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId)); }
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        return (int)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchQueueItem($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, array $plan, array $fingerprint, $researchType, $now)
{
    try {
        mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db);
        $existing = mylottoexpertV97FindExistingResearchQueueItem($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, (string)($fingerprint['hash'] ?? ''));
        if ($existing > 0) { return $existing; }
        $family = (string)($plan['global_setting_family'] ?? $plan['setting_family'] ?? '');
        $settingKey = (string)($plan['setting_key'] ?? '');
        $batchRunValuesForQueue = (array)($plan['batch_run_values'] ?? array());
        $controlValue = isset($batchRunValuesForQueue[0]) ? (string)$batchRunValuesForQueue[0] : '';
        $testValues = json_encode((array)($plan['batch_run_values'] ?? array()), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        $hold = json_encode(array('guardrail'=>(string)($plan['guardrail'] ?? ''),'locked_settings'=>(string)($plan['locked_settings'] ?? '')), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        $priority = 50.0 + min(40.0, (float)((int)($plan['global_source_rows'] ?? 0)));
        $db->setQuery(
            'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') .
            ' (`lottery_id`,`game_id`,`target_draw_date`,`research_status`,`research_type`,`setting_family`,`setting_key`,`control_value`,`test_values_json`,`hold_constant_json`,`settings_fingerprint`,`settings_fingerprint_json`,`priority_score`,`assignment_count`,`max_assignments`,`replication_needed`,`created_at`) VALUES (' .
            (int)$lotteryId . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$gameId) . ',' .
            $db->quote('') . ',' .
            $db->quote('open') . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$researchType) . ',' .
            $db->quote($family) . ',' .
            $db->quote($settingKey) . ',' .
            $db->quote($controlValue) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$testValues) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$hold) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)($fingerprint['hash'] ?? '')) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)($fingerprint['json'] ?? '')) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)round($priority, 4)) . ',0,1,0,' .
            $db->quote((string)$now) . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        $queueId = (int)$db->insertid();
        if ($queueId > 0 && function_exists('mylottoexpertV101UpdateQueueRefinementMeta')) {
            $plan['_mle_lottery_id'] = (int)$lotteryId;
            $plan['_mle_game_id'] = (string)$gameId;
            mylottoexpertV101UpdateQueueRefinementMeta($db, $queueId, 0, $plan, $researchType, $now);
        }
        return $queueId;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE V97] create research queue failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return 0;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchAssignment($db, $queueId, $userId, $lotteryId, $gameId, $batchHeaderId, $now)
{
    $queueId = (int)$queueId;
    if ($queueId <= 0) { return 0; }
    try {
        mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db);
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema')) { mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db); }

        try {
            $dq = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
                ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
            $db->setQuery($dq, 0, 1);
            $existingAssignment = (int)$db->loadResult();
            if ($existingAssignment > 0) { return $existingAssignment; }
        } catch (\Throwable $dupE) {   }

        try {
            $qcap = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array($db->quoteName('assignment_count'), $db->quoteName('max_assignments'), $db->quoteName('replication_needed')))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId);
            $db->setQuery($qcap, 0, 1);
            $capRow = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($capRow) && !empty($capRow)) {
                $assigned = (int)($capRow['assignment_count'] ?? 0);
                $maxAssignments = max(1, (int)($capRow['max_assignments'] ?? 1));
                if ($assigned >= $maxAssignments) {
                    return 0;
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $capE) {   }

        $batchUuid = 'mle-v101-' . (int)$batchHeaderId . '-' . substr(hash('sha256', $queueId . ':' . $userId . ':' . $lotteryId . ':' . $now), 0, 16);
        $db->setQuery(
            'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') .
            ' (`queue_id`,`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`game_id`,`batch_uuid`,`batch_header_id`,`assigned_status`,`assigned_at`) VALUES (' .
            (int)$queueId . ',' . (int)$userId . ',' . (int)$lotteryId . ',' . $db->quote((string)$gameId) . ',' . $db->quote($batchUuid) . ',' . (int)$batchHeaderId . ',' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        $assignmentId = (int)$db->insertid();
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('assignment_count') . ' = ' . $db->quoteName('assignment_count') . ' + 1, ' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId);
        $db->execute();
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101MarkQueueAssignmentDecision')) {
            mylottoexpertV101MarkQueueAssignmentDecision($db, $queueId, $userId, 'assigned_under_cap', $now);
        }
        return $assignmentId;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE V97/V101] create research assignment failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return 0;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db)
{
    try { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $queue = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
    $assign = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing')) {
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'assignment_policy', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_policy` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'single_user' AFTER `replication_needed`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'duplicate_group_key', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `duplicate_group_key` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `assignment_policy`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'last_assigned_user_id', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `last_assigned_user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `duplicate_group_key`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'last_assignment_decision', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `last_assignment_decision` varchar(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `last_assigned_user_id`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'refinement_round', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `refinement_round` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `last_assignment_decision`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'assignment_policy', "ALTER TABLE `{$assign}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_policy` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `assigned_status`");
        mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'duplicate_group_key', "ALTER TABLE `{$assign}` ADD COLUMN `duplicate_group_key` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `assignment_policy`");
    }
    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertV101SafeStatus($value, $fallback = '')
{
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/', '_', $value);
    $value = trim($value, '_');
    return $value !== '' ? substr($value, 0, 80) : (string)$fallback;
}

function mylottoexpertV101BuildDuplicateGroupKey($lotteryId, $gameId, array $plan)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $settingKey = mylottoexpertV101SafeStatus($plan['setting_key'] ?? '', 'unknown_setting');
    $batchType = mylottoexpertV101SafeStatus($plan['batch_type'] ?? '', 'batch');
    $family = mylottoexpertV101SafeStatus($plan['global_setting_family'] ?? $plan['setting_family'] ?? '', 'general');
    return substr(hash('sha256', $lotteryId . '|' . $gameId . '|' . $family . '|' . $settingKey . '|' . $batchType), 0, 64);
}

function mylottoexpertV101CountRecentDuplicateGroup($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, array $plan)
{
    try {
        mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db);
        $groupKey = mylottoexpertV101BuildDuplicateGroupKey($lotteryId, $gameId, $plan);
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('COUNT(*)')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('duplicate_group_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote($groupKey))
