            ->where($db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('open') . ',' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('saved') . ',' . $db->quote('waiting_for_draw') . ',' . $db->quote('partial_scored') . ')');
        if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '') { $q->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId)); }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        return (int)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertV101DesignFractions($round)
{
    $sets = array(
        array(0.08,0.20,0.32,0.44,0.56,0.68,0.80,0.92),
        array(0.04,0.16,0.28,0.40,0.52,0.64,0.76,0.88),
        array(0.12,0.24,0.36,0.48,0.60,0.72,0.84,0.96),
        array(0.02,0.14,0.26,0.38,0.50,0.62,0.74,0.86)
    );
    $idx = abs((int)$round) % count($sets);
    return $sets[$idx];
}

function mylottoexpertV101NormalizeDesignedValue($value, $type)
{
    $type = strtolower(trim((string)$type));
    if ($type === 'decimal' || $type === 'float') {
        return rtrim(rtrim(number_format((float)$value, 4, '.', ''), '0'), '.');
    }
    return (string)((int)round((float)$value));
}

function mylottoexpertV101RefineBatchPlanForHive($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, array $plan)
{
    if (empty($plan['has_recommendation'])) { return $plan; }
    $values = is_array($plan['batch_run_values'] ?? null) ? array_values($plan['batch_run_values']) : array();
    $labels = is_array($plan['batch_runs'] ?? null) ? array_values($plan['batch_runs']) : array();
    if (count($values) !== 9 || count($labels) !== 9) { return $plan; }
    $min = isset($plan['range_min']) ? (float)$plan['range_min'] : null;
    $max = isset($plan['range_max']) ? (float)$plan['range_max'] : null;
    if ($min === null || $max === null || $max <= $min) { return $plan; }
    $dupCount = mylottoexpertV101CountRecentDuplicateGroup($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $plan);
    if ($dupCount <= 0) {
        $plan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] = 0;
        $plan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] = 'single_user_unique_first_assignment';
        return $plan;
    }

    $type = strtolower(trim((string)($plan['batch_variable_type'] ?? 'integer')));
    $fractions = mylottoexpertV101DesignFractions($dupCount);
    $newValues = array((string)$values[0]);
    $seen = array();
    for ($i = 0; $i < 8; $i++) {
        $raw = $min + (($max - $min) * (float)$fractions[$i]);
        $txt = mylottoexpertV101NormalizeDesignedValue($raw, $type);
        if ($txt === '' || isset($seen[$txt])) { return $plan; }
        $seen[$txt] = true;
        $newValues[] = $txt;
    }
    if (count($newValues) !== 9) { return $plan; }
    $settingLabel = trim((string)($plan['test_variable'] ?? $plan['setting_label'] ?? 'setting'));
    for ($j = 1; $j < 9; $j++) {
        $labels[$j] = 'Test ' . $j . ' - ' . $settingLabel . ' ' . $newValues[$j] . ' (Hive alternate design ' . (int)$dupCount . ')';
    }
    $plan['batch_run_values'] = $newValues;
    $plan['batch_runs'] = $labels;
    $plan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] = (int)$dupCount;
    $plan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] = 'avoid_duplicate_research_design';
    $plan['_mle_v101_duplicate_group_key'] = mylottoexpertV101BuildDuplicateGroupKey($lotteryId, $gameId, $plan);
    $plan['guardrail'] = trim((string)($plan['guardrail'] ?? '') . ' Hive refinement changed the test points to avoid duplicating an already-open research design for this lottery.');
    return $plan;
}

function mylottoexpertV101RecommendedMaxAssignments($researchType, array $plan)
{
    $researchType = strtolower(trim((string)$researchType));
    if (!empty($plan['replication_needed']) || strpos($researchType, 'replication') !== false || strpos($researchType, 'needs_replication') !== false) { return 3; }
    if ($researchType === 'global_starting_prior') { return 1; }
    if ($researchType === 'safe_discovery_baseline') { return 1; }
    return 1;
}

function mylottoexpertV101UpdateQueueRefinementMeta($db, $queueId, $userId, array $plan, $researchType, $now)
{
    $queueId = (int)$queueId;
    if ($queueId <= 0) { return false; }
    try {
        mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db);
        $policy = (string)($plan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] ?? 'single_user');
        $groupKey = (string)($plan['_mle_v101_duplicate_group_key'] ?? '');
        if ($groupKey === '') { $groupKey = mylottoexpertV101BuildDuplicateGroupKey((int)($plan['_mle_lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($plan['_mle_game_id'] ?? ''), $plan); }
        $maxAssignments = mylottoexpertV101RecommendedMaxAssignments($researchType, $plan);
        $replication = $maxAssignments > 1 ? 1 : 0;
        $round = (int)($plan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] ?? 0);
        $sets = array(
            $db->quoteName('assignment_policy') . ' = ' . $db->quote(substr($policy, 0, 64)),
            $db->quoteName('duplicate_group_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote(substr($groupKey, 0, 191)),
            $db->quoteName('max_assignments') . ' = ' . (int)$maxAssignments,
            $db->quoteName('replication_needed') . ' = ' . (int)$replication,
            $db->quoteName('refinement_round') . ' = ' . (int)$round,
            $db->quoteName('last_assignment_decision') . ' = ' . $db->quote('v101_refined_assignment_ready'),
            $db->quoteName('last_assigned_user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId
        );
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertV101MarkQueueAssignmentDecision($db, $queueId, $userId, $decision, $now)
{
    try {
        mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db);
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('last_assigned_user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId . ', ' . $db->quoteName('last_assignment_decision') . ' = ' . $db->quote(substr((string)$decision, 0, 80)) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertV99SafeJsonDecode($raw)
{
    $raw = trim((string)$raw);
    if ($raw === '') { return array(); }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    return (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) ? $decoded : array();
}

function mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, $tableName, $columnName)
{
    try {
        $raw = $db->getPrefix() . preg_replace('/^#__/', '', (string)$tableName);
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()"
          . " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw)
          . " AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote((string)$columnName)
        );
        return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, $tableName, $columnName, $alterSql)
{
    if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, $tableName, $columnName)) { return true; }
    try { $db->setQuery((string)$alterSql); $db->execute(); return true; } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema($db)
{
    try { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $queue = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
    $assign = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';

    mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'last_reconciled_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `last_reconciled_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL");
    mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'feedback_version', "ALTER TABLE `{$queue}` ADD COLUMN `feedback_version` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
    mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'last_reconciled_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assign}` ADD COLUMN `last_reconciled_at` datetime NULL DEFAULT NULL");
    mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_status', "ALTER TABLE `{$assign}` ADD COLUMN `result_status` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
    mylottoexpertV99AddColumnIfMissing($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_json', "ALTER TABLE `{$assign}` ADD COLUMN `result_json` mediumtext NULL DEFAULT NULL");
    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertV99NormalizeDate($value)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') { return ''; }
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue')) {
        $value = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($value);
    }
    if ($value === '') { return ''; }
    $ts = strtotime($value);
    return ($ts !== false && $ts > 0) ? date('Y-m-d', $ts) : '';
}

function mylottoexpertV99IsScoredSavedRow(array $row)
{
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated') && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated($row)) {
        return true;
    }
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['evaluation_status'] ?? $row['status'] ?? '')));
    if (in_array($status, array('scored','evaluated','complete','completed','learned','final','finished'), true)) { return true; }
    if (mylottoexpertV99NormalizeDate($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? '') !== '') { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['evaluated_at'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('main_hits_count', $row) && trim((string)$row['main_hits_count']) !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('extra_hits_count', $row) && trim((string)$row['extra_hits_count']) !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('learning_score', $row) && trim((string)$row['learning_score']) !== '') { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertV99ScoreSavedRow(array $row)
{
    $mainHits = 0;
    foreach (array('main_hits_count','main_hit_count','main_matches','main_hits','hit_count','hits','total_hits') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && is_numeric($row[$k])) { $mainHits = max($mainHits, (int)$row[$k]); }
    }
    $extraHits = 0;
    foreach (array('extra_hits_count','extra_hit_count','bonus_matches','extra_hits','bonus_hits') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && is_numeric($row[$k])) { $extraHits = max($extraHits, (int)$row[$k]); }
    }
    $top20 = 0;
    foreach (array('top20_hits','top_20_hits','top20_main_hits','top_20_main_hits') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && is_numeric($row[$k])) { $top20 = max($top20, (int)$row[$k]); }
    }
    $top10 = 0;
    foreach (array('top10_hits','top_10_hits','top10_main_hits','top_10_main_hits') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && is_numeric($row[$k])) { $top10 = max($top10, (int)$row[$k]); }
    }
    $learning = 0.0;
    foreach (array('learning_score','weighted_quality_score','quality_score','score','final_score') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && is_numeric($row[$k])) { $learning = max($learning, (float)$row[$k]); }
    }
    $totalHits = $mainHits + $extraHits;
    $score = ($mainHits * 100.0) + ($extraHits * 35.0) + ($top10 * 8.0) + ($top20 * 3.0) + min(50.0, max(0.0, $learning));
    if ($score <= 0.0 && $totalHits > 0) { $score = $totalHits * 100.0; }
    return array(
        'saved_id' => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
        'source_batch_run_id' => (int)($row['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0),
        'source_batch_run_order' => (int)($row['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0),
        'is_control' => ((int)($row['batch_control_flag'] ?? 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0,
        'main_hits' => $mainHits,
        'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
        'total_hits' => $totalHits,
        'top10' => $top10,
        'top20' => $top20,
        'learning_score' => $learning,
        'score' => $score,
        'actual_draw_date' => mylottoexpertV99NormalizeDate($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? $row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'evaluation_status' => (string)($row['evaluation_status'] ?? '')
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV99LoadSavedRowsForBatchAssignment($db, array $assignment)
{
    $batchHeaderId = (int)($assignment['batch_header_id'] ?? 0);
    $userId = (int)($assignment['user_id'] ?? 0);
    $lotteryId = (int)($assignment['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($batchHeaderId <= 0 || $userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    try {
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe') || !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers')) { return array(); }
        $cols = function_exists('mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames') ? mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers') : array();
        if (!in_array('source_batch_id', $cols, true)) { return array(); }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchHeaderId);
        if (in_array('source_batch_run_order', $cols, true)) { $q->order($db->quoteName('source_batch_run_order') . ' ASC'); }
        else { $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' ASC'); }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mylottoexpertV99ClassifyResearchOutcome(array $savedRows)
{
    $savedCount = count($savedRows);
    $scored = array();
    $missingSettings = 0;
    foreach ($savedRows as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        $settingsRaw = trim((string)($row['settings_json'] ?? $row['settings'] ?? ''));
        if ($settingsRaw === '') { $missingSettings++; }
        if (mylottoexpertV99IsScoredSavedRow($row)) { $scored[] = mylottoexpertV99ScoreSavedRow($row); }
    }
    $scoredCount = count($scored);
    $out = array(
        'result_status' => 'waiting_for_draw',
        'saved_count' => $savedCount,
        'scored_count' => $scoredCount,
        'missing_settings_count' => $missingSettings,
        'control' => array(),
        'best_run' => array(),
        'best_test_run' => array(),
        'score_delta_vs_control' => 0,
        'summary' => '',
        'scored_runs' => $scored
    );
    if ($savedCount <= 0) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'assigned_not_saved';
        $out['summary'] = 'Research assignment exists, but no saved prediction rows are linked yet.';
        return $out;
    }
    if ($missingSettings >= $savedCount) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'invalid_missing_settings';
        $out['summary'] = 'Saved rows exist but settings snapshots are missing, so this assignment cannot teach the hive reliably.';
        return $out;
    }
    if ($scoredCount <= 0) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'waiting_for_draw';
        $out['summary'] = 'Saved rows are linked, but the official draw has not been scored yet.';
        return $out;
    }
    usort($scored, function($a, $b) {
        if ((float)$b['score'] == (float)$a['score']) { return ((int)$b['total_hits'] > (int)$a['total_hits']) ? 1 : -1; }
        return ((float)$b['score'] > (float)$a['score']) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    $best = $scored[0];
    $control = array();
    foreach ($scored as $rowScore) {
        if (!empty($rowScore['is_control']) || (int)($rowScore['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0) === 1) { $control = $rowScore; break; }
    }
    if (empty($control)) { $control = end($scored); if (!is_array($control)) { $control = array(); } }
    $bestTest = array();
    foreach ($scored as $rowScore) {
        if ((int)($rowScore['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0) !== 1 && empty($rowScore['is_control'])) { $bestTest = $rowScore; break; }
    }
    if (empty($bestTest)) { $bestTest = $best; }
    $delta = (float)($bestTest['score'] ?? 0) - (float)($control['score'] ?? 0);
    $out['control'] = $control;
    $out['best_run'] = $best;
    $out['best_test_run'] = $bestTest;
    $out['score_delta_vs_control'] = round($delta, 6);
    if ($scoredCount < max(1, $savedCount)) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'partial_scored';
        $out['summary'] = 'Some linked rows are scored, but the full batch is not complete yet.';
        return $out;
    }
    if ($delta >= 25.0 || (int)($bestTest['total_hits'] ?? 0) > (int)($control['total_hits'] ?? 0)) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'improved';
        $out['summary'] = 'A tested setting outperformed the control run. Promote carefully or replicate before locking.';
    } elseif ($delta <= -25.0 || (int)($control['total_hits'] ?? 0) > (int)($bestTest['total_hits'] ?? 0)) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'weakened';
        $out['summary'] = 'The control run beat the tested settings. Treat the tested direction as weak unless future evidence improves it.';
    } else {
        $out['result_status'] = 'neutral';
        $out['summary'] = 'The tested setting was close to the control. Keep collecting or test a nearby setting.';
    }
    if ($out['result_status'] === 'improved' && $savedCount < 9) {
        $out['result_status'] = 'needs_replication';
        $out['summary'] = 'The tested setting improved, but the batch support is incomplete. Replication is needed.';
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV99UpdateAssignmentAndQueueFeedback($db, array $assignment, array $outcome, $now)
{
    $assignmentId = (int)($assignment['id'] ?? 0);
    $queueId = (int)($assignment['queue_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($assignmentId <= 0) { return false; }
    $savedCount = (int)($outcome['saved_count'] ?? 0);
    $scoredCount = (int)($outcome['scored_count'] ?? 0);
    $resultStatus = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/', '', strtolower((string)($outcome['result_status'] ?? '')));
    if ($resultStatus === '') { $resultStatus = 'waiting_for_draw'; }
    $assignedStatus = 'assigned';
    if ($resultStatus === 'assigned_not_saved') { $assignedStatus = 'assigned'; }
    elseif ($resultStatus === 'waiting_for_draw') { $assignedStatus = 'waiting_for_draw'; }
    elseif ($resultStatus === 'partial_scored') { $assignedStatus = 'partial_scored'; }
    elseif (in_array($resultStatus, array('improved','neutral','weakened','needs_replication','invalid_missing_settings','inconclusive'), true)) { $assignedStatus = 'completed'; }
    $resultJson = json_encode($outcome, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    try {
        $sets = array(
            $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($assignedStatus),
            $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = ' . $savedCount,
            $db->quoteName('scored_count') . ' = ' . $scoredCount
        );
        if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'last_reconciled_at')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now); }
        if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_status')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('result_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($resultStatus); }
        if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_json')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$resultJson); }
        if ($assignedStatus === 'completed') { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('completed_at') . ' = COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('completed_at') . ', ' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ')'; }
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $assignmentId);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    if ($queueId > 0) {
        try {
            $queueStatus = $assignedStatus;
            if ($assignedStatus === 'completed') { $queueStatus = 'scored'; }
            elseif ($assignedStatus === 'waiting_for_draw') { $queueStatus = 'saved'; }
            $sets = array(
                $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($queueStatus),
                $db->quoteName('result_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($resultStatus),
                $db->quoteName('result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$resultJson)
            );
            if ($scoredCount > 0) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('scored_at') . ' = COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('scored_at') . ', ' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ')'; }
            if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'last_reconciled_at')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now); }
            if (mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'feedback_version')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('feedback_version') . ' = ' . $db->quote('v99'); }
            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $queueId);
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }
    return true;
}

function mylottoexpertV99ReconcileResearchQueueFeedback($db, $limit = 60)
{
    $limit = max(5, min(200, (int)$limit));
    if (!mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema($db)) { return array('checked'=>0,'updated'=>0,'error'=>'schema_unavailable'); }
    $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $checked = 0;
    $updated = 0;
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('batch_header_id') . ' > 0')
            ->where($db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' NOT IN (' . $db->quote('archived') . ',' . $db->quote('cancelled') . ')')
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit($limit);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $assignments = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($assignments)) { $assignments = array(); }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array('checked'=>0,'updated'=>0,'error'=>'assignment_read_failed');
    }
    foreach ($assignments as $assignment) {
        if (!is_array($assignment)) { continue; }
        $checked++;
        $savedRows = mylottoexpertV99LoadSavedRowsForBatchAssignment($db, $assignment);
        $outcome = mylottoexpertV99ClassifyResearchOutcome($savedRows);
        if (mylottoexpertV99UpdateAssignmentAndQueueFeedback($db, $assignment, $outcome, $now)) { $updated++; }
    }
    return array('checked'=>$checked,'updated'=>$updated,'error'=>'');
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiTextContainsAny($value, array $needles)
{
    $text = strtolower((string)$value);
    if ($text === '') { return false; }
    foreach ($needles as $needle) {
        $needle = strtolower((string)$needle);
        if ($needle !== '' && strpos($text, $needle) !== false) { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasSettingsEvidence(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('settings_json','settings','params_json','parameter_json','best_params_json','full_settings_json','batch_full_settings_json','batch_settings_json') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return true; }
    }
    foreach (array(
        'skai_window_size','skai_window','skip_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed','best_window','tuned_window','skai_blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','laplace_k','epochs','batch_size','risk_profile','strategy','strategy_profile','focus_profile','model_family','batch_type','skai_run_mode','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos','source_batch_test_variable','source_batch_test_value','batch_run_test_variable','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_test_variable','batch_header_recommended_value','range_min','range_max','batch_header_range_min','batch_header_range_max'
    ) as $key) {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated(array $row)
{
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('evaluation_status','score_status','status','play_status'), '')));
    if (in_array($status, array('scored','evaluated','complete','completed','learned','final','finished'), true)) { return true; }
    if (isset($row['evaluated_at']) && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($row['evaluated_at']) !== '') { return true; }
    if (isset($row['actual_draw_date']) && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($row['actual_draw_date']) !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('main_hits_count', $row) && $row['main_hits_count'] !== null && $row['main_hits_count'] !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('extra_hits_count', $row) && $row['extra_hits_count'] !== null && $row['extra_hits_count'] !== '') { return true; }
    if (isset($row['evaluation_json']) && trim((string)$row['evaluation_json']) !== '') { return true; }
    if (array_key_exists('learning_score', $row) && $row['learning_score'] !== null && $row['learning_score'] !== '') { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasPredictionNumbers(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('main_numbers','regular_main_numbers_json','ranked_main_numbers_json','canonical_main_display','main_display_json','top_combos_json','daily_primary_prediction','daily_primary_prediction_json','daily_top_picks_json','daily_set_predictions_json') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsExcluded(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('advice_status','play_status','status_explicit','save_intent') as $key) {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')));
        if ($value === '') { continue; }
        if (in_array($value, array('deleted','delete','excluded','exclude','exclude_from_advice','do_not_use','trash','trashed','archived_bad','bad_prediction'), true)) { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasRunOrBatchIdentity(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','analysis_run_uuid','batch_uuid','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','prediction_uid','client_hash','result_hash') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && trim((string)$row[$key]) !== '') { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow(array $row, $table, $rowId, $reason)
{
    $settingsJson = isset($row['settings_json']) ? trim((string)$row['settings_json']) : '';
    $settingsRaw  = isset($row['settings']) ? trim((string)$row['settings']) : '';
    $methodText = trim(implode(' | ', array_filter(array(
        (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['origin_source'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['analysis_engine_label'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['skai_run_mode'] ?? '')
    ), static function($v){ return trim((string)$v) !== ''; })));
    $runId = (string)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','analysis_run_uuid','batch_uuid','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','prediction_uid'), '');
    return array(
        'table' => (string)$table,
        'row_id' => (int)$rowId,
        'reason' => (string)$reason,
        'user_id' => (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0),
        'game_id' => (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
        'target_game_id' => (string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
        'lottery_id' => (string)($row['lottery_id'] ?? ''),
        'target_lottery_id' => (string)($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? ''),
        'target_draw_date' => (string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'actual_draw_date' => (string)($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'evaluation_status' => (string)($row['evaluation_status'] ?? ''),
        'evaluated_at' => (string)($row['evaluated_at'] ?? ''),
        'main_hits_count' => (string)($row['main_hits_count'] ?? ''),
        'extra_hits_count' => (string)($row['extra_hits_count'] ?? ''),
        'learning_score' => (string)($row['learning_score'] ?? ''),
        'method_text' => $methodText,
        'run_or_batch_identity' => $runId,
        'has_settings_json' => $settingsJson !== '' ? 1 : 0,
        'has_settings' => $settingsRaw !== '' ? 1 : 0,
        'has_prediction_numbers' => mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasPredictionNumbers($row) ? 1 : 0,
        'is_skai_detected' => mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow($row) ? 1 : 0,
        'is_scored_or_evaluated' => mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated($row) ? 1 : 0,
        'is_excluded' => mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsExcluded($row) ? 1 : 0,
        'skai_window_size' => (string)($row['skai_window_size'] ?? ''),
        'skip_window' => (string)($row['skip_window'] ?? ''),
        'best_window' => (string)($row['best_window'] ?? ''),
        'tuned_window' => (string)($row['tuned_window'] ?? ''),
        'source_batch_test_variable' => (string)($row['source_batch_test_variable'] ?? ''),
        'source_batch_test_value' => (string)($row['source_batch_test_value'] ?? ''),
        'latest_draw_date' => (string)($row['latest_draw_date'] ?? '')
    );
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchUserSavedNumbersPrimaryRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, &$audit)
{
    $rows = array();
    $existsSaved = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers');
    if (!$existsSaved) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'user_saved_numbers_primary', false, 0, true, false, 'Primary scored saved prediction table is missing.');
        return $rows;
    }
    $cols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
    $colSet = array();
    foreach ($cols as $c) { $colSet[$c] = true; }
    $identity = array();
    foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id') as $col) {
        if (isset($colSet[$col]) && (int)$lotteryId > 0) { $identity[] = $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId; }
    }
    if ($gameId !== '') {
        foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $col) {
            if (isset($colSet[$col])) { $identity[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId); }
        }
    }
    $orderCol = 'id';
    foreach (array('evaluated_at','actual_draw_date','target_draw_date','date_saved','generated_at','updated_at','created_at','id') as $candidate) {
        if (isset($colSet[$candidate])) { $orderCol = $candidate; break; }
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->setLimit(5000)
            ->order($db->quoteName($orderCol) . ' DESC');
        if (!empty($identity)) { $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $identity) . ')'); }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }

        try {
            $batchRunMap = array();
            $batchHeaderMap = array();
            $runIds = array();
            $batchIds = array();
            foreach ($rows as $er) {
                if (!is_array($er)) { continue; }
                $rid = (int)($er['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0);
                $bid = (int)($er['source_batch_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($rid > 0) { $runIds[$rid] = $rid; }
                if ($bid > 0) { $batchIds[$bid] = $bid; }
            }
            $hasBatchRun = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_skai_batch_run');
            $hasBatchHeader = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_skai_batch_header');
            if ($hasBatchRun && !empty($runIds)) {
                $brq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('*')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', array_values($runIds))) . ')');
                $db->setQuery($brq);
                $brRows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
                foreach ($brRows as $br) {
                    $brid = (int)($br['id'] ?? 0);
                    if ($brid > 0) { $batchRunMap[$brid] = $br; }
                    $bbid = (int)($br['batch_id'] ?? 0);
                    if ($bbid > 0) { $batchIds[$bbid] = $bbid; }
                }
            }
            if ($hasBatchHeader && !empty($batchIds)) {
                $bhq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('*')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', array_values($batchIds))) . ')');
                $db->setQuery($bhq);
                $bhRows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
                foreach ($bhRows as $bh) {
                    $bhid = (int)($bh['id'] ?? 0);
                    if ($bhid > 0) { $batchHeaderMap[$bhid] = $bh; }
                }
            }
            foreach ($rows as &$erow) {
                if (!is_array($erow)) { continue; }
                $rid = (int)($erow['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0);
                $bid = (int)($erow['source_batch_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($rid > 0 && isset($batchRunMap[$rid])) {
                    $br = $batchRunMap[$rid];
                    if ($bid <= 0) { $bid = (int)($br['batch_id'] ?? 0); }
                    $erow['_mle_batch_run_found'] = 1;
                    foreach (array(
                        'full_settings_json' => 'batch_run_full_settings_json',
                        'test_variable' => 'batch_run_test_variable',
                        'test_value' => 'batch_run_test_value',
                        'run_order' => 'batch_run_order',
                        'run_name' => 'batch_run_name',
                        'is_control' => 'batch_run_is_control',
                        'source' => 'batch_run_source'
                    ) as $srcKey => $dstKey) {
                        if (isset($br[$srcKey]) && trim((string)$br[$srcKey]) !== '' && empty($erow[$dstKey])) { $erow[$dstKey] = $br[$srcKey]; }
                    }
                    if (empty($erow['source_batch_test_variable']) && !empty($br['test_variable'])) { $erow['source_batch_test_variable'] = $br['test_variable']; }
                    if (empty($erow['source_batch_test_value']) && !empty($br['test_value'])) { $erow['source_batch_test_value'] = $br['test_value']; }
                }
                if ($bid > 0 && isset($batchHeaderMap[$bid])) {
                    $bh = $batchHeaderMap[$bid];
                    $erow['_mle_batch_header_found'] = 1;
                    foreach (array(
                        'test_variable' => 'batch_header_test_variable',
                        'range_min' => 'batch_header_range_min',
                        'range_max' => 'batch_header_range_max',
                        'recommended_value' => 'batch_header_recommended_value',
                        'batch_type' => 'batch_header_batch_type',
                        'evidence_summary' => 'batch_header_evidence_summary',
                        'precision_lock_stage' => 'batch_header_precision_lock_stage',
                        'recommendation_level' => 'batch_header_recommendation_level',
                        'precision_progress_level' => 'batch_header_precision_progress_level'
                    ) as $srcKey => $dstKey) {
                        if (isset($bh[$srcKey]) && trim((string)$bh[$srcKey]) !== '' && empty($erow[$dstKey])) { $erow[$dstKey] = $bh[$srcKey]; }
                    }
                    if (empty($erow['source_batch_test_variable']) && !empty($bh['test_variable'])) { $erow['source_batch_test_variable'] = $bh['test_variable']; }
                    if (empty($erow['recommended_value']) && !empty($bh['recommended_value'])) { $erow['recommended_value'] = $bh['recommended_value']; }
                    if (empty($erow['range_min']) && !empty($bh['range_min'])) { $erow['range_min'] = $bh['range_min']; }
                    if (empty($erow['range_max']) && !empty($bh['range_max'])) { $erow['range_max'] = $bh['range_max']; }
                }
            }
            unset($erow);
            $audit['batch_join_reality'] = array(
                'batch_run_rows_found' => count($batchRunMap),
                'batch_header_rows_found' => count($batchHeaderMap),
                'source_batch_run_ids_seen' => count($runIds),
                'source_batch_ids_seen' => count($batchIds)
            );
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $audit['batch_join_reality'] = array('read_error' => true, 'message' => 'Batch enrichment failed safely.');
        }
        $reality = array(
            'scanned' => count($rows),
            'identity_filter_used' => !empty($identity),
            'skai_detected_rows' => 0,
            'scored_or_evaluated_rows' => 0,
            'settings_rows' => 0,
            'prediction_number_rows' => 0,
            'run_or_batch_identity_rows' => 0,
            'excluded_rows' => 0,
            'eligible_if_window_present_rows' => 0,
            'all_settings_eligible_rows' => 0,
            'history_window_eligible_rows' => 0,
            'all_settings_missing_window_rows' => 0,
            'missing_target_identity_rows' => 0,
            'missing_draw_identity_rows' => 0,
            'missing_window_rows' => 0,
            'skip_reason_counts' => array(
                'excluded_or_deleted' => 0,
                'missing_target_identity' => 0,
                'missing_draw_identity' => 0,
                'not_scored_or_evaluated' => 0,
                'missing_prediction_numbers' => 0,
                'not_skai' => 0,
                'missing_settings' => 0,
                'missing_window' => 0
            ),
            'latest_samples' => array(),
            'latest_skipped_samples' => array()
        );
        foreach ($rows as &$row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
            $row['_mle_shared_source_table'] = 'user_saved_numbers_primary';
            $row['_mle_shared_identity_filter_used'] = !empty($identity) ? 1 : 0;
            $isSkai = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow($row);
            $isChecked = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated($row);
            $hasSettings = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasSettingsEvidence($row);
            $hasNumbers = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasPredictionNumbers($row);
            $hasRun = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasRunOrBatchIdentity($row);
            $isExcluded = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsExcluded($row);
            $hasTargetIdentity = (trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? '')) !== '' || trim((string)($row['game_id'] ?? '')) !== '' || (int)($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0 || (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0);
            $hasDrawIdentity = (mylottoexpertSharedSkaiExtractDrawDateFromRow($row) !== '');
            $tmpSettings = array();
            if ($hasSettings) { $tmpSettings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings(mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow($row), $row); }
            $tmpWindowInfo = !empty($tmpSettings) ? mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($tmpSettings) : array();
            $hasWindow = ((int)($tmpWindowInfo['window'] ?? 0) > 0);
            $allSettingsEligible = (!$isExcluded && $hasTargetIdentity && $hasDrawIdentity && $isChecked && $hasNumbers && $isSkai && $hasSettings);
            if ($allSettingsEligible) {
                $reality['all_settings_eligible_rows']++;
                if ($hasWindow) { $reality['history_window_eligible_rows']++; }
                else { $reality['all_settings_missing_window_rows']++; }
            }
            if (!$hasTargetIdentity) { $reality['missing_target_identity_rows']++; }
            if (!$hasDrawIdentity) { $reality['missing_draw_identity_rows']++; }
            if (!$hasWindow) { $reality['missing_window_rows']++; }
            $primarySkipReason = '';
            if ($isExcluded) { $primarySkipReason = 'excluded_or_deleted'; }
            elseif (!$hasTargetIdentity) { $primarySkipReason = 'missing_target_identity'; }
            elseif (!$hasDrawIdentity) { $primarySkipReason = 'missing_draw_identity'; }
            elseif (!$isScored) { $primarySkipReason = 'not_scored_or_evaluated'; }
            elseif (!$hasNumbers) { $primarySkipReason = 'missing_prediction_numbers'; }
            elseif (!$isSkai) { $primarySkipReason = 'not_skai'; }
            elseif (!$hasSettings) { $primarySkipReason = 'missing_settings'; }
            elseif (!$hasWindow) { $primarySkipReason = 'missing_window'; }
            if ($primarySkipReason !== '') {
                if (!isset($reality['skip_reason_counts'][$primarySkipReason])) { $reality['skip_reason_counts'][$primarySkipReason] = 0; }
                $reality['skip_reason_counts'][$primarySkipReason]++;
                if (count($reality['latest_skipped_samples']) < 25) {
                    $reality['latest_skipped_samples'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, 'user_saved_numbers_primary', (int)($row['id'] ?? 0), $primarySkipReason);
                }
            }
            if ($isSkai) { $reality['skai_detected_rows']++; }
            if ($isScored) { $reality['scored_or_evaluated_rows']++; }
            if ($hasSettings) { $reality['settings_rows']++; }
            if ($hasNumbers) { $reality['prediction_number_rows']++; }
            if ($hasRun) { $reality['run_or_batch_identity_rows']++; }
            if ($isExcluded) { $reality['excluded_rows']++; }
            if ($isSkai && $isChecked && $hasSettings && $hasNumbers && !$isExcluded) { $reality['eligible_if_window_present_rows']++; }
            if (count($reality['latest_samples']) < 12) {
                $reality['latest_samples'][] = array(
                    'id' => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
                    'user_id' => (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0),
                    'game_id' => (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
                    'target_game_id' => (string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
                    'target_draw_date' => (string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                    'actual_draw_date' => (string)($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                    'evaluation_status' => (string)($row['evaluation_status'] ?? ''),
                    'evaluated_at' => (string)($row['evaluated_at'] ?? ''),
                    'main_hits_count' => (string)($row['main_hits_count'] ?? ''),
                    'source' => (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
                    'analysis_method_key' => (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
                    'has_settings' => $hasSettings ? 1 : 0,
                    'has_numbers' => $hasNumbers ? 1 : 0,
                    'has_run_or_batch_identity' => $hasRun ? 1 : 0,
                    'is_skai' => $isSkai ? 1 : 0,
                    'is_scored' => $isChecked ? 1 : 0,
                    'is_excluded' => $isExcluded ? 1 : 0,
                    'has_window' => $hasWindow ? 1 : 0,
                    'all_settings_eligible' => $allSettingsEligible ? 1 : 0
                );
            }
        }
        unset($row);
        $audit['reality_audit']['user_saved_numbers_primary'] = $reality;
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'user_saved_numbers_primary', true, count($rows), !empty($identity), false, 'Primary real-schema source: saved prediction rows with target identity, SKAI settings, batch/run identity, and evaluation/scoring columns.');
        return $rows;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'user_saved_numbers_primary', true, 0, !empty($identity), true, 'Read failed while scanning real-schema saved prediction rows.');
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable(&$audit, $table, $exists, $scanned, $identityFilterUsed, $readError, $note = '')
{
    $audit['tables_checked'][$table] = array(
        'exists' => (bool)$exists,
        'scanned' => (int)$scanned,
        'identity_filter_used' => (bool)$identityFilterUsed,
        'read_error' => (bool)$readError,
        'note' => (string)$note
    );
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, $tableName)
{
    try {
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__' . $tableName, false);
        if (!is_array($cols)) { return array(); }
        $out = array();
        foreach ($cols as $key => $meta) {
            if (is_string($key) && $key !== '') { $out[] = $key; }
            elseif (is_object($meta) && isset($meta->Field)) { $out[] = (string)$meta->Field; }
        }
        return array_values(array_unique($out));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSql($db, array $cols, $alias, $column, $as)
{
    if (!in_array($column, $cols, true)) { return ''; }
    return $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName($column) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName($as);
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchPerformanceJoinedSettingsRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, &$audit)
{
    $rows = array();
    $existsPerf = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_performance');
    $existsSaved = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers');
    if (!$existsPerf || !$existsSaved) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_performance_join_saved_settings', ($existsPerf && $existsSaved), 0, true, false, 'Missing performance or saved-number table.');
        return $rows;
    }
    $pCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'skai_learning_performance');
    $sCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
    $brExists = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_skai_batch_run');
    $bhExists = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_skai_batch_header');
    $brCols = $brExists ? mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_run') : array();
    $bhCols = $bhExists ? mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header') : array();
    try {
        $select = array('p.*');
        foreach (array(
            'id'=>'saved_id','user_id'=>'saved_user_id','lottery_id'=>'saved_lottery_id','target_lottery_id'=>'saved_target_lottery_id','target_game_id'=>'saved_target_game_id','game_id'=>'saved_game_id','source'=>'saved_source','origin_source'=>'saved_origin_source','analysis_method_key'=>'saved_analysis_method_key','settings_json'=>'settings_json','settings'=>'settings','prediction_target_json'=>'prediction_target_json','run_uuid'=>'saved_run_uuid','source_batch_id'=>'source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id'=>'source_batch_run_id','source_batch_run_order'=>'source_batch_run_order','draws_used'=>'saved_draws_used','draws_analyzed'=>'saved_draws_analyzed','skai_window_size'=>'saved_skai_window_size','skip_window'=>'saved_skip_window','best_window'=>'saved_best_window','tuned_window'=>'saved_tuned_window'
        ) as $col=>$as) {
            $frag = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSql($db, $sCols, 's', $col, $as);
            if ($frag !== '') { $select[] = $frag; }
        }
        if ($brExists) {
            foreach (array('id'=>'batch_run_id','batch_id'=>'batch_id','run_order'=>'batch_run_order','run_name'=>'batch_run_name','source'=>'batch_run_source','method'=>'batch_run_method','test_variable'=>'test_variable','test_value'=>'test_value','full_settings_json'=>'batch_full_settings_json','settings_json'=>'batch_settings_json') as $col=>$as) {
                $frag = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSql($db, $brCols, 'br', $col, $as);
                if ($frag !== '') { $select[] = $frag; }
            }
        }
        if ($bhExists) {
            foreach (array('batch_type'=>'batch_type','test_variable'=>'header_test_variable','range_min'=>'range_min','range_max'=>'range_max','recommended_value'=>'recommended_value','recommendation_level'=>'recommendation_level','precision_progress_level'=>'precision_progress_level','precision_lock_stage'=>'precision_lock_stage','lottery_id'=>'batch_lottery_id','game_id'=>'batch_game_id') as $col=>$as) {
                $frag = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSql($db, $bhCols, 'bh', $col, $as);
                if ($frag !== '') { $select[] = $frag; }
            }
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($select)->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance', 'p'));
        $joinOn = array();
        if (in_array('run_id', $pCols, true) && in_array('id', $sCols, true)) { $joinOn[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = p.' . $db->quoteName('run_id'); }
        if (in_array('run_uuid', $pCols, true) && in_array('run_uuid', $sCols, true)) { $joinOn[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = TRIM(COALESCE(p.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))'; }
        if (empty($joinOn)) { $joinOn[] = '1=0'; }
        $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ON (' . implode(' OR ', $joinOn) . ')');
        if ($brExists) {
            $brJoin = array();
            if (in_array('source_batch_run_id', $sCols, true) && in_array('id', $brCols, true)) { $brJoin[] = 'br.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id'); }
            if (in_array('source_batch_id', $sCols, true) && in_array('batch_id', $brCols, true) && in_array('source_batch_run_order', $sCols, true) && in_array('run_order', $brCols, true)) {
                $brJoin[] = '(br.' . $db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' AND br.' . $db->quoteName('run_order') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_order') . ')';
            }
            if (!empty($brJoin)) { $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run', 'br') . ' ON (' . implode(' OR ', $brJoin) . ')'); }
        }
        if ($bhExists && $brExists && in_array('batch_id', $brCols, true) && in_array('id', $bhCols, true)) {
            $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header', 'bh') . ' ON bh.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = br.' . $db->quoteName('batch_id'));
        }
        $identity = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $pCols, true)) { $identity[] = 'p.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId; } }
        foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $identity[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId; } }
        if ($gameId !== '') {
            foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $pCols, true)) { $identity[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(p.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId); } }
            foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $identity[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId); } }
        }
        if (!empty($identity)) { $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $identity) . ')'); }
        $methodParts = array();
        foreach (array('analysis_method_key','method_key') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $pCols, true)) { $methodParts[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(p.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))) = ' . $db->quote('skai'); } }
        foreach (array('source','origin_source') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $pCols, true)) { $methodParts[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(p.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))) IN (' . $db->quote('skai') . ',' . $db->quote('skai_prediction') . ',' . $db->quote('skai_batch') . ')'; } }
        foreach (array('analysis_method_key','method_key') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $methodParts[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))) = ' . $db->quote('skai'); } }
        foreach (array('source','origin_source') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $methodParts[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))) IN (' . $db->quote('skai') . ',' . $db->quote('skai_prediction') . ',' . $db->quote('skai_batch') . ',' . $db->quote('mle_precision_lock_batch') . ')'; } }
        if (!empty($methodParts)) { $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $methodParts) . ')'); }
        $dateOrder = in_array('draw_date', $pCols, true) ? 'p.' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') : (in_array('target_draw_date', $pCols, true) ? 'p.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') : 'p.' . $db->quoteName('id'));
        $q->order($dateOrder . ' DESC')->setLimit(5000);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }
        foreach ($rows as &$r) { if (is_array($r)) { $r['_mle_shared_source_table'] = 'v55_performance_join_saved_settings'; $r['_mle_shared_identity_filter_used'] = 1; } }
        unset($r);
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_performance_join_saved_settings', true, count($rows), true, false, 'Checked performance joined to saved SKAI settings and MLE batch run settings.');
        return $rows;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_performance_join_saved_settings', true, 0, true, true, 'Read failed while joining performance to saved settings.');
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchLearningEventsJoinedSettingsRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, &$audit)
{
    $rows = array();
    $existsEvents = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_events');
    $existsSaved = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers');
    if (!$existsEvents || !$existsSaved) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_learning_events_join_saved_settings', ($existsEvents && $existsSaved), 0, true, false, 'Missing learning-event or saved-number table.');
        return $rows;
    }
    $eCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'skai_learning_events');
    $sCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
    try {
        $select = array('e.*');
        foreach (array('id'=>'saved_id','user_id'=>'saved_user_id','lottery_id'=>'saved_lottery_id','target_lottery_id'=>'saved_target_lottery_id','target_game_id'=>'saved_target_game_id','game_id'=>'saved_game_id','source'=>'saved_source','origin_source'=>'saved_origin_source','analysis_method_key'=>'saved_analysis_method_key','settings_json'=>'settings_json','settings'=>'settings','prediction_target_json'=>'prediction_target_json','run_uuid'=>'saved_run_uuid','draws_used'=>'saved_draws_used','draws_analyzed'=>'saved_draws_analyzed','skai_window_size'=>'saved_skai_window_size','skip_window'=>'saved_skip_window','best_window'=>'saved_best_window','tuned_window'=>'saved_tuned_window') as $col=>$as) {
            $frag = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiColumnSql($db, $sCols, 's', $col, $as);
            if ($frag !== '') { $select[] = $frag; }
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($select)->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events', 'e'));
        $joinOn = array();
        if (in_array('run_uuid', $eCols, true) && in_array('run_uuid', $sCols, true)) { $joinOn[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = TRIM(COALESCE(e.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ',' . $db->quote('') . '))'; }
        if (in_array('target_draw_date', $eCols, true) && in_array('target_draw_date', $sCols, true) && in_array('game_id', $eCols, true) && in_array('target_game_id', $sCols, true)) {
            $joinOn[] = '(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = TRIM(COALESCE(e.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) AND s.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' = e.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ')';
        }
        if (empty($joinOn)) { $joinOn[] = '1=0'; }
        $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ON (' . implode(' OR ', $joinOn) . ')');
        $identity = array();
        if ($gameId !== '' && in_array('game_id', $eCols, true)) { $identity[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(e.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId); }
        foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $identity[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId; } }
        if ($gameId !== '') { foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $col) { if (in_array($col, $sCols, true)) { $identity[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId); } } }
        if (!empty($identity)) { $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $identity) . ')'); }
        if (in_array('is_learned', $eCols, true)) { $q->where('e.' . $db->quoteName('is_learned') . ' = 1'); }
        $q->order((in_array('target_draw_date', $eCols, true) ? 'e.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') : 'e.' . $db->quoteName('id')) . ' DESC')->setLimit(5000);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }
        foreach ($rows as &$r) { if (is_array($r)) { $r['_mle_shared_source_table'] = 'v55_learning_events_join_saved_settings'; $r['_mle_shared_identity_filter_used'] = 1; } }
        unset($r);
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_learning_events_join_saved_settings', true, count($rows), true, false, 'Elite SKAI learning events joined to saved settings by run UUID / exact draw.');
        return $rows;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        mylottoexpertSharedSkaiAddAuditTable($audit, 'v55_learning_events_join_saved_settings', true, 0, true, true, 'Read failed while joining learning events to saved settings.');
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile($db, $lotteryId, array $cardRows = array())
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery($db, $lotteryId, $cardRows);
    $backfillAudit = array(
        'version' => 'v80_global_learning_batch_intelligence',
        'mode' => 'user_saved_numbers_primary_plus_joined_skai_evidence_mapper',
        'total_rows_scanned' => 0,
        'usable_rows' => 0,
        'all_settings_usable_rows' => 0,
        'all_settings_users' => 0,
        'all_settings_draws' => 0,
        'history_window_usable_rows' => 0,
        'accepted_users' => 0,
        'accepted_draws' => 0,
        'tables_checked' => array(),
        'accepted_by_table' => array(),
        'window_keys_found' => array(),
        'skipped' => array(
            'identity_mismatch' => 0,
            'not_skai' => 0,
            'missing_settings' => 0,
            'missing_window' => 0,
            'invalid_draw_date' => 0,
            'not_scored_or_evaluated' => 0,
            'missing_prediction_numbers' => 0,
            'excluded_or_deleted' => 0
        ),
        'reality_audit' => array(),
        'skipped_by_table' => array(),
        'sample_rejections' => array(),
        'accepted_samples' => array(),
        'built_from_existing_database' => true,
        'mapper_note' => 'v79 makes all-settings intelligence the main learning objective. History Window remains one setting family. The mapper studies reliability, consistency, weak signals, and outlier recovery from every valid scored SKAI saved run for this exact lottery.'
    );
    $empty = array(
        'available' => false,
        'status' => 'unavailable',
        'message' => 'Shared SKAI learning is not available yet.',
        'game_id' => $gameId,
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'method_key' => 'skai',
        'profile_type' => 'history_window',
        'evidence_users' => 0,
        'evidence_runs' => 0,
        'evidence_draws' => 0,
        'confidence_score' => 0.0,
        'stability_score' => 0.0,
        'recommended_window_min' => 0,
        'recommended_window_max' => 0,
        'recommended_window_center' => 0,
        'profile_json' => array(),
        'historical_backfill' => $backfillAudit
    );
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 || !mylottoexpertSharedSkaiLearningTableReady($db)) { return $empty; }

    $rows = array();

    $primarySavedRows = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchUserSavedNumbersPrimaryRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $backfillAudit);
    if (!empty($primarySavedRows)) { $rows = array_merge($rows, $primarySavedRows); }

    $perfRows = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchPerformanceJoinedSettingsRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $backfillAudit);
    if (!empty($perfRows)) { $rows = array_merge($rows, $perfRows); }
    $eventRows = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchLearningEventsJoinedSettingsRows($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $backfillAudit);
    if (!empty($eventRows)) { $rows = array_merge($rows, $eventRows); }

    $genericSources = array(
        'skai_backtest_summary',
        'skai_backtest_metrics',
        'skai_parameter_sets',
        'skai_run_log',
        'skai_shared_learning',
        'skai_tail_recovery_summary',
        'skai_best_settings'
    );
    foreach ($genericSources as $tableName) {
        $scan = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFetchGenericTableRows($db, $tableName, $lotteryId, $gameId, 5000);
        $backfillAudit['tables_checked'][$tableName] = array(
            'exists' => !empty($scan['exists']),
            'scanned' => (int)($scan['scanned'] ?? 0),
            'identity_filter_used' => !empty($scan['identity_filter_used']),
            'read_error' => !empty($scan['read_error'])
        );
        if (!empty($scan['rows'])) { $rows = array_merge($rows, $scan['rows']); }
    }

    $scored = array();
    $users = array();
    $draws = array();
    $lastDate = '';
    $baselineLiftSum = 0.0;
    $baselineCount = 0;
    $seen = array();
    $allSettingsRows = 0;
    $allSettingsUsers = array();
    $allSettingsDraws = array();
    $allSettingsEvidenceRows = array();
    $backfillAudit['total_rows_scanned'] = count($rows);

    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        $table = (string)($row['_mle_shared_source_table'] ?? 'unknown');
        if (!isset($backfillAudit['accepted_by_table'][$table])) { $backfillAudit['accepted_by_table'][$table] = 0; }
        if (!isset($backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table])) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table] = array('identity_mismatch'=>0,'not_skai'=>0,'missing_settings'=>0,'missing_window'=>0,'invalid_draw_date'=>0,'not_scored_or_evaluated'=>0,'missing_prediction_numbers'=>0,'excluded_or_deleted'=>0);
        }
        $rowId = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('id','saved_id','run_id','parameter_set_id'), 0);
        $dedupeKey = $table . ':' . $rowId . ':' . md5(json_encode(array_slice($row, 0, 20), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES));
        if (isset($seen[$dedupeKey])) { continue; }
        $seen[$dedupeKey] = true;

        $drawDate = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiExtractDrawDateFromRow($row);
        if ($drawDate === '') {
            $drawDate = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue(mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('date_saved','generated_at','run_date','created_at','updated_at'), ''));
        }
        if ($drawDate === '') {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['invalid_draw_date']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['invalid_draw_date']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'invalid_draw_date'); }
            continue;
        }
        if (!mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIdentityMatches($row, $lotteryId, $gameId)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['identity_mismatch']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['identity_mismatch']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'identity_mismatch'); }
            continue;
        }
        if ($table === 'user_saved_numbers_primary' && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsExcluded($row)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['excluded_or_deleted']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['excluded_or_deleted']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'excluded_or_deleted'); }
            continue;
        }
        if ($table === 'user_saved_numbers_primary' && !mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowIsScoredEvaluated($row)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['not_scored_or_evaluated']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['not_scored_or_evaluated']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'not_scored_or_evaluated'); }
            continue;
        }
        if ($table === 'user_saved_numbers_primary' && !mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasPredictionNumbers($row)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['missing_prediction_numbers']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['missing_prediction_numbers']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'missing_prediction_numbers'); }
            continue;
        }
        if (!mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow($row)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['not_skai']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['not_skai']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'not_skai'); }
            continue;
        }
        if (!mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowHasSettingsEvidence($row)) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['missing_settings']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['missing_settings']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'missing_settings'); }
            continue;
        }
        $settings = mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow($row);
        $settings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $row);
        if ($table === 'user_saved_numbers_primary') {
            $allSettingsRows++;
            $asu = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('user_id','saved_user_id','created_by','owner_id'), 0);
            if ($asu > 0) { $allSettingsUsers[$asu] = true; }
            if ($drawDate !== '') { $allSettingsDraws[$drawDate] = true; }
            $allSettingsEvidenceRows[] = mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingsEvidenceRow($row, $settings, $drawDate, $table, $rowId);
        }
        $windowInfo = mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($settings);
        $window = (int)($windowInfo['window'] ?? 0);
        if ($window <= 0) {
            $backfillAudit['skipped']['missing_window']++;
            $backfillAudit['skipped_by_table'][$table]['missing_window']++;
            if (count($backfillAudit['sample_rejections']) < 25) { $backfillAudit['sample_rejections'][] = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiBuildSkipDrilldownRow($row, $table, $rowId, 'missing_window'); }
            continue;
        }
        $foundKey = (string)($windowInfo['key'] ?? 'window');
        if (!isset($backfillAudit['window_keys_found'][$foundKey])) { $backfillAudit['window_keys_found'][$foundKey] = 0; }
        $backfillAudit['window_keys_found'][$foundKey]++;

        $edge = function_exists('mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow') ? mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row) : array();
        $score = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiRowScore($row);
        if (!empty($edge)) {
            $score += ((float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0) * 8.0) + ((float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0) * 10.0);
        }
        $penLift = (float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('penalized_rank_lift','baseline_lift'), 0.0));
        $scored[] = array('window' => $window, 'score' => $score, 'draw_date' => $drawDate, 'table' => $table, 'window_key' => $foundKey);
        $backfillAudit['accepted_by_table'][$table]++;
        if (count($backfillAudit['accepted_samples']) < 8) { $backfillAudit['accepted_samples'][] = array('table'=>$table,'row_id'=>$rowId,'window'=>$window,'key'=>$foundKey,'draw_date'=>$drawDate); }
        $uid = (int)mylottoexpertSharedSkaiFirstValue($row, array('user_id','saved_user_id','created_by','owner_id'), 0);
        if ($uid > 0) { $users[$uid] = true; }
        $draws[$drawDate] = true;
        if ($lastDate === '' || strcmp($drawDate, $lastDate) > 0) { $lastDate = $drawDate; }
        $baselineLiftSum += $penLift;
        $baselineCount++;
    }

    $runCount = count($scored);
    $userCount = count($users);
    $drawCount = count($draws);
    $backfillAudit['usable_rows'] = $runCount;
    $backfillAudit['history_window_usable_rows'] = $runCount;
    $backfillAudit['all_settings_usable_rows'] = $allSettingsRows;
    $backfillAudit['all_settings_users'] = count($allSettingsUsers);
    $backfillAudit['all_settings_draws'] = count($allSettingsDraws);
    $backfillAudit['accepted_users'] = $userCount;
    $backfillAudit['accepted_draws'] = $drawCount;
    $v79SettingsIntelligence = mylottoexpertV79BuildSettingsIntelligence($allSettingsEvidenceRows);
    $backfillAudit['v79_settings_intelligence_summary'] = array(
        'usable_rows' => (int)($v79SettingsIntelligence['usable_rows'] ?? 0),
        'users' => (int)($v79SettingsIntelligence['users'] ?? 0),
        'draws' => (int)($v79SettingsIntelligence['draws'] ?? 0),
        'learning_posture' => (string)($v79SettingsIntelligence['learning_posture'] ?? 'building'),
        'top_setting_patterns' => array_slice((array)($v79SettingsIntelligence['top_setting_patterns'] ?? array()), 0, 8),
        'outlier_recovery_settings' => array_slice((array)($v79SettingsIntelligence['outlier_recovery_settings'] ?? array()), 0, 8),
        'next_controlled_test' => (array)($v79SettingsIntelligence['next_controlled_test'] ?? array())
    );

    if ($runCount < 1) {
        $profile = $empty;
        $profile['status'] = 'collecting';
        $profile['message'] = 'Historical SKAI data was found, but the mapper did not yet find rows with verified History Window evidence. Rows that are scored SKAI settings evidence but missing a window are still counted separately as all-settings evidence in the admin audit.';
        $profile['historical_backfill'] = $backfillAudit;
        $profile['global_settings_intelligence'] = $v79SettingsIntelligence;
    } else {
        usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
        $cutStrong = max(1, (int)ceil($runCount * 0.40));
        $strong = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutStrong);
        $strongVals = array_map(function($r) { return (int)$r['window']; }, $strong);
        $wMin = (int)min($strongVals);
        $wMax = (int)max($strongVals);
        $wCenter = (int)round(array_sum($strongVals) / max(1, count($strongVals)));
        $cutSweet = max(1, (int)ceil($runCount * 0.20));
        $sweet = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutSweet);
        $sweetVals = array_map(function($r) { return (int)$r['window']; }, $sweet);
        $sweetMin = (int)min($sweetVals);
        $sweetMax = (int)max($sweetVals);
        $width = max(0, $wMax - $wMin);
        $stability = max(0.0, min(1.0, 1.0 - ($width / 975.0)));
        $evidenceFactor = min(1.0, ($runCount / 60.0) * 0.45 + ($drawCount / 10.0) * 0.35 + ($userCount / 3.0) * 0.20);
        $baselineLift = $baselineCount > 0 ? ($baselineLiftSum / $baselineCount) : 0.0;
        $baselineFactor = $baselineLift > 0 ? min(1.0, $baselineLift / 5.0) : 0.0;
        $confidence = max(0.0, min(0.95, ($evidenceFactor * 0.55) + ($stability * 0.30) + ($baselineFactor * 0.15)));
        $status = 'collecting';
        if ($userCount >= 3 && $runCount >= 30 && $drawCount >= 5 && $confidence >= 0.55) { $status = 'ready'; }
        if ($userCount >= 5 && $runCount >= 80 && $drawCount >= 12 && $confidence >= 0.72) { $status = 'strong'; }
        $profileJson = array(
            'version' => 'v80_global_learning_batch_intelligence',
            'rule' => 'exact_identity_scored_user_saved_number_with_skai_settings_and_evaluated_outcome',
            'recommended_window_min' => $wMin,
            'recommended_window_max' => $wMax,
            'recommended_window_center' => $wCenter,
            'sweet_window_min' => $sweetMin,
            'sweet_window_max' => $sweetMax,
            'top_windows' => array_slice($scored, 0, 12),
            'all_settings_evidence' => array(
                'usable_rows' => (int)$allSettingsRows,
                'users' => count($allSettingsUsers),
                'draws' => count($allSettingsDraws),
                'note' => 'All-settings evidence is the main global learning objective. History Window is one setting family.'
            ),
            'global_settings_intelligence' => $v79SettingsIntelligence,
            'thresholds' => array('ready_users'=>3,'ready_runs'=>30,'ready_draws'=>5),
            'historical_backfill' => $backfillAudit,
            'updated_by' => 'mylottoexpert'
        );
        $profile = array(
            'available' => true,
            'status' => $status,
            'message' => $status === 'collecting' ? 'Shared SKAI learning found usable historical evidence and is still collecting enough support.' : 'Shared SKAI learning built this starting window from scored saved SKAI predictions with exact target identity, saved settings, and evaluated outcome evidence.',
            'game_id' => $gameId,
            'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
            'method_key' => 'skai',
            'profile_type' => 'history_window',
            'recommended_window_min' => $wMin,
            'recommended_window_max' => $wMax,
            'recommended_window_center' => $wCenter,
            'sweet_window_min' => $sweetMin,
            'sweet_window_max' => $sweetMax,
            'evidence_users' => $userCount,
            'evidence_runs' => $runCount,
            'evidence_draws' => $drawCount,
            'all_settings_evidence_users' => count($allSettingsUsers),
            'all_settings_evidence_runs' => (int)$allSettingsRows,
            'all_settings_evidence_draws' => count($allSettingsDraws),
            'confidence_score' => $confidence,
            'stability_score' => $stability,
            'baseline_lift' => $baselineLift,
            'last_scored_draw_date' => $lastDate,
            'profile_json' => $profileJson,
            'global_settings_intelligence' => $v79SettingsIntelligence,
            'historical_backfill' => $backfillAudit
        );
        try {
            $rawName = $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_shared_learning_profiles';
            $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
            $lastSql = $lastDate !== '' ? $db->quote($lastDate) : 'NULL';
            $jsonSql = $db->quote(json_encode($profileJson, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES));
            $backfillSql = $db->quote(json_encode($backfillAudit, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES));
            $sql = "INSERT INTO `{$rawName}` "
                 . "(`game_id`,`lottery_id`,`method_key`,`profile_type`,`recommended_window_min`,`recommended_window_max`,`recommended_window_center`,`sweet_window_min`,`sweet_window_max`,`evidence_users`,`evidence_runs`,`evidence_draws`,`confidence_score`,`stability_score`,`baseline_lift`,`status`,`last_scored_draw_date`,`profile_json`,`historical_backfill_json`,`last_backfill_at`,`is_active`,`created_at`,`updated_at`) VALUES ("
                 . $db->quote($gameId) . "," . (int)$lotteryId . "," . $db->quote('skai') . "," . $db->quote('history_window') . ","
                 . (int)$wMin . "," . (int)$wMax . "," . (int)$wCenter . "," . (int)$sweetMin . "," . (int)$sweetMax . ","
                 . (int)$userCount . "," . (int)$runCount . "," . (int)$drawCount . "," . number_format($confidence, 6, '.', '') . "," . number_format($stability, 6, '.', '') . "," . number_format($baselineLift, 6, '.', '') . ","
                 . $db->quote($status) . "," . $lastSql . "," . $jsonSql . "," . $backfillSql . "," . $db->quote($now) . ",1," . $db->quote($now) . "," . $db->quote($now) . ") "
                 . "ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `recommended_window_min`=VALUES(`recommended_window_min`),`recommended_window_max`=VALUES(`recommended_window_max`),`recommended_window_center`=VALUES(`recommended_window_center`),`sweet_window_min`=VALUES(`sweet_window_min`),`sweet_window_max`=VALUES(`sweet_window_max`),`evidence_users`=VALUES(`evidence_users`),`evidence_runs`=VALUES(`evidence_runs`),`evidence_draws`=VALUES(`evidence_draws`),`confidence_score`=VALUES(`confidence_score`),`stability_score`=VALUES(`stability_score`),`baseline_lift`=VALUES(`baseline_lift`),`status`=VALUES(`status`),`last_scored_draw_date`=VALUES(`last_scored_draw_date`),`profile_json`=VALUES(`profile_json`),`historical_backfill_json`=VALUES(`historical_backfill_json`),`last_backfill_at`=VALUES(`last_backfill_at`),`is_active`=1,`updated_at`=VALUES(`updated_at`)";
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {

        }
    }
    return $profile;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile($db, $lotteryId, $gameId = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 || !mylottoexpertSharedSkaiLearningTableReady($db)) { return array(); }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning_profiles'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('profile_type') . ' = ' . $db->quote('history_window'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
            ->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(1);
        if ($gameId !== '') {
            $q->where('(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ')');
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
