        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        return is_array($row) ? $row : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck($key, $label, $ok, $detail)
{
    return array(
        'key' => (string)$key,
        'label' => (string)$label,
        'ok' => (bool)$ok,
        'status' => !empty($ok) ? 'yes' : 'no',
        'detail' => (string)$detail
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV56LoadSavedRowsForBatch($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId, array $matchedSavedIds = array())
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $out = array();
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || $batchId <= 0 || !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers')) { return $out; }
    $cols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) { return $out; }
    $select = array();
    foreach (array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','label','settings_json','settings','prediction_target_json','run_uuid','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_run_order','draw_date','target_draw_date','created_at','updated_at','skai_window_size','skip_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed','best_window','tuned_window') as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $cols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($col); }
    }
    if (empty($select)) { return $out; }
    $where = array();
    if (in_array('source_batch_id', $cols, true)) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId; }
    $ids = array();
    foreach ($matchedSavedIds as $sid) { $sid = (int)$sid; if ($sid > 0) { $ids[$sid] = true; } }
    if (!empty($ids) && in_array('id', $cols, true)) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', array_keys($ids))) . ')'; }
    if (empty($where)) { return $out; }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $where) . ')')
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(250);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mylottoexpertV56CountScoredRowsForSavedBatch($db, array $savedRows, $gameId)
{
    $out = array('performance_count'=>0, 'learning_event_count'=>0, 'scored_count'=>0, 'linked_settings_count'=>0, 'run_uuid_count'=>0);
    if (empty($savedRows)) { return $out; }
    $savedIds = array();
    $runUuids = array();
    foreach ($savedRows as $row) {
        $sid = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid > 0) { $savedIds[$sid] = true; }
        $ru = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($row['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        if ($ru !== '') { $runUuids[$ru] = true; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow($row);
        $settings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $row);
        $wi = mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($settings);
        if ((int)($wi['window'] ?? 0) > 0) { $out['linked_settings_count']++; }
    }
    $out['run_uuid_count'] = count($runUuids);

    if (!empty($savedIds) && mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_performance')) {
        $pCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'skai_learning_performance');
        if (!empty($pCols)) {
            $joinParts = array();
            if (in_array('run_id', $pCols, true)) { $joinParts[] = $db->quoteName('run_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', array_keys($savedIds))) . ')'; }
            if (!empty($runUuids) && in_array('run_uuid', $pCols, true)) {
                $quoted = array();
                foreach (array_keys($runUuids) as $ru) { $quoted[] = $db->quote($ru); }
                $joinParts[] = $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $quoted) . ')';
            }
            if (!empty($joinParts)) {
                try {
                    $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('COUNT(*)')->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $joinParts) . ')');
                    if ($gameId !== '' && in_array('target_game_id', $pCols, true)) { $q->where('(' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ')'); }
                    if (in_array('draw_date', $pCols, true)) { $q->where($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' IS NOT NULL')->where($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00')); }
                    $db->setQuery($q);
                    $out['performance_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
                } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['performance_count'] = 0; }
            }
        }
    }

    if (!empty($runUuids) && mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_events')) {
        $eCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'skai_learning_events');
        if (in_array('run_uuid', $eCols, true)) {
            $quoted = array();
            foreach (array_keys($runUuids) as $ru) { $quoted[] = $db->quote($ru); }
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('COUNT(*)')->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events'))->where($db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $quoted) . ')');
                if ($gameId !== '' && in_array('game_id', $eCols, true)) { $q->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId)); }
                if (in_array('is_learned', $eCols, true)) { $q->where($db->quoteName('is_learned') . ' = 1'); }
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $out['learning_event_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['learning_event_count'] = 0; }
        }
    }
    $out['scored_count'] = (int)$out['performance_count'] + (int)$out['learning_event_count'];
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertBuildHistoryWindowEvidenceVerification($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $gameId, array $sharedProfile = array())
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $out = array(
        'version' => 'v60_full_skai_settings_evidence_mapper',
        'available' => true,
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'game_id' => $gameId,
        'batch_id' => 0,
        'batch_status' => '',
        'batch_created_at' => '',
        'batch_name' => '',
        'reason' => '',
        'checks' => array(),
        'counts' => array('batch_runs'=>0,'saved_prediction_rows'=>0,'saved_distinct_runs'=>0,'window_values_found'=>0,'scored_rows'=>0,'linked_settings_rows'=>0),
        'window_values' => array()
    );
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) {
        $out['available'] = false;
        $out['reason'] = 'Missing user or lottery identity.';
        return $out;
    }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $hasHeader = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header');
    $hasRun = mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run');
    if (!$hasHeader || !$hasRun) {
        $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('batch_created', 'History Window batch created', false, 'Batch tables are not available yet.');
        $out['reason'] = 'History Window batch tables are missing.';
        return $out;
    }

    $header = array();
    try {
        $hCols = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiSafeTableColumns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header');
        $select = array();
        foreach (array('id','user_id','lottery_id','lottery_name','batch_name','batch_type','batch_source','source_page','status','test_variable','range_min','range_max','recommended_value','precision_lock_stage','recommendation_level','precision_progress_level','evidence_summary','created_at') as $col) {
            if (in_array($col, $hCols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($col); }
        }
        if (empty($select)) { $select[] = '*'; }
        $historyParts = array();
        if (in_array('test_variable', $hCols, true)) { $historyParts[] = $db->quoteName('test_variable') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%History Window%'); }
        if (in_array('batch_type', $hCols, true)) {
            $historyParts[] = $db->quoteName('batch_type') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%History Window%');
            $historyParts[] = $db->quoteName('batch_type') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%History Horizon%');
            $historyParts[] = $db->quoteName('batch_type') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%Horizon%');
            $historyParts[] = $db->quoteName('batch_type') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%Window%');
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        if (!empty($historyParts)) { $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $historyParts) . ')'); }
        $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $header = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($header)) { $header = array(); }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { $header = array(); }

    $batchId = (int)($header['id'] ?? 0);
    $out['batch_id'] = $batchId;
    $out['batch_status'] = (string)($header['status'] ?? '');
    $out['batch_created_at'] = (string)($header['created_at'] ?? '');
    $out['batch_name'] = (string)($header['batch_name'] ?? '');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('batch_created', 'History Window batch created', $batchId > 0, $batchId > 0 ? ('Batch #' . $batchId . ' found. Status: ' . (string)($header['status'] ?? 'unknown') . '.') : 'No History Window batch has been created for this lottery yet.');

    $runs = array();
    if ($batchId > 0) { $runs = mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $userId, $lotteryId); }
    $runCount = count($runs);
    $out['counts']['batch_runs'] = $runCount;

    $windowValues = array();
    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $settings = array();
        if (isset($run['_settings']) && is_array($run['_settings'])) { $settings = $run['_settings']; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $run);
        $info = mylottoexpertExtractSkaiWindowInfo($settings);
        $w = (int)($info['window'] ?? 0);
        if ($w > 0) { $windowValues[$w] = true; }
    }
    $out['window_values'] = array_map('intval', array_keys($windowValues));
    sort($out['window_values']);
    $out['counts']['window_values_found'] = count($out['window_values']);
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('batch_run_rows', '9 batch run definitions exist', $runCount >= 9, $runCount . ' batch run definition' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' found.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('window_values_captured', 'settings/window values captured', $runCount >= 9 && count($windowValues) >= 8, count($windowValues) . ' distinct History Window value' . (count($windowValues) === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' found: ' . (!empty($out['window_values']) ? implode(', ', $out['window_values']) : 'none') . '.');

    $saveCounts = ($batchId > 0 && function_exists('mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves')) ? mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId) : array('saved_count'=>0,'saved_run_count'=>0,'matched_saved_ids'=>array());
    $savedRows = mylottoexpertV56LoadSavedRowsForBatch($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId, (array)($saveCounts['matched_saved_ids'] ?? array()));
    $savedCount = max((int)($saveCounts['saved_count'] ?? 0), count($savedRows));
    $savedRunCount = max((int)($saveCounts['saved_run_count'] ?? 0), $savedCount);
    $out['counts']['saved_prediction_rows'] = $savedCount;
    $out['counts']['saved_distinct_runs'] = $savedRunCount;
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('saved_rows', '9 runs saved', $savedRunCount >= 9, $savedRunCount . ' distinct saved SKAI run' . ($savedRunCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' linked to the History Window batch.');

    $scored = mylottoexpertV56CountScoredRowsForSavedBatch($db, $savedRows, $gameId);
    $out['counts']['scored_rows'] = (int)($scored['scored_count'] ?? 0);
    $out['counts']['linked_settings_rows'] = (int)($scored['linked_settings_count'] ?? 0);
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('draw_scored', 'draw scored', (int)$out['counts']['scored_rows'] > 0, (int)$out['counts']['scored_rows'] . ' scored outcome row' . ((int)$out['counts']['scored_rows'] === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' found for saved rows from this batch.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('scored_linked_settings', 'scored outcome linked to saved settings', ((int)$out['counts']['scored_rows'] > 0 && (int)$out['counts']['linked_settings_rows'] > 0), (int)$out['counts']['linked_settings_rows'] . ' saved row' . ((int)$out['counts']['linked_settings_rows'] === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' include usable window/settings data.');

    $failed = array();
    foreach ($out['checks'] as $check) {
        if (empty($check['ok'])) { $failed[] = (string)$check['label']; }
    }
    $usable = empty($failed);
    $sharedBackfill = (array)($sharedProfile['historical_backfill'] ?? array());
    $sharedUsable = (int)($sharedBackfill['usable_rows'] ?? 0);
    $detail = $usable ? 'This History Window batch has the required batch, saved-run, scored-outcome, and saved-settings chain.' : ('Not usable yet: ' . implode(', ', $failed) . '.');
    if ($usable && $sharedUsable > 0) { $detail .= ' Shared mapper currently reports ' . $sharedUsable . ' usable scored SKAI row' . ($sharedUsable === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' for this lottery.'; }
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('usable_shared_learning', 'usable for shared learning', $usable, $detail);
    $out['usable_for_shared_learning'] = $usable;
    $out['reason'] = $usable ? 'Ready: the History Window evidence chain is complete for at least one scored draw.' : $detail;
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV60NormalizeSettingScalar($value)
{
    if (is_bool($value)) { return $value ? '1' : '0'; }
    if (is_int($value)) { return (string)$value; }
    if (is_float($value)) { return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($value, 6, '.', ''), '0'), '.'); }
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') { return ''; }
    $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $value);
    return substr($value, 0, 120);
}

function mylottoexpertV60FlattenSettings(array $settings, $prefix = '', $depth = 0)
{
    $out = array();
    if ($depth > 3) { return $out; }
    foreach ($settings as $key => $value) {
        $cleanKey = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '_', (string)$key));
        if ($cleanKey === '') { continue; }
        $path = $prefix === '' ? $cleanKey : ($prefix . '.' . $cleanKey);
        if (is_array($value)) {
            $nested = mylottoexpertV60FlattenSettings($value, $path, $depth + 1);
            foreach ($nested as $nk => $nv) { $out[$nk] = $nv; }
        } elseif (is_scalar($value) || $value === null) {
            $scalar = mylottoexpertV60NormalizeSettingScalar($value);
            if ($scalar !== '') { $out[$path] = $scalar; }
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV60FirstSettingValue(array $flat, array $needles)
{
    foreach ($needles as $needle) {
        $needle = strtolower((string)$needle);
        foreach ($flat as $key => $value) {
            $k = strtolower((string)$key);
            if ($k === $needle || substr($k, -strlen('.' . $needle)) === '.' . $needle) {
                return array('value' => $value, 'source_key' => $key);
            }
        }
    }
    return array('value' => '', 'source_key' => '');
}

function mylottoexpertV60SupportedSettingDefinitions()
{
    return array(
        'history_window' => array('label'=>'History Window / Draw Depth','keys'=>array('draws_used','draws_analyzed','skai_window','skai_window_size','skip_window','best_window','tuned_window','selected_window','selected_window_size','history_window','history_window_size','history_draws','window_draws','lookback_draws','lookback_window','draw_window','sample_window','training_window','window','window_size','test_value','source_batch_test_value','batch_run_test_value','batch_header_recommended_value','batch_test_value','source_batch_recommended_value','recommended_value','source_batch_window','mle_window_value')),
        'blend_ai_pct' => array('label'=>'AI Blend Percent','keys'=>array('blend_ai_pct','ai_blend_pct','blend_pct','ai_weight','blend_ai','frequency_ai_pct')),
        'blend_skip_pct' => array('label'=>'Skip Blend Percent','keys'=>array('blend_skip_pct','skip_blend_pct','skip_weight','blend_skip')),
        'risk_profile' => array('label'=>'Risk Profile','keys'=>array('risk_profile','profile','selected_profile','training_style','coverage_style')),
        'strategy' => array('label'=>'Strategy','keys'=>array('strategy','strategy_profile','skai_mode_method','method_strategy','run_strategy')),
        'focus_profile' => array('label'=>'Focus Profile','keys'=>array('focus_profile','precision_profile','horizon_profile','learning_focus','test_variable')),
        'model_family' => array('label'=>'Model Family','keys'=>array('model_family','engine_version','model_version','engine','source_mode','final_rank_source')),
        'batch_type' => array('label'=>'Batch Type','keys'=>array('batch_type','run_mode','skai_run_mode','prediction_mode','predictionMode')),
        'top_n_combos' => array('label'=>'Combo Count / Top N','keys'=>array('top_n_combos','combo_count','comboCountSaved','combo_count_preference','final_prediction_set_count')),
        'sampling_temperature' => array('label'=>'Sampling Temperature','keys'=>array('sampling_temperature','temperature')),
        'diversity_penalty' => array('label'=>'Diversity Penalty','keys'=>array('diversity_penalty','diversity')),
        'gap_scale' => array('label'=>'Gap Scale','keys'=>array('gap_scale','gap_weight')),
        'laplace_k' => array('label'=>'Laplace K','keys'=>array('laplace_k','laplace','smoothing_k')),
        'epochs' => array('label'=>'Epochs','keys'=>array('epochs','training_epochs')),
        'batch_size' => array('label'=>'Batch Size','keys'=>array('batch_size','training_batch_size')),
        'calibration_enabled' => array('label'=>'Calibration Enabled','keys'=>array('calibration_enabled','supports_calibration')),
        'tail_recovery_enabled' => array('label'=>'Tail Recovery Enabled','keys'=>array('tail_recovery_enabled','supports_tail_recovery')),
        'pairwise_enabled' => array('label'=>'Pairwise Enabled','keys'=>array('pairwise_enabled','supports_pairs')),
        'gibbs_enabled' => array('label'=>'MCMC / Gibbs Enabled','keys'=>array('gibbs_enabled','supports_gibbs','mcmc_enabled'))
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV60RowQualityScore(array $row)
{
    $score = 0.0;
    foreach (array('weighted_quality_score','quality_score','final_score','score','learning_score','stability_score','confidence_score','baseline_lift','avg_rank_lift','penalized_rank_lift') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) {
            $value = (float)$row[$key];
            if ($key === 'weighted_quality_score') { $score += $value * 4.0; }
            elseif ($key === 'avg_rank_lift') { $score += $value * 8.0; }
            elseif ($key === 'penalized_rank_lift') { $score += $value * 10.0; }
            else { $score += $value; }
        }
    }
    $score += ((int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? $row['top_10_hits'] ?? 0)) * 0.80;
    $score += ((int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? $row['top_20_hits'] ?? 0)) * 0.35;
    $score += ((int)($row['main_hit_count'] ?? $row['hit_count'] ?? $row['hits'] ?? $row['total_hits'] ?? 0)) * 0.60;
    if ($score == 0.0) { $score = 0.01; }
    return $score;
}

function mylottoexpertV60LooksLikeSkaiSavedRow(array $row)
{
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow') && mylottoexpertSharedSkaiIsSkaiRow($row)) { return true; }
    foreach (array('analysis_method_key','saved_analysis_method_key','method_key','method','source','origin_source','saved_source','model_family','engine') as $key) {
        $v = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$key] ?? '')));
        if ($v === 'skai' || $v === 'skai_prediction' || $v === 'skai_batch' || $v === 'mle_precision_lock_batch') { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertV60SafeDateValue($value)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') { return ''; }
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue')) {
        $value = mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($value);
    }
    $value = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)$value);
    return preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}\-\d{2}$/', $value) ? $value : '';
}

function mylottoexpertV60ExtractOutcomeMetrics(array $row)
{
    $mainHits = 0;
    foreach (array('main_hit_count','main_hits','hit_count','hits','total_hits','direct_hits','matched_main') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) { $mainHits = max($mainHits, (int)$row[$key]); }
    }
    $extraHits = 0;
    foreach (array('extra_hit_count','extra_hits','bonus_hits','matched_extra','powerball_hits') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) { $extraHits = max($extraHits, (int)$row[$key]); }
    }
    $top10Hits = 0;
    foreach (array('top10_hits','top_10_hits','top10_main_hits','top_10_main_hits') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) { $top10Hits = max($top10Hits, (int)$row[$key]); }
    }
    $top20Hits = 0;
    foreach (array('top20_hits','top_20_hits','top20_main_hits','top_20_main_hits') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key])) { $top20Hits = max($top20Hits, (int)$row[$key]); }
    }
    $allMainFound = false;
    foreach (array('all_main_found','all_main_hit','all_numbers_found','jackpot_main_found') as $key) {
        if (!empty($row[$key]) && (string)$row[$key] !== '0') { $allMainFound = true; }
    }
    $rawScore = mylottoexpertV60RowQualityScore($row);
    $normalized = 0.0;
    $normalized += min(30.0, max(0, $mainHits) * 8.0);
    $normalized += min(18.0, max(0, $extraHits) * 6.0);
    $normalized += min(18.0, max(0, $top10Hits) * 4.5);
    $normalized += min(12.0, max(0, $top20Hits) * 2.0);
    if ($allMainFound) { $normalized += 20.0; }
    $normalized += min(25.0, max(0.0, (float)$rawScore) * 2.0);
    if ($normalized <= 0.0 && $rawScore > 0.0) { $normalized = min(20.0, $rawScore * 2.0); }
    return array(
        'main_hits' => $mainHits,
        'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
        'top10_hits' => $top10Hits,
        'top20_hits' => $top20Hits,
        'all_main_found' => $allMainFound ? 1 : 0,
        'raw_score' => (float)$rawScore,
        'normalized_score' => (float)max(0.0, min(100.0, $normalized))
    );
}

function mylottoexpertV60ComputeEvidenceQuality(array $row, array $flat, $drawDate, $runUuid, $savedId)
{
    $score = 0;
    $reasons = array();
    if ((int)$savedId > 0) { $score += 12; $reasons[] = 'saved_row_id'; }
    if ((string)$runUuid !== '') { $score += 12; $reasons[] = 'run_uuid'; }
    if ((string)$drawDate !== '') { $score += 14; $reasons[] = 'draw_date'; }
    $lotteryId = (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? $row['target_lottery_id'] ?? $row['saved_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($lotteryId > 0) { $score += 10; $reasons[] = 'lottery_id'; }
    $gameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? $row['saved_game_id'] ?? $row['saved_target_game_id'] ?? ''));
    if ($gameId !== '') { $score += 10; $reasons[] = 'game_id'; }
    $settingsCount = count($flat);
    if ($settingsCount >= 5) { $score += 16; $reasons[] = 'settings_snapshot'; }
    elseif ($settingsCount > 0) { $score += 8; $reasons[] = 'partial_settings_snapshot'; }
    $metrics = mylottoexpertV60ExtractOutcomeMetrics($row);
    if ((int)$metrics['main_hits'] > 0 || (int)$metrics['extra_hits'] > 0 || (float)$metrics['raw_score'] > 0.01) {
        $score += 16; $reasons[] = 'scored_outcome_metrics';
    }
    if (!empty($row['batch_uuid']) || !empty($row['batch_id']) || !empty($row['batch_index']) || !empty($row['batch_run_id'])) {
        $score += 5; $reasons[] = 'batch_identity';
    }
    if (!empty($row['evaluation_json']) || !empty($row['score_json']) || !empty($row['settings_json']) || !empty($row['full_settings_json'])) {
        $score += 5; $reasons[] = 'structured_json';
    }
    return array('score' => min(100, $score), 'reasons' => $reasons, 'settings_count' => $settingsCount, 'metrics' => $metrics);
}

function mylottoexpertV60SignalClass($count, $strongCount, $weakCount, $distinctDraws, $avgScore)
{
    $count = max(0, (int)$count);
    $strongCount = max(0, (int)$strongCount);
    $weakCount = max(0, (int)$weakCount);
    $distinctDraws = max(0, (int)$distinctDraws);
    $avgScore = (float)$avgScore;
    $strongRate = $count > 0 ? ($strongCount / $count) : 0.0;
    $weakRate = $count > 0 ? ($weakCount / $count) : 0.0;
    $confidence = 0;
    $confidence += min(35, $count * 4);
    $confidence += min(25, $distinctDraws * 5);
    $confidence += min(25, (int)round($strongRate * 25));
    $confidence += min(15, (int)round(min(100.0, max(0.0, $avgScore)) / 100.0 * 15));
    $confidence -= min(20, (int)round($weakRate * 20));
    $confidence = max(0, min(100, $confidence));
    if ($count >= 12 && $distinctDraws >= 4 && $strongRate >= 0.50 && $weakRate <= 0.35 && $confidence >= 70) {
        return array('class' => 'strong_candidate', 'confidence' => $confidence, 'message' => 'Repeated strong signal. Candidate for controlled protection or tighter testing.');
    }
    if ($count >= 6 && $distinctDraws >= 2 && $strongRate >= 0.35 && $confidence >= 45) {
        return array('class' => 'promising', 'confidence' => $confidence, 'message' => 'Promising signal. Keep collecting scored outcomes before locking.');
    }
    if ($count >= 5 && $weakRate >= 0.65 && $strongRate <= 0.20) {
        return array('class' => 'weak_or_harmful', 'confidence' => max(20, $confidence), 'message' => 'Weak signal. Use as contrast evidence and avoid over-promoting without new proof.');
    }
    return array('class' => 'collecting', 'confidence' => $confidence, 'message' => 'Collecting evidence. Not enough repeated scored support yet.');
}

function mylottoexpertV60BuildSettingAdvice($label, array $valueSignals, $distinctValues)
{
    if (empty($valueSignals)) {
        return array('action' => 'collect', 'title' => 'Collect more scored evidence', 'body' => $label . ' has not produced enough verified scored settings evidence yet.');
    }
    usort($valueSignals, function($a, $b) {
        if ((int)$b['confidence'] === (int)$a['confidence']) { return ((float)$b['avg_score'] > (float)$a['avg_score']) ? 1 : -1; }
        return ((int)$b['confidence'] > (int)$a['confidence']) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    $best = $valueSignals[0];
    $cls = (string)($best['signal_class'] ?? 'collecting');
    if ($cls === 'strong_candidate') {
        return array('action' => 'protect_or_tighten', 'title' => 'Protect this signal while testing carefully', 'body' => $label . ' has a repeated strong candidate. Test nearby or related values without changing unrelated settings.', 'candidate' => (string)$best['value']);
    }
    if ($cls === 'promising') {
        return array('action' => 'continue_testing', 'title' => 'Continue controlled testing', 'body' => $label . ' has a promising candidate but needs more completed draws before locking.', 'candidate' => (string)$best['value']);
    }
    if ((int)$distinctValues > 1) {
        return array('action' => 'isolate_variable', 'title' => 'Isolate this setting in a controlled test', 'body' => $label . ' has multiple observed values but not enough separation yet. Test one variable at a time.', 'candidate' => (string)$best['value']);
    }
    return array('action' => 'collect', 'title' => 'Keep collecting', 'body' => $label . ' has evidence, but it is not mature enough to guide future runs yet.', 'candidate' => (string)$best['value']);
}

function mylottoexpertV60BuildNextBestTests(array $profiles)
{
    $tests = array();
    foreach ($profiles as $key => $profile) {
        $advice = (array)($profile['advice'] ?? array());
        $action = (string)($advice['action'] ?? 'collect');
        $priority = 0;
        if ($action === 'protect_or_tighten') { $priority = 90; }
        elseif ($action === 'continue_testing') { $priority = 70; }
        elseif ($action === 'isolate_variable') { $priority = 55; }
        else { $priority = 20; }
        $coverage = (int)($profile['observed_count'] ?? 0);
        $confidence = (int)($profile['best_confidence'] ?? 0);
        $tests[] = array(
            'setting_key' => (string)$key,
            'setting_label' => (string)($profile['label'] ?? $key),
            'priority' => $priority + min(9, (int)floor($confidence / 10)),
            'action' => $action,
            'candidate' => (string)($advice['candidate'] ?? ''),
            'title' => (string)($advice['title'] ?? 'Collect more scored evidence'),
            'body' => (string)($advice['body'] ?? 'Keep collecting completed scored evidence.'),
            'coverage' => $coverage,
            'confidence' => $confidence
        );
    }
    usort($tests, function($a, $b) {
        if ((int)$b['priority'] === (int)$a['priority']) { return ((int)$b['confidence'] > (int)$a['confidence']) ? 1 : -1; }
        return ((int)$b['priority'] > (int)$a['priority']) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    return array_slice($tests, 0, 5);
}

function mylottoexpertV60BuildFullSettingsEvidenceMapper($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, array $activeRows, array $perfRows, array $savedById)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $defs = mylottoexpertV60SupportedSettingDefinitions();
    $out = array(
        'available' => false,
        'status' => 'collecting',
        'message' => 'Elite SKAI settings intelligence is collecting verified scored evidence.',
        'version' => 'v60_elite_skai_settings_intelligence_engine',
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'game_id' => $gameId,
        'counts' => array(
            'saved_skai_rows' => 0,
            'scored_skai_rows' => 0,
            'settings_snapshot_rows' => 0,
            'linked_scored_settings_rows' => 0,
            'distinct_draws' => 0,
            'distinct_users' => 0,
            'settings_supported' => 0,
            'settings_missing' => count($defs),
            'elite_quality_avg' => 0,
            'strong_signal_settings' => 0,
            'promising_signal_settings' => 0,
            'weak_signal_settings' => 0
        ),
        'checks' => array(),
        'readiness' => array('tier'=>'collecting','score'=>0,'message'=>'The intelligence layer is collecting verified scored evidence.'),
        'next_best_tests' => array(),
        'setting_profiles' => array(),
        'missing_setting_keys' => array(),
        'audit' => array(
            'rule' => 'exact_lottery_saved_settings_joined_to_scored_outcome',
            'note' => 'Reads saved/scored evidence only. Pending runs are counted as saved evidence but are not used as scored learning proof.',
            'sample_rows' => array()
        )
    );

    $savedSkaiIds = array();
    $users = array();
    foreach ($activeRows as $r) {
        if (!is_array($r)) { continue; }
        if (!mylottoexpertV60LooksLikeSkaiSavedRow($r)) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($r['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid > 0) { $savedSkaiIds[$sid] = true; }
        $uid = (int)($r['user_id'] ?? $r['saved_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($uid > 0) { $users[$uid] = true; }
    }
    $out['counts']['saved_skai_rows'] = count($savedSkaiIds);

    $accepted = array();
    $draws = array();
    $runUuids = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $pRow) {
        if (!is_array($pRow)) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($pRow['__saved_id'] ?? $pRow['run_id'] ?? $pRow['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        $saved = ($sid > 0 && isset($savedById[$sid]) && is_array($savedById[$sid])) ? $savedById[$sid] : array();
        $merged = $pRow;
        foreach ($saved as $k => $v) {
            if (!array_key_exists($k, $merged) || $merged[$k] === '' || $merged[$k] === null) { $merged[$k] = $v; }
            else { $merged['saved_' . $k] = $v; }
        }
        $merged['_mle_shared_source_table'] = 'v60_active_performance_join_saved_settings';
        if (!mylottoexpertV60LooksLikeSkaiSavedRow($merged)) { continue; }
        if ($lotteryId > 0) {
            $rowLot = (int)($merged['lottery_id'] ?? $merged['target_lottery_id'] ?? $merged['saved_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            if ($rowLot > 0 && $rowLot !== $lotteryId) { continue; }
        }
        if ($gameId !== '') {
            $rowGame = trim((string)($merged['target_game_id'] ?? $merged['game_id'] ?? $merged['saved_game_id'] ?? $merged['saved_target_game_id'] ?? ''));
            if ($rowGame !== '' && $rowGame !== $gameId) { continue; }
        }
        $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow') ? mylottoexpertDecodeSettingsFromSharedLearningRow($merged) : array();
        $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings') ? mylottoexpertMergeSharedLearningSettings($settings, $merged) : array_merge($settings, $merged);
        $flat = mylottoexpertV60FlattenSettings($settings);
        if (empty($flat)) { continue; }
        $drawDate = function_exists('mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue') ? mylottoexpertSharedSkaiNormalizeDateValue($merged['draw_date'] ?? $merged['target_draw_date'] ?? '') : trim((string)($merged['draw_date'] ?? $merged['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($drawDate === '') { continue; }
        $uid = (int)($merged['user_id'] ?? $merged['saved_user_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($uid > 0) { $users[$uid] = true; }
        $draws[$drawDate] = true;
        $ru = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($merged['run_uuid'] ?? $merged['saved_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        if ($ru !== '') { $runUuids[$ru] = true; }
        $quality = mylottoexpertV60ComputeEvidenceQuality($merged, $flat, $drawDate, $ru, $sid);
        $metrics = (array)($quality['metrics'] ?? array());
        $accepted[] = array('row'=>$merged, 'flat'=>$flat, 'score'=>(float)($metrics['normalized_score'] ?? mylottoexpertV60RowQualityScore($merged)), 'draw_date'=>$drawDate, 'saved_id'=>$sid, 'run_uuid'=>$ru, 'quality'=>$quality, 'metrics'=>$metrics);
    }

    $out['counts']['scored_skai_rows'] = count($accepted);
    $out['counts']['settings_snapshot_rows'] = count($accepted);
    $out['counts']['linked_scored_settings_rows'] = count($accepted);
    $out['counts']['distinct_draws'] = count($draws);
    $out['counts']['distinct_users'] = count($users);

    usort($accepted, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $strongCut = max(1, (int)ceil(count($accepted) * 0.30));
    $weakCut = max(1, (int)ceil(count($accepted) * 0.25));
    $strong = array_slice($accepted, 0, $strongCut);
    $weak = array_slice(array_reverse($accepted), 0, $weakCut);
    $qualityTotal = 0; foreach ($accepted as $qa) { $qualityTotal += (int)($qa['quality']['score'] ?? 0); } unset($qa);
    $out['counts']['elite_quality_avg'] = count($accepted) > 0 ? (int)round($qualityTotal / count($accepted)) : 0;

    foreach ($defs as $key => $def) {
        $allValues = array();
        $strongValues = array();
        $weakValues = array();
        $sourceKeys = array();
        $valueStats = array();
        foreach ($accepted as $item) {
            $found = mylottoexpertV60FirstSettingValue((array)$item['flat'], (array)$def['keys']);
            if ((string)$found['value'] !== '') {
                $val = (string)$found['value'];
                if (!isset($allValues[$val])) { $allValues[$val] = 0; }
                $allValues[$val]++;
                $sourceKeys[(string)$found['source_key']] = true;
                if (!isset($valueStats[$val])) {
                    $valueStats[$val] = array('value'=>$val,'count'=>0,'strong_count'=>0,'weak_count'=>0,'score_total'=>0.0,'quality_total'=>0,'draws'=>array(),'users'=>array(),'main_hits_total'=>0,'extra_hits_total'=>0,'top10_hits_total'=>0,'top20_hits_total'=>0,'all_main_found_total'=>0,'latest_draw_date'=>'');
                }
                $valueStats[$val]['count']++;
                $valueStats[$val]['score_total'] += (float)($item['score'] ?? 0.0);
                $valueStats[$val]['quality_total'] += (int)($item['quality']['score'] ?? 0);
                $valueStats[$val]['draws'][(string)($item['draw_date'] ?? '')] = true;
                $uid = (int)($item['row']['user_id'] ?? $item['row']['saved_user_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($uid > 0) { $valueStats[$val]['users'][$uid] = true; }
                $m = (array)($item['metrics'] ?? array());
                $valueStats[$val]['main_hits_total'] += (int)($m['main_hits'] ?? 0);
                $valueStats[$val]['extra_hits_total'] += (int)($m['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
                $valueStats[$val]['top10_hits_total'] += (int)($m['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
                $valueStats[$val]['top20_hits_total'] += (int)($m['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
                $valueStats[$val]['all_main_found_total'] += (int)($m['all_main_found'] ?? 0);
                if ((string)($item['draw_date'] ?? '') > (string)$valueStats[$val]['latest_draw_date']) { $valueStats[$val]['latest_draw_date'] = (string)$item['draw_date']; }
            }
        }
        foreach ($strong as $item) {
            $found = mylottoexpertV60FirstSettingValue((array)$item['flat'], (array)$def['keys']);
            if ((string)$found['value'] !== '') {
                $val = (string)$found['value'];
                if (!isset($strongValues[$val])) { $strongValues[$val] = 0; }
                $strongValues[$val]++;
                if (isset($valueStats[$val])) { $valueStats[$val]['strong_count']++; }
            }
        }
        foreach ($weak as $item) {
            $found = mylottoexpertV60FirstSettingValue((array)$item['flat'], (array)$def['keys']);
            if ((string)$found['value'] !== '') {
                $val = (string)$found['value'];
                if (!isset($weakValues[$val])) { $weakValues[$val] = 0; }
                $weakValues[$val]++;
                if (isset($valueStats[$val])) { $valueStats[$val]['weak_count']++; }
            }
        }
        arsort($allValues);
        arsort($strongValues);
        arsort($weakValues);
        if (!empty($allValues)) {
            $valueSignals = array();
            foreach ($valueStats as $val => $stats) {
                $cnt = max(1, (int)$stats['count']);
                $distinctDrawCount = count((array)$stats['draws']);
                $avgScore = (float)$stats['score_total'] / $cnt;
                $signal = mylottoexpertV60SignalClass($cnt, (int)$stats['strong_count'], (int)$stats['weak_count'], $distinctDrawCount, $avgScore);
                $valueSignals[] = array(
                    'value' => (string)$val,
                    'count' => $cnt,
                    'strong_count' => (int)$stats['strong_count'],
                    'weak_count' => (int)$stats['weak_count'],
                    'distinct_draws' => $distinctDrawCount,
                    'distinct_users' => count((array)$stats['users']),
                    'avg_score' => (float)$avgScore,
                    'avg_quality' => (int)round((float)$stats['quality_total'] / $cnt),
                    'main_hits_total' => (int)$stats['main_hits_total'],
                    'extra_hits_total' => (int)$stats['extra_hits_total'],
                    'top10_hits_total' => (int)$stats['top10_hits_total'],
                    'top20_hits_total' => (int)$stats['top20_hits_total'],
                    'all_main_found_total' => (int)$stats['all_main_found_total'],
                    'latest_draw_date' => (string)$stats['latest_draw_date'],
                    'signal_class' => (string)$signal['class'],
                    'confidence' => (int)$signal['confidence'],
                    'signal_message' => (string)$signal['message']
                );
            }
            usort($valueSignals, function($a, $b) {
                if ((int)$b['confidence'] === (int)$a['confidence']) { return ((float)$b['avg_score'] > (float)$a['avg_score']) ? 1 : -1; }
                return ((int)$b['confidence'] > (int)$a['confidence']) ? 1 : -1;
            });
            $topAll = array_slice($allValues, 0, 5, true);
            $topStrong = array_slice($strongValues, 0, 5, true);
            $advice = mylottoexpertV60BuildSettingAdvice((string)$def['label'], $valueSignals, count($allValues));
            $bestConfidence = !empty($valueSignals) ? (int)$valueSignals[0]['confidence'] : 0;
            if (!empty($valueSignals) && (string)$valueSignals[0]['signal_class'] === 'strong_candidate') { $out['counts']['strong_signal_settings']++; }
            elseif (!empty($valueSignals) && (string)$valueSignals[0]['signal_class'] === 'promising') { $out['counts']['promising_signal_settings']++; }
            elseif (!empty($valueSignals) && (string)$valueSignals[0]['signal_class'] === 'weak_or_harmful') { $out['counts']['weak_signal_settings']++; }
            $out['setting_profiles'][$key] = array(
                'label' => (string)$def['label'],
                'observed_count' => array_sum($allValues),
                'distinct_values' => count($allValues),
                'top_values' => $topAll,
                'top_strong_values' => $topStrong,
                'top_weak_values' => array_slice($weakValues, 0, 5, true),
                'value_signals' => array_slice($valueSignals, 0, 8),
                'best_confidence' => $bestConfidence,
                'advice' => $advice,
                'source_keys' => array_slice(array_keys($sourceKeys), 0, 8)
            );
        } else {
            $out['missing_setting_keys'][] = $key;
        }
    }
    $out['counts']['settings_supported'] = count($out['setting_profiles']);
    $out['counts']['settings_missing'] = count($out['missing_setting_keys']);
    $out['next_best_tests'] = mylottoexpertV60BuildNextBestTests($out['setting_profiles']);
    $readinessScore = 0;
    $readinessScore += min(25, (int)$out['counts']['scored_skai_rows']);
    $readinessScore += min(20, (int)$out['counts']['distinct_draws'] * 4);
    $readinessScore += min(20, (int)$out['counts']['settings_supported'] * 2);
    $readinessScore += min(20, (int)$out['counts']['elite_quality_avg'] / 5);
    $readinessScore += min(15, ((int)$out['counts']['strong_signal_settings'] * 5) + ((int)$out['counts']['promising_signal_settings'] * 3));
    $readinessScore = max(0, min(100, (int)round($readinessScore)));
    $tier = 'collecting';
    $tierMessage = 'Elite settings intelligence is collecting verified scored evidence. Do not lock settings yet.';
    if ($readinessScore >= 80 && (int)$out['counts']['distinct_draws'] >= 5 && (int)$out['counts']['settings_supported'] >= 8) { $tier = 'elite_ready'; $tierMessage = 'Elite settings intelligence has enough repeated scored evidence for controlled admin guidance.'; }
    elseif ($readinessScore >= 60 && (int)$out['counts']['distinct_draws'] >= 3) { $tier = 'actionable'; $tierMessage = 'Settings intelligence is actionable for controlled testing, but still needs more completed draws before locking.'; }
    elseif ($readinessScore >= 35) { $tier = 'building'; $tierMessage = 'Settings intelligence is building. Use it to pick the next test, not to lock conclusions.'; }
    $out['readiness'] = array('tier'=>$tier,'score'=>$readinessScore,'message'=>$tierMessage);

    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('saved_skai_rows', 'SKAI saved runs exist', $out['counts']['saved_skai_rows'] > 0, $out['counts']['saved_skai_rows'] . ' saved SKAI row(s) found for this lottery.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('scored_skai_rows', 'SKAI scored outcomes exist', $out['counts']['scored_skai_rows'] > 0, $out['counts']['scored_skai_rows'] . ' scored SKAI row(s) joined to saved settings.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('settings_snapshot_rows', 'Full settings snapshots captured', $out['counts']['settings_snapshot_rows'] > 0, $out['counts']['settings_snapshot_rows'] . ' scored row(s) include decodable settings snapshots.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('setting_coverage', 'Multiple SKAI settings mapped', $out['counts']['settings_supported'] >= 3, $out['counts']['settings_supported'] . ' supported setting area(s) mapped.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('draw_support', 'Completed draw support exists', $out['counts']['distinct_draws'] > 0, $out['counts']['distinct_draws'] . ' distinct scored draw date(s) found.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('elite_quality', 'Evidence quality scored', $out['counts']['elite_quality_avg'] >= 50, $out['counts']['elite_quality_avg'] . ' average evidence-quality score.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('repeatable_signals', 'Repeatable setting signals found', ((int)$out['counts']['strong_signal_settings'] + (int)$out['counts']['promising_signal_settings']) > 0, ((int)$out['counts']['strong_signal_settings'] + (int)$out['counts']['promising_signal_settings']) . ' promising or strong setting area(s).');

    if (!empty($accepted)) {
        $out['available'] = true;
        $out['status'] = ((string)($out['readiness']['tier'] ?? 'collecting') === 'elite_ready' || (string)($out['readiness']['tier'] ?? 'collecting') === 'actionable') ? 'ready' : 'collecting';
        $out['message'] = (string)($out['readiness']['message'] ?? 'Elite settings intelligence is collecting scored support.');
        foreach (array_slice($accepted, 0, 8) as $sample) {
            $out['audit']['sample_rows'][] = array(
                'saved_id' => (int)$sample['saved_id'],
                'run_uuid' => (string)$sample['run_uuid'],
                'draw_date' => (string)$sample['draw_date'],
                'score' => (float)$sample['score'],
                'quality' => (int)($sample['quality']['score'] ?? 0)
            );
        }
    }

    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV61SignalWeight($class, $confidence)
{
    $confidence = max(0, min(100, (int)$confidence));
    if ($class === 'strong_candidate') { return 100 + $confidence; }
    if ($class === 'promising') { return 70 + $confidence; }
    if ($class === 'weak_or_harmful') { return -100 + $confidence; }
    return 20 + $confidence;
}

function mylottoexpertV61PickBestValueSignal(array $profile)
{
    $signals = (array)($profile['value_signals'] ?? array());
    if (empty($signals)) { return null; }
    usort($signals, function($a, $b) {
        $aw = mylottoexpertV61SignalWeight((string)($a['signal_class'] ?? ''), (int)($a['confidence'] ?? 0));
        $bw = mylottoexpertV61SignalWeight((string)($b['signal_class'] ?? ''), (int)($b['confidence'] ?? 0));
        if ($aw === $bw) {
            $as = (float)($a['avg_score'] ?? 0.0);
            $bs = (float)($b['avg_score'] ?? 0.0);
            if ($as == $bs) { return 0; }
            return $bs > $as ? 1 : -1;
        }
        return $bw > $aw ? 1 : -1;
    });
    return $signals[0];
}

function mylottoexpertV61BuildClosedLoopRecommendation(array $v60Map)
{
    $profiles = (array)($v60Map['setting_profiles'] ?? array());
    $counts = (array)($v60Map['counts'] ?? array());
    $readiness = (array)($v60Map['readiness'] ?? array());
    $out = array(
        'available' => !empty($v60Map['available']) && !empty($profiles),
        'version' => 'v61_closed_loop_skai_recommendation_intelligence',
        'status' => 'collecting',
        'title' => 'Closed-loop SKAI intelligence is collecting evidence',
        'message' => 'The system is mapping settings, but needs more completed scored draws before recommending a controlled test.',
        'readiness_score' => (int)($readiness['score'] ?? 0),
        'readiness_tier' => (string)($readiness['tier'] ?? 'collecting'),
        'recommended_test' => array('available'=>false,'setting_key'=>'','setting_label'=>'','test_value'=>'','reason'=>'Not enough repeated scored evidence yet.'),
        'hold_constant' => array(),
        'avoid_or_review' => array(),
        'monitor' => array(),
        'validation_protocol' => array(
            'Save the complete SKAI run snapshot before the draw.',
            'Score only after the official completed draw is available.',
            'Compare the scored outcome back to the exact saved settings snapshot.',
            'Change only the recommended setting on the next controlled test; keep the hold-constant settings stable.',
            'After scoring, mark whether the recommendation improved, stayed neutral, or weakened the evidence.'
        ),
        'admin_notes' => array(),
        'checks' => array()
    );
    $scoredRows = (int)($counts['scored_skai_rows'] ?? 0);
    $distinctDraws = (int)($counts['distinct_draws'] ?? 0);
    $supported = (int)($counts['settings_supported'] ?? 0);
    $quality = (int)($counts['elite_quality_avg'] ?? 0);
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('minimum_scored_rows', 'Minimum scored setting rows', $scoredRows >= 9, $scoredRows . ' scored SKAI setting row(s).');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('minimum_draws', 'Multiple completed draws', $distinctDraws >= 3, $distinctDraws . ' distinct completed scored draw(s).');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('setting_breadth', 'Broad setting coverage', $supported >= 8, $supported . ' setting area(s) mapped.');
    $out['checks'][] = mylottoexpertV56EvidenceCheck('quality_gate', 'Evidence quality gate', $quality >= 50, $quality . ' average evidence-quality score.');

    $candidates = array();
    foreach ($profiles as $key => $profile) {
        if (!is_array($profile)) { continue; }
        $best = mylottoexpertV61PickBestValueSignal($profile);
        if (!is_array($best)) { continue; }
        $class = (string)($best['signal_class'] ?? 'collecting');
        $conf = (int)($best['confidence'] ?? 0);
        $item = array(
            'setting_key' => (string)$key,
            'setting_label' => (string)($profile['label'] ?? $key),
            'value' => (string)($best['value'] ?? ''),
            'confidence' => $conf,
            'signal_class' => $class,
            'distinct_draws' => (int)($best['distinct_draws'] ?? 0),
            'distinct_users' => (int)($best['distinct_users'] ?? 0),
            'avg_score' => (float)($best['avg_score'] ?? 0.0),
            'strong_count' => (int)($best['strong_count'] ?? 0),
            'weak_count' => (int)($best['weak_count'] ?? 0),
            'message' => (string)($best['signal_message'] ?? '')
        );
        if ($class === 'strong_candidate' && $conf >= 65) {
            $out['hold_constant'][] = $item;
        } elseif ($class === 'weak_or_harmful') {
            $out['avoid_or_review'][] = $item;
        } elseif ($class === 'promising' || $conf >= 45) {
            $candidates[] = $item;
        } else {
            $out['monitor'][] = $item;
        }
    }
    usort($candidates, function($a, $b) {
        if ((int)$b['confidence'] === (int)$a['confidence']) { return ((float)$b['avg_score'] > (float)$a['avg_score']) ? 1 : -1; }
        return ((int)$b['confidence'] > (int)$a['confidence']) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    usort($out['hold_constant'], function($a, $b) { return ((int)$b['confidence'] > (int)$a['confidence']) ? 1 : -1; });
    usort($out['avoid_or_review'], function($a, $b) { return ((int)$b['weak_count'] > (int)$a['weak_count']) ? 1 : -1; });
    $out['hold_constant'] = array_slice($out['hold_constant'], 0, 8);
    $out['avoid_or_review'] = array_slice($out['avoid_or_review'], 0, 8);
    $out['monitor'] = array_slice($out['monitor'], 0, 8);

    $gatesOk = ($scoredRows >= 9 && $distinctDraws >= 3 && $supported >= 6 && $quality >= 40);
    if ($gatesOk && !empty($candidates)) {
        $pick = $candidates[0];
        $out['recommended_test'] = array(
            'available' => true,
            'setting_key' => (string)$pick['setting_key'],
            'setting_label' => (string)$pick['setting_label'],
            'test_value' => (string)$pick['value'],
            'confidence' => (int)$pick['confidence'],
            'signal_class' => (string)$pick['signal_class'],
            'reason' => 'Best next controlled test based on repeated scored evidence. Change only this setting and keep stronger settings constant.'
        );
        $out['status'] = ($distinctDraws >= 5 && $supported >= 8 && $quality >= 55) ? 'elite_ready' : 'actionable';
        $out['title'] = $out['status'] === 'elite_ready' ? 'Closed-loop SKAI intelligence ready' : 'Closed-loop SKAI intelligence actionable';
        $out['message'] = 'Use the recommended one-setting test, then score the completed draw to validate whether the recommendation improved the evidence.';
    } elseif ($gatesOk && empty($candidates) && !empty($out['hold_constant'])) {
        $out['status'] = 'stabilize';
        $out['title'] = 'Closed-loop SKAI intelligence says stabilize';
        $out['message'] = 'Strong settings exist, but there is not a clean next variable to test yet. Keep collecting scored outcomes.';
        $out['recommended_test']['reason'] = 'Hold current stronger settings stable until a test candidate separates from the evidence.';
    } else {
        $out['status'] = 'collecting';
        $out['admin_notes'][] = 'Closed-loop recommendation is gated until saved/scored settings, distinct draws, setting breadth, and quality are sufficient.';
    }
    return $out;
}

function skaiUpsertPerformanceRecord($db, $userId, array $data)
{
    $userId = (int) $userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return false;
    }

    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $tblName = '`' . $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance`';
    $now     = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');

    $actualJson  = json_encode(array_values((array)($data['actual_numbers'] ?? array())), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);    $rankingJson = json_encode(array_values((array)($data['predicted_ranking'] ?? array())), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    $comboJson   = json_encode((array)($data['combo_hit_summary'] ?? array()), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    $notesJson   = json_encode((array)($data['notes'] ?? array()), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

    $avgRank    = (isset($data['avg_winning_rank'])    && $data['avg_winning_rank']    !== null) ? round((float)$data['avg_winning_rank'],    2) : null;
    $bestRank   = (isset($data['best_winning_rank'])   && $data['best_winning_rank']   !== null) ? (int)$data['best_winning_rank']             : null;
    $worstRank  = (isset($data['worst_winning_rank'])  && $data['worst_winning_rank']  !== null) ? (int)$data['worst_winning_rank']            : null;
    $medianRank = (isset($data['median_winning_rank']) && $data['median_winning_rank'] !== null) ? round((float)$data['median_winning_rank'], 2) : null;
    $wScore     = (isset($data['weighted_quality_score']) && $data['weighted_quality_score'] !== null) ? round((float)$data['weighted_quality_score'], 6) : null;

    $runDateSql         = !empty($data['run_date'])  ? $db->quote((string)$data['run_date'])  : 'NULL';
    $drawDateSql        = !empty($data['draw_date']) ? $db->quote((string)$data['draw_date']) : 'NULL';
    $targetDrawDateSql  = !empty($data['target_draw_date']) ? $db->quote((string)$data['target_draw_date']) : 'NULL';
    $targetDrawAtSql    = !empty($data['target_draw_at']) ? $db->quote((string)$data['target_draw_at']) : 'NULL';
    $avgSql             = ($avgRank    !== null) ? $avgRank    : 'NULL';
    $bestSql            = ($bestRank   !== null) ? $bestRank   : 'NULL';
    $worstSql           = ($worstRank  !== null) ? $worstRank  : 'NULL';
    $medianSql          = ($medianRank !== null) ? $medianRank : 'NULL';
    $wSql               = ($wScore     !== null) ? $wScore     : 'NULL';

    $runUuid             = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($data['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
    $snapshotRunUuid     = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($data['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
    $runIdentityKey      = (string)($data['run_identity_key'] ?? '');
    $predictionTargetId  = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($data['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
    $predictionTargetKey = (string)($data['prediction_target_key'] ?? '');
    $targetGameId        = (string)($data['target_game_id'] ?? '');
    $targetLotteryId     = (int)($data['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $targetDrawSession   = (string)($data['target_draw_session'] ?? '');
    $targetTimezoneId    = (string)($data['target_timezone_id'] ?? '');
    $targetPredFamily    = (string)($data['target_prediction_family'] ?? '');
    $targetPredType      = (string)($data['target_prediction_type'] ?? '');
    $analysisMethodKey   = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($data['analysis_method_key'] ?? '') : strtolower(trim((string)($data['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')));
    if ($analysisMethodKey === '') { $analysisMethodKey = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($data['source'] ?? '') : ''; }
    $analysisLabels      = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($analysisMethodKey) : array('', '');
    $analysisEngineLabel = (string)($data['analysis_engine_label'] ?? ($analysisLabels[0] ?? ''));
    $analysisTrackLabel  = (string)($data['analysis_track_label'] ?? ($analysisLabels[1] ?? ''));

    $sql = "INSERT INTO {$tblName}
        (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`lottery_name`,`draw_date`,`run_date`,`run_id`,`run_uuid`,`snapshot_run_uuid`,`run_identity_key`,
         `prediction_target_id`,`prediction_target_key`,`target_game_id`,`target_lottery_id`,`target_draw_date`,`target_draw_at`,`target_draw_session`,`target_timezone_id`,`target_prediction_family`,`target_prediction_type`,`source`,
         `analysis_method_key`,`analysis_engine_label`,`analysis_track_label`,
         `actual_numbers_json`,`predicted_ranking_json`,
         `avg_winning_rank`,`best_winning_rank`,`worst_winning_rank`,`median_winning_rank`,`weighted_quality_score`,
         `top10_hits`,`top20_hits`,`top30_hits`,`top50_hits`,`missing_hits_count`,`combo_hit_summary_json`,
         `tail_enabled`,`tail_active`,`tail_promoted_count`,`tail_promoted_hit_count`,
         `calibration_enabled`,`calibration_active`,
         `shared_learning_enabled`,`pairwise_enabled`,`gibbs_enabled`,`live_tuning_enabled`,
         `confidence_level`,`trend_bucket`,`notes_json`,`created_at`,`updated_at`)
        VALUES (
         " . (int)$userId . ",
         " . (int)($data['lottery_id'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)($data['lottery_name'] ?? '')) . ",
         {$drawDateSql},
         {$runDateSql},
         " . (int)($data['run_id'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . $db->quote($runUuid) . ",
         " . $db->quote($snapshotRunUuid) . ",
         " . $db->quote($runIdentityKey) . ",
         " . $db->quote($predictionTargetId) . ",
         " . $db->quote($predictionTargetKey) . ",
         " . $db->quote($targetGameId) . ",
         " . $targetLotteryId . ",
         {$targetDrawDateSql},
         {$targetDrawAtSql},
         " . $db->quote($targetDrawSession) . ",
         " . $db->quote($targetTimezoneId) . ",
         " . $db->quote($targetPredFamily) . ",
         " . $db->quote($targetPredType) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)($data['source'] ?? '')) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$analysisMethodKey) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$analysisEngineLabel) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$analysisTrackLabel) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$actualJson) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$rankingJson) . ",
         {$avgSql},{$bestSql},{$worstSql},{$medianSql},{$wSql},
         " . (int)($data['top10_hits'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['top20_hits'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['top30_hits'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['top50_hits'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$comboJson) . ",
         " . (int)($data['tail_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['tail_active'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['tail_promoted_count'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['tail_promoted_hit_count'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['calibration_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['calibration_active'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['shared_learning_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['pairwise_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['gibbs_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . (int)($data['live_tuning_enabled'] ?? 0) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)($data['confidence_level'] ?? 'insufficient_data')) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)($data['trend_bucket'] ?? 'unknown')) . ",
         " . $db->quote((string)$notesJson) . ",
         " . $db->quote($now) . ",
         " . $db->quote($now) . "
        )
        ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
         `lottery_name`            = VALUES(`lottery_name`),
         `draw_date`               = VALUES(`draw_date`),
         `run_date`                = VALUES(`run_date`),
         `run_uuid`                = VALUES(`run_uuid`),
         `snapshot_run_uuid`       = VALUES(`snapshot_run_uuid`),
         `run_identity_key`        = VALUES(`run_identity_key`),
         `prediction_target_id`    = VALUES(`prediction_target_id`),
         `prediction_target_key`   = VALUES(`prediction_target_key`),
         `target_game_id`          = VALUES(`target_game_id`),
         `target_lottery_id`       = VALUES(`target_lottery_id`),
         `target_draw_date`        = VALUES(`target_draw_date`),
         `target_draw_at`          = VALUES(`target_draw_at`),
         `target_draw_session`     = VALUES(`target_draw_session`),
         `target_timezone_id`      = VALUES(`target_timezone_id`),
         `target_prediction_family`= VALUES(`target_prediction_family`),
         `target_prediction_type`  = VALUES(`target_prediction_type`),
         `analysis_method_key`     = VALUES(`analysis_method_key`),
         `analysis_engine_label`   = VALUES(`analysis_engine_label`),
         `analysis_track_label`    = VALUES(`analysis_track_label`),
         `actual_numbers_json`     = VALUES(`actual_numbers_json`),
         `predicted_ranking_json`  = VALUES(`predicted_ranking_json`),
         `avg_winning_rank`        = VALUES(`avg_winning_rank`),
         `best_winning_rank`       = VALUES(`best_winning_rank`),
         `worst_winning_rank`      = VALUES(`worst_winning_rank`),
         `median_winning_rank`     = VALUES(`median_winning_rank`),
         `weighted_quality_score`  = VALUES(`weighted_quality_score`),
         `top10_hits`              = VALUES(`top10_hits`),
         `top20_hits`              = VALUES(`top20_hits`),
         `top30_hits`              = VALUES(`top30_hits`),
         `top50_hits`              = VALUES(`top50_hits`),
         `missing_hits_count`      = VALUES(`missing_hits_count`),
         `combo_hit_summary_json`  = VALUES(`combo_hit_summary_json`),
         `tail_enabled`            = VALUES(`tail_enabled`),
         `tail_active`             = VALUES(`tail_active`),
         `tail_promoted_count`     = VALUES(`tail_promoted_count`),
         `tail_promoted_hit_count` = VALUES(`tail_promoted_hit_count`),
         `calibration_enabled`     = VALUES(`calibration_enabled`),
         `calibration_active`      = VALUES(`calibration_active`),
         `shared_learning_enabled` = VALUES(`shared_learning_enabled`),
         `pairwise_enabled`        = VALUES(`pairwise_enabled`),
         `gibbs_enabled`           = VALUES(`gibbs_enabled`),
         `live_tuning_enabled`     = VALUES(`live_tuning_enabled`),
         `confidence_level`        = VALUES(`confidence_level`),
         `trend_bucket`            = VALUES(`trend_bucket`),
         `notes_json`              = VALUES(`notes_json`),
         `updated_at`              = VALUES(`updated_at`)";
    try {
        $db->setQuery($sql);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function skaiMigratePerformanceTableKeys($db)
{
    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';

    $oldKeyExists = false;
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS
              WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
                AND TABLE_NAME   = " . $db->quote($rawName) . "
                AND INDEX_NAME   = 'uq_user_run_source'"
        );
        $oldKeyExists = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }

    $newKeyExists = false;
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS
              WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
                AND TABLE_NAME   = " . $db->quote($rawName) . "
                AND INDEX_NAME   = 'uq_user_run_draw_source'"
        );
        $newKeyExists = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }

    if ($oldKeyExists) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` DROP INDEX `uq_user_run_source`");
            $db->execute();
        } catch (Exception $e) {

        }
    }

    if (!$newKeyExists) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}`
                  ADD UNIQUE KEY `uq_user_run_draw_source` (`user_id`,`run_id`,`draw_date`,`source`)"
            );
            $db->execute();
        } catch (Exception $e) {

        }
    }

    return true;
}

function skaiLoadPerformanceHistory($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $limit)
{
    $userId = (int) $userId;
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return array();
    }

    $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
    $tblName = '`' . $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance`';
    $limit   = max(1, min(500, (int)$limit));

    $where = '`user_id` = ' . $userId;
    if ((int)$lotteryId > 0) {
        $where .= ' AND `lottery_id` = ' . (int)$lotteryId;
    }
    $sql = "SELECT * FROM {$tblName} WHERE {$where} ORDER BY `draw_date` DESC, `run_id` DESC LIMIT {$limit}";
    try {
        $db->setQuery($sql);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function skaiComputeTrend(array $records)
{

    $scored = array();
    foreach ($records as $rec) {
        if (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '') {
            $scored[] = (float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'];
        }
    }

    $total = count($scored);

    if ($total < 5) {
        $confidence = 'insufficient_data';
    } elseif ($total < 15) {
        $confidence = 'early_trend';
    } elseif ($total < 35) {
        $confidence = 'moderate';
    } else {
        $confidence = 'strong';
    }

    if ($total === 0) {
        return array(
            'last10_avg'   => null,
            'last25_avg'   => null,
            'last50_avg'   => null,
            'lifetime_avg' => null,
            'sample_count' => 0,
            'delta_10vs20' => null,
            'trend_bucket' => 'unknown',
            'confidence'   => 'insufficient_data',
        );
    }

    $avgFn = function (array $slice) {
        if (empty($slice)) { return null; }
        return round(array_sum($slice) / count($slice), 2);
    };

    $last10   = $avgFn(array_slice($scored, 0, 10));
    $last25   = $avgFn(array_slice($scored, 0, 25));
    $last50   = $avgFn(array_slice($scored, 0, 50));
    $lifetime = $avgFn($scored);

    $delta       = null;
    $trendBucket = 'unknown';
    if ($total >= 10) {
        $currentWindow = $avgFn(array_slice($scored, 0, 10));
        $priorWindow   = $avgFn(array_slice($scored, 10, 10));
        if ($priorWindow !== null && $currentWindow !== null) {
            $delta = round($priorWindow - $currentWindow, 2);

            $trendThreshold = 1.5;
            if ($delta > $trendThreshold) {
                $trendBucket = 'improving';
            } elseif ($delta < -$trendThreshold) {
                $trendBucket = 'declining';
            } else {
                $trendBucket = 'flat';
            }
        }
    }

    return array(
        'last10_avg'   => $last10,
        'last25_avg'   => $last25,
        'last50_avg'   => $last50,
        'lifetime_avg' => $lifetime,
        'sample_count' => $total,
        'delta_10vs20' => $delta,
        'trend_bucket' => $trendBucket,
        'confidence'   => $confidence,
    );
}

function skaiDeriveScorecard(array $trend)
{
    $conf   = (string)($trend['confidence']   ?? 'insufficient_data');
    $bucket = (string)($trend['trend_bucket'] ?? 'unknown');

    if ($conf === 'insufficient_data') {
        return array(
            'label'       => 'Needs More Data',
            'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--neutral',
            'description' => 'More validated draw results are needed to measure a reliable trend. Keep saving runs and checking back after each draw.',
        );
    }
    if ($bucket === 'improving') {
        if ($conf === 'early_trend') {
            return array(
                'label'       => 'Early Positive Trend',
                'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--good',
                'description' => 'Early evidence suggests predictions are improving. Continue monitoring as more draws are validated.',
            );
        }
        return array(
            'label'       => 'Improving',
            'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--good',
            'description' => 'Winning numbers are consistently appearing higher in SKAI\'s ranked predictions over recent draws.',
        );
    }
    if ($bucket === 'declining') {
        if ($conf === 'early_trend') {
            return array(
                'label'       => 'Early Negative Trend',
                'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--caution',
                'description' => 'Early data suggests prediction quality may be declining. Review your settings and method selection.',
            );
        }
        return array(
            'label'       => 'Declining',
            'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--bad',
            'description' => 'Average winning rank has increased over recent draws. Consider reviewing SKAI settings or method combinations.',
        );
    }
    if ($bucket === 'flat') {
        return array(
            'label'       => 'Stable',
            'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--neutral',
            'description' => 'Prediction quality is consistent. No significant improvement or decline detected in recent draws.',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'label'       => 'Calibrating',
        'class'       => 'skai-lp-status--neutral',
        'description' => 'Not enough completed draw cycles to calculate a performance trend yet.',
    );
}

function skaiLpModStatus($count, $sampleCount)
{
    if ($sampleCount <= 0 || $count <= 0) { return 'inactive'; }

    $majorityThreshold = (int)floor($sampleCount / 2) + 1;
    return ($count >= $majorityThreshold) ? 'active' : 'building';
}

function skaiLpGrade($avgRank)
{
    if ($avgRank === null || $avgRank === '') {
        return array('grade' => 'unknown', 'label' => 'Unknown', 'class' => 'skai-lp-grade--unknown');
    }
    $r = (float)$avgRank;
    if ($r <= 5)  { return array('grade' => 'elite',    'label' => 'Elite',    'class' => 'skai-lp-grade--elite'); }
    if ($r <= 10) { return array('grade' => 'strong',   'label' => 'Strong',   'class' => 'skai-lp-grade--strong'); }
    if ($r <= 20) { return array('grade' => 'moderate', 'label' => 'Moderate', 'class' => 'skai-lp-grade--moderate'); }
    return             array('grade' => 'weak',     'label' => 'Weak',     'class' => 'skai-lp-grade--weak');
}

function skaiLpConsistency(array $records)
{
    $vals = array();
    foreach ($records as $rec) {
        if (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '') {
            $vals[] = (float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'];
        }
    }
    $n = count($vals);
    if ($n < 3) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'unknown',
            'label'       => 'Not enough data',
            'description' => 'At least 3 scored runs are needed to measure consistency.',
            'stddev'      => null,
        );
    }
    $mean   = array_sum($vals) / $n;
    $sumSq  = 0.0;
    foreach ($vals as $v) { $sumSq += ($v - $mean) * ($v - $mean); }
    $stddev = round(sqrt($sumSq / $n), 2);

    $CONS_HIGH_THRESHOLD     = 3.0;
    $CONS_MODERATE_THRESHOLD = 7.0;

    if ($stddev < $CONS_HIGH_THRESHOLD) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'high',
            'label'       => 'High Consistency',
            'description' => 'Results are reliably similar across runs. SKAI performs predictably.',
            'stddev'      => $stddev,
        );
    }
    if ($stddev < $CONS_MODERATE_THRESHOLD) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'moderate',
            'label'       => 'Moderate Consistency',
            'description' => 'Some variation between runs, with occasional stronger or weaker results.',
            'stddev'      => $stddev,
        );
    }
    return array(
        'level'       => 'volatile',
        'label'       => 'Volatile',
        'description' => 'Performance varies significantly between runs. Results are unpredictable.',
        'stddev'      => $stddev,
    );
}

function skaiLpTrendIntelligence($delta)
{
    if ($delta === null) {
        return array(
            'direction' => 'unknown',
            'strength'  => '',
            'label'     => 'Not enough data for a trend',
            'arrow'     => '-',
        );
    }
    $abs = abs((float)$delta);

    $TREND_FLAT_THRESHOLD     = 1.5;
    $TREND_SLIGHT_THRESHOLD   = 4.0;
    $TREND_MODERATE_THRESHOLD = 8.0;

    if ($abs < $TREND_FLAT_THRESHOLD) {
        return array(
            'direction' => 'flat',
            'strength'  => 'minimal',
            'label'     => 'No significant change',
            'arrow'     => '-',
        );
    }

    if ($abs < $TREND_SLIGHT_THRESHOLD)   { $strength = 'Slight'; }
    elseif ($abs < $TREND_MODERATE_THRESHOLD) { $strength = 'Moderate'; }
    else                                  { $strength = 'Strong'; }

    if ((float)$delta > 0) {
        return array(
            'direction' => 'improving',
            'strength'  => $strength,
            'label'     => $strength . ' Improvement',
            'arrow'     => 'Up',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'direction' => 'declining',
        'strength'  => $strength,
        'label'     => $strength . ' Decline',
        'arrow'     => 'Down',
    );
}

function skaiLpBestRunStats(array $records)
{
    $bestAvgRank    = null;
    $bestSingleRank = null;
    $maxTop10       = 0;
    $maxTop20       = 0;
    $bestWScore     = null;
    $bestRunDate    = '';

    foreach ($records as $rec) {
        $avg = (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '')
            ? (float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'] : null;
        $best = (isset($rec['best_winning_rank']) && $rec['best_winning_rank'] !== null)
            ? (int)$rec['best_winning_rank'] : null;
        $t10  = (int)($rec['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $t20  = (int)($rec['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $ws   = (isset($rec['weighted_quality_score']) && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== null && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== '')
            ? (float)$rec['weighted_quality_score'] : null;

        if ($avg !== null && ($bestAvgRank === null || $avg < $bestAvgRank)) {
            $bestAvgRank = $avg;
            $bestRunDate = (string)($rec['draw_date'] ?? '');
        }

        if ($best !== null && ($bestSingleRank === null || $best < $bestSingleRank)) {
            $bestSingleRank = $best;
        }

        if ($t10 > $maxTop10) { $maxTop10 = $t10; }
        if ($t20 > $maxTop20) { $maxTop20 = $t20; }

        if ($ws !== null && ($bestWScore === null || $ws > $bestWScore)) {
            $bestWScore = $ws;
        }
    }

    return array(
        'best_avg_rank'    => ($bestAvgRank    !== null) ? round($bestAvgRank, 1) : null,
        'best_single_rank' => $bestSingleRank,
        'max_top10_hits'   => $maxTop10,
        'max_top20_hits'   => $maxTop20,
        'best_weighted'    => ($bestWScore !== null) ? round($bestWScore, 3) : null,
        'best_run_date'    => $bestRunDate,
    );
}

if (!defined('SKAI_LP_NULL_RANK_SENTINEL')) {
    define('SKAI_LP_NULL_RANK_SENTINEL', 9999.0);
}

function skaiLpNormalize($val, $min, $max)
{

    if ((float)$max - (float)$min < 1.0e-10) { return 1.0; }
    $v = max((float)$min, min((float)$max, (float)$val));
    return ($v - (float)$min) / ((float)$max - (float)$min);
}

function skaiLpComputeRunScores(array $records)
{
    if (empty($records)) { return array(); }

    $NULL_RANK = SKAI_LP_NULL_RANK_SENTINEL;

    $avgRanks  = array();
    $wScores   = array();
    $bestRanks = array();
    $missings  = array();
    $top10s    = array();
    $top20s    = array();

    foreach ($records as $rec) {
        $avgRanks[]  = (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '')
            ? (float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'] : $NULL_RANK;
        $wScores[]   = (isset($rec['weighted_quality_score']) && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== null && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== '')
            ? (float)$rec['weighted_quality_score'] : 0.0;
        $bestRanks[] = (isset($rec['best_winning_rank']) && $rec['best_winning_rank'] !== null)
            ? (float)$rec['best_winning_rank'] : $NULL_RANK;
        $missings[]  = (int)($rec['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0);
        $top10s[]    = (int)($rec['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20s[]    = (int)($rec['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
