    }

    $minAvg  = min($avgRanks);   $maxAvg  = max($avgRanks);
    $minWs   = min($wScores);    $maxWs   = max($wScores);
    $minBest = min($bestRanks);  $maxBest = max($bestRanks);
    $minMis  = min($missings);   $maxMis  = max($missings);
    $minT10  = min($top10s);     $maxT10  = max($top10s);
    $minT20  = min($top20s);     $maxT20  = max($top20s);

    $scores = array();
    $n = count($records);
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {

        $normAvgInv  = skaiLpNormalize($maxAvg  - $avgRanks[$i],  0.0, $maxAvg  - $minAvg);
        $normBestInv = skaiLpNormalize($maxBest - $bestRanks[$i], 0.0, $maxBest - $minBest);
        $normMisInv  = skaiLpNormalize($maxMis  - $missings[$i],  0.0, $maxMis  - $minMis);

        $normWs  = skaiLpNormalize($wScores[$i], $minWs,  $maxWs);
        $normT10 = skaiLpNormalize($top10s[$i],  $minT10, $maxT10);
        $normT20 = skaiLpNormalize($top20s[$i],  $minT20, $maxT20);

        $sys = ($normAvgInv  * 0.45)
             + ($normWs      * 0.30)
             + ($normBestInv * 0.15)
             + ($normMisInv  * 0.10);

        $hit = ($normT20    * 0.45)
             + ($normT10    * 0.30)
             + ($normMisInv * 0.15)
             + ($normAvgInv * 0.10);

        $balanced = ($sys * 0.60) + ($hit * 0.40);

        $scores[] = array(
            'sys'      => round($sys,      4),
            'hit'      => round($hit,      4),
            'balanced' => round($balanced, 4),
        );
    }

    return $scores;
}

function skaiLpFormatRunSettingLabel($aiPct, $stratFamily)
{
    $stratFamily = (string)$stratFamily;
    if ($aiPct !== null && $stratFamily !== '') {
        return (string)(int)round((float)$aiPct) . '% - ' . $stratFamily;
    }
    if ($aiPct !== null) {
        return (string)(int)round((float)$aiPct) . '%';
    }
    if ($stratFamily !== '') {
        return $stratFamily;
    }
    return '';
}

function skaiLpFormatTrainingStyleLabel($value)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '') {
        return '';
    }
    $value = str_replace(array('_','-'), ' ', $value);
    return ucwords($value);
}

function skaiLpExtractRunRecord(array $records, $idx)
{
    $rec = $records[(int)$idx];
    $ts  = strtotime((string)($rec['draw_date'] ?? ''));

    $notesArr = array();
    if (!empty($rec['notes_json'])) {
        $notesDecoded = json_decode((string)$rec['notes_json'], true);
        if (is_array($notesDecoded)) {
            $notesArr = $notesDecoded;
        }
    }
    $runAiPct       = (isset($notesArr['run_ai_pct']) && $notesArr['run_ai_pct'] !== null && $notesArr['run_ai_pct'] !== '')
                        ? round((float)$notesArr['run_ai_pct'], 1) : null;
    $runStratFamily = (isset($notesArr['run_strategy_family']) && (string)$notesArr['run_strategy_family'] !== '')
                        ? (string)$notesArr['run_strategy_family'] : '';

    $runSettingLabel = skaiLpFormatRunSettingLabel($runAiPct, $runStratFamily);

    return array(
        'idx'                 => (int)$idx,
        'run_id'              => (int)($rec['run_id'] ?? 0),
        'label'               => $ts ? date('M j, Y', $ts) : (string)($rec['draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'avg_rank'            => (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '')
                                   ? round((float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'], 1) : null,
        'best_rank'           => ($rec['best_winning_rank'] !== null) ? (int)$rec['best_winning_rank'] : null,
        'weighted'            => (isset($rec['weighted_quality_score']) && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== null && $rec['weighted_quality_score'] !== '')
                                   ? round((float)$rec['weighted_quality_score'], 3) : null,
        'missing'             => (int)($rec['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0),
        'top10'               => (int)($rec['top10_hits'] ?? 0),
        'top20'               => (int)($rec['top20_hits'] ?? 0),

        'run_ai_pct'          => $runAiPct,
        'run_strategy_family' => $runStratFamily,
        'run_setting_label'   => $runSettingLabel,
    );
}

function skaiLpSelectBestSystemRun(array $records)
{
    if (empty($records)) { return null; }

    $scores   = skaiLpComputeRunScores($records);
    $bestIdx  = 0;
    $bestScore = -1.0;
    foreach ($scores as $i => $s) {
        if ($s['sys'] > $bestScore) { $bestScore = $s['sys']; $bestIdx = $i; }
    }

    $result        = skaiLpExtractRunRecord($records, $bestIdx);
    $result['score'] = $bestScore;
    return $result;
}

function skaiLpSelectBestHitRun(array $records)
{
    if (empty($records)) { return null; }

    $scores   = skaiLpComputeRunScores($records);
    $bestIdx  = 0;
    $bestScore = -1.0;
    foreach ($scores as $i => $s) {
        if ($s['hit'] > $bestScore) { $bestScore = $s['hit']; $bestIdx = $i; }
    }

    $result        = skaiLpExtractRunRecord($records, $bestIdx);
    $result['score'] = $bestScore;
    return $result;
}

function skaiLpSelectRecommendedRun(array $records, $mode)
{
    if (empty($records)) { return null; }

    $strategyMap = array(
        'balanced'      => array(
            'key'    => 'balanced',
            'label'  => 'Balanced Strategy',
            'reason' => 'This setting produced the strongest combined ranking quality and hit coverage in recent scored runs.',
        ),
        'hit_priority'  => array(
            'key'    => 'hit',
            'label'  => 'Hit Priority Strategy',
            'reason' => 'Maximizes hit-range outcomes - prioritizes Top-20 and Top-10 coverage.',
        ),
        'rank_priority' => array(
            'key'    => 'sys',
            'label'  => 'Rank Priority Strategy',
            'reason' => 'Focuses on overall ranking quality by prioritizing average rank and weighted score.',
        ),
    );
    $strategy  = $strategyMap[$mode] ?? $strategyMap['balanced'];
    $scoreKey  = $strategy['key'];

    $scores   = skaiLpComputeRunScores($records);
    $bestIdx  = 0;
    $bestScore = -1.0;
    foreach ($scores as $i => $s) {
        if ($s[$scoreKey] > $bestScore) { $bestScore = $s[$scoreKey]; $bestIdx = $i; }
    }

    $result                  = skaiLpExtractRunRecord($records, $bestIdx);
    $result['score']         = $bestScore;
    $result['mode']          = $mode;
    $result['strategy_label']= $strategy['label'];
    $result['reason']        = $strategy['reason'];
    return $result;
}

function skaiLpDualRunInsight($bestSys, $bestHit, $sampleCount)
{
    if ($bestSys === null || $bestHit === null) { return ''; }

    if ((int)$bestSys['idx'] === (int)$bestHit['idx']) {
        $text = 'The same run delivered both the best ranking quality and the strongest hit performance, '
              . 'indicating unusually strong alignment between system quality and playable outcome.';
    } else {
        $text = 'The strongest ranking-quality run differed from the strongest hit-oriented run. '
              . 'This shows that SKAI can rank winning numbers well overall while a different run '
              . 'may produce better short-range hit concentration - both results are valid and useful '
              . 'depending on what you are evaluating.';
    }

    if ((int)$sampleCount < 10) {
        $text .= ' Note: the current sample is still very early - these patterns will become more '
               . 'reliable as additional scored runs accumulate.';
    }

    return $text;
}

function skaiLpSelectWorstRun(array $records)
{
    $worstIdx = null;
    $worstVal = null;
    foreach ($records as $i => $rec) {
        $avg = (isset($rec['avg_winning_rank']) && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $rec['avg_winning_rank'] !== '')
            ? (float)$rec['avg_winning_rank'] : null;
        if ($avg === null) { continue; }
        if ($worstVal === null || $avg > $worstVal) { $worstVal = $avg; $worstIdx = $i; }
    }
    return $worstIdx;
}

function skaiLpConfidenceLabel($sampleCount)
{
    $n = (int)$sampleCount;
    if ($n < 10) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'very_early',
            'label'       => 'Very Early Stage',
            'description' => 'Results are based on fewer than 10 validated runs. Treat patterns as hints only.',
        );
    }
    if ($n < 25) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'early',
            'label'       => 'Early Stage',
            'description' => 'Some patterns are emerging but the sample is still small. Observe a few more draw cycles before acting on trends.',
        );
    }
    if ($n < 50) {
        return array(
            'level'       => 'moderate',
            'label'       => 'Moderate Confidence',
            'description' => 'A meaningful sample is available. Trend direction and grade are likely reliable.',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'level'       => 'strong',
        'label'       => 'Strong Confidence',
        'description' => 'Large sample size. Performance metrics are statistically robust.',
    );
}

function skaiLpModStatusLabel($status)
{
    if ($status === 'active') {
        return array(
            'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--active',
            'badge_text'  => 'Active',
            'note'        => 'Detected in recent scored runs',
        );
    }
    if ($status === 'building') {
        return array(
            'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--building',
            'badge_text'  => 'Building',
            'note'        => 'Seen in some recent scored runs',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--inactive',
        'badge_text'  => 'Not recently detected',
        'note'        => 'Not detected in recent scored runs',
    );
}

function skaiLpCurrentHybridStatus($activeNow, $historyCount, $sampleCount)
{
    $activeNow = ((int)$activeNow > 0);
    $historyCount = (int)$historyCount;
    $sampleCount = (int)$sampleCount;

    if ($activeNow) {
        if ($historyCount <= 0 || $sampleCount <= 0) {
            return array(
                'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--building',
                'badge_text'  => 'Active now',
                'note'        => 'Used in the latest draw context, but history is still early',
            );
        }
        $historyStatus = skaiLpModStatus($historyCount, $sampleCount);
        if ($historyStatus === 'active') {
            return array(
                'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--active',
                'badge_text'  => 'Active now',
                'note'        => 'Used in the latest draw context and supported by past results',
            );
        }
        return array(
            'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--building',
            'badge_text'  => 'Active now',
            'note'        => 'Used in the latest draw context and still building history',
        );
    }

    if ($historyCount > 0 && $sampleCount > 0) {
        $historyStatus = skaiLpModStatus($historyCount, $sampleCount);
        if ($historyStatus === 'active') {
            return array(
                'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--building',
                'badge_text'  => 'Used before',
                'note'        => 'Supported by past results, but not active in the latest draw context',
            );
        }
        return array(
            'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--inactive',
            'badge_text'  => 'Used before',
            'note'        => 'Seen in past results, but not active in the latest draw context',
        );
    }

    return array(
        'badge_class' => 'skai-lp-mod-badge--inactive',
        'badge_text'  => 'Not used now',
        'note'        => 'Not detected in the latest draw context or recent scored history',
    );
}

function skaiLpInsight(array $grade, array $trend, array $consistency, array $confidence)
{

    $gradeMap = array(
        'elite'    => 'performing at an elite level',
        'strong'   => 'performing strongly',
        'moderate' => 'performing at a moderate level',
        'weak'     => 'producing weaker results than expected',
        'unknown'  => 'not yet rated',
    );
    $gradePhrase = $gradeMap[$grade['grade']] ?? 'performing at an unclassified level';

    $trendDir = $trend['direction'];
    if ($trendDir === 'improving') {
        $trendPhrase = 'with a ' . strtolower((string)$trend['strength']) . ' recent improvement in prediction quality';
    } elseif ($trendDir === 'declining') {
        $trendPhrase = 'but showing a ' . strtolower((string)$trend['strength']) . ' decline in recent runs';
    } elseif ($trendDir === 'flat') {
        $trendPhrase = 'with no significant recent change in quality';
    } else {
        $trendPhrase = 'with insufficient trend data';
    }

    $consMap = array(
        'high'     => 'Results are reliably consistent across runs.',
        'moderate' => 'Performance varies moderately between runs.',
        'volatile' => 'Results vary significantly between runs - some runs perform much better or worse than average.',
        'unknown'  => '',
    );
    $consPhrase = $consMap[$consistency['level']] ?? '';

    $confCaveat = '';
    if (in_array($confidence['level'], array('very_early', 'early'), true)) {
        $confCaveat = ' Note: the sample size is still small, so these trends may shift with more draws.';
    }

    $sentence = 'The system is currently ' . $gradePhrase . ', ' . $trendPhrase . '. '
              . ($consPhrase !== '' ? $consPhrase . ' ' : '')
              . $confCaveat;

    return trim($sentence);
}

if ($__mleAllowMaintenance || $__mleIsActionRequest) {

    skaiEnsurePerformanceTable($db);
    skaiEnsurePerformanceTableSchema($db);
    $__mleSharedSkaiLearningSchemaStatus = mylottoexpertEnsureSharedSkaiLearningProfilesTable($db, $user);
    try { mylottoexpertBackfillPerformanceAnalysisMethodIdentity($db); } catch (\Throwable $_mlePerfMethodBackfillE) {   }

    if (!skaiMigratePerformanceTableKeys($db)) {
        \Joomla\CMS\Log\Log::add(
            'SKAI Learning performance: unique key migration failed - check database permissions.',
            \Joomla\CMS\Log\Log::WARNING,
            'skai.learning'
        );
    }
} else {
    $__mleSharedSkaiLearningSchemaStatus = array('skipped' => true, 'reason' => 'normal_page_load');
}

$__mleAction = strtolower(trim($app->input->getString('mle_action', '')));
if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) === 'POST') {
    $__mleActionPost = strtolower(trim($app->input->post->getString('mle_action', '')));
    if ($__mleActionPost !== '') {
        $__mleAction = $__mleActionPost;
    }
}

if (in_array($__mleAction, array('hide_lottery_from_workspace','remove_watched_lottery','restore_hidden_lotteries'), true)) {
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo workspace cannot change watched lotteries.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__hiddenIds = mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $workspaceUserId);
    if ($__mleAction === 'hide_lottery_from_workspace' || $__mleAction === 'remove_watched_lottery') {
        $__hideLotteryId = (int)$app->input->post->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
        if ($__hideLotteryId <= 0) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('The lottery could not be removed because LottoExpert could not identify it.', 'error');
        } else {
            $__hiddenIds[$__hideLotteryId] = $__hideLotteryId;
            mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $workspaceUserId, $__hiddenIds);
            $app->enqueueMessage('Lottery removed from your My Lotteries workspace. Saved predictions and learning history were not deleted.', 'message');
        }
    } elseif ($__mleAction === 'restore_hidden_lotteries') {
        mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $workspaceUserId, array());
        $app->enqueueMessage('All hidden lotteries were restored to your workspace.', 'message');
    }
    $__cleanRedirectUri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
    $__cleanRedirectUri->delVar('mle_action');
    $app->redirect($__cleanRedirectUri->toString());
    return;
}

$__mlePerformanceProfile = mylottoexpertBuildPerformanceProfile($app);

function mylottoexpertV100SafeStatusKey($value)
{
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/', '', $value);
    return $value !== '' ? $value : 'unknown';
}

function mylottoexpertV109CountHiveQueueRows($db)
{
    try {
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe') || !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_lottery_research_queue')) { return 0; }
        $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'));
        return (int)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertV109SeedHiveResearchQueueFromSharedLearning($db, $userId, $limit = 12)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $limit = max(1, min(25, (int)$limit));
    $seeded = array('attempted'=>0, 'created'=>0, 'existing'=>0, 'skipped'=>0, 'items'=>array());
    if ($userId <= 0) { return $seeded; }
    if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables') || !function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence')) { return $seeded; }

    try { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return $seeded; }

    if (mylottoexpertV109CountHiveQueueRows($db) > 0) { return $seeded; }

    try { $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $active = array(); }
    if (!is_array($active) || empty($active)) { return $seeded; }

    $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $done = 0;
    foreach ($active as $lid => $data) {
        if ($done >= $limit) { break; }
        $lotteryId = (int)$lid;
        if ($lotteryId <= 0) { continue; }
        $rows = is_array($data) && is_array($data['rows'] ?? null) ? (array)$data['rows'] : array();
        if (empty($rows)) { $seeded['skipped']++; continue; }

        $gameId = '';
        try { if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery')) { $gameId = (string)mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery($db, $lotteryId, $rows); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $gameId = ''; }

        $sharedProfile = array();
        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile')) {
                $sharedProfile = mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile($db, $lotteryId, $rows);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $sharedProfile = array(); }

        $globalIntel = is_array($sharedProfile['global_settings_intelligence'] ?? null) ? (array)$sharedProfile['global_settings_intelligence'] : array();
        if (empty($globalIntel) || !function_exists('mylottoexpertV97GlobalIntelHasUsableEvidence') || !mylottoexpertV97GlobalIntelHasUsableEvidence($globalIntel)) { $seeded['skipped']++; continue; }

        $settingsAdv = array('has_advice'=>false);
        try { if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV80BuildSettingsAdviceFromGlobalIntel')) { $settingsAdv = mylottoexpertV80BuildSettingsAdviceFromGlobalIntel($settingsAdv, $globalIntel); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $settingsAdv = array('has_advice'=>false); }
        if (empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])) {
            try { if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97BuildBaselineSettingsAdvice')) { $settingsAdv = mylottoexpertV97BuildBaselineSettingsAdvice($globalIntel); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $settingsAdv = array('has_advice'=>false); }
        }
        if (empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])) { $seeded['skipped']++; continue; }

        $precisionLock = array('has_range'=>false,'range_min'=>0,'range_max'=>100,'stage'=>'v109_hive_queue_seed','true_cluster_support'=>0,'true_cluster_draw_support'=>0);
        $summary = array(
            'total_runs' => count($rows),
            'scored_draws' => (int)($globalIntel['draws'] ?? 0),
            'global_settings_usable_rows' => (int)($globalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0),
            'global_settings_users' => (int)($globalIntel['users'] ?? 0),
            'global_settings_draws' => (int)($globalIntel['draws'] ?? 0),
            'global_learning_scope' => 'exact_lottery_only',
            'v109_seed_source' => 'shared_skai_global_settings_intelligence'
        );

        $plan = array();
        try { if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildForcedNextSettingsSkaiBatchPlan')) { $plan = mleAdvisoryBuildForcedNextSettingsSkaiBatchPlan($settingsAdv, $precisionLock, $summary); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $plan = array(); }
        if (empty($plan['has_recommendation']) || !is_array($plan['batch_run_values'] ?? null) || count((array)$plan['batch_run_values']) !== 9) { $seeded['skipped']++; continue; }

        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101RefineBatchPlanForHive')) {
            try { $plan = mylottoexpertV101RefineBatchPlanForHive($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $plan); } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
        }

        $skaiMeta = array('gameId'=>$gameId, 'gm'=>(string)($data['lottery_name'] ?? ''), 'st'=>'', 'stn'=>'');
        $baseSettings = array();
        try { if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97BuildGlobalPriorBaseSettings')) { $baseSettings = mylottoexpertV97BuildGlobalPriorBaseSettings($skaiMeta, $settingsAdv, $plan); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $baseSettings = array(); }
        if (empty($baseSettings)) { $baseSettings = array('skai_run_mode'=>'global_hive_research_batch'); }

        $fingerprint = array('hash'=>'','json'=>'');
        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97BuildSettingsFingerprint')) {
                $fingerprint = mylottoexpertV97BuildSettingsFingerprint($baseSettings, $lotteryId, $gameId, '', array(
                    'v109_seed' => 'shared_learning',
                    'setting_key' => (string)($plan['setting_key'] ?? ''),
                    'batch_run_values' => implode('|', (array)($plan['batch_run_values'] ?? array()))
                ));
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $fingerprint = array('hash'=>'','json'=>''); }
        if (empty($fingerprint['hash'])) { $seeded['skipped']++; continue; }

        $seeded['attempted']++;
        $existingId = function_exists('mylottoexpertV97FindExistingResearchQueueItem') ? (int)mylottoexpertV97FindExistingResearchQueueItem($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, (string)$fingerprint['hash']) : 0;
        if ($existingId > 0) { $seeded['existing']++; $done++; continue; }

        $queueId = 0;
        try { if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchQueueItem')) { $queueId = (int)mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchQueueItem($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $plan, $fingerprint, 'v109_seeded_from_shared_learning', $now); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { $queueId = 0; }
        if ($queueId > 0) {
            $seeded['created']++;
            $seeded['items'][] = array('queue_id'=>$queueId, 'lottery_id'=>$lotteryId, 'game_id'=>$gameId, 'setting_key'=>(string)($plan['setting_key'] ?? ''), 'research_type'=>'v109_seeded_from_shared_learning');
            $done++;
        } else {
            $seeded['skipped']++;
        }
    }
    return $seeded;
}

function mylottoexpertV100LoadHiveDashboardData($db, $limit = 12)
{
    $limit = max(5, min(50, (int)$limit));
    $out = array(
        'available' => false,
        'version' => 'v100_admin_hive_research_dashboard',
        'queue_total' => 0,
        'assignment_total' => 0,
        'queue_status_counts' => array(),
        'assignment_status_counts' => array(),
        'result_status_counts' => array(),
        'recent_queue' => array(),
        'recent_assignments' => array(),
        'lottery_summary' => array(),
        'message' => 'Hive research tables are not available yet.'
    );
    try {
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema')) {
            mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema($db);
        } elseif (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables')) {
            mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db);
        }
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe')) { return $out; }
        if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_lottery_research_queue')) { return $out; }
        if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments')) { return $out; }
        $out['available'] = true;
        $out['message'] = 'Hive research dashboard is reading the queue and assignment tables.';

        $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'));
        $out['queue_total'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'));
        $out['assignment_total'] = (int)$db->loadResult();

        $db->setQuery('SELECT COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ') AS k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' GROUP BY COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ') ORDER BY c DESC');
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$rows as $r) { $out['queue_status_counts'][mylottoexpertV100SafeStatusKey($r['k'] ?? '')] = (int)($r['c'] ?? 0); }

        $db->setQuery('SELECT COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ') AS k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' GROUP BY COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ') ORDER BY c DESC');
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$rows as $r) { $out['assignment_status_counts'][mylottoexpertV100SafeStatusKey($r['k'] ?? '')] = (int)($r['c'] ?? 0); }

        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_status')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('result_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('pending') . ') AS k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('result_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('pending') . ') ORDER BY c DESC');
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            foreach ((array)$rows as $r) { $out['result_status_counts'][mylottoexpertV100SafeStatusKey($r['k'] ?? '')] = (int)($r['c'] ?? 0); }
        }

        $queueSelect = array('id','lottery_id','game_id','research_status','research_type','setting_family','setting_key','priority_score','assignment_count','max_assignments','result_status','created_at','assigned_at','scored_at','last_reconciled_at');
        $queueSelectSql = implode(', ', array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $queueSelect));
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $queueSelectSql .
            ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') .
            ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
        );
        $recentQueue = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out['recent_queue'] = is_array($recentQueue) ? $recentQueue : array();

        $assignmentSelect = array('id','queue_id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','batch_header_id','assigned_status','assigned_at','saved_count','scored_count','completed_at');
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_status')) { $assignmentSelect[] = 'result_status'; }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'last_reconciled_at')) { $assignmentSelect[] = 'last_reconciled_at'; }

        $assignmentSelectSql = implode(', ', array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $assignmentSelect));
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $assignmentSelectSql .
            ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') .
            ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
        );
        $recentAssignments = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out['recent_assignments'] = is_array($recentAssignments) ? $recentAssignments : array();

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', COUNT(*) AS queue_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_count, MAX(' . $db->quoteName('created_at') . ') AS latest_created ' .
            ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') .
            ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') .
            ' ORDER BY queue_count DESC, latest_created DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
        );
        $lotterySummary = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out['lottery_summary'] = is_array($lotterySummary) ? $lotterySummary : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['message'] = 'Hive dashboard could not be loaded: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV100RenderStatusPills(array $counts)
{
    if (empty($counts)) { return '<span class="mle-ci-chip mle-ci-chip--amber">none yet</span>'; }
    $html = '';
    foreach ($counts as $key => $count) {
        $label = ucwords(str_replace(array('_','-'), ' ', (string)$key));
        $cls = 'mle-ci-chip';
        if (in_array((string)$key, array('improved','scored','completed','saved','waiting_for_draw'), true)) { $cls .= ' mle-ci-chip--teal'; }
        elseif (in_array((string)$key, array('weakened','invalid_missing_settings','assigned_not_saved'), true)) { $cls .= ' mle-ci-chip--amber'; }
        $html .= '<span class="' . $cls . '">' . htmlspecialchars($label . ': ' . (int)$count, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>';
    }
    return $html;
}

function mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    static $cache = array();
    $key = $lotteryId . '|' . strtolower($gameId);
    if (isset($cache[$key])) { return $cache[$key]; }

    $fallbackParts = array();
    if ($lotteryId > 0) { $fallbackParts[] = 'Lottery ID ' . (string)$lotteryId; }
    if ($gameId !== '') { $fallbackParts[] = 'Game ID ' . $gameId; }
    $fallback = !empty($fallbackParts) ? implode(' | ', $fallbackParts) : 'Unknown lottery';

    $formatLabel = function(array $row) use ($fallback) {
        $country = trim((string)($row['country_name'] ?? $row['mle_country_name'] ?? ''));
        $state = trim((string)($row['state_name'] ?? $row['mle_state_name'] ?? ''));
        $name = trim((string)($row['lottery_name'] ?? $row['name'] ?? $row['title'] ?? $row['game_name'] ?? ''));
        $game = trim((string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''));
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta')) {
            try {
                $meta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta($state, $country, $name, $game);
                $country = trim((string)($meta['country'] ?? $country));
                $state = trim((string)($meta['state'] ?? $state));
                $name = trim((string)($meta['lottery'] ?? $name));
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        }
        $parts = array();
        if ($country !== '') { $parts[] = $country; }
        if ($state !== '' && strtolower($state) !== 'lottery') { $parts[] = $state; }
        if ($name !== '') { $parts[] = $name; }
        if (empty($parts) && $game !== '') { $parts[] = 'Game ID ' . $game; }
        return !empty($parts) ? implode(' - ', $parts) : $fallback;
    };

    try {
        if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe')) { $cache[$key] = $fallback; return $fallback; }
        $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries');
        $cols = is_array($cols) ? $cols : array();
        if (empty($cols)) { $cache[$key] = $fallback; return $fallback; }

        $idCol = in_array('lottery_id', $cols, true) ? 'lottery_id' : (in_array('id', $cols, true) ? 'id' : '');
        $nameCol = in_array('name', $cols, true) ? 'name' : (in_array('lottery_name', $cols, true) ? 'lottery_name' : (in_array('title', $cols, true) ? 'title' : ''));
        $hasGame = in_array('game_id', $cols, true);
        $hasStateId = in_array('state_id', $cols, true);
        $hasCountryId = in_array('country_id', $cols, true);
        $hasStateName = in_array('state_name', $cols, true);
        $hasCountryName = in_array('country_name', $cols, true);

        $select = array();
        if ($idCol !== '') { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol, 'lottery_id'); }
        else { $select[] = $db->quote('0', 'lottery_id'); }
        $select[] = $nameCol !== '' ? 'l.' . $db->quoteName($nameCol, 'lottery_name') : $db->quote('', 'lottery_name');
        $select[] = $hasGame ? 'l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') : $db->quote('', 'game_id');
        if ($hasStateId) { $select[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'state_name'); }
        elseif ($hasStateName) { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName('state_name'); }
        else { $select[] = $db->quote('', 'state_name'); }
        if ($hasCountryId && $hasStateId) { $select[] = 'c.' . $db->quoteName('name', 'country_name'); }
        elseif ($hasCountryName) { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName('country_name'); }
        else { $select[] = $db->quote('', 'country_name'); }

        $runLookup = function($whereSql) use ($db, $select, $hasStateId, $hasCountryId) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($select)->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'));
            if ($hasStateId) {
                $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'));
                $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON s.' . $db->quoteName('country_id') . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName('country_id'));
            } elseif ($hasCountryId) {
                $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('country_id') . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName('country_id'));
            }
            $q->where($whereSql)->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            return is_array($row) ? $row : array();
        };

        $row = array();

        if ($hasGame && $gameId !== '') {
            $row = $runLookup('TRIM(COALESCE(l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote($gameId));
        }
        if (empty($row) && $lotteryId > 0 && $idCol !== '') {
            $row = $runLookup('l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
        }
        if (empty($row)) { $cache[$key] = $fallback; return $fallback; }
        $label = $formatLabel($row);
        $cache[$key] = $label;
        return $label;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $cache[$key] = $fallback;
        return $fallback;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel(array &$map, $lotteryId, $gameId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $key = $lotteryId . '|' . strtolower($gameId);
    if (!isset($map[$key])) {
        $map[$key] = array(
            'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
            'game_id' => $gameId,
            'label' => '',
            'queue_total' => 0,
            'queue_open' => 0,
            'queue_assigned' => 0,
            'queue_scored' => 0,
            'assignments' => 0,
            'assigned_users' => 0,
            'saved_count' => 0,
            'assigned_scored_count' => 0,
            'evidence_rows' => 0,
            'evidence_users' => 0,
            'evidence_scored' => 0,
            'pending_to_score' => 0,
            'settings_rows' => 0,
            'latest_activity' => '',
            'activity_score' => 0,
            'result_status_counts' => array()
        );
    }
    return $key;
}

function mylottoexpertV119NormalizeLotteryDisplayKey($label, $gameId = '')
{
    $label = strtolower(trim((string)$label));
    $gameId = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId));
    $label = str_replace('&amp;', ' and ', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/euro\s*millions/', 'euromillions', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/mega\s*millions/', 'mega millions', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/power\s*ball/', 'powerball', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/\s*\|\s*game id\s*[a-z0-9_\-]+\s*$/i', '', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/\s*\|\s*lottery id\s*\d+\s*$/i', '', $label);
    $label = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $label);
    $label = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $label));
    if ($label === '' && $gameId !== '') {
        $label = 'game ' . preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $gameId);
    }
    return $label !== '' ? $label : 'unknown lottery';
}

function mylottoexpertV119SplitLotteryRegionLabel($label)
{
    $label = trim((string)$label);
    $parts = array_map('trim', explode(' - ', $label));
    $parts = array_values(array_filter($parts, function($v) { return $v !== ''; }));
    $out = array('region' => 'Other / Unknown', 'lottery_name' => $label !== '' ? $label : 'Unknown lottery');
    if (count($parts) >= 3) {
        $out['region'] = $parts[0] . ' - ' . $parts[1];
        $out['lottery_name'] = $parts[2];
    } elseif (count($parts) === 2) {
        $out['region'] = $parts[0];
        $out['lottery_name'] = $parts[1];
    } elseif (count($parts) === 1) {
        $out['region'] = 'Other / Unknown';
        $out['lottery_name'] = $parts[0];
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV119MergeLotteryActivityItems(array $items)
{
    $merged = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        if (!is_array($item)) { continue; }
        $label = trim((string)($item['label'] ?? ''));
        $gameId = trim((string)($item['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $key = mylottoexpertV119NormalizeLotteryDisplayKey($label, $gameId);
        if (!isset($merged[$key])) {
            $regionInfo = mylottoexpertV119SplitLotteryRegionLabel($label);
            $item['group_region'] = $regionInfo['region'];
            $item['group_lottery_name'] = $regionInfo['lottery_name'];
            $item['technical_identity_count'] = 0;
            $item['technical_identities'] = array();
            $item['game_ids_seen'] = array();
            $item['lottery_ids_seen'] = array();
            $merged[$key] = $item;
        }
        $idKey = (string)((int)($item['lottery_id'] ?? 0)) . '|' . strtolower(trim((string)($item['game_id'] ?? '')));
        $merged[$key]['technical_identities'][$idKey] = 1;
        if (trim((string)($item['game_id'] ?? '')) !== '') { $merged[$key]['game_ids_seen'][trim((string)$item['game_id'])] = 1; }
        if ((int)($item['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $merged[$key]['lottery_ids_seen'][(string)((int)$item['lottery_id'])] = 1; }
        foreach ($item as $field => $value) {
            if (in_array($field, array('lottery_id','game_id','label','latest_activity','activity_score','result_status_counts','group_region','group_lottery_name','technical_identity_count','technical_identities','game_ids_seen','lottery_ids_seen'), true)) { continue; }
            if (is_numeric($value)) {
                $merged[$key][$field] = (int)($merged[$key][$field] ?? 0) + (int)$value;
            }
        }
        if (strcmp((string)($item['latest_activity'] ?? ''), (string)($merged[$key]['latest_activity'] ?? '')) > 0) {
            $merged[$key]['latest_activity'] = (string)($item['latest_activity'] ?? '');
        }
        if (isset($item['result_status_counts']) && is_array($item['result_status_counts'])) {
            foreach ($item['result_status_counts'] as $status => $count) {
                if (!isset($merged[$key]['result_status_counts'][$status])) { $merged[$key]['result_status_counts'][$status] = 0; }
                $merged[$key]['result_status_counts'][$status] += (int)$count;
            }
        }
        if ((int)($merged[$key]['lottery_id'] ?? 0) <= 0 && (int)($item['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $merged[$key]['lottery_id'] = (int)$item['lottery_id']; }
        if (trim((string)($merged[$key]['game_id'] ?? '')) === '' && trim((string)($item['game_id'] ?? '')) !== '') { $merged[$key]['game_id'] = trim((string)$item['game_id']); }
    }
    foreach ($merged as $key => $item) {
        $item['technical_identity_count'] = count((array)($item['technical_identities'] ?? array()));
        $item['technical_identities'] = array_keys((array)($item['technical_identities'] ?? array()));
        $item['game_ids_seen'] = array_keys((array)($item['game_ids_seen'] ?? array()));
        $item['lottery_ids_seen'] = array_keys((array)($item['lottery_ids_seen'] ?? array()));
        $item['activity_score'] = ((int)($item['queue_open'] ?? 0) * 30) + ((int)($item['queue_assigned'] ?? 0) * 25) + ((int)($item['assignments'] ?? 0) * 20) + ((int)($item['pending_to_score'] ?? 0) * 16) + ((int)($item['future_pending_draws'] ?? 0) * 8) + ((int)($item['unscored_rows'] ?? 0) * 5) + ((int)($item['evidence_scored'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['evidence_users'] ?? 0) * 6) + ((int)($item['run_log_rows'] ?? 0) * 4) + ((int)($item['learning_events'] ?? 0) * 4) + ((int)($item['shared_learning_samples'] ?? 0) * 2) + ((int)($item['recent_24h'] ?? 0) * 12) + ((int)($item['recent_7d'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['settings_rows'] ?? 0)) + ((int)($item['active_locked'] ?? 0) * 8) + ((int)($item['optimizer_snapshots'] ?? 0) * 6) + ((int)($item['print_manifests'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['saved_rows'] ?? 0));
        $merged[$key] = $item;
    }
    $out = array_values($merged);
    usort($out, function($a, $b) {
        $ra = (string)($a['group_region'] ?? '');
        $rb = (string)($b['group_region'] ?? '');
        if ($ra !== $rb) { return strcmp($ra, $rb); }
        if ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) === (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) { return strcmp((string)($a['label'] ?? ''), (string)($b['label'] ?? '')); }
        return ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) > (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV110LoadSitewideHiveIntelligence($db, $limit = 12)
{

    $limit = max(10, min(150, (int)$limit));
    $out = array(
        'available' => false,
        'active_lotteries' => array(),
        'top_users' => array(),
        'recent_activity' => array(),
        'latest_saved_rows' => array(),
        'pending_draws' => array(),
        'future_pending_draws' => array(),
        'method_focus' => array(),
        'runtime_focus' => array(),
        'learning_activity' => array(),
        'batch_activity' => array(),
        'table_health' => array(),
        'missing_tables' => array(),
        'warnings' => array(),
        'totals' => array(
            'lotteries' => 0,
            'queue_open' => 0,
            'queue_total' => 0,
            'assignments' => 0,
            'distinct_assignment_users' => 0,
            'site_users' => 0,
            'site_saved_rows' => 0,
            'site_skai_rows' => 0,
            'pending_to_score' => 0,
            'future_pending_draws' => 0,
            'unscored_rows' => 0,
            'scored_evidence' => 0,
            'settings_rows' => 0,
            'recent_7d_rows' => 0,
            'recent_24h_rows' => 0,
            'today_rows' => 0,
            'yesterday_rows' => 0,
            'current_7d_rows' => 0,
            'previous_7d_rows' => 0,
            'run_log_rows' => 0,
            'runtime_audit_rows' => 0,
            'shared_learning_rows' => 0,
            'learning_events_rows' => 0,
            'batch_headers' => 0,
            'batch_runs' => 0,
            'parameter_sets' => 0,
            'best_settings' => 0,
            'tail_summaries' => 0,
            'backtest_summaries' => 0,
            'backtest_metrics' => 0,
            'current_locked_settings' => 0,
            'optimizer_snapshots' => 0,
            'print_manifests' => 0
        ),
        'message' => 'Sitewide hive intelligence is not available yet.'
    );

    $map = array();
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $tableNames = array(
        'user_saved_numbers' => $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers',
        'users' => $prefix . 'users',
        'lotteries' => $prefix . 'lotteries',
        'mle_lottery_research_queue' => $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue',
        'mle_lottery_research_assignments' => $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments',
        'skai_run_log' => $prefix . 'skai_run_log',
        'skai_runtime_audit' => $prefix . 'skai_runtime_audit',
        'skai_shared_learning' => $prefix . 'skai_shared_learning',
        'skai_learning_events' => $prefix . 'skai_learning_events',
        'skai_backtest_summary' => $prefix . 'skai_backtest_summary',
        'skai_backtest_metrics' => $prefix . 'skai_backtest_metrics',
        'skai_parameter_sets' => $prefix . 'skai_parameter_sets',
        'skai_best_settings' => $prefix . 'skai_best_settings',
        'skai_tail_recovery_summary' => $prefix . 'skai_tail_recovery_summary',
        'mle_skai_batch_header' => $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header',
        'mle_skai_batch_run' => $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run',
        'mle_current_locked_settings' => $prefix . 'mle_current_locked_settings',
        'mle_optimizer_snapshots' => $prefix . 'mle_optimizer_snapshots',
        'mle_prediction_print_manifest' => $prefix . 'mle_prediction_print_manifest'
    );

    $tableExists = function($key) use ($db, $tableNames) {
        $raw = isset($tableNames[$key]) ? $tableNames[$key] : $key;
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe')) { return mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $raw); }
        try {
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw));
            return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    };
    $columnsFor = function($key) use ($db) {
        static $cache = array();
        $table = '#__' . $key;
        if (isset($cache[$table])) { return $cache[$table]; }
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe')) {
            $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, $table);
            $cache[$table] = is_array($cols) ? $cols : array();
            return $cache[$table];
        }
        try {
            $cols = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
            $cache[$table] = is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $cache[$table] = array(); }
        return $cache[$table];
    };
    $hasCol = function(array $cols, $col) { return in_array((string)$col, $cols, true); };
    $qcol = function($col, $alias = '') use ($db) { return ($alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '') . $db->quoteName($col); };
    $nullIfBlank = function($colSql) use ($db) { return 'NULLIF(' . $colSql . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; };
    $dateValid = function($colSql) use ($db) { return '(' . $colSql . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $colSql . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND ' . $colSql . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')'; };
    $safeCount = function($key) use ($db, $tableExists) {
        if (!$tableExists($key)) { return 0; }
        try { $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $key)); return (int)$db->loadResult(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
    };

    try {
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema')) { mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema($db); }

        foreach ($tableNames as $key => $raw) {
            $exists = $tableExists($key);
            $out['table_health'][$key] = array('exists' => $exists, 'rows' => $exists ? $safeCount($key) : 0);
            if (!$exists && $key !== 'users' && $key !== 'lotteries') { $out['missing_tables'][] = $key; }
        }

        $hasSaved = $tableExists('user_saved_numbers');
        if (!$hasSaved) {
            $out['message'] = 'Sitewide hive intelligence cannot load because user_saved_numbers is missing.';
            return $out;
        }
        $out['available'] = true;
        $out['message'] = 'Sitewide hive intelligence is reading all major saved-run, SKAI runtime, learning, batch, queue, and scoring tables.';

        $hasUsers = $tableExists('users');
        $savedCols = $columnsFor('user_saved_numbers');
        if (!$hasCol($savedCols, 'created_at')) { $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers has no created_at column. v114 correctly uses date_saved/generated_at/evaluated_at/user_local_datetime instead.'; }

        $lotteryParts = array();
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'target_lottery_id')) { $lotteryParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $qcol('target_lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'lottery_id')) { $lotteryParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $qcol('lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        $lotteryExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($lotteryParts, array('0'))) . ')';
        $gameParts = array();
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'target_game_id')) { $gameParts[] = $nullIfBlank($qcol('target_game_id')); }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'game_id')) { $gameParts[] = $nullIfBlank($qcol('game_id')); }
        $gameExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($gameParts, array($db->quote('')))) . ')';
        $dateParts = array();
        foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date') as $dc) {
            if ($hasCol($savedCols, $dc)) { $dateParts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $qcol($dc) . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')'; }
        }
        $drawDateExpr = !empty($dateParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $dateParts) . ')' : 'NULL';
        $activityParts = array();
        foreach (array('evaluated_at','date_saved','generated_at','user_local_datetime','target_draw_at','next_draw_at','actual_draw_date','target_draw_date','next_draw_date') as $ac) {
            if ($hasCol($savedCols, $ac)) { $activityParts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $qcol($ac) . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')'; }
        }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'utc_epoch')) { $activityParts[] = 'FROM_UNIXTIME(NULLIF(' . $qcol('utc_epoch') . ',0))'; }
        $activityExpr = !empty($activityParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $activityParts) . ')' : 'NOW()';
        $statusExpr = $hasCol($savedCols, 'evaluation_status') ? $qcol('evaluation_status') : $db->quote('pending');
        $sourceExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_filter(array(
            $hasCol($savedCols, 'analysis_method_key') ? $nullIfBlank($qcol('analysis_method_key')) : '',
            $hasCol($savedCols, 'origin_source') ? $nullIfBlank($qcol('origin_source')) : '',
            $hasCol($savedCols, 'source') ? $nullIfBlank($qcol('source')) : '',
            $hasCol($savedCols, 'skai_run_mode') ? $nullIfBlank($qcol('skai_run_mode')) : '',
            $db->quote('unknown')
        ))) . ')';

        $skaiTests = array();
        foreach (array('analysis_method_key','origin_source','source','analysis_source_page','model_family','batch_type','skai_run_mode') as $sc) {
            if ($hasCol($savedCols, $sc)) { $skaiTests[] = $qcol($sc) . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%skai%'); }
        }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'skai_window_size')) { $skaiTests[] = $qcol('skai_window_size') . ' IS NOT NULL'; }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'sampling_temperature')) { $skaiTests[] = $qcol('sampling_temperature') . ' IS NOT NULL'; }
        $skaiWhere = !empty($skaiTests) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $skaiTests) . ')' : '0=1';
        $settingsTests = array();
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings','full_settings_json','digit_probabilities','position_combinations') as $st) {
            if ($hasCol($savedCols, $st)) { $settingsTests[] = '(' . $qcol($st) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $qcol($st) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        }
        foreach (array('sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','skai_window_size','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight','walks','epochs') as $st) {
            if ($hasCol($savedCols, $st)) { $settingsTests[] = $qcol($st) . ' IS NOT NULL'; }
        }
        $settingsWhere = !empty($settingsTests) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $settingsTests) . ')' : '0=1';
        $scoredTests = array();
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'evaluation_status')) { $scoredTests[] = $qcol('evaluation_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('evaluated') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('final') . ')'; }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'actual_draw_date')) { $scoredTests[] = $dateValid($qcol('actual_draw_date')); }
        if ($hasCol($savedCols, 'evaluated_at')) { $scoredTests[] = $dateValid($qcol('evaluated_at')); }
        $scoredWhere = !empty($scoredTests) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $scoredTests) . ')' : '0=1';
        $unscoredWhere = '(NOT ' . $scoredWhere . ')';
        $pendingWhere = '(' . $drawDateExpr . ' IS NOT NULL AND DATE(' . $drawDateExpr . ') <= CURDATE() AND ' . $unscoredWhere . ')';
        $futurePendingWhere = '(' . $drawDateExpr . ' IS NOT NULL AND DATE(' . $drawDateExpr . ') > CURDATE() AND ' . $unscoredWhere . ')';

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qcol('user_id') . ') AS users, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $skaiWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $unscoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unscored_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pendingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $futurePendingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS future_pending_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_7d, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_24h ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers')
        );
        $totalRow = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (is_array($totalRow)) {
            $out['totals']['site_saved_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['saved_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['site_users'] = (int)($totalRow['users'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['site_skai_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['skai_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['settings_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['settings_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['scored_evidence'] = (int)($totalRow['scored_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['unscored_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['unscored_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['pending_to_score'] = (int)($totalRow['pending_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['future_pending_draws'] = (int)($totalRow['future_pending_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['recent_7d_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['recent_7d'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['recent_24h_rows'] = (int)($totalRow['recent_24h'] ?? 0);
        }

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qcol('user_id') . ') AS site_users, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $skaiWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evidence_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evidence_scored, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $unscoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unscored_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pendingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_to_score, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $futurePendingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS future_pending_draws, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_7d, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_24h, ' .
            'MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr
        );
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {
            $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
            $map[$key]['saved_rows'] = (int)($r['saved_rows'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['site_users'] = (int)($r['site_users'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['evidence_rows'] = (int)($r['evidence_rows'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['evidence_users'] = (int)($r['site_users'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['settings_rows'] = (int)($r['settings_rows'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['evidence_scored'] = (int)($r['evidence_scored'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['unscored_rows'] = (int)($r['unscored_rows'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['pending_to_score'] = (int)($r['pending_to_score'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['future_pending_draws'] = (int)($r['future_pending_draws'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['recent_7d'] = (int)($r['recent_7d'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['recent_24h'] = (int)($r['recent_24h'] ?? 0);
            $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
        }

        if ($tableExists('mle_lottery_research_queue')) {
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', COUNT(*) AS queue_total, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('open') . ',' . $db->quote('ready_to_assign') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_open, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('in_progress') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_assigned, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('research_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_scored, ' .
                'MAX(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_at') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('created_at') . ')) AS latest_activity ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id')
            );
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['queue_total'] = (int)($r['queue_total'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['queue_open'] = (int)($r['queue_open'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['queue_assigned'] = (int)($r['queue_assigned'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['queue_scored'] = (int)($r['queue_scored'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('mle_lottery_research_assignments')) {
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', COUNT(*) AS assignments, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS assigned_users, ' .
                'SUM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ',0)) AS saved_count, SUM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('scored_count') . ',0)) AS assigned_scored_count, MAX(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('completed_at') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_at') . ')) AS latest_activity ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id')
            );
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['assignments'] = (int)($r['assignments'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['assigned_users'] = (int)($r['assigned_users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['saved_count'] = (int)($r['saved_count'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['assigned_scored_count'] = (int)($r['assigned_scored_count'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }

        if ($tableExists('skai_run_log')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT game_id, COUNT(*) AS run_log_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users, MAX(created_at) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_run_log') . ' GROUP BY game_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, 0, (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['run_log_rows'] = (int)($r['run_log_rows'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['run_log_users'] = (int)($r['users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT runtime_status, final_rank_source, COUNT(*) AS rows, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users, MAX(created_at) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_run_log') . ' GROUP BY runtime_status, final_rank_source ORDER BY rows DESC LIMIT 20');
            $runtime = $db->loadAssocList();
            $out['runtime_focus'] = is_array($runtime) ? $runtime : array();
        }
        if ($tableExists('skai_learning_events')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT game_id, COUNT(*) AS learning_events, SUM(CASE WHEN is_learned = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS learned_events, MAX(COALESCE(learned_at, created_at)) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events') . ' GROUP BY game_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, 0, (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['learning_events'] = (int)($r['learning_events'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['learned_events'] = (int)($r['learned_events'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('skai_shared_learning')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT game_id, COUNT(*) AS shared_rows, SUM(COALESCE(sample_count,0)) AS samples, MAX(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning') . ' GROUP BY game_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, 0, (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['shared_learning_rows'] = (int)($r['shared_rows'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['shared_learning_samples'] = (int)($r['samples'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('mle_skai_batch_header')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT lottery_id, COUNT(*) AS batch_headers, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS batch_users, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('open') . ',' . $db->quote('active') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_batches, MAX(created_at) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header') . ' GROUP BY lottery_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), '');
                $map[$key]['batch_headers'] = (int)($r['batch_headers'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['batch_users'] = (int)($r['batch_users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['open_batches'] = (int)($r['open_batches'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('mle_current_locked_settings')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT lottery_id, COUNT(*) AS locked_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS locked_users, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_locked, MAX(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings') . ' GROUP BY lottery_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), '');
                $map[$key]['locked_rows'] = (int)($r['locked_rows'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['locked_users'] = (int)($r['locked_users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['active_locked'] = (int)($r['active_locked'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('mle_optimizer_snapshots')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT lottery_id, COUNT(*) AS optimizer_snapshots, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS optimizer_users, MAX(COALESCE(updated_at, created_at)) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_optimizer_snapshots') . ' GROUP BY lottery_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), '');
                $map[$key]['optimizer_snapshots'] = (int)($r['optimizer_snapshots'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['optimizer_users'] = (int)($r['optimizer_users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }
        if ($tableExists('mle_prediction_print_manifest')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT lottery_id, game_id, COUNT(*) AS print_manifests, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS print_users, MAX(COALESCE(printed_at, created_at)) AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_prediction_print_manifest') . ' GROUP BY lottery_id, game_id');
            foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                $key = mylottoexpertV110MergeLotteryIntel($map, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $map[$key]['print_manifests'] = (int)($r['print_manifests'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['print_users'] = (int)($r['print_users'] ?? 0);
                $map[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$map[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
            }
        }

        $userSelectName = $hasUsers ? 'COALESCE(NULLIF(u.' . $db->quoteName('name') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), NULLIF(u.' . $db->quoteName('username') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), CONCAT(' . $db->quote('User ') . ', s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . '))' : 'CONCAT(' . $db->quote('User ') . ', s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ')';
        $lotteryExprS = str_replace(array($db->quoteName('target_lottery_id'), $db->quoteName('lottery_id')), array('s.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id'), 's.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id')), $lotteryExpr);
        $gameExprS = str_replace(array($db->quoteName('target_game_id'), $db->quoteName('game_id')), array('s.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id'), 's.' . $db->quoteName('game_id')), $gameExpr);
        $activityExprS = $activityExpr;
        $drawDateExprS = $drawDateExpr;
        foreach ($savedCols as $c) { $activityExprS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $activityExprS); $drawDateExprS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $drawDateExprS); }
        $sourceExprS = $sourceExpr;
        foreach ($savedCols as $c) { $sourceExprS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $sourceExprS); }
        $scoredWhereS = $scoredWhere; $settingsWhereS = $settingsWhere; $skaiWhereS = $skaiWhere; $pendingWhereS = $pendingWhere; $futurePendingWhereS = $futurePendingWhere;
        foreach ($savedCols as $c) {
            $scoredWhereS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $scoredWhereS);
            $settingsWhereS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $settingsWhereS);
            $skaiWhereS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $skaiWhereS);
            $pendingWhereS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $pendingWhereS);
            $futurePendingWhereS = str_replace($db->quoteName($c), 's.' . $db->quoteName($c), $futurePendingWhereS);
        }
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' AS user_id, ' . $userSelectName . ' AS display_name, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $lotteryExprS . ') AS lotteries, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $skaiWhereS . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsWhereS . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhereS . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pendingWhereS . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $futurePendingWhereS . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS future_pending_rows, MAX(' . $activityExprS . ') AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') .
            ($hasUsers ? ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__users', 'u') . ' ON u.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') : '') .
            ' GROUP BY s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ', display_name ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, latest_activity DESC LIMIT 25'
        );
        $topUsers = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out['top_users'] = is_array($topUsers) ? $topUsers : array();

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, ' . $drawDateExpr . ' AS draw_date, COUNT(*) AS pending_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qcol('user_id') . ') AS users, MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $pendingWhere .
            ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ', ' . $drawDateExpr . ' ORDER BY draw_date ASC, pending_rows DESC LIMIT 40'
        );
        $pending = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$pending as &$p) { $p['label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($p['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($p['game_id'] ?? '')); }
        unset($p);
        $out['pending_draws'] = is_array($pending) ? $pending : array();
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, ' . $drawDateExpr . ' AS draw_date, COUNT(*) AS pending_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qcol('user_id') . ') AS users, MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $futurePendingWhere .
            ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ', ' . $drawDateExpr . ' ORDER BY draw_date ASC, pending_rows DESC LIMIT 40'
        );
        $future = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$future as &$p) { $p['label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($p['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($p['game_id'] ?? '')); }
        unset($p);
        $out['future_pending_draws'] = is_array($future) ? $future : array();

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $sourceExpr . ' AS method_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qcol('user_id') . ') AS users, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $lotteryExpr . ') AS lotteries, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' GROUP BY ' . $sourceExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC LIMIT 25'
        );
        $methods = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out['method_focus'] = is_array($methods) ? $methods : array();

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' AS id, s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' AS user_id, ' . $userSelectName . ' AS display_name, ' . $lotteryExprS . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExprS . ' AS game_id, ' .
            $sourceExprS . ' AS method_key, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'evaluation_status') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') : $db->quote('pending')) . ' AS evaluation_status, ' .
            $drawDateExprS . ' AS target_draw_date, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'actual_draw_date') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') : 'NULL') . ' AS actual_draw_date, ' .
            $activityExprS . ' AS latest_activity ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') .
            ($hasUsers ? ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__users', 'u') . ' ON u.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') : '') .
            ' ORDER BY latest_activity DESC, s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 50'
        );
        $recent = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$recent as &$r) { $r['label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '')); }
        unset($r);
        $out['recent_activity'] = is_array($recent) ? $recent : array();

        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' AS id, s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' AS user_id, ' . $userSelectName . ' AS display_name, ' . $lotteryExprS . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExprS . ' AS game_id, ' .
            $sourceExprS . ' AS method_key, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'label') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('label') : $db->quote('')) . ' AS label_text, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'evaluation_status') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') : $db->quote('pending')) . ' AS evaluation_status, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'date_saved') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('date_saved') : 'NULL') . ' AS date_saved, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'generated_at') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('generated_at') : 'NULL') . ' AS generated_at, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'target_draw_date') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') : ($hasCol($savedCols,'next_draw_date') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('next_draw_date') : 'NULL')) . ' AS target_draw_date, ' .
            ($hasCol($savedCols,'batch_uuid') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') : $db->quote('')) . ' AS batch_uuid ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') .
            ($hasUsers ? ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__users', 'u') . ' ON u.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') : '') .
            ' ORDER BY s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 75'
        );
        $latestById = $db->loadAssocList();
        foreach ((array)$latestById as &$r) { $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '')); }
        unset($r);
        $out['latest_saved_rows'] = is_array($latestById) ? $latestById : array();

        $out['totals']['run_log_rows'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_run_log']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['runtime_audit_rows'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_runtime_audit']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['shared_learning_rows'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_shared_learning']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['learning_events_rows'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_learning_events']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['batch_headers'] = (int)$out['table_health']['mle_skai_batch_header']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['batch_runs'] = (int)$out['table_health']['mle_skai_batch_run']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['parameter_sets'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_parameter_sets']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['best_settings'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_best_settings']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['tail_summaries'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_tail_recovery_summary']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['backtest_summaries'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_backtest_summary']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['backtest_metrics'] = (int)$out['table_health']['skai_backtest_metrics']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['current_locked_settings'] = (int)$out['table_health']['mle_current_locked_settings']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['optimizer_snapshots'] = (int)$out['table_health']['mle_optimizer_snapshots']['rows'];
        $out['totals']['print_manifests'] = (int)$out['table_health']['mle_prediction_print_manifest']['rows'];

        foreach ($map as $key => $item) {
            $item['label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)$item['lottery_id'], (string)$item['game_id']);
            $item['activity_score'] = ((int)($item['queue_open'] ?? 0) * 30) + ((int)($item['queue_assigned'] ?? 0) * 25) + ((int)($item['assignments'] ?? 0) * 20) + ((int)($item['pending_to_score'] ?? 0) * 16) + ((int)($item['future_pending_draws'] ?? 0) * 8) + ((int)($item['unscored_rows'] ?? 0) * 5) + ((int)($item['evidence_scored'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['evidence_users'] ?? 0) * 6) + ((int)($item['run_log_rows'] ?? 0) * 4) + ((int)($item['learning_events'] ?? 0) * 4) + ((int)($item['shared_learning_samples'] ?? 0) * 2) + ((int)($item['recent_24h'] ?? 0) * 12) + ((int)($item['recent_7d'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['settings_rows'] ?? 0)) + ((int)($item['active_locked'] ?? 0) * 8) + ((int)($item['optimizer_snapshots'] ?? 0) * 6) + ((int)($item['print_manifests'] ?? 0) * 3) + ((int)($item['saved_rows'] ?? 0));
            $map[$key] = $item;
            $out['totals']['queue_open'] += (int)($item['queue_open'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['queue_total'] += (int)($item['queue_total'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['assignments'] += (int)($item['assignments'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['distinct_assignment_users'] += (int)($item['assigned_users'] ?? 0);
        }
        $items = array_values($map);
        $items = function_exists('mylottoexpertV119MergeLotteryActivityItems') ? mylottoexpertV119MergeLotteryActivityItems($items) : $items;
        usort($items, function($a, $b) {
