            $ra = (string)($a['group_region'] ?? '');
            $rb = (string)($b['group_region'] ?? '');
            if ($ra !== $rb) { return strcmp($ra, $rb); }
            if ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) === (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) { return strcmp((string)($b['latest_activity'] ?? ''), (string)($a['latest_activity'] ?? '')) * -1; }
            return ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) > (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) ? 1 : -1;
        });
        $out['totals']['lotteries'] = count($items);
        $out['active_lotteries'] = array_slice($items, 0, $limit);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['message'] = 'Sitewide hive intelligence could not be loaded: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }
    return $out;
}

          <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Learning events</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['learning_events_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
        </div>
        <p class="mle-ci-panel__text">This admin-only view now reads the full saved-run ecosystem and the major SKAI runtime/learning/batch tables. ' | Not checked: ' . (int)($item['unscored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Due score: ' . (int)($item['pending_to_score'] ?? 0) . ' | Future: ' . (int)($item['future_pending_draws'] ?? 0) . ' | Locked: ' . (int)($item['active_locked'] ?? 0) . ' | Optimizer: ' . (int)($item['optimizer_snapshots'] ?? 0) . ' | Printed: ' . (int)($item['print_manifests'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>

              </div>

                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved: ' . (int)($m['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Users: ' . (int)($m['users'] ?? 0) . ' | Lotteries: ' . (int)($m['lotteries'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored: ' . (int)($m['scored_rows'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Latest activity: ' . (string)($m['latest_activity'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php if (empty($latestSavedRows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No saved rows found</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No records were returned from user_saved_numbers.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($latestSavedRows as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Row #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . (string)($r['display_name'] ?? ('User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0))) . ' | ' . (string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Method: ' . (string)($r['method_key'] ?? 'unknown') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Target draw: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? '') . ' | Batch: ' . (string)($r['batch_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved: ' . (string)($r['date_saved'] ?? '') . ' | Generated: ' . (string)($r['generated_at'] ?? '') . ' | Label: ' . (string)($r['label_text'] ?? '') . ' | Game ID: ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Recent saved-run activity</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php if (empty($recent)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No recent activity</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No recent saved rows were found.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($recent as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($r['display_name'] ?? ('User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0))) . ' | ' . (string)($r['label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Method: ' . (string)($r['method_key'] ?? 'unknown') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Target draw: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? '') . ' | Actual draw: ' . (string)($r['actual_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Latest activity: ' . (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? '') . ' | Row ID: ' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, $table)
    {
        try {
            $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $table;
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES" .
                " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()" .
                " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw)
            );
            return ((int)$db->loadResult()) > 0;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165Columns')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, $table)
    {
        static $cache = array();
        if (isset($cache[$table])) { return $cache[$table]; }
        try {
            $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $table;
            $db->setQuery(
                "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS" .
                " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()" .
                " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw)
            );
            $cols = $db->loadColumn();
            $cache[$table] = is_array($cols) ? $cols : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $cache[$table] = array();
        }
        return $cache[$table];
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165HasColumn')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165HasColumn(array $cols, $column)
    {
        return in_array((string)$column, $cols, true);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165GameExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, $alias, array $cols)
    {
        $alias = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$alias);
        $p = $alias !== '' ? ($alias . '.') : '';
        $parts = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'target_game_id')) { $parts[] = 'NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')), ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'game_id')) { $parts[] = 'NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')), ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        $lotParts = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'target_lottery_id')) { $lotParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $p . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'lottery_id')) { $lotParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $p . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        if (!empty($lotParts)) {
            $lotExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $lotParts) . ',0)';
            $parts[] = 'CASE WHEN ' . $lotExpr . ' > 0 THEN CONCAT(' . $db->quote('lottery:') . ', ' . $lotExpr . ') ELSE NULL END';
        }
        if (empty($parts)) { return $db->quote('unknown'); }
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $parts) . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow(array &$map, $gameKey)
    {
        $gameKey = trim((string)$gameKey);
        if ($gameKey === '') { $gameKey = 'unknown'; }
        if (!isset($map[$gameKey])) {
            $map[$gameKey] = array(
                'game_key' => $gameKey,
                'game_id' => strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? '' : $gameKey,
                'lottery_id' => strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? (int)substr($gameKey, 8) : 0,
                'label' => '',
                'saved_rows' => 0,
                'saved_users' => 0,
                'normal_saved_rows' => 0,
                'admin_research_saved_rows' => 0,
                'scored_saved_rows' => 0,
                'latest_saved_at' => '',
                'learning_events' => 0,
                'learned_events' => 0,
                'matched_learning_events' => 0,
                'matched_normal_learning_events' => 0,
                'matched_admin_learning_events' => 0,
                'shared_learning_rows' => 0,
                'shared_learning_samples' => 0,
                'learning_performance_rows' => 0,
                'learning_performance_users' => 0,
                'research_assignments' => 0,
                'research_saved_assignments' => 0,
                'latest_learning_at' => '',
                'audit_status' => '',
                'activity_score' => 0
            );
        }
        return $gameKey;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165BuildAdminLearningAudit')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165BuildAdminLearningAudit($db, $limit = 25)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $map = array();
        $totals = array(
            'saved_rows' => 0,
            'normal_saved_rows' => 0,
            'admin_research_saved_rows' => 0,
            'scored_saved_rows' => 0,
            'learning_events' => 0,
            'learned_events' => 0,
            'matched_normal_learning_events' => 0,
            'shared_learning_samples' => 0,
            'research_saved_assignments' => 0,
            'lotteries' => 0
        );
        $warnings = array();

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
                $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 's', $cols);
                $adminConds = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_assignment_id')) { $adminConds[] = 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_assignment_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_queue_id')) { $adminConds[] = 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_queue_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'origin_source')) { $adminConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('origin_source') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) LIKE ' . $db->quote('%research%'); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'source')) { $adminConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('source') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) LIKE ' . $db->quote('%research%'); }
                $adminExpr = !empty($adminConds) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $adminConds) . ')' : '0=1';
                $scoredConds = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'evaluation_status')) { $scoredConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('checked') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('evaluated') . ')'; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'evaluated_at')) { $scoredConds[] = '(s.' . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' IS NOT NULL AND s.' . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')'; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'actual_draw_date')) { $scoredConds[] = '(s.' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ' IS NOT NULL AND s.' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')'; }
                $scoredExpr = !empty($scoredConds) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $scoredConds) . ')' : '0=1';
                $latestParts = array();
                foreach (array('date_saved','generated_at','created_at','evaluated_at') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c); } }
                $latestExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                $select = array(
                    $gameExpr . ' AS game_key',
                    'COUNT(*) AS saved_rows',
                    mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'user_id') ? 'COUNT(DISTINCT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS saved_users' : '0 AS saved_users',
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $adminExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS admin_research_saved_rows',
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (' . $adminExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_saved_rows',
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_saved_rows',
                    $latestExpr . ' AS latest_saved_at'
                );
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC LIMIT ' . (int)max(100, $limit * 4));
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $r) {
                        $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                        foreach (array('saved_rows','saved_users','admin_research_saved_rows','normal_saved_rows','scored_saved_rows') as $field) { $map[$k][$field] += (int)($r[$field] ?? 0); }
                        if ((string)($r['latest_saved_at'] ?? '') !== '' && (string)$r['latest_saved_at'] > (string)$map[$k]['latest_saved_at']) { $map[$k]['latest_saved_at'] = (string)$r['latest_saved_at']; }
                    }
                }
            } else { $warnings[] = 'user_saved_numbers table not found.'; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $warnings[] = 'Saved-run audit query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'skai_learning_events')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'skai_learning_events');
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'game_id')) {
                    $learnedExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'is_learned') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('is_learned') . ',0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)' : '0';
                    $latestParts = array();
                    foreach (array('learned_at','created_at','updated_at') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
                    $latestExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS learning_events, ' . $learnedExpr . ' AS learned_events, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_learning_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events') . ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('game_id'));
                    $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                    if (is_array($rows)) {
                        foreach ($rows as $r) {
                            $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                            $map[$k]['learning_events'] += (int)($r['learning_events'] ?? 0);
                            $map[$k]['learned_events'] += (int)($r['learned_events'] ?? 0);
                            if ((string)($r['latest_learning_at'] ?? '') !== '' && (string)$r['latest_learning_at'] > (string)$map[$k]['latest_learning_at']) { $map[$k]['latest_learning_at'] = (string)$r['latest_learning_at']; }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'run_uuid') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
                    $sCols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
                    if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($sCols, 'run_uuid')) {
                        $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 's', $sCols);
                        $adminConds = array();
                        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($sCols, 'hive_assignment_id')) { $adminConds[] = 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_assignment_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
                        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($sCols, 'hive_queue_id')) { $adminConds[] = 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_queue_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
                        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($sCols, 'origin_source')) { $adminConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('origin_source') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) LIKE ' . $db->quote('%research%'); }
                        $adminExpr = !empty($adminConds) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $adminConds) . ')' : '0=1';
                        $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(DISTINCT e.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ') AS matched_events, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $adminExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched_admin_events, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (' . $adminExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched_normal_events FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events', 'e') . ' INNER JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ON BINARY TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = BINARY TRIM(COALESCE(e.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))' . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(100, $limit * 4));
                        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                        if (is_array($rows)) {
                            foreach ($rows as $r) {
                                $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                                $map[$k]['matched_learning_events'] += (int)($r['matched_events'] ?? 0);
                                $map[$k]['matched_admin_learning_events'] += (int)($r['matched_admin_events'] ?? 0);
                                $map[$k]['matched_normal_learning_events'] += (int)($r['matched_normal_events'] ?? 0);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $warnings[] = 'Learning-event audit query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'skai_shared_learning')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'skai_shared_learning');
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'game_id')) {
                    $sampleExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'sample_count') ? 'SUM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('sample_count') . ',0))' : '0';
                    $latestParts = array();
                    foreach (array('updated_at','created_at') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
                    $latestExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS shared_rows, ' . $sampleExpr . ' AS samples, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_learning_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning') . ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('game_id'));
                    $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                    if (is_array($rows)) {
                        foreach ($rows as $r) {
                            $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                            $map[$k]['shared_learning_rows'] += (int)($r['shared_rows'] ?? 0);
                            $map[$k]['shared_learning_samples'] += (int)($r['samples'] ?? 0);
                            if ((string)($r['latest_learning_at'] ?? '') !== '' && (string)$r['latest_learning_at'] > (string)$map[$k]['latest_learning_at']) { $map[$k]['latest_learning_at'] = (string)$r['latest_learning_at']; }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $warnings[] = 'Shared-learning audit query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'skai_learning_performance')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'skai_learning_performance');
                $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'p', $cols);
                $latestParts = array();
                foreach (array('evaluated_at','created_at','draw_date','target_draw_date') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = 'p.' . $db->quoteName($c); } }
                $latestExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                $userExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'user_id') ? 'COUNT(DISTINCT p.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ')' : '0';
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS rows_found, ' . $userExpr . ' AS users_found, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_learning_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance', 'p') . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY rows_found DESC LIMIT ' . (int)max(100, $limit * 4));
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $r) {
                        $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                        $map[$k]['learning_performance_rows'] += (int)($r['rows_found'] ?? 0);
                        $map[$k]['learning_performance_users'] += (int)($r['users_found'] ?? 0);
                        if ((string)($r['latest_learning_at'] ?? '') !== '' && (string)$r['latest_learning_at'] > (string)$map[$k]['latest_learning_at']) { $map[$k]['latest_learning_at'] = (string)$r['latest_learning_at']; }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $warnings[] = 'Learning-performance audit query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments');
                $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'a', $cols);
                $savedConds = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'runner_status')) { $savedConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('saved'); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'saved_count')) { $savedConds[] = 'COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ',0) > 0'; }
                $savedExpr = !empty($savedConds) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $savedConds) . ')' : '0=1';
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS assignments, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $savedExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved_assignments FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a') . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY assignments DESC LIMIT ' . (int)max(100, $limit * 4));
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $r) {
                        $k = mylottoexpertV165MergeAuditRow($map, (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown'));
                        $map[$k]['research_assignments'] += (int)($r['assignments'] ?? 0);
                        $map[$k]['research_saved_assignments'] += (int)($r['saved_assignments'] ?? 0);
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $warnings[] = 'Admin research assignment audit query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        foreach ($map as $k => &$item) {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
                try { $item['label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)$item['lottery_id'], (string)$item['game_id']); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $item['label'] = ''; }
            }
            if ($item['label'] === '') { $item['label'] = (string)$item['game_key']; }
            $item['activity_score'] = ((int)$item['saved_rows'] * 5) + ((int)$item['normal_saved_rows'] * 8) + ((int)$item['scored_saved_rows'] * 12) + ((int)$item['matched_normal_learning_events'] * 20) + ((int)$item['learning_events'] * 10) + ((int)$item['shared_learning_samples'] * 2) + ((int)$item['research_saved_assignments'] * 3);
            if ((int)$item['normal_saved_rows'] > 0 && ((int)$item['learning_events'] > 0 || (int)$item['shared_learning_samples'] > 0 || (int)$item['learning_performance_rows'] > 0)) {
                $item['audit_status'] = 'Normal user evidence exists for this lottery, and learning tables also contain lottery-level evidence.';
            } elseif ((int)$item['normal_saved_rows'] > 0) {
                $item['audit_status'] = 'Normal user runs exist, but no confirmed learned/reconciled table rows were found yet.';
            } elseif ((int)$item['admin_research_saved_rows'] > 0 || (int)$item['research_saved_assignments'] > 0) {
                $item['audit_status'] = 'Only admin research evidence was found in this audit snapshot.';
            } elseif ((int)$item['learning_events'] > 0 || (int)$item['shared_learning_samples'] > 0) {
                $item['audit_status'] = 'Learning rows exist, but this audit could not match them back to saved user rows.';
            } else {
                $item['audit_status'] = 'No learning evidence found yet.';
            }
            foreach (array('saved_rows','normal_saved_rows','admin_research_saved_rows','scored_saved_rows','learning_events','learned_events','matched_normal_learning_events','shared_learning_samples','research_saved_assignments') as $tf) { $totals[$tf] += (int)$item[$tf]; }
        }
        unset($item);

        $items = array_values($map);
        usort($items, function($a, $b) {
            if ((int)$b['activity_score'] === (int)$a['activity_score']) { return strcmp((string)$b['latest_saved_at'], (string)$a['latest_saved_at']) * -1; }
            return ((int)$b['activity_score'] > (int)$a['activity_score']) ? 1 : -1;
        });
        $totals['lotteries'] = count($items);
        return array('totals' => $totals, 'items' => array_slice($items, 0, $limit), 'warnings' => $warnings);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165RenderAdminLearningAudit')) {
    function mylottoexpertV165RenderAdminLearningAudit($db, $limit = 25)
    {
        $audit = mylottoexpertV165BuildAdminLearningAudit($db, $limit);
        $totals = (array)($audit['totals'] ?? array());
        $items = (array)($audit['items'] ?? array());
        $warnings = (array)($audit['warnings'] ?? array());
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section id="mle-v165-admin-learning-audit" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem; border:2px solid #0f766e;" aria-label="Admin Learning Audit">
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin Learning Audit</span>
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Confirms normal user evidence versus admin research evidence</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
            <p class="mle-v123-section-note">Read-only audit. This panel does not change saved predictions, learning events, scoring, queues, or SKAI settings. It shows whether each lottery has normal user saved/scored evidence, admin research evidence, and lottery-level learning rows.</p>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Normal user saved rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['normal_saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Admin research saved rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['admin_research_saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Scored saved rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['scored_saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Learning events</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['learning_events'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Matched normal learning events</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['matched_normal_learning_events'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Shared learning samples</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['shared_learning_samples'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Research saved assignments</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['research_saved_assignments'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Lotteries audited</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['lotteries'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($warnings)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:.75rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Audit warnings</span><p><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', array_slice($warnings, 0, 6)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
              <summary><strong>Lottery learning source breakdown</strong></summary>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
                <?php if (empty($items)): ?>
                  <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No audit rows found</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No saved rows or learning rows were returned by the audit queries.</span></div>
                <?php else: foreach ($items as $item): ?>
                  <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                    <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($item['label'] ?? $item['game_key'] ?? 'Unknown lottery'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Normal saved: ' . (int)($item['normal_saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Admin research saved: ' . (int)($item['admin_research_saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Saved users: ' . (int)($item['saved_users'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored saved: ' . (int)($item['scored_saved_rows'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Learning events: ' . (int)($item['learning_events'] ?? 0) . ' | Learned events: ' . (int)($item['learned_events'] ?? 0) . ' | Matched normal events: ' . (int)($item['matched_normal_learning_events'] ?? 0) . ' | Matched admin events: ' . (int)($item['matched_admin_learning_events'] ?? 0) . ' | Shared samples: ' . (int)($item['shared_learning_samples'] ?? 0) . ' | Performance rows: ' . (int)($item['learning_performance_rows'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Admin assignments saved: ' . (int)($item['research_saved_assignments'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest saved: ' . (string)($item['latest_saved_at'] ?? '') . ' | Latest learning: ' . (string)($item['latest_learning_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($item['audit_status'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong></span>
                  </div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div>
            </details>
          </div>
        </section>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166ActivityDateExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166ActivityDateExpr($db, $alias, array $cols)
    {
        $alias = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$alias);
        $p = $alias !== '' ? ($alias . '.') : '';
        $parts = array();
        foreach (array('date_saved','generated_at','created_at','evaluated_at') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) {
                $parts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $p . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
        }
        if (empty($parts)) { return $db->quote(''); }
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $parts) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166AdminResearchExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166AdminResearchExpr($db, $alias, array $cols)
    {
        $alias = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$alias);
        $p = $alias !== '' ? ($alias . '.') : '';
        $conds = array();
        foreach (array('hive_assignment_id','mle_research_assignment_id','research_assignment_id') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $conds[] = 'COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName($c) . ',0) > 0'; }
        }
        foreach (array('hive_queue_id','mle_research_queue_id','research_queue_id') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $conds[] = 'COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName($c) . ',0) > 0'; }
        }
        foreach (array('origin_source','source','batch_type','model_family') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $conds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) LIKE ' . $db->quote('%research%'); }
        }
        if (empty($conds)) { return '0=1'; }
        return '(' . implode(' OR ', $conds) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166ScoredExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166ScoredExpr($db, $alias, array $cols)
    {
        $alias = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$alias);
        $p = $alias !== '' ? ($alias . '.') : '';
        $conds = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'evaluation_status')) { $conds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('checked') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('evaluated') . ')'; }
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'evaluated_at')) { $conds[] = '(' . $p . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $p . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')'; }
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'actual_draw_date')) { $conds[] = '(' . $p . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $p . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')'; }
        if (empty($conds)) { return '0=1'; }
        return '(' . implode(' OR ', $conds) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166MethodExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166MethodExpr($db, $alias, array $cols)
    {
        $alias = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$alias);
        $p = $alias !== '' ? ($alias . '.') : '';
        $parts = array();
        foreach (array('analysis_method_key','model_family','origin_source','source') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $parts[] = 'NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $p . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')), ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        }
        if (empty($parts)) { return $db->quote('unknown'); }
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $parts) . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166BuildUserActivityStats')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166BuildUserActivityStats($db, $limit = 15)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(50, (int)$limit));
        $out = array(
            'totals' => array('saved_rows'=>0,'active_users'=>0,'active_lotteries'=>0,'last_24h'=>0,'last_7d'=>0,'last_30d'=>0,'scored_rows'=>0,'admin_research_rows'=>0),
            'top_users' => array(),
            'top_lotteries' => array(),
            'top_user_lotteries' => array(),
            'top_methods' => array(),
            'warnings' => array()
        );
        if (!mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers table not found.';
            return $out;
        }
        $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
        if (empty($cols)) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Could not read user_saved_numbers columns.';
            return $out;
        }
        $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $activityExpr = mylottoexpertV166ActivityDateExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $hasActivityDate = ($activityExpr !== $db->quote(''));
        $adminExpr = mylottoexpertV166AdminResearchExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $scoredExpr = mylottoexpertV166ScoredExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $methodExpr = mylottoexpertV166MethodExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $userExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'user_id') ? 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ',0)' : '0';
        $last24 = $hasActivityDate ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)' : '0';
        $last7 = $hasActivityDate ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)' : '0';
        $last30 = $hasActivityDate ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)' : '0';
        $latestExpr = $hasActivityDate ? 'MAX(' . $activityExpr . ')' : $db->quote('');

        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $userExpr . ') AS active_users, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $gameExpr . ') AS active_lotteries, ' . $last24 . ' AS last_24h, ' . $last7 . ' AS last_7d, ' . $last30 . ' AS last_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $adminExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS admin_research_rows FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's'));
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row)) {
                foreach ($out['totals'] as $k => $v) { $out['totals'][$k] = (int)($row[$k] ?? 0); }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'User activity total query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            $joinUsers = mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'users');
            $selectName = $joinUsers ? 'MAX(u.' . $db->quoteName('name') . ') AS display_name, MAX(u.' . $db->quoteName('username') . ') AS username, MAX(u.' . $db->quoteName('email') . ') AS email' : $db->quote('') . ' AS display_name, ' . $db->quote('') . ' AS username, ' . $db->quote('') . ' AS email';
            $sql = 'SELECT ' . $userExpr . ' AS user_id, ' . $selectName . ', COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $gameExpr . ') AS lotteries, ' . $last24 . ' AS last_24h, ' . $last7 . ' AS last_7d, ' . $last30 . ' AS last_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $adminExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS admin_research_rows, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's');
            if ($joinUsers) { $sql .= ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__users', 'u') . ' ON u.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $userExpr; }
            $sql .= ' GROUP BY ' . $userExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, latest_activity DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit;
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            $out['top_users'] = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Top-user query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $userExpr . ') AS users, ' . $last24 . ' AS last_24h, ' . $last7 . ' AS last_7d, ' . $last30 . ' AS last_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $adminExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS admin_research_rows, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, latest_activity DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as &$r) {
                    $gameKey = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    $gameId = strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? '' : $gameKey;
                    $lotteryId = strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? (int)substr($gameKey, 8) : 0;
                    $label = '';
                    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
                        try { $label = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $label = ''; }
                    }
                    $r['label'] = $label !== '' ? $label : $gameKey;
                }
                unset($r);
                $out['top_lotteries'] = $rows;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Top-lottery query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            $joinUsers = mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'users');
            $selectName = $joinUsers ? 'MAX(u.' . $db->quoteName('name') . ') AS display_name' : $db->quote('') . ' AS display_name';
            $sql = 'SELECT ' . $userExpr . ' AS user_id, ' . $selectName . ', ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, ' . $last7 . ' AS last_7d, ' . $last30 . ' AS last_30d, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's');
            if ($joinUsers) { $sql .= ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__users', 'u') . ' ON u.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $userExpr; }
            $sql .= ' GROUP BY ' . $userExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, latest_activity DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit;
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as &$r) {
                    $gameKey = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    $gameId = strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? '' : $gameKey;
                    $lotteryId = strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0 ? (int)substr($gameKey, 8) : 0;
                    $label = '';
                    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
                        try { $label = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $label = ''; }
                    }
                    $r['label'] = $label !== '' ? $label : $gameKey;
                }
                unset($r);
                $out['top_user_lotteries'] = $rows;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Top user-lottery query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $methodExpr . ' AS method_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $userExpr . ') AS users, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $gameExpr . ') AS lotteries, ' . $last7 . ' AS last_7d, ' . $last30 . ' AS last_30d, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $methodExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, latest_activity DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            $out['top_methods'] = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Top-method query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV166RenderUserActivityStats')) {
    function mylottoexpertV166RenderUserActivityStats($db, $limit = 15)
    {
        $stats = mylottoexpertV166BuildUserActivityStats($db, $limit);
        $totals = (array)($stats['totals'] ?? array());
        $topUsers = (array)($stats['top_users'] ?? array());
        $topLotteries = (array)($stats['top_lotteries'] ?? array());
        $topPairs = (array)($stats['top_user_lotteries'] ?? array());
        $topMethods = (array)($stats['top_methods'] ?? array());
        $warnings = (array)($stats['warnings'] ?? array());
        $formatUser = function($row) {
            $name = trim((string)($row['display_name'] ?? ''));
            if ($name === '') { $name = trim((string)($row['username'] ?? '')); }
            if ($name === '') { $name = 'User ' . (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0); }
            return $name . ' | ID ' . (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0);
        };
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section id="mle-v166-admin-user-activity-stats" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem; border:2px solid #1d4ed8;" aria-label="Admin User Activity Stats">
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin User Activity Stats</span>
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Most active users, most-used lotteries, and activity patterns</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
            <p class="mle-v123-section-note">Read-only activity dashboard. This panel only counts existing saved/run rows; it does not change predictions, learning, scoring, queues, or user data.</p>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Saved/run rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Active users</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['active_users'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Active lotteries</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['active_lotteries'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Last 24 hours</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['last_24h'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Last 7 days</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['last_7d'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Last 30 days</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['last_30d'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Scored rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['scored_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Admin research rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['admin_research_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($warnings)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:.75rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Activity warnings</span><p><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', array_slice($warnings, 0, 6)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <div class="mle-ci-layer-grid" style="margin-top:1rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-layer-card"><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head"><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Most active users</span><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Who is running/saving the most</span></div><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body"><div class="mle-v123-simple-list">
                <?php if (empty($topUsers)): ?><div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No user activity found</strong><span>No saved/run rows were available.</span></div><?php else: foreach ($topUsers as $row): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($formatUser($row), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Rows ' . (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Lotteries ' . (int)($row['lotteries'] ?? 0) . ' | 24h ' . (int)($row['last_24h'] ?? 0) . ' | 7d ' . (int)($row['last_7d'] ?? 0) . ' | 30d ' . (int)($row['last_30d'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored ' . (int)($row['scored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest ' . (string)($row['latest_activity'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div></div></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-layer-card"><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head"><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Most-run lotteries</span><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Which games users are using most</span></div><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body"><div class="mle-v123-simple-list">
                <?php if (empty($topLotteries)): ?><div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No lottery activity found</strong><span>No lottery grouping was returned.</span></div><?php else: foreach ($topLotteries as $row): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['label'] ?? $row['game_key'] ?? 'Unknown lottery'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Rows ' . (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Users ' . (int)($row['users'] ?? 0) . ' | 24h ' . (int)($row['last_24h'] ?? 0) . ' | 7d ' . (int)($row['last_7d'] ?? 0) . ' | 30d ' . (int)($row['last_30d'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored ' . (int)($row['scored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest ' . (string)($row['latest_activity'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div></div></div>
            </div>
            <details style="margin-top:1rem;">
              <summary><strong>More user activity detail</strong> - user/lottery combinations and method usage</summary>
              <div class="mle-ci-layer-grid" style="margin-top:1rem;">
                <div class="mle-ci-layer-card"><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head"><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Top user + lottery combinations</span><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Who is focused on which lottery</span></div><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body"><div class="mle-v123-simple-list">
                  <?php if (empty($topPairs)): ?><div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No user/lottery combinations found</strong><span>No grouped activity was returned.</span></div><?php else: foreach ($topPairs as $row): ?>
                    <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($formatUser($row), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['label'] ?? $row['game_key'] ?? 'Unknown lottery') . ' | Rows ' . (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | 7d ' . (int)($row['last_7d'] ?? 0) . ' | 30d ' . (int)($row['last_30d'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest ' . (string)($row['latest_activity'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
                  <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
                </div></div></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-layer-card"><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head"><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Most-used methods/sources</span><span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">How users are creating activity</span></div><div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body"><div class="mle-v123-simple-list">
                  <?php if (empty($topMethods)): ?><div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No method activity found</strong><span>No method grouping was returned.</span></div><?php else: foreach ($topMethods as $row): ?>
                    <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($row['method_key'] ?? 'unknown'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Rows ' . (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Users ' . (int)($row['users'] ?? 0) . ' | Lotteries ' . (int)($row['lotteries'] ?? 0) . ' | 7d ' . (int)($row['last_7d'] ?? 0) . ' | 30d ' . (int)($row['last_30d'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest ' . (string)($row['latest_activity'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
                  <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
                </div></div></div>
              </div>
            </details>
          </div>
        </section>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey')) {
    function mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $gameKey)
    {
        $gameKey = trim((string)$gameKey);
        $lotteryId = 0;
        $gameId = $gameKey;
        if (strpos($gameKey, 'lottery:') === 0) {
            $lotteryId = (int)substr($gameKey, 8);
            $gameId = '';
        }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
            try {
                $label = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId);
                if (trim((string)$label) !== '') { return (string)$label; }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        }
        return $gameKey !== '' ? $gameKey : 'Unknown lottery';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV167DecisionForLottery')) {
    function mylottoexpertV167DecisionForLottery(array $row)
    {
        $saved = (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0);
        $pending = (int)($row['pending_unscored'] ?? 0);
        $pastDue = (int)($row['past_due_unscored'] ?? 0);
        $waiting = (int)($row['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0);
        $scored = (int)($row['scored_rows'] ?? 0);
        $learned = (int)($row['learning_events'] ?? 0);
        $avg = (float)($row['avg_learning_score'] ?? 0.0);
        $best = (float)($row['best_learning_score'] ?? 0.0);
        $spread = $best - $avg;
        $next = trim((string)($row['next_check_at'] ?? ''));
        $latestLearning = trim((string)($row['latest_learning_at'] ?? ''));
        $latestSaved = trim((string)($row['latest_activity'] ?? ''));

        $decision = array(
            'status' => 'Building Evidence',
            'priority' => 'Medium priority',
            'next_action' => 'Continue Balanced Settings Sweep',
            'reason' => 'Evidence exists, but the lottery is not ready to narrow yet.',
            'range_label' => 'Balanced exploration range',
            'range_detail' => 'AI blend 15-85 | Temperature 0.65-1.35 | Gap scale 0.20-0.80 | Epochs 40-180',
            'css' => 'mle-v167-status-building'
        );

        if ($waiting >= 10 || $pending >= 25) {
            $decision['status'] = 'Hold - Waiting For Draw Results';
            $decision['priority'] = 'Hold';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Do not run more research yet';
            $decision['reason'] = 'There are already saved rows waiting for official draw results or scoring. Let the cron process them before spending more runner resources.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'Resources already allocated';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'Wait for official results and cron scoring. Next check: ' . ($next !== '' ? $next : 'not scheduled');
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-hold';
            return $decision;
        }

        if ($pastDue >= 10 && $waiting >= 5) {
            $decision['status'] = 'Repair Needed';
            $decision['priority'] = 'Repair needed';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Check official draw importer or scoring evidence';
            $decision['reason'] = 'Past-due rows are waiting for official results. This is an operations issue before it is a research issue.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'No new sweep recommended';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'Fix result availability first, then let the cron score the backlog.';
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-repair';
            return $decision;
        }

        if ($saved > 0 && $scored < 20 && $learned < 20) {
            $decision['status'] = 'Needs Broad Exploration';
            $decision['priority'] = 'High priority';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Run Balanced Settings Sweep';
            $decision['reason'] = 'The lottery has activity but not enough scored learning evidence after the Hive start date.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'Balanced exploration range';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'AI blend 15-85 | Temperature 0.65-1.35 | Gap scale 0.20-0.80 | Epochs 40-180';
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-broad';
            return $decision;
        }

        if ($scored >= 30 && $learned >= 30 && $spread >= 75.0) {
            $decision['status'] = 'Candidate Range Forming';
            $decision['priority'] = 'High priority';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Run Tight Best-Candidate Sweep';
            $decision['reason'] = 'Scored evidence exists and the best result is separating from the average. Narrow the range and verify the candidate.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'Tight best-candidate range';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'AI blend 35-65 | Temperature 0.85-1.15 | Gap scale 0.35-0.65 | Diversity 0.00-0.05';
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-tight';
            return $decision;
        }

        if ($scored >= 100 && $learned >= 100 && $latestLearning !== '') {
            $decision['status'] = 'Stable - Monitor';
            $decision['priority'] = 'Low priority';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Monitor only';
            $decision['reason'] = 'This lottery has substantial scored learning evidence. Avoid spending research resources unless performance changes.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'Monitor current best settings';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'Use normal user runs and cron scoring. Run more research only after a material performance shift.';
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-stable';
            return $decision;
        }

        if ($saved <= 0 && $latestSaved === '') {
            $decision['status'] = 'No Recent Evidence';
            $decision['priority'] = 'Low priority';
            $decision['next_action'] = 'Do not allocate resources yet';
            $decision['reason'] = 'No saved activity was found for this lottery in the current audit window.';
            $decision['range_label'] = 'No active range';
            $decision['range_detail'] = 'Wait for user activity or deliberately select this lottery if it is strategically important.';
            $decision['css'] = 'mle-v167-status-stable';
            return $decision;
        }

        return $decision;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV167BuildResourceAllocation')) {
    function mylottoexpertV167BuildResourceAllocation($db, $limit = 40)
    {
        $limit = max(10, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $out = array(
            'totals' => array('lotteries'=>0,'high'=>0,'medium'=>0,'low'=>0,'hold'=>0,'repair'=>0,'tight'=>0,'balanced'=>0,'waiting'=>0,'scored'=>0,'learning_events'=>0),
            'items' => array(),
            'warnings' => array()
        );

        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') || !mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers table not found.';
            return $out;
        }
        $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
        if (empty($cols)) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Could not read user_saved_numbers columns.';
            return $out;
        }

        $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 's', $cols);
        $activityExpr = function_exists('mylottoexpertV166ActivityDateExpr') ? mylottoexpertV166ActivityDateExpr($db, 's', $cols) : $db->quote('');
        $hasActivity = ($activityExpr !== $db->quote(''));
        $latestActivity = $hasActivity ? 'MAX(' . $activityExpr . ')' : $db->quote('');
        $scoredExpr = function_exists('mylottoexpertV166ScoredExpr') ? mylottoexpertV166ScoredExpr($db, 's', $cols) : '0=1';
        $userExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'user_id') ? 'COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ',0)' : '0';

        $targetParts = array();
        foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date') as $c) {
            if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $targetParts[] = 'NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        }
        $targetExpr = !empty($targetParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $targetParts) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')' : $db->quote('');
        $hasTargetExpr = '(' . $targetExpr . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND ' . $targetExpr . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND ' . $targetExpr . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
        $pastDueExpr = '(' . $hasTargetExpr . ' AND DATE(' . $targetExpr . ') < CURDATE())';
        $currentOrFutureTargetExpr = '(' . $hasTargetExpr . ' AND DATE(' . $targetExpr . ') >= CURDATE())';
        $pendingExpr = '(' . $currentOrFutureTargetExpr . ' AND NOT (' . $scoredExpr . '))';

        $waitingExpr = '0';
        if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_wait_reason')) {
            $waitingExpr = 'CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_wait_reason') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('official_draw_not_loaded') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END';
        }
        $lastCheckExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_last_checked_at') ? 'MAX(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_last_checked_at') . ')' : $db->quote('');
        $nextCheckExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_next_check_at') ? 'MIN(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_next_check_at') . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . '))' : $db->quote('');
        $attemptExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_attempt_count') ? 'SUM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_attempt_count') . ',0))' : '0';
        $avgScoreExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'learning_score') ? 'AVG(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('learning_score') . ',0) ELSE NULL END)' : '0';
        $bestScoreExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'learning_score') ? 'MAX(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('learning_score') . ',0) ELSE 0 END)' : '0';
        $latestTargetExpr = $targetExpr !== $db->quote('') ? 'MAX(' . $targetExpr . ')' : $db->quote('');

        $map = array();
        try {
            $sql = 'SELECT ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $userExpr . ') AS users, '
                . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_rows, '
                . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pendingExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_unscored, '
                . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pastDueExpr . ' AND NOT (' . $scoredExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS past_due_unscored, '
                . 'SUM(' . $waitingExpr . ') AS waiting_official_draw, '
                . $avgScoreExpr . ' AS avg_learning_score, ' . $bestScoreExpr . ' AS best_learning_score, '
                . $latestTargetExpr . ' AS latest_target_draw_date, ' . $latestActivity . ' AS latest_activity, '
                . $lastCheckExpr . ' AS last_checked_at, ' . $nextCheckExpr . ' AS next_check_at, ' . $attemptExpr . ' AS cron_attempts '
                . 'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY waiting_official_draw DESC, pending_unscored DESC, scored_rows ASC, saved_rows DESC LIMIT ' . (int)max(100, $limit * 3);
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {
                $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                $r['learning_events'] = 0;
                $r['learned_events'] = 0;
                $r['latest_learning_at'] = '';
                $r['queue_rows'] = 0;
                $r['assignments'] = 0;
                $r['saved_assignments'] = 0;
                $r['label'] = mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $k);
                $map[$k] = $r;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Allocation saved-row query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'skai_learning_events')) {
                $lcols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'skai_learning_events');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'l', $lcols);
                $learnedExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lcols, 'is_learned') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(l.' . $db->quoteName('is_learned') . ',0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)' : 'COUNT(*)';
                $latestParts = array();
                foreach (array('learned_at','created_at','target_draw_date','draw_date') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lcols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c); } }
                $latestLearningExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS learning_events, ' . $learnedExpr . ' AS learned_events, ' . $latestLearningExpr . ' AS latest_learning_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events', 'l') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5));
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    if (!isset($map[$k])) { $map[$k] = array('game_key'=>$k,'label'=>mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $k),'saved_rows'=>0,'users'=>0,'scored_rows'=>0,'pending_unscored'=>0,'past_due_unscored'=>0,'waiting_official_draw'=>0,'avg_learning_score'=>0,'best_learning_score'=>0,'latest_target_draw_date'=>'','latest_activity'=>'','last_checked_at'=>'','next_check_at'=>'','cron_attempts'=>0,'queue_rows'=>0,'assignments'=>0,'saved_assignments'=>0); }
                    $map[$k]['learning_events'] = (int)($r['learning_events'] ?? 0);
                    $map[$k]['learned_events'] = (int)($r['learned_events'] ?? 0);
                    $map[$k]['latest_learning_at'] = (string)($r['latest_learning_at'] ?? '');
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Allocation learning-event query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_lottery_research_queue')) {
                $qcols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_lottery_research_queue');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'q', $qcols);
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS queue_rows FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5));
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    if (!isset($map[$k])) { $map[$k] = array('game_key'=>$k,'label'=>mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $k),'saved_rows'=>0,'users'=>0,'scored_rows'=>0,'pending_unscored'=>0,'past_due_unscored'=>0,'waiting_official_draw'=>0,'avg_learning_score'=>0,'best_learning_score'=>0,'latest_target_draw_date'=>'','latest_activity'=>'','last_checked_at'=>'','next_check_at'=>'','cron_attempts'=>0,'learning_events'=>0,'learned_events'=>0,'latest_learning_at'=>'','assignments'=>0,'saved_assignments'=>0); }
                    $map[$k]['queue_rows'] = (int)($r['queue_rows'] ?? 0);
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Allocation queue query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments')) {
                $acols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'a', $acols);
                $savedConds = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($acols, 'runner_status')) { $savedConds[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) = ' . $db->quote('saved'); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($acols, 'saved_count')) { $savedConds[] = 'COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ',0) > 0'; }
                $savedAssignExpr = !empty($savedConds) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $savedConds) . ')' : '0=1';
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS assignments, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $savedAssignExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved_assignments FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5));
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    if (!isset($map[$k])) { $map[$k] = array('game_key'=>$k,'label'=>mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $k),'saved_rows'=>0,'users'=>0,'scored_rows'=>0,'pending_unscored'=>0,'past_due_unscored'=>0,'waiting_official_draw'=>0,'avg_learning_score'=>0,'best_learning_score'=>0,'latest_target_draw_date'=>'','latest_activity'=>'','last_checked_at'=>'','next_check_at'=>'','cron_attempts'=>0,'learning_events'=>0,'learned_events'=>0,'latest_learning_at'=>'','queue_rows'=>0); }
                    $map[$k]['assignments'] = (int)($r['assignments'] ?? 0);
                    $map[$k]['saved_assignments'] = (int)($r['saved_assignments'] ?? 0);
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Allocation assignment query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        $items = array();
        foreach ($map as $k => $row) {
            $row['game_key'] = $k;
            $row['decision'] = mylottoexpertV167DecisionForLottery($row);
            $items[] = $row;
        }
        usort($items, function($a, $b) {
            $priorityScore = function($r) {
                $d = (array)($r['decision'] ?? array());
                $p = (string)($d['priority'] ?? '');
                if ($p === 'Repair needed') { return 100000; }
                if ($p === 'High priority') { return 80000; }
                if ($p === 'Hold') { return 60000; }
                if ($p === 'Medium priority') { return 40000; }
                return 10000;
            };
            $as = $priorityScore($a) + ((int)($a['pending_unscored'] ?? 0) * 50) + ((int)($a['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0) * 25) + ((int)($a['saved_rows'] ?? 0));
            $bs = $priorityScore($b) + ((int)($b['pending_unscored'] ?? 0) * 50) + ((int)($b['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0) * 25) + ((int)($b['saved_rows'] ?? 0));
            if ($as === $bs) { return strcmp((string)($b['latest_activity'] ?? ''), (string)($a['latest_activity'] ?? '')); }
            return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1;
        });

        $items = array_slice($items, 0, $limit);
        foreach ($items as $row) {
            $d = (array)($row['decision'] ?? array());
            $out['totals']['lotteries']++;
            $out['totals']['waiting'] += (int)($row['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['scored'] += (int)($row['scored_rows'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['learning_events'] += (int)($row['learning_events'] ?? 0);
            $priority = (string)($d['priority'] ?? '');
            $action = (string)($d['next_action'] ?? '');
            if ($priority === 'High priority') { $out['totals']['high']++; }
            elseif ($priority === 'Medium priority') { $out['totals']['medium']++; }
            elseif ($priority === 'Hold') { $out['totals']['hold']++; }
            elseif ($priority === 'Repair needed') { $out['totals']['repair']++; }
            else { $out['totals']['low']++; }
            if (strpos($action, 'Tight') !== false) { $out['totals']['tight']++; }
            if (strpos($action, 'Balanced') !== false) { $out['totals']['balanced']++; }
        }
        $out['items'] = $items;
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV167RenderResourceAllocationCenter')) {
    function mylottoexpertV167RenderResourceAllocationCenter($db, $limit = 40)
    {
        $alloc = mylottoexpertV167BuildResourceAllocation($db, $limit);
        $totals = (array)($alloc['totals'] ?? array());
        $items = (array)($alloc['items'] ?? array());
        $warnings = (array)($alloc['warnings'] ?? array());
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section id="mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem;border:2px solid #7c3aed;" aria-label="Hive Research Allocation Center">
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin Only</span>
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Hive Research Allocation Center</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
            <p class="mle-v123-section-note">Read-only resource guidance. This panel tells the admin where to run Balanced sweeps, where to run Tight best-candidate sweeps, where to hold because cron is waiting for official draws, and where repair may be needed. It does not create queues, run SKAI, score rows, or change saved history.</p>
            <style>
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;padding:.24rem .6rem;font-weight:800;font-size:.72rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;background:#f8fafc;color:#334155;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-broad{background:#eff6ff;color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#bfdbfe;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-building{background:#f8fafc;color:#334155;border-color:#cbd5e1;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-tight{background:#f5f3ff;color:#6d28d9;border-color:#ddd6fe;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-hold{background:#fffbeb;color:#92400e;border-color:#fde68a;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-repair{background:#fef2f2;color:#991b1b;border-color:#fecaca;}
              #mle-v167-hive-resource-allocation-center .mle-v167-status-stable{background:#ecfdf5;color:#047857;border-color:#a7f3d0;}
            </style>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Lotteries reviewed</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['lotteries'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">High priority</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['high'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Hold / waiting</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['hold'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Repair needed</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['repair'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-bottom:.9rem;">
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Balanced recommended</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['balanced'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Tight recommended</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['tight'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Waiting rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['waiting'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Learning events</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($totals['learning_events'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($warnings)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:.75rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Allocation warnings</span><p><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', array_slice($warnings, 0, 6)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
              <summary><strong>Lottery resource recommendations</strong> - sweep mode, hold status, and exploration range</summary>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
                <?php if (empty($items)): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No allocation rows found</strong><span>No saved or learning evidence was available for allocation review.</span></div>
                <?php else: foreach ($items as $item): ?>
                  <?php $d = (array)($item['decision'] ?? array()); $css = (string)($d['css'] ?? 'mle-v167-status-building'); ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row">
                    <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($item['label'] ?? $item['game_key'] ?? 'Unknown lottery'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> <span class="mle-v167-pill <?php echo htmlspecialchars($css, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($d['status'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></strong>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Priority: ' . (string)($d['priority'] ?? '') . ' | Next action: ' . (string)($d['next_action'] ?? '') . ' | Game key: ' . (string)($item['game_key'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved ' . (int)($item['saved_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Users ' . (int)($item['users'] ?? 0) . ' | Pending ' . (int)($item['pending_unscored'] ?? 0) . ' | Waiting draw ' . (int)($item['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored ' . (int)($item['scored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Learning events ' . (int)($item['learning_events'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Score avg ' . number_format((float)($item['avg_learning_score'] ?? 0), 1, '.', '') . ' | Score best ' . number_format((float)($item['best_learning_score'] ?? 0), 1, '.', '') . ' | Queue rows ' . (int)($item['queue_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Assignments ' . (int)($item['assignments'] ?? 0) . ' | Saved assignments ' . (int)($item['saved_assignments'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($d['range_label'] ?? '') . ': ' . (string)($d['range_detail'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
