                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Reason: ' . (string)($d['reason'] ?? '') . ' | Last check ' . (string)($item['last_checked_at'] ?? '') . ' | Next check ' . (string)($item['next_check_at'] ?? '') . ' | Latest target draw ' . (string)($item['latest_target_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                  </div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div>
            </details>
            <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
              <summary><strong>Decision rules used</strong></summary>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Hold</strong><span>If pending unscored rows are 25 or more, or waiting-official-draw rows are 10 or more, do not create more research until cron scores the backlog.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Balanced settings sweep</strong><span>Use when scored learning evidence is still below the broad-evidence threshold. This explores AI blend, temperature, gap scale, diversity, and epochs widely.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Tight best-candidate sweep</strong><span>Use when at least 30 scored rows and 30 learning events exist and the best score is separating from the average by 75 or more points.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Monitor only</strong><span>Use when substantial scored learning evidence exists. Avoid spending research resources unless results begin drifting.</span></div>
              </div>
            </details>
          </div>
        </section>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow')) {
    function mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow(array &$map, $db, $gameKey)
    {
        $gameKey = trim((string)$gameKey);
        if ($gameKey === '') { $gameKey = 'unknown'; }
        if (!isset($map[$gameKey])) {
            $map[$gameKey] = array(
                'game_key' => $gameKey,
                'label' => function_exists('mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey') ? mylottoexpertV167LotteryLabelFromGameKey($db, $gameKey) : $gameKey,
                'lottery_id' => 0,
                'following_users' => 0,
                'total_saved_runs' => 0,
                'saved_batch_runs' => 0,
                'saved_batch_sets' => 0,
                'pending_unscored_batch_runs' => 0,
                'waiting_official_draw' => 0,
                'scored_batch_runs' => 0,
                'latest_target_draw_date' => '',
                'last_checked_at' => '',
                'next_check_at' => '',
                'cron_attempts' => 0,
                'queue_rows' => 0,
                'queue_pending' => 0,
                'queue_running' => 0,
                'queue_complete' => 0,
                'queue_failed' => 0,
                'assignments' => 0,
                'assignments_pending' => 0,
                'assignments_running' => 0,
                'assignments_saved' => 0,
                'assignments_failed' => 0,
                'planned_headers' => 0,
                'planned_runs' => 0,
                'learning_events' => 0,
                'latest_learning_at' => ''
            );
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV168BatchCoverageDecision')) {
    function mylottoexpertV168BatchCoverageDecision(array $row)
    {
        $queuePending = (int)($row['queue_pending'] ?? 0);
        $assignPending = (int)($row['assignments_pending'] ?? 0);
        $running = (int)($row['queue_running'] ?? 0) + (int)($row['assignments_running'] ?? 0);
        $waiting = (int)($row['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0);
        $pendingSaved = (int)($row['pending_unscored_batch_runs'] ?? 0);
        $scored = (int)($row['scored_batch_runs'] ?? 0);
        $learning = (int)($row['learning_events'] ?? 0);
        $planned = (int)($row['planned_runs'] ?? 0) + (int)($row['queue_rows'] ?? 0) + (int)($row['assignments'] ?? 0);

        if ($running > 0) {
            return array('status'=>'Running now','priority'=>'Active','next_action'=>'Let current SKAI queue runner finish','css'=>'mle-v168-status-running','reason'=>'This lottery has queue or assignment work currently marked running.');
        }
        if ($waiting >= 10 || $pendingSaved >= 25) {
            return array('status'=>'Hold','priority'=>'Hold','next_action'=>'Do not add more batch runs yet','css'=>'mle-v168-status-hold','reason'=>'Enough saved work is already waiting for official draw results or cron scoring.');
        }
        if (($queuePending + $assignPending) > 0) {
            return array('status'=>'Queued','priority'=>'High priority','next_action'=>'Run SKAI queue runner before creating more queues','css'=>'mle-v168-status-queued','reason'=>'There is already planned queue work waiting to be executed.');
        }
        if ($planned <= 0 && $scored <= 0) {
            return array('status'=>'No batch coverage','priority'=>'High priority','next_action'=>'Create and run Balanced Settings Sweep','css'=>'mle-v168-status-empty','reason'=>'No visible batch coverage exists for this lottery.');
        }
        if ($scored < 20) {
            return array('status'=>'Needs more batch evidence','priority'=>'Medium priority','next_action'=>'Create Balanced Settings Sweep','css'=>'mle-v168-status-broad','reason'=>'There is not enough scored batch evidence yet.');
        }
        if ($scored >= 30 && $learning >= 30) {
            return array('status'=>'Candidate coverage ready','priority'=>'Medium priority','next_action'=>'Create Tight Best-Candidate Sweep','css'=>'mle-v168-status-tight','reason'=>'Enough scored learning exists to justify tighter confirmation work.');
        }
        if ($scored >= 100 && $learning >= 100) {
            return array('status'=>'Covered','priority'=>'Low priority','next_action'=>'Monitor only','css'=>'mle-v168-status-covered','reason'=>'This lottery already has substantial scored batch coverage.');
        }
        return array('status'=>'Building coverage','priority'=>'Medium priority','next_action'=>'Continue Balanced Settings Sweep','css'=>'mle-v168-status-building','reason'=>'Batch evidence exists, but more scored outcomes are needed before tightening.');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV168LoadBatchCoverage')) {
    function mylottoexpertV168LoadBatchCoverage($db, $limit = 80)
    {
        $limit = max(20, min(200, (int)$limit));
        $out = array('available'=>true,'warnings'=>array(),'totals'=>array('lotteries'=>0,'active'=>0,'queued'=>0,'hold'=>0,'empty'=>0,'broad'=>0,'tight'=>0,'covered'=>0,'pending_saved'=>0,'waiting'=>0,'queued_assignments'=>0,'following_users'=>0),'items'=>array());
        $map = array();

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'lotteries')) {
                $lotCols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'lotteries');
                $idCol = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'lottery_id') ? 'lottery_id' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'id') ? 'id' : '');
                $gameCol = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'game_id') ? 'game_id' : '';
                $nameCol = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'name') ? 'name' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'lottery_name') ? 'lottery_name' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols, 'title') ? 'title' : ''));
                if ($idCol !== '' || $gameCol !== '') {
                    $select = array();
                    if ($idCol !== '') { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol, 'lottery_id'); }
                    else { $select[] = '0 AS lottery_id'; }
                    if ($gameCol !== '') { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($gameCol, 'game_id'); }
                    else { $select[] = $db->quote('', 'game_id'); }
                    if ($nameCol !== '') { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($nameCol, 'lottery_name'); }
                    else { $select[] = $db->quote('', 'lottery_name'); }
                    $orderCol = $nameCol !== '' ? $nameCol : ($idCol !== '' ? $idCol : $gameCol);
                    $sql = 'SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l') . ' ORDER BY l.' . $db->quoteName($orderCol) . ' ASC LIMIT 1000';
                    $db->setQuery($sql);
                    foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $lotRow) {
                        $gid = trim((string)($lotRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
                        $lid = (int)($lotRow['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                        $k = $gid !== '' ? $gid : ($lid > 0 ? ('lottery:' . $lid) : 'unknown');
                        mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                        $lotLabel = trim((string)($lotRow['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
                        if ($lotLabel !== '') { $map[$k]['label'] = $lotLabel; }
                        if ($lid > 0) { $map[$k]['lottery_id'] = $lid; }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage lottery seed query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_lottery_preferences')) {
                $prefCols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_lottery_preferences');
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($prefCols, 'lottery_id') && mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($prefCols, 'user_id')) {
                    $prefLotteryExpr = 'p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id');
                    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'lotteries')) {
                        $lotCols2 = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'lotteries');
                        $lotIdCol2 = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'lottery_id') ? 'lottery_id' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'id') ? 'id' : '');
                        $lotGameCol2 = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'game_id') ? 'game_id' : '';
                        $lotNameCol2 = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'name') ? 'name' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'lottery_name') ? 'lottery_name' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($lotCols2, 'title') ? 'title' : ''));
                        if ($lotIdCol2 !== '') {
                            $gameExpr2 = $lotGameCol2 !== '' ? 'COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(l.' . $db->quoteName($lotGameCol2) . '), ' . $db->quote('') . '), CONCAT(' . $db->quote('lottery:') . ', p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . '))' : 'CONCAT(' . $db->quote('lottery:') . ', p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ')';
                            $nameExpr2 = $lotNameCol2 !== '' ? 'MAX(l.' . $db->quoteName($lotNameCol2) . ')' : $db->quote('');
                            $sql = 'SELECT ' . $gameExpr2 . ' AS game_key, p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' AS lottery_id, COUNT(DISTINCT p.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS following_users, ' . $nameExpr2 . ' AS lottery_name FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_lottery_preferences', 'p') . ' LEFT JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l') . ' ON p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = l.' . $db->quoteName($lotIdCol2) . ' GROUP BY p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', ' . $gameExpr2 . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                        } else {
                            $sql = 'SELECT CONCAT(' . $db->quote('lottery:') . ', p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ') AS game_key, p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' AS lottery_id, COUNT(DISTINCT p.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS following_users, ' . $db->quote('') . ' AS lottery_name FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_lottery_preferences', 'p') . ' GROUP BY p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                        }
                    } else {
                        $sql = 'SELECT CONCAT(' . $db->quote('lottery:') . ', p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ') AS game_key, p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' AS lottery_id, COUNT(DISTINCT p.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS following_users, ' . $db->quote('') . ' AS lottery_name FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_lottery_preferences', 'p') . ' GROUP BY p.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                    }
                    $db->setQuery($sql);
                    foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                        $k = trim((string)($r['game_key'] ?? ''));
                        if ($k === '') { $k = 'lottery:' . (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0); }
                        mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                        $map[$k]['following_users'] = max((int)($map[$k]['following_users'] ?? 0), (int)($r['following_users'] ?? 0));
                        if ((int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $map[$k]['lottery_id'] = (int)$r['lottery_id']; }
                        $lotLabel2 = trim((string)($r['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
                        if ($lotLabel2 !== '') { $map[$k]['label'] = $lotLabel2; }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage follower query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 's', $cols);
                $batchSignals = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'batch_uuid')) { $batchSignals[] = "TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) <> " . $db->quote(''); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'batch_total')) { $batchSignals[] = "COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('batch_total') . ",0) >= 2"; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'source_batch_id')) { $batchSignals[] = "COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ",0) > 0"; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'source_batch_run_id')) { $batchSignals[] = "COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ",0) > 0"; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'source_batch_type')) { $batchSignals[] = "TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('source_batch_type') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) <> " . $db->quote(''); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'origin_source')) { $batchSignals[] = "LOWER(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('origin_source') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) LIKE " . $db->quote('%batch%'); }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'source')) { $batchSignals[] = "LOWER(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('source') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) LIKE " . $db->quote('%batch%'); }
                $batchExpr = !empty($batchSignals) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $batchSignals) . ')' : '0=1';

                $evalParts = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'evaluation_status')) { $evalParts[] = "LOWER(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) IN (" . $db->quote('scored') . "," . $db->quote('evaluated') . "," . $db->quote('learned') . ")"; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'main_hits_count')) { $evalParts[] = "s." . $db->quoteName('main_hits_count') . " IS NOT NULL"; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'actual_draw_date')) { $evalParts[] = "s." . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . " IS NOT NULL AND s." . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . " <> " . $db->quote('') . " AND s." . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . " <> " . $db->quote('0000-00-00'); }
                $scoredExpr = !empty($evalParts) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $evalParts) . ')' : '0=1';

                $waitExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_wait_reason') ? "CASE WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_wait_reason') . ", " . $db->quote('') . ")) = " . $db->quote('official_draw_not_loaded') . " THEN 1 ELSE 0 END" : '0';
                $targetExpr = $db->quote('');
                foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','draw_date') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $targetExpr = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c); break; } }
                $lastCheckExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_last_checked_at') ? 'MAX(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_last_checked_at') . ')' : $db->quote('');
                $nextCheckExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_next_check_at') ? 'MAX(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_next_check_at') . ')' : $db->quote('');
                $attemptExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'hive_cron_attempt_count') ? 'MAX(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_cron_attempt_count') . ',0))' : '0';
                $setExpr = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'batch_uuid') ? 'COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ' . $batchExpr . ' THEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')), ' . $db->quote('') . ') ELSE NULL END)' : '0';

                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, '
                    . 'COUNT(*) AS total_saved_runs, '
                    . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $batchExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved_batch_runs, '
                    . $setExpr . ' AS saved_batch_sets, '
                    . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $batchExpr . ' AND NOT (' . $scoredExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_unscored_batch_runs, '
                    . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $batchExpr . ' AND (' . $scoredExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scored_batch_runs, '
                    . 'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $batchExpr . ' THEN ' . $waitExpr . ' ELSE 0 END) AS waiting_official_draw, '
                    . 'MAX(' . $targetExpr . ') AS latest_target_draw_date, ' . $lastCheckExpr . ' AS last_checked_at, ' . $nextCheckExpr . ' AS next_check_at, ' . $attemptExpr . ' AS cron_attempts '
                    . 'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    foreach (array('total_saved_runs','saved_batch_runs','saved_batch_sets','pending_unscored_batch_runs','waiting_official_draw','scored_batch_runs','cron_attempts') as $n) { $map[$k][$n] = (int)($r[$n] ?? 0); }
                    foreach (array('latest_target_draw_date','last_checked_at','next_check_at') as $n) { $map[$k][$n] = (string)($r[$n] ?? ''); }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage saved-row query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_lottery_research_queue')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_lottery_research_queue');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'q', $cols);
                $statusCol = mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'research_status') ? 'research_status' : (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'status') ? 'status' : '');
                $statusExpr = $statusCol !== '' ? 'LOWER(COALESCE(q.' . $db->quoteName($statusCol) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))' : $db->quote('');
                $pendingExpr = $statusCol !== '' ? $statusExpr . ' IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')' : '1=1';
                $runningExpr = $statusCol !== '' ? $statusExpr . ' IN (' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('in_progress') . ')' : '0=1';
                $completeExpr = $statusCol !== '' ? $statusExpr . ' IN (' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('complete') . ',' . $db->quote('saved') . ')' : '0=1';
                $failedExpr = $statusCol !== '' ? $statusExpr . ' IN (' . $db->quote('failed') . ',' . $db->quote('error') . ')' : '0=1';
                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS queue_rows, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $pendingExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_pending, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $runningExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_running, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $completeExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_complete, SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $failedExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queue_failed FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    foreach (array('queue_rows','queue_pending','queue_running','queue_complete','queue_failed') as $n) { $map[$k][$n] = (int)($r[$n] ?? 0); }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage queue query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'a', $cols);
                $statusParts = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'runner_status')) { $statusParts[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))'; }
                if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'assigned_status')) { $statusParts[] = 'LOWER(COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))'; }
                $statusExpr = !empty($statusParts) ? 'CONCAT_WS(' . $db->quote('|') . ',' . implode(',', $statusParts) . ')' : $db->quote('');
                $pendingExpr = $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%queued%') . ' OR ' . $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%assigned%') . ' OR ' . $statusExpr . ' = ' . $db->quote('|');
                $runningExpr = $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%running%') . ' OR ' . $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%progress%');
                $savedExpr = $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%saved%') . ' OR ' . (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, 'saved_count') ? 'COALESCE(a.' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ',0) > 0' : '0=1');
                $failedExpr = $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%failed%') . ' OR ' . $statusExpr . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%error%');
                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS assignments, SUM(CASE WHEN (' . $pendingExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assignments_pending, SUM(CASE WHEN (' . $runningExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assignments_running, SUM(CASE WHEN (' . $savedExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assignments_saved, SUM(CASE WHEN (' . $failedExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assignments_failed FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    foreach (array('assignments','assignments_pending','assignments_running','assignments_saved','assignments_failed') as $n) { $map[$k][$n] = (int)($r[$n] ?? 0); }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage assignment query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'h', $cols);
                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS planned_headers FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header', 'h') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    $map[$k]['planned_headers'] = (int)($r['planned_headers'] ?? 0);
                }
            }
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'mle_skai_batch_run')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_run');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'r', $cols);
                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS planned_runs FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run', 'r') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    $map[$k]['planned_runs'] = (int)($r['planned_runs'] ?? 0);
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage planned batch query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV165TableExists') && mylottoexpertV165TableExists($db, 'skai_learning_events')) {
                $cols = mylottoexpertV165Columns($db, 'skai_learning_events');
                $g = mylottoexpertV165GameExpr($db, 'l', $cols);
                $latestParts = array();
                foreach (array('learned_at','created_at','target_draw_date') as $c) { if (mylottoexpertV165HasColumn($cols, $c)) { $latestParts[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c); } }
                $latestExpr = !empty($latestParts) ? 'MAX(COALESCE(' . implode(',', $latestParts) . '))' : $db->quote('');
                $sql = 'SELECT ' . $g . ' AS game_key, COUNT(*) AS learning_events, ' . $latestExpr . ' AS latest_learning_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events', 'l') . ' GROUP BY ' . $g . ' LIMIT ' . (int)max(200, $limit * 5);
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $r) {
                    $k = (string)($r['game_key'] ?? 'unknown');
                    mylottoexpertV168EnsureCoverageRow($map, $db, $k);
                    $map[$k]['learning_events'] = (int)($r['learning_events'] ?? 0);
                    $map[$k]['latest_learning_at'] = (string)($r['latest_learning_at'] ?? '');
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Batch coverage learning query failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        $items = array();
        foreach ($map as $k => $row) {
            $row['decision'] = mylottoexpertV168BatchCoverageDecision($row);
            $items[] = $row;
        }
        usort($items, function($a, $b) {
            $priorityScore = function($r) {
                $d = (array)($r['decision'] ?? array());
                $status = (string)($d['status'] ?? '');
                if ($status === 'No batch coverage') { $base = 100000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Needs more batch evidence') { $base = 94000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Building coverage') { $base = 90000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Candidate coverage ready') { $base = 87000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Queued') { $base = 82000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Running now') { $base = 76000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Hold') { $base = 52000; }
                elseif ($status === 'Covered') { $base = 10000; }
                else { $base = 40000; }
                $queueToRun = (int)($r['queue_pending'] ?? 0) + (int)($r['assignments_pending'] ?? 0) + (int)($r['planned_runs'] ?? 0);
                $coverageGap = max(0, 20 - (int)($r['scored_batch_runs'] ?? 0));
                return $base + ($coverageGap * 100) + ($queueToRun * 50) + ((int)($r['pending_unscored_batch_runs'] ?? 0) * 20) - ((int)($r['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0) * 5);
            };
            $af = (int)($a['following_users'] ?? 0); $bf = (int)($b['following_users'] ?? 0);
            if ($af !== $bf) { return ($bf > $af) ? 1 : -1; }
            $ar = (int)($a['total_saved_runs'] ?? 0); $br = (int)($b['total_saved_runs'] ?? 0);
            if ($ar !== $br) { return ($br > $ar) ? 1 : -1; }
            $ab = (int)($a['saved_batch_runs'] ?? 0); $bb = (int)($b['saved_batch_runs'] ?? 0);
            if ($ab !== $bb) { return ($bb > $ab) ? 1 : -1; }
            $as = $priorityScore($a); $bs = $priorityScore($b);
            if ($as !== $bs) { return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1; }
            return strcmp((string)($a['label'] ?? ''), (string)($b['label'] ?? ''));
        });
        $items = array_slice($items, 0, $limit);
        foreach ($items as $row) {
            $d = (array)($row['decision'] ?? array());
            $out['totals']['lotteries']++;
            $out['totals']['pending_saved'] += (int)($row['pending_unscored_batch_runs'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['waiting'] += (int)($row['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['queued_assignments'] += (int)($row['assignments_pending'] ?? 0);
            $out['totals']['following_users'] += (int)($row['following_users'] ?? 0);
            $status = (string)($d['status'] ?? '');
            if ($status === 'Running now') { $out['totals']['active']++; }
            elseif ($status === 'Queued') { $out['totals']['queued']++; }
            elseif ($status === 'Hold') { $out['totals']['hold']++; }
            elseif ($status === 'No batch coverage') { $out['totals']['empty']++; }
            elseif (strpos($status, 'Candidate') !== false) { $out['totals']['tight']++; }
            elseif ($status === 'Covered') { $out['totals']['covered']++; }
            else { $out['totals']['broad']++; }
        }
        $out['items'] = $items;
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV168RenderBatchCoverageCenter')) {
    function mylottoexpertV168RenderBatchCoverageCenter($db, $limit = 80)
    {
        $data = mylottoexpertV168LoadBatchCoverage($db, $limit);
        $totals = (array)($data['totals'] ?? array());
        $items = (array)($data['items'] ?? array());
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section id="mle-v168-batch-coverage-center" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem;border:2px solid #0f766e;" aria-label="Batch Run Coverage Center">
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin Only</span>

              #mle-v168-batch-coverage-center .mle-v168-status-queued{background:#eff6ff;color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#bfdbfe;}

              #mle-v168-batch-coverage-center .mle-v168-status-building{background:#f8fafc;color:#334155;border-color:#cbd5e1;}
            </style>
            <p class="mle-v123-section-note">This read-only admin panel is sorted by user popularity first, then by total saved run activity. Operational status remains visible so equal-popularity lotteries can still be triaged correctly.</p>
            <div class="mle-v123-kpi-grid" style="margin-top:1rem;">
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Lotteries tracked</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['lotteries'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Users following</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['following_users'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Queued assignment work</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['queued_assignments'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Pending saved batch runs</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['pending_saved'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Waiting official draw</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['waiting'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-v123-kpi-grid" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Need batch coverage</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['empty'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Run queue first</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['queued'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Hold</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['hold'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
              <div class="mle-v123-kpi"><span>Tight candidates</span><strong><?php echo (int)($totals['tight'] ?? 0); ?></strong></div>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($data['warnings'])): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:.85rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Coverage warnings</span><p><?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(' | ', (array)$data['warnings']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></p></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
              <summary><strong>Lottery batch coverage by user popularity</strong> - most-followed lotteries first</summary>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
                <?php if (empty($items)): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No batch coverage rows found</strong><span>No queued, assigned, saved batch, or learned batch evidence was found by this panel.</span></div>
                <?php else: foreach ($items as $item): ?>
                  <?php $d = (array)($item['decision'] ?? array()); $css = (string)($d['css'] ?? 'mle-v168-status-building'); ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row">
                    <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($item['label'] ?? $item['game_key'] ?? 'Unknown lottery'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> <span class="mle-v168-pill <?php echo htmlspecialchars($css, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($d['status'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></strong>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Users following ' . (int)($item['following_users'] ?? 0) . ' | Priority: ' . (string)($d['priority'] ?? '') . ' | Next action: ' . (string)($d['next_action'] ?? '') . ' | Game key: ' . (string)($item['game_key'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Total saved runs ' . (int)($item['total_saved_runs'] ?? 0) . ' | Saved batch runs ' . (int)($item['saved_batch_runs'] ?? 0) . ' | Batch sets ' . (int)($item['saved_batch_sets'] ?? 0) . ' | Pending saved ' . (int)($item['pending_unscored_batch_runs'] ?? 0) . ' | Waiting draw ' . (int)($item['waiting_official_draw'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored batch runs ' . (int)($item['scored_batch_runs'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <?php
                      $queueCreatedCount = (int)($item['queue_rows'] ?? 0) + (int)($item['planned_headers'] ?? 0);
                      $queueWorkToRun = (int)($item['queue_pending'] ?? 0) + (int)($item['assignments_pending'] ?? 0) + (int)($item['planned_runs'] ?? 0);
                      $queueStatusText = $queueCreatedCount > 0 ? ('Queue in place: yes | Queues/headers ' . $queueCreatedCount . ' | Work still to run ' . $queueWorkToRun) : 'Queue in place: no | Needs queue created and SKAI batch run';
                    ?>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($queueStatusText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Queue rows ' . (int)($item['queue_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Queue pending ' . (int)($item['queue_pending'] ?? 0) . ' | Assignments ' . (int)($item['assignments'] ?? 0) . ' | Pending assignments ' . (int)($item['assignments_pending'] ?? 0) . ' | Running ' . ((int)($item['queue_running'] ?? 0) + (int)($item['assignments_running'] ?? 0)) . ' | Saved assignments ' . (int)($item['assignments_saved'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Planned headers ' . (int)($item['planned_headers'] ?? 0) . ' | Planned runs ' . (int)($item['planned_runs'] ?? 0) . ' | Learning events ' . (int)($item['learning_events'] ?? 0) . ' | Latest target draw ' . (string)($item['latest_target_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Cron last check ' . (string)($item['last_checked_at'] ?? '') . ' | Cron next check ' . (string)($item['next_check_at'] ?? '') . ' | Attempts ' . (int)($item['cron_attempts'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Reason: ' . (string)($d['reason'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                  </div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div>
            </details>
            <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
              <summary><strong>How to use this panel</strong></summary>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Sort order</strong><span>The default order is users following first, total saved runs second, saved batch runs third, then operational priority. This keeps the most popular lotteries at the top while still showing whether queue or coverage work is needed.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Run queue first</strong><span>If a lottery already has pending assignments, run the SKAI queue runner before creating another sweep.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Hold</strong><span>If many saved runs are waiting for official draw results, do not spend more resources yet. Let the cron score them first.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Create Balanced Settings Sweep</strong><span>Use when a lottery has weak or missing scored batch coverage.</span></div>
                <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>Create Tight Best-Candidate Sweep</strong><span>Use when scored evidence and learning events are high enough to refine a candidate range.</span></div>
              </div>
            </details>
          </div>
        </section>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV116ColumnExists($db, $table, $column)
{
    try {
        $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $table;
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS" .
            " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()" .
            " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw) .
            " AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote($column)
        );
        return ((int)$db->loadResult()) > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV116TableExists($db, $table)
{
    try {
        $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $table;
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES" .
            " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()" .
            " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw)
        );
        return ((int)$db->loadResult()) > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV116GetTableColumns($db, $table)
{
    static $cache = array();
    if (isset($cache[$table])) { return $cache[$table]; }
    try {
        $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $table;
        $db->setQuery(
            "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS" .
            " WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()" .
            " AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw)
        );
        $cols = $db->loadColumn();
        $cache[$table] = is_array($cols) ? $cols : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $cache[$table] = array();
    }
    return $cache[$table];
}

function mylottoexpertV116PickFirstExistingColumn(array $cols, array $candidates)
{
    foreach ($candidates as $c) {
        if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { return $c; }
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertV116LoadRawSavedActivity($db, $limit = 120)
{
    $limit = max(25, min(250, (int)$limit));
    $out = array(
        'available' => false,
        'saved_rows' => array(),
        'batch_headers' => array(),
        'batch_runs' => array(),
        'skai_run_logs' => array(),
        'warnings' => array()
    );

    try {
        if (mylottoexpertV116TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV116GetTableColumns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
            $select = array();
            foreach (array(
                'id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','label','main_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','canonical_display_string','date_saved','generated_at','user_local_datetime','utc_epoch','next_draw_date','target_draw_date','next_draw_at','target_draw_at','evaluation_status','actual_draw_date','main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_type','settings_json','settings','sampling_temperature','skai_window_size','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight'
            ) as $c) {
                if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
            }
            if (!in_array('id', $cols, true)) {
                $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers is missing id, so raw latest saved rows cannot be ordered by row id.';
            } else {
                if (empty($select)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName('id'); }
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {
                    $lotteryId = 0;
                    if (isset($r['target_lottery_id']) && (int)$r['target_lottery_id'] > 0) { $lotteryId = (int)$r['target_lottery_id']; }
                    elseif (isset($r['lottery_id'])) { $lotteryId = (int)$r['lottery_id']; }
                    $gameId = '';
                    if (isset($r['target_game_id']) && trim((string)$r['target_game_id']) !== '') { $gameId = trim((string)$r['target_game_id']); }
                    elseif (isset($r['game_id'])) { $gameId = trim((string)$r['game_id']); }
                    $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel') ? mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId) : ('Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId . ($gameId !== '' ? ' | Game ID ' . $gameId : ''));
                    $r['resolved_method_label'] = trim((string)($r['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''));
                    if ($r['resolved_method_label'] === '') { $r['resolved_method_label'] = trim((string)($r['origin_source'] ?? '')); }
                    if ($r['resolved_method_label'] === '') { $r['resolved_method_label'] = trim((string)($r['source'] ?? 'unknown')); }
                    $out['saved_rows'][] = $r;
                }
                $out['available'] = true;
            }
        } else {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers table is missing.';
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV116TableExists($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header')) {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV116GetTableColumns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_header');
            $select = array();
            foreach (array('id','user_id','lottery_id','lottery_name','batch_name','batch_source','batch_type','status','test_variable','recommended_value','created_at') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
            if (in_array('id', $cols, true) && !empty($select)) {
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 40');
                $out['batch_headers'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            }
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV116TableExists($db, 'mle_skai_batch_run')) {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV116GetTableColumns($db, 'mle_skai_batch_run');
            $select = array();
            foreach (array('id','batch_id','user_id','lottery_id','run_order','run_name','is_control','source','test_variable','test_value','status','created_at') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
            if (in_array('id', $cols, true) && !empty($select)) {
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 60');
                $out['batch_runs'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            }
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV116TableExists($db, 'skai_run_log')) {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV116GetTableColumns($db, 'skai_run_log');
            $select = array();
            foreach (array('id','run_uuid','user_id','game_id','lottery_slug','engine_version','config_version','tuning_mode','runtime_status','final_rank_source','created_at') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
            if (in_array('id', $cols, true) && !empty($select)) {
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_run_log') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 60');
                $out['skai_run_logs'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'Raw activity trace failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV116RenderRawSavedActivityTrace($db)
{
    if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV116LoadRawSavedActivity')) { return ''; }
    $trace = mylottoexpertV116LoadRawSavedActivity($db, 20);
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <section id="mle-v116-raw-sitewide-activity-trace" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem;" aria-label="Admin Raw Sitewide Activity Trace">
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
        <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin Raw Activity Trace</span>
        <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Newest rows directly from the source tables</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
        <p class="mle-ci-panel__text">This section intentionally bypasses the hive filters and reads the newest rows by primary key first. If you just ran Texas Cash 5, it should appear here even before it is scored, assigned, or reconciled.</p>
        <?php foreach ((array)($trace['warnings'] ?? array()) as $w): ?>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2" style="margin-top:.75rem;"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">Trace warning</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$w, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Newest user_saved_numbers rows</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php $rows = (array)($trace['saved_rows'] ?? array()); ?>
            <?php if (empty($rows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No saved rows returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">The direct source-table trace did not return rows from user_saved_numbers.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($rows as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved row #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . (string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Method: ' . (string)($r['resolved_method_label'] ?? 'unknown') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Target draw: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ($r['next_draw_date'] ?? '')) . ' | Actual: ' . (string)($r['actual_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved: ' . (string)($r['date_saved'] ?? '') . ' | Generated: ' . (string)($r['generated_at'] ?? '') . ' | Main: ' . (string)($r['main_numbers'] ?? '') . ' | Extra: ' . (string)($r['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '') . ' | Game: ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '') . ' | Target game: ' . (string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Newest MyLottoExpert SKAI batch headers</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php $headers = (array)($trace['batch_headers'] ?? array()); ?>
            <?php if (empty($headers)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No batch headers returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No newest rows were found in mle_skai_batch_header.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($headers as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Batch header #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | Lottery ' . (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Name: ' . (string)($r['batch_name'] ?? '') . ' | Type: ' . (string)($r['batch_type'] ?? '') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['status'] ?? '') . ' | Test: ' . (string)($r['test_variable'] ?? '') . ' | Created: ' . (string)($r['created_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Newest SKAI run logs</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php $logs = (array)($trace['skai_run_logs'] ?? array()); ?>
            <?php if (empty($logs)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No SKAI run logs returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No newest rows were found in skai_run_log.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($logs as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('SKAI log #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | Game ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Status: ' . (string)($r['runtime_status'] ?? '') . ' | Rank source: ' . (string)($r['final_rank_source'] ?? '') . ' | Created: ' . (string)($r['created_at'] ?? '') . ' | Run UUID: ' . (string)($r['run_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </section>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

function mylottoexpertV117TableExists($db, $tableKey)
{
    $tableKey = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$tableKey);
    if ($tableKey === '') { return false; }
    $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $tableKey;
    try {
        $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($raw));
        return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
}

function mylottoexpertV117Columns($db, $tableKey)
{
    static $cache = array();
    $tableKey = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$tableKey);
    if ($tableKey === '') { return array(); }
    if (isset($cache[$tableKey])) { return $cache[$tableKey]; }
    try {
        $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($db->getPrefix() . $tableKey));
        $cols = $db->loadColumn();
        $cache[$tableKey] = is_array($cols) ? array_values($cols) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { $cache[$tableKey] = array(); }
    return $cache[$tableKey];
}

function mylottoexpertV117SelectExisting($db, array $cols, array $wanted, $alias = '')
{
    $out = array();
    foreach ($wanted as $c) {
        if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) {
            $out[] = ($alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '') . $db->quoteName($c);
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV117SafeLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
        try { return mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lotteryId, $gameId); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    }
    $parts = array();
    if ($lotteryId > 0) { $parts[] = 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId; }
    if ($gameId !== '') { $parts[] = 'Game ID ' . $gameId; }
    return !empty($parts) ? implode(' | ', $parts) : 'Unknown lottery';
}

function mylottoexpertV117LoadSourceTruthActivity($db, $limit = 100)
{

    $limit = max(20, min(500, (int)$limit));
    $out = array(
        'warnings' => array(),
        'summary' => array(),
        'newest_saved_rows' => array(),
        'lottery_counts' => array(),
        'cash5_candidates' => array(),
        'cash5_saved_rows' => array(),
        'newest_batch_headers' => array(),
        'newest_batch_runs' => array(),
        'newest_skai_logs' => array(),
        'query_notes' => array()
    );

    if (!mylottoexpertV117TableExists($db, 'user_saved_numbers')) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers does not exist, so source-truth saved activity cannot be inspected.';
        return $out;
    }

    $cols = mylottoexpertV117Columns($db, 'user_saved_numbers');
    $has = function($c) use ($cols) { return in_array($c, $cols, true); };

    try {
        $summary = array();
        $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'));
        $summary['total_saved_rows'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        if ($has('id')) {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT MIN(' . $db->quoteName('id') . '), MAX(' . $db->quoteName('id') . ') FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'));
            $range = (array)$db->loadRow();
            $summary['min_id'] = isset($range[0]) ? (int)$range[0] : 0;
            $summary['max_id'] = isset($range[1]) ? (int)$range[1] : 0;
        }
        foreach (array('date_saved','generated_at','user_local_datetime','target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','evaluated_at') as $dc) {
            if ($has($dc)) {
                try {
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT MAX(' . $db->quoteName($dc) . ') FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName($dc) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $db->quoteName($dc) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName($dc) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName($dc) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00'));
                    $summary['max_' . $dc] = (string)$db->loadResult();
                } catch (\Throwable $e) { $summary['max_' . $dc] = 'read failed'; }
            }
        }
        $out['summary'] = $summary;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'Source-truth summary failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    try {
        if (!$has('id')) { $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers is missing id; newest rows cannot be read by primary key.'; }
        else {
            $wanted = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','label','main_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','canonical_display_string','prediction_type','prediction_family','date_saved','generated_at','user_local_datetime','utc_epoch','next_draw_date','target_draw_date','next_draw_at','target_draw_at','evaluation_status','actual_draw_date','main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_type','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','settings_json','settings','sampling_temperature','skai_window_size','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight','hive_learning_contract_version','hive_intake_mode','hive_queue_id','hive_assignment_id','hive_research_type','hive_setting_key','hive_settings_fingerprint','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_missing_json');
            $select = mylottoexpertV117SelectExisting($db, $cols, $wanted);
            if (empty($select)) { $select = array($db->quoteName('id')); }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
            $rows = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            foreach ($rows as $r) {
                $lid = (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
                $gid = trim((string)(($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')));
                $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = mylottoexpertV117SafeLabel($db, $lid, $gid);
                $out['newest_saved_rows'][] = $r;
            }
            $out['query_notes'][] = 'Newest saved rows are read by user_saved_numbers.id DESC with no scoring, queue, date, or SKAI filter.';
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'Newest saved rows query failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    try {
        $lotteryExprParts = array();
        if ($has('target_lottery_id')) { $lotteryExprParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        if ($has('lottery_id')) { $lotteryExprParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        $lotteryExpr = !empty($lotteryExprParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($lotteryExprParts, array('0'))) . ')' : '0';
        $gameExprParts = array();
        if ($has('target_game_id')) { $gameExprParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        if ($has('game_id')) { $gameExprParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        $gameExpr = !empty($gameExprParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($gameExprParts, array($db->quote('')))) . ')' : $db->quote('');

        $validSqlValue = function($col) use ($db) {
            return '(' . $db->quoteName($col) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0') . ' AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('[]') . ' AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('{}') . ' AND ' .
                'LOWER(' . $db->quoteName($col) . ') <> ' . $db->quote('null') . ')';
        };
        $validDateValue = function($col) use ($db) {
            return '(' . $db->quoteName($col) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND ' .
                $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
        };

        $checkedParts = array();
        if ($has('evaluation_status')) {
            $checkedParts[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ')) IN (' .
                $db->quote('scored') . ',' .
                $db->quote('evaluated') . ',' .
                $db->quote('complete') . ',' .
                $db->quote('completed') . ',' .
                $db->quote('final') . ',' .
                $db->quote('checked') . ',' .
                $db->quote('result_checked') . ',' .
                $db->quote('learned') . ')';
        }
        foreach (array('evaluated_at','actual_draw_date') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $checkedParts[] = $validDateValue($c); }
        }
        foreach (array('actual_main_numbers','actual_extra_numbers','matched_numbers','evaluation_json') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $checkedParts[] = $validSqlValue($c); }
        }

        foreach (array('main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','main_matches','bonus_matches','learning_score') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $checkedParts[] = '(' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' IS NOT NULL)'; }
        }
        $checkedExpr = !empty($checkedParts) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $checkedParts) . ')' : '0';

        $drawParts = array();
        foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $drawParts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')'; }
        }
        foreach (array('target_draw_at','next_draw_at') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $drawParts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(LEFT(' . $db->quoteName($c) . ',10), ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')'; }
        }
        $drawDateExpr = !empty($drawParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($drawParts, array($db->quote('')))) . ')' : $db->quote('');
        $hasDrawInfoExpr = '(' . $drawDateExpr . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
        $waitingForDrawingExpr = '(NOT (' . $checkedExpr . ') AND ' . $hasDrawInfoExpr . ' AND ' . $drawDateExpr . ' >= CURDATE())';
        $needsResultCheckExpr = '(NOT (' . $checkedExpr . ') AND ' . $hasDrawInfoExpr . ' AND ' . $drawDateExpr . ' < CURDATE())';
        $missingDrawInfoExpr = '(NOT (' . $checkedExpr . ') AND NOT ' . $hasDrawInfoExpr . ')';

        $settingsExpr = '0';
        $setParts = array();
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings','digit_probabilities','position_combinations','sampling_temperature','skai_window_size','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight') as $c) {
            if ($has($c)) { $setParts[] = '(' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        }
        if (!empty($setParts)) { $settingsExpr = '(' . implode(' OR ', $setParts) . ')'; }
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, COUNT(*) AS rows_found, COUNT(DISTINCT ' . ($has('user_id') ? $db->quoteName('user_id') : '0') . ') AS users_found, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $checkedExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $waitingForDrawingExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting_for_drawing_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $needsResultCheckExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS needs_result_check_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $missingDrawInfoExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_drawing_info_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (' . $checkedExpr . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_checked_rows, ' .
            'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsExpr . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
            'MAX(' . ($has('id') ? $db->quoteName('id') : '0') . ') AS newest_id ' .
            'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY newest_id DESC LIMIT 100'
        );
        $rows = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
        $mergedCounts = array();
        foreach ($rows as $r) {
            $label = mylottoexpertV117SafeLabel($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
            $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = $label;
            $key = strtolower(trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', (string)$label)));
            if ($key === '') { $key = 'unknown|' . (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0) . '|' . strtolower((string)($r['game_id'] ?? '')); }
            if (!isset($mergedCounts[$key])) {
                $mergedCounts[$key] = array(
                    'resolved_lottery_label' => $label,
                    'rows_found' => 0,
                    'users_found' => 0,
                    'checked_rows' => 0,
                    'waiting_for_drawing_rows' => 0,
                    'needs_result_check_rows' => 0,
                    'missing_drawing_info_rows' => 0,
                    'not_checked_rows' => 0,
                    'settings_rows' => 0,
                    'newest_id' => 0,
                    'technical_groups' => 0,
                    'lottery_ids_seen' => array(),
                    'game_ids_seen' => array()
                );
            }
            $mergedCounts[$key]['rows_found'] += (int)($r['rows_found'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['users_found'] += (int)($r['users_found'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['checked_rows'] += (int)($r['checked_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['waiting_for_drawing_rows'] += (int)($r['waiting_for_drawing_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['needs_result_check_rows'] += (int)($r['needs_result_check_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['missing_drawing_info_rows'] += (int)($r['missing_drawing_info_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['not_checked_rows'] += (int)($r['not_checked_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['settings_rows'] += (int)($r['settings_rows'] ?? 0);
            $mergedCounts[$key]['newest_id'] = max((int)$mergedCounts[$key]['newest_id'], (int)($r['newest_id'] ?? 0));
            $mergedCounts[$key]['technical_groups']++;
            if ((int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $mergedCounts[$key]['lottery_ids_seen'][(string)(int)$r['lottery_id']] = true; }
            $gidSeen = trim((string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
            if ($gidSeen !== '') { $mergedCounts[$key]['game_ids_seen'][$gidSeen] = true; }

            $mergedCounts[$key]['scored_rows'] = $mergedCounts[$key]['checked_rows'];
            $mergedCounts[$key]['unscored_rows'] = $mergedCounts[$key]['not_checked_rows'];
        }
        $out['lottery_counts'] = array_values($mergedCounts);
        usort($out['lottery_counts'], function($a, $b) {
            if ((int)($b['newest_id'] ?? 0) === (int)($a['newest_id'] ?? 0)) {
                return strcmp((string)($a['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), (string)($b['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''));
            }
            return ((int)($b['newest_id'] ?? 0) > (int)($a['newest_id'] ?? 0)) ? 1 : -1;
        });
        $out['query_notes'][] = 'Lottery counts now use plain-English result-check buckets: checked, waiting for drawing, needs result check, and missing drawing info.';
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'Lottery count source-truth query failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    try {
        if (mylottoexpertV117TableExists($db, 'lotteries')) {
            $lcols = mylottoexpertV117Columns($db, 'lotteries');
            $idCol = in_array('lottery_id', $lcols, true) ? 'lottery_id' : (in_array('id', $lcols, true) ? 'id' : '');
            $nameCols = array();
            foreach (array('name','lottery_name','title','game_name','slug') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $lcols, true)) { $nameCols[] = 'COALESCE(l.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; } }
            $gameCol = in_array('game_id', $lcols, true) ? 'l.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') : $db->quote('');
            if ($idCol !== '' && (!empty($nameCols) || in_array('game_id', $lcols, true))) {
                $hay = 'LOWER(CONCAT_WS(' . $db->quote(' ') . ', ' . implode(',', array_merge($nameCols, array($gameCol))) . '))';
                $select = array('l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol, 'lottery_id'), $gameCol . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('game_id'));
                foreach (array('name','lottery_name','title','game_name','slug') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $lcols, true)) { $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c); } }
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l') . ' WHERE ' . $hay . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%cash%') . ' OR ' . $hay . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%c5%') . ' OR ' . $hay . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote('%texas%') . ' ORDER BY l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol) . ' ASC LIMIT 40');
                $candidates = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
                $out['cash5_candidates'] = $candidates;
                $ids = array();
                $gids = array();
                foreach ($candidates as $c) {
                    if ((int)($c['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $ids[] = (int)$c['lottery_id']; }
                    $gid = trim((string)($c['game_id'] ?? ''));
                    if ($gid !== '') { $gids[] = $gid; }
                }
                $where = array();
                if (!empty($ids)) {
                    $idList = implode(',', array_map('intval', array_unique($ids)));
                    if ($has('lottery_id')) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')'; }
                    if ($has('target_lottery_id')) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')'; }
                }
                if (!empty($gids)) {
                    $gidList = array();
                    foreach (array_unique($gids) as $g) { $gidList[] = $db->quote($g); }
                    if ($has('game_id')) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $gidList) . ')'; }
                    if ($has('target_game_id')) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $gidList) . ')'; }
                }
                if (!empty($where) && $has('id')) {
                    $select = mylottoexpertV117SelectExisting($db, $cols, array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','label','main_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','date_saved','generated_at','target_draw_date','next_draw_date','evaluation_status','batch_uuid','source_batch_id'));
                    if (empty($select)) { $select = array($db->quoteName('id')); }
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE (' . implode(' OR ', $where) . ') ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 100');
                    $matches = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
                    foreach ($matches as $r) {
                        $lid = (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
                        $gid = trim((string)(($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')));
                        $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = mylottoexpertV117SafeLabel($db, $lid, $gid);
                        $out['cash5_saved_rows'][] = $r;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $out['warnings'][] = 'Cash/Texas diagnostic query failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    foreach (array(
        'mle_skai_batch_header' => 'newest_batch_headers',
        'mle_skai_batch_run' => 'newest_batch_runs',
        'skai_run_log' => 'newest_skai_logs'
    ) as $table => $outKey) {
        try {
            if (!mylottoexpertV117TableExists($db, $table)) { continue; }
            $tcols = mylottoexpertV117Columns($db, $table);
            if (!in_array('id', $tcols, true)) { continue; }
            $wanted = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','lottery_name','run_uuid','batch_id','batch_name','batch_source','batch_type','run_order','run_name','source','status','runtime_status','test_variable','test_value','created_at');
            $select = mylottoexpertV117SelectExisting($db, $tcols, $wanted);
            if (empty($select)) { $select = array($db->quoteName('id')); }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $table) . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)min($limit, 100));
            $out[$outKey] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Newest ' . $table . ' trace failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }
    }

    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertV117RenderSourceTruthActivityInspector($db)
{
    $__mleTraceLimit = 100;
    try {
        $__mleTraceLimit = (int)\Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication()->input->getInt('mle_activity_limit', 20);
    } catch (\Throwable $__mleTraceLimitE) {
        $__mleTraceLimit = 100;
    }
    $__mleTraceLimit = max(25, min(500, $__mleTraceLimit));
    $data = mylottoexpertV117LoadSourceTruthActivity($db, $__mleTraceLimit);
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <section id="mle-v117-source-truth-activity-inspector" class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem; border:2px solid #bfdbfe;" aria-label="Admin Source Truth Activity Inspector">
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
        <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Admin Source-Truth Activity Inspector</span>

      </div>
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
        <p class="mle-ci-panel__text">This section reads source tables directly with minimal filtering. It is designed to catch new runs even when the hive queue, scoring, date aggregation, or SKAI evidence filters do not see them yet. For safety, the raw inspector loads a bounded number of rows by default.</p>
        <form method="get" class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:.85rem; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; gap:.65rem;">
          <span class="mle-ci-callout__label" style="margin:0;">Loaded row limit</span>
          <label for="mle-activity-limit" class="mle-ci-panel__text" style="margin:0;">Show newest</label>
          <select id="mle-activity-limit" name="mle_activity_limit" style="min-height:36px; border:1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius:10px; padding:.35rem .55rem;">
            <option value="20"<?php echo $__mleTraceLimit === 20 ? ' selected' : ''; ?>>20 rows</option>
            <option value="50"<?php echo $__mleTraceLimit === 50 ? ' selected' : ''; ?>>50 rows</option>
            <option value="100"<?php echo $__mleTraceLimit === 100 ? ' selected' : ''; ?>>100 rows</option>
            <option value="200"<?php echo $__mleTraceLimit === 200 ? ' selected' : ''; ?>>200 rows</option>
            <option value="500"<?php echo $__mleTraceLimit === 500 ? ' selected' : ''; ?>>500 rows</option>
          </select>
          <button type="submit" class="mle-v107-bottom-toggle" style="min-height:36px;">Load selected amount</button>
          <span class="mle-ci-panel__text" style="margin:0;">Current: <?php echo (int)$__mleTraceLimit; ?> newest rows maximum per raw source section.</span>
        </form>
        <?php foreach ((array)($data['warnings'] ?? array()) as $w): ?>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2" style="margin-top:.75rem;"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">Source-truth warning</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$w, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>
        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Source table summary</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php $sum = (array)($data['summary'] ?? array()); ?>
            <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Total saved rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($sum['total_saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Newest ID</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($sum['max_id'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
            <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Max date saved</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($sum['max_date_saved'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
            <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Max generated</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($sum['max_generated_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Newest saved rows by source-table ID</strong></summary>

            <?php if (empty($rows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No newest saved rows returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">The direct ID query returned no rows.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach (array_slice($rows, 0, $__mleTraceLimit) as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">

                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Method: ' . (string)($r['analysis_method_key'] ?? ' | Source batch: ' . (string)($r['source_batch_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved: ' . (string)($r['date_saved'] ?? '') . ' | Generated: ' . (string)($r['generated_at'] ?? '') . ' | Target draw: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ($r['next_draw_date'] ?? '')) . ' | Game: ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '') . ' | Target game: ' . (string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') . ' | Main: ' . (string)($r['main_numbers'] ?? '') . ' | Extra: ' . (string)($r['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Lottery counts directly from user_saved_numbers</strong></summary>
