              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No grouped lottery counts returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">The direct grouping query did not return lottery rows.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach (array_slice($counts, 0, $__mleTraceLimit) as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? '') . ' | newest row #' . (int)($r['newest_id'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Rows: ' . (int)($r['rows_found'] ?? 0) . ' | Users: ' . (int)($r['users_found'] ?? 0) . ' | Scored: ' . (int)($r['scored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Not checked: ' . (int)($r['unscored_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Settings: ' . (int)($r['settings_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Game: ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Texas / Cash 5 diagnostic probe</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">

              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No Cash/Texas lottery candidates found</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">The lotteries table did not return a Cash/Texas/C5 candidate from its searchable columns.</span></div>
            <?php else: ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">Cash/Texas candidates found</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo count($cand); ?> candidate lottery row(s) found in the lotteries table.</span></div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            <?php if (empty($cashRows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No matching saved rows found for Cash/Texas candidates</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">If you can see Cash 5 in user_saved_numbers, compare its lottery_id/game_id to the candidate IDs shown by the lotteries table.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach (array_slice($cashRows, 0, min($__mleTraceLimit, 100)) as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Cash/Texas saved row #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . (string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Lottery ID: ' . (string)($r['lottery_id'] ?? '') . ' | Target lottery: ' . (string)($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? '') . ' | Game: ' . (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '') . ' | Target game: ' . (string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Saved: ' .               </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </section>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

function mylottoexpertV120RenderLiveSavedActivityPanel($db, $limit = 30)
{
    $limit = max(10, min(100, (int)$limit));
    if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV117LoadSourceTruthActivity')) {
        return '<div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:1rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Live Saved Activity</span><p>Source-truth activity inspector is not available in this build.</p></div>';
    }
    try {
        $trace = mylottoexpertV117LoadSourceTruthActivity($db, $limit);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return '<div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:1rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Live Saved Activity</span><p>Live saved activity could not be loaded: ' . htmlspecialchars($e->getMessage(), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</p></div>';
    }
    $summary = (array)($trace['summary'] ?? array());
    $rows = array_slice((array)($trace['newest_saved_rows'] ?? array()), 0, min($limit, 30));
    $counts = array_slice((array)($trace['lottery_counts'] ?? array()), 0, 30);
    $cashRows = array_slice((array)($trace['cash5_saved_rows'] ?? array()), 0, 12);
    $warnings = (array)($trace['warnings'] ?? array());

    ob_start();
    ?>
    <section class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem; border-color:#93c5fd;" aria-label="Admin Live Saved Activity Source Truth">
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
        <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Live Saved Activity - Source Truth</span>
        <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Newest saved runs directly from user_saved_numbers</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
        <div class="mle-ci-decision-band">
          <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Saved rows</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($summary['total_saved_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
          <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Newest row ID</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($summary['max_id'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
          <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Latest saved</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($summary['max_date_saved'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
          <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Latest generated</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($summary['max_generated_at'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
        </div>
        <p class="mle-ci-panel__text" style="margin-top:.8rem;">This panel is the raw source-of-truth view. It does not require hive queue assignment, scoring, target draw matching, or SKAI evidence qualification. If a Texas Cash 5 row is saved in user_saved_numbers and is among the newest rows, it should appear here.</p>
        <?php foreach ($warnings as $w): ?>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2" style="margin-top:.65rem;"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">Warning</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$w, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
        <?php endforeach; ?>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Newest saved runs by row ID</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php if (empty($rows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No rows returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">The direct user_saved_numbers query returned no rows.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($rows as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Row #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . (string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Lottery ID: ' . (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0)) . ' | Game ID: ' . (string)((($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '') ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')) . ' | Source: ' . (string)($r['source'] ?? '') . ' | Method: ' . (string)($r['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved: ' . (string)($r['date_saved'] ?? '') . ' | Generated: ' . (string)($r['generated_at'] ?? '') . ' | Target draw: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? '') . ' | Next draw: ' . (string)($r['next_draw_date'] ?? '') . ' | Status: ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | Main: ' . (string)($r['main_numbers'] ?? '') . ' | Extra: ' . (string)($r['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Direct lottery counts from user_saved_numbers</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php if (empty($counts)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No grouped counts</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">No direct saved lottery counts were returned.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($counts as $c): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Saved predictions: ' . (int)($c['rows_found'] ?? 0) . ' | Users: ' . (int)($c['users_found'] ?? 0) . ' | Checked: ' . (int)(($c['checked_rows'] ?? null) !== null ? ($c['checked_rows'] ?? 0) : ($c['scored_rows'] ?? 0)) . ' | Waiting for drawing: ' . (int)($c['waiting_for_drawing_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Needs result check: ' . (int)($c['needs_result_check_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Missing drawing info: ' . (int)($c['missing_drawing_info_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Has SKAI settings: ' . (int)($c['settings_rows'] ?? 0) . ' | Newest row: ' . (int)($c['newest_id'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <?php if ((int)($c['needs_result_check_rows'] ?? 0) > 0 && (int)(($c['checked_rows'] ?? null) !== null ? ($c['checked_rows'] ?? 0) : ($c['scored_rows'] ?? 0)) <= 0): ?>
                  <span class="mle-ci-panel__text">Admin check: this lottery has past saved predictions that appear ready to be checked against winning numbers.</span>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <?php if ((int)($c['technical_groups'] ?? 0) > 1): ?>
                  <span class="mle-ci-panel__text"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Merged technical groups: ' . (int)($c['technical_groups'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <?php endif; ?>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details style="margin-top:.9rem;">
          <summary><strong>Texas / Cash 5 saved-row probe</strong></summary>
          <div class="mle-ci-insight-list2" style="margin-top:.85rem;">
            <?php if (empty($cashRows)): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">No Cash/Texas probe rows returned</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value">If you can see Texas Cash 5 in user_saved_numbers, compare its lottery_id/game_id with the newest saved rows above. The row may be saved under a different label or unresolved identity.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ($cashRows as $r): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2">
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Cash/Texas match row #' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | User ' . (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . (string)($r['resolved_lottery_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Lottery ID: ' . (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0)) . ' | Game ID: ' . (string)((($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '') ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')) . ' | Saved: ' . (string)($r['date_saved'] ?? '') . ' | Target: ' . (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </section>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

if ($__mleAllowMaintenance) {
    try { mylottoexpertBackfillHeatmapPlayRows($db, $workspaceUserId); } catch (\Throwable $_mleHeatmapBackfillE) {   }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV122EnsureHiveContractColumns')) {
function mylottoexpertV122EnsureHiveContractColumns($db, $currentUser)
{
    $status = array('success'=>true,'created_or_updated'=>false,'needs_super_user'=>false,'added'=>array(),'skipped'=>array(),'message'=>'');
    try {
        $isSuper = false;
        try { $isSuper = is_object($currentUser) && method_exists($currentUser, 'authorise') && $currentUser->authorise('core.admin'); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $isSuper = false; }
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $rawName = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe') && !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawName)) {
            $status['success'] = false;
            $status['message'] = 'user_saved_numbers table was not found.';
            return $status;
        }
        $required = array(
            'hive_learning_contract_version' => "VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Hive learning contract schema version saved by SKAI'",
            'hive_intake_mode'               => "VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'planned_hive_guided, observed_manual_skai, or observed_skai_batch'",
            'hive_queue_id'                  => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Hive research queue id when assigned before run'",
            'hive_assignment_id'             => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Hive assignment id when assigned before run'",
            'hive_research_type'             => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Hive research type or observed intake type'",
            'hive_setting_key'               => "VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'Hive setting key being tested when known'",
            'hive_settings_fingerprint'      => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Normalized settings fingerprint used by hive duplicate guard'",
            'hive_contract_status'           => "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'hive_ready, tracking_ready, or missing_required_fields'",
            'hive_contract_json'             => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL COMMENT 'Canonical SKAI hive learning contract payload'",
            'hive_contract_missing_json'     => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of missing contract fields at save time'"
        );
        $missing = array();
        foreach ($required as $col => $def) {
            $exists = false;
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe')) { $exists = mylottoexpertColumnExistsSafe($db, $rawName, $col); }
            else {
                $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName) . " AND COLUMN_NAME = " . $db->quote($col));
                $exists = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
            }
            if ($exists) { $status['skipped'][] = $col; }
            else { $missing[$col] = $def; }
        }
        if (empty($missing)) {
            $status['message'] = 'Hive contract columns already exist.';
            return $status;
        }
        if (!$isSuper) {
            $status['success'] = false;
            $status['needs_super_user'] = true;
            $status['message'] = 'Hive contract columns are waiting for a superuser page load.';
            return $status;
        }
        foreach ($missing as $col => $def) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `{$col}` {$def}");
                $db->execute();
                $status['added'][] = $col;
                $status['created_or_updated'] = true;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $status['success'] = false;
                error_log('[MLE V122] Failed to add hive contract column ' . $col . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
            }
        }
        $indexMap = array(
            'idx_mle_hive_contract_status' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_hive_contract_status` (`hive_contract_status`)",
            'idx_mle_hive_queue_assignment' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_hive_queue_assignment` (`hive_queue_id`,`hive_assignment_id`)",
            'idx_mle_hive_fingerprint' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_hive_fingerprint` (`hive_settings_fingerprint`)"
        );
        foreach ($indexMap as $idx => $sql) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawName) . " AND INDEX_NAME = " . $db->quote($idx));
                if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V122] Hive contract index check/add failed ' . $idx . ': ' . $e->getMessage()); }
        }
        $status['message'] = 'Hive contract schema bootstrap complete. Added: ' . implode(',', $status['added']);
        return $status;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $status['success'] = false;
        $status['message'] = $e->getMessage();
        error_log('[MLE V122] Hive contract schema bootstrap exception: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return $status;
    }
}
}

function mylottoexpertV121SafeText($value, $maxLen = 191)
{
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $value);
    if ($maxLen > 0 && strlen($value) > $maxLen) { $value = substr($value, 0, $maxLen); }
    return $value;
}

function mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIsSkaiLike(array $row)
{
    $hay = strtolower(implode(' ', array(
        (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['origin_source'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['analysis_engine_label'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['analysis_source_page'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['model_family'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['batch_type'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['skai_run_mode'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['source_batch_origin'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['source_batch_type'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['hive_learning_contract_version'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['hive_intake_mode'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['hive_research_type'] ?? ''),
        (string)($row['hive_contract_status'] ?? '')
    )));
    if (strpos($hay, 'skai') !== false) { return true; }
    if (strpos($hay, 'mle_precision') !== false || strpos($hay, 'precision') !== false) { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['settings_json'] ?? '')) !== '' || trim((string)($row['settings'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['hive_contract_json'] ?? '')) !== '' || trim((string)($row['hive_learning_contract_version'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['run_uuid'] ?? '')) !== '' || trim((string)($row['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    if ((int)($row['batch_total'] ?? 0) > 0 || trim((string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIsScored(array $row)
{
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['evaluation_status'] ?? '')));
    if (in_array($status, array('scored','evaluated','complete','completed'), true)) { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['evaluated_at'] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
    if (trim((string)($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? '')) !== '' && trim((string)($row['actual_draw_date'] ?? '')) !== '0000-00-00') { return true; }
    if ((int)($row['main_hits_count'] ?? 0) > 0 || (int)($row['extra_hits_count'] ?? 0) > 0) { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowLotteryId(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('target_lottery_id','lottery_id') as $key) {
        $v = (int)($row[$key] ?? 0);
        if ($v > 0) { return $v; }
    }
    return 0;
}

function mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowGameId(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $key) {
        $v = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($row[$key] ?? '', 64);
        if ($v !== '') { return $v; }
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowDrawDate(array $row)
{
    foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date') as $key) {
        $v = trim((string)($row[$key] ?? ''));
        if ($v !== '' && strncmp($v, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) { return substr($v, 0, 10); }
    }
    return '';
}

function mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIntakeKey(array $row)
{
    $lotteryId = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowLotteryId($row);
    $gameId = strtolower(mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowGameId($row));
    foreach (array('hive_assignment_id','hive_queue_id','batch_uuid','source_batch_id','analysis_run_uuid','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','prediction_uid','comparison_group_key') as $key) {
        $v = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($row[$key] ?? '', 128);
        if ($v !== '' && $v !== '0') { return $lotteryId . '|' . $gameId . '|' . $key . '|' . strtolower($v); }
    }
    return $lotteryId . '|' . $gameId . '|row|' . (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
}

function mylottoexpertV121BuildObservedFingerprint(array $groupRows, $groupKey)
{
    $first = isset($groupRows[0]) && is_array($groupRows[0]) ? $groupRows[0] : array();
    $payload = array(
        'version' => 'v121_observed_skai_intake',
        'intake_key' => (string)$groupKey,
        'lottery_id' => mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowLotteryId($first),
        'game_id' => mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowGameId($first),
        'draw_date' => mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowDrawDate($first),
        'batch_uuid' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['batch_uuid'] ?? '', 128),
        'hive_queue_id' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['hive_queue_id'] ?? '', 128),
        'hive_assignment_id' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['hive_assignment_id'] ?? '', 128),
        'hive_settings_fingerprint' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['hive_settings_fingerprint'] ?? '', 128),
        'hive_intake_mode' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['hive_intake_mode'] ?? '', 80),
        'source_batch_id' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['source_batch_id'] ?? '', 128),
        'source_batch_type' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['source_batch_type'] ?? '', 64),
        'analysis_method_key' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['analysis_method_key'] ?? '', 64),
        'source' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['source'] ?? '', 64),
        'origin_source' => mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['origin_source'] ?? '', 64),
        'row_ids' => array_values(array_map(function($r){ return (int)($r['id'] ?? 0); }, $groupRows))
    );
    $json = json_encode($payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    return array('hash' => hash('sha256', (string)$json), 'json' => (string)$json, 'payload' => $payload);
}

function mylottoexpertV121FindQueueByFingerprint($db, $hash)
{
    $hash = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9]/', '', strtolower((string)$hash));
    if ($hash === '') { return 0; }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('settings_fingerprint') . ' = ' . $db->quote($hash))
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        return (int)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertV121FindAssignmentByQueueOrBatch($db, $queueId, $batchUuid, $userId)
{
    try {
        $where = array();
        if ((int)$queueId > 0) { $where[] = $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId; }
        $batchUuid = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($batchUuid, 128);
        if ($batchUuid !== '') { $where[] = $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($batchUuid); }
        if (empty($where)) { return 0; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $where) . ')')
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        return (int)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertV121CreateObservedQueue($db, array $groupRows, $groupKey, array $fingerprint, $now)
{
    $first = isset($groupRows[0]) && is_array($groupRows[0]) ? $groupRows[0] : array();
    $lotteryId = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowLotteryId($first);
    $gameId = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowGameId($first);
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 && $gameId === '') { return 0; }
    $existing = mylottoexpertV121FindQueueByFingerprint($db, $fingerprint['hash'] ?? '');
    if ($existing > 0) { return $existing; }
    $savedCount = count($groupRows);
    $scoredCount = 0;
    foreach ($groupRows as $r) { if (mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIsScored($r)) { $scoredCount++; } }
    $status = ($scoredCount > 0) ? (($scoredCount >= $savedCount) ? 'scored' : 'partial_scored') : 'observed_saved';
    $resultStatus = ($scoredCount > 0) ? 'observed_scored' : 'waiting_for_draw';
    $drawDate = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowDrawDate($first);
    $settingKey = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['source_batch_test_variable'] ?? '', 100);
    if ($settingKey === '') { $settingKey = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['batch_type'] ?? ($first['skai_run_mode'] ?? 'observed_skai_run'), 100); }
    $resultJson = json_encode(array(
        'version' => 'v121',
        'intake_key' => (string)$groupKey,
        'saved_count' => $savedCount,
        'scored_count' => $scoredCount,
        'first_row_id' => (int)($first['id'] ?? 0),
        'latest_row_id' => max(array_map(function($r){ return (int)($r['id'] ?? 0); }, $groupRows)),
        'note' => 'Observed SKAI saved activity was routed into the hive after save.',
        'hive_contract_status' => (string)($first['hive_contract_status'] ?? ''),
        'hive_intake_mode' => (string)($first['hive_intake_mode'] ?? '')
    ), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    try {
        $db->setQuery(
            'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') .
            ' (`lottery_id`,`game_id`,`target_draw_date`,`research_status`,`research_type`,`setting_family`,`setting_key`,`control_value`,`test_values_json`,`hold_constant_json`,`settings_fingerprint`,`settings_fingerprint_json`,`priority_score`,`assignment_count`,`max_assignments`,`replication_needed`,`created_at`,`scored_at`,`result_status`,`result_json`) VALUES (' .
            (int)$lotteryId . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$gameId) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$drawDate) . ',' .
            $db->quote($status) . ',' .
            $db->quote('observed_skai_intake') . ',' .
            $db->quote('observed_saved_activity') . ',' .
            $db->quote($settingKey) . ',' .
            $db->quote(mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['source_batch_test_value'] ?? '', 100)) . ',' .
            $db->quote(json_encode(array(), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)) . ',' .
            $db->quote(json_encode(array('source'=>'user_saved_numbers','intake'=>'v121'), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)($fingerprint['hash'] ?? '')) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)($fingerprint['json'] ?? '')) . ',' .
            $db->quote('25.0000') . ',0,1,0,' .
            $db->quote((string)$now) . ',' .
            ($scoredCount > 0 ? $db->quote((string)$now) : 'NULL') . ',' .
            $db->quote($resultStatus) . ',' .
            $db->quote((string)$resultJson) . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        return (int)$db->insertid();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE V121] observed queue insert failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return 0;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV121CreateObservedAssignment($db, $queueId, array $groupRows, $now)
{
    if ((int)$queueId <= 0 || empty($groupRows)) { return 0; }
    $first = isset($groupRows[0]) && is_array($groupRows[0]) ? $groupRows[0] : array();
    $userId = (int)($first['user_id'] ?? 0);
    $lotteryId = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowLotteryId($first);
    $gameId = mylottoexpertV121ResolveSavedRowGameId($first);
    $batchUuid = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['batch_uuid'] ?? '', 128);
    if ($batchUuid === '') {
        foreach (array('source_batch_id','analysis_run_uuid','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','prediction_uid','comparison_group_key') as $key) {
            $v = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first[$key] ?? '', 100);
            if ($v !== '' && $v !== '0') { $batchUuid = 'observed-' . $key . '-' . $v; break; }
        }
    }
    if ($batchUuid === '') { $batchUuid = 'observed-row-' . (int)($first['id'] ?? 0); }
    $existing = mylottoexpertV121FindAssignmentByQueueOrBatch($db, $queueId, $batchUuid, $userId);
    $savedCount = count($groupRows);
    $scoredCount = 0;
    foreach ($groupRows as $r) { if (mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIsScored($r)) { $scoredCount++; } }
    $status = ($scoredCount > 0) ? (($scoredCount >= $savedCount) ? 'completed' : 'partial_scored') : 'saved_waiting_for_draw';
    $resultStatus = ($scoredCount > 0) ? 'observed_scored' : 'waiting_for_draw';
    $resultJson = json_encode(array(
        'version' => 'v121',
        'source_table' => 'user_saved_numbers',
        'hive_contract_status' => (string)($first['hive_contract_status'] ?? ''),
        'hive_intake_mode' => (string)($first['hive_intake_mode'] ?? ''),
        'row_ids' => array_values(array_map(function($r){ return (int)($r['id'] ?? 0); }, $groupRows)),
        'saved_count' => $savedCount,
        'scored_count' => $scoredCount
    ), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
    try {
        if ($existing > 0) {
            $sets = array(
                $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = ' . (int)$savedCount,
                $db->quoteName('scored_count') . ' = ' . (int)$scoredCount,
                $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($status)
            );
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'last_reconciled_at')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now); }
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_status')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('result_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($resultStatus); }
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists') && mylottoexpertV99ColumnExists($db, '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'result_json')) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$resultJson); }
            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$existing);
            $db->execute();
            return $existing;
        }
        $db->setQuery(
            'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') .
            ' (`queue_id`,`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`game_id`,`batch_uuid`,`batch_header_id`,`assigned_status`,`assigned_at`,`opened_in_skai_at`,`saved_count`,`scored_count`,`completed_at`) VALUES (' .
            (int)$queueId . ',' . (int)$userId . ',' . (int)$lotteryId . ',' . $db->quote((string)$gameId) . ',' . $db->quote($batchUuid) . ',0,' . $db->quote($status) . ',' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ',' . $db->quote((string)$now) . ',' . (int)$savedCount . ',' . (int)$scoredCount . ',' . ($scoredCount > 0 ? $db->quote((string)$now) : 'NULL') . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        $assignmentId = (int)$db->insertid();
        if ($assignmentId > 0) {
            $sets = array($db->quoteName('assignment_count') . ' = 1', $db->quoteName('assigned_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now));
            if ($scoredCount > 0) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('scored_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$now); }
            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId);
            $db->execute();
        }
        return $assignmentId;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE V121] observed assignment insert failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return 0;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV121IngestRecentSkaiSavedRowsIntoHive($db, $limit = 150)
{
    $result = array('scanned'=>0,'skai_like'=>0,'groups'=>0,'created_queue'=>0,'created_assignment'=>0,'updated_assignment'=>0,'skipped'=>0);
    $limit = max(25, min(1000, (int)$limit));
    try {
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe') || !mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers')) { return $result; }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables')) { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema')) { mylottoexpertV99EnsureFeedbackSchema($db); }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema')) { mylottoexpertV101EnsureAssignmentRefinementSchema($db); }
        $cols = function_exists('mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames') ? mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers') : array();
        $needed = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','analysis_engine_label','analysis_source_page','model_family','batch_type','skai_run_mode','source_batch_origin','source_batch_type','settings_json','settings','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','analysis_run_uuid','prediction_uid','comparison_group_key','batch_uuid','batch_total','source_batch_id','target_lottery_id','target_game_id','target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date','evaluation_status','evaluated_at','main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','source_batch_test_variable','source_batch_test_value','date_saved','generated_at','main_numbers','extra_ball_numbers');
        $select = array();
        foreach ($needed as $c) { if (isset($cols[$c])) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
        if (!in_array($db->quoteName('id'), $select, true)) { return $result; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($select)->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows)) { return $result; }
        $result['scanned'] = count($rows);
        $groups = array();
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row) || !mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIsSkaiLike($row)) { continue; }
            $result['skai_like']++;
            $key = mylottoexpertV121SavedRowIntakeKey($row);
            if (!isset($groups[$key])) { $groups[$key] = array(); }
            $groups[$key][] = $row;
        }
        $result['groups'] = count($groups);
        $now = gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        foreach ($groups as $key => $groupRows) {
            $fp = mylottoexpertV121BuildObservedFingerprint($groupRows, $key);
            $beforeQueue = mylottoexpertV121FindQueueByFingerprint($db, $fp['hash'] ?? '');
            $queueId = $beforeQueue > 0 ? $beforeQueue : mylottoexpertV121CreateObservedQueue($db, $groupRows, $key, $fp, $now);
            if ($queueId <= 0) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            if ($beforeQueue <= 0) { $result['created_queue']++; }
            $first = $groupRows[0];
            $batchUuid = mylottoexpertV121SafeText($first['batch_uuid'] ?? '', 128);
            $beforeAssign = mylottoexpertV121FindAssignmentByQueueOrBatch($db, $queueId, $batchUuid, (int)($first['user_id'] ?? 0));
            $assignId = mylottoexpertV121CreateObservedAssignment($db, $queueId, $groupRows, $now);
            if ($assignId > 0 && $beforeAssign <= 0) { $result['created_assignment']++; }
            elseif ($assignId > 0) { $result['updated_assignment']++; }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE V121] intake reconcile failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
    if (!isset($GLOBALS['_mle_v121_intake_summary'])) { $GLOBALS['_mle_v121_intake_summary'] = $result; }
    return $result;
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123AdminRowsLimit')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123AdminRowsLimit($default = 20)
    {
        try {
            $input = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication()->input;
            $v = (int)$input->getInt('mle_admin_rows', (int)$default);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $v = (int)$default; }
        if ($v <= 20) { return 20; }
        if ($v <= 50) { return 50; }
        if ($v <= 100) { return 100; }
        return 100;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123BuildRowsUrl')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123BuildRowsUrl($rows)
    {
        $rows = (int)$rows;
        if ($rows < 20) { $rows = 20; }
        if ($rows > 100) { $rows = 100; }
        try {
            $uri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
            $uri->setVar('mle_admin_rows', $rows);
            return htmlspecialchars($uri->toString(), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return '?mle_admin_rows=' . (int)$rows;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123FriendlyStatus')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123FriendlyStatus($state)
    {
        $state = strtolower(trim((string)$state));
        if ($state === '') { return 'No status yet'; }
        $map = array(
            'open' => 'Ready to assign',
            'assigned' => 'Assigned to a user',
            'saved_waiting_for_draw' => 'Saved, waiting for draw',
            'waiting_for_draw' => 'Waiting for draw',
            'partial_scored' => 'Partly scored',
            'completed' => 'Completed',
            'improved' => 'Helped the hive',
            'neutral' => 'Neutral result',
            'weakened' => 'Did not help',
            'needs_replication' => 'Needs another test',
            'invalid_missing_settings' => 'Missing settings',
            'invalid_not_scored' => 'Not scored yet',
            'observed_saved' => 'Observed saved run',
            'observed_scored' => 'Observed scored run',
            'hive_ready' => 'Hive ready',
            'tracking_ready' => 'Tracking ready',
            'missing_required_fields' => 'Missing required fields'
        );
        return isset($map[$state]) ? $map[$state] : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $state));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123RenderFlowStep')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123RenderFlowStep($label, $value, $status, $note)
    {
        $status = strtolower(trim((string)$status));
        $badgeClass = 'mle-v123-flow-badge';
        if ($status === 'ok') { $badgeClass .= ' mle-v123-flow-badge--ok'; }
        elseif ($status === 'wait') { $badgeClass .= ' mle-v123-flow-badge--wait'; }
        elseif ($status === 'warn') { $badgeClass .= ' mle-v123-flow-badge--warn'; }
        else { $badgeClass .= ' mle-v123-flow-badge--idle'; }
        return '<div class="mle-v123-flow-step">'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-flow-step__label">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '<strong class="mle-v123-flow-step__value">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</strong>'
            . '<span class="' . $badgeClass . '">' . htmlspecialchars(ucwords($status ?: 'idle'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-flow-step__note">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$note, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '</div>';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123LoadHiveContractHealth')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123LoadHiveContractHealth($db)
    {
        $out = array('available' => false, 'counts' => array(), 'latest' => array(), 'message' => 'Hive contract columns have not been detected yet.');
        try {
            $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($table));
            if ((int)$db->loadResult() <= 0) { return $out; }
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($table));
            $cols = (array)$db->loadColumn();
            if (!in_array('hive_contract_status', $cols, true)) { return $out; }
            $out['available'] = true;
            $out['message'] = 'Hive contract columns are installed. New SKAI saves should carry a contract status.';
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ' AS status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' GROUP BY ' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ' ORDER BY total DESC');
            $out['counts'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            $select = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','analysis_method_key','date_saved','generated_at','target_draw_date','evaluation_status','hive_learning_contract_version','hive_intake_mode','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_missing_json');
            $select = array_values(array_intersect($select, $cols));
            if (!empty($select) && in_array('id', $select, true)) {
                $quoted = array();
                foreach ($select as $c) { $quoted[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $quoted) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 20');
                $out['latest'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
                foreach ($out['latest'] as &$r) {
                    $lid = (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
                    $gid = trim((string)(($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')));
                    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel')) {
                        $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, $lid, $gid);
                    } else { $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = 'Lottery ' . $lid . ($gid !== '' ? ' | Game ' . $gid : ''); }
                }
                unset($r);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['message'] = 'Hive contract health could not load: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV123RenderRowsControl')) {
    function mylottoexpertV123RenderRowsControl($current)
    {
        $current = (int)$current;
        return '<div class="mle-v123-toolbar">'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-toolbar__label">Showing latest ' . (int)$current . ' items per section.</span>'
            . '<a class="mle-v123-toolbar__btn" href="' . mylottoexpertV123BuildRowsUrl(20) . '">Show 20</a>'
            . '<a class="mle-v123-toolbar__btn" href="' . mylottoexpertV123BuildRowsUrl(50) . '">More: 50</a>'
            . '<a class="mle-v123-toolbar__btn" href="' . mylottoexpertV123BuildRowsUrl(100) . '">More: 100</a>'
            . '</div>';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135TableColumns')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135TableColumns($db, $rawTable)
    {
        static $cache = array();
        $key = (string)$rawTable;
        if (isset($cache[$key])) { return $cache[$key]; }
        try {
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawTable));
            $cols = $db->loadColumn();
            $cache[$key] = is_array($cols) ? array_values($cols) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $cache[$key] = array();
        }
        return $cache[$key];
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135TableExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $rawTable)
    {
        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe')) { return mylottoexpertTableExistsSafe($db, $rawTable); }
            $db->setQuery("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($rawTable));
            return (int)$db->loadResult() > 0;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135HasColumn')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, $column)
    {
        return in_array((string)$column, (array)mylottoexpertV135TableColumns($db, $rawTable), true);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135ActivityExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135ActivityExpr($db, $alias, $rawTable)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $parts = array();
        foreach (array('date_saved','generated_at','evaluated_at','user_local_datetime','created_at') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                $parts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $q . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
        }
        return !empty($parts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $parts) . ')' : 'NULL';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135DateExprForTable')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135DateExprForTable($db, $alias, $rawTable, &$dateColumnUsed = '')
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $dateColumnUsed = '';
        foreach (array('date_saved','generated_at','evaluated_at','user_local_datetime','created_at','updated_at','logged_at','event_at','run_at','assigned_at') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $dateColumnUsed = $col;
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                return 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $q . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
        }
        if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, 'target_draw_date')) {
            $dateColumnUsed = 'target_draw_date';
            $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date');
            return 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $q . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
        }
        return 'NULL';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr($db, $alias, $rawTable)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $l = function($col) use ($db, $rawTable, $prefix) {
            if (!mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, $col)) { return $db->quote(''); }
            return 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $prefix . $db->quoteName($col) . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')))';
        };
        $method = $l('analysis_method_key');
        $source = $l('source');
        $origin = $l('origin_source');
        $model = $l('model_family');
        $batch = $l('batch_type');
        $page = $l('analysis_source_page');
        $saveIntent = $l('save_intent');
        $settingsJson = $l('settings_json');
        $settings = $l('settings');
        return
            "CASE " .
            "WHEN (" . $source . " IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map') OR " . $origin . " IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map')) THEN 'frequency_heatmap' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . "='mcmc' OR " . $source . " LIKE '%mcmc%' OR " . $origin . " LIKE '%mcmc%' OR " . $model . "='mcmc') THEN 'mcmc' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . " IN ('skip_hit','skip','skiphit') OR " . $source . " LIKE '%skip%' OR " . $origin . " LIKE '%skip%') THEN 'skip_hit' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . " IN ('frequency','frequency_map','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap') OR " . $source . " LIKE '%heatmap%' OR " . $origin . " LIKE '%heatmap%' OR " . $source . " LIKE '%frequency%' OR " . $origin . " LIKE '%frequency%') THEN 'frequency_heatmap' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . "='core_ai' OR " . $source . " IN ('core_ai','core_ai_prediction','lottoexpert_core_ai','classic_ai','classic_ai_prediction','neural','neural_ai','neural_ai_prediction') OR " . $origin . " IN ('core_ai','core_ai_prediction','lottoexpert_core_ai','classic_ai','classic_ai_prediction','neural','neural_ai','neural_ai_prediction')) THEN 'core_ai' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . "='skai' OR " . $source . " IN ('skai','skai_prediction','skai_blend') OR " . $origin . " IN ('skai','skai_prediction','mle_precision_lock_batch') OR " . $model . "='skai' OR " . $batch . " LIKE '%skai%' OR " . $page . "='skai') THEN 'skai' " .
            "WHEN (" . $source . "='ai_prediction') THEN (CASE WHEN (" . $method . "='skai' OR " . $origin . " IN ('skai','skai_prediction','mle_precision_lock_batch') OR " . $model . "='skai' OR " . $batch . " LIKE '%skai%' OR " . $settingsJson . " LIKE '%skai_%' OR " . $settings . " LIKE '%skai_%') THEN 'skai' ELSE 'core_ai' END) " .
            "WHEN (" . $saveIntent . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate') OR " . $source . "='strategy_set' OR " . $origin . " IN ('manual','strategy_builder')) THEN 'strategy_manual' " .
            "WHEN (" . $method . "='strategy_set' OR " . $method . "='manual') THEN 'strategy_manual' " .
            "ELSE 'unknown' END";
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135SkaiClassWhere')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135SkaiClassWhere($db, $alias, $rawTable)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $methodExpr = mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr($db, $alias, $rawTable);
        $tests = array('(' . $methodExpr . " = 'skai')");
        foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','hive_learning_contract_version','hive_intake_mode') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $tests[] = '(' . $prefix . $db->quoteName($col) . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $prefix . $db->quoteName($col) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
            }
        }
        return '(' . implode(' OR ', $tests) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135JsonLooksValid')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135JsonLooksValid($value)
    {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '') { return true; }
        json_decode($value, true);
        return json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BuildSavedRowRoutingStatus')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135BuildSavedRowRoutingStatus(array $row)
    {
        $resolved = strtolower(trim((string)($row['resolved_method_key'] ?? 'unknown')));
        $method = strtolower(trim((string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')));
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
        $origin = strtolower(trim((string)($row['origin_source'] ?? '')));
        $saveIntent = strtolower(trim((string)($row['save_intent'] ?? '')));
        $playStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($row['play_status'] ?? '')));
        $gameId = trim((string)(($row['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($row['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($row['game_id'] ?? '')));
        $lotteryId = (int)(($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
        $runUuid = trim((string)($row['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $snapshotRunUuid = trim((string)($row['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $batchUuid = trim((string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $predictionTargetId = trim((string)($row['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
        $contractStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($row['hive_contract_status'] ?? '')));
        $heatmapLike = in_array($source, array('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map'), true)
            || in_array($origin, array('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map'), true);
        $sourceSaysSkai = in_array($source, array('skai','skai_prediction','skai_blend'), true)
            || in_array($origin, array('skai','skai_prediction','mle_precision_lock_batch'), true);
        $sourceSaysCoreAi = in_array($source, array('core_ai','core_ai_prediction','ai_prediction','neural_ai','classic_ai'), true)
            || in_array($origin, array('core_ai','core_ai_prediction','ai_prediction','neural_ai','classic_ai'), true);

        if ($playStatus === 'draft' || in_array($saveIntent, array('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate'), true)) { return 'Excluded intentionally'; }
        if ($gameId === '') { return 'Missing game_id'; }
        if ($lotteryId <= 0) { return 'Missing lottery_id'; }
        if ($heatmapLike && $resolved !== 'frequency_heatmap') { return 'Source/method conflict'; }
        if ($sourceSaysSkai && $resolved !== 'skai') { return 'Source/method conflict'; }
        if ($sourceSaysCoreAi && $resolved === 'skai') { return 'Source/method conflict'; }
        if ($method !== '' && $resolved !== 'unknown' && $method !== $resolved && !($method === 'frequency' && $resolved === 'frequency_heatmap') && !($method === 'strategy_set' && $resolved === 'strategy_manual')) { return 'Method conflict'; }
        if ($resolved === 'skai' && $contractStatus === '') { return 'Missing Hive contract'; }
        if ($resolved === 'skai' && $predictionTargetId === '') { return 'Missing prediction target'; }
        if ($resolved === 'skai' && $runUuid === '' && $snapshotRunUuid === '' && $batchUuid === '') { return 'Missing run identity'; }
        if ($resolved === 'unknown') { return 'Needs manual review'; }
        return 'OK';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BuildHiveExclusionReason')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135BuildHiveExclusionReason(array $row)
    {
        $resolved = strtolower(trim((string)($row['resolved_method_key'] ?? 'unknown')));
        $saveIntent = strtolower(trim((string)($row['save_intent'] ?? '')));
        $playStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($row['play_status'] ?? '')));
        $gameId = trim((string)(($row['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($row['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($row['game_id'] ?? '')));
        $lotteryId = (int)(($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
        $targetDrawDate = trim((string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $predictionTargetId = trim((string)($row['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
        $runUuid = trim((string)($row['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $snapshotRunUuid = trim((string)($row['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $batchUuid = trim((string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $contractStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($row['hive_contract_status'] ?? '')));

        if ($resolved !== 'skai') { return 'not_skai_class'; }
        if ($playStatus === 'draft') { return 'draft'; }
        if (in_array($saveIntent, array('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate'), true)) { return 'manual_custom_excluded'; }
        if ($gameId === '') { return 'missing_game_id'; }
        if ($lotteryId <= 0) { return 'missing_lottery_id'; }
        if ($predictionTargetId === '') { return 'missing_prediction_target'; }
        if ($runUuid === '' && $snapshotRunUuid === '' && $batchUuid === '') { return 'missing_run_identity'; }
        if ($targetDrawDate === '' || $targetDrawDate === '0000-00-00' || $targetDrawDate === '0000-00-00 00:00:00') { return 'missing_target_draw_date'; }
        if ($contractStatus === 'missing_required_fields') { return 'missing_required_fields'; }
        if ($contractStatus === '') { return 'blank_hive_contract_status'; }
        return 'eligible';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BackfillSkaiContractMissing')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135BackfillSkaiContractMissing($db, $limit = 500)
    {
        $limit = max(50, min(1500, (int)$limit));
        $raw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $raw)) { return array('updated'=>0,'scanned'=>0); }
        foreach (array('id','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_missing_json') as $required) {
            if (!mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, $required)) { return array('updated'=>0,'scanned'=>0); }
        }
        $select = array('id');
        foreach (array('source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','game_id','target_game_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','run_uuid','prediction_target_id','target_draw_date','hive_learning_contract_version','hive_intake_mode','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_missing_json','hive_contract_json','hive_settings_fingerprint') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, $col)) { $select[] = $col; }
        }
        $methodExpr = mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr($db, '', $raw);
        $db->setQuery(
            'SELECT ' . implode(',', array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $select)) .
            ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') .
            ' WHERE ' . $methodExpr . " = 'skai'" .
            ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
        );
        $rows = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
        $updated = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $r) {
            $missing = array();
            foreach (array('run_uuid','prediction_target_id','target_game_id','target_lottery_id','target_draw_date','hive_learning_contract_version','hive_intake_mode','hive_contract_json') as $k) {
                if (!array_key_exists($k, $r)) { continue; }
                $v = trim((string)$r[$k]);
                if ($v === '' || $v === '0' || $v === '0000-00-00' || $v === '0000-00-00 00:00:00') { $missing[] = $k; }
            }
            if (empty($missing)) { continue; }
            $status = strtolower(trim((string)($r['hive_contract_status'] ?? '')));
            if ($status === 'hive_ready' || $status === 'tracking_ready') { continue; }
            $db->setQuery(
                'UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') .
                ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('missing_required_fields') . ', ' .
                $db->quoteName('hive_contract_missing_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote(json_encode(array_values($missing), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)) .
                ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$r['id']
            );
            $db->execute();
            $updated++;
        }
        return array('updated'=>$updated,'scanned'=>count($rows));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135LoadForensicAuditData')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135LoadForensicAuditData($db, $limit = 50)
    {
        $limit = max(20, min(300, (int)$limit));
        $out = array(
            'warnings' => array(),
            'source_truth' => array(),
            'method_counts' => array(),
            'contract_counts' => array(),
            'contract_latest' => array(),
            'latest_saved_activity' => array(),
            'identity_mismatches' => array(),
            'routing_warnings' => array(),
            'cross_table_counts' => array(),
            'newest_activity_trace' => array(),
            'skai_sync' => array(
                'contract_counts' => array(),
                'runtime_mismatch' => array(),
                'runtime_without_save' => array(),
                'save_without_runtime' => array(),
                'events_without_save' => array(),
                'missing_fields' => array(),
                'settings_checks' => array(),
                'target_checks' => array()
            ),
            'hive_learning' => array(
                'counts' => array(),
                'excluded_reasons' => array(),
                'excluded_rows' => array()
            ),
            'sql_meta' => array()
        );
        $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'user_saved_numbers is missing.';
            return $out;
        }

        $activityExpr = mylottoexpertV135ActivityExpr($db, 's', $savedRaw);
        $methodExpr = mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr($db, 's', $savedRaw);
        $skaiWhere = mylottoexpertV135SkaiClassWhere($db, 's', $savedRaw);
        $out['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] = $activityExpr;
        $out['sql_meta']['saved_method_expr'] = $methodExpr;
        $out['sql_meta']['saved_skai_where'] = $skaiWhere;

        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT COUNT(*) AS all_time, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last_7_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS previous_7_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS usable_activity_date_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_activity_date_rows ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's')
            );
            $out['source_truth'] = (array)$db->loadAssoc();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Source truth counts failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT ' . $methodExpr . ' AS method_key, COUNT(*) AS all_time, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last_7_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS previous_7_rows ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') .
                ' GROUP BY method_key ORDER BY all_time DESC'
            );
            $out['method_counts'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Method counts failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'hive_contract_status')) {
            try {
                $statusExpr = "CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.hive_contract_status,''))) IN ('hive_ready','tracking_ready','missing_required_fields') THEN LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.hive_contract_status,''))) ELSE 'blank' END";
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $statusExpr . ' AS contract_status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY contract_status ORDER BY total DESC');
                $out['contract_counts'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $out['warnings'][] = 'Contract status counts failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        try {
            $wanted = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','date_saved','generated_at','target_draw_date','evaluation_status','hive_intake_mode','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_missing_json');
            $sel = array();
            foreach ($wanted as $c) {
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, $c)) { $sel[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c); }
            }
            if (!empty($sel)) {
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $sel) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ORDER BY s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 20');
                $out['contract_latest'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Contract latest rows failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            $routeSelect = array('s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' AS id', 's.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' AS user_id');
            foreach (array('source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','save_intent','play_status','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','hive_contract_status','hive_contract_json','hive_contract_missing_json','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key','target_draw_date','target_draw_at','target_draw_session','target_prediction_type','date_saved','generated_at','evaluation_status','settings_json','settings','hive_settings_fingerprint') as $c) {
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, $c)) { $routeSelect[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c); }
            }
            $routeSelect[] = $activityExpr . ' AS activity_at';
            $routeSelect[] = $methodExpr . ' AS resolved_method_key';
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $routeSelect) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ORDER BY s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT 500');
            $rows = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            $routingWarnings = array();
            $missingFieldsRows = array();
            $settingsRows = array();
            $targetRows = array();
            $latestSavedActivity = array();
            $identityMismatches = array();
            $runtimeByRun = array();
            $runtimeByBatch = array();
            $runtimeWithoutSave = array();
            $saveWithoutRuntime = array();
            $eventsWithoutSave = array();
            $savedRunMap = array();
            $savedBatchMap = array();
            $savedPredictionTargetMap = array();
            $lotteryGameMap = array();
            $fingerprintMap = array();

            $lotteriesRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'lotteries';
            if (mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $lotteriesRaw) && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $lotteriesRaw, 'game_id')) {
                $lotteryIdCol = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $lotteriesRaw, 'lottery_id') ? 'lottery_id' : (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $lotteriesRaw, 'id') ? 'id' : '');
                if ($lotteryIdCol !== '') {
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName($lotteryIdCol) . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' AS game_id FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__lotteries') . ' WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) <> ' . $db->quote(''));
                    foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $lotteryRow) {
                        $lotteryGameMap[strtolower(trim((string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? '')))] = (int)($lotteryRow['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                    }
                }
            }

            foreach ($rows as $r) {
                $id = (int)($r['id'] ?? 0);
                $source = strtolower(trim((string)($r['source'] ?? '')));
                $origin = strtolower(trim((string)($r['origin_source'] ?? '')));
                $method = strtolower(trim((string)($r['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')));
                $resolved = strtolower(trim((string)($r['resolved_method_key'] ?? 'unknown')));
                $routingStatus = function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BuildSavedRowRoutingStatus') ? mylottoexpertV135BuildSavedRowRoutingStatus($r) : 'OK';
                $hiveExclusionReason = function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BuildHiveExclusionReason') ? mylottoexpertV135BuildHiveExclusionReason($r) : 'eligible';
                $r['routing_status'] = $routingStatus;
                $r['hive_exclusion_reason'] = $hiveExclusionReason;
                $latestSavedActivity[] = $r;

                $runUuid = trim((string)($r['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $snapUuid = trim((string)($r['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $batchUuid = trim((string)($r['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $predictionTargetId = trim((string)($r['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
                foreach (array($runUuid, $snapUuid) as $savedRunKey) {
                    if ($savedRunKey !== '') { $savedRunMap[$savedRunKey] = $id; }
                }
                if ($batchUuid !== '') { $savedBatchMap[$batchUuid] = $id; }
                if ($predictionTargetId !== '') { $savedPredictionTargetMap[$predictionTargetId] = $id; }

                if (($source === 'heatmap_manual' || $origin === 'heatmap_manual') && $resolved !== 'frequency_heatmap') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'source/origin heatmap but resolved method is not frequency_heatmap');
                }
                if (($source === 'core_ai' || $origin === 'core_ai' || $source === 'ai_prediction') && $resolved === 'skai') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Core AI source appears resolved as SKAI; review ai_prediction context');
                }
                if (($source === 'skai' || $origin === 'skai' || $source === 'skai_prediction') && $resolved !== 'skai') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'SKAI source/origin conflicts with resolved method');
                }
                if ($routingStatus !== 'OK' && $routingStatus !== 'Excluded intentionally' && $routingStatus !== 'Needs manual review') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>strtolower($routingStatus));
                }

                $lotteryId = (int)(($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0) ?: ($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
                $gameId = trim((string)(($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') !== '' ? ($r['target_game_id'] ?? '') : ($r['game_id'] ?? '')));
                $baseGameId = trim((string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                $baseLotteryId = (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                $targetGameId = trim((string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
                $targetLotteryId = (int)($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);

                if ($lotteryId > 0 && $gameId === '') {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows with lottery_id but no game_id');
                }
                if ($lotteryId <= 0 && $gameId !== '') {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows with game_id but no lottery_id');
                }
                if ($targetGameId !== '' && $baseGameId !== '' && strtolower($targetGameId) !== strtolower($baseGameId)) {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows where target_game_id differs from game_id');
                }
                if ($targetLotteryId > 0 && $baseLotteryId > 0 && $targetLotteryId !== $baseLotteryId) {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows where target_lottery_id differs from lottery_id');
                }
                if ($targetGameId === '' && $baseGameId !== '') {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows where target_game_id is blank but game_id exists');
                }
                if ($targetLotteryId <= 0 && $baseLotteryId > 0) {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows where target_lottery_id is blank but lottery_id exists');
                }
                if ($gameId !== '' && isset($lotteryGameMap[strtolower($gameId)]) && $lotteryId > 0 && (int)$lotteryGameMap[strtolower($gameId)] !== $lotteryId) {
                    $identityMismatches[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'Rows where game_id resolves to a different lottery_id than the saved lottery_id');
                }
                if ((int)($r['batch_total'] ?? 0) > 1 && $batchUuid === '') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'batch_total > 1 but batch_uuid missing');
                }
                if ($batchUuid !== '' && (int)($r['batch_index'] ?? 0) <= 0) {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'batch_uuid present but batch_index missing');
                }
                if ((int)($r['batch_total'] ?? 0) > 0 && (int)($r['batch_index'] ?? 0) > (int)($r['batch_total'] ?? 0)) {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'batch_index is outside 1..batch_total');
                }
                if ($predictionTargetId !== '' && trim((string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? '')) === '') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'prediction_target_id present but target fields are incomplete');
                }
                if ((string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? '') === '0000-00-00') {
                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'target_draw_date is Joomla null-date sentinel');
                }

                if ($resolved === 'skai') {
                    $required = array('run_uuid','prediction_target_id','target_game_id','target_lottery_id','target_draw_date','hive_contract_status');
                    $missing = array();
                    foreach ($required as $k) {
                        $v = trim((string)($r[$k] ?? ''));
                        if ($v === '' || $v === '0' || $v === '0000-00-00') { $missing[] = $k; }
                    }
                    $missingFieldsRows[] = array(
                        'id'=>$id,
                        'user_id'=>(int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0),
                        'source'=>(string)($r['source'] ?? ''),
                        'origin_source'=>(string)($r['origin_source'] ?? ''),
                        'analysis_method_key'=>(string)($r['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
                        'game_id'=>(string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''),
                        'target_game_id'=>(string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
                        'lottery_id'=>(string)($r['lottery_id'] ?? ''),
                        'target_lottery_id'=>(string)($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? ''),
                        'run_uuid'=>$runUuid,
                        'snapshot_run_uuid'=>$snapUuid,
                        'batch_uuid'=>$batchUuid,
                        'batch_index'=>(string)($r['batch_index'] ?? ''),
                        'batch_total'=>(string)($r['batch_total'] ?? ''),
                        'prediction_target_id'=>$predictionTargetId,
                        'target_draw_date'=>(string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                        'evaluation_status'=>(string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? ''),
                        'hive_contract_status'=>(string)($r['hive_contract_status'] ?? ''),
                        'hive_contract_missing_json'=>(string)($r['hive_contract_missing_json'] ?? ''),
                        'missing_fields'=>$missing
                    );
                }

                $settingsJson = (string)($r['settings_json'] ?? '');
                $settingsRaw = (string)($r['settings'] ?? '');
                $fingerprint = trim((string)($r['hive_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''));
                $contractJson = (string)($r['hive_contract_json'] ?? '');
                if ($settingsJson !== '' || $settingsRaw !== '' || $contractJson !== '') {
                    $settingsRows[] = array(
                        'id'=>$id,
                        'settings_json_valid'=>mylottoexpertV135JsonLooksValid($settingsJson) ? 1 : 0,
                        'settings_valid'=>mylottoexpertV135JsonLooksValid($settingsRaw) ? 1 : 0,
                        'hive_contract_json_valid'=>mylottoexpertV135JsonLooksValid($contractJson) ? 1 : 0,
                        'hive_settings_fingerprint'=>$fingerprint
                    );
                    $settingsBlob = $settingsJson !== '' ? $settingsJson : $settingsRaw;
                    if ($settingsBlob !== '') {
                        $normHash = hash('sha256', strtolower(trim((string)$settingsBlob)));
                        if ($fingerprint !== '') {
                            if (!isset($fingerprintMap[$fingerprint])) {
                                $fingerprintMap[$fingerprint] = array('settings_hash'=>$normHash,'ids'=>array($id));
                            } else {
                                $fingerprintMap[$fingerprint]['ids'][] = $id;
                                if ($fingerprintMap[$fingerprint]['settings_hash'] !== $normHash) {
                                    $routingWarnings[] = array('id'=>$id,'reason'=>'distinct settings appear to share the same hive_settings_fingerprint');
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                $targetRows[] = array(
                    'id'=>$id,
                    'prediction_target_id'=>$predictionTargetId,
                    'target_draw_date'=>(string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                    'target_game_id'=>(string)($r['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
                    'target_lottery_id'=>(string)($r['target_lottery_id'] ?? ''),
                    'game_id'=>(string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''),
                    'lottery_id'=>(string)($r['lottery_id'] ?? ''),
                    'target_draw_at'=>(string)($r['target_draw_at'] ?? ''),
                    'target_draw_session'=>(string)($r['target_draw_session'] ?? ''),
                    'target_prediction_type'=>(string)($r['target_prediction_type'] ?? ''),
                    'prediction_target_key'=>(string)($r['prediction_target_key'] ?? '')
                );
            }

            foreach (array('skai_run_log','skai_runtime_audit') as $rt) {
                $rawRt = $db->getPrefix() . $rt;
                if (!mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $rawRt)) { continue; }
                $rtSel = array();
                foreach (array('id','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','created_at') as $c) {
                    if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawRt, $c)) { $rtSel[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
                }
                if (empty($rtSel)) { continue; }
                $orderCol = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawRt, 'id') ? $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC' : (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $rawRt, 'created_at') ? $db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC' : '1');
