                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $rtSel) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $rt) . ' ORDER BY ' . $orderCol . ' LIMIT 500');
                foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $rtRow) {
                    $matched = false;
                    foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid') as $rk) {
                        $v = trim((string)($rtRow[$rk] ?? ''));
                        if ($v !== '') {
                            $runtimeByRun[$v] = true;
                            if (isset($savedRunMap[$v])) { $matched = true; }
                        }
                    }
                    $bv = trim((string)($rtRow['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
                    if ($bv !== '') {
                        $runtimeByBatch[$bv] = true;
                        if (isset($savedBatchMap[$bv])) { $matched = true; }
                    }
                    if (!$matched) { $runtimeWithoutSave[] = array_merge(array('table'=>$rt), $rtRow); }
                }
            }

            foreach ($latestSavedActivity as $savedRow) {
                if (strtolower(trim((string)($savedRow['resolved_method_key'] ?? 'unknown'))) !== 'skai') { continue; }
                $runUuid = trim((string)($savedRow['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $snapUuid = trim((string)($savedRow['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $batchUuid = trim((string)($savedRow['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
                $hasRuntime = false;
                if ($runUuid !== '' && isset($runtimeByRun[$runUuid])) { $hasRuntime = true; }
                if ($snapUuid !== '' && isset($runtimeByRun[$snapUuid])) { $hasRuntime = true; }
                if ($batchUuid !== '' && isset($runtimeByBatch[$batchUuid])) { $hasRuntime = true; }
                if (!$hasRuntime) { $saveWithoutRuntime[] = $savedRow; }
            }

            if (mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_events')) {
                $eventSel = array();
                foreach (array('id','user_id','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid','prediction_target_id','created_at') as $c) {
                    if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_events', $c)) { $eventSel[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
                }
                if (!empty($eventSel)) {
                    $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $eventSel) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events') . ' ORDER BY ' . (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_events', 'id') ? $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC' : $db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC') . ' LIMIT 500');
                    foreach ((array)$db->loadAssocList() as $eventRow) {
                        $matched = false;
                        foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid','prediction_target_id') as $matchKey) {
                            $v = trim((string)($eventRow[$matchKey] ?? ''));
                            if ($v === '') { continue; }
                            if (in_array($matchKey, array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid'), true) && isset($savedRunMap[$v])) { $matched = true; break; }
                            if ($matchKey === 'batch_uuid' && isset($savedBatchMap[$v])) { $matched = true; break; }
                            if ($matchKey === 'prediction_target_id' && isset($savedPredictionTargetMap[$v])) { $matched = true; break; }
                        }
                        if (!$matched) { $eventsWithoutSave[] = $eventRow; }
                    }
                }
            }

            $out['routing_warnings'] = array_slice($routingWarnings, 0, 100);
            $out['latest_saved_activity'] = array_slice($latestSavedActivity, 0, 100);
            $out['identity_mismatches'] = array_slice($identityMismatches, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['missing_fields'] = array_slice($missingFieldsRows, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['settings_checks'] = array_slice($settingsRows, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['target_checks'] = array_slice($targetRows, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['runtime_without_save'] = array_slice($runtimeWithoutSave, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['save_without_runtime'] = array_slice($saveWithoutRuntime, 0, 100);
            $out['skai_sync']['events_without_save'] = array_slice($eventsWithoutSave, 0, 100);
            $out['hive_learning']['excluded_rows'] = array_slice(array_values(array_filter($latestSavedActivity, function($row) {
                return strtolower(trim((string)($row['resolved_method_key'] ?? 'unknown'))) === 'skai'
                    && trim((string)($row['hive_exclusion_reason'] ?? 'eligible')) !== 'eligible';
            })), 0, 100);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Routing mismatch audit failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            $savedDateCol = '';
            $savedDateExpr = mylottoexpertV135DateExprForTable($db, 's', $savedRaw, $savedDateCol);
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT COUNT(*) AS skai_all_time, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_today, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_yesterday, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_last_7, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 DAY) AND DATE(' . $savedDateExpr . ') < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_prev_7, ' .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'run_uuid') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_run_uuid, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ", '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_run_uuid, " : '0 AS has_run_uuid, 0 AS missing_run_uuid, ') .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_uuid') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_batch_uuid, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ", '') = '' AND COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('batch_total') . ",0) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_batch_uuid_for_multi, " : '0 AS has_batch_uuid, 0 AS missing_batch_uuid_for_multi, ') .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'prediction_target_id') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_prediction_target_id, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ", '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_prediction_target_id, " : '0 AS has_prediction_target_id, 0 AS missing_prediction_target_id, ') .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_game_id') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_target_game_id, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ", '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_target_game_id, " : '0 AS has_target_game_id, 0 AS missing_target_game_id, ') .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'hive_contract_status') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_hive_contract_status, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ", '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_hive_contract_status, " : '0 AS has_hive_contract_status, 0 AS missing_hive_contract_status, ') .
                (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'hive_contract_json') ? 'SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_json') . ", '') <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_hive_contract_json, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_json') . ", '') = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_hive_contract_json " : '0 AS has_hive_contract_json, 0 AS missing_hive_contract_json ') .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' WHERE ' . $skaiWhere
            );
            $out['skai_sync']['contract_counts'] = (array)$db->loadAssoc();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'SKAI contract counts failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_game_id') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'game_id')) {
                $gameExprSql = 'TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '), ' . $db->quote('') . '))';
            } elseif (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_game_id')) {
                $gameExprSql = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))';
            } elseif (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'game_id')) {
                $gameExprSql = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))';
            } else {
                $gameExprSql = $db->quote('');
            }
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_lottery_id') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'lottery_id')) {
                $lotteryExprSql = 'COALESCE(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0), NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0), 0)';
            } elseif (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_lottery_id')) {
                $lotteryExprSql = 'COALESCE(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0),0)';
            } elseif (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'lottery_id')) {
                $lotteryExprSql = 'COALESCE(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0),0)';
            } else {
                $lotteryExprSql = '0';
            }
            $drawExprSql = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'target_draw_date')
                ? 'TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(s.' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('') . '))'
                : $db->quote('');
            $predictionTargetSql = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'prediction_target_id')
                ? 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . '))'
                : $db->quote('');
            $runIdentityParts = array();
            foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid') as $identityCol) {
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, $identityCol)) {
                    $runIdentityParts[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName($identityCol) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) <> ' . $db->quote('');
                }
            }
            $runIdentitySql = !empty($runIdentityParts) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $runIdentityParts) . ')' : '0';
            $saveIntentSql = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'save_intent') ? 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')))' : $db->quote('');
            $playStatusSql = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'play_status') ? 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('play_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')))' : $db->quote('');
            $contractStatusSql = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'hive_contract_status') ? 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')))' : $db->quote('');
            $excludedCaseSql =
                "CASE " .
                "WHEN " . $playStatusSql . " = 'draft' THEN 'draft' " .
                "WHEN " . $saveIntentSql . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate') THEN 'manual_custom_excluded' " .
                "WHEN " . $gameExprSql . " = '' THEN 'missing_game_id' " .
                "WHEN " . $lotteryExprSql . " <= 0 THEN 'missing_lottery_id' " .
                "WHEN " . $predictionTargetSql . " = '' THEN 'missing_prediction_target' " .
                "WHEN NOT " . $runIdentitySql . " THEN 'missing_run_identity' " .
                "WHEN " . $drawExprSql . " = '' THEN 'missing_target_draw_date' " .
                "WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = 'missing_required_fields' THEN 'missing_required_fields' " .
                "WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = '' THEN 'blank_hive_contract_status' " .
                "ELSE 'eligible' END";
            $scoredPartsSql = array();
            if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'evaluation_status')) {
                $scoredPartsSql[] = 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . "))) IN ('scored','evaluated','complete','completed','final','checked','result_checked','learned')";
            }
            foreach (array('evaluated_at','actual_draw_date') as $dateScoredCol) {
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, $dateScoredCol)) {
                    $scoredPartsSql[] = '(s.' . $db->quoteName($dateScoredCol) . ' IS NOT NULL AND s.' . $db->quoteName($dateScoredCol) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND s.' . $db->quoteName($dateScoredCol) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND s.' . $db->quoteName($dateScoredCol) . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
                }
            }
            $scoredSql = !empty($scoredPartsSql) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $scoredPartsSql) . ')' : '0';

            $buildExistsSql = function($tableName, $tableAlias) use ($db, $savedRaw) {
                $otherRaw = $db->getPrefix() . $tableName;
                if (!mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $otherRaw)) { return '0'; }
                $conds = array();
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'run_uuid') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'run_uuid')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ')';
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'run_uuid') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'snapshot_run_uuid')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ')';
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'snapshot_run_uuid') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'run_uuid')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ')';
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'snapshot_run_uuid') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'snapshot_run_uuid')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('snapshot_run_uuid') . ')';
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_uuid') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'batch_uuid')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ')';
                }
                if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'prediction_target_id') && mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $otherRaw, 'prediction_target_id')) {
                    $conds[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(s." . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ", '')) <> '' AND s." . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ' = ' . $tableAlias . '.' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ')';
                }
                if (empty($conds)) { return '0'; }
                return 'EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $tableName, $tableAlias) . ' WHERE ' . implode(' OR ', $conds) . ')';
            };

            $learningEventExistsSql = $buildExistsSql('skai_learning_events', 'le');
            $learningPerfExistsSql = $buildExistsSql('skai_learning_performance', 'lp');

            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_skai_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $excludedCaseSql . " = 'eligible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS eligible_for_hive_intake, " .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $excludedCaseSql . " <> 'eligible' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excluded_from_hive_intake, " .
                "SUM(CASE WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = 'hive_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hive_ready_rows, " .
                "SUM(CASE WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = 'tracking_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tracking_ready_rows, " .
                "SUM(CASE WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = 'missing_required_fields' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_required_fields_rows, " .
                "SUM(CASE WHEN " . $contractStatusSql . " = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS blank_hive_contract_status_rows, " .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $learningEventExistsSql . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS learning_event_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $learningPerfExistsSql . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS learning_performance_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN NOT ' . $scoredSql . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_evaluation_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredSql . ' AND ' . $drawExprSql . " <> '' AND DATE(" . $drawExprSql . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evaluated_after_draw_rows ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' WHERE ' . $skaiWhere
            );
            $out['hive_learning']['counts'] = (array)$db->loadAssoc();

            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT excluded_reason, COUNT(*) AS total FROM (' .
                'SELECT ' . $excludedCaseSql . ' AS excluded_reason FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') .
                ' WHERE ' . $skaiWhere .
                ') z GROUP BY excluded_reason ORDER BY total DESC'
            );
            $out['hive_learning']['excluded_reasons'] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Hive learning verification failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            $tables = array(
                'user_saved_numbers' => array('required'=>array('id','user_id')),
                'skai_run_log' => array('required'=>array('run_uuid')),
                'skai_runtime_audit' => array('required'=>array('run_uuid')),
                'skai_learning_events' => array('required'=>array('user_id')),
                'skai_learning_performance' => array('required'=>array('user_id')),
                'mle_skai_batch_header' => array('required'=>array('batch_uuid')),
                'mle_skai_batch_run' => array('required'=>array('batch_uuid')),
                'mle_lottery_research_queue' => array('required'=>array('id')),
                'mle_lottery_research_assignments' => array('required'=>array('id'))
            );
            foreach ($tables as $t => $meta) {
                $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $t;
                $exists = mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $raw);
                $row = array(
                    'table' => '#__' . $t,
                    'exists' => $exists ? 1 : 0,
                    'required_columns_ok' => 0,
                    'date_column_used' => '',
                    'all_time' => 0,
                    'today' => 0,
                    'yesterday' => 0,
                    'last_7' => 0,
                    'previous_7' => 0,
                    'latest_activity' => ''
                );
                if ($exists) {
                    $requiredOk = true;
                    foreach ((array)($meta['required'] ?? array()) as $rc) {
                        if (!mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, $rc)) { $requiredOk = false; break; }
                    }
                    $row['required_columns_ok'] = $requiredOk ? 1 : 0;
                    $dateCol = '';
                    $dateExpr = mylottoexpertV135DateExprForTable($db, 'x', $raw, $dateCol);
                    $row['date_column_used'] = $dateCol;
                    $db->setQuery(
                        'SELECT COUNT(*) AS all_time, ' .
                        'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_rows, ' .
                        'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_rows, ' .
                        'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS last_7_rows, ' .
                        'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 DAY) AND DATE(' . $dateExpr . ') < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS previous_7_rows, ' .
                        'MAX(' . $dateExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
                        'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $t, 'x')
                    );
                    $c = (array)$db->loadAssoc();
                    $row['all_time'] = (int)($c['all_time'] ?? 0);
                    $row['today'] = (int)($c['today_rows'] ?? 0);
                    $row['yesterday'] = (int)($c['yesterday_rows'] ?? 0);
                    $row['last_7'] = (int)($c['last_7_rows'] ?? 0);
                    $row['previous_7'] = (int)($c['previous_7_rows'] ?? 0);
                    $row['latest_activity'] = (string)($c['latest_activity'] ?? '');
                }
                $out['cross_table_counts'][] = $row;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Cross-table counts failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        try {
            foreach (array('user_saved_numbers','skai_run_log','skai_runtime_audit','skai_learning_events','skai_learning_performance','mle_skai_batch_header','mle_skai_batch_run') as $t) {
                $raw = $db->getPrefix() . $t;
                if (!mylottoexpertV135TableExists($db, $raw)) { continue; }
                $sel = array();
                foreach (array('id','user_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','prediction_target_id','target_draw_date','date_saved','generated_at','created_at') as $c) {
                    if (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, $c)) { $sel[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
                }
                if (empty($sel)) { continue; }
                $order = mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, 'id') ? $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC' : (mylottoexpertV135HasColumn($db, $raw, 'created_at') ? $db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC' : '1');
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $sel) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $t) . ' ORDER BY ' . $order . ' LIMIT 50');
                $out['newest_activity_trace'][$t] = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['warnings'][] = 'Newest activity trace failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135RenderForensicAuditPanels')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135RenderForensicAuditPanels($db, $limit = 50, array $dashboardTotals = array())
    {
        $isSuper = false;
        try {
            $auditUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
            $isSuper = is_object($auditUser) && method_exists($auditUser, 'authorise') && $auditUser->authorise('core.admin');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $isSuper = false;
        }
        if (!$isSuper) { return ''; }
        $data = mylottoexpertV135LoadForensicAuditData($db, $limit);
        $methodToday = array(
            'skai' => 0,
            'core_ai' => 0,
            'frequency_heatmap' => 0,
            'mcmc' => 0,
            'skip_hit' => 0,
            'strategy_manual' => 0,
            'unknown' => 0
        );
        foreach ((array)$data['method_counts'] as $methodRow) {
            $methodKey = strtolower(trim((string)($methodRow['method_key'] ?? 'unknown')));
            if (!isset($methodToday[$methodKey])) { $methodToday[$methodKey] = 0; }
            $methodToday[$methodKey] = (int)($methodRow['today_rows'] ?? 0);
        }
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section class="mle-ci-layer-card" style="margin-top:1rem; border:2px solid #93c5fd;" aria-label="Hive Learning Forensic Audit">
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__head">
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__eyebrow">Hive Learning Forensic Audit</span>
            <span class="mle-ci-layer-card__title">Source-truth SKAI <-> MyLottoExpert routing and cross-table diagnostics</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mle-ci-layer-card__body">
            <?php foreach ((array)$data['warnings'] as $w): ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-insight-item2" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;"><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__label">Warning</span><span class="mle-ci-insight-item2__value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$w, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
            <details style="margin-top:.5rem;">
              <summary><strong>Source Truth Counts</strong></summary>
              <?php $st = (array)$data['source_truth']; $t=(int)($st['today_rows']??0); $y=(int)($st['yesterday_rows']??0); $w=(int)($st['last_7_rows']??0); $pw=(int)($st['previous_7_rows']??0); ?>
              <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-top:.7rem;">
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">All time</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($st['all_time'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Today</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo $t; ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Yesterday</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo $y; ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Today vs Yesterday</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo ($t-$y); ?></span></div>
              </div>
              <div class="mle-ci-decision-band" style="margin-top:.5rem;">
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Last 7</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo $w; ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Previous 7</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo $pw; ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">7d delta</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo ($w-$pw); ?></span></div>
                <div class="mle-ci-kpi"><span class="mle-ci-kpi__label">Usable activity date</span><span class="mle-ci-kpi__value"><?php echo (int)($st['usable_activity_date_rows'] ?? 0); ?></span></div>
              </div>
              <p class="mle-ci-panel__text" style="margin-top:.5rem;">Missing/invalid activity date rows: <?php echo (int)($st['missing_activity_date_rows'] ?? 0); ?>. Date SQL: <code><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($data['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></code></p>
              <?php
                $dashboardChecks = array(
                    array('label'=>'All saved rows', 'dashboard'=>(int)($dashboardTotals['site_saved_rows'] ?? 0), 'raw'=>(int)($st['all_time'] ?? 0), 'source'=>'#__user_saved_numbers', 'date_field'=>'all rows', 'filter'=>'all saved rows'),
                    array('label'=>'Today saved rows', 'dashboard'=>(int)($dashboardTotals['today_rows'] ?? 0), 'raw'=>$t, 'source'=>'#__user_saved_numbers', 'date_field'=>(string)($data['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] ?? ''), 'filter'=>'DATE(saved_activity_expr)=CURDATE()'),
                    array('label'=>'Yesterday saved rows', 'dashboard'=>(int)($dashboardTotals['yesterday_rows'] ?? 0), 'raw'=>$y, 'source'=>'#__user_saved_numbers', 'date_field'=>(string)($data['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] ?? ''), 'filter'=>'DATE(saved_activity_expr)=CURDATE()-1'),
                    array('label'=>'Last 7 days', 'dashboard'=>(int)($dashboardTotals['current_7d_rows'] ?? 0), 'raw'=>$w, 'source'=>'#__user_saved_numbers', 'date_field'=>(string)($data['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] ?? ''), 'filter'=>'calendar last 7 days'),
                    array('label'=>'Previous 7 days', 'dashboard'=>(int)($dashboardTotals['previous_7d_rows'] ?? 0), 'raw'=>$pw, 'source'=>'#__user_saved_numbers', 'date_field'=>(string)($data['sql_meta']['saved_activity_expr'] ?? ''), 'filter'=>'previous calendar 7 days')
                );
              ?>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
                <?php foreach ($dashboardChecks as $check): ?>
                  <?php $matchText = ((int)$check['dashboard'] === (int)$check['raw']) ? 'match' : 'mismatch'; ?>

(string)$check['filter'] . (((int)$check['dashboard'] === (int)$check['raw']) ? '' : ' | explanation=dashboard total differs from direct source-truth query and should be reviewed'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span></div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
              </div>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.75rem;">

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $column)
    {
        static $cache = array();
        $key = (string)$table;
        if (!isset($cache[$key])) {
            try {
                $cols = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
                $cache[$key] = is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $cache[$key] = array();
            }
        }
        return in_array((string)$column, (array)$cache[$key], true);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134TableExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134TableExists($db, $table)
    {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SHOW TABLES LIKE ' . $db->quote($table));
            return (string)$db->loadResult() !== '';
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134NullIfBlankSql')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134NullIfBlankSql($db, $sql)
    {
        return 'NULLIF(' . $sql . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134SavedActivityExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134SavedActivityExpr($db, $alias)
    {
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV135ActivityExpr')) {
            return mylottoexpertV135ActivityExpr($db, $alias, $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers');
        }
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        return $prefix . $db->quoteName('date_saved');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134LotteryExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134LotteryExpr($db, $alias)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $parts = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'target_lottery_id')) { $parts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $prefix . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'lottery_id')) { $parts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $prefix . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0)'; }
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($parts, array('0'))) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134GameExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134GameExpr($db, $alias)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $parts = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'target_game_id')) { $parts[] = mylottoexpertV134NullIfBlankSql($db, $prefix . $db->quoteName('target_game_id')); }
        if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'game_id')) { $parts[] = mylottoexpertV134NullIfBlankSql($db, $prefix . $db->quoteName('game_id')); }
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', array_merge($parts, array($db->quote('')))) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134DrawDateExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134DrawDateExpr($db, $alias)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $parts = array();
        foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) {
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                $parts[] = 'NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $q . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
        }
        return !empty($parts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $parts) . ')' : 'NULL';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134ScoredWhere')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134ScoredWhere($db, $alias)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $tests = array();
        if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'evaluation_status')) {
            $tests[] = $prefix . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('scored') . ',' . $db->quote('evaluated') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('final') . ',' . $db->quote('checked') . ')';
        }
        foreach (array('evaluated_at','actual_draw_date') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) {
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                $tests[] = '(' . $q . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $q . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' AND ' . $q . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ' AND ' . $q . ' <> ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
        }
        foreach (array('main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','main_matches','bonus_matches','learning_score') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) {
                $tests[] = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col) . ' IS NOT NULL';
            }
        }
        foreach (array('matched_numbers','actual_main_numbers','actual_extra_numbers','evaluation_json') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) {
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                $tests[] = '(' . $q . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $q . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
            }
        }
        return !empty($tests) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $tests) . ')' : '0=1';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134SettingsWhere')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134SettingsWhere($db, $alias)
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $tests = array();
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings','full_settings_json','digit_probabilities','position_combinations') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) {
                $q = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
                $tests[] = '(' . $q . ' IS NOT NULL AND ' . $q . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
            }
        }
        foreach (array('sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','skai_window_size','freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight','walks','epochs') as $col) {
            if (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, $col)) { $tests[] = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col) . ' IS NOT NULL'; }
        }
        return !empty($tests) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $tests) . ')' : '0=1';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134SkaiWhere')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134SkaiWhere($db, $alias)
    {
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV135SkaiClassWhere')) {
            return mylottoexpertV135SkaiClassWhere($db, $alias, $table);
        }
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        return $prefix . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134MethodExpr')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134MethodExpr($db, $alias)
    {
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr')) {
            return mylottoexpertV135ResolvedMethodExpr($db, $alias, $table);
        }
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? $alias . '.' : '';
        return 'COALESCE(' . $prefix . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ', ' . $db->quote('unknown') . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134ResolveSimpleLotteryParts')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134ResolveSimpleLotteryParts($db, $lotteryId, $gameId)
    {
        $label = function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel') ? mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)$lotteryId, (string)$gameId) : ('Lottery ' . (int)$lotteryId);
        $region = 'Other / Unknown';
        $name = $label;
        if (strpos($label, ' - ') !== false) {
            $parts = explode(' - ', $label);
            if (count($parts) >= 3) {
                $name = array_pop($parts);
                $region = implode(' - ', $parts);
            } elseif (count($parts) === 2) {
                $region = $parts[0];
                $name = $parts[1];
            }
        }
        return array($label, $region, $name);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV134PatchAdminOperatingViewData')) {
    function mylottoexpertV134PatchAdminOperatingViewData($db, array $intel, $limit)
    {
        $limit = max(20, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $table = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mylottoexpertV134TableExists($db, $table)) { return $intel; }
        $totals = (array)($intel['totals'] ?? array());
        $lotteryExpr = mylottoexpertV134LotteryExpr($db, 's');
        $gameExpr = mylottoexpertV134GameExpr($db, 's');
        $activityExpr = mylottoexpertV134SavedActivityExpr($db, 's');
        $drawExpr = mylottoexpertV134DrawDateExpr($db, 's');
        $scoredWhere = mylottoexpertV134ScoredWhere($db, 's');
        $settingsWhere = mylottoexpertV134SettingsWhere($db, 's');
        $skaiWhere = mylottoexpertV134SkaiWhere($db, 's');
        $methodExpr = mylottoexpertV134MethodExpr($db, 's');
        $unscoredWhere = '(NOT ' . $scoredWhere . ')';
        $needsCheckWhere = '(' . $drawExpr . ' IS NOT NULL AND DATE(' . $drawExpr . ') <= CURDATE() AND ' . $unscoredWhere . ')';
        $waitingWhere = '(' . $drawExpr . ' IS NOT NULL AND DATE(' . $drawExpr . ') > CURDATE() AND ' . $unscoredWhere . ')';
        $missingDrawWhere = '(' . $drawExpr . ' IS NULL AND ' . $unscoredWhere . ')';

        try {
            $db->setQuery(
                'SELECT COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS users, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $skaiWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS skai_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $needsCheckWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS needs_result_check, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $waitingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waiting_for_drawing, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $missingDrawWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_drawing_info, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_7d, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_24h, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS today_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') <= CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS current_7d_rows, ' .
                'SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 13 DAY) AND DATE(' . $activityExpr . ') < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS previous_7d_rows ' .
                'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's')
            );
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row)) {
                $totals['site_saved_rows'] = (int)($row['saved_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['site_users'] = (int)($row['users'] ?? 0);
                $totals['site_skai_rows'] = (int)($row['skai_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['settings_rows'] = (int)($row['settings_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['scored_evidence'] = (int)($row['checked_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['pending_to_score'] = (int)($row['needs_result_check'] ?? 0);
                $totals['future_pending_draws'] = (int)($row['waiting_for_drawing'] ?? 0);
                $totals['missing_drawing_info'] = (int)($row['missing_drawing_info'] ?? 0);
                $totals['recent_7d_rows'] = (int)($row['recent_7d'] ?? 0);
                $totals['recent_24h_rows'] = (int)($row['recent_24h'] ?? 0);
                $totals['today_rows'] = (int)($row['today_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['yesterday_rows'] = (int)($row['yesterday_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['current_7d_rows'] = (int)($row['current_7d_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['previous_7d_rows'] = (int)($row['previous_7d_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['today_rows'] = (int)($row['today_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['yesterday_rows'] = (int)($row['yesterday_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['current_7d_rows'] = (int)($row['current_7d_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['previous_7d_rows'] = (int)($row['previous_7d_rows'] ?? 0);
                $totals['unscored_rows'] = (int)$totals['pending_to_score'] + (int)$totals['future_pending_draws'] + (int)$totals['missing_drawing_info'];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $intel['warnings'][] = 'v134 source-truth totals fallback failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
        }

        if (empty($intel['latest_saved_rows']) && (int)($totals['site_saved_rows'] ?? 0) > 0) {
            try {
                $select = array(
                    's.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' AS id',
                    's.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' AS user_id',
                    $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id',
                    $gameExpr . ' AS game_id',
                    $methodExpr . ' AS method_key',
                    (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'label') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('label') : $db->quote('')) . ' AS label_text',
                    (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'evaluation_status') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') : $db->quote('pending')) . ' AS evaluation_status',
                    (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'date_saved') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('date_saved') : 'NULL') . ' AS date_saved',
                    (mylottoexpertV134ColumnExists($db, $table, 'generated_at') ? 's.' . $db->quoteName('generated_at') : 'NULL') . ' AS generated_at',
                    $drawExpr . ' AS target_draw_date',
                    $activityExpr . ' AS activity_at'
                );
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' ORDER BY s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                foreach ((array)$rows as &$r) {
                    $r['resolved_lottery_label'] = function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel') ? mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '')) : ('Lottery ' . (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
                }
                unset($r);
                $intel['latest_saved_rows'] = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $intel['warnings'][] = 'v134 latest saved rows fallback failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        if (empty($intel['active_lotteries']) && (int)($totals['site_saved_rows'] ?? 0) > 0) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery(
                    'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS site_users, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $skaiWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evidence_rows, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $settingsWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settings_rows, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $scoredWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS evidence_scored, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $needsCheckWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_to_score, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $waitingWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS future_pending_draws, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $missingDrawWhere . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_drawing_info, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_7d, ' .
                    'SUM(CASE WHEN ' . $activityExpr . ' >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS recent_24h, ' .
                    'MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity, MAX(s.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ') AS newest_id ' .
                    'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC, newest_id DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
                );
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                $merged = array();
                foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {
                    list($label, $region, $name) = mylottoexpertV134ResolveSimpleLotteryParts($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
                    $key = strtolower($region . '|' . $name);
                    if (!isset($merged[$key])) {
                        $merged[$key] = array('label'=>$label,'group_region'=>$region,'group_lottery_name'=>$name,'saved_rows'=>0,'site_users'=>0,'evidence_rows'=>0,'settings_rows'=>0,'evidence_scored'=>0,'pending_to_score'=>0,'future_pending_draws'=>0,'missing_drawing_info'=>0,'recent_7d'=>0,'recent_24h'=>0,'latest_activity'=>'','newest_id'=>0,'technical_identity_count'=>0,'lottery_ids_seen'=>array(),'game_ids_seen'=>array());
                    }
                    foreach (array('saved_rows','site_users','evidence_rows','settings_rows','evidence_scored','pending_to_score','future_pending_draws','missing_drawing_info','recent_7d','recent_24h') as $k) { $merged[$key][$k] += (int)($r[$k] ?? 0); }
                    $merged[$key]['latest_activity'] = max((string)$merged[$key]['latest_activity'], (string)($r['latest_activity'] ?? ''));
                    $merged[$key]['newest_id'] = max((int)$merged[$key]['newest_id'], (int)($r['newest_id'] ?? 0));
                    $merged[$key]['technical_identity_count']++;
                    if ((int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { $merged[$key]['lottery_ids_seen'][] = (int)$r['lottery_id']; }
                    if ((string)($r['game_id'] ?? '') !== '') { $merged[$key]['game_ids_seen'][] = (string)$r['game_id']; }
                    $merged[$key]['unscored_rows'] = (int)$merged[$key]['pending_to_score'] + (int)$merged[$key]['future_pending_draws'] + (int)$merged[$key]['missing_drawing_info'];
                    $merged[$key]['activity_score'] = ((int)$merged[$key]['recent_24h'] * 12) + ((int)$merged[$key]['recent_7d'] * 3) + (int)$merged[$key]['saved_rows'] + ((int)$merged[$key]['pending_to_score'] * 5) + ((int)$merged[$key]['evidence_scored'] * 2);
                }
                $items = array_values($merged);
                usort($items, function($a, $b) {
                    if ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) === (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) { return ((int)($b['newest_id'] ?? 0) > (int)($a['newest_id'] ?? 0)) ? 1 : -1; }
                    return ((int)($b['activity_score'] ?? 0) > (int)($a['activity_score'] ?? 0)) ? 1 : -1;
                });
                $intel['active_lotteries'] = array_slice($items, 0, $limit);
                $totals['lotteries'] = count($items);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $intel['warnings'][] = 'v134 active lottery fallback failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        if (empty($intel['pending_draws']) && (int)($totals['pending_to_score'] ?? 0) > 0) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery(
                    'SELECT ' . $lotteryExpr . ' AS lottery_id, ' . $gameExpr . ' AS game_id, ' . $drawExpr . ' AS draw_date, COUNT(*) AS pending_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS users, MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity ' .
                    'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' WHERE ' . $needsCheckWhere . ' GROUP BY ' . $lotteryExpr . ', ' . $gameExpr . ', ' . $drawExpr . ' ORDER BY pending_rows DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit
                );
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                foreach ((array)$rows as &$r) { $r['label'] = function_exists('mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel') ? mylottoexpertV110ResolveLotteryLabel($db, (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0), (string)($r['game_id'] ?? '')) : ('Lottery ' . (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0)); }
                unset($r);
                $intel['pending_draws'] = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $intel['warnings'][] = 'v134 pending draw fallback failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        if (empty($intel['method_focus']) && (int)($totals['site_saved_rows'] ?? 0) > 0) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $methodExpr . ' AS method_key, COUNT(*) AS saved_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT s.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ') AS users, MAX(' . $activityExpr . ') AS latest_activity FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 's') . ' GROUP BY ' . $methodExpr . ' ORDER BY saved_rows DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
                $intel['method_focus'] = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $intel['warnings'][] = 'v134 method focus fallback failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        $intel['totals'] = $totals;
        $intel['v134_source_truth_fallback'] = 1;
        return $intel;
    }
}
