if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BuildPeriodTrendMeta')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135BuildPeriodTrendMeta($current, $previous)
    {
        $current = (int)$current;
        $previous = (int)$previous;
        $delta = $current - $previous;
        $class = 'flat';
        if ($delta > 0) { $class = 'up'; }
        elseif ($delta < 0) { $class = 'down'; }

        $sign = $delta > 0 ? '+' : '';
        if ($previous > 0) {
            $pct = round(($delta / max(1, $previous)) * 100.0, 1);
            $pctText = ($pct > 0 ? '+' : '') . rtrim(rtrim(number_format($pct, 1, '.', ''), '0'), '.') . '%';
            $label = $sign . (string)$delta . ' (' . $pctText . ')';
        } else {
            if ($current > 0) {
                $label = '+' . (string)$current . ' (new)';
                $class = 'up';
            } else {
                $label = '0 (no change)';
                $class = 'flat';
            }
        }

        return array(
            'delta' => $delta,
            'class' => $class,
            'label' => $label,
        );
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV135RenderPeriodComparisonCard')) {
    function mylottoexpertV135RenderPeriodComparisonCard($title, $current, $previous, $previousLabel, $note)
    {
        $meta = mylottoexpertV135BuildPeriodTrendMeta($current, $previous);
        return '<div class="mle-v123-period-card">'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-period-card__label">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$title, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '<strong class="mle-v123-period-card__value">' . (int)$current . '</strong>'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-period-card__trend mle-v123-period-card__trend--' . htmlspecialchars((string)$meta['class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">vs ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$previousLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$meta['label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '<span class="mle-v123-period-card__note">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$previousLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ': ' . (int)$previous . '. ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$note, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span>'
            . '</div>';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user) {
        try { return is_object($user) && method_exists($user, 'authorise') && $user->authorise('core.admin'); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array $payload) {
        try {
            while (ob_get_level() > 0) {
                @ob_end_clean();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}

        $flags = JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE;
        if (defined('JSON_INVALID_UTF8_SUBSTITUTE')) {
            $flags = $flags | JSON_INVALID_UTF8_SUBSTITUTE;
        }

        $json = json_encode($payload, $flags);
        if (!is_string($json) || $json === '') {
            $fallback = array(
                'ok' => false,
                'error' => 'json_encode_failed',
                'message' => function_exists('json_last_error_msg') ? json_last_error_msg() : 'Unable to encode JSON response.'
            );
            $json = json_encode($fallback, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_INVALID_UTF8_SUBSTITUTE);
        }

        try {
            $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
            if (method_exists($app, 'clearHeaders')) { $app->clearHeaders(); }
            $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
            $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
            $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);
            $app->sendHeaders();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
                @header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
                @header('Pragma: no-cache');
            }
        }

        echo $json;
        exit;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150ColExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150ColExists($db, $rawTable, $col) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable) . ' AND COLUMN_NAME = ' . $db->quote($col));
            return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150IndexExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150IndexExists($db, $rawTable, $idx) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable) . ' AND INDEX_NAME = ' . $db->quote($idx));
            return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables')) { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); }
        $queueRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $safeAlter = function($raw, $col, $sql) use ($db) {
            try { if (!mylottoexpertV150ColExists($db, $raw, $col)) { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V150] schema add failed ' . $col . ': ' . $e->getMessage()); }
        };
        $safeAlter($queueRaw, 'campaign_uuid', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `campaign_uuid` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `id`");
        $safeAlter($queueRaw, 'campaign_label', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `campaign_label` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `campaign_uuid`");
        $safeAlter($queueRaw, 'admin_runner_mode', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `admin_runner_mode` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `research_type`");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'assignment_settings_json', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_settings_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'assignment_settings_fingerprint', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_settings_fingerprint` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'runner_status', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'runner_started_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_started_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'runner_saved_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_saved_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'runner_message', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_message` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safeAlter($assignRaw, 'runner_result_json', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_result_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        try { if (!mylottoexpertV150IndexExists($db, $queueRaw, 'idx_mle_v150_campaign')) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_v150_campaign` (`campaign_uuid`)"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { if (!mylottoexpertV150IndexExists($db, $assignRaw, 'idx_mle_v150_runner')) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_v150_runner` (`runner_status`,`assigned_status`)"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { if (!mylottoexpertV150IndexExists($db, $assignRaw, 'idx_mle_v150_fp')) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD KEY `idx_mle_v150_fp` (`assignment_settings_fingerprint`)"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        return true;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150SettingsForIndex')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150SettingsForIndex($i, $mode) {
        $profiles = array('balanced', 'conservative', 'explorative');
        $strategies = array('hybrid', 'ai', 'skip');
        $windows = array(50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 200, 250, 300, 365, 500);
        $blend = 15 + (($i * 7) % 71);
        $tempRaw = 65 + (($i * 11) % 71);
        $divRaw = (($i * 13) % 11);
        $gapRaw = 20 + (($i * 17) % 61);
        $epochs = 40 + (($i * 19) % 141);
        if ($mode === 'tight_best_candidate') {
            $blend = 35 + (($i * 5) % 31);
            $tempRaw = 85 + (($i * 7) % 31);
            $divRaw = (($i * 3) % 6);
            $gapRaw = 35 + (($i * 9) % 31);
        }
        $settings = array(
            'profile' => $profiles[$i % count($profiles)],
            'strategy' => $strategies[(int)floor($i / count($profiles)) % count($strategies)],
            'skai_blend_ai_pct' => (string)$blend,
            'blend_ai_pct' => (string)$blend,
            'sampling_temperature' => number_format($tempRaw / 100.0, 2, '.', ''),
            'diversity_penalty' => number_format($divRaw / 100.0, 2, '.', ''),
            'gap_scale' => number_format($gapRaw / 100.0, 2, '.', ''),
            'skai_window_size' => (string)$windows[$i % count($windows)],
            'epochs' => (string)$epochs,
            'batch_size' => (string)(32 + (($i * 3) % 5) * 16),
            'skai_top_n_numbers' => '20',
            'skai_top_n_combos' => '5',
            '_mle_research_type' => 'admin_client_research',
            '_mle_global_learning_setting_key' => 'v150_admin_sweep',
        );
        return $settings;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150MakeFingerprint')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150MakeFingerprint(array $settings, $gameId, $targetDrawDate) {
        ksort($settings);
        return hash('sha256', (string)$gameId . '|' . (string)$targetDrawDate . '|' . json_encode($settings, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150CreateCampaign')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150CreateCampaign($db, $user, array $input) {
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden'); }
        mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
        $lotteryId = max(0, (int)($input['lottery_id'] ?? 0));
        $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)($input['game_id'] ?? ''), 0, 64));
        $targetDrawDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', substr((string)($input['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), 0, 10));
        $runCount = max(1, min(10000, (int)($input['run_count'] ?? 100)));
        $mode = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)($input['mode'] ?? 'balanced_sweep'));
        if ($gameId === '') { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_game_id'); }
        if ($targetDrawDate === '' || !preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}\-\d{2}$/', $targetDrawDate)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_target_draw_date'); }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $campaignUuid = 'hive-v150-' . substr(hash('sha256', $gameId . '|' . $targetDrawDate . '|' . $runCount . '|' . $mode . '|' . microtime(true)), 0, 24);
        $label = 'Admin Hive Research ' . $gameId . ' ' . $targetDrawDate . ' ' . $runCount . ' runs';
        $created = 0;
        $assignmentIds = array();
        for ($i = 0; $i < $runCount; $i++) {
            $settings = mylottoexpertV150SettingsForIndex($i, $mode);
            $settings['_mle_research_index'] = $i + 1;
            $settings['_mle_research_total'] = $runCount;
            $fingerprint = mylottoexpertV150MakeFingerprint($settings, $gameId, $targetDrawDate);
            $settings['_mle_research_settings_fingerprint'] = $fingerprint;
            $settingsJson = json_encode($settings, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))
                ->columns($db->quoteName(array('campaign_uuid','campaign_label','lottery_id','game_id','target_draw_date','research_status','research_type','admin_runner_mode','setting_family','setting_key','control_value','test_values_json','hold_constant_json','settings_fingerprint','settings_fingerprint_json','priority_score','assignment_count','max_assignments','replication_needed','created_at')))
                ->values(implode(',', array(
                    $db->quote($campaignUuid), $db->quote($label), (int)$lotteryId, $db->quote($gameId), $db->quote($targetDrawDate), $db->quote('assigned'), $db->quote('admin_client_research'), $db->quote($mode), $db->quote('admin_sweep'), $db->quote('settings_bundle'), $db->quote((string)($i + 1)), $db->quote($settingsJson), $db->quote('{}'), $db->quote($fingerprint), $db->quote($settingsJson), $db->quote('100.0000'), 1, 1, 0, $db->quote($now)
                )));
            try { $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V150] queue insert failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); continue; }
            $queueId = (int)$db->insertid();
            if ($queueId <= 0) { continue; }
            $batchUuid = $campaignUuid . '-' . ($i + 1);
            $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))
                ->columns($db->quoteName(array('queue_id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','batch_uuid','batch_header_id','assigned_status','assigned_at','assignment_settings_json','assignment_settings_fingerprint','runner_status','runner_message')))
                ->values(implode(',', array((int)$queueId, (int)$user->id, (int)$lotteryId, $db->quote($gameId), $db->quote($batchUuid), 0, $db->quote('assigned'), $db->quote($now), $db->quote($settingsJson), $db->quote($fingerprint), $db->quote('queued'), $db->quote('Queued for admin client runner'))));
            try { $db->setQuery($q2); $db->execute(); $assignmentIds[] = (int)$db->insertid(); $created++; } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE V150] assignment insert failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
        }
        return array('ok'=>true,'campaign_uuid'=>$campaignUuid,'created'=>$created,'assignment_ids'=>$assignmentIds,'label'=>$label);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150ClaimNextAssignment')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150ClaimNextAssignment($db, $user, $campaignUuid = '') {
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden'); }
        mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$campaignUuid);
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array('a.*','q.campaign_uuid','q.target_draw_date','q.research_type','q.campaign_label'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
            ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
            ->where('a.' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('running') . ')')
            ->where('(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('retry') . '))')
            ->order('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' ASC')
            ->setLimit(1);
        if ($campaignUuid !== '') { $q->where('q.' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid)); }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($row) || empty($row)) { return array('ok'=>true,'done'=>true,'message'=>'No queued assignment found.'); }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_started_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now) . ', ' . $db->quoteName('opened_in_skai_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id']);
        try { $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $settings = json_decode((string)($row['assignment_settings_json'] ?? ''), true);
        if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }
        return array('ok'=>true,'done'=>false,'assignment'=>array(
            'assignment_id'=>(int)$row['id'], 'queue_id'=>(int)$row['queue_id'], 'lottery_id'=>(int)$row['lottery_id'], 'game_id'=>(string)$row['game_id'], 'target_draw_date'=>(string)$row['target_draw_date'], 'campaign_uuid'=>(string)$row['campaign_uuid'], 'campaign_label'=>(string)$row['campaign_label'], 'settings'=>$settings, 'settings_fingerprint'=>(string)$row['assignment_settings_fingerprint']
        ));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV156ClaimResearchChunk')) {
    function mylottoexpertV156ClaimResearchChunk($db, $user, $campaignUuid = '', $chunkSize = 9) {
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden'); }
        mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$campaignUuid);
        $chunkSize = max(1, min(9, (int)$chunkSize));
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array('a.*','q.campaign_uuid','q.target_draw_date','q.research_type','q.campaign_label'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
            ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
            ->where('a.' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('running') . ')')
            ->where('(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('retry') . '))')
            ->order('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' ASC')
            ->setLimit($chunkSize);
        if ($campaignUuid !== '') { $q->where('q.' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid)); }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return array('ok'=>true,'done'=>true,'message'=>'No queued assignment chunk found.'); }
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($rows as $r) { $ids[] = (int)$r['id']; }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments')
            . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running')
            . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running')
            . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_started_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now)
            . ', ' . $db->quoteName('opened_in_skai_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now)
            . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Claimed inside SKAI-native 9-run research chunk')
            . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ')');
        try { $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $assignments = array();
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $settings = json_decode((string)($row['assignment_settings_json'] ?? ''), true);
            if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }
            $assignments[] = array(
                'assignment_id'=>(int)$row['id'],
                'queue_id'=>(int)$row['queue_id'],
                'lottery_id'=>(int)$row['lottery_id'],
                'game_id'=>(string)$row['game_id'],
                'target_draw_date'=>(string)$row['target_draw_date'],
                'campaign_uuid'=>(string)$row['campaign_uuid'],
                'campaign_label'=>(string)$row['campaign_label'],
                'settings'=>$settings,
                'settings_fingerprint'=>(string)$row['assignment_settings_fingerprint']
            );
        }
        return array('ok'=>true,'done'=>false,'chunk_size'=>count($assignments),'assignments'=>$assignments);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150RecordAssignmentResult')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150RecordAssignmentResult($db, $user, array $input) {
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden'); }
        mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
        $assignmentId = (int)($input['assignment_id'] ?? 0);
        $ok = !empty($input['ok']);
        if ($assignmentId <= 0) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_assignment_id'); }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $message = substr(preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', (string)($input['message'] ?? ($ok ? 'Saved' : 'Failed'))), 0, 255);
        $resultJson = json_encode($input, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        $sets = array(
            $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($ok ? 'saved' : 'failed'),
            $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($ok ? 'completed' : 'failed'),
            $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = ' . ($ok ? '1' : '0'),
            $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote($message),
            $db->quoteName('runner_result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote($resultJson),
            $db->quoteName('completed_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now)
        );
        if ($ok) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('runner_saved_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $assignmentId);
        try { $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()); }
        return array('ok'=>true,'assignment_id'=>$assignmentId);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV154CampaignCommand')) {
    function mylottoexpertV154CampaignCommand($db, $user, array $input) {
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden'); }
        mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($input['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $command = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)($input['command'] ?? '')));
        if ($campaignUuid === '') { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_campaign_uuid'); }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $queueTable = '#__mle_lottery_research_queue';
        $assignTable = '#__mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $qIds = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName($queueTable))
            ->where($db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid));
        $db->setQuery($qIds);
        $queueIds = $db->loadColumn();
        if (!is_array($queueIds) || empty($queueIds)) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'campaign_not_found'); }
        $queueIds = array_values(array_map('intval', $queueIds));
        $idList = implode(',', $queueIds);
        if ($command === 'reset_running') {
            $sql = 'UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName($assignTable)
                 . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Reset from running by admin on ' . $now)
                 . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')'
                 . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running');
            try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); return array('ok'=>true,'command'=>$command,'changed'=>(int)$db->getAffectedRows()); }
            catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()); }
        }
        if ($command === 'retry_failed') {
            $sql = 'UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName($assignTable)
                 . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Queued for retry by admin on ' . $now)
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = 0'
                 . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')'
                 . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('failed');
            try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); return array('ok'=>true,'command'=>$command,'changed'=>(int)$db->getAffectedRows()); }
            catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()); }
        }
        if ($command === 'resume_prepare') {
            $sql = 'UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName($assignTable)
                 . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned')
                 . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Prepared for resume by admin on ' . $now)
                 . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')'
                 . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running');
            try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); return array('ok'=>true,'command'=>$command,'changed'=>(int)$db->getAffectedRows()); }
            catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()); }
        }

        if ($command === 'delete_campaign' || $command === 'delete_campaign_with_saved') {
            $deleteSaved = ($command === 'delete_campaign_with_saved');
            if ($deleteSaved) {
                $confirm = strtoupper(trim((string)($input['confirm'] ?? '')));
                if ($confirm !== 'DELETE SAVED') {
                    return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'confirm_required','message'=>'Type DELETE SAVED to delete linked saved runs.');
                }
            }
            try {
                $assignIds = array();
                $assignFingerprints = array();
                $assignUserIds = array();
                $campaignGameIds = array();
                $campaignDrawDates = array();
                $savedDeleted = 0;
                $savedMatched = 0;
                $savedDeleteBlocked = false;
                $savedWhereSql = '';

                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assignment_settings_fingerprint') . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName($assignTable) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')');
                $assignRows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($assignRows)) {
                    foreach ($assignRows as $assignRow) {
                        $assignId = (int)($assignRow['id'] ?? 0);
                        $assignUserId = (int)($assignRow['user_id'] ?? 0);
                        $assignGameId = trim((string)($assignRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
                        $assignFp = preg_replace('/[^a-fA-F0-9]/', '', (string)($assignRow['assignment_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''));
                        if ($assignId > 0) { $assignIds[] = $assignId; }
                        if ($assignUserId > 0) { $assignUserIds[$assignUserId] = $assignUserId; }
                        if ($assignGameId !== '') { $campaignGameIds[$assignGameId] = $assignGameId; }
                        if ($assignFp !== '') { $assignFingerprints[$assignFp] = $assignFp; }
                    }
                }
                $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName($queueTable) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')');
                $queueRows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($queueRows)) {
                    foreach ($queueRows as $queueRow) {
                        $queueGameId = trim((string)($queueRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
                        $queueDrawDate = trim((string)($queueRow['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
                        if ($queueGameId !== '') { $campaignGameIds[$queueGameId] = $queueGameId; }
                        if ($queueDrawDate !== '' && strncmp($queueDrawDate, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) { $campaignDrawDates[$queueDrawDate] = $queueDrawDate; }
                    }
                }

                if ($deleteSaved) {
                    $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
                    $savedCols = array();
                    try { $savedCols = $db->getTableColumns($savedRaw, false); } catch (\Throwable $colEx) { $savedCols = array(); }
                    $savedWhere = array();
                    if (!empty($assignIds) && is_array($savedCols) && array_key_exists('hive_assignment_id', $savedCols)) {
                        $savedWhere[] = $db->quoteName('hive_assignment_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $assignIds)) . ')';
                    }
                    if (is_array($savedCols) && array_key_exists('hive_queue_id', $savedCols)) {
                        $savedWhere[] = $db->quoteName('hive_queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')';
                    }

                    if (!empty($assignFingerprints) && !empty($campaignGameIds) && is_array($savedCols) && array_key_exists('hive_settings_fingerprint', $savedCols)) {
                        $fpQuotes = array();
                        foreach ($assignFingerprints as $fp) { $fpQuotes[] = $db->quote($fp); }
                        $gameConds = array();
                        foreach ($campaignGameIds as $gid) {
                            if (array_key_exists('target_game_id', $savedCols)) { $gameConds[] = $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gid); }
                            if (array_key_exists('game_id', $savedCols)) { $gameConds[] = $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gid); }
                        }
                        $dateConds = array();
                        foreach ($campaignDrawDates as $dd) {
                            if (array_key_exists('target_draw_date', $savedCols)) { $dateConds[] = $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' = ' . $db->quote($dd); }
                            if (array_key_exists('next_draw_date', $savedCols)) { $dateConds[] = $db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . ' = ' . $db->quote($dd); }
                        }
                        $modeConds = array();
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_intake_mode', $savedCols)) { $modeConds[] = $db->quoteName('hive_intake_mode') . ' = ' . $db->quote('automatic_skai_save'); }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_research_type', $savedCols)) { $modeConds[] = $db->quoteName('hive_research_type') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('guided_hive_research') . ',' . $db->quote('observed_skai_intake') . ')'; }
                        $userCond = '';
                        if (!empty($assignUserIds) && array_key_exists('user_id', $savedCols)) { $userCond = $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', array_values($assignUserIds))) . ')'; }
                        if (!empty($fpQuotes) && !empty($gameConds) && !empty($dateConds) && !empty($modeConds)) {
                            $fallbackParts = array(
                                $db->quoteName('hive_settings_fingerprint') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $fpQuotes) . ')',
                                '(' . implode(' OR ', $gameConds) . ')',
                                '(' . implode(' OR ', $dateConds) . ')',
                                '(' . implode(' OR ', $modeConds) . ')'
                            );
                            if ($userCond !== '') { $fallbackParts[] = $userCond; }
                            $savedWhere[] = '(' . implode(' AND ', $fallbackParts) . ')';
                        }
                    }

                    if (!empty($savedWhere)) {
                        $savedWhereSql = '(' . implode(' OR ', $savedWhere) . ')';
                        $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $savedWhereSql);
                        $savedMatched = (int)$db->loadResult();
                    } else {
                        $savedDeleteBlocked = true;
                    }
                }

                $db->transactionStart();

                if ($deleteSaved && !$savedDeleteBlocked && $savedMatched > 0 && $savedWhereSql !== '') {
                    $db->setQuery('DELETE FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $savedWhereSql);
                    $db->execute();
                    $savedDeleted = (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
                }

                $db->setQuery('DELETE FROM ' . $db->quoteName($assignTable) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ')');
                $db->execute();
                $assignDeleted = (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
                $db->setQuery('DELETE FROM ' . $db->quoteName($queueTable) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid));
                $db->execute();
                $queueDeleted = (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
                $db->transactionCommit();

                return array(
                    'ok'=>true,
                    'command'=>$command,
                    'assignments_deleted'=>$assignDeleted,
                    'queue_rows_deleted'=>$queueDeleted,
                    'saved_runs_matched'=>$savedMatched,
                    'saved_runs_deleted'=>$savedDeleted,
                    'saved_delete_blocked'=>$savedDeleteBlocked ? 1 : 0,
                    'note'=>$deleteSaved ? 'Research queue rows and linked saved prediction records were deleted.' : 'Research queue rows were deleted. Saved prediction records in user_saved_numbers were not deleted.'
                );
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                try { $db->transactionRollback(); } catch (\Throwable $ignore) {}
                return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage());
            }
        }
        return array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'unknown_campaign_command');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV152DecodeJsonArray')) {
    function mylottoexpertV152DecodeJsonArray($value) {
        $decoded = json_decode((string)$value, true);
        return is_array($decoded) ? $decoded : array();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV152SettingsSummaryText')) {
    function mylottoexpertV152SettingsSummaryText($settingsJson, $fingerprint = '') {
        $settings = mylottoexpertV152DecodeJsonArray($settingsJson);
        $parts = array();
        $map = array(
            'profile' => 'Profile',
            'strategy' => 'Strategy',
            'blend_ai_pct' => 'AI blend',
            'skai_blend_ai_pct' => 'AI blend',
            'sampling_temperature' => 'Temp',
            'diversity_penalty' => 'Diversity',
            'gap_scale' => 'Gap',
            'skai_window_size' => 'Window',
            'window_size' => 'Window',
            'epochs' => 'Epochs',
            'batch_size' => 'Batch'
        );
        $used = array();
        foreach ($map as $key => $label) {
            if (isset($used[$label])) { continue; }
            if (array_key_exists($key, $settings) && $settings[$key] !== '' && $settings[$key] !== null) {
                $parts[] = $label . ': ' . substr((string)$settings[$key], 0, 40);
                $used[$label] = true;
            }
        }
        if (!empty($fingerprint)) { $parts[] = 'FP: ' . substr((string)$fingerprint, 0, 12); }
        return implode(' | ', $parts);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers')) {
    function mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers($value) {
        $out = array();
        foreach (preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$value) as $part) {
            $part = trim((string)$part);
            if ($part !== '') { $out[] = (int)$part; }
        }
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet')) {
    function mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet($numbers, $actual = array(), $extra = false) {
        $numbers = is_array($numbers) ? $numbers : mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers($numbers);
        $actual = is_array($actual) ? array_map('intval', $actual) : mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers($actual);
        $actualMap = array();
        foreach ($actual as $a) { $actualMap[(string)(int)$a] = true; }
        if (empty($numbers)) { return '<span style="color:#64748b;font-size:.82rem;">No numbers</span>'; }
        $html = '';
        foreach ($numbers as $n) {
            $n = (int)$n;
            $hit = isset($actualMap[(string)$n]);
            $bg = $hit ? '#dcfce7' : ($extra ? '#fef3c7' : '#ffffff');
            $bd = $hit ? '#16a34a' : ($extra ? '#f59e0b' : '#94a3b8');
            $color = $hit ? '#14532d' : '#0f172a';
            $html .= '<span title="' . ($hit ? 'Hit' : 'Not a direct hit') . '" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:999px;border:2px solid ' . $bd . ';background:' . $bg . ';color:' . $color . ';font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;margin:2px;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(15,23,42,.08);">' . (int)$n . '</span>';
        }
        return $html;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150LoadCampaignSummary')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150LoadCampaignSummary($db, $limit = 10) {
        $out = array('campaigns'=>array(), 'top50'=>array(), 'recent_assignments'=>array());
        try {
            mylottoexpertV150EnsureIntegratedSchema($db);
            $db->setQuery('SELECT q.campaign_uuid, MAX(q.campaign_label) AS campaign_label, MAX(q.game_id) AS game_id, MAX(q.target_draw_date) AS target_draw_date, COUNT(a.id) AS assignments, SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('saved') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved, SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('running') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS running, SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('failed') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued, MIN(q.created_at) AS created_at FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' INNER JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a') . ' ON a.queue_id = q.id WHERE q.campaign_uuid <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' GROUP BY q.campaign_uuid ORDER BY MIN(q.created_at) DESC', 0, max(1, (int)$limit));
            $out['campaigns'] = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array('a.id AS assignment_id','a.queue_id','a.lottery_id','a.game_id','a.batch_uuid','a.assigned_status','a.assigned_at','a.assignment_settings_json','a.assignment_settings_fingerprint','a.runner_status','a.runner_started_at','a.runner_saved_at','a.runner_message','a.saved_count','a.completed_at','q.campaign_uuid','q.campaign_label','q.target_draw_date'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
                ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
                ->where('q.' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' <> ' . $db->quote(''))
                ->order('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit(200);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
            foreach ($rows as &$row) {
                $row['settings_summary'] = mylottoexpertV152SettingsSummaryText((string)($row['assignment_settings_json'] ?? ''), (string)($row['assignment_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''));
            }
            unset($row);
            $out['recent_assignments'] = $rows;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try {
            $cols = array();
            try { $cols = array_keys($db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false)); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $cols = array(); }
            if (in_array('hive_assignment_id', $cols, true)) {
                $sel = array('id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','target_draw_date','date_saved','label','main_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','hive_queue_id','hive_assignment_id','hive_settings_fingerprint');
                foreach (array('main_hits_count','extra_hits_count','learning_score','evaluation_status','evaluated_at','actual_draw_date','actual_main_numbers','actual_extra_numbers','evaluation_json','settings_json','settings') as $c) { if (in_array($c, $cols, true)) { $sel[] = $c; } }
                $order = in_array('learning_score', $cols, true) ? ($db->quoteName('learning_score') . ' DESC, ') : '';
                $order .= in_array('main_hits_count', $cols, true) ? ($db->quoteName('main_hits_count') . ' DESC, ') : '';
                $order .= $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC';
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select(array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $sel))->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))->where($db->quoteName('hive_assignment_id') . ' > 0')->order($order)->setLimit(50);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();
                foreach ($rows as &$row) {
                    $settingsJson = (string)($row['settings_json'] ?? ($row['settings'] ?? ''));
                    $row['settings_summary'] = mylottoexpertV152SettingsSummaryText($settingsJson, (string)($row['hive_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''));
                }
                unset($row);
                $out['top50'] = $rows;
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150HandleAjax')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150HandleAjax($db, $user) {
        $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
        $in = $app->input;
        $action = strtolower(trim((string)$in->getString('mle_hive_action', '')));
        if ($action === '') { return; }
        if (!mylottoexpertV150IsSuperUser($user)) { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden')); }
        if (strtoupper((string)$in->getMethod()) !== 'POST') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'post_required')); }
        if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'csrf_failed')); }
        $raw = (string)$in->get('payload', '', 'RAW');
        $payload = $raw !== '' ? json_decode($raw, true) : array();
        if (!is_array($payload)) { $payload = array(); }
        if ($action === 'create_campaign') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(mylottoexpertV150CreateCampaign($db, $user, $payload)); }
        if ($action === 'claim_next') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(mylottoexpertV150ClaimNextAssignment($db, $user, (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''))); }
        if ($action === 'claim_chunk') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(mylottoexpertV156ClaimResearchChunk($db, $user, (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), (int)($payload['chunk_size'] ?? 9))); }
        if ($action === 'record_result') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(mylottoexpertV150RecordAssignmentResult($db, $user, $payload)); }
        if ($action === 'campaign_command') { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(mylottoexpertV154CampaignCommand($db, $user, $payload)); }
        if ($action === 'summary') { $data = mylottoexpertV150LoadCampaignSummary($db, 20); mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>true,'data'=>$data,'html'=>mylottoexpertV150RenderSummaryHtml($data))); }
        mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'unknown_action'));
    }
}
try { mylottoexpertV150HandleAjax($db, $user); } catch (\Throwable $e) { if (isset($app)) { mylottoexpertV150JsonResponse(array('ok'=>false,'error'=>'exception','message'=>$e->getMessage())); } }

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151GetTableColumns')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151GetTableColumns($db, $rawTable) {
        static $cache = array();
        $rawTable = (string)$rawTable;
        if (isset($cache[$rawTable])) { return $cache[$rawTable]; }
        $cols = array();
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable));
            $rows = $db->loadColumn();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $c) { $cols[(string)$c] = true; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $cache[$rawTable] = $cols;
        return $cols;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn(array $cols, array $candidates) {
        foreach ($candidates as $c) { if (isset($cols[$c])) { return $c; } }
        return '';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151NormalizeDateOnly')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151NormalizeDateOnly($value) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '' || $value === '0000-00-00' || $value === '0000-00-00 00:00:00') { return ''; }
        $ts = strtotime($value);
        return $ts ? date('Y-m-d', $ts) : '';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151ResolveNextDrawDateForGame')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151ResolveNextDrawDateForGame($db, $gameId) {
        $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
        if ($gameId === '') { return ''; }
        try {
            if (function_exists('getNextScheduledDrawing')) {
                $next = getNextScheduledDrawing($gameId, $db);
                if (is_array($next) && !empty($next['draw_date'])) {
                    $d = mylottoexpertV151NormalizeDateOnly($next['draw_date']);
                    if ($d !== '') { return $d; }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try {
            if (function_exists('getLatestDrawing')) {
                $latest = getLatestDrawing($gameId, $db);
                if (is_array($latest) && !empty($latest['next_draw_date'])) {
                    $d = mylottoexpertV151NormalizeDateOnly($latest['next_draw_date']);
                    if ($d !== '') { return $d; }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        return '';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151LoadAdminLotteryChoices')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151LoadAdminLotteryChoices($db) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $lotRaw = $prefix . 'lotteries';
        $stateRaw = $prefix . 'states';
        $countryRaw = $prefix . 'countries';
        $lotCols = mylottoexpertV151GetTableColumns($db, $lotRaw);
        if (empty($lotCols)) { return array(); }
        $lotteryIdCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($lotCols, array('lottery_id', 'id'));
        $gameIdCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($lotCols, array('game_id', 'gameId', 'gid'));
        $nameCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($lotCols, array('lottery_name', 'name', 'game_name', 'title'));
        if ($lotteryIdCol === '' || $gameIdCol === '' || $nameCol === '') { return array(); }
        $hasStateId = isset($lotCols['state_id']);
        $stateCols = mylottoexpertV151GetTableColumns($db, $stateRaw);
        $countryCols = mylottoexpertV151GetTableColumns($db, $countryRaw);
        $stateNameCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($stateCols, array('name', 'state_name', 'title'));
        $stateIdCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($stateCols, array('state_id', 'id'));
        $countryIdCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($stateCols, array('country_id'));
        $countryNameCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($countryCols, array('name', 'country_name', 'title'));
        $countryPkCol = mylottoexpertV151FirstExistingColumn($countryCols, array('country_id', 'id'));
        $select = array(
            'l.' . $db->quoteName($lotteryIdCol) . ' AS lottery_id',
            'l.' . $db->quoteName($gameIdCol) . ' AS game_id',
            'l.' . $db->quoteName($nameCol) . ' AS lottery_name'
        );
        if ($hasStateId && $stateNameCol !== '' && $stateIdCol !== '') {
            $select[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($stateNameCol) . ' AS state_name';
        } else {
            $select[] = $db->quote('', 'state_name');
        }
        if ($hasStateId && $stateIdCol !== '' && $countryIdCol !== '' && $countryNameCol !== '' && $countryPkCol !== '') {
            $select[] = 'c.' . $db->quoteName($countryNameCol) . ' AS country_name';
        } else {
            $select[] = $db->quote('', 'country_name');
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'))
            ->where('TRIM(COALESCE(l.' . $db->quoteName($gameIdCol) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) <> ' . $db->quote(''));
        if ($hasStateId && $stateNameCol !== '' && $stateIdCol !== '') {
            $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName($stateIdCol));
        }
        if ($hasStateId && $stateIdCol !== '' && $countryIdCol !== '' && $countryNameCol !== '' && $countryPkCol !== '') {
            $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__countries', 'c') . ' ON s.' . $db->quoteName($countryIdCol) . ' = c.' . $db->quoteName($countryPkCol));
        }
        $q->order(array('state_name ASC', 'lottery_name ASC', 'game_id ASC'));
        try { $db->setQuery($q); $rows = $db->loadAssocList(); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { $rows = array(); }
        if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }
        $out = array();
        foreach ($rows as $r) {
            $gameId = trim((string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''));
            $lotteryId = (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            $lotteryName = trim((string)($r['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if ($gameId === '' || $lotteryId <= 0 || $lotteryName === '') { continue; }
            $state = trim((string)($r['state_name'] ?? ''));
            $country = trim((string)($r['country_name'] ?? ''));
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta')) {
                $meta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta($state, $country, $lotteryName, $gameId);
                $state = trim((string)($meta['state'] ?? $state));
                $country = trim((string)($meta['country'] ?? $country));
                $lotteryName = trim((string)($meta['lottery'] ?? $lotteryName));
            }
            $group = $state !== '' ? $state : ($country !== '' ? $country : 'Other Lotteries');
            $label = $lotteryName . ' (' . $gameId . ')';
            $nextDraw = mylottoexpertV151ResolveNextDrawDateForGame($db, $gameId);
            $out[] = array(
                'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
                'game_id' => $gameId,
                'lottery_name' => $lotteryName,
                'state_name' => $state,
                'country_name' => $country,
                'group_label' => $group,
                'label' => $label,
                'next_draw_date' => $nextDraw,
                'sort_date' => $nextDraw !== '' ? $nextDraw : '9999-12-31',
            );
        }
        usort($out, function($a, $b) {
            $ag = strtolower((string)($a['group_label'] ?? ''));
            $bg = strtolower((string)($b['group_label'] ?? ''));
            if ($ag !== $bg) { return $ag < $bg ? -1 : 1; }
            $an = strtolower((string)($a['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            $bn = strtolower((string)($b['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if ($an !== $bn) { return $an < $bn ? -1 : 1; }
            return strcmp((string)($a['game_id'] ?? ''), (string)($b['game_id'] ?? ''));
        });
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV151PickDefaultLotteryChoice')) {
    function mylottoexpertV151PickDefaultLotteryChoice(array $choices) {
        $bestIndex = -1;
        $bestDate = '9999-12-31';
        foreach ($choices as $idx => $choice) {
            $d = (string)($choice['next_draw_date'] ?? '');
            if ($d !== '' && $d < $bestDate) { $bestDate = $d; $bestIndex = (int)$idx; }
        }
        return $bestIndex >= 0 ? $bestIndex : 0;
    }
}
