        <script>
        (function(){
          'use strict';
          if (window.__MLE_V150_HIVE_CONSOLE__) { return; }
          window.__MLE_V150_HIVE_CONSOLE__ = true;
          var tokenName = <?php echo json_encode($token); ?>;
          var running = false;
          var activeCampaign = '';
          var sessionDone = 0;
          var currentOrdinal = 0;
          var campaignTotal = 0;
          var liveLedgerStarted = false;
          var currentAssignmentId = '';
          var currentRunStartedAt = 0;
          var lastHeartbeatAt = 0;
          var monitorTimer = null;
          var wakeLock = null;
          var currentProgressPct = 0;
          var activeChunkSize = 0;
          var activeChunkSaved = 0;
          var activeChunkId = '';
          function byId(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
          function pad2(n){ n=parseInt(String(n||0),10)||0; return n<10?'0'+n:String(n); }
          function fmtElapsed(ms){ var s=Math.max(0,Math.floor((ms||0)/1000)); return pad2(Math.floor(s/60))+':'+pad2(s%60); }
          function heartbeat(msg){ lastHeartbeatAt = Date.now(); setText('mle-v155-heartbeat-clock', msg ? String(msg) : new Date(lastHeartbeatAt).toLocaleTimeString()); }
          function setRunnerState(state, phase){ setText('mle-v155-runner-state', state || 'Idle'); if(phase){ setText('mle-v155-current-phase', phase); } }
          function setProgress(pct, label){ pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,parseInt(String(pct||0),10)||0)); currentProgressPct=pct; var bar=byId('mle-v155-run-progress-bar'); if(bar){ bar.style.width=String(pct)+'%'; } setText('mle-v155-run-progress-label', String(pct)+'%'+(label?' - '+label:'')); if(label){ setText('mle-v155-current-phase', label); } heartbeat(label || 'progress'); }
          function updateMonitor(){
            var now=Date.now();
            setText('mle-v155-current-elapsed', currentRunStartedAt ? fmtElapsed(now-currentRunStartedAt) : '00:00');
            setText('mle-v155-heartbeat-age', lastHeartbeatAt ? (Math.floor((now-lastHeartbeatAt)/1000)+'s ago') : 'Never');
            setText('mle-v155-current-assignment', currentAssignmentId ? ('#'+currentAssignmentId) : 'None');
            setText('mle-v155-visibility-state', document.hidden ? 'Window is backgrounded; browser may throttle timers.' : 'Window active.');
            if(running && lastHeartbeatAt && (now-lastHeartbeatAt)>120000){ setRunnerState('Possible stall', 'No heartbeat for more than 2 minutes. Use Refresh, Resume, or Reset stuck running if needed.'); }
          }
          function startMonitor(){ if(!monitorTimer){ monitorTimer=window.setInterval(updateMonitor,1000); } updateMonitor(); }
          function stopMonitor(){ if(monitorTimer){ window.clearInterval(monitorTimer); monitorTimer=null; } updateMonitor(); }
          function clearRunnerHeartbeat(){ lastHeartbeatAt=0; currentRunStartedAt=0; currentAssignmentId=''; currentProgressPct=0; setText('mle-v155-heartbeat-age','Never'); setText('mle-v155-heartbeat-clock','No active runner.'); setText('mle-v155-current-elapsed','00:00'); setText('mle-v155-current-assignment','None'); var bar=byId('mle-v155-run-progress-bar'); if(bar){ bar.style.width='0%'; } setText('mle-v155-run-progress-label','0%'); }
          function setStatus(msg){ var el=byId('mle-v150-status'); if(el){ el.textContent=msg; } }
          function setText(id, value){ var el=byId(id); if(el){ el.textContent=String(value == null ? '' : value); } }
          function settingsSummary(settings, fp){
            settings = settings || {};
            var parts = [];
            function add(label, keys){
              var i, v;
              for(i=0;i<keys.length;i++){ v=settings[keys[i]]; if(v !== undefined && v !== null && String(v) !== ''){ parts.push(label + ': ' + String(v).substring(0,40)); return; } }
            }
            add('Profile', ['profile','training_style','risk_profile']);
            add('Strategy', ['strategy','skai_mode_method']);
            add('AI blend', ['blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_ai_pct']);
            add('Temp', ['sampling_temperature']);
            add('Diversity', ['diversity_penalty']);
            add('Gap', ['gap_scale']);
            add('Window', ['skai_window_size','window_size']);
            add('Epochs', ['epochs']);
            add('Batch', ['batch_size']);
            if(fp){ parts.push('FP: ' + String(fp).substring(0,12)); }
            return parts.join(' | ');
          }
          function setCounter(){ setText('mle-v152-current-run', String(currentOrdinal || 0) + ' / ' + String(campaignTotal || 0)); setText('mle-v152-session-done', String(sessionDone || 0)); setText('mle-v154-active-campaign', activeCampaign ? activeCampaign : 'None selected. Use Select/Resume on a campaign below.'); }
          function clearLiveLedger(){ var box=byId('mle-v152-run-ledger'); if(box){ box.innerHTML=''; } liveLedgerStarted=true; }
          function appendLiveRow(title, body, detail, state){
            var box=byId('mle-v152-run-ledger'); if(!box){ return; }
            if(!liveLedgerStarted){ clearLiveLedger(); }
            var color = state === 'saved' ? '#16a34a' : (state === 'failed' ? '#dc2626' : (state === 'running' ? '#2563eb' : '#94a3b8'));
            var row=document.createElement('div'); row.className='mle-v123-simple-row'; row.style.borderLeft='4px solid '+color;
            row.innerHTML='<strong>'+esc(title)+'</strong><span>'+esc(body)+'</span>'+(detail?'<span style="display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#334155;">'+esc(detail)+'</span>':'')+(state==='running'?'<div style="height:7px;background:#e2e8f0;border-radius:999px;margin-top:7px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:7px;width:'+String(currentProgressPct||5)+'%;background:#2563eb;border-radius:999px;"></div></div>':'');
            if(box.firstChild){ box.insertBefore(row, box.firstChild); } else { box.appendChild(row); }
          }
          function syncLotterySelection(){
            var sel = byId('mle-v150-lottery-select');
            var game = byId('mle-v150-game-id');
            var lid = byId('mle-v150-lottery-id');
            var date = byId('mle-v150-target-date');
            var opt = sel && sel.options && sel.selectedIndex >= 0 ? sel.options[sel.selectedIndex] : null;
            if(!opt){ return; }
            if(game){ game.value = opt.getAttribute('data-game-id') || ''; }
            if(lid){ lid.value = opt.getAttribute('data-lottery-id') || opt.value || '0'; }
            if(date){ date.value = opt.getAttribute('data-next-draw-date') || ''; }
          }
          function initLotteryPicker(){
            var sel = byId('mle-v150-lottery-select');
            if(!sel){ return; }
            syncLotterySelection();
            sel.onchange = function(){ syncLotterySelection(); };
          }
          function post(action, payload, cb){
            var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
            var body = tokenName + '=1&mle_hive_action=' + encodeURIComponent(action) + '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload || {}));
            xhr.open('POST', window.location.href.split('#')[0], true);
            xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type','application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
            xhr.onreadystatechange = function(){ if(xhr.readyState !== 4){return;} var data=null; try{ data=JSON.parse(xhr.responseText||'{}'); }catch(e){ data={ok:false,error:'bad_json',message:'The campaign endpoint returned non-JSON output. Refresh the admin page and try again. If this repeats, check the raw response sample.',status:xhr.status,raw:(xhr.responseText||'').substring(0,500)}; } if(cb){ cb(data); } };
            xhr.send(body);
          }
          function buildSkaiUrl(a){
            var base = byId('mle-v150-skai-url').value || '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/skai-lottery-prediction';
            var sep = base.indexOf('?') === -1 ? '?' : '&';
            var s = a.settings || {};
            if(a.chunk_assignments && a.chunk_assignments.length){
              return base + sep
                + 'gameId=' + encodeURIComponent(a.game_id || '')
                + '&gid=' + encodeURIComponent(a.game_id || '')
                + '&hive_auto_research=1&hive_research_chunk=1'
                + '&hive_chunk_key=' + encodeURIComponent(a.chunk_key || '')
                + '&mle_guided_mode=admin_hive_chunk_runner&mle_command_source=mle_admin_hive_console';
            }
            return base + sep
              + 'gameId=' + encodeURIComponent(a.game_id || '')
              + '&gid=' + encodeURIComponent(a.game_id || '')
              + '&hive_auto_research=1'
              + '&mle_research_queue_id=' + encodeURIComponent(a.queue_id || '')
              + '&mle_research_assignment_id=' + encodeURIComponent(a.assignment_id || '')
              + '&mle_research_type=admin_client_research'
              + '&mle_settings_fingerprint=' + encodeURIComponent(a.settings_fingerprint || '')
              + '&mle_guided_mode=admin_hive_runner&mle_command_source=mle_admin_hive_console'
              + '&hive_settings_json=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(s));
          }
          function runNext(){
            if(!running){ setRunnerState('Stopped','Runner stopped.'); setStatus('Stopped.'); stopMonitor(); return; }
            post('claim_chunk', {campaign_uuid: activeCampaign, chunk_size: 9}, function(res){
              if(!res || !res.ok){ setStatus('Chunk claim failed: ' + (res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown')); running=false; stopMonitor(); return; }
              if(res.done){ setProgress(100,'Campaign complete'); setRunnerState('Complete','No queued assignments remain.'); setStatus('Campaign complete. No queued assignments remain.'); running=false; stopMonitor(); refresh(); return; }
              var assignments = res.assignments || [];
              if(!assignments.length){ setStatus('No assignments returned for chunk.'); running=false; stopMonitor(); return; }
              var first = assignments[0] || {};
              var s = first.settings || {};
              activeChunkSize = assignments.length;
              activeChunkSaved = 0;
              activeChunkId = 'mle_hive_research_chunk_v156_' + String(Date.now()) + '_' + String(Math.floor(Math.random()*100000));
              currentAssignmentId = String(first.assignment_id || '');
              currentRunStartedAt = Date.now();
              currentOrdinal = parseInt(String(s._mle_research_index || first.assignment_index || currentOrdinal + 1 || 1), 10) || 1;
              if(!campaignTotal && s._mle_research_total){ campaignTotal = parseInt(String(s._mle_research_total), 10) || 0; }
              var chunkPayload = {schema:'mle_hive_research_chunk_v156', chunk_key:activeChunkId, campaign_uuid:first.campaign_uuid || activeCampaign, total:assignments.length, assignments:assignments};
              try { localStorage.setItem(activeChunkId, JSON.stringify(chunkPayload)); } catch(e) { setStatus('Could not store SKAI research chunk payload in browser storage: '+(e&&e.message?e.message:'unknown')); running=false; stopMonitor(); return; }
              setRunnerState('Running','SKAI-native research chunk claimed. Loading SKAI once for up to 9 assignments.');
              setProgress(5,'Research chunk claimed');
              startMonitor();
              setCounter();
              var summary = settingsSummary(s, first.settings_fingerprint || '');
              setText('mle-v152-current-settings', 'Chunk of ' + assignments.length + ' SKAI-native batch run(s). First: ' + (summary || 'Settings loaded.'));
              setStatus('Running SKAI-native chunk of ' + assignments.length + ' assignment(s), starting at ' + currentOrdinal + ' / ' + (campaignTotal || '?') + '.');
              appendLiveRow('SKAI-native chunk started', 'Assignments in this chunk: ' + assignments.length + '. SKAI will run/save them internally using the proven batch save path.', summary, 'running');
              for(var ci=0; ci<assignments.length; ci++){
                var ca = assignments[ci] || {}; var cs = ca.settings || {};
                appendLiveRow('Queued in current SKAI chunk | assignment #' + (ca.assignment_id || ''), 'Will run inside SKAI page without returning to MyLottoExpert between each run.', settingsSummary(cs, ca.settings_fingerprint || ''), 'queued');
              }
              var wrap=byId('mle-v150-frame-wrap'); var frame=byId('mle-v150-skai-frame');
              if(wrap){ wrap.style.display='block'; }
              if(frame){ frame.onload=function(){ setProgress(Math.max(currentProgressPct,25),'SKAI chunk page loaded'); }; frame.src = buildSkaiUrl({chunk_assignments:assignments, chunk_key:activeChunkId, game_id:first.game_id || '', settings:s}); }
            });
          }
          function refresh(){ post('summary', {}, function(res){ var box=byId('mle-v150-summary'); if(box && res && res.ok && res.html){ box.innerHTML=res.html; } else if(box && res && res.ok && res.data){ box.innerHTML=renderSummary(res.data); } }); }
          function esc(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/[&<>\"]/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c];}); }
          function renderSummary(data){
            var h='<div class="mle-v123-simple-list">'; var c=(data&&data.campaigns)||[]; var i;
            if(!c.length){ h+='<div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No campaigns yet</strong><span>Create one above.</span></div>'; }
            for(i=0;i<c.length;i++){ h+='<div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>'+esc(c[i].campaign_label||c[i].campaign_uuid)+'</strong><span>Assignments '+esc(c[i].assignments)+' | Saved '+esc(c[i].saved)+' | Running '+esc(c[i].running)+' | Failed '+esc(c[i].failed)+'</span><div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:9px;"><button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="select" data-campaign-uuid="'+esc(c[i].campaign_uuid)+'" data-campaign-total="'+esc(c[i].assignments)+'">Select</button><button type="button" class="btn" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="resume" data-campaign-uuid="'+esc(c[i].campaign_uuid)+'" data-campaign-total="'+esc(c[i].assignments)+'">Run in SKAI</button><button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="delete" data-campaign-uuid="'+esc(c[i].campaign_uuid)+'" data-campaign-total="'+esc(c[i].assignments)+'">Delete queue only</button><button type="button" class="btn-outline" style="border-color:#fecaca;color:#991b1b;" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="delete_saved" data-campaign-uuid="'+esc(c[i].campaign_uuid)+'" data-campaign-total="'+esc(c[i].assignments)+'">Delete queue and saved runs</button></div></div>'; }
            h+='</div><div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:1rem;">'; var t=(data&&data.top50)||[];
            if(!t.length){ h+='<div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No Top 50 rows yet</strong><span>Saved/scored hive assignment rows will appear here.</span></div>'; }
            for(i=0;i<t.length;i++){ h+='<div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>#'+(i+1)+' saved '+esc(t[i].id)+' score '+esc(t[i].learning_score||0)+'</strong><span>Hits '+esc(t[i].main_hits_count||0)+'+'+esc(t[i].extra_hits_count||0)+' | '+esc(t[i].main_numbers||'')+' '+esc(t[i].extra_ball_numbers||'')+'</span></div>'; }
            h+='</div>'; return h;
          }

          function campaignCommand(command, uuid, cb){
            post('campaign_command', {command:command,campaign_uuid:uuid}, function(res){
              if(cb){ cb(res); return; }
              if(res && res.ok){ setStatus('Campaign command '+command+' completed. Changed '+(res.changed || res.assignments_deleted || 0)+' row(s).'); refresh(); }
              else { setStatus('Campaign command failed: '+(res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown')); }
            });
          }
          function selectCampaign(uuid, total){
            activeCampaign = uuid || '';
            campaignTotal = parseInt(String(total || campaignTotal || 0), 10) || 0;
            currentOrdinal = 0;
            sessionDone = 0;
            setCounter();
            clearLiveLedger();
            appendLiveRow('Campaign selected', activeCampaign || 'No campaign selected', 'Press Start Runner to continue queued assignments, or use Resume to reset any stuck running row first.', 'queued');
            setStatus(activeCampaign ? ('Selected campaign '+activeCampaign+'.') : 'No campaign selected.');
          }
          initLotteryPicker();
          clearRunnerHeartbeat();
          updateMonitor();
          (function(){ var qs=window.location.search||''; function qp(n){ var m=new RegExp('[?&]'+n+'=([^&]*)').exec(qs); return m?decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g,' ')):''; } var camp=qp('mle_campaign')||''; var total=qp('mle_campaign_total')||'0'; if(camp){ activeCampaign=camp; campaignTotal=parseInt(total,10)||0; setCounter(); setStatus('Dedicated runner window loaded for '+camp+'. Press Start Runner or Resume.'); } })();
          function startSelectedQueue(){
            if(!activeCampaign){ setStatus('Select or create a campaign before starting the SKAI runner.'); return false; }
            if(running){ setStatus('The selected campaign is already running.'); return false; }
            running=true;
            currentRunStartedAt=Date.now();
            lastHeartbeatAt=Date.now();
            currentProgressPct=0;
            setRunnerState('Starting','Claiming the next SKAI research chunk.');
            setProgress(1,'Starting selected queue');
            setStatus('Starting selected campaign '+activeCampaign+'. SKAI will run the queue in the embedded runner below.');
            startMonitor();
            runNext();
            return false;
          }
          function openSkaiQueue(uuid){
            uuid = uuid || activeCampaign || '';
            if(!uuid){ setStatus('Select or create a campaign before opening SKAI.'); return false; }
            var base = byId('mle-v150-skai-url').value || '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/skai-lottery-prediction';
            var sep = base.indexOf('?') === -1 ? '?' : '&';
            var game = byId('mle-v150-game-id') ? byId('mle-v150-game-id').value : '';
            var url = base + sep + 'gameId=' + encodeURIComponent(game || '') + '&gid=' + encodeURIComponent(game || '') + '&hive_research_runner=1&campaign_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uuid);
            var w = window.open(url, 'skai_hive_research_' + uuid, 'width=1280,height=920,noopener=no');
            if(w){ setStatus('Opened SKAI-owned Hive Research Runner for ' + uuid + '. Run/save progress now happens inside SKAI.'); }
            else { setStatus('Popup blocked. Allow popups for LottoExpert, then try again.'); }
            return false;
          }
          byId('mle-v150-create').onclick=function(){
            syncLotterySelection();
            var payload={lottery_id:byId('mle-v150-lottery-id').value,game_id:byId('mle-v150-game-id').value,target_draw_date:byId('mle-v150-target-date').value,run_count:byId('mle-v150-run-count').value,mode:byId('mle-v150-mode').value};
            if(!payload.game_id || !payload.lottery_id || String(payload.lottery_id)==='0'){ setStatus('Choose a lottery before creating the campaign.'); return; }
            if(!payload.target_draw_date){ setStatus('No upcoming draw date was found for this lottery. Enter the target draw date manually.'); return; }
            setStatus('Creating campaign...'); post('create_campaign', payload, function(res){ if(res&&res.ok){ activeCampaign=res.campaign_uuid||''; campaignTotal=parseInt(String(res.created||payload.run_count||0),10)||0; currentOrdinal=0; sessionDone=0; setCounter(); clearLiveLedger(); setText('mle-v152-current-settings','Campaign created. Open it in SKAI to run the queue.'); appendLiveRow('Campaign created', String(campaignTotal)+' assignments for '+payload.game_id+' on '+payload.target_draw_date, 'Mode: '+payload.mode+' | Run this queue from SKAI.', 'queued'); setStatus('Created '+res.created+' assignments for '+payload.game_id+' on '+payload.target_draw_date+'. Campaign '+activeCampaign+'. Open it in SKAI to run.'); refresh(); } else { setStatus('Create failed: '+(res&&(res.error||res.message)||'unknown')); } });
          };
          byId('mle-v150-start').onclick=function(){ startSelectedQueue(); };
          byId('mle-v150-stop').onclick=function(){ running=false; setRunnerState('Stopped','Stop requested. Current SKAI iframe may finish, but no next assignment will start.'); setStatus('Stop requested. Current SKAI iframe may finish, but no next assignment will start.'); stopMonitor(); };
          byId('mle-v150-refresh').onclick=function(){ refresh(); setStatus('Summary refreshed.'); };
          byId('mle-v155-popout').onclick=function(){ openSkaiQueue(activeCampaign); };
          byId('mle-v155-wake-lock').onclick=function(){ if(!navigator.wakeLock||!navigator.wakeLock.request){ setStatus('Wake Lock is not supported in this browser. Keep the computer awake manually.'); return; } navigator.wakeLock.request('screen').then(function(lock){ wakeLock=lock; setStatus('Screen wake lock is active while this page stays open.'); }).catch(function(err){ setStatus('Wake Lock failed: '+(err&&err.message?err.message:'unknown')); }); };
          document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
            var btn = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-mle-v154-campaign-action]') : null;
            var uuid, total, action;
            if(!btn){ return; }
            uuid = btn.getAttribute('data-campaign-uuid') || '';
            total = btn.getAttribute('data-campaign-total') || '0';
            action = btn.getAttribute('data-mle-v154-campaign-action') || '';
            if(!uuid){ setStatus('Campaign action blocked: missing campaign id.'); return; }
            if(action === 'select'){ selectCampaign(uuid, total); return; }
            if(action === 'resume'){ campaignCommand('resume_prepare', uuid, function(res){ if(res && res.ok){ selectCampaign(uuid, total); setStatus('Prepared '+uuid+' for SKAI runner. Reset '+(res.changed||0)+' stuck running row(s). Starting selected queue.'); appendLiveRow('Prepared selected campaign for SKAI', uuid, 'Reset '+(res.changed||0)+' previously running row(s). SKAI will own the run/save loop.', 'running'); startSelectedQueue(); } else { setStatus('Resume failed: '+(res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown')); } }); return; }
            if(action === 'reset_running'){ if(window.confirm && !window.confirm('Reset stuck RUNNING rows back to QUEUED for this campaign?')){ return; } campaignCommand('reset_running', uuid); return; }
            if(action === 'retry_failed'){ if(window.confirm && !window.confirm('Move FAILED rows back to QUEUED for retry?')){ return; } campaignCommand('retry_failed', uuid); return; }
            if(action === 'delete'){ if(!(window.prompt && window.prompt('This deletes only the research queue/assignment rows for this campaign. Linked saved prediction records will remain. Type DELETE to continue.', '') === 'DELETE')){ setStatus('Delete cancelled.'); return; } campaignCommand('delete_campaign', uuid, function(res){ if(res && res.ok){ if(activeCampaign === uuid){ activeCampaign=''; running=false; setCounter(); } setStatus('Deleted campaign queue only. Assignments deleted: '+(res.assignments_deleted||0)+'. Saved predictions were not deleted.'); refresh(); } else { setStatus('Delete failed: '+(res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown')); } }); return; }
            if(action === 'delete_saved'){
              if(!(window.prompt && window.prompt('This permanently deletes the campaign queue and the saved prediction runs that are linked to this queue. It does not delete unrelated saved predictions. Type DELETE SAVED to continue.', '') === 'DELETE SAVED')){ setStatus('Delete saved runs cancelled.'); return; }
              post('campaign_command', {command:'delete_campaign_with_saved', campaign_uuid:uuid, confirm:'DELETE SAVED'}, function(res){
                if(res && res.ok){
                  if(activeCampaign === uuid){ activeCampaign=''; running=false; setCounter(); }
                  setStatus('Deleted queue and linked saved runs. Assignments deleted: '+(res.assignments_deleted||0)+'. Saved runs deleted: '+(res.saved_runs_deleted||0)+'.');
                  refresh();
                } else {
                  setStatus('Delete saved runs failed: '+(res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown'));
                }
              });
              return;
            }
          }, false);
          window.mleHiveResearchDebug = function(){ return {running:running, activeCampaign:activeCampaign, currentOrdinal:currentOrdinal, campaignTotal:campaignTotal, sessionDone:sessionDone, currentAssignmentId:currentAssignmentId, currentProgressPct:currentProgressPct, elapsed:currentRunStartedAt?fmtElapsed(Date.now()-currentRunStartedAt):'00:00', lastHeartbeatAt:lastHeartbeatAt, heartbeatAgeSeconds:lastHeartbeatAt?Math.floor((Date.now()-lastHeartbeatAt)/1000):null, hidden:document.hidden, status:(byId('mle-v150-status')?byId('mle-v150-status').textContent:'')}; };
          document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function(){ updateMonitor(); if(document.hidden){ setRunnerState(running?'Backgrounded':'Idle','Window is backgrounded; browser may throttle timers.'); } else if(running){ setRunnerState('Running','Window active again. Refreshing monitor.'); refresh(); } });
          window.addEventListener('message', function(ev){
            var d = ev && ev.data ? ev.data : null;
            if(d && d.type === 'skai_hive_research_progress'){
              var pp=d.payload||{};
              if(pp.assignment_id){ currentAssignmentId=String(pp.assignment_id); }
              if(pp.ordinal){ currentOrdinal=parseInt(String(pp.ordinal),10)||currentOrdinal; setCounter(); }
              setRunnerState('Running', pp.message || 'SKAI progress update');
              setProgress(pp.progress || currentProgressPct || 1, pp.message || 'SKAI progress');
              return;
            }
            if(d && d.type === 'skai_hive_research_chunk_done'){
              var cp=d.payload||{};
              try { if(activeChunkId){ localStorage.removeItem(activeChunkId); } } catch(e) {}
              if(cp.ok === false){ running=false; setRunnerState('Stopped','SKAI chunk stopped after a failed assignment.'); setStatus('SKAI chunk stopped: '+(cp.message||'failure reported')); stopMonitor(); refresh(); return; }
              setProgress(100,'Chunk complete');
              setRunnerState('Running','SKAI chunk complete. Moving to next chunk.');
              setStatus('SKAI-native chunk completed. Saved in this chunk: '+String(activeChunkSaved)+' / '+String(activeChunkSize)+'. Loading next chunk...');
              refresh();
              activeChunkSize=0; activeChunkSaved=0; activeChunkId='';
              if(running){ setTimeout(runNext, 1200); }
              return;
            }
            if(!d || d.type !== 'skai_hive_research_result'){ return; }
            post('record_result', d.payload || {}, function(res){
              var payload = d.payload || {};
              var recordedOk = !!(res && res.ok);
              var runnerOk = !!(payload && payload.ok);
              sessionDone++;
              setCounter();
              if(recordedOk && runnerOk){
                activeChunkSaved++;
                setProgress(Math.max(currentProgressPct, Math.min(95, Math.round((activeChunkSaved / Math.max(activeChunkSize,1))*90))), 'Saved assignment ' + activeChunkSaved + ' of current chunk');
                setRunnerState('Running','Saved. Continuing inside SKAI chunk.');
                appendLiveRow('Run ' + (payload.ordinal || currentOrdinal || '?') + ' / ' + (campaignTotal || '?') + ' | assignment #' + (payload.assignment_id || ''), 'SAVED | ' + (payload.message || 'SKAI assignment completed and saved through the regular 9-run batch save path.'), 'Prediction: main ' + (payload.main_numbers || []).join(' ') + ' | extra ' + (payload.extra_numbers || []).join(' ') + ' | ' + settingsSummary(payload.settings_snapshot || {}, payload.settings_fingerprint || ''), 'saved');
                setStatus('Recorded saved assignment #' + (payload.assignment_id||'') + '. Continuing current SKAI-native chunk.');
                refresh();
              }
              else {
                setProgress(Math.max(currentProgressPct,50),'Failed or save not confirmed');
                setRunnerState('Stopped','Failed or save not confirmed.');
                var failMsg = recordedOk
                  ? (payload.message || 'SKAI reported that the run was not saved. Runner stopped so the campaign does not burn through assignments.')
                  : (res && (res.error||res.message) || 'unknown record_result failure');
                appendLiveRow('Run ' + (payload.ordinal || currentOrdinal || '?') + ' / ' + (campaignTotal || '?') + ' | assignment #' + (payload.assignment_id || ''), 'FAILED | ' + failMsg, settingsSummary(payload.settings_snapshot || {}, payload.settings_fingerprint || ''), 'failed');
                setStatus('Stopped after failed assignment #' + (payload.assignment_id || '') + ': ' + failMsg);
                running=false;
                stopMonitor();
                refresh();
              }
            });
          }, false);
        }());
        </script>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV150RenderSummaryHtml')) {
    function mylottoexpertV150RenderSummaryHtml(array $summary) {
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="mle-v152-research-report">
          <div class="mle-v123-simple-list">
          <?php if (empty($summary['campaigns'])): ?><div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No campaigns yet</strong><span>Create an admin research campaign above.</span></div><?php else: foreach ((array)$summary['campaigns'] as $c):
              $assignments = (int)($c['assignments'] ?? 0);
              $saved = (int)($c['saved'] ?? 0);
              $running = (int)($c['running'] ?? 0);
              $failed = (int)($c['failed'] ?? 0);
              $queued = isset($c['queued']) ? (int)$c['queued'] : max(0, $assignments - $saved - $running - $failed);
              $pct = $assignments > 0 ? round(($saved + $failed) * 100 / $assignments, 1) : 0;
          ?>
            <div class="mle-v123-simple-row">
              <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_label'] ?? $c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
              <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Attempted ' . ($saved + $failed) . ' / ' . $assignments . ' (' . $pct . '%) | Saved ' . $saved . ' | Running ' . $running . ' | Failed ' . $failed . ' | Queued ' . $queued . ' | Target ' . (string)($c['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              <div style="height:8px;background:#e2e8f0;border-radius:999px;margin-top:8px;overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:8px;width:<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)min(100, max(0, $pct)), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>%;background:#2563eb;border-radius:999px;"></div></div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:9px;">
                <button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="select" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Select</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="resume" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Run in SKAI</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="reset_running" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Reset stuck running</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="retry_failed" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Retry failed</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-outline" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="delete" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Delete queue only</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-outline" style="border-color:#fecaca;color:#991b1b;" data-mle-v154-campaign-action="delete_saved" data-campaign-uuid="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($c['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" data-campaign-total="<?php echo (int)$assignments; ?>">Delete queue and saved runs</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
          </div>

          <details style="margin-top:1rem;">
            <summary><strong>Run-by-run progress ledger</strong> <span style="color:#64748b;font-weight:500;">latest 200 assignments, one line per run</span></summary>
            <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
            <?php if (empty($summary['recent_assignments'])): ?>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No assignment rows yet</strong><span>Create a campaign to see every run, status, fingerprint, settings, and result message.</span></div>
            <?php else: foreach ((array)$summary['recent_assignments'] as $a):
                $status = strtolower((string)($a['runner_status'] ?? $a['assigned_status'] ?? ''));
                $statusLabel = $status !== '' ? strtoupper($status) : 'UNKNOWN';
                $settingsJson = (string)($a['assignment_settings_json'] ?? '');
            ?>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-row" style="border-left:4px solid <?php echo $status === 'saved' ? '#16a34a' : ($status === 'failed' ? '#dc2626' : ($status === 'running' ? '#2563eb' : '#94a3b8')); ?>;">
                <strong><?php echo 'Run assignment #' . (int)($a['assignment_id'] ?? 0) . ' | ' . htmlspecialchars($statusLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ' | ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($a['game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ' | target ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($a['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
                <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Started ' . (string)($a['runner_started_at'] ?? '') . ' | Saved ' . (string)($a['runner_saved_at'] ?? '') . ' | ' . (string)($a['runner_message'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <span style="display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#334155;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($a['settings_summary'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                <details style="margin-top:6px;"><summary>Full settings JSON and fingerprint</summary><pre style="white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.35;max-height:220px;overflow:auto;">Fingerprint: <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($a['assignment_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
<?php echo htmlspecialchars($settingsJson, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></pre></details>
              </div>
            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
            </div>
          </details>

          <details style="margin-top:1rem;">
            <summary><strong>Top 50 scored/saved SKAI results</strong> <span style="color:#64748b;font-weight:500;">colored-ball view</span></summary>
            <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
            <?php if (empty($summary['top50'])): ?>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No Top 50 rows yet</strong><span>After SKAI saves and the rows are scored, the best research results appear here with colored prediction balls.</span></div>
            <?php else: $rank=1; foreach ((array)$summary['top50'] as $r):
                $actualMain = mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers((string)($r['actual_main_numbers'] ?? ''));
                $actualExtra = mylottoexpertV152CsvNumbers((string)($r['actual_extra_numbers'] ?? ''));
            ?>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-row">
                <strong><?php echo '#' . (int)$rank . ' | saved row ' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . ' | score ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($r['learning_score'] ?? '0'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ' | hits ' . (int)($r['main_hits_count'] ?? 0) . '+' . (int)($r['extra_hits_count'] ?? 0); ?></strong>
                <div style="margin-top:6px;"><span style="font-weight:800;color:#334155;margin-right:8px;">Prediction</span><?php echo mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet((string)($r['main_numbers'] ?? ''), $actualMain, false); ?> <?php echo mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet((string)($r['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? ''), $actualExtra, true); ?></div>
                <?php if (!empty($actualMain) || !empty($actualExtra)): ?><div style="margin-top:4px;"><span style="font-weight:800;color:#334155;margin-right:8px;">Actual</span><?php echo mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet($actualMain, $actualMain, false); ?> <?php echo mylottoexpertV152RenderBallSet($actualExtra, $actualExtra, true); ?></div><?php endif; ?>
                <span style="display:block;margin-top:6px;color:#334155;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Assignment ' . (string)($r['hive_assignment_id'] ?? '') . ' | Status ' . (string)($r['evaluation_status'] ?? '') . ' | ' . (string)($r['settings_summary'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
              </div>
            <?php $rank++; endforeach; endif; ?>
            </div>
          </details>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
