if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $rawTable)
    {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote((string)$rawTable));
            return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $rawTable)
    {
        static $cache = array();
        $rawTable = (string)$rawTable;
        if (isset($cache[$rawTable])) { return $cache[$rawTable]; }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable));
            $cols = $db->loadColumn();
            $cache[$rawTable] = is_array($cols) ? array_fill_keys($cols, true) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $cache[$rawTable] = array(); }
        return $cache[$rawTable];
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols(array $cols, array $required)
    {
        foreach ($required as $c) { if (!isset($cols[$c])) { return false; } }
        return true;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $tableSql, $whereSql, $limit)
    {
        $limit = max(1, min(500, (int)$limit));
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' FROM ' . $tableSql . ' WHERE ' . $whereSql . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
            $ids = $db->loadColumn();
            return is_array($ids) ? array_map('intval', $ids) : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $tableSql, $whereSql)
    {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ' . $tableSql . ' WHERE ' . $whereSql);
            return (int)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return -1; }
    }
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminLotteryNameMap')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminLotteryNameMap($db, array $lotteryIds)
    {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($lotteryIds as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; } }
        if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }
        try {
            $raw = $db->getPrefix() . 'lotteries';
            if (!mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $raw)) { return array(); }
            $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $raw);
            if (!isset($cols['id'])) { return array(); }
            $nameCol = '';
            foreach (array('name','lottery_name','game_name','title') as $c) { if (isset($cols[$c])) { $nameCol = $c; break; } }
            if ($nameCol === '') { return array(); }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ', ' . $db->quoteName($nameCol) . ' AS lottery_name FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__lotteries') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ')');
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            $out = array();
            foreach ((array)$rows as $r) { $out[(int)$r['id']] = trim((string)($r['lottery_name'] ?? '')); }
            return $out;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $tableSql, array $cols, $whereSql, $limit = 25)
    {
        $limit = max(1, min(50, (int)$limit));
        $wanted = array('id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','lottery_name','target_draw_date','draw_date','actual_draw_date','user_id');
        $select = array();
        foreach ($wanted as $c) { if (isset($cols[$c])) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); } }
        if (!in_array($db->quoteName('id'), $select, true) && isset($cols['id'])) { array_unshift($select, $db->quoteName('id')); }
        if (empty($select) || !isset($cols['id'])) { return array(); }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $tableSql . ' WHERE ' . $whereSql . ' ORDER BY ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC LIMIT ' . (int)$limit);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return array(); }
            $lotIds = array();
            foreach ($rows as $r) {
                $lid = (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? $r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($lid > 0) { $lotIds[$lid] = $lid; }
            }
            $nameMap = mylottoexpertV55AdminLotteryNameMap($db, array_values($lotIds));
            $groups = array();
            foreach ($rows as $r) {
                $lid = (int)($r['lottery_id'] ?? $r['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                $gid = trim((string)($r['game_id'] ?? $r['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
                $name = trim((string)($r['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
                if ($name === '' && $lid > 0 && isset($nameMap[$lid])) { $name = (string)$nameMap[$lid]; }
                if ($name === '') { $name = $lid > 0 ? ('Lottery ID ' . $lid) : ($gid !== '' ? ('Game ' . $gid) : 'Unknown lottery'); }
                $draw = trim((string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? $r['draw_date'] ?? $r['actual_draw_date'] ?? ''));
                $key = (string)$lid . '|' . (string)$gid . '|' . (string)$name . '|' . (string)$draw;
                if (!isset($groups[$key])) {
                    $groups[$key] = array('lottery_id'=>$lid,'game_id'=>$gid,'lottery_name'=>$name,'draw_date'=>$draw,'sample_ids'=>array(),'sample_users'=>array(),'count'=>0);
                }
                $groups[$key]['count']++;
                $groups[$key]['sample_ids'][] = (int)($r['id'] ?? 0);
                $uid = (int)($r['user_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($uid > 0) { $groups[$key]['sample_users'][$uid] = $uid; }
            }
            $out = array_values($groups);
            foreach ($out as &$g) { $g['sample_users'] = array_values($g['sample_users']); $g['sample_ids'] = array_slice($g['sample_ids'], 0, 10); }
            return $out;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminRollbackDir')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminRollbackDir()
    {
        return rtrim((string)JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR, '/') . '/logs/mle_repair_rollbacks';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot($db, $tableName, array $ids, $issueKey, $adminUserId)
    {
        $ids = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('intval', $ids))));
        if (empty($ids)) { return ''; }
        $tableName = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$tableName);
        if ($tableName === '') { return ''; }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT * FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $tableName) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ')');
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return ''; }
            $dir = mylottoexpertV55AdminRollbackDir();
            if (!is_dir($dir)) { @mkdir($dir, 0755, true); }
            $token = date('Ymd_His') . '_' . preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '_', (string)$issueKey) . '_' . substr(sha1(json_encode($ids) . microtime(true)), 0, 10);
            $path = $dir . '/rollback_' . $token . '.json';
            $payload = array('token'=>$token,'issue_key'=>(string)$issueKey,'table'=>(string)$tableName,'admin_user_id'=>(int)$adminUserId,'created_at'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'row_count'=>count($rows),'rows'=>$rows);
            $json = json_encode($payload, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            if ($json === false) { return ''; }
            return @file_put_contents($path, $json, LOCK_EX) !== false ? $token : '';
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return ''; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminLatestRollbackSnapshot')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminLatestRollbackSnapshot()
    {
        $dir = mylottoexpertV55AdminRollbackDir();
        if (!is_dir($dir)) { return array(); }
        $files = glob($dir . '/rollback_*.json');
        if (!is_array($files) || empty($files)) { return array(); }
        rsort($files, SORT_STRING);
        $path = $files[0];
        $raw = @file_get_contents($path);
        $data = json_decode((string)$raw, true);
        if (!is_array($data)) { return array(); }
        $data['_path'] = $path;
        return $data;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminApplyRollbackSnapshot')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminApplyRollbackSnapshot($db, $token = '')
    {
        $dir = mylottoexpertV55AdminRollbackDir();
        $path = '';
        $token = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$token);
        if ($token !== '') { $path = $dir . '/rollback_' . $token . '.json'; }
        else { $latest = mylottoexpertV55AdminLatestRollbackSnapshot(); $path = (string)($latest['_path'] ?? ''); }
        if ($path === '' || !is_file($path)) { return array('ok'=>false,'updated'=>0,'message'=>'No rollback snapshot was found.'); }
        $data = json_decode((string)@file_get_contents($path), true);
        if (!is_array($data) || empty($data['table']) || empty($data['rows']) || !is_array($data['rows'])) { return array('ok'=>false,'updated'=>0,'message'=>'Rollback snapshot is invalid.'); }
        $table = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$data['table']);
        $updated = 0;
        try {
            foreach ($data['rows'] as $row) {
                if (!is_array($row) || !isset($row['id'])) { continue; }
                $sets = array();
                foreach ($row as $col => $val) {
                    if ($col === 'id') { continue; }
                    $col = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '', (string)$col);
                    if ($col === '') { continue; }
                    $sets[] = $db->quoteName($col) . ' = ' . ($val === null ? 'NULL' : $db->quote((string)$val));
                }
                if (empty($sets)) { continue; }
                $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__' . $table) . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id']);
                $db->execute();
                $updated++;
            }
            @rename($path, $path . '.applied');
            return array('ok'=>true,'updated'=>$updated,'message'=>'Rollback restored ' . $updated . ' rows from snapshot ' . (string)($data['token'] ?? '') . '.');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('ok'=>false,'updated'=>$updated,'message'=>'Rollback failed after ' . $updated . ' rows: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AAAdminAuditCutoffDate')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AAAdminAuditCutoffDate() { return '2026-05-21'; }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, array $cols, $alias = '')
    {
        $prefix = $alias !== '' ? rtrim((string)$alias, '.') . '.' : '';
        $cutoff = $db->quote(mylottoexpertV2AAAdminAuditCutoffDate());
        $dateCols = array('date_saved','generated_at','evaluated_at','actual_draw_date','target_draw_date','created_at','updated_at','assigned_at','runner_saved_at','runner_started_at');
        $parts = array();
        foreach ($dateCols as $col) {
            if (!isset($cols[$col])) { continue; }
            $qcol = $prefix . $db->quoteName($col);
            $parts[] = '(NULLIF(NULLIF(' . $qcol . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '), ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ') >= ' . $cutoff . ')';
        }
        if (empty($parts)) {

            return '0=1';
        }
        return '(' . implode(' OR ', $parts) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($whereSql, $scopeSql)
    {
        $whereSql = trim((string)$whereSql);
        $scopeSql = trim((string)$scopeSql);
        if ($scopeSql === '' || $scopeSql === '1=1') { return $whereSql; }
        if ($whereSql === '') { return $scopeSql; }
        return '(' . $whereSql . ') AND (' . $scopeSql . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta($includeLegacy)
    {
        return array(
            'include_legacy' => (bool)$includeLegacy,
            'cutoff_date' => mylottoexpertV2AAAdminAuditCutoffDate(),
            'label' => $includeLegacy ? 'Including legacy pre-Hive rows' : '2026-05-21 forward only',
            'note' => $includeLegacy
                ? 'Legacy pre-Hive rows are included because admin explicitly requested them.'
                : 'Legacy rows before 2026-05-21 are ignored by default because full Hive learning started on 2026-05-21.'
        );
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AABackfillSavedMethodIdentityScoped')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AABackfillSavedMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit = 25, $includeLegacy = false)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $includeLegacy = (bool)$includeLegacy;
        $scopeMeta = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta($includeLegacy);
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedTable = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        try {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $savedTable);
            if (!isset($cols['id']) || !isset($cols['analysis_method_key']) || !isset($cols['source'])) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'Required saved-row method columns are missing.'); }
            $selectCols = array('id','source','analysis_method_key');
            foreach (array('analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','analysis_source_page','origin_source','model_family','batch_type','settings_json','settings','label','template_name','skai_run_mode','risk_profile','strategy_profile','focus_profile','signal_blend_label','date_saved','generated_at','target_draw_date','evaluated_at','actual_draw_date','created_at','updated_at') as $c) {
                if (isset($cols[$c]) && !in_array($c, $selectCols, true)) { $selectCols[] = $c; }
            }
            $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
            if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $selectCols))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->where($where)
                ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit($limit);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'No scoped saved rows needed method identity backfill.'); }
            $updated = 0;
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) : (function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? '') : strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? ''))));
                $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method));
                if ($method === '' || $method === 'unknown') { continue; }
                $labels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method) : array('', '');
                $sets = array(
                    $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote($method),
                    $db->quoteName('analysis_schema_version') . ' = ' . $db->quote('1')
                );
                if (isset($cols['analysis_engine_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' IS NULL THEN ' . $db->quote((string)($labels[0] ?? '')) . ' ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' END'; }
                if (isset($cols['analysis_track_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' IS NULL THEN ' . $db->quote((string)($labels[1] ?? '')) . ' ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' END'; }
                $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->set($sets)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id'])
                    ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)');
                $db->setQuery($q2); $db->execute(); $updated++;
            }
            return array('updated'=>$updated,'message'=>'Scoped saved-row method identity backfill completed.');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'Scoped saved-row method backfill failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2AABackfillPerformanceMethodIdentityScoped')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2AABackfillPerformanceMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit = 25, $includeLegacy = false)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $includeLegacy = (bool)$includeLegacy;
        $scopeMeta = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta($includeLegacy);
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $perfTable = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
        try {
            $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $perfTable);
            if (!isset($cols['id']) || !isset($cols['analysis_method_key']) || !isset($cols['source'])) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'Required performance method columns are missing.'); }
            $selectCols = array('id','source','analysis_method_key');
            foreach (array('analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','date_saved','generated_at','target_draw_date','evaluated_at','actual_draw_date','created_at','updated_at','draw_date') as $c) {
                if (isset($cols[$c]) && !in_array($c, $selectCols, true)) { $selectCols[] = $c; }
            }
            $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
            if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select(array_map(array($db, 'quoteName'), $selectCols))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
                ->where($where)
                ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit($limit);
            $db->setQuery($q); $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'No scoped performance rows needed method identity backfill.'); }
            $updated = 0;
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $src = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
                if (in_array($src, array('ai_prediction','ai','neural_ai','neural'), true)) { $method = 'skai'; }
                else { $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? '') : ''; $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method)); }
                if ($method === '' || $method === 'unknown') { continue; }
                $labels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method) : array('', '');
                $sets = array($db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote($method));
                if (isset($cols['analysis_engine_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_engine_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)($labels[0] ?? '')); }
                if (isset($cols['analysis_track_label'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('analysis_track_label') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)($labels[1] ?? '')); }
                $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
                    ->set($sets)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$row['id'])
                    ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL)');
                $db->setQuery($q2); $db->execute(); $updated++;
            }
            return array('updated'=>$updated,'message'=>'Scoped performance-row method identity backfill completed.');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'Scoped performance-row method backfill failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminAuditSummary')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminAuditSummary($db, $limit = 25, $includeLegacy = false)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(5000, (int)$limit));
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedRaw = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $perfRaw  = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $queueRaw  = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
        $issues = array();
        $warnings = array();
        $addIssue = function($key, $label, $severity, $description, $ids, $fixable, $fixOp, $totalFound = null, $tableLabel = '', $lotteryContexts = array()) use (&$issues) {
            $sampleIds = array_slice((array)$ids, 0, 25);
            $totalFound = ($totalFound === null) ? count((array)$ids) : (int)$totalFound;
            $issues[] = array(
                'key' => (string)$key,
                'label' => (string)$label,
                'severity' => (string)$severity,
                'description' => (string)$description,
                'total_found' => $totalFound,
                'sample_count' => count((array)$ids),
                'sample_ids' => $sampleIds,
                'lottery_contexts' => is_array($lotteryContexts) ? $lotteryContexts : array(),
                'fixable' => (bool)$fixable,
                'fix_op' => (string)$fixOp,
                'table' => (string)$tableLabel
            );
        };

        if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
            $sCols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $savedRaw);
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($sCols, array('id','analysis_method_key','source'))) {
                $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $sCols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where);
                $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $sCols, $where, 50);
                $addIssue('saved_missing_method', 'Saved rows missing method identity', 'repairable', 'Saved predictions have a source, but the canonical analysis_method_key is blank. Safe repair can backfill the method identity from existing source/settings metadata.', $ids, true, 'safe_repair', $total, 'user_saved_numbers', $contexts);
            }
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($sCols, array('id','evaluation_status','actual_draw_date'))) {
                $hitExpr = array();
                if (isset($sCols['main_hits_count'])) { $hitExpr[] = 'COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('main_hits_count') . ',0) > 0'; }
                if (isset($sCols['extra_hits_count'])) { $hitExpr[] = 'COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('extra_hits_count') . ',0) > 0'; }
                $hitSql = !empty($hitExpr) ? '(' . implode(' OR ', $hitExpr) . ')' : '1=1';
                $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('unscored') . ',' . $db->quote('waiting') . ')'
                       . ' AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') NOT IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ') AND ' . $hitSql;
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $sCols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where);
                $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $sCols, $where, 50);
                $addIssue('pending_with_actual_result', 'Saved rows still pending after actual result', 'repairable', 'Rows already have actual draw/result evidence but still look pending. Safe repair can mark these exact rows as scored/evaluated without scanning every user.', $ids, true, 'safe_repair', $total, 'user_saved_numbers', $contexts);
            }
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($sCols, array('id','target_draw_date'))) {
                $where = '(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . '))';
                if (isset($sCols['evaluation_status'])) { $where .= ' AND LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('unscored') . ')'; }
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $sCols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where);
                $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $sCols, $where, 50);
                $addIssue('missing_target_draw', 'Saved rows missing target draw date', 'review', 'A prediction without a target draw date cannot be proven against a specific draw. This is reported for review and is not auto-fixed because guessing the draw date would be unsafe.', $ids, false, 'review_only', $total, 'user_saved_numbers', $contexts);
            }
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($sCols, array('id','hive_contract_status'))) {
                $where = '(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $sCols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where);
                $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $sCols, $where, 50);
                $addIssue('missing_hive_contract', 'Saved rows missing Hive contract status', 'repairable', 'Older SKAI rows may be missing newer Hive tracking fields. Safe repair runs the existing contract backfill in a bounded chunk.', $ids, true, 'contract_backfill', $total, 'user_saved_numbers', $contexts);
            }
        } else {
            $warnings[] = 'user_saved_numbers table was not found.';
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $perfRaw)) {
            $pCols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $perfRaw);
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($pCols, array('id','analysis_method_key','source'))) {
                $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $pCols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'), $where, $limit);
                $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'), $where);
                $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'), $pCols, $where, 50);
                $addIssue('performance_missing_method', 'Performance rows missing method identity', 'repairable', 'Scored/performance rows have a source but no canonical analysis_method_key. Safe repair can backfill from the saved source.', $ids, true, 'safe_repair', $total, 'skai_learning_performance', $contexts);
            }
        }

        if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $assignRaw)) {
            $aCols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $assignRaw);
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($aCols, array('id','assigned_status'))) {
                $dateCol = isset($aCols['assigned_at']) ? 'assigned_at' : (isset($aCols['updated_at']) ? 'updated_at' : (isset($aCols['created_at']) ? 'created_at' : ''));
                if ($dateCol !== '') {
                    $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('claimed') . ',' . $db->quote('processing') . ') AND ' . $db->quoteName($dateCol) . ' < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)';
                    if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $aCols)); }
                    $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'), $where, $limit);
                    $total = mylottoexpertV2YAdminCountRows($db, $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'), $where);
                    $contexts = mylottoexpertV55AdminIssueLotteryContexts($db, $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'), $aCols, $where, 50);
                    $addIssue('stale_running_assignments', 'Stale running/claimed assignments', 'repairable', 'Some assignment rows appear stuck in running/claimed status for more than two hours. Safe repair can release only these stale rows back to queued/pending.', $ids, true, 'safe_repair', $total, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments', $contexts);
                }
            }
        }

        return array('ok'=>true,'limit'=>$limit,'issues'=>$issues,'warnings'=>$warnings,'generated_at'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'scope'=>$scopeMeta);
    }
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV55AdminRepairIssue')) {
    function mylottoexpertV55AdminRepairIssue($db, $issueKey, $limit = 25, $adminUserId = 0, $includeLegacy = false)
    {
        $issueKey = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)$issueKey);
        $limit = max(5, min(5000, (int)$limit));
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedRaw = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $perfRaw = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $scopeMeta = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta((bool)$includeLegacy);
        $out = array('attempted'=>1,'updated'=>0,'actions'=>array(),'warnings'=>array(),'issue_key'=>$issueKey,'admin_user_id'=>(int)$adminUserId,'ran_at'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'scope'=>$scopeMeta,'rollback_token'=>'');
        try {
            if ($issueKey === 'saved_missing_method') {
                if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
                    $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $savedRaw);
                    $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
                    if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
                    $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                    $out['rollback_token'] = mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot($db, 'user_saved_numbers', $ids, $issueKey, $adminUserId);
                }
                $res = mylottoexpertV2AABackfillSavedMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit, (bool)$includeLegacy);
                $out['updated'] = (int)($res['updated'] ?? 0); $out['actions'][] = (string)($res['message'] ?? 'Saved method repair completed.');
            } elseif ($issueKey === 'performance_missing_method') {
                if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $perfRaw)) {
                    $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $perfRaw);
                    $where = '(' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key') . ' IS NULL) AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('source') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote('');
                    if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
                    $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'), $where, $limit);
                    $out['rollback_token'] = mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot($db, 'skai_learning_performance', $ids, $issueKey, $adminUserId);
                }
                $res = mylottoexpertV2AABackfillPerformanceMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit, (bool)$includeLegacy);
                $out['updated'] = (int)($res['updated'] ?? 0); $out['actions'][] = (string)($res['message'] ?? 'Performance method repair completed.');
            } elseif ($issueKey === 'pending_with_actual_result') {
                if (!mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) { return $out; }
                $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $savedRaw);
                if (!mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($cols, array('id','evaluation_status','actual_draw_date'))) { return $out; }
                $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('unscored') . ',' . $db->quote('waiting') . ') AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') NOT IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')';
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                if (!empty($ids)) {
                    $out['rollback_token'] = mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot($db, 'user_saved_numbers', $ids, $issueKey, $adminUserId);
                    $sets = array($db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('scored'));
                    if (isset($cols['evaluated_at'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' = COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . '), NOW())'; }
                    $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ')');
                    $db->execute(); $out['updated'] = count($ids); $out['actions'][] = 'Marked ' . count($ids) . ' exact-result saved rows as scored.';
                }
            } elseif ($issueKey === 'missing_hive_contract') {
                $res = function_exists('mylottoexpertV135BackfillSkaiContractMissing') ? mylottoexpertV135BackfillSkaiContractMissing($db, $limit) : array('updated'=>0,'message'=>'Contract backfill function missing.');
                $out['updated'] = (int)($res['updated'] ?? 0); $out['actions'][] = 'Contract backfill: ' . (string)($res['message'] ?? 'completed');
            } elseif ($issueKey === 'stale_running_assignments') {
                if (!mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $assignRaw)) { return $out; }
                $cols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $assignRaw);
                if (!mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($cols, array('id','assigned_status'))) { return $out; }
                $dateCol = isset($cols['assigned_at']) ? 'assigned_at' : (isset($cols['updated_at']) ? 'updated_at' : (isset($cols['created_at']) ? 'created_at' : ''));
                if ($dateCol === '') { return $out; }
                $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('claimed') . ',' . $db->quote('processing') . ') AND ' . $db->quoteName($dateCol) . ' < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)';
                if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $cols)); }
                $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'), $where, $limit);
                if (!empty($ids)) {
                    $out['rollback_token'] = mylottoexpertV55AdminStoreRollbackSnapshot($db, 'mle_lottery_research_assignments', $ids, $issueKey, $adminUserId);
                    $sets = array($db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued'));
                    if (isset($cols['last_reconciled_at'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = NOW()'; }
                    $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ')');
                    $db->execute(); $out['updated'] = count($ids); $out['actions'][] = 'Released ' . count($ids) . ' stale assignment rows back to queued.';
                }
            } else {
                $out['warnings'][] = 'Unknown or review-only repair lane. Nothing was changed.';
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Repair issue failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminSafeRepairChunk')) {
    function mylottoexpertV2YAdminSafeRepairChunk($db, $limit = 25, $adminUserId = 0, $includeLegacy = false)
    {
        $limit = max(5, min(5000, (int)$limit));
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedRaw = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $scopeMeta = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminScopeMeta((bool)$includeLegacy);
        $out = array('attempted'=>0,'updated'=>0,'actions'=>array(),'warnings'=>array(),'admin_user_id'=>(int)$adminUserId,'ran_at'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'scope'=>$scopeMeta);

        try {
            $out['attempted']++;
            $res = mylottoexpertV2AABackfillSavedMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit, (bool)$includeLegacy);
            $out['updated'] += (int)($res['updated'] ?? 0);
            $out['actions'][] = 'Saved-row method identity scoped repair: ' . (string)($res['message'] ?? 'completed');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Saved method scoped repair failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            $out['attempted']++;
            $res = mylottoexpertV2AABackfillPerformanceMethodIdentityScoped($db, $limit, (bool)$includeLegacy);
            $out['updated'] += (int)($res['updated'] ?? 0);
            $out['actions'][] = 'Performance-row method identity scoped repair: ' . (string)($res['message'] ?? 'completed');
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Performance method scoped repair failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
                $sCols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $savedRaw);
                if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($sCols, array('id','evaluation_status','actual_draw_date'))) {
                    $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('pending') . ',' . $db->quote('unscored') . ',' . $db->quote('waiting') . ') AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('actual_draw_date') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') NOT IN (' . $db->quote('') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')';
                    if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $sCols)); }
                    $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'), $where, $limit);
                    if (!empty($ids)) {
                        $sets = array($db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('scored'));
                        if (isset($sCols['evaluated_at'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ' = COALESCE(NULLIF(' . $db->quoteName('evaluated_at') . ',' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . '), NOW())'; }
                        $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ')');
                        $db->execute();
                        $out['updated'] += count($ids);
                        $out['actions'][] = 'Marked ' . count($ids) . ' exact-result saved rows as scored.';
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Pending/scored saved-row repair failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        try {
            if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminTableExists($db, $assignRaw)) {
                $aCols = mylottoexpertV2YAdminColumns($db, $assignRaw);
                if (mylottoexpertV2YAdminHasCols($aCols, array('id','assigned_status'))) {
                    $dateCol = isset($aCols['assigned_at']) ? 'assigned_at' : (isset($aCols['updated_at']) ? 'updated_at' : (isset($aCols['created_at']) ? 'created_at' : ''));
                    if ($dateCol !== '') {
                        $where = 'LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ')) IN (' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('claimed') . ',' . $db->quote('processing') . ') AND ' . $db->quoteName($dateCol) . ' < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)';
                        if (!$includeLegacy) { $where = mylottoexpertV2AAAdminApplyScope($where, mylottoexpertV2AAAdminDateScopeWhere($db, $aCols)); }
                        $ids = mylottoexpertV2YAdminSampleIds($db, $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'), $where, $limit);
                        if (!empty($ids)) {
                            $sets = array($db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued'));
                            if (isset($aCols['last_reconciled_at'])) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = NOW()'; }
                            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ')');
                            $db->execute();
                            $out['updated'] += count($ids);
                            $out['actions'][] = 'Released ' . count($ids) . ' stale assignment rows back to queued.';
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $out['warnings'][] = 'Stale assignment repair failed: ' . $e->getMessage(); }

        return $out;
    }
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertPhase49AdminToolsRequested')) {
    function mylottoexpertPhase49AdminToolsRequested($app)
    {
        try {
            $in = $app->input;
            $requested = ((int)$in->getInt('mle_admin_tools', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_dbi_load', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_maintenance', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_perf_diag', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_admin_perf', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_full_workspace', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_work_notice_admin', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_admin_audit_details', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_learning_audit', 0) === 1)
                || ((int)$in->getInt('mle_batch_admin', 0) === 1);
            if (strtoupper((string)$in->getMethod()) === 'POST') {
                $requested = $requested
                    || trim((string)$in->post->getString('mle_admin_op', '')) !== ''
                    || trim((string)$in->post->getString('mle_dbi_action', '')) !== ''
                    || trim((string)$in->post->getString('mle_work_notice_action', '')) !== '';
            }
            return (bool)$requested;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertPhase49AdminLiteLauncher')) {
    function mylottoexpertPhase49AdminLiteLauncher()
    {
        try { $uri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { $uri = null; }
        $makeUrl = function($key, $value = '1') use ($uri) {
            if ($uri) {
                $u = clone $uri;
                $u->setVar($key, $value);
                return htmlspecialchars($u->toString(), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
            }
            return '?' . rawurlencode((string)$key) . '=' . rawurlencode((string)$value);
        };
        $links = array(
            array('Admin Operations', 'Queue seeding, learning ingest, contract backfill, reconciliation, and safe repair controls.', $makeUrl('mle_admin_tools')),
            array('Duplicate Batch Audit', 'Open duplicate-batch integrity tools only when you need to inspect or repair duplicate saved batches.', $makeUrl('mle_dbi_load')),
            array('Maintenance Tools', 'Open schema/maintenance controls only when intentionally performing maintenance.', $makeUrl('mle_maintenance')),
            array('Performance Diagnostics', 'Open browser-side performance diagnostics for this workspace.', $makeUrl('mle_perf_diag')),
            array('Full Workspace', 'Load the uncapped admin workspace only when a full forensic inspection is required.', $makeUrl('mle_full_workspace')),
            array('Show Research in Workspace', 'Temporarily include admin research runs as full lottery cards for inspection only.', $makeUrl('mle_show_admin_research'))
        );
        $summary = array('ok'=>false,'total'=>0,'queued'=>0,'running'=>0,'saved'=>0,'failed'=>0,'recent'=>array());
        try { $summary = mylottoexpertPhase52LoadAdminResearchSummary(\Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo(), \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser(), 6); } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <section class="mle-decision-summary mle-admin-lite-launcher" aria-label="Admin tools launcher">
          <div class="mle-ci-panel mle-ci-panel--quiet">
            <div class="mle-ci-panel__head">
              <span class="mle-ci-panel__eyebrow">Admin mode</span>
              <h3 class="mle-ci-panel__title">Admin tools are available on demand</h3>
              <p class="mle-ci-panel__text">To protect page speed, MyLottoExpert now loads the normal workspace first. Heavy admin diagnostics, audits, maintenance, duplicate checks, and full-workspace reports load only when you open them intentionally.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-admin-lite-launcher__grid">
              <?php foreach ($links as $link): ?>
                <a class="mle-admin-lite-launcher__card" href="<?php echo $link[2]; ?>">
                  <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($link[0], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
                  <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars($link[1], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                </a>
              <?php endforeach; ?>
            </div>
            <?php if (!empty($summary['ok']) && (int)($summary['total'] ?? 0) > 0): ?>
              <div class="mle-admin-research-compact" aria-label="Admin research summary">
                <strong>Admin research runs are hidden from workspace cards by default.</strong>
                <span>Total <?php echo (int)$summary['total']; ?> | Queued <?php echo (int)$summary['queued']; ?> | Running <?php echo (int)$summary['running']; ?> | Saved <?php echo (int)$summary['saved']; ?> | Failed <?php echo (int)$summary['failed']; ?></span>
                <?php if (!empty($summary['recent'])): ?>
                  <div class="mle-admin-research-compact__list">
                    <?php foreach ((array)$summary['recent'] as $item): ?>
                      <div class="mle-admin-research-compact__item">
                        <b><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($item['game_id'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></b>
                        <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars('Draw ' . (string)($item['target_draw_date'] ?? '') . ' | Runs ' . (int)($item['assignment_count'] ?? 0) . ' | Saved ' . (int)($item['saved_count'] ?? 0) . ' | Failed ' . (int)($item['failed_count'] ?? 0), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                      </div>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                  </div>
                <?php endif; ?>
              </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
          </div>
        </section>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertV100RenderAdminHiveResearchDashboard($db, $user)
{

    $mleV124IsSuperUser = false;
    try {
        $mleV124IsSuperUser = is_object($user)
            && method_exists($user, 'authorise')
            && $user->authorise('core.admin');
    } catch (\Throwable $mleV124GateError) {
        $mleV124IsSuperUser = false;
    }
    if (!$mleV124IsSuperUser) {
        return '';
    }

    if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertV100LoadHiveDashboardData')) {
        return '';
    }

    if (!mylottoexpertPhase49AdminToolsRequested($mlePhase49App)) {
        return mylottoexpertPhase49AdminLiteLauncher();
    }

    $__mleV109SeedSummary = array('attempted'=>0, 'created'=>0, 'existing'=>0, 'skipped'=>0, 'items'=>array(), 'manual'=>true, 'not_run'=>'Open Admin Operations Center and click Run Queue Seed Chunk.');
    $__mleV121IntakeSummary = array('scanned'=>0,'skai_like'=>0,'groups'=>0,'created_queue'=>0,'created_assignment'=>0,'updated_assignment'=>0,'skipped'=>0,'manual'=>true,'not_run'=>'Open Admin Operations Center and click Run Learning Ingest Chunk.');
    $__mleV135ContractBackfill = array('updated'=>0,'scanned'=>0,'manual'=>true,'not_run'=>'Open Admin Operations Center and click Run Contract Backfill Chunk.');

    $__mleAdminTokenOk = (!$__mleAdminIsPost) || ((int)$__mleAdminInput->post->getInt($__mleAdminToken, 0) === 1);

    $__mleAdminOpMessage = '';
    $__mleAdminOpKind = '';

    $__mleAdminClamp = function($value, $default, $min, $max) {
        $value = (int)$value;
        if ($value <= 0) { $value = (int)$default; }
        return max((int)$min, min((int)$max, $value));
    };
    $__mleAdminRunWithLock = function($opLabel, $callback) use (&$__mleAdminOpMessage, &$__mleAdminOpKind) {
        $lockPath = rtrim((string)JPATH_ROOT, '/') . '/tmp/mle_admin_operations.lock';
        $fh = @fopen($lockPath, 'c');
        if (!$fh) {
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'warn';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = 'Could not open the admin operation lock file. Nothing was run.';
            return null;
        }
        if (!@flock($fh, LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB)) {
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'warn';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = 'Another admin operation appears to be running. Wait a minute and try again.';
            @fclose($fh);
            return null;
        }
        try {
            @ftruncate($fh, 0);
            @fwrite($fh, $opLabel . ' | ' . date('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
            $result = $callback();
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'ok';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = $opLabel . ' completed.';
            return $result;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'error';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = $opLabel . ' failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
            return null;
        } finally {
            @flock($fh, LOCK_UN);
            @fclose($fh);
        }
    };

    if ($__mleAdminOp !== '') {
        if (!$__mleAdminTokenOk) {
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'error';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = 'Security token check failed. No admin operation was run.';

            });
            if (is_array($__result)) { $__mleV2YAuditSummary = $__result; }
        } elseif ($__mleAdminOp === 'safe_repair') {
            $__limit = $__mleAdminClamp($__mleAdminInput->post->getInt('mle_admin_limit', 25), 25, 5, 5000);
            $__result = $__mleAdminRunWithLock('Safe Repair Chunk', function() use ($db, $__limit, $user, $__mleAuditIncludeLegacy) {
                return function_exists('mylottoexpertV2YAdminSafeRepairChunk') ? mylottoexpertV2YAdminSafeRepairChunk($db, $__limit, (int)($user->id ?? 0), $__mleAuditIncludeLegacy) : array('attempted'=>0,'updated'=>0,'warnings'=>array('function_missing'));
            });

'Rollback completed.')),'warnings'=>empty($__result['ok']) ? array((string)($__result['message'] ?? 'Rollback failed.')) : array(),'ran_at'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'scope'=>$__mleAuditScopeMeta); }
        } else {
            $__mleAdminOpKind = 'warn';
            $__mleAdminOpMessage = 'Unknown admin operation. Nothing was run.';
        }
    }

    $displayLimit = function_exists('mylottoexpertV123AdminRowsLimit') ? mylottoexpertV123AdminRowsLimit(20) : 20;
