            <?php   ?>
            <?php

            $__srsDiagCols = array();
            try {
                $__srsDiagColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
                $__srsDiagCols = is_array($__srsDiagColsRaw) ? array_keys($__srsDiagColsRaw) : array();
            } catch (\Throwable $__srsDiagColsE) { $__srsDiagCols = array(); }
            $__srsDiagLatest  = array();
            $__srsDiagToday   = array('hive_best' => 0, 'user_override' => 0, 'stable_default' => 0, 'missing' => 0);
            try {
                $__srsDiagQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select(array('id','user_id','game_id','lottery_id','target_game_id','target_lottery_id','source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','run_uuid','prediction_target_id','date_saved','generated_at','settings_json','settings'))
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai_prediction'))
                    ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                    ->setLimit(50);
                $db->setQuery($__srsDiagQ);
                $__srsDiagRows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($__srsDiagRows)) {
                    $__todayStr = date('Y-m-d');
                    foreach ($__srsDiagRows as $__srsDiagRow) {
                        $__srsSettingsJson = (string)($__srsDiagRow['settings_json'] ?? $__srsDiagRow['settings'] ?? '');
                        $__srsSettingsArr = array();
                        if ($__srsSettingsJson !== '') {
                            $__srsDec = json_decode($__srsSettingsJson, true);
                            if (is_array($__srsDec)) { $__srsSettingsArr = $__srsDec; }
                        }
                        $__srsSource = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['skai_settings_source'] ?? '');
                        $__srsLearningApplied  = (int)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['skai_learning_applied'] ?? -1);
                        $__srsLearningOverride = (int)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['skai_learning_override'] ?? -1);
                        $__srsHiveFingerprint  = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_settings_fingerprint'] ?? '');
                        $__srsEvidenceCount    = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_evidence_count'] ?? '');
                        $__srsAvgScore         = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_average_learning_score'] ?? '');
                        $__srsBestScore        = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_best_learning_score'] ?? '');
                        $__srsLatestAt         = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_latest_evaluated_at'] ?? '');
                        $__srsReason           = (string)($__srsSettingsArr['hive_settings_source']['hive_applied_reason'] ?? '');
                        $__srsDiagRow['_skai_settings_source']            = $__srsSource;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_skai_learning_applied']            = $__srsLearningApplied;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_skai_learning_override']           = $__srsLearningOverride;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_settings_fingerprint'] = $__srsHiveFingerprint;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_evidence_count']       = $__srsEvidenceCount;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_average_learning_score'] = $__srsAvgScore;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_best_learning_score']    = $__srsBestScore;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_latest_evaluated_at']    = $__srsLatestAt;
                        $__srsDiagRow['_hive_applied_reason']                 = $__srsReason;
                        $__srsDiagLatest[] = $__srsDiagRow;

                        $__srsSaveDate = substr((string)($__srsDiagRow['date_saved'] ?? $__srsDiagRow['generated_at'] ?? ''), 0, 10);
                        if ($__srsSaveDate === $__todayStr) {
                            if ($__srsSource === 'hive_best') { $__srsDiagToday['hive_best']++; }
                            elseif ($__srsSource === 'user_override') { $__srsDiagToday['user_override']++; }
                            elseif ($__srsSource === 'stable_default') { $__srsDiagToday['stable_default']++; }
                            else { $__srsDiagToday['missing']++; }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $__srsDiagE) { $__srsDiagLatest = array(); }
            ?>
            <details style="margin-top:1rem;">
              <summary><strong>Single Run settings source diagnostics (admin only)</strong></summary>
              <div class="mle-v123-section-note" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
                <strong>Today:</strong>
                Hive best: <?php echo (int)$__srsDiagToday['hive_best']; ?> |
                User override: <?php echo (int)$__srsDiagToday['user_override']; ?> |
                Stable default: <?php echo (int)$__srsDiagToday['stable_default']; ?> |
                Missing source: <?php echo (int)$__srsDiagToday['missing']; ?>
              </div>
              <div class="mle-v123-simple-list" style="margin-top:.75rem;">
                <?php if (empty($__srsDiagLatest)): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row"><strong>No SKAI single run rows found</strong><span>No skai_prediction rows were available for this diagnostic view.</span></div>
                <?php else: foreach ($__srsDiagLatest as $__srsDiagR): ?>
                  <div class="mle-v123-simple-row">
                    <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars(
                        '#' . (int)($__srsDiagR['id'] ?? 0) .
                        ' | User ' . (int)($__srsDiagR['user_id'] ?? 0) .
                        ' | game_id: ' . (string)($__srsDiagR['game_id'] ?? '') .
                        ' | lottery_id: ' . (int)($__srsDiagR['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
                        ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(
                        'settings_source: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_skai_settings_source'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_skai_settings_source'] : 'not set') .
                        ' | learning_applied: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_skai_learning_applied'] >= 0 ? (string)$__srsDiagR['_skai_learning_applied'] : 'not set') .
                        ' | override: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_skai_learning_override'] >= 0 ? (string)$__srsDiagR['_skai_learning_override'] : 'not set') .
                        ' | fingerprint: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_settings_fingerprint'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_settings_fingerprint'] : 'none') .
                        ' | evidence: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_evidence_count'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_evidence_count'] : 'n/a') .
                        ' | reason: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_reason'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_reason'] : 'none') .
                        ' | saved: ' . (string)($__srsDiagR['date_saved'] ?? ''),
                        ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                    <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars(
                        'run_uuid: ' . (string)($__srsDiagR['run_uuid'] ?? '') .
                        ' | target: ' . (string)($__srsDiagR['prediction_target_id'] ?? '') .
                        ' | avg_score: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_average_learning_score'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_average_learning_score'] : 'n/a') .
                        ' | best_score: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_best_learning_score'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_best_learning_score'] : 'n/a') .
                        ' | latest_at: ' . ($__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_latest_evaluated_at'] !== '' ? $__srsDiagR['_hive_applied_latest_evaluated_at'] : 'n/a'),
                        ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
                  </div>
                <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
              </div>
            </details>
          </details>
        </div>
      </details>
                      <?php else: ?>
        <div class="mle-ci-callout" style="margin-top:1rem;"><span class="mle-ci-callout__label">Audit details not loaded</span><p>Technical audit details, raw traces, source-truth inspectors, and forensic reports are intentionally not loaded on normal admin open. Click <strong>Load Audit Details</strong> in the Admin Execution Center when you intentionally need them.</p></div>
                      <?php endif; ?>
    </section>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}

$__mleV99FeedbackSummary = array('checked'=>0,'updated'=>0,'manual'=>true,'not_run'=>'Run Reconciliation Chunk from the Admin Execution Center.');

function mleAdvisoryDecodeNumberPayload($raw)
{
    $raw = trim((string)$raw);
    if ($raw === '') {
        return array();
    }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
        return array();
    }
    $out = array();
    $walk = function ($value) use (&$walk, &$out) {
        if (is_array($value)) {
            foreach ($value as $v) {
                $walk($v);
            }
            return;
        }
        if (is_scalar($value)) {
            $text = trim((string)$value);
            if ($text === '') {
                return;
            }
            if (preg_match_all('/\d+/', $text, $m)) {
                foreach ($m[0] as $part) {
                    $n = (int)$part;
                    if ($n > 0 || $text === '0') {
                        $out[] = $n;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    };
    $walk($decoded);
    return array_values($out);
}

function mleAdvisoryInferRankedPoolSize(array $row)
{
    $predicted = mleAdvisoryDecodeNumberPayload($row['predicted_ranking_json'] ?? '');
    $n = count($predicted);
    if ($n > 0) {
        return max(1, $n);
    }
    foreach (array('worst_winning_rank', 'best_winning_rank', 'median_winning_rank', 'avg_winning_rank') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_numeric($row[$key]) && (float)$row[$key] > 0) {
            $n = max($n, (int)ceil((float)$row[$key]));
        }
    }
    if (!empty($row['top50_hits'])) { $n = max($n, 50); }
    elseif (!empty($row['top30_hits'])) { $n = max($n, 30); }
    elseif (!empty($row['top20_hits'])) { $n = max($n, 20); }
    elseif (!empty($row['top10_hits'])) { $n = max($n, 10); }
    return max(10, $n > 0 ? $n : 50);
}

function mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow(array $row)
{
    $rankedPool = mleAdvisoryInferRankedPoolSize($row);
    $expectedRandomAvgRank = ($rankedPool + 1.0) / 2.0;

    $avgRank = (isset($row['avg_winning_rank']) && is_numeric($row['avg_winning_rank']) && (float)$row['avg_winning_rank'] > 0)
        ? (float)$row['avg_winning_rank'] : null;

    $actual = mleAdvisoryDecodeNumberPayload($row['actual_numbers_json'] ?? '');
    $actualCount = count($actual);
    $missing = max(0, (int)($row['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0));
    $found = 0;
    if ($actualCount > 0) {
        $found = max(0, $actualCount - $missing);
    } elseif ($avgRank !== null) {
        $found = max(1, (int)(($row['top50_hits'] ?? 0) ?: ($row['top30_hits'] ?? 0) ?: ($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0) ?: ($row['top10_hits'] ?? 1)));
        $actualCount = $found + $missing;
    }

    $missingPenaltyRank = $rankedPool + 1.0;
    $penalizedAvgRank = null;
    if ($avgRank !== null && ($found + $missing) > 0) {
        $penalizedAvgRank = (($avgRank * max(1, $found)) + ($missing * $missingPenaltyRank)) / max(1, ($found + $missing));
    }

    $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
    $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
    $expectedTop10 = ($actualCount > 0) ? ($actualCount * (min(10, $rankedPool) / $rankedPool)) : null;
    $expectedTop20 = ($actualCount > 0) ? ($actualCount * (min(20, $rankedPool) / $rankedPool)) : null;

    return array(
        'ranked_pool_size'         => $rankedPool,
        'expected_random_avg_rank' => round($expectedRandomAvgRank, 2),
        'avg_rank_lift'            => ($avgRank !== null && $avgRank > 0) ? round($expectedRandomAvgRank / $avgRank, 3) : 0.0,
        'penalized_avg_rank'       => ($penalizedAvgRank !== null) ? round($penalizedAvgRank, 2) : null,
        'penalized_rank_lift'      => ($penalizedAvgRank !== null && $penalizedAvgRank > 0) ? round($expectedRandomAvgRank / $penalizedAvgRank, 3) : 0.0,
        'top10_expected_hits'      => ($expectedTop10 !== null) ? round($expectedTop10, 3) : null,
        'top20_expected_hits'      => ($expectedTop20 !== null) ? round($expectedTop20, 3) : null,
        'top10_lift'               => ($expectedTop10 !== null && $expectedTop10 > 0) ? round($top10 / $expectedTop10, 3) : 0.0,
        'top20_lift'               => ($expectedTop20 !== null && $expectedTop20 > 0) ? round($top20 / $expectedTop20, 3) : 0.0,
        'actual_count'             => $actualCount,
        'found_count'              => $found,
        'missing_count'            => $missing,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge(array $rows, $method = '')
{
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $sumAvgLift = 0.0;
    $sumPenLift = 0.0;
    $sumTop10Lift = 0.0;
    $sumTop20Lift = 0.0;
    $sumExpectedRank = 0.0;
    $sumPenRank = 0.0;
    $valid = 0;
    $positive = 0;
    $draws = array();
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        if ($method !== '' && $method !== 'unknown') {
            $rowMethod = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['__method_key'] ?? $row['source'] ?? '');
            if ($rowMethod !== $method) { continue; }
        }
        $edge = mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row);
        if (($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0) <= 0 && ($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0) <= 0) { continue; }
        $valid++;
        $sumAvgLift += (float)$edge['avg_rank_lift'];
        $sumPenLift += (float)$edge['penalized_rank_lift'];
        $sumTop10Lift += (float)$edge['top10_lift'];
        $sumTop20Lift += (float)$edge['top20_lift'];
        $sumExpectedRank += (float)$edge['expected_random_avg_rank'];
        if ($edge['penalized_avg_rank'] !== null) { $sumPenRank += (float)$edge['penalized_avg_rank']; }
        if ((float)$edge['avg_rank_lift'] >= 1.05 && (float)$edge['penalized_rank_lift'] >= 1.00) { $positive++; }
        $dd = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd !== '' && $dd !== '0000-00-00') { $draws[$dd] = 1; }
    }
    if ($valid <= 0) {
        return array(
            'sample_count' => 0,
            'validation_draws' => 0,
            'repeat_count' => 0,
            'avg_rank_lift' => 0.0,
            'penalized_rank_lift' => 0.0,
            'top10_lift' => 0.0,
            'top20_lift' => 0.0,
            'expected_random_avg_rank' => null,
            'penalized_avg_rank' => null,
            'edge_label' => 'Edge still measuring',
        );
    }
    $avgLift = round($sumAvgLift / $valid, 3);
    $penLift = round($sumPenLift / $valid, 3);
    $label = 'Edge still measuring';
    if ($avgLift >= 1.20 && $penLift >= 1.10) { $label = 'Strong edge vs random'; }
    elseif ($avgLift >= 1.15 && $penLift >= 1.05) { $label = 'Positive edge vs random'; }
    elseif ($avgLift >= 1.05 && $penLift >= 1.00) { $label = 'Early edge vs random'; }
    elseif ($avgLift >= 1.00) { $label = 'Near random baseline'; }
    else { $label = 'Below random baseline'; }

    return array(
        'sample_count' => $valid,
        'validation_draws' => count($draws),
        'repeat_count' => $positive,
        'avg_rank_lift' => $avgLift,
        'penalized_rank_lift' => $penLift,
        'top10_lift' => round($sumTop10Lift / $valid, 3),
        'top20_lift' => round($sumTop20Lift / $valid, 3),
        'expected_random_avg_rank' => round($sumExpectedRank / $valid, 2),
        'penalized_avg_rank' => round($sumPenRank / $valid, 2),
        'edge_label' => $label,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryPrecisionMilestoneDefinitions()
{
    return array(
        array('key'=>'learning_stage','label'=>'Learning Stage','draws'=>0,'runs'=>0,'clusters'=>0,'short'=>'Collecting evidence'),
        array('key'=>'early_direction','label'=>'Early Direction','draws'=>3,'runs'=>18,'clusters'=>0,'short'=>'Possible signal forming'),
        array('key'=>'exploratory_batch','label'=>'Exploratory Precision Batch','draws'=>5,'runs'=>45,'clusters'=>2,'short'=>'First controlled test after regular batch evidence'),
        array('key'=>'narrowing_signal','label'=>'Narrowing Signal','draws'=>6,'runs'=>45,'clusters'=>3,'short'=>'Repeated direction forming'),
        array('key'=>'validated_focus_range','label'=>'Validated Focus Range','draws'=>12,'runs'=>75,'clusters'=>4,'short'=>'Strong repeated evidence'),
        array('key'=>'precision_focus_range','label'=>'Settings Precision Range','draws'=>20,'runs'=>120,'clusters'=>5,'short'=>'Strongest disciplined range')
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryResolvePrecisionMilestoneStatus($currentKey, $milestoneKey)
{
    $order = array('learning_stage'=>0,'early_direction'=>1,'exploratory_batch'=>2,'narrowing_signal'=>3,'validated_focus_range'=>4,'precision_focus_range'=>5);
    $cur = isset($order[$currentKey]) ? (int)$order[$currentKey] : 0;
    $idx = isset($order[$milestoneKey]) ? (int)$order[$milestoneKey] : 0;
    if ($idx < $cur) { return 'complete'; }
    if ($idx === $cur) { return 'current'; }
    if ($idx === $cur + 1) { return 'next'; }
    return 'future';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildPrecisionWaitingText($currentKey, $drawCount, $runCount, $clusterSupport)
{
    $defs = mleAdvisoryPrecisionMilestoneDefinitions();
    $order = array('learning_stage'=>0,'early_direction'=>1,'exploratory_batch'=>2,'narrowing_signal'=>3,'validated_focus_range'=>4,'precision_focus_range'=>5);
    $cur = isset($order[$currentKey]) ? (int)$order[$currentKey] : 0;
    if ($cur >= 5) {
        return 'Settings Precision Range is active. Keep validating future completed draws before treating this as a long-term baseline.';
    }
    $next = $defs[$cur + 1];
    $need = array();
    $moreDraws = max(0, (int)$next['draws'] - (int)$drawCount);
    $moreRuns = max(0, (int)$next['runs'] - (int)$runCount);
    $moreClusters = max(0, (int)$next['clusters'] - (int)$clusterSupport);
    if ($moreDraws > 0) { $need[] = $moreDraws . ' more completed draw cycle' . ($moreDraws === 1 ? '' : 's'); }
    if ($moreRuns > 0) { $need[] = $moreRuns . ' more scored run' . ($moreRuns === 1 ? '' : 's'); }
    if ($moreClusters > 0) { $need[] = $moreClusters . ' more repeated setting cluster' . ($moreClusters === 1 ? '' : 's'); }
    if (empty($need)) {
        return 'The next milestone is ready once the latest saved evidence is scored and reviewed.';
    }
    return 'Waiting for ' . implode(', ', $need) . ' to reach ' . $next['label'] . '.';
}

function mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel($completedDraws, $totalScoredRuns, $topMethodPct = 0.0, $runnerUpPct = 0.0, array $edgeMetrics = array()) {
    $completedDraws  = (int)$completedDraws;
    $totalScoredRuns = (int)$totalScoredRuns;
    $topMethodPct    = (float)$topMethodPct;
    $runnerUpPct     = (float)$runnerUpPct;

    $avgRankLift       = isset($edgeMetrics['avg_rank_lift']) ? (float)$edgeMetrics['avg_rank_lift'] : 0.0;
    $penalizedRankLift = isset($edgeMetrics['penalized_rank_lift']) ? (float)$edgeMetrics['penalized_rank_lift'] : 0.0;
    $validationDraws   = isset($edgeMetrics['validation_draws']) ? (int)$edgeMetrics['validation_draws'] : $completedDraws;
    $repeatCount       = isset($edgeMetrics['repeat_count']) ? (int)$edgeMetrics['repeat_count'] : 0;
    $rangeWidth        = isset($edgeMetrics['range_width']) ? (float)$edgeMetrics['range_width'] : 100.0;
    $trendBucket       = strtolower(trim((string)($edgeMetrics['trend_bucket'] ?? 'unknown')));

    $methodGap = abs($topMethodPct - $runnerUpPct);
    $closeRace = ($topMethodPct > 0.0 && $runnerUpPct > 0.0 && $methodGap < 8.0);
    $trendHealthy = in_array($trendBucket, array('improving','flat','unknown',''), true);
    $hasBasicEdge = ($avgRankLift >= 1.05 && $penalizedRankLift >= 1.00);
    $hasGoodEdge  = ($avgRankLift >= 1.15 && $penalizedRankLift >= 1.05);
    $hasEliteEdge = ($avgRankLift >= 1.20 && $penalizedRankLift >= 1.10);

    if ($completedDraws < 3 || $totalScoredRuns < 18) {
        return array('level' => 'learning_stage', 'label' => 'Learning Stage',
            'description' => 'LottoExpert is collecting completed draw-cycle evidence. A batch can add many scored runs, but each target date still counts as one completed draw cycle.');
    }

    if ($closeRace && $completedDraws < 12) {
        return array('level' => 'close_race', 'label' => 'Close Race',
            'description' => 'Two methods are close. Keep both in testing until one shows a clearer edge across more completed draw cycles.');
    }

    if ($completedDraws >= 20 && $totalScoredRuns >= 120 && $validationDraws >= 20 && $hasEliteEdge && $rangeWidth <= 15.0 && $repeatCount >= 5 && $trendHealthy) {
        return array('level' => 'precision_focus_range', 'label' => 'Settings Precision Range',
            'description' => 'This is LottoExpert\'s strongest current disciplined range, supported across many completed draw cycles and repeated scored runs. It is not a guarantee.');
    }

    if ($completedDraws >= 12 && $totalScoredRuns >= 75 && $validationDraws >= 12 && $hasGoodEdge && $rangeWidth <= 20.0 && $repeatCount >= 4 && $trendHealthy) {
        return array('level' => 'validated_focus_range', 'label' => 'Validated Focus Range',
            'description' => 'This range has repeated support across completed draw cycles and positive lift versus random expectation. Use it as a disciplined testing range.');
    }

    if ($completedDraws >= 6 && $totalScoredRuns >= 45 && $hasGoodEdge && $repeatCount >= 3 && $trendHealthy) {
        return array('level' => 'narrowing_signal', 'label' => 'Narrowing Signal',
            'description' => 'Repeated completed-draw evidence is starting to favor a tighter strategy range. Keep future tests controlled.');
    }

    if ($completedDraws >= 5 && $totalScoredRuns >= 45 && $hasBasicEdge && $repeatCount >= 2) {
        return array('level' => 'exploratory_batch', 'label' => 'Exploratory Precision Batch',
            'description' => 'Enough regular batch evidence has built up to test a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch. This is a structured test, not a conclusion.');
    }

    if ($completedDraws >= 3 && $totalScoredRuns >= 18 && ($avgRankLift >= 1.00 || $topMethodPct > $runnerUpPct)) {
        return array('level' => 'early_direction', 'label' => 'Early Direction',
            'description' => 'A possible direction is forming. LottoExpert will wait for more completed draw cycles before stronger narrowing guidance.');
    }

    return array('level' => 'no_clear_edge', 'label' => 'No Clear Edge Yet',
        'description' => 'Current scored results do not yet show a reliable edge over the baseline. Keep saving, scoring, and comparing after completed draws.');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method) {
    $raw = strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($raw) : $raw;
    $map = array(
        'skai' => 'SKAI', 'skai_prediction' => 'SKAI', 'skai_blend' => 'SKAI',
        'core_ai' => 'Core AI', 'core_ai_prediction' => 'Core AI', 'lottoexpert_core_ai' => 'Core AI',
        'ai' => 'Core AI', 'ai_prediction' => 'Core AI', 'neural' => 'Core AI', 'neural_ai' => 'Core AI', 'neural_ai_prediction' => 'Core AI', 'neural_ai' => 'Core AI',
        'mcmc' => 'MCMC Learning Engine', 'mcmc_prediction' => 'MCMC',
        'skip' => 'Skip/Hit', 'skip_hit' => 'Skip/Hit', 'skiphit' => 'Skip/Hit',
        'frequency' => 'Frequency/Heatmap', 'heatmap' => 'Frequency/Heatmap',
    );
    return isset($map[$method]) ? $map[$method] : ($method !== '' ? ucfirst($method) : 'Unknown');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $map = array(
        'skai' => array(
            'role' => 'Flagship Engine',
            'track' => 'SKAI Precision Track',
            'short_track' => 'SKAI Track',
            'badge' => 'flagship',
            'learns' => 'blend strength, history window, diversity, temperature, and controlled Precision Focus batches',
            'positioning' => 'SKAI is LottoExpert\'s most advanced engine. Use it as the primary precision workflow when its scored evidence is leading or when you want the most complete controlled-batch system.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Run regular SKAI batches and save them so LottoExpert can compare results across completed draw cycles.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Create or run the SKAI Precision Focus batch when the card says the evidence is ready.',
            'focus_label' => 'SKAI Precision Focus Batch',
            'can_batch_now' => true,
        ),
        'core_ai' => array(
            'role' => 'Foundational Precision Engine',
            'track' => 'Core AI Precision Lock Track',
            'short_track' => 'Core AI Track',
            'badge' => 'core-ai',
            'learns' => 'focus profile, signal blend percentage, ranked candidate overlap, batch completion, and per-draw scoring across Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock runs',
            'positioning' => 'Core AI is LottoExpert\'s elite foundational analysis engine. It is not above SKAI; it creates disciplined 9-run Precision Lock evidence that MyLottoExpert can score, group, and compare after the official draw.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Run the Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock and let each completed run auto-save so MyLottoExpert can compare the full batch after the draw.',

            'focus_label' => 'Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock',
            'can_batch_now' => true,
        ),
        'mcmc' => array(
            'role' => 'Sampling Track',
            'track' => 'MCMC Sampling Track',
            'short_track' => 'MCMC Track',
            'badge' => 'sampling',
            'learns' => 'sampling depth, walks, burn-in, smoothing, decay, coverage spread, and repeated sampling profiles',

            'next_if_ready' => 'Use the repeated MCMC settings as the control and test one sampling setting at a time. Full MCMC focus-batch handoff will be added on the MCMC page next.',
            'focus_label' => 'MCMC Sampling Focus Test',

        'ai' => array(
            'role' => 'Foundational Precision Engine',
            'track' => 'Core AI Precision Lock Track',
            'short_track' => 'Core AI Track',
            'badge' => 'core-ai',
            'learns' => 'focus profile, signal blend percentage, ranked candidate overlap, batch completion, and per-draw scoring across Core AI and legacy AI prediction saves',
            'positioning' => 'Legacy Core AI saves are displayed as Core AI so users see one clear foundational AI track instead of two confusing labels.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Run the Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock and let each completed run auto-save so MyLottoExpert can compare the full batch after the draw.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Use the repeated Core AI settings as the next controlled focusing run, or run another full Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock for the next target draw.',
            'focus_label' => 'Core AI 9-Batch Precision Lock',
            'can_batch_now' => true,
        ),
        'skip_hit' => array(
            'role' => 'Timing Signal',
            'track' => 'Skip/Hit Timing Track',
            'short_track' => 'Skip/Hit Track',
            'badge' => 'timing',
            'learns' => 'past draws checked, skip timing weight, history weight, and frequency weight when those settings are saved',
            'positioning' => 'Skip/Hit is best treated as a timing signal and comparison layer. It can support controlled weight testing when saved settings are available.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Keep saving Skip/Hit runs and compare whether they align with SKAI, Core AI, or MCMC across completed draws.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Use Skip/Hit as a timing-control test. Change only one timing weight at a time and score after the next draw.',
            'focus_label' => 'Skip/Hit Timing Weight Test',
            'can_batch_now' => false,
        ),
        'frequency' => array(
            'role' => 'Frequency Baseline',
            'track' => 'Manual Frequency Baseline',
            'short_track' => 'Frequency Baseline',
            'badge' => 'baseline',
            'learns' => 'manual frequency alignment and comparison against tunable engines',
            'positioning' => 'Frequency and Heatmap saves are valuable baselines, but they are mostly manual and should not be treated as automated narrowing engines unless tunable settings are saved.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Use Frequency Map as a baseline reference and compare future SKAI, Core AI, or MCMC runs against it.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Use the Frequency Map result as a comparison baseline. Run a tunable method if you want an automated focus test.',
            'focus_label' => 'Frequency Baseline Review',
            'can_batch_now' => false,
        ),
        'heatmap' => array(
            'role' => 'Frequency Baseline',
            'track' => 'Manual Frequency Baseline',
            'short_track' => 'Frequency Baseline',
            'badge' => 'baseline',
            'learns' => 'manual frequency alignment and comparison against tunable engines',
            'positioning' => 'Frequency and Heatmap saves are valuable baselines, but they are mostly manual and should not be treated as automated narrowing engines unless tunable settings are saved.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Use Frequency Map as a baseline reference and compare future SKAI, Core AI, or MCMC runs against it.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Use the Frequency Map result as a comparison baseline. Run a tunable method if you want an automated focus test.',
            'focus_label' => 'Frequency Baseline Review',
            'can_batch_now' => false,
        ),
    );
    if (!isset($map[$method])) {
        return array(
            'role' => 'Comparison Signal',
            'track' => 'Comparison Track',
            'short_track' => 'Comparison',
            'badge' => 'comparison',
            'learns' => 'saved-run performance compared against completed draw results',
            'positioning' => 'This method can be evaluated as a comparison signal when runs are saved and scored.',
            'next_if_building' => 'Keep saving and scoring runs for this method before using it for narrowing.',
            'next_if_ready' => 'Use the strongest repeated settings as a controlled comparison test.',
            'focus_label' => 'Comparison Focus Test',
            'can_batch_now' => false,
        );
    }
    return $map[$method];
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodRoleLabel($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return (string)($info['role'] ?? 'Comparison Signal');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodTrackLabel($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return (string)($info['track'] ?? 'Comparison Track');
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodBadgeKey($method) {
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    return preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_-]/i', '', (string)($info['badge'] ?? 'comparison'));
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildMethodAwareAdvice($method, $hasPending, $pendingRuns, $hasSettingsAdvice, $hasSkaiBatch, $stageLabel, $settingsSummary) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $info = mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method);
    $methodLabel = mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method);
    $stageLabel = trim((string)$stageLabel) !== '' ? trim((string)$stageLabel) : 'Learning Stage';
    $settingsSummary = trim((string)$settingsSummary);
    if (!empty($hasPending)) {
        return array(
            'title' => $methodLabel . ' work is in progress',
            'body' => (int)$pendingRuns . ' pending run' . ((int)$pendingRuns === 1 ? ' is' : 's are') . ' waiting for the next official draw result. Do not create another focus test for this lottery until these are scored.',
            'cta' => 'Review pending runs after the draw',
            'state' => 'in-progress',
        );
    }
    if ($method === 'skai' && !empty($hasSkaiBatch)) {
        return array(
            'title' => 'SKAI Precision Focus is ready',
            'body' => 'SKAI is the active learning track and a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch is ready. Run it in SKAI, then come back after the draw to score the results.',
            'cta' => 'Create or open SKAI Precision Focus Batch',
            'state' => 'ready',
        );
    }
    if (!empty($hasSettingsAdvice)) {
        return array(
            'title' => $info['focus_label'] . ' is forming',
            'body' => $methodLabel . ' is the leading evidence direction. Keep the repeated baseline stable and test one setting at a time. ' . ($settingsSummary !== '' ? 'Current settings clue: ' . $settingsSummary . '.' : 'The repeatable settings profile is still forming.'),
            'cta' => (string)$info['next_if_ready'],
            'state' => $method === 'frequency' || $method === 'heatmap' ? 'baseline' : 'ready',
        );
    }
    return array(
        'title' => $info['track'] . ' is building evidence',
        'body' => $methodLabel . ' is currently the leading direction, but the evidence is still in the ' . $stageLabel . ' stage. ' . (string)$info['next_if_building'],
        'cta' => 'Keep building scored evidence',
        'state' => 'building',
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key) {
    $map = array(
        'ai_blend_pct'          => 'Blend Setting',
        'blend_pct'             => 'Blend Setting',
        'ai_percent'            => 'Blend Setting',
        'epochs'                => 'Training Cycles',
        'window_size'           => 'History Window',
        'draws_analyzed'        => 'Past Draws Checked',
        'learning_rate'         => 'Learning Speed',
        'dropout'               => 'Overthinking Protection',
        'hidden_layers'         => 'Pattern Depth',
        'recency_decay'         => 'Recent Draw Focus',
        'sampling_temperature'  => 'Variety Level',
        'diversity_penalty'     => 'Spread Control',
        'gap_scale'             => 'Gap Timing',
        'best_window'           => 'Best History Search',
        'auto_tune'             => 'Auto Adjust',
        'top_n_numbers'         => 'Number Pool Size',
        'top_n_combos'          => 'Combo Pool Size',
        'chain_length'          => 'Sampling Depth',
        'burn_in'               => 'Warm-Up Runs',
        'laplace_k'             => 'Smoothing Level',
        'frequency_weight'      => 'Frequency Weight',
        'skip_weight'           => 'Skip Timing Weight',
        'history_weight'        => 'History Weight',
    );
    $key = strtolower(trim((string)$key));
    return isset($map[$key]) ? $map[$key] : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $key));
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc(array $settings, $method = '') {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $parts = array();

    $add = function($label, $value) use (&$parts) {
        if ($value === null) { return; }
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '') { return; }
        if (count($parts) >= 5) { return; }
        $parts[] = $label . ': ' . $value;
    };

    $mode = '';
    foreach (array('skai_run_mode','training_style','profile','risk_profile','run_mode') as $k) {
        if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') {
            $mode = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($settings[$k]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($mode !== '') { $add('Mode', $mode); }

    $coreFocus = '';
    foreach (array('focus_profile','risk_profile','profile','training_style') as $k) {
        if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') {
            $coreFocus = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($settings[$k]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($coreFocus !== '' && stripos(implode(' ', $parts), 'Mode:') === false) { $add('Core AI Focus', $coreFocus); }

    $blendVal = null;
    foreach (array('signal_blend_ai_pct','core_ai_ai_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct') as $k) {
        if (isset($settings[$k]) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) {
            $blendVal = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($settings[$k]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($blendVal !== null) {
        $add('Blend Setting', mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($blendVal) . '%');
    }

    if ($method === 'core_ai' || $method === 'core_ai_prediction') {
        foreach (array('batch_type'=>'Batch Type','batch_index'=>'Batch Run','batch_total'=>'Batch Size','signal_blend_label'=>'Signal Blend') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'skai' || $method === 'skai_prediction' || $method === '') {
        foreach (array(
            'skai_window_size' => 'History Window',
            'draws_used' => 'Past Draws Checked',
            'best_window' => 'Best History Search',
            'auto_tune' => 'Auto Adjust',
            'sampling_temperature' => 'Variety Level',
            'diversity_penalty' => 'Spread Control'
        ) as $k => $label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') {
                $v = $settings[$k];
                if ($k === 'best_window' || $k === 'auto_tune') {
                    $v = ((string)$v === '1' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'yes' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'on' || strtolower((string)$v) === 'true') ? 'On' : 'Off';
                }
                $add($label, $v);
            }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'ai' || $method === 'ai_prediction') {
        foreach (array('epochs'=>'Training Cycles','recency_decay'=>'Recent Draw Focus','dropout_rate'=>'Overthinking Protection','hidden_layers'=>'Pattern Depth') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'skip' || $method === 'skip_hit') {
        foreach (array('draws_analyzed'=>'Past Draws Checked','skip_weight'=>'Skip Timing Weight','hist_weight'=>'History Weight','freq_weight'=>'Frequency Weight') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    } elseif ($method === 'mcmc' || $method === 'mcmc_prediction') {
        foreach (array('chain_len'=>'Sampling Depth','walks'=>'Walks','burn_in'=>'Warm-Up Runs','laplace_k'=>'Smoothing Level','decay'=>'Recent Draw Focus') as $k=>$label) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && trim((string)$settings[$k]) !== '') { $add($label, $settings[$k]); }
        }
    }

    if (empty($parts)) {
        foreach ($settings as $k => $v) {
            if (count($parts) >= 4) { break; }
            if (is_array($v) || is_object($v)) { continue; }
            $v = trim((string)$v);
            if ($v === '') { continue; }
            $lk = strtolower((string)$k);
            if (in_array($lk, array('id','user_id','lottery_id','source','created_at','updated_at'), true)) { continue; }
            $add(mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($lk), $v);
        }
    }

    return empty($parts) ? 'Settings profile still building' : implode(', ', $parts);
}

function mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $perfTable = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
    try {
        $q = "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($perfTable);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $perfCols = $db->loadColumn();
        $perfCols = is_array($perfCols) ? $perfCols : array();
        if (!in_array('advice_status', $perfCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$perfTable}` ADD COLUMN `advice_status` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'use_in_advice' AFTER `run_uuid`");
            $db->execute();
        }
        if (!in_array('advice_status_updated_at', $perfCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$perfTable}` ADD COLUMN `advice_status_updated_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `advice_status`");
            $db->execute();
        }

        if (!in_array('status_explicit', $perfCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$perfTable}` ADD COLUMN `status_explicit` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `advice_status_updated_at`");
            $db->execute();
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }

    $savedTable = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
    try {
        $qSaved = "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($savedTable);
        $db->setQuery($qSaved);
        $savedCols = $db->loadColumn();
        $savedCols = is_array($savedCols) ? $savedCols : array();
        if (!in_array('advice_status', $savedCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$savedTable}` ADD COLUMN `advice_status` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'use_in_advice'");
            $db->execute();
        }
        if (!in_array('advice_status_updated_at', $savedCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$savedTable}` ADD COLUMN `advice_status_updated_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `advice_status`");
            $db->execute();
        }
        if (!in_array('status_explicit', $savedCols, true)) {
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$savedTable}` ADD COLUMN `status_explicit` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `advice_status_updated_at`");
            $db->execute();
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }

    $settingsTable = $prefix . 'user_saved_settings';
    $advCols = array(
        'advisory_reason'      => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_reason` TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_old_value'   => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_old_value` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_new_value'   => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_new_value` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_setting_key' => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_setting_key` VARCHAR(100) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_proof_level' => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_proof_level` VARCHAR(50) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
        'advisory_method'      => "ALTER TABLE `{$settingsTable}` ADD COLUMN `advisory_method` VARCHAR(50) NULL DEFAULT NULL",
    );
    try {
        $q2 = "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = " . $db->quote($settingsTable);
        $db->setQuery($q2);
        $settingCols = $db->loadColumn();
        $settingCols = is_array($settingCols) ? $settingCols : array();
        foreach ($advCols as $colName => $sql) {
            if (!in_array($colName, $settingCols, true)) {
                try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e2) {   }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveBallRoleClass($isActual, $isExtra, $isMatch)
{
    if ($isActual) {
        return $isExtra ? 'actual-extra' : 'actual-main';
    }
    if ($isExtra) {
        return $isMatch ? 'pred-extra-hit' : 'pred-extra';
    }
    return $isMatch ? 'pred-main-hit' : 'pred-main';
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml(array $numbers, array $matches = array(), $isActual = false, $isExtra = false) {
    $matchMap = array();
    foreach ($matches as $m) { $matchMap[(int)$m] = 1; }
    if (empty($numbers)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">Not saved</span>'; }
    $html = '<span class="mle-ball-list' . ($isExtra ? ' mle-ball-list--extra' : '') . '">';
    foreach ($numbers as $n) {
        $n = (int)$n;

        if ($n < 0) { continue; }
        $isMatch = isset($matchMap[$n]);
        $role = mleAdvisoryResolveBallRoleClass($isActual, $isExtra, $isMatch);
        $cls = 'mle-ball mle-ball-core mle-ball-role-' . $role;
        if ($isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--actual'; }
        if ($isExtra) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--extra'; }
        if (!$isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--predicted'; }
        if ($isMatch) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--match'; }
        $label = str_replace('-', ' ', $role) . ' number ' . (string)$n;
        $html .= '<span class="' . $cls . '" data-ball-role="' . htmlspecialchars($role, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" data-ball-number="' . htmlspecialchars((string)$n, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" aria-label="' . htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"><span class="mle-ball-text">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$n, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span></span>';
    }
    $html .= '</span>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderBallSetHtml(array $mainNumbers, array $extraNumbers, array $mainMatches = array(), array $extraMatches = array(), $isActual = false) {
    $hasMain = !empty($mainNumbers);
    $hasExtra = !empty($extraNumbers);
    if (!$hasMain && !$hasExtra) {
        return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">' . ($isActual ? 'Upcoming' : 'Not saved') . '</span>';
    }
    $html = '<div class="mle-ball-set">';
    if ($hasMain) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__main">' . mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml($mainNumbers, $mainMatches, $isActual, false) . '</div>';
    }
    if ($hasExtra) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__extra"><span class="mle-extra-label">Extra</span>' . mleAdvisoryRenderBallListHtml($extraNumbers, $extraMatches, $isActual, true) . '</div>';
    }
    $html .= '</div>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString($combo) {
    $combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$combo);
    if ($combo === '') { return array(); }
    return array_map('intval', str_split($combo));
}

function mleAdvisoryInferComboStringsFromNumbers(array $numbers, $pickSize = 0) {
    $out = array();
    foreach ($numbers as $n) {
        if (is_array($n) || is_object($n)) { continue; }
        $raw = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$n);
        if ($raw === '') { continue; }
        if (strlen($raw) > 1) {
            $out[] = $raw;
        }
        if (count($out) >= 5) { break; }
    }
    if (empty($out) && !empty($numbers) && count($numbers) <= 5) {
        $digits = array();
        foreach ($numbers as $n) {
            $nn = (int)$n;
            if ($nn >= 0 && $nn <= 9) { $digits[] = (string)$nn; }
        }
        if (!empty($digits)) { $out[] = implode('', $digits); }
    }
    return array_values(array_unique($out));
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml(array $digits, array $compareDigits = array(), $isActual = false, $isExtra = false) {
    if (empty($digits)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">' . ($isActual ? 'Upcoming' : 'Not saved') . '</span>'; }
    $remaining = array_values(array_map('intval', $compareDigits));
    $html = '<span class="mle-ball-list mle-daily-digit-pills' . ($isExtra ? ' mle-ball-list--extra' : '') . '">';
    foreach ($digits as $d) {
        $d = (int)$d;
        if ($d < 0) { continue; }
        $matched = false;
        if (!$isActual && !empty($remaining)) {
            $idx = array_search($d, $remaining, true);
            if ($idx !== false) { $matched = true; unset($remaining[$idx]); $remaining = array_values($remaining); }
        }
        $role = mleAdvisoryResolveBallRoleClass($isActual, $isExtra, $matched);
        $cls = 'mle-ball mle-ball--digit mle-ball-core mle-ball-role-' . $role;
        if ($isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--actual'; }
        if ($isExtra) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--extra'; }
        if (!$isActual) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--predicted'; }
        if ($matched) { $cls .= ' mle-ball--match'; }
        $label = str_replace('-', ' ', $role) . ' digit ' . (string)$d;
        $html .= '<span class="' . $cls . '" data-ball-role="' . htmlspecialchars($role, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" data-ball-number="' . htmlspecialchars((string)$d, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" aria-label="' . htmlspecialchars($label, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"><span class="mle-ball-text">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$d, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '</span></span>';
    }
    $html .= '</span>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(array $comboStrings, array $actualDigits = array(), array $extraNumbers = array(), array $actualExtra = array(), $isActual = false, $pickSize = 0) {
    $actualDigits = array_values(array_map('intval', $actualDigits));
    $html = '<div class="mle-ball-set mle-daily-visual-set">';
    if ($isActual) {
        $html .= '<div class="mle-daily-visual-actual">' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($actualDigits, array(), true, false) . '</div>';
    } else {
        if (empty($comboStrings)) { return '<span class="mle-visual-upcoming">Not saved</span>'; }
        $html .= '<div class="mle-daily-combo-row mle-daily-visual-combos">';
        foreach (array_slice($comboStrings, 0, 5) as $idx => $combo) {
            $combo = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$combo);
            if ($combo === '') { continue; }
            $digits = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString($combo);
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip mle-daily-combo-chip--split">';
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip__rank">#' . (int)($idx + 1) . '</span>';
            $html .= '<span class="mle-daily-combo-chip__digits">' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($digits, $actualDigits, false, false) . '</span>';
            $html .= '</span>';
        }
        $html .= '</div>';
    }
    if (!empty($extraNumbers) || (!empty($actualExtra) && $isActual)) {
        $bonusDigits = $isActual ? array_values(array_map('intval', $actualExtra)) : array_values(array_map('intval', $extraNumbers));
        $html .= '<div class="mle-ball-set__extra mle-daily-visual-bonus"><span class="mle-extra-label">Extra</span>' . mleAdvisoryRenderDailyDigitPillsHtml($bonusDigits, $actualExtra, $isActual, true) . '</div>';
    }
    $html .= '</div>';
    return $html;
}

function mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml(array $run, $isActual = false) {
    $isDaily = !empty($run['is_daily']);
    if ($isDaily) {
        if ($isActual) {
            return mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(
                array(),
                (array)($run['actual'] ?? array()),
                array(),
                (array)($run['actual_extra'] ?? array()),
                true,
                (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0)
            );
        }
        $comboStrings = (array)($run['pred_combo_strings'] ?? array());
        if (empty($comboStrings)) {
            $comboStrings = mleAdvisoryInferComboStringsFromNumbers((array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()), (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0));
        }
        return mleAdvisoryRenderDailyComboSetHtml(
            $comboStrings,
            (array)($run['actual'] ?? array()),
            (array)($run['predicted_extra'] ?? array()),
            (array)($run['actual_extra'] ?? array()),
            false,
            (int)($run['daily_pick_size'] ?? 0)
        );
    }
    return mleAdvisoryRenderBallSetHtml(
        (array)($run[$isActual ? 'actual' : 'predicted'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run[$isActual ? 'actual_extra' : 'predicted_extra'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run['matches'] ?? array()),
        (array)($run['extra_matches'] ?? array()),
        $isActual
    );
}

function mleAdvisorySplitActualNumbersForRun(array $actualAll, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra) {
    $actualAll = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $actualAll), function($n) { return $n > 0; }));
    $pickSize = 0;
    foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $pickSize = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($pickSize <= 0) { $pickSize = count($predMain); }
    $extraExpected = 0;
    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$savedRow[$k] <= 2) { $extraExpected = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }

    if ($extraExpected <= 0 && count($predExtra) > 0 && count($predExtra) <= 2) { $extraExpected = count($predExtra); }
    if ($pickSize <= 0 || count($actualAll) <= $pickSize || $extraExpected <= 0) {
        return array('main' => $actualAll, 'extra' => array());
    }
    return array(
        'main' => array_slice($actualAll, 0, $pickSize),
        'extra' => array_slice($actualAll, $pickSize, $extraExpected)
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson($raw) {
    $result = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
    if (!is_string($raw) || trim($raw) === '') { return $result; }
    $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
    if (!is_array($decoded)) { return $result; }

    $mainKeys = array('main','main_numbers','draw_main','actual_main','numbers','regular_main_numbers');
    $extraKeys = array('extra','extras','extra_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','draw_extra','actual_extra','bonus','bonus_numbers','lucky_stars','stars','lucky_star','lucky_star_1','lucky_star_2','star_1','star_2','powerball','power_ball','mega_ball','extra_ball','extra_ball_1','extra_ball_2');

    foreach ($mainKeys as $key) {
        if (isset($decoded[$key])) {
            $vals = is_array($decoded[$key]) ? $decoded[$key] : explode(',', (string)$decoded[$key]);
            foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['main'], true)) { $result['main'][] = $n; } }
        }
    }
    foreach ($extraKeys as $key) {
        if (isset($decoded[$key])) {
            $vals = is_array($decoded[$key]) ? $decoded[$key] : explode(',', (string)$decoded[$key]);
            foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['extra'], true)) { $result['extra'][] = $n; } }
        }
    }

    foreach (array('actual','draw','result','official') as $parentKey) {
        if (isset($decoded[$parentKey]) && is_array($decoded[$parentKey])) {
            $nested = $decoded[$parentKey];
            foreach ($mainKeys as $key) {
                if (isset($nested[$key])) {
                    $vals = is_array($nested[$key]) ? $nested[$key] : explode(',', (string)$nested[$key]);
                    foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['main'], true)) { $result['main'][] = $n; } }
                }
            }
            foreach ($extraKeys as $key) {
                if (isset($nested[$key])) {
                    $vals = is_array($nested[$key]) ? $nested[$key] : explode(',', (string)$nested[$key]);
                    foreach ($vals as $v) { $n = (int)$v; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $result['extra'], true)) { $result['extra'][] = $n; } }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    return $result;
}

if (!function_exists('mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches')) {
    function mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches(array $actual, array $predicted, $keepStrings = false) {
        $matched = array();
        if ($keepStrings) {
            $actualCounts = array();
            foreach ($actual as $v) {
                $sv = (string)$v;
                $actualCounts[$sv] = isset($actualCounts[$sv]) ? $actualCounts[$sv] + 1 : 1;
            }
            foreach ($predicted as $v) {
                $sv = (string)$v;
                if (isset($actualCounts[$sv]) && $actualCounts[$sv] > 0) {
                    $matched[] = $sv;
                    $actualCounts[$sv]--;
                }
            }
        } else {
            $actualCounts = array();
            foreach ($actual as $v) {
                $iv = (int)$v;
                $actualCounts[$iv] = isset($actualCounts[$iv]) ? $actualCounts[$iv] + 1 : 1;
            }
            foreach ($predicted as $v) {
                $iv = (int)$v;
                if (isset($actualCounts[$iv]) && $actualCounts[$iv] > 0) {
                    $matched[] = $iv;
                    $actualCounts[$iv]--;
                }
            }
        }
        return $matched;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleBuildStrictRegularComparisonPayload')) {
    function mleBuildStrictRegularComparisonPayload(array $actualMain, array $predictedMain, array $actualExtra = array(), array $predictedExtra = array(), array $predictedRanking = array()) {
        $actualMain = array_values(array_map('intval', $actualMain));
        $predictedMain = array_values(array_map('intval', $predictedMain));
        $actualExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', $actualExtra));
        $predictedExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', $predictedExtra));
        $predictedRanking = array_values(array_map('intval', $predictedRanking));

        $mainMatches = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualMain, $predictedMain));
        $extraMatches = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualExtra, $predictedExtra));
        $rankingMatches = !empty($predictedRanking)
            ? array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualMain, $predictedRanking))
            : $mainMatches;

        return array(
            'matches' => $mainMatches,
            'extra_matches' => $extraMatches,
            'ranking_matches' => $rankingMatches,
            'main_hits' => count($mainMatches),
            'extra_hits' => count($extraMatches),
            'total_hits' => count($mainMatches) + count($extraMatches),
            'ranking_hit_count' => max(count($rankingMatches), count($mainMatches) + count($extraMatches))
        );
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountForVisual(array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $expected = 0;
    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $expected = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($expected <= 0 && !empty($predExtra)) { $expected = count($predExtra); }
    $gameId = trim((string)($savedRow['target_game_id'] ?? $savedRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
    if ($expected <= 0 && $gameId !== '' && function_exists('getDrawFields')) {
        try {
            $fields = getDrawFields($gameId);
            if (isset($fields['num_extra_expected']) && (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'] > 0) {
                $expected = (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return max(0, (int)$expected);
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveGameIdForVisual($db, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); }
    }
    $lotteryId = 0;
    foreach (array('target_lottery_id','lottery_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { $lotteryId = (int)$perfRow[$k]; break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $lotteryId = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    if ($lotteryId > 0) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select($db->quoteName('game_id'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $gid = trim((string)$db->loadResult());
            if ($gid !== '') { return $gid; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return '';
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromContext($gameId, array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $expected = mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountForVisual($savedRow, $predExtra);
    if ($expected > 0) { return $expected; }
    $nameBits = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['name'] ?? '')));
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($nameBits, 'euro millions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'powerball') !== false) { return 1; }
    if (strpos($nameBits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($nameBits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawResults, $expectedExtra) {
    $out = array();
    $drawResults = trim((string)$drawResults);
    if ($drawResults === '' || (int)$expectedExtra <= 0) { return $out; }
    if (strpos($drawResults, '+') !== false) {
        $parts = explode('+', $drawResults);
        array_shift($parts);
        foreach ($parts as $piece) {
            $piece = trim((string)$piece);
            if ($piece === '') { continue; }
            foreach (preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $piece) as $numText) {
                if ($numText === '') { continue; }
                $n = (int)$numText;
                if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
                if (count($out) >= (int)$expectedExtra) { return $out; }
            }
        }
    }
    return array_slice($out, 0, (int)$expectedExtra);
}

function mleAdvisoryOfficialOrdinalColumns()
{
    return array(
        'first','second','third','fourth','fifth','sixth','seventh','eighth','nineth','tenth',
        'eleventh','twelveth','thirtheenth','fourteenth','fifteenth','sixteenth','seventeenth','eighteenth','nineteenth','twentieth',
        'twenty_first','twenty_second','twenty_third','twenty_fourth','twenty_fifth'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers(array $drawRow)
{
    $out = array();
    foreach (mleAdvisoryOfficialOrdinalColumns() as $col) {
        if (!array_key_exists($col, $drawRow) || $drawRow[$col] === '' || $drawRow[$col] === null) {
            continue;
        }
        $vals = is_array($drawRow[$col]) ? $drawRow[$col] : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$drawRow[$col]);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0) { $out[] = $n; }
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls(array $drawRow, $expectedExtra)
{
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0) { return array(); }
    $ordered = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    if (count($ordered) <= $expectedExtra) { return array(); }
    return array_slice($ordered, -$expectedExtra);
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractActualExtraFromDrawRowFallback($gameId, array $drawRow, $expectedExtra) {
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0 || empty($drawRow)) { return array(); }

    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
        $fromResults = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], $expectedExtra);
        if (!empty($fromResults)) { return $fromResults; }
    }

    $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls($drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    if (!empty($fromOfficialOrdinalColumns)) { return $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns; }

    $aliases = array(
        'extra_ball','extra_ball_1','extra_ball_2','extra_ball_3','extra1','extra2','extra3','extra_1','extra_2','extra_3',
        'bonus','bonus_ball','bonus_ball_1','bonus_ball_2','bonus1','bonus2','bonus_1','bonus_2','bonus_number','bonus_num',
        'powerball','power_ball','power_ball_number','pb',
        'mega_ball','megaball','mega',
        'lucky_star','lucky_stars','lucky_star_1','lucky_star_2','lucky_star1','lucky_star2','star','stars','star_1','star_2','star1','star2',
        'euro_star_1','euro_star_2','eurostar1','eurostar2',
        'number_6','number_7','number6','number7','num_6','num_7','num6','num7','ball_6','ball_7','ball6','ball7',
        'draw_number_6','draw_number_7','drawn_number_6','drawn_number_7','winning_number_6','winning_number_7','result_6','result_7'
    );
    $out = array();
    foreach ($aliases as $alias) {
        if (!array_key_exists($alias, $drawRow) || $drawRow[$alias] === '' || $drawRow[$alias] === null) { continue; }
        $vals = is_array($drawRow[$alias]) ? $drawRow[$alias] : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$drawRow[$alias]);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
            if (count($out) >= $expectedExtra) { return $out; }
        }
    }

    foreach ($drawRow as $key => $value) {
        $keyLower = strtolower((string)$key);
        if (strpos($keyLower, 'extra') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'bonus') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'star') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'power') === false && strpos($keyLower, 'mega') === false) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) { continue; }
        $vals = is_array($value) ? $value : preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$value);
        foreach ($vals as $v) {
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            $n = (int)$v;
            if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n, $out, true)) { $out[] = $n; }
            if (count($out) >= $expectedExtra) { return $out; }
        }
    }

    return array_slice($out, 0, $expectedExtra);
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractActualExtraByTailColumns(array $drawRow, array $main, $expectedExtra) {
    $expectedExtra = (int)$expectedExtra;
    if ($expectedExtra <= 0 || empty($drawRow)) { return array(); }

    $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalExtraBalls($drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    if (!empty($fromOfficialOrdinalColumns)) { return $fromOfficialOrdinalColumns; }

    $candidates = array();
    foreach ($drawRow as $key => $value) {
        $keyLower = strtolower((string)$key);
        if ($value === '' || $value === null) { continue; }
        if (strpos($keyLower, 'date') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'time') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'jackpot') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'game') !== false || strpos($keyLower, 'id') !== false) { continue; }
        if (!preg_match('/(ball|number|num|result|draw|star|bonus|power|mega)/', $keyLower)) { continue; }
        if (is_array($value)) { continue; }
        $parts = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$value);
        foreach ($parts as $part) {
            if ($part === '') { continue; }
            $n = (int)$part;
            if ($n <= 0 || $n > 99) { continue; }
            $sort = 1000;
            if (preg_match('/(\d+)$/', $keyLower, $m)) { $sort = (int)$m[1]; }
            $candidates[] = array('key' => $keyLower, 'sort' => $sort, 'num' => $n);
        }
    }
    if (empty($candidates)) { return array(); }
    usort($candidates, function($a, $b) {
        if ($a['sort'] == $b['sort']) { return strcmp($a['key'], $b['key']); }
        return ($a['sort'] < $b['sort']) ? -1 : 1;
    });

    $values = array();
    foreach ($candidates as $c) { $values[] = (int)$c['num']; }
    $mainCount = count(array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', $main), function($n) { return $n > 0; })));
    if ($mainCount > 0 && count($values) >= ($mainCount + $expectedExtra)) {
        return array_slice($values, $mainCount, $expectedExtra);
    }

    if (count($values) >= $expectedExtra) {
        return array_slice($values, -$expectedExtra);
    }
    return array();
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText($value) {
    $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
    return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
}

function mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    $ctx = array('lottery_id' => 0, 'game_id' => '', 'name' => '', 'game_name' => '', 'country' => '', 'state' => '');
    foreach (array('target_lottery_id','lottery_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { $ctx['lottery_id'] = (int)$perfRow[$k]; break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { $ctx['lottery_id'] = (int)$savedRow[$k]; break; }
    }
    foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    foreach (array('lottery_name','name') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    foreach (array('game_name') as $k) {
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && trim((string)$perfRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$perfRow[$k]); break; }
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && trim((string)$savedRow[$k]) !== '') { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$savedRow[$k]); break; }
    }
    if ($ctx['lottery_id'] > 0) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$ctx['lottery_id'])
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) {
                if ($ctx['game_id'] === '' && !empty($row['game_id'])) { $ctx['game_id'] = trim((string)$row['game_id']); }
                if ($ctx['name'] === '' && !empty($row['name'])) { $ctx['name'] = trim((string)$row['name']); }
                if ($ctx['game_name'] === '' && !empty($row['game_name'])) { $ctx['game_name'] = trim((string)$row['game_name']); }
                if ($ctx['country'] === '' && !empty($row['country'])) { $ctx['country'] = trim((string)$row['country']); }
                if ($ctx['state'] === '' && !empty($row['state'])) { $ctx['state'] = trim((string)$row['state']); }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    return $ctx;
}

function mleAdvisoryInferExpectedExtraCountForActual($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predExtra, array $drawRow = array()) {

    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $bits = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_id'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name'] . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
    if (strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false || strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }

    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
        $tail = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], 5);
        if (!empty($tail)) { return count($tail); }
    }

    $specGameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    if ($specGameId === '') { $specGameId = (string)$ctx['game_id']; }
    if ($specGameId !== '' && function_exists('getDrawFields')) {
        try {
            $fields = getDrawFields($specGameId);
            if (isset($fields['num_extra_expected']) && (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'] > 0) {
                return (int)$fields['num_extra_expected'];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    foreach (array('target_extra_count','extra_count','num_extra_balls_drawn') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$savedRow[$k] <= 2) { return (int)$savedRow[$k]; }
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0 && (int)$perfRow[$k] <= 2) { return (int)$perfRow[$k]; }
    }

    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryInferActualPickSizeForVisual($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $drawRow, $expectedExtra) {
    foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
        if (isset($savedRow[$k]) && (int)$savedRow[$k] > 0) { return (int)$savedRow[$k]; }
        if (isset($perfRow[$k]) && (int)$perfRow[$k] > 0) { return (int)$perfRow[$k]; }
    }
    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $bits = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_id'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name']);
    if (strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false || strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 5; }
    $all = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    if (!empty($all) && (int)$expectedExtra > 0 && count($all) > (int)$expectedExtra) { return count($all) - (int)$expectedExtra; }
    if (!empty($predMain) && count($predMain) <= 10) { return count($predMain); }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryExtractActualPartsFromOfficialRow($db, $gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra, array $drawRow) {
    $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
    $expectedExtra = mleAdvisoryInferExpectedExtraCountForActual($db, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predExtra, $drawRow);

    if ($gameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
        try {
            $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($gameId, $drawRow);
            $main = isset($parts['main']) && is_array($parts['main']) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $parts['main'])) : array();
            $extra = isset($parts['extra']) && is_array($parts['extra']) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $parts['extra'])) : array();
            if (!empty($main)) {
                if ($expectedExtra > 0 && empty($extra) && isset($drawRow['draw_results'])) {
                    $tail = mleAdvisoryParseDrawResultsExtraTail($drawRow['draw_results'], $expectedExtra);
                    if (!empty($tail)) { $extra = $tail; }
                }
                if ($expectedExtra > 0) { $extra = array_slice($extra, 0, $expectedExtra); }
                return array('main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    if (isset($drawRow['draw_results']) && trim((string)$drawRow['draw_results']) !== '') {
        $dr = trim((string)$drawRow['draw_results']);
        if (preg_match('/^\d+(?:-\d+){2,}(?:\+\d+(?:\+\d+)*)?$/', $dr)) {
            $parts = explode('+', $dr);
            $mainText = array_shift($parts);
            $main = array();
            foreach (explode('-', $mainText) as $piece) {
                $n = (int)$piece;
                if ($n > 0) { $main[] = $n; }
            }
            $extra = array();
            if ($expectedExtra > 0) {
                foreach ($parts as $piece) {
                    $n = (int)$piece;
                    if ($n > 0) { $extra[] = $n; }
                    if (count($extra) >= $expectedExtra) { break; }
                }
            }
            if (!empty($main)) { return array('main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra); }
        }
    }

    $pickSize = mleAdvisoryInferActualPickSizeForVisual($db, $gameId, $perfRow, $savedRow, $predMain, $drawRow, $expectedExtra);
    $all = mleAdvisoryExtractOfficialOrdinalDrawNumbers($drawRow);
    $main = array();
    $extra = array();
    if (!empty($all)) {
        if ($pickSize <= 0 && $expectedExtra > 0 && count($all) > $expectedExtra) { $pickSize = count($all) - $expectedExtra; }
        if ($pickSize > 0) { $main = array_slice($all, 0, $pickSize); }
        if ($expectedExtra > 0 && $pickSize > 0 && count($all) >= ($pickSize + $expectedExtra)) {
            $extra = array_slice($all, $pickSize, $expectedExtra);
        }
    }
    return array('main' => array_values($main), 'extra' => array_values($extra));
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadOfficialDrawRowForVisual($db, $gameId, $drawDate, array $perfRow, array $savedRow) {
    static $cache = array();
    $drawDate = trim((string)$drawDate);
    if ($drawDate === '') { return null; }
    $ts = strtotime($drawDate);
    if ($ts === false) { return null; }
    $dateOnly = date('Y-m-d', $ts);
    $ctx = mleAdvisoryLookupLotteryContextForVisual($db, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    if (trim((string)$gameId) === '') { $gameId = (string)$ctx['game_id']; }
    $cacheKey = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId)) . '|' . (int)$ctx['lottery_id'] . '|' . $dateOnly;
    if (array_key_exists($cacheKey, $cache)) { return $cache[$cacheKey]; }

    $drawSession = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['draw_session'] ?? ''));
    $drawAt = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_at'] ?? $savedRow['next_draw_at'] ?? ''));
    if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && function_exists('getDrawByDate')) {
        try {
            $row = getDrawByDate((string)$gameId, $dateOnly, $db, $drawSession, $drawAt);
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) { $cache[$cacheKey] = $row; return $row; }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }

    $tables = array();
    if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
        try {
            $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec((string)$gameId);
            $tbl = trim((string)($spec['dbCol'] ?? ''));
            if ($tbl !== '') { $tables[] = $db->replacePrefix($tbl); }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    try {
        $q = "SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('draw_date','draw_results','first','sixth','seventh','game_id') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT COLUMN_NAME) >= 5";
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $found = $db->loadColumn();
        if (is_array($found)) { foreach ($found as $t) { if ($t !== '' && !in_array($t, $tables, true)) { $tables[] = $t; } } }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { }

    foreach ($tables as $table) {
        try {
            $cols = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
            $colNames = array();
