            if (is_array($cols)) { foreach ($cols as $ck => $cv) { $colNames[] = strtolower(is_string($ck) ? $ck : ((is_object($cv) && isset($cv->Field)) ? (string)$cv->Field : '')); } }
            if (!in_array('draw_date', $colNames, true)) { continue; }
            $query = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table))->where('DATE(' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') . ') = ' . $db->quote($dateOnly));
            if (trim((string)$gameId) !== '' && in_array('game_id', $colNames, true)) { $query->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId)); }
            $query->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC')->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($query);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) { $cache[$cacheKey] = $row; return $row; }

            $nameNeedle = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)$ctx['name'] . ' ' . (string)$ctx['game_name']);
            if ($nameNeedle !== '' && in_array('game_name', $colNames, true)) {
                $query2 = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table))->where('DATE(' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') . ') = ' . $db->quote($dateOnly));
                $db->setQuery($query2);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $r) {
                        $rName = mleAdvisoryNormalizeNameText((string)($r['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($r['stateprov_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($r['country'] ?? ''));
                        if ($rName !== '' && ($nameNeedle === $rName || strpos($nameNeedle, $rName) !== false || strpos($rName, $nameNeedle) !== false || (strpos($nameNeedle, 'euromillions') !== false && strpos($rName, 'euromillions') !== false))) {
                            $cache[$cacheKey] = $r; return $r;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
    }
    $cache[$cacheKey] = null;
    return null;
}

function mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromFullContext($gameId, array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predExtra) {
    $merged = $savedRow;
    foreach ($perfRow as $k => $v) {
        if (!isset($merged[$k]) || $merged[$k] === '' || $merged[$k] === null) { $merged[$k] = $v; }
    }
    $expected = mleAdvisoryExpectedExtraCountFromContext($gameId, $merged, $predExtra);
    if ($expected > 0) { return $expected; }
    $bits = strtolower(trim((string)$gameId . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['lottery_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($perfRow['game_name'] ?? '') . ' ' . (string)($savedRow['game_name'] ?? '')));
    if (strpos($bits, 'euromillions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'euro millions') !== false) { return 2; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'powerball') !== false) { return 1; }
    if (strpos($bits, 'mega millions') !== false || strpos($bits, 'megamillions') !== false) { return 1; }
    return 0;
}

function mleResolveOfficialActualDrawResult($db, $lotteryId, $gameId, $drawDate, $drawSession, $predictionType, array $perfRow = array(), array $savedRow = array())
{
    $result = array(
        'found' => false,
        'source' => 'official_draw_result',
        'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
        'game_id' => trim((string)$gameId),
        'draw_date' => '',
        'draw_session' => trim((string)$drawSession),
        'main_numbers' => array(),
        'extra_numbers' => array(),
        'display_main' => '',
        'display_extra' => '',
        'is_daily' => false,
        'message' => 'Official draw result not loaded yet',
        'draw_row' => array(),
    );

    $drawDate = trim((string)$drawDate);
    $drawTs = $drawDate !== '' ? strtotime($drawDate) : false;
    if ($drawTs === false || $drawTs <= 0) {
        $result['message'] = 'Waiting for actual draw result';
        return $result;
    }
    $result['draw_date'] = date('Y-m-d', $drawTs);

    if ($result['game_id'] === '') {
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        if ($lotteryId > 0) {
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select($db->quoteName('game_id'))
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                    ->setLimit(1);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $gid = trim((string)$db->loadResult());
                if ($gid !== '') { $result['game_id'] = $gid; }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        }
    }
    if ($result['game_id'] === '') {
        $result['message'] = 'Official draw result needs verification';
        return $result;
    }

    $drawRow = mleAdvisoryLoadOfficialDrawRowForVisual($db, $result['game_id'], $result['draw_date'], $perfRow, $savedRow);
    if (!is_array($drawRow) || empty($drawRow)) {
        $result['message'] = 'Official draw result not loaded yet';
        return $result;
    }
    $result['draw_row'] = $drawRow;

    $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($result['game_id'], $drawRow);
    $main = array_values((array)($parts['main'] ?? array()));
    $extra = array_values((array)($parts['extra'] ?? array()));

    $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($result['game_id']);
    $cfg = isset($spec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($spec['lotteryConfig']) ? $spec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
    $drawFields = getDrawFields($result['game_id']);
    $isDaily = !empty($cfg['is_daily']);
    $pickSize = (int)($cfg['pick_size'] ?? $cfg['daily_pick_size'] ?? $cfg['num_main_balls_drawn'] ?? 0);
    $expectedExtra = (int)($drawFields['num_extra_expected'] ?? $cfg['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? 0);
    $result['is_daily'] = $isDaily ? true : false;

    if ($pickSize > 0 && count($main) !== $pickSize) {
        $result['message'] = 'Official draw result needs verification';
        return $result;
    }
    if (!$isDaily && $expectedExtra > 0 && count($extra) > $expectedExtra) {
        $extra = array_slice($extra, 0, $expectedExtra);
    }
    if (!$isDaily && $expectedExtra === 0) {
        $extra = array();
    }

    $result['main_numbers'] = array_values($main);
    $result['extra_numbers'] = array_values($extra);
    if ($isDaily) {
        $result['display_main'] = implode('', array_map('strval', $result['main_numbers']));
        $result['display_extra'] = implode('', array_map('strval', $result['extra_numbers']));
    } else {
        $result['display_main'] = implode(' ', array_map('strval', $result['main_numbers']));
        $result['display_extra'] = implode(' ', array_map('strval', $result['extra_numbers']));
    }
    $result['found'] = !empty($result['main_numbers']) || !empty($result['extra_numbers']);
    if ($result['found']) {
        $result['message'] = '';
    }
    return $result;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual(array $perfRow, array $savedRow, array $predMain, array $predExtra) {
    $dbForVisual = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
    $lotteryId = (int)($perfRow['target_lottery_id'] ?? $perfRow['lottery_id'] ?? $savedRow['target_lottery_id'] ?? $savedRow['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $gameId = mleAdvisoryResolveGameIdForVisual($dbForVisual, $perfRow, $savedRow);
    $drawDate = trim((string)($perfRow['draw_date'] ?? $perfRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $savedRow['next_draw_date'] ?? ''));
    $drawSession = trim((string)($perfRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['target_draw_session'] ?? $savedRow['draw_session'] ?? ''));

    $official = mleResolveOfficialActualDrawResult(
        $dbForVisual,
        $lotteryId,
        $gameId,
        $drawDate,
        $drawSession,
        (string)($savedRow['prediction_type'] ?? ''),
        $perfRow,
        $savedRow
    );

    $cachedMain = array();
    $cachedExtra = array();
    $cachedMismatch = false;
    $rawActualJson = (string)($perfRow['actual_numbers_json'] ?? '');
    if ($rawActualJson !== '') {
        $cachedParts = mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson($rawActualJson);
        $cachedMain = array_values((array)($cachedParts['main'] ?? array()));
        $cachedExtra = array_values((array)($cachedParts['extra'] ?? array()));
    }
    if (!empty($official['found']) && (!empty($cachedMain) || !empty($cachedExtra))) {
        $offMain = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($official['main_numbers'] ?? array())));
        $offExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($official['extra_numbers'] ?? array())));
        $cmpMain = array_values(array_map('intval', $cachedMain));
        $cmpExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', $cachedExtra));
        if ($cmpMain !== $offMain || $cmpExtra !== $offExtra) { $cachedMismatch = true; }
    }

    $__officialMain = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($official['main_numbers'] ?? array())));
    $__officialExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($official['extra_numbers'] ?? array())));
    $__rangeFiltered = function_exists('mylottoexpertFilterActualPartsForGameRange')
        ? mylottoexpertFilterActualPartsForGameRange($gameId, $__officialMain, $__officialExtra)
        : array('main' => $__officialMain, 'extra' => $__officialExtra, 'range_invalid' => false, 'invalid' => array());

    return array(
        'main' => array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__rangeFiltered['main'] ?? array()))),
        'extra' => array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__rangeFiltered['extra'] ?? array()))),
        'found' => !empty($official['found']) && (!empty($__rangeFiltered['main']) || !empty($__rangeFiltered['extra'])),
        'source' => (string)($official['source'] ?? 'official_draw_result'),
        'message' => !empty($__rangeFiltered['range_invalid']) ? 'Official draw result failed range audit for this game and was filtered.' : (string)($official['message'] ?? ''),
        'draw_date' => (string)($official['draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'draw_session' => (string)($official['draw_session'] ?? ''),
        'is_daily' => !empty($official['is_daily']),
        'cached_mismatch' => $cachedMismatch,
        'range_invalid' => !empty($__rangeFiltered['range_invalid']),
        'range_invalid_numbers' => array_values((array)($__rangeFiltered['invalid'] ?? array())),
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, $tableName) {
    try {
        $raw = $db->getTableColumns($tableName, false);
        return is_array($raw) ? array_keys($raw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryIsInactiveStatus($value) {
    $v = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
    return in_array($v, array('deleted','retired','archived','learning_only','orphaned'), true);
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method)
{
    $m = strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    if ($m === '') { return ''; }
    $m = str_replace(array('-', ' '), '_', $m);
    $m = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_]+/', '', $m);
    $map = array(
        'skai_prediction'=>'skai','skai_blend'=>'skai','skai'=>'skai',
        'core_ai_prediction'=>'core_ai','lottoexpert_core_ai'=>'core_ai','core_ai'=>'core_ai',
        'ai_prediction'=>'core_ai','ai'=>'core_ai','neural'=>'core_ai','neural_ai'=>'core_ai','neural_ai_prediction'=>'core_ai','classic_ai'=>'core_ai','classic_ai_prediction'=>'core_ai',
        'mcmc_prediction'=>'mcmc','mcmc'=>'mcmc',
        'skip_hit_prediction'=>'skip_hit','skip_hit'=>'skip_hit','skiphit'=>'skip_hit','skip'=>'skip_hit',
        'frequency_map'=>'frequency','frequency'=>'frequency','freq'=>'frequency','heat_map'=>'frequency','heatmap'=>'frequency','heatmap_manual'=>'frequency','manual_heatmap'=>'frequency',
        'manual'=>'manual','strategy_set'=>'strategy_set','strategy_builder'=>'strategy_set'
    );
    return isset($map[$m]) ? $map[$m] : '';
}

function mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method)
{
    $method = mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($method);
    $map = array(
        'skai'=>array('SKAI','SKAI Precision Track'),
        'core_ai'=>array('Core AI','Core AI Precision Lock Track'),
        'mcmc'=>array('MCMC Learning Engine','Adaptive MCMC Evidence Track'),
        'skip_hit'=>array('Skip/Hit','Skip/Hit Timing Track'),
        'frequency'=>array('Frequency/Heatmap','Frequency Baseline Track'),
        'manual'=>array('Manual Selection','Manual Play Track'),
        'strategy_set'=>array('Strategy Builder','Strategy Builder Track')
    );
    return isset($map[$method]) ? $map[$method] : array('Unknown','Unknown Track');
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel')) {
    function mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel($row)
    {
        $get = function($key) use ($row) {
            if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($key, $row)) { return trim((string)$row[$key]); }
            if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$key)) { return trim((string)$row->$key); }
            return '';
        };

        $officialSource = function($raw) {
            $raw = strtolower(trim((string)$raw));
            return ($raw === ''
                || strpos($raw, 'getlatestdrawing') !== false
                || strpos($raw, 'official') !== false
                || strpos($raw, 'draw_result') !== false
                || strpos($raw, 'direct_latest') !== false
                || strpos($raw, 'v102_exact_identity_scored_prediction_history') !== false
                || strpos($raw, 'visual_run_comparison') !== false);
        };

        $method = '';
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey')) {
            $method = (string)mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row);
        }
        if ($method === '' || $method === 'unknown') {
            foreach (array('analysis_method_key','method_key','method','saved_source','origin_source','analysis_source','prediction_source','source') as $key) {
                $raw = $get($key);
                if ($raw !== '' && !($key === 'source' && $officialSource($raw))) {
                    $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? (string)mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($raw) : strtolower(str_replace(array('-', ' '), '_', $raw));
                    if ($method !== '' && $method !== 'unknown') { break; }
                }
            }
        }

        $label = '';
        if ($method !== '' && $method !== 'unknown' && function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels')) {
            $labels = (array)mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($method);
            $label = trim((string)($labels[0] ?? ''));
        }
        if ($label === '' || strtolower($label) === 'unknown') {
            foreach (array('analysis_engine_label','method_label','source_label','analysis_track_label') as $key) {
                $raw = $get($key);
                if ($raw !== '' && strtolower($raw) !== 'unknown') { $label = $raw; break; }
            }
        }
        if ($label === '' || strtolower($label) === 'unknown') {
            foreach (array('saved_source','origin_source','analysis_source','prediction_source','source') as $key) {
                $raw = $get($key);
                if ($raw === '' || ($key === 'source' && $officialSource($raw))) { continue; }
                $label = ucwords(str_replace(array('_','-'), ' ', $raw));
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($label === '' || strtolower($label) === 'unknown') { $label = 'Analysis Source Not Recorded'; }

        return $label;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertPredictionMetaLineHtml')) {
    function mylottoexpertPredictionMetaLineHtml($row)
    {
        $parts = array();
        $sourceLabel = function_exists('mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel') ? mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel($row) : 'Analysis Source Not Recorded';
        $sourceLabel = trim((string)$sourceLabel);
        if ($sourceLabel === '' || strtolower($sourceLabel) === 'saved prediction') { $sourceLabel = 'Analysis Source Not Recorded'; }
        $parts[] = 'Analysis: ' . htmlspecialchars($sourceLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

        $modeLabel = '';
        $blendLabel = '';
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo')) {
            try {
                $disp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($row, array());
                $modeLabel = trim((string)($disp['mode'] ?? ''));
                $modeLabel = trim(preg_replace('/^Mode:\s*/i', '', $modeLabel));
                $blendLabel = trim((string)($disp['blend_display'] ?? ''));
                if ($blendLabel === '') { $blendLabel = trim((string)($disp['blend_technical'] ?? '')); }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $modeLabel = '';
                $blendLabel = '';
            }
        }

        $runDateLabel = '';
        $targetDateLabel = '';
        $read = function($key) use ($row) {
            if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($key, $row)) { return trim((string)$row[$key]); }
            if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$key)) { return trim((string)$row->$key); }
            return '';
        };
        foreach (array('run_date','generated_at','date_saved','created_at','updated_at','runner_saved_at') as $dateKey) {
            $rawDate = $read($dateKey);
            if ($rawDate !== '' && strncmp($rawDate, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) {
                $ts = strtotime($rawDate);
                if ($ts !== false && $ts > 0) { $runDateLabel = date('Y-m-d', $ts); break; }
            }
        }
        foreach (array('target_draw_date','draw_date','date_raw','actual_draw_date') as $dateKey) {
            $rawDate = $read($dateKey);
            if ($rawDate !== '' && strncmp($rawDate, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) {
                $ts = strtotime($rawDate);
                if ($ts !== false && $ts > 0) { $targetDateLabel = date('Y-m-d', $ts); break; }
            }
        }

        if ($modeLabel !== '') { $parts[] = 'Mode: ' . htmlspecialchars($modeLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); }
        if ($blendLabel !== '') { $parts[] = 'Blend: ' . htmlspecialchars($blendLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); }
        if ($runDateLabel !== '') { $parts[] = 'Run date: ' . htmlspecialchars($runDateLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); }
        if ($targetDateLabel !== '') { $parts[] = 'Target draw: ' . htmlspecialchars($targetDateLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); }

        return implode(' | ', $parts);
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryRowLooksLikeExplicitSkai($row, array $settings = array())
{
    $get = function($key) use ($row, $settings) {
        if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && $row[$key] !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$row[$key]));
        }
        if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$key) && $row->$key !== null && $row->$key !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$row->$key));
        }
        if (array_key_exists($key, $settings) && $settings[$key] !== null && $settings[$key] !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$settings[$key]));
        }
        return '';
    };
    $contains = function($value, array $needles) {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        if ($value === '') { return false; }
        foreach ($needles as $needle) {
            $needle = strtolower((string)$needle);
            if ($needle !== '' && strpos($value, $needle) !== false) { return true; }
        }
        return false;
    };

    $source = $get('source');
    if (in_array($source, array('skai','skai_prediction','skai_blend'), true)) { return true; }
    if ($get('model_family') === 'skai' || $get('origin_source') === 'skai' || $get('origin_source') === 'skai_prediction' || $get('analysis_source_page') === 'skai' || $get('source_page') === 'skai') { return true; }
    if ($contains($get('batch_type'), array('skai_precision','skai_batch','mle_skai','skai precision'))) { return true; }
    if ($contains($get('label'), array('skai'))) { return true; }
    if ($contains($get('analysis_engine_label'), array('skai')) || $contains($get('analysis_track_label'), array('skai'))) { return true; }

    foreach (array('skai_window_size','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos','skai_run_mode','skai_blend_pct','skai_blend','skai_strategy','skai_profile') as $k) {
        if (array_key_exists($k, $settings) && $settings[$k] !== null && $settings[$k] !== '') { return true; }
    }
    return false;
}

function mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($source) {
    $s = strtolower(trim((string)$source));
    if ($s === '') { return 'unknown'; }
    $canonical = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($s) : '';
    if ($canonical !== '') { return $canonical; }

    if ($s === 'skai_prediction' || $s === 'skai_blend' || $s === 'skai' || strpos($s, 'skai') !== false) { return 'skai'; }
    if ($s === 'core_ai' || $s === 'core_ai_prediction' || $s === 'lottoexpert_core_ai' || strpos($s, 'core_ai') !== false || strpos($s, 'core ai') !== false || strpos($s, 'core-ai') !== false) { return 'core_ai'; }
    if ($s === 'mcmc_prediction' || $s === 'mcmc' || strpos($s, 'mcmc') !== false) { return 'mcmc'; }
    if ($s === 'skip_hit' || $s === 'skip' || $s === 'skiphit' || $s === 'skip_prediction' || $s === 'skip_hit_prediction' || $s === 'skip_model' || $s === 'skip-hit' || strpos($s, 'skip_hit') !== false || strpos($s, 'skiphit') !== false || strpos($s, 'skip_prediction') !== false || strpos($s, 'skip-hit') !== false) { return 'skip_hit'; }
    if ($s === 'heatmap' || strpos($s, 'heatmap') !== false) { return 'frequency'; }
    if ($s === 'frequency' || strpos($s, 'frequency') !== false || strpos($s, 'freq') !== false) { return 'frequency'; }
    if ($s === 'ai_prediction' || $s === 'ai' || $s === 'neural' || $s === 'neural_ai' || $s === 'neural_ai_prediction' || $s === 'classic_ai' || $s === 'classic_ai_prediction' || strpos($s, 'neural') !== false) { return 'core_ai'; }
    if ($s === 'strategy_set') { return 'strategy_set'; }
    return $s;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) {

    $source = '';
    if (is_array($row)) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
        $canonicalMethod = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? '') : '';
    } elseif (is_object($row)) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row->source ?? '')));
        $canonicalMethod = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($row->analysis_method_key ?? '') : '';
    } else {
        return mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey('');
    }

    $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings')
        ? mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row)
        : array();
    if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }

    $originSourceForHeatmap = '';
    if (is_array($row)) {
        $originSourceForHeatmap = strtolower(trim((string)($row['origin_source'] ?? '')));
    } elseif (is_object($row)) {
        $originSourceForHeatmap = strtolower(trim((string)($row->origin_source ?? '')));
    }
    if ((function_exists('mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource') && (mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($source) || mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($originSourceForHeatmap)))
        || $source === 'heatmap_manual' || $originSourceForHeatmap === 'heatmap_manual') {
        return 'frequency';
    }

    if (!empty($canonicalMethod)) {
        if ($canonicalMethod === 'core_ai' && function_exists('mleAdvisoryRowLooksLikeExplicitSkai') && mleAdvisoryRowLooksLikeExplicitSkai($row, $settings)) {
            return 'skai';
        }
        return $canonicalMethod;
    }

    $getVal = function($key) use ($row, $settings) {
        if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($key, $row) && $row[$key] !== null && $row[$key] !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$row[$key]));
        }
        if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$key) && $row->$key !== null && $row->$key !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$row->$key));
        }
        if (is_array($settings) && array_key_exists($key, $settings) && $settings[$key] !== null && $settings[$key] !== '') {
            return strtolower(trim((string)$settings[$key]));
        }
        return '';
    };

    $containsAny = function($value, array $needles) {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        if ($value === '') { return false; }
        foreach ($needles as $needle) {
            $needle = strtolower((string)$needle);
            if ($needle !== '' && strpos($value, $needle) !== false) { return true; }
        }
        return false;
    };

    $modelFamily  = $getVal('model_family');
    $originSource = $getVal('origin_source');
    $batchType    = $getVal('batch_type');
    $sourcePage   = $getVal('source_page');
    $engine       = $getVal('engine');
    $engineName   = $getVal('engine_name');
    $modelName    = $getVal('model_name');

    if (in_array($source, array('skai','skai_prediction','skai_blend'), true)) { return 'skai'; }
    if ($modelFamily === 'skai' || $originSource === 'skai' || $originSource === 'skai_prediction' || $sourcePage === 'skai') { return 'skai'; }
    if ($containsAny($batchType, array('skai_precision','skai_batch','mle_skai'))) { return 'skai'; }

    if (in_array($source, array('mcmc','mcmc_prediction'), true) || $modelFamily === 'mcmc' || $originSource === 'mcmc') { return 'mcmc'; }
    if (in_array($source, array('skip','skiphit','skip_hit','skip_prediction','skip_hit_prediction','skip_model','skip-hit'), true) || $modelFamily === 'skip_hit' || $modelFamily === 'skip' || $originSource === 'skip_hit' || $originSource === 'skip') { return 'skip_hit'; }
    if (in_array($source, array('heatmap','heat_map','heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','frequency_heatmap'), true) || $modelFamily === 'heatmap') { return 'frequency'; }
    if (in_array($source, array('frequency','frequency_map'), true) || $modelFamily === 'frequency') { return 'frequency'; }
    if ($source === 'strategy_set') { return 'strategy_set'; }

    $coreAliases = array('core_ai','core-ai','core ai','core_ai_prediction','lottoexpert_core_ai','lottoexpert core ai','ai_prediction','ai','neural','neural_ai','neural_ai_prediction','classic_ai','classic_ai_prediction');
    foreach (array($source,$modelFamily,$originSource,$sourcePage,$engine,$engineName,$modelName) as $v) {
        if ($v !== '' && in_array($v, $coreAliases, true)) { return 'core_ai'; }
    }
    if ($containsAny($batchType, array('core_ai','core ai','core-ai','core_ai_precision','precision_lock_9_batch'))) { return 'core_ai'; }
    foreach (array('signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_label','focus_profile','core_ai_blend_pct') as $k) {
        if (array_key_exists($k, $settings) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) { return 'core_ai'; }
    }

    if ($source === '' || in_array($source, array('prediction','saved_prediction'), true)) {
        foreach (array('skai_window_size','skai_top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_combos','skai_run_mode') as $k) {
            if (array_key_exists($k, $settings) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) { return 'skai'; }
        }
    }

    if (function_exists('mleV65DetectMethodFromMarkers')) {
        $v65Detected = mleV65DetectMethodFromMarkers($row);
        $v65DetectedMethod = (string)($v65Detected['method'] ?? 'unknown');
        $genericSource = ($source === '' || in_array($source, array('unknown','prediction','saved_prediction','default','batch','mle','legacy','auto','generated'), true));
        if ($genericSource && in_array($v65DetectedMethod, array('skai','core_ai','mcmc','skip_hit','frequency'), true)) {
            return $v65DetectedMethod;
        }
    }

    return mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($source !== '' ? $source : 'unknown');
}

if (!function_exists('mleV65RowValue')) {
    function mleV65RowValue($row, $key) {
        if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($key, $row)) { return $row[$key]; }
        if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$key)) { return $row->$key; }
        return '';
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65CleanScalar')) {
    function mleV65CleanScalar($value, $maxLen = 220) {
        if (is_array($value) || is_object($value)) { $value = json_encode($value); }
        $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', (string)$value);
        $value = trim($value);
        if ($maxLen > 0 && strlen($value) > $maxLen) { $value = substr($value, 0, $maxLen); }
        return $value;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65DecodeJsonArray')) {
    function mleV65DecodeJsonArray($value) {
        if (is_array($value)) { return $value; }
        if (is_object($value)) { return json_decode(json_encode($value), true) ?: array(); }
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '') { return array(); }
        $decoded = json_decode($value, true);
        return (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) ? $decoded : array();
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65FlattenForSearch')) {
    function mleV65FlattenForSearch($value) {
        if (is_array($value) || is_object($value)) { $value = json_encode($value); }
        $value = strtolower((string)$value);
        $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-.]+/', ' ', $value);
        return ' ' . trim($value) . ' ';
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65ExtractJsonMarkerText')) {
    function mleV65ExtractJsonMarkerText($row) {
        $parts = array();
        foreach (array('source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','prediction_method','analysis_method','save_source','engine_source','run_source','model_family','batch_type','label','settings_json','settings','meta_json','metadata_json','evidence_json','prediction_target_json','run_uuid','batch_uuid','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','skai_window_size','skip_window','draws_used','draws_analyzed','history_window','window_size','blend_ai_pct','blend_skip_pct','risk_profile','strategy','strategy_profile','focus_profile') as $key) {
            $val = mleV65RowValue($row, $key);
            if ($val !== null && $val !== '') { $parts[] = $key . ' ' . (is_scalar($val) ? (string)$val : json_encode($val)); }
        }
        foreach (array('settings_json','settings','meta_json','metadata_json','evidence_json','prediction_target_json') as $jsonKey) {
            $decoded = mleV65DecodeJsonArray(mleV65RowValue($row, $jsonKey));
            if (!empty($decoded)) { $parts[] = $jsonKey . ' ' . json_encode($decoded); }
        }
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings')) {
            try {
                $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row);
                if (is_array($settings) && !empty($settings)) { $parts[] = 'effective_settings ' . json_encode($settings); }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        }
        return mleV65FlattenForSearch(implode(' ', $parts));
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65DetectMethodFromMarkers')) {
    function mleV65DetectMethodFromMarkers($row) {
        $blob = mleV65ExtractJsonMarkerText($row);
        $has = function(array $needles) use ($blob) {
            foreach ($needles as $needle) {
                $needle = strtolower((string)$needle);
                if ($needle !== '' && strpos($blob, $needle) !== false) { return $needle; }
            }
            return '';
        };
        $methodFields = array();
        foreach (array('analysis_method_key','prediction_method','analysis_method','source','origin_source','save_source','engine_source','run_source','model_family') as $k) {
            $v = strtolower(trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, $k)));
            if ($v !== '') { $methodFields[] = $v; }
        }
        $explicit = implode(' ', $methodFields);
        $genericSources = array('', 'unknown', 'prediction', 'saved_prediction', 'default', 'batch', 'mle', 'legacy', 'auto', 'generated');
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'source')));
        $safeToInfer = ($source === '' || in_array($source, $genericSources, true));
        if (!$safeToInfer) {
            $canon = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($explicit) : '';
            if ($canon !== '') { return array('method'=>$canon, 'confidence'=>'explicit', 'reason'=>'recognized_explicit_method', 'markers'=>array($canon)); }
        }
        $skaiMarker = $has(array('skai_window','skai_window_size','history_window','mle_skai','skai_precision','skai_batch','closed_loop','blend_ai_pct','blend_skip_pct','batch_uuid','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','top_n_combos'));
        if ($skaiMarker !== '') { return array('method'=>'skai', 'confidence'=>'inferred', 'reason'=>'settings_json_contains_skai_markers', 'markers'=>array($skaiMarker)); }
        $mcmcMarker = $has(array('mcmc','gibbs','gibbs_enabled','markov','chain_count','burn_in'));
        if ($mcmcMarker !== '') { return array('method'=>'mcmc', 'confidence'=>'inferred', 'reason'=>'settings_json_contains_mcmc_markers', 'markers'=>array($mcmcMarker)); }
        $skipMarker = $has(array('skip_hit','skip_window','skip model','skip_prediction','hit_skip','skip_hit_prediction'));
        if ($skipMarker !== '') { return array('method'=>'skip_hit', 'confidence'=>'inferred', 'reason'=>'settings_json_contains_skip_hit_markers', 'markers'=>array($skipMarker)); }
        $freqMarker = $has(array('frequency','heatmap','heat_map','freq_map','frequency_map'));
        if ($freqMarker !== '') { return array('method'=>'frequency', 'confidence'=>'inferred', 'reason'=>'settings_json_contains_frequency_markers', 'markers'=>array($freqMarker)); }
        $coreMarker = $has(array('core_ai','core ai','lottoexpert_core_ai','signal_blend_ai_pct','core_ai_blend_pct','precision_lock_9_batch'));
        if ($coreMarker !== '') { return array('method'=>'core_ai', 'confidence'=>'inferred', 'reason'=>'settings_json_contains_core_ai_markers', 'markers'=>array($coreMarker)); }
        return array('method'=>'unknown', 'confidence'=>'none', 'reason'=>'missing_method_source', 'markers'=>array());
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65UnknownReasonForRow')) {
    function mleV65UnknownReasonForRow($row) {
        $source = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'source'));
        $analysis = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'analysis_method_key'));
        $gameId = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'game_id'));
        $targetGameId = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_game_id'));
        $targetDate = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_draw_date'));
        $drawDate = trim((string)mleV65RowValue($row, 'draw_date'));
        if ($gameId === '' && $targetGameId === '' && (int)mleV65RowValue($row, 'lottery_id') <= 0 && (int)mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_lottery_id') <= 0) { return 'missing_game_identity'; }
        if ($source === '' && $analysis === '') { return 'missing_method_source'; }
        if ($targetDate === '' && $drawDate === '') { return 'missing_target_draw'; }
        if ($source !== '' || $analysis !== '') { return 'unrecognized_method_value'; }
        return 'legacy_row_shape';
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow')) {
    function mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow($row, array $visualRow = array()) {
        $settingsJson = mleV65RowValue($row, 'settings_json');
        if ($settingsJson === '') { $settingsJson = mleV65RowValue($row, 'settings'); }
        $metaJson = mleV65RowValue($row, 'meta_json');
        if ($metaJson === '') { $metaJson = mleV65RowValue($row, 'metadata_json'); }
        $detected = mleV65DetectMethodFromMarkers($row);
        $predMain = array();
        $predExtra = array();
        foreach (array('numbers','predicted_numbers','main_numbers','predicted_main','values') as $key) {
            $val = mleV65RowValue($row, $key);
            if ($val !== '') {
                if (is_string($val)) { preg_match_all('/\d+/', $val, $m); $predMain = array_map('intval', $m[0] ?? array()); }
                elseif (is_array($val)) { $predMain = array_map('intval', $val); }
                if (!empty($predMain)) { break; }
            }
        }
        if (empty($predMain) && !empty($visualRow['predicted'])) { $predMain = array_map('intval', (array)$visualRow['predicted']); }
        foreach (array('extra_numbers','bonus_numbers','predicted_extra','extra') as $key) {
            $val = mleV65RowValue($row, $key);
            if ($val !== '') {
                if (is_string($val)) { preg_match_all('/\d+/', $val, $m); $predExtra = array_map('intval', $m[0] ?? array()); }
                elseif (is_array($val)) { $predExtra = array_map('intval', $val); }
                if (!empty($predExtra)) { break; }
            }
        }
        if (empty($predExtra) && !empty($visualRow['predicted_extra'])) { $predExtra = array_map('intval', (array)$visualRow['predicted_extra']); }
        $reason = mleV65UnknownReasonForRow($row);
        $status = trim((string)(mleV65RowValue($row, 'score_status') ?: mleV65RowValue($row, 'status') ?: mleV65RowValue($row, 'play_status')));
        if ($status === '' && empty($visualRow['completed'])) { $status = 'pending_unscored'; }
        return array(
            'saved_id' => (int)(mleV65RowValue($row, 'id') ?: ($visualRow['saved_id'] ?? 0)),
            'user_id' => (int)mleV65RowValue($row, 'user_id'),
            'game_id' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'game_id')),
            'target_game_id' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_game_id')),
            'lottery_id' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'lottery_id')),
            'target_lottery_id' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_lottery_id')),
            'lottery_name' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'lottery_name')),
            'target_draw_date' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'target_draw_date') ?: ($visualRow['draw_date'] ?? '')),
            'draw_date' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'draw_date')),
            'actual_draw_date' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'actual_draw_date')),
            'created_at' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'created_at') ?: mleV65RowValue($row, 'date_saved')),
            'updated_at' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'updated_at')),
            'prediction_method' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'prediction_method')),
            'analysis_method' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'analysis_method')),
            'analysis_method_key' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'analysis_method_key')),
            'source' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'source')),
            'save_source' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'save_source')),
            'origin_source' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'origin_source')),
            'engine_source' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'engine_source')),
            'run_source' => mleV65CleanScalar(mleV65RowValue($row, 'run_source')),
            'status' => mleV65CleanScalar($status),
            'is_scored' => (!empty($visualRow['completed']) || (int)mleV65RowValue($row, 'is_scored') > 0) ? 1 : 0,
            'settings_json_exists' => trim((string)$settingsJson) !== '' ? 1 : 0,
            'meta_json_exists' => trim((string)$metaJson) !== '' ? 1 : 0,
            'predicted_main' => array_values(array_slice(array_unique(array_filter($predMain, function($v){ return (int)$v > 0; })), 0, 30)),
            'predicted_extra' => array_values(array_slice(array_unique(array_filter($predExtra, function($v){ return (int)$v > 0; })), 0, 10)),
            'unknown_reason' => $reason,
            'detected_method' => (string)($detected['method'] ?? 'unknown'),
            'detected_confidence' => (string)($detected['confidence'] ?? 'none'),
            'detected_reason' => (string)($detected['reason'] ?? ''),
            'detected_markers' => (array)($detected['markers'] ?? array()),
        );
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity')) {
    function mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity(array $trace) {
        if ((int)($trace['saved_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { return true; }
        if ((int)($trace['user_id'] ?? 0) > 0) { return true; }
        foreach (array('game_id','target_game_id','lottery_id','target_lottery_id','lottery_name','target_draw_date','draw_date','actual_draw_date','created_at','updated_at','source','save_source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','prediction_method','analysis_method') as $key) {
            if (trim((string)($trace[$key] ?? '')) !== '') { return true; }
        }
        if (!empty($trace['settings_json_exists']) || !empty($trace['meta_json_exists'])) { return true; }
        if (!empty($trace['predicted_main']) || !empty($trace['predicted_extra'])) { return true; }
        return false;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV69BuildUnknownSourceProvenance')) {
    function mleV69BuildUnknownSourceProvenance($row, array $visualRow = array(), $origin = 'unknown') {
        $trace = function_exists('mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow') ? mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow($row, $visualRow) : array();
        $visualKeys = array();
        foreach (array('saved_id','method','method_label','draw_date','label','completed','source_record_id','numbers_count') as $key) {
            if (array_key_exists($key, $visualRow)) { $visualKeys[$key] = is_scalar($visualRow[$key]) ? (string)$visualRow[$key] : json_encode($visualRow[$key]); }
        }
        return array(
            'origin' => (string)$origin,
            'saved_id' => (int)($trace['saved_id'] ?? 0),
            'user_id' => (int)($trace['user_id'] ?? 0),
            'game_id' => (string)($trace['game_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_game_id' => (string)($trace['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
            'lottery_id' => (string)($trace['lottery_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_lottery_id' => (string)($trace['target_lottery_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_draw_date' => (string)($trace['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'draw_date' => (string)($trace['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'created_at' => (string)($trace['created_at'] ?? ''),
            'source' => (string)($trace['source'] ?? ''),
            'method' => (string)($trace['analysis_method_key'] ?? $trace['prediction_method'] ?? $trace['analysis_method'] ?? ''),
            'status' => (string)($trace['status'] ?? ''),
            'predicted_main_count' => count((array)($trace['predicted_main'] ?? array())),
            'predicted_extra_count' => count((array)($trace['predicted_extra'] ?? array())),
            'detected_method' => (string)($trace['detected_method'] ?? 'unknown'),
            'detected_reason' => (string)($trace['detected_reason'] ?? ''),
            'unknown_reason' => (string)($trace['unknown_reason'] ?? 'unknown'),
            'has_meaningful_identity' => mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity($trace) ? 1 : 0,
            'visual_keys' => $visualKeys,
            'admin_message' => 'A pending Unknown count was suppressed because it had no traceable saved row identity, no game identity, no timestamp, and no predicted numbers. This is a source-mapping/counter issue, not a user-fixable saved run.',
        );
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource')) {
    function mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource($row, array $visualRow = array()) {
        if (!function_exists('mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow')) { return false; }
        $trace = mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow($row, $visualRow);
        return !mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity($trace);
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array $lotteryIds) {
    $ids = array();
    foreach ($lotteryIds as $id) {
        $id = (int)$id;
        if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; }
    }
    if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }

    $names = array();
    $lotteryCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__lotteries');
    $hasLotteryId = in_array('lottery_id', $lotteryCols, true);
    $hasId = in_array('id', $lotteryCols, true);
    if (!$hasLotteryId && !$hasId) { return array(); }

    $nameCol = '';
    foreach (array('name','lottery_name','game_name','title') as $candidate) {
        if (in_array($candidate, $lotteryCols, true)) { $nameCol = $candidate; break; }
    }
    if ($nameCol === '') { return array(); }

    $select = array();
    if ($hasLotteryId) { $select[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id'); }
    if ($hasId) { $select[] = $db->quoteName('id'); }
    $select[] = $db->quoteName($nameCol, 'mle_lottery_name');
    foreach (array('state_name','country_name','game_id') as $optionalCol) {
        if (in_array($optionalCol, $lotteryCols, true)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($optionalCol); }
    }

    $whereParts = array();
    if ($hasLotteryId) { $whereParts[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_values($ids)) . ')'; }
    if ($hasId) { $whereParts[] = $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_values($ids)) . ')'; }

    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $whereParts) . ')');
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        if (is_array($rows)) {
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $lid = 0;
                if ($hasLotteryId && isset($row['lottery_id']) && (int)$row['lottery_id'] > 0) {
                    $lid = (int)$row['lottery_id'];
                } elseif ($hasId && isset($row['id']) && (int)$row['id'] > 0) {
                    $lid = (int)$row['id'];
                }
                if ($lid <= 0 || !isset($ids[$lid])) { continue; }

                $baseName = trim((string)($row['mle_lottery_name'] ?? ''));
                $display = '';
                if ($baseName !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine')) {
                    $display = trim((string)mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                        (string)($row['state_name'] ?? ''),
                        (string)($row['country_name'] ?? ''),
                        $baseName,
                        (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
                        ' - '
                    ));
                }
                if ($display === '') { $display = $baseName; }
                if ($display !== '') { $names[$lid] = $display; }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {

    }
    return $names;
}

function mleAdvisoryRowLotteryDisplayName(array $row, $lid) {
    $lid = (int)$lid;
    foreach (array('lottery_name','lottery','name','game_name','title') as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key])) {
            $value = trim((string)$row[$key]);
            if ($value !== '' && !preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $value)) {
                return $value;
            }
        }
    }
    return $lid > 0 ? ('Lottery ID ' . $lid) : 'Lottery';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId, $onlyLotteryId = 0, $rowLimit = 0) {
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $onlyLotteryId = (int)$onlyLotteryId;
    $rowLimit = (int)$rowLimit;
    if ($userId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $snCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($snCols)) { return array(); }

    $hasTargetLotteryId = in_array('target_lottery_id', $snCols, true);
    $hasTargetGameId = in_array('target_game_id', $snCols, true);
    $hasSavedGameId = in_array('game_id', $snCols, true);

    $select = array();
    foreach ($snCols as $c) { $select[] = 'sn.' . $db->quoteName($c); }

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select($select)
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 'sn'))
        ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId);

    $identityWhere = array('COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0) > 0');
    if ($hasTargetLotteryId) { $identityWhere[] = 'COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
    if ($hasTargetGameId) { $identityWhere[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) <> ' . $db->quote(''); }
    if ($hasSavedGameId) { $identityWhere[] = 'TRIM(COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) <> ' . $db->quote(''); }
    $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $identityWhere) . ')');

    if ($onlyLotteryId > 0) {
        $onlyLotteryWhere = array('COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ',0) = ' . (int)$onlyLotteryId);
        if ($hasTargetLotteryId) {
            $onlyLotteryWhere[] = 'COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ',0) = ' . (int)$onlyLotteryId;
        }
        $q->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $onlyLotteryWhere) . ')');
    }

    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds')) {
        $__mleActiveHiddenIds = mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId);
        $__mleActiveHiddenClean = array();
        foreach ((array)$__mleActiveHiddenIds as $__mleActiveHiddenRaw) {
            $__mleActiveHiddenInt = (int)$__mleActiveHiddenRaw;
            if ($__mleActiveHiddenInt > 0) { $__mleActiveHiddenClean[$__mleActiveHiddenInt] = $__mleActiveHiddenInt; }
        }
        if (!empty($__mleActiveHiddenClean)) {
            $__mleActiveHiddenIn = implode(',', array_values($__mleActiveHiddenClean));
            $q->where('COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ', 0) NOT IN (' . $__mleActiveHiddenIn . ')');
            if ($hasTargetLotteryId) {
                $q->where('(COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ', 0) = 0 OR COALESCE(sn.' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ', 0) NOT IN (' . $__mleActiveHiddenIn . '))');
            }
        }
        unset($__mleActiveHiddenIds, $__mleActiveHiddenClean, $__mleActiveHiddenRaw, $__mleActiveHiddenInt, $__mleActiveHiddenIn);
    }

    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols, true)) {
        $q->where("(sn.source <> 'strategy_set' AND (COALESCE(sn.save_intent,'') NOT IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate') OR LOWER(COALESCE(sn.source,'')) IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map') OR LOWER(COALESCE(sn.origin_source,'')) IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map')))");
    } else {
        $q->where("sn.source <> 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $q->order('sn.next_draw_date DESC, sn.source ASC, COALESCE(sn.generated_at, sn.date_saved) DESC, sn.id DESC');
    if ($rowLimit > 0) {
        $q->setLimit(max(25, min(2000, (int)$rowLimit)));
    }

    try { $db->setQuery($q); $rows = $db->loadAssocList(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }

    $grouped = array();
    $debug = array(
        'total_saved_rows_found' => is_array($rows) ? count($rows) : 0,
        'rejected_no_identity' => 0,
        'rejected_status_or_save_intent' => 0,
        'accepted_rows' => 0,
        'accepted_by_group' => array(),
        'accepted_rows_debug' => array(),
    );

    foreach ((array)$rows as $row) {
        $source = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
        if ($source === 'strategy_set') { continue; }

        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow') && mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($row)) {
            $debug['rejected_status_or_save_intent']++;
            continue;
        }

        $saveIntent = strtolower(trim((string)($row['save_intent'] ?? '')));
        $rowSourceForHeatmap = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
        $rowOriginForHeatmap = strtolower(trim((string)($row['origin_source'] ?? '')));
        $isHeatmapEvidenceRow = (function_exists('mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource')
            && (mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($rowSourceForHeatmap) || mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($rowOriginForHeatmap)));
        if (in_array($saveIntent, array('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate'), true) && !$isHeatmapEvidenceRow) {
            $debug['rejected_status_or_save_intent']++;
            continue;
        }

        $inactive = false;
        foreach (array('play_status','status') as $sf) {
            $statusValue = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$sf] ?? '')));
            if (in_array($statusValue, array('deleted','discarded','inactive','retired'), true)) {
                $inactive = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($inactive) {
            $debug['rejected_status_or_save_intent']++;
            continue;
        }

        $identity = mleResolveSavedRowGameIdentity($db, $row);
        $effectiveLotteryId = (int)($identity['effective_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        $effectiveGameId = trim((string)($identity['effective_game_id'] ?? ''));
        if ($effectiveLotteryId <= 0 && $effectiveGameId === '') {
            $debug['rejected_no_identity']++;
            continue;
        }

        $row['lottery_id'] = $effectiveLotteryId;
        $row['game_id'] = $effectiveGameId;
        $row['mle_lottery_game_id'] = $effectiveGameId;

        $lotName = trim((string)($identity['display_lottery_name'] ?? ''));
        if ($lotName === '') { $lotName = mleAdvisoryRowLotteryDisplayName($row, $effectiveLotteryId); }
        $stateName = trim((string)($identity['display_state_name'] ?? ''));
        $countryName = trim((string)($identity['display_country_name'] ?? ''));

        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine')) {
            $displayName = trim((string)mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine($stateName, $countryName, $lotName, $effectiveGameId, ' - '));
            $row['lottery_name'] = $displayName !== '' ? $displayName : $lotName;
        } else {
            $row['lottery_name'] = $lotName;
        }
        $row['mle_state_name'] = $stateName;
        $row['mle_country_name'] = $countryName;

        if ($effectiveGameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertScrubSavedPredictionArrayToGameRange')) {
            $row = mylottoexpertScrubSavedPredictionArrayToGameRange($row, $effectiveGameId);
        }

        $row['__method_key'] = mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row);
        if ($row['__method_key'] === 'strategy_set') { continue; }

        $groupKey = $effectiveGameId !== '' ? ('game:' . strtolower($effectiveGameId)) : ('lottery:' . (int)$effectiveLotteryId);
        if (!isset($grouped[$groupKey])) {
            $grouped[$groupKey] = array(
                'lottery_id' => $effectiveLotteryId,
                'game_id' => $effectiveGameId,
                'lottery_name' => (string)$row['lottery_name'],
                'rows' => array()
            );
        }
        if ((int)$grouped[$groupKey]['lottery_id'] <= 0 && $effectiveLotteryId > 0) {
            $grouped[$groupKey]['lottery_id'] = $effectiveLotteryId;
        }
        if (trim((string)($grouped[$groupKey]['game_id'] ?? '')) === '' && $effectiveGameId !== '') {
            $grouped[$groupKey]['game_id'] = $effectiveGameId;
        }
        if (trim((string)$grouped[$groupKey]['lottery_name']) === '' && trim((string)$row['lottery_name']) !== '') {
            $grouped[$groupKey]['lottery_name'] = (string)$row['lottery_name'];
        }
        $grouped[$groupKey]['rows'][] = $row;

        $debug['accepted_rows']++;
        if (!isset($debug['accepted_by_group'][$groupKey])) {
            $debug['accepted_by_group'][$groupKey] = array(
                'count' => 0,
                'game_id' => $effectiveGameId,
                'lottery_id' => $effectiveLotteryId,
                'lottery_name' => (string)$row['lottery_name'],
            );
        }
        $debug['accepted_by_group'][$groupKey]['count']++;
        $debug['accepted_rows_debug'][] = array(
            'row_id' => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
            'group_key' => $groupKey,
            'method_key' => (string)$row['__method_key'],
            'source' => (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
            'origin_source' => (string)($row['origin_source'] ?? ''),
            'analysis_method_key' => (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
            'lottery_id' => (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
            'target_lottery_id' => (int)($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0),
            'game_id' => (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
            'target_game_id' => (string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
            'display_name' => (string)($row['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
        );
    }

    $out = array();
    foreach ($grouped as $groupKey => $bucket) {
        $lid = (int)($bucket['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($lid <= 0) {
            foreach ((array)($bucket['rows'] ?? array()) as $__rowCandidate) {
                $lid = (int)($__rowCandidate['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($lid > 0) { break; }
            }
        }
        if ($lid <= 0) {
            $debug['rejected_no_identity'] += count((array)($bucket['rows'] ?? array()));
            continue;
        }
        if (!isset($out[$lid])) {
            $out[$lid] = array('lottery_id' => $lid, 'game_id' => (string)($bucket['game_id'] ?? ''), 'lottery_name' => (string)($bucket['lottery_name'] ?? ''), 'rows' => array());
        }
        if (trim((string)($out[$lid]['game_id'] ?? '')) === '' && trim((string)($bucket['game_id'] ?? '')) !== '') {
            $out[$lid]['game_id'] = (string)$bucket['game_id'];
        }
        if (trim((string)$out[$lid]['lottery_name']) === '' && trim((string)($bucket['lottery_name'] ?? '')) !== '') {
            $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = (string)$bucket['lottery_name'];
        }
        foreach ((array)($bucket['rows'] ?? array()) as $__bucketRow) {
            $out[$lid]['rows'][] = $__bucketRow;
        }
    }

    if (!empty($out)) {
        $resolvedNames = mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array_keys($out));
        foreach ($out as $lid => $data) {
            $currentName = trim((string)($data['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if (($currentName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $currentName)) && isset($resolvedNames[$lid]) && trim((string)$resolvedNames[$lid]) !== '') {
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = (string)$resolvedNames[$lid];
            } elseif ($currentName === '') {
                $out[$lid]['lottery_name'] = 'Lottery ID ' . (int)$lid;
            }
        }
    }

    $debug['accepted_by_group'] = array_values($debug['accepted_by_group']);
    $GLOBALS['mle_debug_visibility_stats'] = $debug;

    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertApplyWorkspaceLotteryVisibility')) {
        $out = mylottoexpertApplyWorkspaceLotteryVisibility($db, $userId, $out);
    }

    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildActiveEvidenceIndexes(array $activeRows) {
    $idx = array('ids'=>array(), 'run_uuid'=>array(), 'snapshot_run_uuid'=>array(), 'run_identity_key'=>array(), 'prediction_target_id'=>array(), 'prediction_target_key'=>array(), 'method_by_id'=>array(), 'rows_by_id'=>array());
    foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
        $id = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($id > 0) {
            $idx['ids'][$id] = $id;
            $idx['method_by_id'][$id] = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row));
            $idx['rows_by_id'][$id] = $row;
        }
        foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key') as $k) {
            $v = strtolower(trim((string)($row[$k] ?? '')));
            if ($v !== '' && $id > 0) { $idx[$k][$v] = $id; }
        }
    }
    return $idx;
}

function mleAdvisoryProvenanceTextBlob(array $row) {
    $parts = array();
    foreach (array(
        'source','origin_source','save_intent','play_status','status','analysis_method_key','analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','analysis_source_page',
        'model_family','batch_type','source_batch_type','source_batch_origin','skai_run_mode','risk_profile','strategy_profile','focus_profile','label',
        'hive_intake_mode','hive_research_type','hive_contract_status','hive_assignment_id','hive_queue_id','source_batch_test_variable','source_batch_test_value'
    ) as $key) {
        if (isset($row[$key]) && is_scalar($row[$key])) {
            $v = strtolower(trim((string)$row[$key]));
            if ($v !== '') { $parts[] = $v; }
        }
    }
    return ' ' . preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', implode(' ', $parts)) . ' ';
}

function mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow(array $row) {
    $blob = mleAdvisoryProvenanceTextBlob($row);
    $needles = array(
        ' admin_run ', ' admin run ', ' admin_batch ', ' admin batch ', ' admin_only ', ' admin only ',
        ' system_learning ', ' system learning ', ' learning_only ', ' learning only ', ' training_only ', ' training only ',
        ' global_hive_research ', ' global hive research ', ' global_research ', ' global research ', ' global_starting_prior ',
        ' hive_research ', ' hive research ', ' hive_learning ', ' hive learning ', ' research_queue ', ' research assignment ',
        ' global discovery ', ' global discovery batch ', ' platform research ', ' shared research ', ' optimizer snapshot ', ' diagnostic ', ' debug '
    );
    foreach ($needles as $needle) {
        if (strpos($blob, $needle) !== false) { return true; }
    }
    $saveIntent = strtolower(trim((string)($row['save_intent'] ?? '')));
    if (in_array($saveIntent, array('admin_training','training_only','learning_only','hive_learning','global_research','system_learning'), true)) { return true; }
    $origin = strtolower(trim((string)($row['origin_source'] ?? '')));
    if (in_array($origin, array('admin','admin_run','system_learning','hive_learning','global_research'), true)) { return true; }
    return false;
}

function mleAdvisoryStrictDateKey($value) {
    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '' || strncmp($value, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { return ''; }
    if (preg_match('/(\d{4})-(\d{1,2})-(\d{1,2})/', $value, $m)) {
        return sprintf('%04d-%02d-%02d', (int)$m[1], (int)$m[2], (int)$m[3]);
    }
    if (preg_match('/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})/', $value, $m)) {
        return sprintf('%04d-%02d-%02d', (int)$m[3], (int)$m[1], (int)$m[2]);
    }
    $ts = strtotime($value);
    return ($ts !== false && $ts > 0) ? gmdate('Y-m-d', $ts) : '';
}

function mleAdvisoryFirstDateValue(array $row, array $keys) {
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        if (!array_key_exists($key, $row)) { continue; }
        $raw = trim((string)$row[$key]);
        if ($raw === '' || strncmp($raw, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { continue; }
        $date = mleAdvisoryStrictDateKey($raw);
        if ($date !== '') { return array('raw'=>$raw, 'date'=>$date, 'key'=>$key); }
    }
    return array('raw'=>'', 'date'=>'', 'key'=>'');
}

function mleAdvisoryUserDrawProofCheck(array $savedRow, array $perfRow, $currentUserId, $selectedLotteryId) {
    $currentUserId = (int)$currentUserId;
    $selectedLotteryId = (int)$selectedLotteryId;
    $reasons = array();

    if ($currentUserId <= 0) { $reasons[] = 'missing_current_user'; }

    $savedUserId = (int)($savedRow['user_id'] ?? 0);
    $perfUserId = (int)($perfRow['user_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($savedUserId <= 0 || $savedUserId !== $currentUserId) { $reasons[] = 'saved_row_not_owned_by_current_user'; }
    if ($perfUserId > 0 && $perfUserId !== $currentUserId) { $reasons[] = 'score_row_not_owned_by_current_user'; }

    if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow')) {
        if (mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($savedRow)) { $reasons[] = 'saved_row_system_learning_only'; }
        if (!empty($perfRow) && mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($perfRow)) { $reasons[] = 'score_row_system_learning_only'; }
    }

    $savedId = (int)($savedRow['id'] ?? 0);
    $runId = (int)($perfRow['run_id'] ?? 0);
    $hasImmutableMatch = false;
    if ($savedId > 0 && $runId > 0 && $savedId === $runId) { $hasImmutableMatch = true; }
    foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key') as $key) {
        $a = strtolower(trim((string)($savedRow[$key] ?? '')));
        $b = strtolower(trim((string)($perfRow[$key] ?? '')));
        if ($a !== '' && $b !== '' && $a === $b) { $hasImmutableMatch = true; break; }
    }
    if (!$hasImmutableMatch) { $reasons[] = 'no_immutable_saved_run_match'; }

    $savedLotteryIds = array();
    foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id','effective_lottery_id') as $key) {
        $v = (int)($savedRow[$key] ?? 0);
        if ($v > 0) { $savedLotteryIds[$v] = $v; }
    }
    $perfLotteryIds = array();
    foreach (array('lottery_id','target_lottery_id','effective_lottery_id') as $key) {
        $v = (int)($perfRow[$key] ?? 0);
        if ($v > 0) { $perfLotteryIds[$v] = $v; }
    }
    if ($selectedLotteryId > 0) {
        if (!isset($savedLotteryIds[$selectedLotteryId])) { $reasons[] = 'saved_row_not_for_selected_lottery'; }
        if (!empty($perfLotteryIds) && !isset($perfLotteryIds[$selectedLotteryId])) { $reasons[] = 'score_row_not_for_selected_lottery'; }
    }
    if (!empty($savedLotteryIds) && !empty($perfLotteryIds)) {
        $hasLotteryIntersection = false;
        foreach ($savedLotteryIds as $lid) { if (isset($perfLotteryIds[$lid])) { $hasLotteryIntersection = true; break; } }
        if (!$hasLotteryIntersection) { $reasons[] = 'saved_and_score_lottery_mismatch'; }
    }

    $savedDraw = mleAdvisoryFirstDateValue($savedRow, array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date','draw_date'));
    $perfDraw = mleAdvisoryFirstDateValue($perfRow, array('draw_date','target_draw_date','actual_draw_date','latest_draw_date','next_draw_date'));
    if ($savedDraw['date'] === '' || $perfDraw['date'] === '') {
        $reasons[] = 'missing_target_draw_link';
    } elseif ($savedDraw['date'] !== $perfDraw['date']) {
        $reasons[] = 'saved_prediction_not_tied_to_this_draw';
    }

    $savedAt = mleAdvisoryFirstDateValue($savedRow, array('date_saved','generated_at','created_at','created','saved_at','run_date'));
    if ($savedAt['date'] === '') {
        $reasons[] = 'missing_saved_before_draw_timestamp';
    } elseif ($perfDraw['date'] !== '' && strcmp($savedAt['date'], $perfDraw['date']) > 0) {
        $reasons[] = 'saved_after_target_draw';
    }

    return array(
        'ok' => empty($reasons),
        'reasons' => array_values(array_unique($reasons)),
        'saved_draw_date' => (string)$savedDraw['date'],
        'score_draw_date' => (string)$perfDraw['date'],
        'saved_at_date' => (string)$savedAt['date'],
        'saved_id' => $savedId,
        'score_id' => (int)($perfRow['id'] ?? 0),
        'run_id' => $runId,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance(array $savedRow, array $perfRow = array()) {
    $merged = array_merge($savedRow, $perfRow);
    $method = (string)($savedRow['__method_key'] ?? $perfRow['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($savedRow));
    $methodLabel = function_exists('mleAdvisoryMethodLabel') ? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method) : strtoupper($method);
    $isSystem = mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($savedRow) || (!empty($perfRow) && mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($perfRow));
    $savedId = (int)($savedRow['id'] ?? $perfRow['__saved_id'] ?? $perfRow['run_id'] ?? 0);
    $perfId = (int)($perfRow['id'] ?? 0);
    $batchOrder = (int)($savedRow['source_batch_run_order'] ?? $savedRow['batch_index'] ?? $perfRow['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0);
    $batchTotal = (int)($savedRow['batch_total'] ?? $perfRow['batch_total'] ?? 0);
    $sourceRaw = trim((string)($savedRow['origin_source'] ?? $savedRow['source'] ?? $perfRow['source'] ?? ''));
    $label = $isSystem ? 'System / Hive Learning Run' : 'Your Saved Prediction';
    if (!$isSystem && $methodLabel !== '') { $label = 'Your ' . $methodLabel . ' Saved Prediction'; }
    if ($batchOrder > 0) { $label .= ' #' . $batchOrder; }
    $scope = $isSystem ? 'system_learning_only' : 'user_saved_prediction';
    $explain = $isSystem
        ? 'Used for system learning only. This is not shown as a personal pre-draw prediction proof row.'
        : 'Saved under this member account, tied to this target draw, and matched back to the scored result by saved row/run identity.';
    $trace = array();
    if ($savedId > 0) { $trace[] = 'Saved ID ' . $savedId; }
    if ($perfId > 0) { $trace[] = 'Score ID ' . $perfId; }
    if ($batchOrder > 0) { $trace[] = 'Batch run ' . $batchOrder . ($batchTotal > 0 ? ' of ' . $batchTotal : ''); }
    if (!empty($perfRow['__proof_check']) && is_array($perfRow['__proof_check'])) {
        $__pc = $perfRow['__proof_check'];
        if (!empty($__pc['score_draw_date'])) { $trace[] = 'Target draw ' . (string)$__pc['score_draw_date']; }
        if (!empty($__pc['saved_at_date'])) { $trace[] = 'Saved before draw ' . (string)$__pc['saved_at_date']; }
    }
    if ($sourceRaw !== '') { $trace[] = 'Source ' . $sourceRaw; }
    return array(
        'scope' => $scope,
        'is_user_prediction' => !$isSystem,
        'is_system_learning_only' => $isSystem,
        'label' => $label,
        'method_label' => $methodLabel,
        'explain' => $explain,
        'trace' => implode(' | ', $trace),
        'saved_id' => $savedId,
        'perf_id' => $perfId,
        'batch_order' => $batchOrder,
        'batch_total' => $batchTotal,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryPerformanceMatchesSaved(array $perf, array $idx) {
    $rid = (int)($perf['run_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($rid > 0 && isset($idx['ids'][$rid])) { return $rid; }
    foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key') as $k) {
        $v = strtolower(trim((string)($perf[$k] ?? '')));
        if ($v !== '' && isset($idx[$k][$v])) { return (int)$idx[$k][$v]; }
    }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $activeRows) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || empty($activeRows)) { return array(); }
    $idx = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveEvidenceIndexes($activeRows);
    $perfCols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__skai_learning_performance');
    if (empty($perfCols)) { return array(); }
    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select('*')
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
        ->where('(' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('target_lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId . ')')
        ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC, ' . $db->quoteName('run_date') . ' DESC');
    try { $db->setQuery($q, 0, 600); $rows = $db->loadAssocList(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    $out = array();
    foreach ((array)$rows as $r) {

        $sid = mleAdvisoryPerformanceMatchesSaved($r, $idx);
        if ($sid <= 0) { continue; }
        $savedRow = isset($idx['rows_by_id'][$sid]) && is_array($idx['rows_by_id'][$sid]) ? $idx['rows_by_id'][$sid] : array();
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow') && (mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($savedRow) || mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($r))) {
            continue;
        }

        $__proofCheck = function_exists('mleAdvisoryUserDrawProofCheck') ? mleAdvisoryUserDrawProofCheck($savedRow, $r, $userId, $lotteryId) : array('ok'=>true,'reasons'=>array());
        if (empty($__proofCheck['ok'])) {
            if (!isset($GLOBALS['mle_phase2q_suppressed_proof_rows']) || !is_array($GLOBALS['mle_phase2q_suppressed_proof_rows'])) { $GLOBALS['mle_phase2q_suppressed_proof_rows'] = array(); }
            $GLOBALS['mle_phase2q_suppressed_proof_rows'][] = array(
                'saved_id' => (int)$sid,
                'score_id' => (int)($r['id'] ?? 0),
                'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
                'reasons' => (array)($__proofCheck['reasons'] ?? array()),
            );
            continue;
        }
        $r['__saved_id'] = $sid;
        $r['__proof_check'] = $__proofCheck;
        $r['__method_key'] = isset($idx['method_by_id'][$sid]) ? $idx['method_by_id'][$sid] : mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($r['source'] ?? '');
        if ($r['__method_key'] === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance')) {
            $r['__provenance'] = mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance($savedRow, $r);
        }
        $out[] = $r;
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows(array $perfRows) {
    $empty = array('methods'=>array(), 'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0, 0), 'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>0,'total_draws'=>0,'method_count'=>0));
    if (empty($perfRows)) { return $empty; }
    $methods = array(); $draws = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $src = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($src === '' || $src === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $dd = (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($dd !== '' && $dd !== '0000-00-00') { $draws[$dd] = 1; }
        if (!isset($methods[$src])) { $methods[$src] = array('hits_total'=>0,'top20_total'=>0,'rank_sum'=>0.0,'missing_sum'=>0,'quality_sum'=>0.0,'run_count'=>0,'draw_dates'=>array()); }
        $methods[$src]['hits_total'] += (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['top20_total'] += (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['rank_sum'] += (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['missing_sum'] += (int)($row['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['quality_sum'] += (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $methods[$src]['run_count']++;
        if ($dd !== '') { $methods[$src]['draw_dates'][$dd] = 1; }
    }
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($methods as $src=>$m) {
        $cnt = max(1, (int)$m['run_count']);
        $avgHits = round($m['hits_total'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgTop20 = round($m['top20_total'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgRank = round($m['rank_sum'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgMissing = round($m['missing_sum'] / $cnt, 2);
        $avgQuality = round($m['quality_sum'] / $cnt, 6);
        $score = ($avgHits * 3.0) + ($avgTop20 * 1.5) + ($avgQuality * 10.0) - ($avgRank * 0.15) - ($avgMissing * 0.5);
        $scored[] = array('method'=>$src,'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($src),'score'=>$score,'total_hits'=>$m['hits_total'],'avg_hits'=>$avgHits,'avg_top20'=>$avgTop20,'avg_rank'=>$avgRank,'run_count'=>$cnt,'draw_count'=>count($m['draw_dates']));
    }
    usort($scored, function($a,$b){ return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $rank=1; foreach ($scored as &$s) {
        $s['rank'] = $rank++;
        $s['random_edge'] = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($perfRows, (string)($s['method'] ?? ''));
    } unset($s);
    $totalRuns = count($perfRows); $totalDraws = count($draws);
    $edgeMetrics = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($perfRows);
    return array('methods'=>$scored,'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel($totalDraws,$totalRuns,0.0,0.0,$edgeMetrics),'random_edge'=>$edgeMetrics,'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>$totalRuns,'total_draws'=>$totalDraws,'method_count'=>count($scored)));
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboard($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($perf);
}

    return array(
        'blend_pct'            => array('label'=>'Blend Setting',              'family'=>'blend',     'type'=>'percent',     'min'=>0,      'max'=>100,    'step'=>5,      'meaningful_diff'=>3.0,   'priority'=>90, 'testable'=>true),
