if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerExtractNormalizedSettings')) {
function mleOptimizerExtractNormalizedSettings(array $row, $method = '') {

    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings')) {
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row);
    } else {
        $raw = isset($row['settings_json']) ? $row['settings_json'] : (isset($row['settings']) ? $row['settings'] : '{}');
        $settings = is_array($raw) ? $raw : (array)@json_decode((string)$raw, true);
    }
    if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }

    $aliases = array(
        'blend_pct'            => array('blend_pct','blend_percent','blend','ai_blend_pct','blend_ai_pct'),
        'skai_blend_ai_pct'    => array('skai_blend_ai_pct','skai_blend_pct','ai_pct'),
        'skai_window_size'     => array('skai_window_size','window_size'),
        'draws_analyzed'       => array('draws_analyzed','draws_analyzed_count'),
        'draws_used'           => array('draws_used'),
        'skip_window'          => array('skip_window'),
        'recency_decay'        => array('recency_decay'),
        'decay'                => array('decay','recency'),
        'sampling_temperature' => array('sampling_temperature','temperature'),
        'diversity_penalty'    => array('diversity_penalty','diversity'),
        'gap_scale'            => array('gap_scale'),
        'top_n_numbers'        => array('top_n_numbers','skai_top_n_numbers'),
        'top_n_combos'         => array('top_n_combos','skai_top_n_combos'),
        'learning_rate'        => array('learning_rate'),
        'dropout_rate'         => array('dropout_rate'),
        'hidden_layers'        => array('hidden_layers'),
        'epochs'               => array('epochs'),
        'batch_size'           => array('batch_size'),
        'chain_len'            => array('chain_len','chain_length'),
        'walks'                => array('walks','num_walks'),
        'burn_in'              => array('burn_in','burnin'),
        'laplace_k'            => array('laplace_k','laplace'),
        'skip_weight'          => array('skip_weight'),
        'hist_weight'          => array('hist_weight'),
        'freq_weight'          => array('freq_weight'),
        'best_window'          => array('best_window'),
        'auto_tune'            => array('auto_tune','autotune'),
    );

    $defs = mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions();
    $out  = array();

    foreach ($defs as $key => $def) {
        $val = null;
        $aliasList = isset($aliases[$key]) ? $aliases[$key] : array($key);
        foreach ($aliasList as $alias) {
            if (array_key_exists($alias, $settings) && $settings[$alias] !== '' && $settings[$alias] !== null) {
                $val = $settings[$alias];
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($val === null) { continue; }

        $type = (string)($def['type'] ?? 'decimal');
        $minV = (float)($def['min'] ?? 0.0);
        $maxV = (float)($def['max'] ?? 100.0);

        if ($type === 'boolean') {
            $out[$key] = (strtolower(trim((string)$val)) === 'true' || (string)$val === '1') ? 1 : 0;
        } elseif (is_numeric($val)) {
            $numVal = (float)$val;
            $clamped = max($minV, min($maxV, $numVal));
            $out[$key] = ($type === 'integer') ? (int)round($clamped) : $clamped;
        }

    }

    if ($method !== '') {
        $out['method'] = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    }
    return $out;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerScoreRunEvidence')) {
function mleOptimizerScoreRunEvidence(array $row) {

    $avgRank  = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank']      ?? 999.0);
    $quality  = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score']?? 0.0);
    $top10    = (int)  ($row['top10_hits']             ?? 0);
    $top20    = (int)  ($row['top20_hits']             ?? 0);
    $missing  = (int)  ($row['missing_hits_count']     ?? 0);
    $trend    = strtolower(trim((string)($row['trend_bucket']     ?? 'neutral')));
    $conf     = strtolower(trim((string)($row['confidence_level'] ?? '')));
    $notes    = array();

    $rankQ = 0.1;
    if ($avgRank > 0 && $avgRank < 990) {
        $rankQ = max(0.0, min(1.0, 1.0 - (($avgRank - 1.0) / 998.0)));
        $notes[] = 'avg_rank=' . round($avgRank, 1);
    }

    $hitConc = 0.0;
    if ($top10 > 0 || $top20 > 0) {
        $hitConc = min(1.0, ($top10 * 0.06) + ($top20 * 0.025));
        $notes[] = 'top10=' . $top10 . ' top20=' . $top20;
    }

    $randomEdge = 0.5;
    if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow')) {
        try {
            $edge    = mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row);
            $avgLift = (float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
            if ($avgLift > 0) {
                $randomEdge = min(1.0, 0.5 + ($avgLift - 1.0) * 0.15);
                $notes[] = 'edge=' . round($avgLift, 2) . 'x';
            } elseif ($avgLift < 0) {
                $randomEdge = max(0.0, 0.5 + $avgLift * 0.1);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__e) {   }
    }

    $missingPenalty = 1.0;
    if ($missing > 0) {
        $missingPenalty = max(0.0, 1.0 - ($missing * 0.08));
        $notes[] = 'missing=' . $missing;
    }

    $qualityBonus = ($quality > 0.0) ? min(1.0, $quality / 10.0) : 0.0;

    $trendScore = 0.5;
    if (in_array($trend, array('rising','up','improving'), true))          { $trendScore = 0.8; }
    elseif (in_array($trend, array('falling','down','declining'), true))   { $trendScore = 0.2; }

    $confidenceScore = 0.5;
    if (in_array($conf, array('high','strong'), true))           { $confidenceScore = 0.9; }
    elseif (in_array($conf, array('moderate','medium'), true))   { $confidenceScore = 0.65; }
    elseif (in_array($conf, array('low','weak'), true))          { $confidenceScore = 0.3; }

    if ($quality > 0.0) {
        $score = ($qualityBonus * 0.40) + ($rankQ * 0.25) + ($hitConc * 0.20) + ($randomEdge * 0.10) + ($missingPenalty * 0.05);
    } else {
        $score = ($rankQ * 0.35) + ($hitConc * 0.30) + ($randomEdge * 0.20) + ($missingPenalty * 0.10) + ($trendScore * 0.025) + ($confidenceScore * 0.025);
    }
    $score = max(0.0, min(1.0, $score));

    return array(
        'score'             => $score,
        'ranking_quality'   => round($rankQ,         4),
        'hit_concentration' => round($hitConc,        4),
        'random_edge'       => round($randomEdge,     4),
        'missing_penalty'   => round($missingPenalty, 4),
        'trend_score'       => round($trendScore,     4),
        'confidence_score'  => round($confidenceScore,4),
        'notes'             => $notes,
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence')) {
function mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence(array $records, $method = '') {

    $empty = array('has_signal'=>false,'settings'=>array(),'families'=>array(),'setting'=>'','label'=>'','current_avg'=>0.0,'target_avg'=>0.0,'diff'=>0.0,'threshold'=>1.0,'strong_count'=>0,'weak_count'=>0,'total'=>0);
    if (empty($records)) { return $empty; }
    $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($records as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        if ($method !== '') {
            $rowMethod = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? $row['__method_key'] ?? '') : strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? $row['__method_key'] ?? '')));
            if ($rowMethod !== $method) { continue; }
        }
        $sv = mleOptimizerScoreRunEvidence($row);
        $numScore = is_array($sv) ? (float)$sv['score'] : (float)$sv;
        $scored[] = array('score'=>$numScore,'score_detail'=>(is_array($sv) ? $sv : array('score'=>$numScore)),'settings'=>mleOptimizerExtractNormalizedSettings($row, $method),'row'=>$row);
    }
    $total = count($scored);
    if ($total < 3) { return array_merge($empty, array('total'=>$total)); }
    usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $cut    = max(1, (int)floor($total * 0.35));
    $strong = array_slice($scored, 0, $cut);
    $weak   = array_slice($scored, -$cut);
    $defs   = mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions();

    $settingsOutput = array();
    foreach ($defs as $key => $def) {
        $type = (string)($def['type'] ?? 'decimal');
        $step = (float)($def['step'] ?? 1.0); if ($step <= 0) { $step = 1.0; }
        $minV = (float)($def['min'] ?? 0.0);
        $maxV = (float)($def['max'] ?? 100.0);
        $buckets = array();

        foreach ($scored as $r) {
            if (!isset($r['settings'][$key])) { continue; }
            $val = $r['settings'][$key];
            if ($type === 'boolean') {
                $bk = ((int)$val === 1) ? '1' : '0';
            } elseif (is_numeric($val)) {
                $bk = (string)round(round((float)$val / $step) * $step, 6);
            } else {
                $bk = strtolower(trim((string)$val));
            }
            if (!isset($buckets[$bk])) {
                $buckets[$bk] = array('bucket_value'=>$bk,'run_count'=>0,'scores'=>array(),'ranks'=>array(),'top10s'=>array(),'top20s'=>array(),'missings'=>array(),'edges'=>array());
            }
            $buckets[$bk]['run_count']++;
            $buckets[$bk]['scores'][]  = $r['score'];
            $rowRef = $r['row'];
            $buckets[$bk]['ranks'][]   = (float)($rowRef['avg_winning_rank']    ?? 999.0);
            $buckets[$bk]['top10s'][]  = (int)  ($rowRef['top10_hits']          ?? 0);
            $buckets[$bk]['top20s'][]  = (int)  ($rowRef['top20_hits']          ?? 0);
            $buckets[$bk]['missings'][]= (int)  ($rowRef['missing_hits_count']  ?? 0);
            $buckets[$bk]['edges'][]   = (float)($r['score_detail']['random_edge'] ?? 0.5);
        }
        if (empty($buckets)) { continue; }

        $avg = function(array $arr) { return count($arr) > 0 ? array_sum($arr) / count($arr) : 0.0; };
        $bucketStats = array();
        foreach ($buckets as $bk => $bd) {
            $bucketStats[$bk] = array(
                'bucket_value'        => $bk,
                'run_count'           => $bd['run_count'],
                'avg_optimizer_score' => round($avg($bd['scores']),  4),
                'avg_rank'            => round($avg($bd['ranks']),   2),
                'avg_top10'           => round($avg($bd['top10s']),  2),
                'avg_top20'           => round($avg($bd['top20s']),  2),
                'avg_missing'         => round($avg($bd['missings']),2),
                'avg_random_edge'     => round($avg($bd['edges']),   4),
            );
        }
        uasort($bucketStats, function($a, $b) { return ($b['avg_optimizer_score'] > $a['avg_optimizer_score']) ? 1 : (($b['avg_optimizer_score'] < $a['avg_optimizer_score']) ? -1 : 0); });
        $sortedBuckets = array_values($bucketStats);
        $bestBucket = $sortedBuckets[0];
        $runnerUp   = count($sortedBuckets) > 1 ? $sortedBuckets[1] : null;
        $gap        = $runnerUp !== null ? round($bestBucket['avg_optimizer_score'] - $runnerUp['avg_optimizer_score'], 4) : 1.0;
        $totalRuns  = array_sum(array_column($sortedBuckets, 'run_count'));
        $evidenceLevel = 'none';
        if ($totalRuns >= 12) { $evidenceLevel = 'strong'; }
        elseif ($totalRuns >= 6) { $evidenceLevel = 'moderate'; }
        elseif ($totalRuns >= 3) { $evidenceLevel = 'weak'; }
        $bv = is_numeric($bestBucket['bucket_value']) ? (float)$bestBucket['bucket_value'] : 0.0;
        $recommendedRange = array('min'=>max($minV, round($bv - $step, 6)),'max'=>min($maxV, round($bv + $step, 6)),'sweet_min'=>$bv,'sweet_max'=>$bv);
        $settingsOutput[$key] = array('definition'=>$def,'buckets'=>$sortedBuckets,'best_bucket'=>$bestBucket,'runner_up'=>$runnerUp,'evidence_level'=>$evidenceLevel,'gap_score'=>$gap,'recommended_range'=>$recommendedRange);
    }

    $familiesOutput = array();
    foreach ($settingsOutput as $key => $sdata) {
        $family = (string)($sdata['definition']['family'] ?? 'other');
        if (!isset($familiesOutput[$family])) { $familiesOutput[$family] = array('scores'=>array(),'best_key'=>'','best_score'=>-PHP_FLOAT_MAX,'priority'=>0); }
        $s = (float)($sdata['best_bucket']['avg_optimizer_score'] ?? 0.0);
        $familiesOutput[$family]['scores'][] = $s;
        $priority = (int)($sdata['definition']['priority'] ?? 0);
        if ($s > $familiesOutput[$family]['best_score']) { $familiesOutput[$family]['best_score'] = $s; $familiesOutput[$family]['best_key'] = $key; $familiesOutput[$family]['priority'] = $priority; }
    }
    $familiesFinal = array();
    foreach ($familiesOutput as $family => $fd) {
        $avgS = count($fd['scores']) > 0 ? array_sum($fd['scores']) / count($fd['scores']) : 0.0;
        $bestEv = isset($settingsOutput[$fd['best_key']]['evidence_level']) ? $settingsOutput[$fd['best_key']]['evidence_level'] : 'none';
        $familiesFinal[$family] = array('best_setting_key'=>$fd['best_key'],'avg_score'=>round($avgS, 4),'evidence_level'=>$bestEv,'priority_score'=>(int)$fd['priority']);
    }

    $bestKey = ''; $bestDiff = 0.0; $bestOld = 0.0; $bestNew = 0.0; $bestThreshold = 1.0;
    foreach ($defs as $key => $def) {
        $sv2 = array(); $wv2 = array();
        foreach ($strong as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key])) { $sv2[] = (float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        foreach ($weak   as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key])) { $wv2[] = (float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        if (empty($sv2) || empty($wv2)) { continue; }
        $sa = array_sum($sv2) / count($sv2); $wa = array_sum($wv2) / count($wv2); $diff = abs($sa - $wa);
        $threshold = (float)($def['meaningful_diff'] ?? 1.0);
        if ($diff > $bestDiff && $diff >= $threshold) { $bestDiff = $diff; $bestKey = $key; $bestOld = $wa; $bestNew = $sa; $bestThreshold = $threshold; }
    }
    $hasSig = ($bestKey !== '');
    $def = $hasSig ? $defs[$bestKey] : array();
    return array(
        'has_signal'  => $hasSig,
        'settings'    => $settingsOutput,
        'families'    => $familiesFinal,
        'setting'     => $bestKey,
        'label'       => $hasSig ? (string)($def['label'] ?? $bestKey) : '',
        'current_avg' => round($bestOld, 4),
        'target_avg'  => round($bestNew, 4),
        'diff'        => round($bestDiff, 4),
        'threshold'   => $bestThreshold,
        'strong_count'=> count($strong),
        'weak_count'  => count($weak),
        'total'       => $total,
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile(array $records, $method = '') {

    $empty = array('has_profile'=>false,'profile'=>array(),'locked_settings'=>array(),'floating_settings'=>array(),'confidence'=>'learning','summary'=>'Not enough data yet.','settings'=>array(),'score'=>0.0,'run_count'=>0);
    if (empty($records)) { return $empty; }
    $method = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method) : strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($records as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        if ($method !== '') {
            $rowMethod = function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey') ? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? $row['__method_key'] ?? '') : strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? $row['__method_key'] ?? '')));
            if ($rowMethod !== $method) { continue; }
        }
        $sv = mleOptimizerScoreRunEvidence($row);
        $numScore = is_array($sv) ? (float)$sv['score'] : (float)$sv;
        $scored[] = array('score'=>$numScore,'settings'=>mleOptimizerExtractNormalizedSettings($row, $method));
    }
    if (empty($scored)) { return $empty; }
    usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $total  = count($scored);
    $cutTop = max(1, (int)floor($total * 0.30));
    $strong = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutTop);

    $defs           = mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions();
    $profile        = array();
    $lockedSettings = array();
    $floatSettings  = array();

    foreach ($defs as $key => $def) {
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($strong as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key])) { $vals[] = $r['settings'][$key]; } }
        $minNeeded = max(2, (int)floor($cutTop * 0.5));
        if (count($vals) < $minNeeded) { $floatSettings[] = $key; continue; }
        $type = (string)($def['type'] ?? 'decimal');
        $step = (float)($def['step'] ?? 1.0); if ($step <= 0) { $step = 1.0; }
        if ($type === 'boolean') {
            $ones = array_filter($vals, function($v) { return (int)$v === 1; });
            $profile[$key] = count($ones) >= count($vals) / 2 ? 1 : 0;
        } else {
            $avgVal = array_sum($vals) / count($vals);
            $profile[$key] = ($type === 'integer') ? (int)round($avgVal) : round(round($avgVal / $step) * $step, 6);
        }
        $lockedSettings[] = $key;
    }

    $confidence = 'learning';
    if ($total >= 20 && count($lockedSettings) >= 4) { $confidence = 'strong'; }
    elseif ($total >= 12 && count($lockedSettings) >= 3) { $confidence = 'moderate'; }
    elseif ($total >= 6  && count($lockedSettings) >= 2) { $confidence = 'early'; }

    $best    = $scored[0];
    $summary = 'Based on ' . count($strong) . ' strongest run' . (count($strong) === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' out of ' . $total . '. Current evidence favors these settings as the control baseline.';
    return array('has_profile'=>true,'profile'=>$profile,'locked_settings'=>$lockedSettings,'floating_settings'=>$floatSettings,'confidence'=>$confidence,'summary'=>$summary,'settings'=>$profile,'score'=>round($best['score'],4),'run_count'=>$total);
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment')) {
function mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment(array $records, $method = '') {

    $empty = array('has_experiment'=>false,'setting_key'=>'','label'=>'','family'=>'','current_value'=>'','test_values'=>array(),'reason'=>'Not enough evidence yet to recommend a next experiment.','confidence'=>'learning','guardrail'=>'Keep collecting scored runs first.','strong_count'=>0,'total'=>0,'setting'=>'','control_value'=>'','test_value'=>'');
    $analysis = mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence($records, $method);
    if (empty($analysis['has_signal'])) {
        return array_merge($empty, array('total'=>(int)($analysis['total'] ?? 0),'strong_count'=>(int)($analysis['strong_count'] ?? 0)));
    }
    $defs = mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions();

    $priorityOrder = array('history','blend','recency','diversity','training','mcmc','skip_hit','switches');
    $bestKey = '';
    foreach ($priorityOrder as $fam) {
        if (!isset($analysis['families'][$fam])) { continue; }
        $famData = $analysis['families'][$fam];
        if (in_array($famData['evidence_level'], array('none'), true)) { continue; }
        $candKey = (string)($famData['best_setting_key'] ?? '');
        if ($candKey === '' || !isset($analysis['settings'][$candKey])) { continue; }
        $bestKey = $candKey;
        break;
    }

    if ($bestKey === '' && !empty($analysis['setting'])) { $bestKey = $analysis['setting']; }
    if ($bestKey === '') { return array_merge($empty, array('total'=>(int)($analysis['total'] ?? 0),'strong_count'=>(int)($analysis['strong_count'] ?? 0))); }

    $def      = isset($defs[$bestKey]) ? $defs[$bestKey] : array('label'=>$bestKey,'family'=>'other','min'=>0,'max'=>100,'step'=>1,'meaningful_diff'=>1.0,'priority'=>0,'testable'=>true,'type'=>'decimal');
    $step     = (float)($def['step'] ?? 1.0); if ($step <= 0) { $step = 1.0; }
    $minV     = (float)($def['min'] ?? 0.0);
    $maxV     = (float)($def['max'] ?? 100.0);
    $type     = (string)($def['type'] ?? 'decimal');
    $isDecimal= ($step < 1.0);
    $label    = (string)($def['label'] ?? $bestKey);
    $family   = (string)($def['family'] ?? 'other');

    $currentVal = (float)$analysis['current_avg'];
    $targetVal  = (float)$analysis['target_avg'];
    $controlRounded = $isDecimal ? round($currentVal, 4) : (int)round($currentVal);

    $testVals = array($targetVal);
    for ($i = 1; count($testVals) < 4 && $i <= 10; $i++) {
        $up   = round($targetVal + ($step * $i), 6);
        $down = round($targetVal - ($step * $i), 6);
        if ($up <= $maxV)   { $testVals[] = $up; }
        if (count($testVals) < 4 && $down >= $minV) { $testVals[] = $down; }
        if ($up > $maxV && $down < $minV) { break; }
    }
    $testVals = array_unique($testVals);
    sort($testVals);
    $testVals = array_values(array_map(function($v) use ($isDecimal) { return $isDecimal ? round($v, 4) : (int)round($v); }, $testVals));

    $evidence  = isset($analysis['settings'][$bestKey]['evidence_level']) ? $analysis['settings'][$bestKey]['evidence_level'] : 'weak';
    $reason    = 'Current evidence favors a different ' . $label . '. Test this one change so LottoExpert can measure whether it improves consistency without changing everything else.';

    $stableList = array();
    foreach ($priorityOrder as $f) {
        if ($f === $family) { continue; }
        if (isset($analysis['families'][$f]) && !in_array($analysis['families'][$f]['evidence_level'], array('none'), true)) { $stableList[] = $f; }
        if (count($stableList) >= 3) { break; }
    }
    $guardrail = count($stableList) > 0
        ? 'Keep ' . implode(', ', $stableList) . ' settings stable while testing this.'
        : 'Keep all other settings stable while testing this one change.';

    return array(
        'has_experiment' => true,
        'setting_key'    => $bestKey,
        'label'          => $label,
        'family'         => $family,
        'current_value'  => (string)$controlRounded,
        'test_values'    => $testVals,
        'reason'         => $reason,
        'confidence'     => $evidence,
        'guardrail'      => $guardrail,
        'strong_count'   => (int)($analysis['strong_count'] ?? 0),
        'total'          => (int)($analysis['total'] ?? 0),

        'setting'        => $bestKey,
        'control_value'  => (string)$controlRounded,
        'test_value'     => count($testVals) > 0 ? (string)$testVals[0] : '',
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildControlledBatchPlan')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildControlledBatchPlan(array $records, $method = 'skai') {

    $empty = array('status'=>'collect_more_data','has_plan'=>false,'method'=>$method,'runs'=>array(),'control_profile'=>array(),'next_experiment'=>array(),'reason'=>'Not enough evidence to build a controlled batch plan yet.','summary'=>'Keep collecting scored runs before a controlled experiment can begin.');
    $control    = mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile($records, $method);
    $experiment = mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment($records, $method);
    if (!$control['has_profile'] || !$experiment['has_experiment']) {
        $empty['control_profile']  = $control;
        $empty['next_experiment']  = $experiment;
        return $empty;
    }
    $defs  = mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions();
    $key   = (string)($experiment['setting_key'] ?? $experiment['setting'] ?? '');
    $def   = isset($defs[$key]) ? $defs[$key] : array('min'=>0,'max'=>100,'step'=>1,'meaningful_diff'=>1.0,'label'=>$key,'type'=>'decimal');
    $step  = (float)($def['step'] ?? 1.0); if ($step <= 0) { $step = 1.0; }
    $minV  = (float)($def['min']  ?? 0.0);
    $maxV  = (float)($def['max']  ?? 100.0);
    $target= isset($experiment['test_values']) && count($experiment['test_values']) > 0 ? (float)$experiment['test_values'][0] : (float)($experiment['test_value'] ?? 0.0);

    $runs  = array();

    $runs[] = array(
        'run_number'          => 1,
        'role'                => 'control',
        'type'                => 'control',
        'settings'            => $control['profile'],
        'changed_setting_key' => '',
        'old_value'           => '',
        'new_value'           => '',
        'reason'              => 'Baseline control profile - no settings changed.',
        'description'         => 'Control run: current strongest settings unchanged.',
    );

    $testPoints = isset($experiment['test_values']) ? $experiment['test_values'] : array($target);
    for ($i = 1; count($testPoints) < 7 && $i <= 20; $i++) {
        $up   = round($target + ($step * $i), 6);
        $down = round($target - ($step * $i), 6);
        if ($up <= $maxV)   { $testPoints[] = $up; }
        if (count($testPoints) < 7 && $down >= $minV) { $testPoints[] = $down; }
        if ($up > $maxV && $down < $minV) { break; }
    }
    $testPoints = array_unique($testPoints);
    sort($testPoints);
    $runNum = 2;
    $label  = (string)($experiment['label'] ?? $key);
    $oldVal = (string)($experiment['control_value'] ?? '');
    foreach ($testPoints as $val) {
        if ($runNum > 9) { break; }
        $runs[] = array(
            'run_number'          => $runNum,
            'role'                => 'test',
            'type'                => 'test',
            'settings'            => array_merge($control['profile'], array($key => $val)),
            'changed_setting_key' => $key,
            'old_value'           => $oldVal,
            'new_value'           => (string)$val,
            'reason'              => 'Testing ' . $label . ' = ' . $val . '.',
            'description'         => 'Test ' . $label . ' = ' . $val . '.',
        );
        $runNum++;
    }
    $summary = 'This batch tests ' . $label . ' while holding all other locked settings stable. Run 1 is the control. Runs 2-' . (count($runs)) . ' each test a different value of ' . $label . '.';
    return array(
        'status'           => 'ready',
        'has_plan'         => true,
        'method'           => $method,
        'control_profile'  => $control,
        'next_experiment'  => $experiment,
        'runs'             => $runs,
        'test_setting'     => $key,
        'test_label'       => $label,
        'control_value'    => $oldVal,
        'target_value'     => (string)$target,
        'reason'           => (string)($experiment['reason'] ?? ''),
        'guardrail'        => (string)($experiment['guardrail'] ?? ''),
        'run_count'        => count($runs),
        'summary'          => $summary,
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerEnsureTables')) {
function mleOptimizerEnsureTables($db) {

    try {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $table  = $prefix . 'mle_optimizer_snapshots';
        $sql    = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$table}` (
  `id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `method` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `snapshot_key` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `control_profile_json` mediumtext NULL,
  `setting_evidence_json` mediumtext NULL,
  `next_experiment_json` mediumtext NULL,
  `batch_plan_json` mediumtext NULL,
  `confidence_level` varchar(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'learning',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_method` (`method`),
  KEY `idx_snapshot_key` (`snapshot_key`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4";
        $db->setQuery($sql);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {

        if (function_exists('error_log')) { error_log('[MLE_OPTIMIZER] Snapshot table creation failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    }
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerSaveSnapshot')) {
function mleOptimizerSaveSnapshot($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $method, array $optimizerData) {
    try {
        if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerEnsureTables')) { return false; }
        mleOptimizerEnsureTables($db);
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $table  = $prefix . 'mle_optimizer_snapshots';
        $key    = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/', '_', (string)$method)
                  . '_' . (int)$lotteryId
                  . '_' . date('Ymd_His');
        $cpJson = '';
        $seJson = '';
        $neJson = '';
        $bpJson = '';
        try { $cpJson = json_encode($optimizerData['control_profile']  ?? null, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { $seJson = json_encode($optimizerData['setting_evidence'] ?? null, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { $neJson = json_encode($optimizerData['next_experiment']  ?? null, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { $bpJson = json_encode($optimizerData['batch_plan']       ?? null, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $confLevel = (string)($optimizerData['confidence_level'] ?? $optimizerData['control_profile']['confidence'] ?? 'learning');
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->insert($db->quoteName($table))
            ->columns(array(
                $db->quoteName('user_id'),
                $db->quoteName('lottery_id'),
                $db->quoteName('method'),
                $db->quoteName('snapshot_key'),
                $db->quoteName('control_profile_json'),
                $db->quoteName('setting_evidence_json'),
                $db->quoteName('next_experiment_json'),
                $db->quoteName('batch_plan_json'),
                $db->quoteName('confidence_level'),
                $db->quoteName('created_at'),
                $db->quoteName('updated_at'),
            ))
            ->values(implode(',', array(
                (int)$userId,
                (int)$lotteryId,
                $db->quote((string)$method),
                $db->quote($key),
                $db->quote((string)$cpJson),
                $db->quote((string)$seJson),
                $db->quote((string)$neJson),
                $db->quote((string)$bpJson),
                $db->quote($confLevel),
                $db->quote($now),
                $db->quote($now),
            )));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        if (function_exists('error_log')) { error_log('[MLE_OPTIMIZER] Snapshot save failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
        return false;
    }
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot(array $records, $method = 'skai') {
    $unavailable = array(
        'status'           => 'unavailable',
        'method'           => (string)$method,
        'setting_evidence' => array(),
        'control_profile'  => array(),
        'next_experiment'  => array(),
        'batch_plan'       => array(),
        'confidence_level' => 'learning',
        'summary'          => '',
    );
    if (
        !function_exists('mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence') ||
        !function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile') ||
        !function_exists('mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment') ||
        !function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildControlledBatchPlan')
    ) {
        return $unavailable;
    }
    if (empty($records)) {
        $unavailable['status'] = 'collect_more_data';
        $unavailable['summary'] = 'Still collecting scored runs. Keep saving and scoring runs to build evidence.';
        return $unavailable;
    }
    $settingEvidence = array();
    $controlProfile  = array();
    $nextExperiment  = array();
    $batchPlan       = array();
    try { $settingEvidence = mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence($records, $method); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    try { $controlProfile  = mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile($records, $method);    } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    try { $nextExperiment  = mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment($records, $method);   } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    try { $batchPlan       = mleOptimizerBuildControlledBatchPlan($records, $method); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    $confLevel = (string)($controlProfile['confidence'] ?? 'learning');
    $runCount  = (int)($controlProfile['run_count'] ?? count($records));
    if ($runCount < 3) {
        $unavailable['status']            = 'collect_more_data';
        $unavailable['setting_evidence']  = $settingEvidence;
        $unavailable['control_profile']   = $controlProfile;
        $unavailable['confidence_level']  = $confLevel;
        $unavailable['summary']           = 'Still measuring. Keep collecting scored runs to build evidence.';
        return $unavailable;
    }
    $confLabels = array('learning'=>'Learning','early'=>'Early','moderate'=>'Moderate','strong'=>'Strong');
    $confText   = isset($confLabels[$confLevel]) ? $confLabels[$confLevel] : 'Learning';
    $summary    = !empty($controlProfile['summary'])
        ? (string)$controlProfile['summary']
        : 'Current evidence favors the settings in the control profile. ' . $confText . ' confidence level based on ' . $runCount . ' scored runs. Not a guarantee.';
    return array(
        'status'           => 'ready',
        'method'           => (string)$method,
        'setting_evidence' => $settingEvidence,
        'control_profile'  => $controlProfile,
        'next_experiment'  => $nextExperiment,
        'batch_plan'       => $batchPlan,
        'confidence_level' => $confLevel,
        'summary'          => $summary,
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerRenderPanelHtml')) {
function mleOptimizerRenderPanelHtml(array $snapshot, $lotteryName = '', $lotteryId = 0) {
    $status = (string)($snapshot['status'] ?? 'unavailable');
    if ($status === 'unavailable') { return ''; }
    $lnRaw    = (string)$lotteryName;
    $lnEsc    = htmlspecialchars($lnRaw, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $panelId  = 'mle-optimizer-panel-' . (int)$lotteryId;
    $cp       = (array)($snapshot['control_profile']  ?? array());
    $ne       = (array)($snapshot['next_experiment']  ?? array());
    $bp       = (array)($snapshot['batch_plan']       ?? array());
    $confLevel = (string)($snapshot['confidence_level'] ?? $cp['confidence'] ?? 'learning');
    $confLabels = array('learning'=>'Learning','early'=>'Early','moderate'=>'Moderate','strong'=>'Strong');
    $confText   = isset($confLabels[$confLevel]) ? $confLabels[$confLevel] : 'Learning';
    $hasProfile = !empty($cp['has_profile']);
    $hasExp     = !empty($ne['has_experiment']);
    $hasPlan    = !empty($bp['has_plan']);
    $runCount   = (int)($ne['total'] ?? $cp['run_count'] ?? 0);

    if ($status === 'collect_more_data' || $runCount < 3) {
        $summEsc = htmlspecialchars((string)($snapshot['summary'] ?? 'Keep collecting scored runs.'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        return '<div class="mle-advisory-card mle-optimization-card mle-optimizer-panel-card" id="' . htmlspecialchars($panelId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" style="margin-top:0;border-top:2px solid rgba(99,102,241,.25);">'
             . '<div style="padding:14px 20px;font-size:0.84rem;color:#6b7280;">&#x26A1; <strong>Optimizer</strong> &mdash; Still measuring &mdash; ' . $summEsc . '</div>'
             . '</div>';
    }

    $summaryEsc  = htmlspecialchars((string)($cp['summary'] ?? $snapshot['summary'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lockedList  = (array)($cp['locked_settings']   ?? array());
    $floatList   = (array)($cp['floating_settings'] ?? array());
    $profileMap  = (array)($cp['profile']           ?? array());
    $neLabel     = htmlspecialchars((string)($ne['label']         ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $neCurr      = htmlspecialchars((string)($ne['current_value'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $neReason    = htmlspecialchars((string)($ne['reason']        ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $neGuard     = htmlspecialchars((string)($ne['guardrail']     ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $neConf      = htmlspecialchars((string)($ne['confidence']    ?? 'weak'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $neVals      = (array)($ne['test_values'] ?? array());
    $bpRuns      = (array)($bp['runs'] ?? array());
    $bpSum       = htmlspecialchars((string)($bp['summary'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

    ob_start();
?>
<div class="mle-advisory-card mle-optimization-card mle-optimizer-panel mle-optimizer-panel-card" id="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($panelId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" style="margin-top:0;border-top:2px solid rgba(99,102,241,.25);">
  <details style="width:100%;">
    <summary style="cursor:pointer;padding:14px 20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.95rem;color:#4f46e5;list-style:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;user-select:none;">
      <span style="font-size:1.1rem;">&#x26A1;</span>
      Optimizer Level<?php if ($lnEsc !== '') { ?> &mdash; <?php echo $lnEsc; ?><?php } ?>
      <span class="mle-optimizer-chip" style="margin-left:auto;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($confText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
      <span class="mle-optimizer-muted" style="margin-left:4px;">Read-only &bull; Not a guarantee</span>
    </summary>
    <div class="mle-optimizer-panel__body" style="padding:0 20px 20px 20px;">

      <?php if ($hasProfile): ?>
      <div class="mle-optimizer-card mle-optimizer-card--profile" style="background:#f5f3ff;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div class="mle-optimizer-status" style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;color:#4338ca;margin-bottom:6px;">&#x1F4CC; Current Control Profile (<?php echo htmlspecialchars($confText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>)</div>
        <?php if ($summaryEsc !== ''): ?>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#5b21b6;margin-bottom:8px;"><?php echo $summaryEsc; ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if (!empty($profileMap)): ?>
        <div class="mle-optimizer-grid" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
          <?php foreach ($profileMap as $__pk => $__pv): ?>
          <span class="mle-optimizer-chip"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__pk, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>: <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__pv, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if (!empty($lockedList)): ?>
        <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#6d28d9;"><strong>Locked:</strong> <?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(', ', $lockedList), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if (!empty($floatList)): ?>
        <div class="mle-optimizer-muted" style="font-size:0.78rem;margin-top:2px;"><strong>Still measuring:</strong> <?php echo htmlspecialchars(implode(', ', $floatList), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <?php if ($hasExp): ?>
      <div class="mle-optimizer-card mle-optimizer-card--experiment" style="background:#fefce8;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;color:#92400e;margin-bottom:6px;">&#x1F9EA; Next Setting To Test: <?php echo $neLabel; ?></div>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#78350f;margin-bottom:6px;"><?php echo $neReason; ?></div>
        <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#92400e;margin-bottom:4px;"><strong>Current value:</strong> <?php echo $neCurr; ?> &bull; <strong>Evidence level:</strong> <?php echo $neConf; ?></div>
        <?php if (!empty($neVals)): ?>
        <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#b45309;margin-bottom:4px;"><strong>Values to test:</strong>
          <?php foreach ($neVals as $__nv): ?>
          <span class="mle-optimizer-chip" style="background:#fef3c7;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__nv, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <?php endforeach; ?>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if ($neGuard !== ''): ?>
        <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#92400e;margin-top:4px;padding:6px 10px;background:rgba(253,230,138,.5);border-radius:6px;"><strong>&#x1F6E1; Guardrail:</strong> <?php echo $neGuard; ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <?php if ($hasPlan && !empty($bpRuns)): ?>
      <div class="mle-optimizer-card mle-optimizer-card--batch" style="background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;color:#065f46;margin-bottom:6px;">&#x1F4CB; 9-Run Batch Plan Preview</div>
        <?php if ($bpSum !== ''): ?><div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#064e3b;margin-bottom:8px;"><?php echo $bpSum; ?></div><?php endif; ?>
        <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
          <table class="mle-optimizer-table" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.78rem;color:#064e3b;">
            <thead><tr style="background:#bbf7d0;"><th style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:left;">Run</th><th style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:left;">Role</th><th style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:left;">Changed</th><th style="padding:4px 8px;text-align:left;">Value</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
            <?php foreach ($bpRuns as $__bpr): ?>
            <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #d1fae5;">
              <td style="padding:3px 8px;"><?php echo (int)($__bpr['run_number'] ?? 0); ?></td>
              <td style="padding:3px 8px;font-weight:<?php echo ($__bpr['role'] ?? '') === 'control' ? '700' : '400'; ?>;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($__bpr['role'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
              <td style="padding:3px 8px;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($__bpr['changed_setting_key'] ?? '-'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
              <td style="padding:3px 8px;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)($__bpr['new_value'] ?? '-'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; ?>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.74rem;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:6px;">Test one setting at a time. Keep all other settings stable.</div>
      </div>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <?php if (!$hasProfile && !$hasExp): ?>
      <div class="mle-optimizer-muted" style="font-size:0.84rem;padding:10px 0;">Still measuring &mdash; keep collecting scored runs. A control profile will appear once enough evidence is available. Test one setting at a time.</div>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <div class="mle-optimizer-muted" style="font-size:0.74rem;margin-top:8px;">Optimizer is advisory only. Not a guarantee. Evidence quality depends on completed scored draw cycles.</div>
    </div>
  </details>
</div>
<?php
    $html = ob_get_clean();
    return (string)$html;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerEvidenceLayerDefinitions')) {
function mleOptimizerEvidenceLayerDefinitions() {
    return array(
        'backtest' => array(
            'key'        => 'backtest',
            'label'      => 'Backtest Intelligence',
            'purpose'    => 'Uses historical official draws to discover promising broad setting ranges.',
            'proof_role' => 'discovery',
            'guardrail'  => 'Historical fit is not a guarantee and must be confirmed with future live validation.',
        ),
        'live' => array(
            'key'        => 'live',
            'label'      => 'Live Validation',
            'purpose'    => 'Uses real saved runs scored against future official draws to confirm whether settings still hold up.',
            'proof_role' => 'confirmation',
            'guardrail'  => 'Live validation is slower but more trustworthy because it tests future outcomes.',
        ),
        'combined' => array(
            'key'        => 'combined',
            'label'      => 'Combined Optimizer View',
            'purpose'    => 'Combines historical depth with live proof while keeping the two evidence types separate.',
            'proof_role' => 'recommendation',
            'guardrail'  => 'Recommendations should be treated as controlled tests, not guarantees.',
        ),
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod')) {
function mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod($method = 'skai') {
    $method = strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    if ($method === '') { $method = 'skai'; }
    return preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_]/', '_', $method);
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable')) {
function mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable($db, $lotteryId = 0, $method = 'skai') {
    $out = array(
        'available'   => false,
        'method'      => (string)$method,
        'engine_key'  => function_exists('mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod') ? mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod($method) : 'skai',
        'table'       => '',
        'draw_count'  => 0,
        'message'     => 'Historical official draw data is not currently available.',
    );
    try {
        if (!isset($db) || !is_object($db) || !method_exists($db, 'getPrefix')) { return $out; }
        $prefix = (string)$db->getPrefix();
        $candidates = array($prefix . 'mle_draw_history', $prefix . 'official_draws', $prefix . 'lottery_results', $prefix . 'draw_history');
        foreach ($candidates as $__tbl) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery("SHOW TABLES LIKE " . $db->quote($__tbl));
                $__rows = $db->loadRowList();
                if (empty($__rows)) { continue; }
                $out['table'] = (string)$__tbl;
                $out['available'] = true;
                $out['message'] = 'Backtest planning available. Historical draw storage detected.';
                $__hasLotteryCol = false;
                try {
                    $db->setQuery("SHOW COLUMNS FROM " . $db->quoteName($__tbl));
                    $__cols = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
                    foreach ($__cols as $__c) {
                        if (strtolower((string)($__c['Field'] ?? '')) === 'lottery_id') { $__hasLotteryCol = true; break; }
                    }
                } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
                $__q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('COUNT(*)')->from($db->quoteName($__tbl));
                if ($__hasLotteryCol && (int)$lotteryId > 0) {
                    $__q->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
                }
                $db->setQuery($__q);
                $out['draw_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
                return $out;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { continue; }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    return $out;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerLoadHistoricalDraws')) {
function mleOptimizerLoadHistoricalDraws($db, $lotteryId = 0, $method = 'skai', $limit = 120) {
    $rows = array();
    try {
        $limit = (int)$limit;
        if ($limit <= 0) { $limit = 120; }
        if ($limit > 250) { $limit = 250; }
        if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable')) { return $rows; }
        $__avail = mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable($db, $lotteryId, $method);
        if (empty($__avail['available']) || empty($__avail['table'])) { return $rows; }
        $table = (string)$__avail['table'];
        $hasLotteryCol = false;
        try {
            $db->setQuery("SHOW COLUMNS FROM " . $db->quoteName($table));
            $__cols = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
            foreach ($__cols as $__c) {
                if (strtolower((string)($__c['Field'] ?? '')) === 'lottery_id') { $hasLotteryCol = true; break; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table));
        if ($hasLotteryCol && (int)$lotteryId > 0) {
            $q->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
        }
        $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = (array)$db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $rows = array();
    }
    return $rows;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildBacktestPlan')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildBacktestPlan($method = 'skai', array $historicalDraws = array(), array $liveLayer = array()) {
    $method    = (string)$method;
    $engineKey = function_exists('mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod') ? mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod($method) : 'skai';
    $defs      = function_exists('mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions') ? (array)mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions() : array();
    $liveCP    = (array)($liveLayer['control_profile']['profile'] ?? array());
    $liveCount = (int)($liveLayer['record_count'] ?? 0);
    $histCount = count($historicalDraws);
    $majorKeys = array('skai_window_size','blend_pct','recency_decay','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','gap_scale');
    $ranges    = array();
    $evidence  = array();

    foreach ($majorKeys as $__k) {
        if (empty($defs[$__k])) { continue; }
        $__d = (array)$defs[$__k];
        $__min = (float)($__d['min'] ?? 0.0);
        $__max = (float)($__d['max'] ?? 1.0);
        $__step = (float)($__d['step'] ?? 1.0);
        $__curr = isset($liveCP[$__k]) && is_numeric($liveCP[$__k]) ? (float)$liveCP[$__k] : null;
        if ($__curr !== null) {
            $__rMin = max($__min, $__curr - (2.0 * $__step));
            $__rMax = min($__max, $__curr + (2.0 * $__step));
        } else {
            $__span = $__max - $__min;
            $__rMin = $__min + (0.20 * $__span);
            $__rMax = $__max - (0.20 * $__span);
        }
        if ($__d['type'] === 'integer') { $__rMin = (int)round($__rMin); $__rMax = (int)round($__rMax); }
        if ($__rMin > $__rMax) { $__tmp = $__rMin; $__rMin = $__rMax; $__rMax = $__tmp; }
        $ranges[$__k] = array('min' => $__rMin, 'max' => $__rMax, 'step' => $__step, 'type' => (string)($__d['type'] ?? 'decimal'));
        $evidence[$__k] = array(
            'source'            => ($__curr !== null ? 'live_control_profile_plus_definition' : 'definition_baseline'),
            'historical_depth'  => $histCount,
            'live_records'      => $liveCount,
            'current_live_value'=> $__curr,
            'confidence'        => ($__curr !== null && $liveCount >= 3) ? 'early' : 'learning',
        );
    }

    return array(
        'engine_key'         => $engineKey,
        'method'             => $method,
        'track_priority'     => ($engineKey === 'skai') ? 'primary' : 'standard',
        'mode'               => 'planning_only',
        'execution_status'   => 'not_implemented',
        'max_draws'          => 120,
        'historical_draw_count' => $histCount,
        'recommended_ranges' => $ranges,
        'setting_evidence'   => $evidence,
        'notes'              => ($engineKey === 'skai')
            ? 'Backtest planning is available for SKAI as the primary engine track. Historical execution is explicit and optional; results are not computed automatically.'
            : 'Backtest planning is available for this engine. Historical execution is explicit and optional; results are not computed automatically.',
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildTwoLayerEvidenceSnapshot')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildTwoLayerEvidenceSnapshot($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $liveRecords, $method = 'skai') {
    $method    = (string)$method;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $userId    = (int)$userId;
    $engineKey = function_exists('mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod') ? mleOptimizerResolveEngineKeyFromMethod($method) : 'skai';

    $liveLayer = array(
        'record_count'         => count($liveRecords),
        'completed_draw_count' => 0,
        'setting_evidence'     => array(),
        'control_profile'      => array(),
        'next_experiment'      => array(),
        'confidence_level'     => 'learning',
    );
    try {
        foreach ($liveRecords as $__r) {
            if ((int)($__r['draws_scored'] ?? $__r['draw_count'] ?? 0) > 0) {
                $liveLayer['completed_draw_count']++;
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
    try {
        if (function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot') && !empty($liveRecords)) {
            $__liveSnap = mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot($liveRecords, $method);
            $liveLayer['setting_evidence'] = $__liveSnap['setting_evidence'] ?? array();
            $liveLayer['control_profile']  = $__liveSnap['control_profile']  ?? array();
            $liveLayer['next_experiment']  = $__liveSnap['next_experiment']  ?? array();
            $liveLayer['confidence_level'] = $__liveSnap['confidence_level'] ?? 'learning';
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {}

    $backtestLayer = array(
        'available'          => false,
        'draw_count'         => 0,
        'status'             => 'not_implemented',
        'method'             => $method,
        'engine_key'         => $engineKey,
        'setting_evidence'   => array(),
        'recommended_ranges' => array(),
        'backtest_plan'      => array(),
        'message'            => 'Backtest planning is ready. Historical execution is explicit and optional, not automatic.',
    );
    try {
        $__btAvailability = function_exists('mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable')
            ? (array)mleOptimizerBacktestIsAvailable($db, $lotteryId, $method)
            : array('available'=>false,'draw_count'=>0,'message'=>'Historical official draw data is not currently available.');
        $backtestLayer['available']  = !empty($__btAvailability['available']);
        $backtestLayer['draw_count'] = (int)($__btAvailability['draw_count'] ?? 0);
        $backtestLayer['status']     = $backtestLayer['available'] ? 'planned' : 'not_available';
        $backtestLayer['message']    = (string)($__btAvailability['message'] ?? $backtestLayer['message']);

        $__historicalDraws = function_exists('mleOptimizerLoadHistoricalDraws')
            ? (array)mleOptimizerLoadHistoricalDraws($db, $lotteryId, $method, 120)
            : array();
        $__backtestPlan = function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildBacktestPlan')
            ? (array)mleOptimizerBuildBacktestPlan($method, $__historicalDraws, $liveLayer)
            : array();
        if (!empty($__backtestPlan)) {
            $backtestLayer['backtest_plan']      = $__backtestPlan;
            $backtestLayer['recommended_ranges'] = (array)($__backtestPlan['recommended_ranges'] ?? array());
            $backtestLayer['setting_evidence']   = (array)($__backtestPlan['setting_evidence'] ?? array());
            $backtestLayer['method']             = (string)($__backtestPlan['method'] ?? $method);
            $backtestLayer['engine_key']         = (string)($__backtestPlan['engine_key'] ?? $engineKey);
            if (!empty($__backtestPlan['notes'])) {
                $backtestLayer['message'] = (string)$__backtestPlan['notes'];
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $backtestLayer['status']  = 'not_available';
        $backtestLayer['message'] = 'Historical draw data not available for this lottery.';
    }

    $combinedLayer = array(
        'control_profile'     => array(),
        'recommended_ranges'  => array(),
        'next_experiment'     => array(),
        'confidence_level'    => 'learning',
        'agreement_status'    => 'insufficient',
        'summary'             => '',
    );
    try {
        if (function_exists('mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence')) {
            $__agree = mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence($backtestLayer, $liveLayer);
            $combinedLayer['agreement_status'] = $__agree['agreement_status'] ?? 'insufficient';
        }
        if (function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildCombinedRecommendation')) {
            $__combined = mleOptimizerBuildCombinedRecommendation($backtestLayer, $liveLayer);
            $combinedLayer['control_profile']    = $__combined['control_profile']    ?? array();
            $combinedLayer['recommended_ranges'] = $__combined['recommended_ranges'] ?? array();
            $combinedLayer['next_experiment']    = $__combined['next_experiment']    ?? array();
            $combinedLayer['confidence_level']   = $__combined['confidence_level']   ?? 'learning';
            $combinedLayer['summary']            = $__combined['reason']             ?? '';
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {}

    $confLevel = (string)($combinedLayer['confidence_level'] ?? $liveLayer['confidence_level'] ?? 'learning');
    $status    = 'learning';
    if ($liveLayer['record_count'] >= 3 && in_array($confLevel, array('moderate', 'strong'), true)) {
        $status = 'ready';
    } elseif ($liveLayer['record_count'] > 0 || $backtestLayer['available']) {
        $status = 'learning';
    } else {
        $status = 'unavailable';
    }

    return array(
        'status'        => $status,
        'method'        => $method,
        'engine_key'    => $engineKey,
        'lottery_id'    => $lotteryId,
        'backtest_layer' => $backtestLayer,
        'live_layer'    => $liveLayer,
        'combined_layer' => $combinedLayer,
        'guardrails'    => array(
            'Backtests discover promising ranges.',
            'Live validation confirms whether those ranges still hold up.',
            'Historical fit is not a guarantee.',
            'Only one setting should be tested at a time.',
        ),
    );
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence')) {
function mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence(array $backtestLayer, array $liveLayer) {
    $result = array(
        'agreement_status' => 'insufficient',
        'agreements'       => array(),
        'conflicts'        => array(),
        'summary'          => '',
    );

    if (empty($backtestLayer['available']) || $backtestLayer['status'] === 'not_implemented' || $backtestLayer['status'] === 'not_available') {
        $result['summary'] = 'Backtest evidence is not yet available. Agreement cannot be assessed. Using live validation only.';
        return $result;
    }

    $liveCount = (int)($liveLayer['record_count'] ?? 0);
    if ($liveCount < 3) {
        $result['summary'] = 'Live validation data is still limited (fewer than 3 scored runs). Agreement cannot be assessed yet.';
        return $result;
    }

    $keysToCompare = array('skai_window_size','blend_pct','recency_decay','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','gap_scale');
    $btProfile     = (array)($backtestLayer['recommended_ranges'] ?? array());
    $liveProfile   = (array)($liveLayer['control_profile']['profile'] ?? array());
    $agreements    = array();
    $conflicts     = array();
    foreach ($keysToCompare as $__k) {
        if (!array_key_exists($__k, $btProfile) || !array_key_exists($__k, $liveProfile)) { continue; }
        $btValRaw = $btProfile[$__k];
        $liveValRaw = $liveProfile[$__k];
        if (is_array($btValRaw) && isset($btValRaw['min']) && isset($btValRaw['max']) && is_numeric($liveValRaw)) {
            $__min = (float)$btValRaw['min'];
            $__max = (float)$btValRaw['max'];
            $__lv  = (float)$liveValRaw;
            if ($__lv >= $__min && $__lv <= $__max) {
                $agreements[] = $__k . ' (live=' . $__lv . ' within [' . $__min . ',' . $__max . '])';
            } else {
                $conflicts[] = $__k . ': live=' . $__lv . ' outside [' . $__min . ',' . $__max . ']';
            }
            continue;
        }
        $btVal   = is_scalar($btValRaw) ? (string)$btValRaw : '';
        $liveVal = is_scalar($liveValRaw) ? (string)$liveValRaw : '';
        if ($btVal === '' || $liveVal === '') { continue; }
        if ($btVal === $liveVal) {
            $agreements[] = $__k . ' (' . $btVal . ')';
        } else {
            $conflicts[] = $__k . ': backtest=' . $btVal . ' vs live=' . $liveVal;
        }
    }
    if (empty($agreements) && empty($conflicts)) {
        $result['summary'] = 'Insufficient shared settings data to compare layers.';
        return $result;
    }
    if (!empty($agreements) && empty($conflicts)) {
        $result['agreement_status'] = 'aligned';
        $result['summary']          = 'Backtest and live evidence are aligned on: ' . implode(', ', $agreements) . '. Not a guarantee.';
    } elseif (!empty($agreements) && !empty($conflicts)) {
        $result['agreement_status'] = 'partial';
        $result['summary']          = 'Partial agreement. Aligned: ' . implode(', ', $agreements) . '. Conflicts: ' . implode('; ', $conflicts) . '. Test one setting at a time.';
    } else {
        $result['agreement_status'] = (count($conflicts) > 1 && $liveCount >= 6) ? 'conflict' : 'partial';
        $result['summary']          = 'Conflict detected on: ' . implode('; ', $conflicts) . '. Live validation has higher proof value. The next controlled test should isolate one setting. Not a guarantee.';
    }
    $result['agreements'] = $agreements;
    $result['conflicts']  = $conflicts;
    return $result;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildCombinedRecommendation')) {
function mleOptimizerBuildCombinedRecommendation(array $backtestLayer, array $liveLayer) {
    $result = array(
        'confidence_level'    => 'learning',
        'recommended_ranges'  => array(),
        'control_profile'     => array(),
        'next_experiment'     => array(),
        'reason'              => '',
        'guardrail'           => 'Recommendations should be treated as controlled tests, not guarantees.',
    );
    $liveConf    = (string)($liveLayer['confidence_level'] ?? 'learning');
    $liveCount   = (int)($liveLayer['record_count'] ?? 0);
    $liveCP      = (array)($liveLayer['control_profile'] ?? array());
    $liveNE      = (array)($liveLayer['next_experiment'] ?? array());
    $btAvailable = !empty($backtestLayer['available']) && $backtestLayer['status'] !== 'not_implemented';
    $agreement   = function_exists('mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence')
        ? (array)mleOptimizerCompareBacktestAndLiveEvidence($backtestLayer, $liveLayer)
        : array('agreement_status' => 'insufficient');
    $agreementStatus = (string)($agreement['agreement_status'] ?? 'insufficient');

    if (!$btAvailable) {

        $result['control_profile']    = $liveCP;
        $result['next_experiment']    = $liveNE;
        $result['confidence_level']   = $liveConf;
        $result['recommended_ranges'] = (array)($liveCP['profile'] ?? array());
        if ($liveCount < 3) {
            $result['reason'] = 'Live validation is not strong enough yet. Keep collecting scored runs. The next controlled test should change one setting at a time.';
        } elseif (in_array($liveConf, array('moderate', 'strong'), true)) {
            $result['reason'] = 'Live validation currently confirms the current control profile with ' . ucfirst($liveConf) . ' confidence. Not a guarantee.';
        } else {
            $result['reason'] = 'Live validation is not strong enough yet to confirm a clear setting direction. Keep running and scoring. Test one setting at a time.';
        }
        return $result;
    }

    $btRanges = (array)($backtestLayer['recommended_ranges'] ?? array());
    $result['recommended_ranges'] = !empty($liveCP['profile']) ? (array)$liveCP['profile'] : $btRanges;
    $result['control_profile']    = $liveCP;
    $result['next_experiment']    = $liveNE;

    if (in_array($liveConf, array('moderate', 'strong'), true) && $agreementStatus !== 'conflict') {
        $result['confidence_level'] = $liveConf;
        $result['reason'] = 'Live validation currently confirms the settings with ' . ucfirst($liveConf) . ' confidence. Backtest intelligence provides additional historical depth. Not a guarantee.';
    } elseif ($agreementStatus === 'conflict') {
        $result['confidence_level'] = 'early';
        $result['reason'] = 'Backtest intelligence suggests a different range than current live validation. Live validation has higher proof value. The next controlled test should isolate the conflicting setting. Not a guarantee.';
    } elseif ($liveCount >= 3) {
        $result['confidence_level'] = 'early';
        $result['reason'] = 'Backtest intelligence suggests promising ranges. Live validation is in early stages (' . $liveCount . ' scored runs). The next controlled test should isolate one setting change.';
    } else {
        $result['confidence_level'] = 'learning';
        $result['reason'] = 'Still in the learning phase. Backtest intelligence is available as broad guidance. Live validation needs more scored runs to confirm direction.';
    }
    return $result;
}
}

if (!function_exists('mleOptimizerRenderTwoLayerEvidenceHtml')) {
function mleOptimizerRenderTwoLayerEvidenceHtml(array $snapshot) {
    $status = (string)($snapshot['status'] ?? 'unavailable');

    $method     = htmlspecialchars($methodRaw, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $engineKey  = htmlspecialchars($engineRaw, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $btL        = (array)($snapshot['backtest_layer']  ?? array());
    $liveL      = (array)($snapshot['live_layer']      ?? array());

    $btStatus   = htmlspecialchars((string)($btL['status']    ?? 'not_implemented'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

    $btRanges   = (array)($btL['recommended_ranges'] ?? array());

    $combConf   = htmlspecialchars((string)($combL['confidence_level'] ?? 'learning'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

    $liveNE     = (array)($liveL['next_experiment']  ?? array());

    $agreeTextColor = $agreeTextColors[$combL['agreement_status'] ?? 'insufficient'] ?? '#374151';

    ob_start();
?>
<div class="mle-optimizer-two-layer" style="margin-top:12px;">

      </div>

      <?php if (!empty($guardrails)): ?>
      <div class="mle-optimizer-layer-card" style="background:#fafafa;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:6px;">

        <ul style="margin:0;padding-left:18px;font-size:0.78rem;color:#374151;">
          <?php foreach ($guardrails as $__g): ?>
          <li><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__g, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></li>
          <?php endforeach; ?>
          <li>Do not treat a small sample as final.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <?php endif; ?>

    </div>
  </details>
</div>
<?php
    $html = ob_get_clean();
    return (string)$html;
}
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows(array $perfRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $noAdvice = array('has_advice'=>false,'reason'=>'Settings do not show a clear pattern yet. Keep the current settings unchanged.','try_next'=>'','why'=>'','best_recipe_desc'=>'','keep_same_list'=>'');
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $scored = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $m = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($m !== $method) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$sid])) { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($savedById[$sid]);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0); $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0); $rank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 999); $quality = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $score = ($quality > 0) ? ($quality * 10.0) : (($top10 * 3.0) + ($top20 * 1.5) - ($rank * 0.3));
        $scored[] = array('score'=>$score,'settings'=>$settings,'saved_id'=>$sid);
    }
    if (count($scored) < 3) { $noAdvice['reason'] = 'More completed saved runs are needed before changing settings.'; return $noAdvice; }
    usort($scored, function($a,$b){ return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });
    $total = count($scored); $cut = max(1, (int)floor($total * 0.35));
    $strong = array_slice($scored, 0, $cut); $weak = array_slice($scored, -$cut);
    $keys = array('skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','skai_blend_ai_pct','sampling_temperature','diversity_penalty','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','recency_decay','chain_len','burn_in','laplace_k','best_window','auto_tune');
    $bestKey=''; $old=''; $new=''; $bestDiff=0.0;
    $__optimizerDefs = function_exists('mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions') ? mleOptimizerSettingDefinitions() : array();
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        $sv=array(); $wv=array();
        foreach ($strong as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key]) && is_numeric($r['settings'][$key])) { $sv[]=(float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        foreach ($weak as $r) { if (isset($r['settings'][$key]) && is_numeric($r['settings'][$key])) { $wv[]=(float)$r['settings'][$key]; } }
        if (count($sv) < 1 || count($wv) < 1) { continue; }
        $sa = array_sum($sv)/count($sv); $wa = array_sum($wv)/count($wv); $diff=abs($sa-$wa);
        $__threshold = isset($__optimizerDefs[$key]['meaningful_diff']) ? (float)$__optimizerDefs[$key]['meaningful_diff'] : 1.0;
        if ($diff > $bestDiff && $diff >= $__threshold) { $bestDiff=$diff; $bestKey=$key; $old=round($wa,1); $new=round($sa,1); }
    }
    $bestRecipe = !empty($strong[0]['settings']) ? mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc($strong[0]['settings'], $method) : '';
    if ($bestKey === '') { $noAdvice['best_recipe_desc'] = $bestRecipe; return $noAdvice; }
    $label = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($bestKey);
    $reason = 'Your stronger saved runs used a different ' . $label . '. Test this one change so LottoExpert can measure whether it improves consistency without changing everything else.';
    return array('has_advice'=>true,'setting'=>$bestKey,'setting_label'=>$label,'current_value'=>(string)$old,'suggested_value'=>(string)$new,'reason'=>$reason,'try_next'=>'Create one new settings run that changes only ' . $label . ' from ' . $old . ' to ' . $new . '.','why'=>$reason,'best_recipe_desc'=>$bestRecipe,'keep_same_list'=>'Keep the best method, mode, blend, and other settings the same for this test.','proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(min($total,5),$total));
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisor($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $method = 'skai') {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $savedById = array(); foreach ($rows as $r) { $savedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($perf, $savedById, $method);
}

function mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData(array $perfRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $scored = array();
    $ctrlLabel = 'Blend Setting';
    $methodRows = array();

    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $m = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($m !== $method) { continue; }
        $sid = (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$sid])) { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($savedById[$sid]);

        $pct = null;
        foreach (array('signal_blend_ai_pct','core_ai_ai_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct') as $k) {
            if (isset($settings[$k]) && is_numeric($settings[$k])) {
                $pct = (float)$settings[$k];
                $ctrlLabel = 'Blend Setting';
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($pct === null && isset($settings['skai_window_size']) && is_numeric($settings['skai_window_size'])) {
            $pct = min(100.0, max(0.0, (float)$settings['skai_window_size']));
            $ctrlLabel = 'History Window';
        }
        if ($pct === null) { continue; }

        $methodRows[] = $row;
        $edge = mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $rank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 999);
        $quality = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $avgLift = (float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $penLift = (float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $top10Lift = (float)($edge['top10_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $top20Lift = (float)($edge['top20_lift'] ?? 0.0);

        $score = ($avgLift * 8.0)
               + ($penLift * 10.0)
               + ($top20Lift * 2.0)
               + ($top10Lift * 1.5)
               + ($quality * 4.0)
               + ($top10 * 0.8)
               + ($top20 * 0.35)
               - min(8.0, max(0.0, $rank) * 0.04);

        $scored[] = array(
            'pct' => $pct,
            'score' => $score,
            'avg_rank_lift' => $avgLift,
            'penalized_rank_lift' => $penLift,
            'random_edge' => $edge,
            'draw_date' => (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
        );
    }

    $total = is_array($scored) ? count($scored) : 0;
    $edgeMetrics = mleAdvisoryAggregateRandomEdge($methodRows, $method);
    $noData = array(
        'stage'        => 'broad_testing',
        'stage_label'  => 'Broad testing',
        'has_range'    => false,
        'range_min'    => 0.0,
        'range_max'    => 100.0,
        'sweet_min'    => null,
        'sweet_max'    => null,
        'run_count'    => $total,
        'control_label'=> $ctrlLabel,
        'summary'      => 'Not enough saved scored runs yet for this lottery. Keep saving runs for this lottery before narrowing the range further.',
        'stage_plain'  => 'This lottery is still in broad testing.',
        'evidence_line'=> 'There are not enough saved scored runs yet to compare a narrowed range against the random baseline.',
        'next_step'    => 'Keep saving scored runs for this lottery before narrowing the range further.',
        'random_edge'  => $edgeMetrics,
        'range_width'  => 100.0,
    );
    if ($total < 5) { return $noData; }

    usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });

    $cutStrong = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.40));
    $strongRuns = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutStrong);
    $strongPcts = array();
    foreach ($strongRuns as $r) { $strongPcts[] = $r['pct']; }
    $rangeMin = min($strongPcts);
    $rangeMax = max($strongPcts);

    $sweetMin = null;
    $sweetMax = null;
    $cutSweet = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.20));
    if ($cutSweet >= 2) {
        $sweetRuns = array_slice($scored, 0, $cutSweet);
        $sweetPcts = array();
        foreach ($sweetRuns as $r) { $sweetPcts[] = $r['pct']; }
        $sweetMin = (float)min($sweetPcts);
        $sweetMax = (float)max($sweetPcts);
        if (!($sweetMin >= $rangeMin && $sweetMax <= $rangeMax && ($sweetMax - $sweetMin) < ($rangeMax - $rangeMin))) {
            $sweetMin = null;
            $sweetMax = null;
        }
    }

    $rangeWidth = $rangeMax - $rangeMin;
    $avgLift = (float)($edgeMetrics['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
    $penLift = (float)($edgeMetrics['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
    $repeatCount = (int)($edgeMetrics['repeat_count'] ?? 0);
    $validationDraws = (int)($edgeMetrics['validation_draws'] ?? 0);
    $hasBasicEdge = ($avgLift >= 1.05 && $penLift >= 1.00);
    $hasGoodEdge  = ($avgLift >= 1.15 && $penLift >= 1.05);
    $hasEliteEdge = ($avgLift >= 1.20 && $penLift >= 1.10);

    if ($total >= 120 && $validationDraws >= 20 && $repeatCount >= 5 && $hasEliteEdge && $sweetMin !== null && ($sweetMax - $sweetMin) <= 15.0) {
        $stage = 'precision_focus_range';
        $stageLabel = 'Settings Precision Range';
    } elseif ($total >= 75 && $validationDraws >= 12 && $repeatCount >= 4 && $hasGoodEdge && $rangeWidth <= 20.0) {
        $stage = 'validated_focus_range';
        $stageLabel = 'Validated Focus Range';
    } elseif ($total >= 45 && $validationDraws >= 6 && $repeatCount >= 3 && $hasGoodEdge && $rangeWidth <= 30.0) {
        $stage = 'narrowing_signal';
        $stageLabel = 'Narrowing Signal';
    } elseif ($total >= 27 && $validationDraws >= 4 && $repeatCount >= 2 && $hasBasicEdge && $rangeWidth <= 45.0) {
        $stage = 'exploratory_batch';
        $stageLabel = 'Exploratory Precision Batch';
    } elseif ($total >= 18 && $validationDraws >= 3 && $avgLift >= 1.00 && $rangeWidth <= 60.0) {
        $stage = 'early_direction';
        $stageLabel = 'Early Direction';
    } else {
        $stage = 'broad_testing';
        $stageLabel = 'Broad testing';
    }

    $rMin = (int)round($rangeMin);
    $rMax = (int)round($rangeMax);
    $edgeText = 'Average rank lift ' . number_format($avgLift, 2) . 'x; penalized lift ' . number_format($penLift, 2) . 'x versus random expectation.';

    if ($stage === 'broad_testing') {
        $summary = 'This lottery is still building evidence. LottoExpert is comparing scored runs against a random baseline before narrowing too tightly.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery is still in broad testing.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs are being measured. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep saving scored runs and avoid changing everything at once.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'early_direction') {
        $summary = 'A possible signal is starting to appear for this lottery between ' . $rMin . ' and ' . $rMax . '. Keep tracking it before relying on it heavily.';
        $stagePlain = 'A possible strategy signal is forming.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs show an early range between ' . $rMin . ' and ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep this range on watch and save more scored runs for this lottery.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'exploratory_batch') {
        $summary = 'This range is ready for an exploratory Precision Focus batch for this lottery. It is showing repeated evidence and early lift over random expectation.';
        $stagePlain = 'An exploratory Precision Focus batch is ready.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs and ' . $repeatCount . ' positive-edge runs point to ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Run one controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch and keep the other settings steady.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'narrowing_signal') {
        $summary = 'Recent completed draws are starting to favor a tighter setting range for this lottery. LottoExpert recommends testing inside this range instead of making large changes.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a narrowing signal.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs point to the ' . $ctrlLabel . ' range ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Keep the next test inside this range and compare only one change after the next draw.';
    } elseif ($stage === 'validated_focus_range') {
        $summary = 'This range has repeated support across completed draws and positive lift versus random expectation. Use it as the current disciplined focus area.';
