        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a validated focus range.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs with ' . $validationDraws . ' completed draw dates support ' . $rMin . ' to ' . $rMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Stay inside this focus range and continue validating after future completed draws.';
    } else {
        $sMin = (int)round($sweetMin);
        $sMax = (int)round($sweetMax);
        $summary = 'This is LottoExpert\'s strongest current focus range for this lottery: ' . $sMin . ' to ' . $sMax . '. It is a disciplined test range, not a guarantee.';
        $stagePlain = 'This lottery has a Settings Precision Range.';
        $evidenceLine = $total . ' scored runs repeatedly point to the tighter ' . $ctrlLabel . ' range ' . $sMin . ' to ' . $sMax . '. ' . $edgeText;
        $nextStep = 'Stay inside this range and use one-setting tests to confirm what keeps working for this lottery.';
    }

    return array(
        'stage'        => $stage,
        'stage_label'  => $stageLabel,
        'has_range'    => ($stage !== 'broad_testing'),
        'range_min'    => (float)$rangeMin,
        'range_max'    => (float)$rangeMax,
        'sweet_min'    => $sweetMin,
        'sweet_max'    => $sweetMax,
        'run_count'    => $total,
        'control_label'=> $ctrlLabel,
        'summary'      => $summary,
        'stage_plain'  => $stagePlain,
        'evidence_line'=> $evidenceLine,
        'next_step'    => $nextStep,
        'random_edge'  => $edgeMetrics,
        'range_width'  => (float)$rangeWidth,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeHorizonWindowLockData(array $perfRows, array $savedById)
{
    $HORIZON_MIN = 25.0;
    $HORIZON_MAX = 1000.0;
    $scored = array();
    $latestWindow = 0.0;

    foreach ($perfRows as $row) {
        $sid = (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$sid])) { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($savedById[$sid]);

        $windowVal = null;
        foreach (array('skai_window_size','draws_used','draws_analyzed','skip_window','window_size') as $wk) {
            if (isset($settings[$wk]) && is_numeric($settings[$wk])) {
                $wv = (float)$settings[$wk];
                if ($wv >= $HORIZON_MIN && $wv <= $HORIZON_MAX) {
                    $windowVal = $wv;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        if ($windowVal === null) { continue; }
        if ($windowVal > $latestWindow) { $latestWindow = $windowVal; }

        $edge = mleAdvisoryCalculateRandomEdgeForRow($row);
        $quality = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
        $avgLift = (float)($edge['avg_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $penLift = (float)($edge['penalized_rank_lift'] ?? 0.0);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $rank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 999);

        $score = ($avgLift * 8.0)
               + ($penLift * 10.0)
               + ($quality * 4.0)
               + ($top10 * 0.8)
               + ($top20 * 0.35)
               - min(8.0, max(0.0, $rank) * 0.04);

        $scored[] = array('window' => $windowVal, 'score' => $score);
    }

    $noData = array(
        'has_range'     => false,
        'run_count'     => 0,
        'current_value' => 0.0,
        'range_min'     => $HORIZON_MIN,
        'range_max'     => $HORIZON_MAX,
        'sweet_min'     => null,
        'sweet_max'     => null,
        'stage'         => 'exploring',
        'stage_label'   => 'Exploring',
    );
    $total = count($scored);
    if ($total < 1) { return $noData; }

    usort($scored, function($a, $b) { return ($b['score'] > $a['score']) ? 1 : (($b['score'] < $a['score']) ? -1 : 0); });

    $cutStrong = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.40));
    $strongVals = array_column(array_slice($scored, 0, $cutStrong), 'window');
    $rangeMin = (float)min($strongVals);
    $rangeMax = (float)max($strongVals);

    $sweetMin = null;
    $sweetMax = null;
    $cutSweet = max(1, (int)ceil($total * 0.20));
    if ($cutSweet >= 2) {
        $sweetVals = array_column(array_slice($scored, 0, $cutSweet), 'window');
        $sMin = (float)min($sweetVals);
        $sMax = (float)max($sweetVals);
        if ($sMin >= $rangeMin && $sMax <= $rangeMax && ($sMax - $sMin) < ($rangeMax - $rangeMin)) {
            $sweetMin = $sMin;
            $sweetMax = $sMax;
        }
    }

    $rangeWidth = $rangeMax - $rangeMin;
    $hasRange = ($total >= 3 && $rangeWidth < ($HORIZON_MAX - $HORIZON_MIN) * 0.80);
    if ($rangeWidth <= 100 && $total >= 9) {
        $stage = 'narrowing';
        $stageLabel = 'Narrowing horizon';
    } elseif ($hasRange) {
        $stage = 'early_horizon';
        $stageLabel = 'Early horizon signal';
    } else {
        $stage = 'exploring';
        $stageLabel = 'Exploring';
    }

    return array(
        'has_range'     => $hasRange,
        'run_count'     => $total,
        'current_value' => $latestWindow,
        'range_min'     => $rangeMin,
        'range_max'     => $rangeMax,
        'sweet_min'     => $sweetMin,
        'sweet_max'     => $sweetMax,
        'stage'         => $stage,
        'stage_label'   => $stageLabel,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($value, $type) {
    $type = (string)$type;
    if (!is_numeric($value)) { return ''; }
    $v = (float)$value;
    if ($type === 'decimal') { return rtrim(rtrim(number_format($v, 3, '.', ''), '0'), '.'); }
    return (string)((int)round($v));
}

function mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $recommendedValue, $variableType) {
    $rangeMin = (float)$rangeMin;
    $rangeMax = (float)$rangeMax;
    if ($rangeMax < $rangeMin) { $tmp = $rangeMin; $rangeMin = $rangeMax; $rangeMax = $tmp; }
    $variableType = ($variableType === 'decimal') ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
    $span = $rangeMax - $rangeMin;
    if ($variableType === 'integer') {
        $lo = (int)ceil($rangeMin);
        $hi = (int)floor($rangeMax);
        if (($hi - $lo + 1) < 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct integer test values from this range.'); }
        $raw = array($lo, $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 1.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 2.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 3.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 4.0 / 7.0), $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 5.0 / 7.0), $hi);
        if (is_numeric($recommendedValue)) { $raw[] = max($lo, min($hi, (float)$recommendedValue)); }
        else { $raw[] = $lo + (($hi - $lo) * 6.0 / 7.0); }
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($raw as $v) { $vals[] = (int)round($v); }
        $seen = array(); $distinct = array();
        foreach ($vals as $v) { if ($v < $lo) { $v = $lo; } if ($v > $hi) { $v = $hi; } $k = (string)$v; if (!isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k] = true; $distinct[] = $v; } }
        for ($v=$lo; count($distinct)<8 && $v <= $hi; $v++) { $k=(string)$v; if (!isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=$v; } }
        sort($distinct, SORT_NUMERIC);
        if (count($distinct) > 8) {
            $sample = array();
            for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) { $idx = (int)round($i * (count($distinct)-1) / 7); $sample[] = $distinct[$idx]; }
            $distinct = array_values(array_unique($sample));
        }
        if (count($distinct) !== 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct integer test values from this range.'); }
        return array('ok'=>true,'values'=>$distinct,'reason'=>'');
    }
    if ($span <= 0) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct decimal test values from this range.'); }
    $raw = array();
    for ($i=0; $i<7; $i++) { $raw[] = $rangeMin + ($span * $i / 6.0); }
    if (is_numeric($recommendedValue)) { $raw[] = max($rangeMin, min($rangeMax, (float)$recommendedValue)); }
    else { $raw[] = $rangeMin + ($span * 0.5); }
    $seen = array(); $distinct = array();
    foreach ($raw as $v) { $k = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v, 'decimal'); if ($k !== '' && !isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=(float)$k; } }
    for ($i=0; count($distinct)<8 && $i<80; $i++) { $v = $rangeMin + ($span * $i / 79.0); $k = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v, 'decimal'); if ($k !== '' && !isset($seen[$k])) { $seen[$k]=true; $distinct[]=(float)$k; } }
    sort($distinct, SORT_NUMERIC);
    if (count($distinct) > 8) {
        $sample = array();
        for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) { $idx = (int)round($i * (count($distinct)-1) / 7); $sample[] = $distinct[$idx]; }
        $tmp = array(); $seen2=array();
        foreach ($sample as $v) { $k=mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($v,'decimal'); if (!isset($seen2[$k])) { $seen2[$k]=true; $tmp[]=$v; } }
        $distinct = $tmp;
    }
    if (count($distinct) !== 8) { return array('ok'=>false,'values'=>array(),'reason'=>'LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct decimal test values from this range.'); }
    return array('ok'=>true,'values'=>$distinct,'reason'=>'');
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildForcedNextSettingsSkaiBatchPlan(array $settingsAdv, array $precisionLock, array $summary = array())
{
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    $settingLabel = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting_label'] ?? ''));
    $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    $suggestedValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));

    if (!$hasAdvice || $settingKey === '' || $settingLabel === '') {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => 'No recommended next setting is available yet.');
    }

    $decimalKeys = array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','learning_rate','dropout_rate','gap_scale');
    $binaryKeys = array('best_window','auto_tune');
    $variableType = in_array($settingKey, $decimalKeys, true) ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
    if (!empty($settingsAdv['batch_variable_type']) && in_array((string)$settingsAdv['batch_variable_type'], array('integer','decimal'), true)) {
        $variableType = (string)$settingsAdv['batch_variable_type'];
    }

    if (in_array($settingKey, $binaryKeys, true)) {
        $settingKey = 'skai_blend_ai_pct';
        $settingLabel = 'Blend Setting';
        $currentValue = '50';
        $suggestedValue = '55';
        $variableType = 'integer';
    }

    $cur = is_numeric($currentValue) ? (float)$currentValue : null;
    $sug = is_numeric($suggestedValue) ? (float)$suggestedValue : null;
    if ($cur === null && $sug === null) {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => 'The recommended setting is not numeric enough for a 9-run SKAI batch.');
    }
    if ($cur === null) { $cur = $sug; }
    if ($sug === null) { $sug = $cur; }

    $rangeMin = null;
    $rangeMax = null;

    if (isset($settingsAdv['batch_range_min'], $settingsAdv['batch_range_max']) && is_numeric($settingsAdv['batch_range_min']) && is_numeric($settingsAdv['batch_range_max'])) {
        $rangeMin = (float)$settingsAdv['batch_range_min'];
        $rangeMax = (float)$settingsAdv['batch_range_max'];
    } elseif (!empty($precisionLock['has_range']) && is_numeric($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? null) && is_numeric($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? null)) {
        $rangeMin = (float)$precisionLock['range_min'];
        $rangeMax = (float)$precisionLock['range_max'];
    }

    if ($rangeMin === null || $rangeMax === null || abs($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 1.0e-9) {
        $low = min($cur, $sug);
        $high = max($cur, $sug);
        if ($variableType === 'decimal') {
            $center = ($cur + $sug) / 2.0;
            $span = max(0.08, abs($high - $low) * 2.0);
            $rangeMin = $center - ($span / 2.0);
            $rangeMax = $center + ($span / 2.0);
        } else {
            $center = ($cur + $sug) / 2.0;
            $span = max(7.0, abs($high - $low) * 2.0);
            $rangeMin = floor($center - ($span / 2.0));
            $rangeMax = ceil($center + ($span / 2.0));
        }
    }

    if ($rangeMax < $rangeMin) {
        $tmp = $rangeMin;
        $rangeMin = $rangeMax;
        $rangeMax = $tmp;
    }

    if (preg_match('/(pct|percent|blend)/i', $settingKey)) {
        $rangeMin = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$rangeMin));
        $rangeMax = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$rangeMax));
        if (($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 7.0 && $variableType === 'integer') {
            $center = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$sug));
            $rangeMin = max(0.0, $center - 4.0);
            $rangeMax = min(100.0, $center + 4.0);
        }
    }

    if ($variableType === 'decimal' && in_array($settingKey, array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','dropout_rate','gap_scale'), true)) {
        $rangeMin = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$rangeMin));
        $rangeMax = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$rangeMax));
        if (($rangeMax - $rangeMin) < 0.08) {
            $center = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$sug));
            $rangeMin = max(0.0, $center - 0.06);
            $rangeMax = min(1.0, $center + 0.06);
        }
    }

    $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {

        $settingKey = 'skai_blend_ai_pct';
        $settingLabel = 'Blend Setting';
        $variableType = 'integer';
        $rangeMin = 20.0;
        $rangeMax = 80.0;
        $suggestedValue = '50';
        $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    }

    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false, 'fail_reason' => (string)($valueResult['reason'] ?? 'Could not build a 9-run SKAI batch.'));
    }

    $values = (array)$valueResult['values'];
    $controlValue = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($cur, $variableType);
    $batchRunLabels = array('Control - Current Best Settings');
    $batchRunValues = array($controlValue !== '' ? $controlValue : (string)$currentValue);
    $desc = array(1=>'Low edge test',2=>'Low-mid test',3=>'Mid-low test',4=>'Center test',5=>'Mid-high test',6=>'High-mid test',7=>'High edge test',8=>'Recommended point');

    for ($i = 0; $i < 8; $i++) {
        $vText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($values[$i], $variableType);
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test ' . ($i + 1) . ' - ' . $settingLabel . ' ' . $vText . ' (' . $desc[$i + 1] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = $vText;
    }

    $rMinText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($rangeMin, $variableType);
    $rMaxText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($rangeMax, $variableType);

    return array(
        'has_recommendation' => true,
        'title' => !empty($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_global_settings_advice']) ? 'Global Settings Intelligence 9-Run SKAI Batch' : 'Recommended Next Settings 9-Run SKAI Batch',
        'summary' => !empty($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_global_settings_advice']) ? 'LottoExpert created a controlled 9-run SKAI batch from global scored settings intelligence for this exact lottery.' : 'LottoExpert created a controlled 9-run SKAI batch from the recommended next setting.',
        'test_plan' => 'Create 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 is the control. Runs 2 through 9 test only ' . $settingLabel . ' across a bracketed range so SKAI can narrow the next setting more clearly.',
        'advanced_explanation' => !empty($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_global_settings_advice']) ? 'This batch uses per-lottery global scored evidence to choose one setting family, then brackets it into eight sections while keeping the stronger settings stable.' : 'This batch keeps the base settings stable and varies one setting across 8 bracketed values.',
        'guardrail' => 'Do not change other settings while this batch is being tested.',
        'evidence_line' => ((int)($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0)) . ' saved runs are being used to create the next controlled test.',
        'batch_purpose' => 'Narrow the recommended next setting using a controlled 9-run SKAI batch.',
        'locked_settings' => trim((string)($settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] ?? 'Keep the strongest settings stable.')),
        'test_variable' => $settingLabel,
        'setting_key' => $settingKey,
        'control_run' => 'Control - Current Best Settings (' . $settingLabel . ' at ' . ($controlValue !== '' ? $controlValue : (string)$currentValue) . ').',
        'control_source' => 'Recommended Next Settings Run',
        'batch_runs' => $batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values' => $batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves' => 'Which point in this setting range deserves the next focused test.',
        'preferred_use' => 'Best when the user wants the next settings recommendation to move directly into SKAI for immediate testing.',
        'range_basis' => $settingLabel,
        'current_range' => $rMinText . ' to ' . $rMaxText,
        'range_min' => $rangeMin,
        'range_max' => $rangeMax,
        'recommended_value' => $suggestedValue,
        'beginner_explanation' => 'This sends you directly to the correct SKAI lottery page with 9 controlled runs ready to test. The first run is the control; the other 8 test one setting.',
        'milestone_supported' => 'Run the next controlled SKAI test for this lottery.',
        'batch_type' => !empty($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_global_settings_advice']) ? 'Global Settings Intelligence 9-Run Batch' : 'Next Settings 9-Run Batch',
        'global_learning_scope' => !empty($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_global_settings_advice']) ? 'exact_lottery_only' : '',
        'global_setting_family' => (string)($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_setting_family'] ?? ''),
        'global_source_rows' => (int)($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_source_rows'] ?? 0),
        'global_source_users' => (int)($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_source_users'] ?? 0),
        'global_source_draws' => (int)($settingsAdv['_mle_v80_source_draws'] ?? 0)
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryParseSkaiLotteryUrlMetaFromUrl($url, $lotteryId = 0)
{
    $url = trim((string)$url);
    $parsedMeta = array(
        'lottery_url' => '',
        'base_url' => '',
        'gameId' => '',
        'st' => '',
        'stn' => '',
        'gm' => '',
        'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
    );
    if ($url === '') {
        return $parsedMeta;
    }

    $decodedUrl = html_entity_decode($url, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    if (!preg_match('#skai-lottery-prediction#i', $decodedUrl)) {
        return $parsedMeta;
    }

    $parts = @parse_url($decodedUrl);
    if (!is_array($parts)) {
        return $parsedMeta;
    }

    $scheme = isset($parts['scheme']) ? strtolower((string)$parts['scheme']) : '';
    $host   = isset($parts['host']) ? trim((string)$parts['host']) : '';
    $path   = isset($parts['path']) ? trim((string)$parts['path']) : '';
    if ($path === '' || stripos($path, 'skai-lottery-prediction') === false) {
        return $parsedMeta;
    }

    $baseUrl = $path;
    if ($host !== '') {
        $baseUrl = ($scheme !== '' ? $scheme : 'https') . '://' . $host . $path;
        if (!empty($parts['port'])) {
            $baseUrl = ($scheme !== '' ? $scheme : 'https') . '://' . $host . ':' . (int)$parts['port'] . $path;
        }
    } elseif ($baseUrl !== '' && $baseUrl[0] !== '/') {
        $baseUrl = '/' . ltrim($baseUrl, '/');
    }

    $query = array();
    if (!empty($parts['query'])) {
        parse_str((string)$parts['query'], $query);
    }

    $gameIdRaw = $query['gameId'] ?? ($query['game_id'] ?? ($query['gid'] ?? ''));
    $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$gameIdRaw, 0, 50));
    $stateCode = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)($query['st'] ?? ''), 0, 20)));
    $stateName = trim((string)($query['stn'] ?? ''));
    $gameName  = trim((string)($query['gm'] ?? ''));

    $parsedMeta['lottery_url'] = $decodedUrl;
    $parsedMeta['base_url'] = $baseUrl;
    $parsedMeta['gameId'] = $gameId;
    $parsedMeta['st'] = $stateCode;
    $parsedMeta['stn'] = $stateName;
    $parsedMeta['gm'] = $gameName;
    return $parsedMeta;
}

function mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($value)
{

    $value = trim((string)$value);
    if ($value === '' || !preg_match('/^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]{1,50}$/', $value)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (preg_match('/^0+$/', $value)) {
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiPageBaseUrl($db)
{

    $siteBase = rtrim(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::base(), '/');

    if (defined('MLE_SKAI_PAGE_PATH')) {
        $configured = trim((string)constant('MLE_SKAI_PAGE_PATH'));
        if ($configured !== '') {
            if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $configured)) {
                return $configured;
            }
            return $siteBase . '/' . ltrim($configured, '/');
        }
    }

    return $siteBase . '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/skai-lottery-prediction';
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateName, $countryName = '')
{
    $stateName = trim((string)$stateName);
    $countryName = trim((string)$countryName);
    if ($stateName === '') {
        return '';
    }

    $key = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $stateName));
    $key = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $key));

    $map = array(
        'alabama'=>'al','alaska'=>'ak','arizona'=>'az','arkansas'=>'ar','california'=>'ca','colorado'=>'co','connecticut'=>'ct','delaware'=>'de','district of columbia'=>'dc','florida'=>'fl','georgia'=>'ga','hawaii'=>'hi','idaho'=>'id','illinois'=>'il','indiana'=>'in','iowa'=>'ia','kansas'=>'ks','kentucky'=>'ky','louisiana'=>'la','maine'=>'me','maryland'=>'md','massachusetts'=>'ma','michigan'=>'mi','minnesota'=>'mn','mississippi'=>'ms','missouri'=>'mo','montana'=>'mt','nebraska'=>'ne','nevada'=>'nv','new hampshire'=>'nh','new jersey'=>'nj','new mexico'=>'nm','new york'=>'ny','north carolina'=>'nc','north dakota'=>'nd','ohio'=>'oh','oklahoma'=>'ok','oregon'=>'or','pennsylvania'=>'pa','rhode island'=>'ri','south carolina'=>'sc','south dakota'=>'sd','tennessee'=>'tn','texas'=>'tx','utah'=>'ut','vermont'=>'vt','virginia'=>'va','washington'=>'wa','west virginia'=>'wv','wisconsin'=>'wi','wyoming'=>'wy'
    );

    if (isset($map[$key])) {
        return $map[$key];
    }

    if (preg_match('/^[a-z]{2}$/i', $stateName)) {
        return strtolower($stateName);
    }

    $combo = strtolower($stateName . ' ' . $countryName);
    if (strpos($combo, 'multi') !== false || strpos($combo, 'euro') !== false) {
        return '';
    }

    return strtolower(substr(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]/i', '', $stateName), 0, 12));
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $meta = array(
        'lottery_url' => '',
        'base_url' => '',
        'gameId' => '',
        'st' => '',
        'stn' => '',
        'gm' => '',
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
    );
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) {
        return $meta;
    }

    try {
        $lotteryColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__lotteries', false);
        $lotteryCols = is_array($lotteryColsRaw) ? array_keys($lotteryColsRaw) : array();
        $stateColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__states', false);
        $stateCols = is_array($stateColsRaw) ? array_keys($stateColsRaw) : array();

        $select = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','id','game_id','gameId','gid','game_code','game_alias','name','game_name','display_name','title','alias','lottery_urls','lottery_url','url','state_id') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $lotteryCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('l_' . $c);
            }
        }
        foreach (array('state_id','name','state_name','state_code','code','abbr','abbrev','short_code','alias','title') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $stateCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('s_' . $c);
            }
        }
        if (empty($select)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        $where = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','id') as $idCol) {
            if (in_array($idCol, $lotteryCols, true)) {
                $where[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($idCol) . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId;
            }
        }
        if (empty($where)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'))
            ->where('(' . implode(' OR ', $where) . ')')
            ->setLimit(1);
        if (in_array('state_id', $lotteryCols, true) && in_array('state_id', $stateCols, true)) {
            $q->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($row)) {
            return $meta;
        }

        foreach (array('l_lottery_urls','l_lottery_url','l_url') as $k) {
            $candidateUrl = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($candidateUrl === '') { continue; }
            $urlMeta = mleAdvisoryParseSkaiLotteryUrlMetaFromUrl($candidateUrl, $lotteryId);
            if (!empty($urlMeta['lottery_url'])) {
                $meta['lottery_url'] = (string)$urlMeta['lottery_url'];
                $meta['base_url'] = (string)$urlMeta['base_url'];
                if ($meta['gameId'] === '' && $urlMeta['gameId'] !== '') { $meta['gameId'] = (string)$urlMeta['gameId']; }
                if ($meta['st'] === '' && $urlMeta['st'] !== '') { $meta['st'] = (string)$urlMeta['st']; }
                if ($meta['stn'] === '' && $urlMeta['stn'] !== '') { $meta['stn'] = (string)$urlMeta['stn']; }
                if ($meta['gm'] === '' && $urlMeta['gm'] !== '') { $meta['gm'] = (string)$urlMeta['gm']; }
                break;
            }
        }

        foreach (array('l_game_id','l_gameId','l_gid','l_game_code','l_game_alias') as $k) {
            if ($meta['gameId'] !== '') { break; }
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if (mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($v)) { $meta['gameId'] = $v; break; }
        }
        if ($meta['gameId'] === '') {
            foreach (array('l_alias') as $k) {
                $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
                if (mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($v)) { $meta['gameId'] = $v; break; }
            }
        }

        if ($meta['gameId'] === '') {
            try {
                $snCols = function_exists('mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe')
                    ? mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_numbers')
                    : array();
                $candidateCols = array();
                foreach (array('target_game_id', 'game_id') as $snCol) {
                    if (in_array($snCol, $snCols, true)) {
                        $candidateCols[] = $snCol;
                    }
                }
                $jsonCols = array();
                foreach (array('prediction_target_json', 'settings_json', 'settings') as $snJsonCol) {
                    if (in_array($snJsonCol, $snCols, true)) {
                        $jsonCols[] = $snJsonCol;
                    }
                }
                if (in_array('lottery_id', $snCols, true) && (!empty($candidateCols) || !empty($jsonCols))) {
                    $snSelect = array();
                    foreach (array_merge($candidateCols, $jsonCols) as $snSelCol) {
                        $snSelect[] = $db->quoteName($snSelCol);
                    }
                    $snQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->select($snSelect)
                        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                        ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                        ->setLimit(25);
                    try {
                        $fallbackUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
                        $fallbackUserId = (int)($fallbackUser->id ?? 0);
                    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                        $fallbackUserId = 0;
                    }
                    if ($fallbackUserId > 0 && in_array('user_id', $snCols, true)) {
                        $snQ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$fallbackUserId);
                    }
                    foreach (array('generated_at', 'date_saved', 'id') as $orderCol) {
                        if (in_array($orderCol, $snCols, true)) {
                            $snQ->order($db->quoteName($orderCol) . ' DESC');
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    $db->setQuery($snQ);
                    $snRows = $db->loadAssocList();
                    foreach ((array)$snRows as $snRow) {
                        foreach ($candidateCols as $snCol) {
                            $candidate = trim((string)($snRow[$snCol] ?? ''));
                            if (mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($candidate)) {
                                $meta['gameId'] = $candidate;
                                break 2;
                            }
                        }
                        foreach ($jsonCols as $snJsonCol) {
                            $decoded = json_decode((string)($snRow[$snJsonCol] ?? ''), true);
                            if (!is_array($decoded)) { continue; }
                            foreach (array('game_id', 'gameId', 'gid', 'target_game_id') as $jsonKey) {
                                $candidate = trim((string)($decoded[$jsonKey] ?? ''));
                                if (mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($candidate)) {
                                    $meta['gameId'] = $candidate;
                                    break 3;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {

            }
        }

        foreach (array('l_game_name','l_name','l_display_name','l_title','l_alias') as $k) {
            if ($meta['gm'] !== '') { break; }
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $meta['gm'] = $v; break; }
        }

        $stateName = trim((string)($meta['stn'] ?? ''));
        foreach (array('s_name','s_state_name','s_title') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $stateName = $v; break; }
        }
        $stateCode = trim((string)($meta['st'] ?? ''));
        foreach (array('s_state_code','s_code','s_abbr','s_abbrev','s_short_code','s_alias') as $k) {
            $v = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($v !== '') { $stateCode = $v; break; }
        }
        if ($stateCode === '') {
            $stateCode = mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateName, '');
        } elseif (!preg_match('/^[a-z]{2}$/i', $stateCode)) {
            $stateCode = mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($stateCode, '');
        } else {
            $stateCode = strtolower($stateCode);
        }

        if ($stateName === '' && mylottoexpertIsKnownMultiStateLottery((string)$meta['gm'], (string)$meta['gameId'], '')) {
            $stateName = 'United States';
        }
        if ($stateCode === '' && $stateName === 'United States') {
            $stateCode = 'us';
        }

        $meta['gameId'] = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$meta['gameId'], 0, 50));
        if (!mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($meta['gameId'])) {
            $meta['gameId'] = '';
        }
        $meta['st'] = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$stateCode, 0, 20));
        $meta['stn'] = $stateName !== '' ? $stateName : (string)($meta['stn'] ?? '');
        $meta['gm'] = $meta['gm'] !== '' ? $meta['gm'] : ('Lottery ' . $lotteryId);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return $meta;
    }

    return $meta;
}

function mleAdvisoryValidateSkaiLotteryUrlMeta(array $meta)
{

    $missing = array();
    $gameId = trim((string)($meta['gameId'] ?? ''));
    if (!mleAdvisoryIsPlausibleSkaiGameId($gameId)) {
        $missing[] = 'gameId';
    }
    return array(
        'ok' => empty($missing),
        'missing' => $missing,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalSkaiLotteryUrl($db, $lotteryId, array $extraArgs = array(), $hash = '')
{

    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $meta = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId);
    $gameId = trim((string)($meta['gameId'] ?? ''));
    $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr($gameId, 0, 50));

    $baseUrl = trim((string)($meta['base_url'] ?? ''));
    if ($baseUrl === '') {
        $baseUrl = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiPageBaseUrl($db);
    }

    $queryArgs = array('gameId' => $gameId);
    foreach (array('st', 'stn', 'gm') as $displayKey) {
        $displayValue = trim((string)($meta[$displayKey] ?? ''));
        if ($displayValue !== '') {
            $queryArgs[$displayKey] = $displayValue;
        }
    }

    foreach ($extraArgs as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
        if (is_string($v) && trim($v) === '') { continue; }
        $queryArgs[$k] = $v;
    }

    $url = $baseUrl . '?' . http_build_query($queryArgs, '', '&', PHP_QUERY_RFC3986);
    $hash = trim((string)$hash);
    if ($hash !== '') {
        $url .= '#' . ltrim($hash, '#');
    }
    return $url;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiBatchOpenUrl($db, $lotteryId, $batchId, $batchType = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $extraArgs = array(
        'mle_skai_batch' => 1,
        'mle_skai_bridge' => 1,
        'mle_precision_batch' => 1,
        'mle_guided_mode' => 'required',
        'mle_required_action' => 'precision_batch',
        'mle_cancel_allowed' => 1,
        'mle_command_source' => 'mylottoexpert',
        'mle_batch_enforcement' => 'guided_locked',
        'mle_global_batch' => 1,
        'mle_batch_scope' => 'exact_lottery',
        'batch_id' => $batchId,
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'open' => 'precision_batch',
        'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
    );
    $batchType = trim((string)$batchType);
    if ($batchType !== '') {
        $extraArgs['mle_batch_type'] = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '_', $batchType));
    }

    return mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalSkaiLotteryUrl($db, $lotteryId, $extraArgs);
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiRegularRunUrl($db, $lotteryId)
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    return mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalSkaiLotteryUrl($db, $lotteryId, array(
        'mle_skai_batch' => 1,
        'mle_skai_bridge' => 1,
        'mle_global_batch' => 1,
        'mle_batch_scope' => 'exact_lottery',
        'mle_guided_mode' => 'global_learning',
        'mle_required_action' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'mle_command_source' => 'mylottoexpert',
        'mle_batch_type' => 'regular_global_learning',
        'open' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
        'mle_single_mode' => 'best_global_settings',
        'mle_single_source' => 'global_learning'
    ));
}

function mylottoexpertResolveBestHiveSettingsForSkaiRun($db, $gameId, $lotteryId, $predictionFamily, $predictionType)
{
    $gameId          = (string)$gameId;
    $lotteryId       = (int)$lotteryId;
    $predictionFamily = strtolower(trim((string)$predictionFamily));
    $predictionType   = strtolower(trim((string)$predictionType));

    $empty = array(
        'found'                  => false,
        'source'                 => 'stable_default',
        'settings'               => array(),
        'confidence'             => 'none',
        'evidence_count'         => 0,
        'average_learning_score' => 0.0,
        'best_learning_score'    => 0.0,
        'latest_evaluated_at'    => '',
        'hive_settings_fingerprint' => '',
        'reason'                 => 'no_reliable_hive_learned_settings_available',
    );

    if ($gameId === '' && $lotteryId <= 0) {
        $empty['reason'] = 'no_game_id_or_lottery_id';
        return $empty;
    }

    $profileTable = $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_shared_learning_profiles';
    try {
        $tables = $db->getTableList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $tables = array();
    }
    if (!in_array($profileTable, $tables, true)) {
        $empty['reason'] = 'shared_learning_profile_table_missing';
        return $empty;
    }

    $profileCols = array();
    try {
        $rawCols = $db->getTableColumns('#__skai_shared_learning_profiles', false);
        $profileCols = is_array($rawCols) ? array_keys($rawCols) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $profileCols = array();
    }

    $candidates = array();

    if ($gameId !== '') {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning_profiles'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
                ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
                ->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit(5);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $r) { $r['_resolve_source'] = 'exact_game'; $candidates[] = $r; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }

    if (empty($candidates) && $lotteryId > 0) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning_profiles'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                ->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit(5);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $r) { $r['_resolve_source'] = 'lottery_fallback'; $candidates[] = $r; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }

    if (empty($candidates) && $predictionFamily !== '') {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning_profiles'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('method_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('skai'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
                ->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit(5);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $r) { $r['_resolve_source'] = 'global_family'; $candidates[] = $r; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }

    if (empty($candidates)) {
        $empty['reason'] = 'no_active_profile_found';
        return $empty;
    }

    $best = null;
    foreach ($candidates as $c) {
        if ($best === null) { $best = $c; continue; }
        $bestRuns = (int)($best['evidence_runs'] ?? 0);
        $cRuns    = (int)($c['evidence_runs'] ?? 0);
        if ($cRuns > $bestRuns) { $best = $c; continue; }
        if ($cRuns === $bestRuns && strcmp((string)($c['updated_at'] ?? ''), (string)($best['updated_at'] ?? '')) > 0) { $best = $c; }
    }

    if ($best === null) {
        $empty['reason'] = 'candidate_selection_failed';
        return $empty;
    }

    $profileJson = (string)($best['profile_json'] ?? '');
    $profile = array();
    if ($profileJson !== '') {
        $decoded = json_decode($profileJson, true);
        if (is_array($decoded)) { $profile = $decoded; }
    }

    $settings = array();

    if (!empty($profile['global_settings_intelligence']['recommended_settings'])) {
        $settings = (array)$profile['global_settings_intelligence']['recommended_settings'];
    } elseif (!empty($profile['settings'])) {
        $settings = (array)$profile['settings'];
    } elseif (!empty($profile['winning_profile'])) {
        $settings = (array)$profile['winning_profile'];
    } elseif (!empty($profile['best_profile'])) {
        $settings = (array)$profile['best_profile'];
    }

    if (empty($settings)) {
        $empty['reason'] = 'profile_found_but_no_usable_settings';
        return $empty;
    }

    $evidenceRuns = (int)($best['evidence_runs'] ?? 0);
    $updatedAt    = (string)($best['updated_at'] ?? '');
    $fingerprint  = (string)($best['settings_fingerprint'] ?? '');
    $resolveSource = (string)($best['_resolve_source'] ?? 'exact_game');

    if ($evidenceRuns >= 20) { $confidence = 'high'; }
    elseif ($evidenceRuns >= 5) { $confidence = 'medium'; }
    elseif ($evidenceRuns >= 1) { $confidence = 'low'; }
    else { $confidence = 'none'; }

    if ($confidence === 'none') {
        $empty['reason'] = 'insufficient_evidence';
        return $empty;
    }

    $avgLearningScore  = 0.0;
    $bestLearningScore = 0.0;
    $perfTable = $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_performance';
    if (in_array($perfTable, $tables, true)) {
        try {
            $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('AVG(' . $db->quoteName('learning_score') . ') AS avg_score, MAX(' . $db->quoteName('learning_score') . ') AS best_score')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' IS NULL OR ' . $db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
                ->setLimit(1);
            if ($gameId !== '') {
                $q2->where('(' . $db->quoteName('target_game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId) . ')');
            } elseif ($lotteryId > 0) {
                $q2->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
            }
            $db->setQuery($q2);
            $perfRow = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($perfRow)) {
                $avgLearningScore  = round((float)($perfRow['avg_score'] ?? 0.0), 8);
                $bestLearningScore = round((float)($perfRow['best_score'] ?? 0.0), 8);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }

    return array(
        'found'                  => true,
        'source'                 => 'hive_best',
        'source_detail'          => $resolveSource,
        'settings'               => $settings,
        'confidence'             => $confidence,
        'evidence_count'         => $evidenceRuns,
        'average_learning_score' => $avgLearningScore,
        'best_learning_score'    => $bestLearningScore,
        'latest_evaluated_at'    => $updatedAt,
        'hive_settings_fingerprint' => $fingerprint,
        'reason'                 => 'hive_best_settings_resolved',
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveCoreAiPageBaseUrl($db)
{
    $siteBase = rtrim(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::base(), '/');
    if (defined('MLE_CORE_AI_PAGE_PATH')) {
        $configured = trim((string)constant('MLE_CORE_AI_PAGE_PATH'));
        if ($configured !== '') {
            if (preg_match('#^https?://#i', $configured)) {
                return $configured;
            }
            return $siteBase . '/' . ltrim($configured, '/');
        }
    }
    return $siteBase . '/ai-powered-predictions';
}

function mleAdvisoryBase64UrlEncode($value)
{
    return rtrim(strtr(base64_encode((string)$value), '+/', '-_'), '=');
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildCoreAiBatchPlanJson(array $profiles, array $blends)
{
    $cleanProfiles = array();
    foreach ($profiles as $profile) {
        $profile = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_-]/i', '', (string)$profile));
        if (!in_array($profile, array('balanced','explorative','conservative'), true)) {
            $profile = 'balanced';
        }
        if (!in_array($profile, $cleanProfiles, true)) {
            $cleanProfiles[] = $profile;
        }
    }
    if (empty($cleanProfiles)) { $cleanProfiles = array('balanced'); }

    $cleanBlends = array();
    foreach ($blends as $blend) {
        $blend = max(0, min(100, (int)$blend));
        if (!in_array($blend, $cleanBlends, true)) {
            $cleanBlends[] = $blend;
        }
    }
    if (empty($cleanBlends)) { $cleanBlends = array(25,50,75); }

    $out = array();
    foreach ($cleanProfiles as $profile) {
        foreach ($cleanBlends as $blend) {
            if (count($out) >= 9) { break 2; }
            $focusLabel = $profile === 'explorative' ? 'Explorative Focus' : ($profile === 'conservative' ? 'Conservative Focus' : 'Balanced Focus');
            $out[] = array(
                'profile' => $profile,
                'blend_pct' => $blend,
                'label' => $focusLabel . ' x Blend ' . $blend . '%'
            );
        }
    }
    return json_encode($out, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalCoreAiLotteryUrl($db, $lotteryId, array $extraArgs = array(), $hash = '')
{
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $meta = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiLotteryUrlMeta($db, $lotteryId);
    $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)($meta['gameId'] ?? ''), 0, 50));
    $baseUrl = mleAdvisoryResolveCoreAiPageBaseUrl($db);
    $queryArgs = array('gameId' => $gameId);
    foreach (array('st','stn','gm') as $displayKey) {
        $displayValue = trim((string)($meta[$displayKey] ?? ''));
        if ($displayValue !== '') { $queryArgs[$displayKey] = $displayValue; }
    }
    foreach ($extraArgs as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
        if (is_string($v) && trim($v) === '') { continue; }
        $queryArgs[$k] = $v;
    }
    $url = $baseUrl . '?' . http_build_query($queryArgs, '', '&', PHP_QUERY_RFC3986);
    $hash = trim((string)$hash);
    if ($hash !== '') { $url .= '#' . ltrim($hash, '#'); }
    return $url;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveCoreAiRangeTestUrl($db, $lotteryId, array $profiles = array('balanced','explorative','conservative'), array $blends = array(25,50,75), $autoRun = false)
{
    $planJson = mleAdvisoryBuildCoreAiBatchPlanJson($profiles, $blends);
    $extra = array(
        'core_ai_batch_plan' => mleAdvisoryBase64UrlEncode($planJson),
        'core_ai_batch_uuid' => 'mle_core_' . substr(hash('sha256', (string)$lotteryId . '|' . $planJson . '|' . time()), 0, 24),
        'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
        'open' => 'core_ai_precision_batch'
    );
    if ($autoRun) { $extra['core_ai_autorun'] = '1'; }
    return mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalCoreAiLotteryUrl($db, (int)$lotteryId, $extra, 'core-ai-precision-lock-intro');
}

function mleAdvisoryReadIncomingSkaiRequest($app)
{
    $get = $app->input->get;
    $aliases = array(
        'gameId' => array('gameId', 'game', 'gameName', 'lottery'),
        'st' => array('st', 'state'),
        'stn' => array('stn', 'stateName'),
        'gm' => array('gm', 'gameName', 'game'),
        'batch_id' => array('batch_id', 'batchId', 'batch'),
        'run_id' => array('run_id', 'runId'),
    );
    $result = array(
        'gameId' => '',
        'st' => '',
        'stn' => '',
        'gm' => '',
        'batch_id' => 0,
        'run_id' => 0,
        'lottery_id' => (int)$get->getInt('lottery_id', 0),
        'open' => trim((string)$get->getCmd('open', '')),
        'mle_skai_batch' => (int)$get->getInt('mle_skai_batch', 0),
        'mle_precision_batch' => (int)$get->getInt('mle_precision_batch', 0),
        'param_sources' => array(),
    );

    foreach ($aliases as $canonical => $keys) {
        foreach ($keys as $key) {
            if ($canonical === 'batch_id' || $canonical === 'run_id') {
                $value = (int)$get->getInt($key, 0);
                if ($value > 0) {
                    $result[$canonical] = $value;
                    $result['param_sources'][$canonical] = $key;
                    break;
                }
                continue;
            }
            $value = trim((string)$get->getString($key, ''));
            if ($value !== '') {
                $result[$canonical] = $value;
                $result['param_sources'][$canonical] = $key;
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    $result['gameId'] = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$result['gameId'], 0, 50));
    $result['st'] = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', substr((string)$result['st'], 0, 20)));
    $result['stn'] = trim((string)$result['stn']);
    $result['gm'] = trim((string)$result['gm']);

    return $result;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveIncomingSkaiRequest($db, $app)
{
    $request = mleAdvisoryReadIncomingSkaiRequest($app);
    $request['matched_lottery_id'] = 0;
    $request['matched_game_id'] = '';
    $request['matched_state_code'] = '';
    $request['matched_state_name'] = '';
    $request['matched_game_name'] = '';

    if ($request['gameId'] === '' && $request['st'] === '' && $request['stn'] === '' && $request['gm'] === '') {
        return $request;
    }

    try {
        $lotteryColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__lotteries', false);
        $lotteryCols = is_array($lotteryColsRaw) ? array_keys($lotteryColsRaw) : array();
        $stateColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__states', false);
        $stateCols = is_array($stateColsRaw) ? array_keys($stateColsRaw) : array();
        if (empty($lotteryCols)) {
            return $request;
        }

        $select = array();
        foreach (array('lottery_id','id','game_id','gameId','gid','game_code','game_alias','name','game_name','display_name','title','alias','state_id') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $lotteryCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 'l.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('l_' . $c);
            }
        }
        foreach (array('state_id','name','state_name','state_code','code','abbr','abbrev','short_code','alias','title') as $c) {
            if (in_array($c, $stateCols, true)) {
                $select[] = 's.' . $db->quoteName($c) . ' AS ' . $db->quoteName('s_' . $c);
            }
        }
        if (empty($select)) {
            return $request;
        }

        $query = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l'))
            ->setLimit(250);
        if (in_array('state_id', $lotteryCols, true) && in_array('state_id', $stateCols, true)) {
            $query->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 's') . ' ON l.' . $db->quoteName('state_id') . ' = s.' . $db->quoteName('state_id'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $rows = array();
    }

    if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) {
        return $request;
    }

    $wantedGameId = strtoupper(trim((string)$request['gameId']));
    $wantedStateCode = strtolower(trim((string)$request['st']));
    $wantedStateName = strtolower(trim((string)$request['stn']));
    $wantedGameName = strtolower(trim((string)$request['gm']));

    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        $rowLotteryId = (int)($row['l_lottery_id'] ?? $row['l_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($rowLotteryId <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        $rowGameId = '';
        foreach (array('l_game_id','l_gameId','l_gid','l_game_code','l_game_alias') as $k) {
            $candidate = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($candidate !== '') { $rowGameId = $candidate; break; }
        }
        $rowGameName = '';
        foreach (array('l_game_name','l_name','l_display_name','l_title','l_alias') as $k) {
            $candidate = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($candidate !== '') { $rowGameName = $candidate; break; }
        }
        $rowStateName = '';
        foreach (array('s_name','s_state_name','s_title') as $k) {
            $candidate = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($candidate !== '') { $rowStateName = $candidate; break; }
        }
        $rowStateCode = '';
        foreach (array('s_state_code','s_code','s_abbr','s_abbrev','s_short_code','s_alias') as $k) {
            $candidate = trim((string)($row[$k] ?? ''));
            if ($candidate !== '') { $rowStateCode = strtolower($candidate); break; }
        }
        if ($rowStateCode === '' && $rowStateName !== '') {
            $rowStateCode = mleAdvisoryNormalizeStateCodeForSkai($rowStateName, '');
        }

        $gameIdMatch = ($wantedGameId !== '' && strtoupper($rowGameId) === $wantedGameId);
        $gameNameMatch = ($wantedGameName !== '' && strtolower($rowGameName) === $wantedGameName);
        $stateCodeMatch = ($wantedStateCode !== '' && $rowStateCode === $wantedStateCode);
        $stateNameMatch = ($wantedStateName !== '' && strtolower($rowStateName) === $wantedStateName);

        if (!$gameIdMatch && !$gameNameMatch) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($wantedStateCode !== '' && !$stateCodeMatch && $wantedStateName !== '' && !$stateNameMatch) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($wantedStateName !== '' && !$stateNameMatch && $wantedStateCode !== '' && !$stateCodeMatch) {
            continue;
        }

        $request['matched_lottery_id'] = $rowLotteryId;
        $request['matched_game_id'] = $rowGameId;
        $request['matched_state_code'] = $rowStateCode;
        $request['matched_state_name'] = $rowStateName;
        $request['matched_game_name'] = $rowGameName;
        if ($request['lottery_id'] <= 0) {
            $request['lottery_id'] = $rowLotteryId;
        }
        break;
    }

    return $request;
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildHistoryHorizonSkaiBatchPlan(array $summary, array $precisionLock = array(), array $settingsAdv = array())
{
    $runCount = (int)($summary['total_runs'] ?? ($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $clusterCount = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));

    if ($runCount < 18 || $drawCount < 2) {
        return array(
            'has_recommendation' => false,
            'fail_reason' => 'History Window is not ready yet. LottoExpert first needs at least 2 completed draw cycles and about 18 scored runs so the first window test is not based on a single draw.'
        );
    }

    $currentValue = '';
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    if (in_array($settingKey, array('skai_window_size','draws_used','draws_analyzed','skip_window','window_size'), true)) {
        $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    }
    if ($currentValue === '' && isset($precisionLock['control_value']) && is_numeric($precisionLock['control_value'])) {
        $currentValue = (string)((int)round((float)$precisionLock['control_value']));
    }
    if ($currentValue === '' || !is_numeric($currentValue)) {
        $currentValue = '100';
    }

    $horizons = array(25, 50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 500, 1000);
    $labels = array(
        25  => 'Near-history window',
        50  => 'Short-term window',
        100 => 'Balanced recent window',
        150 => 'Medium window',
        200 => 'Medium-long window',
        300 => 'Long window',
        500 => 'Deep-history window',
        1000 => 'Long/full-history proxy'
    );

    $batchRunLabels = array('Control - Current History Window');
    $batchRunValues = array((string)((int)round((float)$currentValue)));
    foreach ($horizons as $h) {
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test - History Window ' . (string)$h . ' draws (' . (string)$labels[$h] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = (string)$h;
    }

    $evidenceLine = $runCount . ' scored runs across ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '. ';
    $evidenceLine .= 'Cluster support: ' . $clusterCount . '. This batch is for History Window discovery, not Settings Precision.';

    return array(
        'has_recommendation' => true,
        'title' => 'History Window 9-Run SKAI Batch',
        'summary' => 'This batch tests how far back SKAI should look by comparing history windows from 25 to 1,000 past draws. It is a research/search run, not a prediction run.',
        'test_plan' => 'Create 9 SKAI window-search runs for this lottery. Run 1 keeps the current history window as the control. Runs 2 through 9 test broad history horizons: 25, 50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 500, and 1000 draws. Do not treat these runs as playable predictions.',
        'advanced_explanation' => 'More draws are not automatically better. This batch compares responsiveness versus stability so LottoExpert can learn whether this lottery is behaving better with short, medium, long, or deeper history windows.',
        'guardrail' => 'Important: this is a window-narrowing search only. Do not use these numbers as predictions. The purpose is to test which draw-history range performs best so future prediction runs can use a better-supported window.',
        'evidence_line' => $evidenceLine,
        'batch_purpose' => 'Discover which history window performs best before creating a tighter Settings Precision test. This narrows the search window; it does not create a final prediction.',
        'locked_settings' => 'Keep all other SKAI settings stable while only the history window changes.',
        'test_variable' => 'History Window',
        'setting_key' => 'skai_window_size',
        'setting_key_aliases' => array('skai_window_size','draws_used','skip_window','window_size'),
        'control_run' => 'Control - Current History Window (' . (string)((int)round((float)$currentValue)) . ' draws).',
        'control_source' => 'Current SKAI baseline',
        'batch_runs' => $batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values' => $batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves' => 'Whether this lottery is currently responding better to short, medium, long, or deeper draw-history windows.',
        'preferred_use' => 'Best when the best history window is not yet supported or when the draw-history evidence needs broader comparison.',
        'range_basis' => 'History Window',
        'current_range' => '25 to 1000 draws',
        'range_min' => 25,
        'range_max' => 1000,
        'recommended_value' => 'Broad horizon comparison',
        'beginner_explanation' => 'This tests the History Window Range. It compares several history depths so LottoExpert can learn whether recent, medium, or deeper history is more useful before any settings test. This is not a prediction batch and should not be played as a prediction.',
        'milestone_supported' => 'Discover the best SKAI history window for this lottery.',
        'batch_type' => 'History Horizon Discovery Batch'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest(array $precisionLock, array $settingsAdv, array $summary, array $currentLockedSettings = array()) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $trueClusterCount = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $hasRange = !empty($precisionLock['has_range']);
    $stage = (string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? 'broad_testing');
    $rangeMin = (float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0.0);
    $rangeMax = (float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100.0);
    $controlLabel = trim((string)($precisionLock['control_label'] ?? 'primary setting'));
    if ($controlLabel === '') { $controlLabel = 'primary setting'; }
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $settingLabel = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting_label'] ?? ''));
    $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? ''));
    $currentValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['current_value'] ?? ''));
    $suggestedValue = trim((string)($settingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));
    $lockReady = !empty($currentLockedSettings['has_active_lock']) || in_array((string)($currentLockedSettings['status'] ?? ''), array('Locked for Testing','Precision Focus Candidate','Elite Baseline'), true);
    $controlSource = $lockReady ? 'Current Locked Settings' : 'Current Best Settings';
    $controlRunName = $lockReady ? 'Control - Current Locked Settings' : 'Control - Current Best Settings';
    $rMinInt = (int)round($rangeMin);
    $rMaxInt = (int)round($rangeMax);
    $empty = array(
        'has_recommendation'=>false,
        'title'=>'Controlled SKAI Batch Test',
        'summary'=>'Not enough saved scored runs yet for a controlled SKAI batch test in this lottery.',
        'test_plan'=>'',
        'guardrail'=>'Keep saving and scoring runs for this lottery first.',
        'evidence_line'=>$runCount . ' saved scored runs and ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw date' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.',
        'batch_purpose'=>'',
        'locked_settings'=>'',
        'test_variable'=>'',
        'setting_key'=>'',
        'control_run'=>'',
        'control_source'=>$controlSource,
        'batch_runs'=>array(),
        'batch_run_values'=>array(),
        'what_it_proves'=>'',
        'preferred_use'=>'Best if you want SKAI to test several points inside the current Settings Precision Range.',
        'range_basis'=>$controlLabel,
        'current_range'=>($rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt),
        'beginner_explanation'=>'This creates 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 keeps the current best settings as the control. Runs 2 through 9 test one SKAI setting inside its current Settings Precision Range. This is different from the History Window Range.',
        'milestone_supported'=>'',
        'fail_reason'=>'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence before creating a controlled batch.'
    );
    if ($runCount < 45 || $drawCount < 5 || !$hasRange || $trueClusterCount < 2) {
        $horizonPlan = mleAdvisoryBuildHistoryHorizonSkaiBatchPlan($summary, $precisionLock, $settingsAdv);
        if (!empty($horizonPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
            return $horizonPlan;
        }
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'This lottery is not ready for a Settings Precision 9-run batch yet. LottoExpert first needs about 5 completed regular batch cycles, at least 45 scored runs, and a repeated settings pattern. Until then, run regular SKAI batches and save the results for automatic future scoring. After at least 2 completed draw cycles and about 18 scored runs, LottoExpert can also offer a History Window batch to compare 25 to 1,000 draws back.';
        $empty['fail_reason'] = (string)($horizonPlan['fail_reason'] ?? $empty['guardrail']);
        return $empty;
    }
    if (!in_array($stage, array('exploratory_batch','strategy_candidate','narrowing_signal','validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range'), true)) { return $empty; }
    if (!$hasAdvice || $settingLabel === '' || $settingKey === '') {
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'Keep using one clean next test until this lottery isolates a single setting strongly enough for a batch.';
        return $empty;
    }
    $binaryKeys = array('best_window','auto_tune');
    if (in_array($settingKey, $binaryKeys, true)) {
        $empty['guardrail'] = 'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert needs a numeric range setting before creating a controlled batch.';
        return $empty;
    }
    $decimalKeys = array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','learning_rate','dropout_rate','gap_scale');
    $variableType = in_array($settingKey, $decimalKeys, true) ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
    $valueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($rangeMin, $rangeMax, $suggestedValue, $variableType);
    if (empty($valueResult['ok']) || count((array)($valueResult['values'] ?? array())) !== 8) {
        $empty['guardrail'] = (string)($valueResult['reason'] ?? 'This lottery is not ready for a 9-run SKAI batch yet. LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct test values from the current evidence.');
        $empty['fail_reason'] = $empty['guardrail'];
        return $empty;
    }
    $values = (array)$valueResult['values'];
    $batchRunLabels = array($controlRunName);
    $batchRunValues = array($currentValue !== '' ? $currentValue : '');
    $desc = array(1=>'Low edge of current range',2=>'Low-mid test point',3=>'Mid-low test point',4=>'Center point',5=>'Mid-high test point',6=>'High-mid test point',7=>'High edge of current range',8=>'Current recommended next setting');
    for ($i=0; $i<8; $i++) {
        $vText = mleAdvisoryNormalizeBatchValue($values[$i], $variableType);
        $batchRunLabels[] = 'Test ' . ($i+1) . ' - ' . $settingLabel . ' ' . $vText . ' (' . $desc[$i+1] . ')';
        $batchRunValues[] = $vText;
    }
    $plan = 'Create 9 saved runs for this lottery while keeping the control settings locked. The first run is the control from ' . $controlSource . '. Runs 2 through 9 test only ' . $settingLabel . ' across the current Settings Precision Range (' . $rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt . '). This is a setting scale, not the draw-history window. Review results after LottoExpert automatically scores the next completed draw.';
    $advancedExplanation = 'This batch keeps the base settings locked and varies only ' . $settingLabel . ' across 8 useful distinct test points inside the current Settings Precision Range. The control run preserves ' . $controlSource . '.';
    return array(
        'has_recommendation'=>true,
        'title'=>'Controlled SKAI Batch Test',
        'summary'=>'Evidence is now strong enough to run a controlled 9-run SKAI batch test for this lottery only.',
        'test_plan'=>$plan,
        'advanced_explanation'=>$advancedExplanation,
        'guardrail'=>'Do not change multiple unrelated settings. Keep the current strongest setup stable and test one focused range question.',
        'evidence_line'=>$runCount . ' saved scored runs, ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw dates, and repeated cluster support in ' . $trueClusterCount . ' strong evidence runs.',
        'batch_purpose'=>'Test which exact point inside the current Settings Precision Range for ' . $settingLabel . ' performs best when all other proven settings stay locked.',
        'locked_settings'=>trim((string)($settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] ?? 'Keep the strongest settings stable.')),
        'test_variable'=>$settingLabel,
        'setting_key'=>$settingKey,
        'control_run'=>$controlRunName . ' (' . $settingLabel . ' at ' . ($currentValue !== '' ? $currentValue : 'the current value') . ').',
        'control_source'=>$controlSource,
        'batch_runs'=>$batchRunLabels,
        'batch_run_values'=>$batchRunValues,
        'what_it_proves'=>'Which exact point inside this lottery current Settings Precision Range performs best when all other proven settings stay locked.',
        'preferred_use'=>'Best if you want SKAI to test several useful distinct points inside the current Settings Precision Range.',
        'range_basis'=>$controlLabel,
        'current_range'=>($rMinInt . ' to ' . $rMaxInt),
        'beginner_explanation'=>'This creates 9 SKAI runs for this lottery. Run 1 keeps the current best settings as the control. Runs 2 through 9 test one SKAI setting inside its current Settings Precision Range. This is different from the History Window Range.',
        'milestone_supported'=>'Confirm the range across more completed draws.',
        'batch_type'=>'Precision Focus Batch'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel(array $precisionLock, array $summary, array $topMethod, array $settingsAdv, array $batchTest) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? ($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $methodRepeat = (int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $trueClusterSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $clusterDrawSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $hasRange = !empty($precisionLock['has_range']);
    $stage = (string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? 'broad_testing');
    $isNarrow = in_array($stage, array('narrowing_signal','validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range'), true);
    $hasAdvice = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']);
    $hasBatch = !empty($batchTest['has_recommendation']);
    $label = 'Learning Stage';
    $key = 'learning_stage';
    $why = 'This lottery is still building completed draw-cycle evidence. Batches add scored runs, but each target date counts as one completed draw cycle.';
    $next = 'Keep saving runs. LottoExpert will score them automatically after completed draws.';

    if ($runCount >= 120 && $drawCount >= 20 && $methodRepeat >= 12 && $trueClusterSupport >= 5 && $clusterDrawSupport >= 5 && $isNarrow && $hasAdvice) {
        $label = 'Settings Precision Range';
        $key = 'precision_focus_range';
        $why = 'This lottery has strong completed draw-cycle support, repeated scored runs, and repeated settings cluster evidence. This is LottoExpert\'s strongest disciplined range, not a guarantee.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Use the controlled Precision Focus batch and keep validating future draw cycles.' : 'Keep the strongest baseline stable and continue one-setting tests.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 75 && $drawCount >= 12 && $trueClusterSupport >= 4 && $clusterDrawSupport >= 4 && $isNarrow && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Validated Focus Range';
        $key = 'validated_focus_range';
        $why = 'This lottery has repeated support across completed draw cycles and enough scored-run evidence to guide disciplined testing.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Run the controlled 9-run SKAI batch and let LottoExpert score it automatically after the next draw.' : 'Create the recommended next settings run and keep measuring after the next draw.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 45 && $drawCount >= 6 && $trueClusterSupport >= 3 && $hasRange && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Narrowing Signal';
        $key = 'narrowing_signal';
        $why = 'Repeated completed-draw evidence is starting to favor a tighter strategy range for this lottery.';
        $next = 'Keep locked settings stable and test one uncertain setting next.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 27 && $drawCount >= 4 && $trueClusterSupport >= 2 && $hasRange && ($hasAdvice || $hasBatch)) {
        $label = 'Exploratory Precision Batch';
        $key = 'exploratory_batch';
        $why = 'This lottery has enough completed draw-cycle evidence for the first controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.';
        $next = $hasBatch ? 'Run the controlled Precision Focus batch.' : 'Create a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.';
    } elseif ($runCount >= 18 && $drawCount >= 3) {
        $label = 'Early Direction';
        $key = 'early_direction';
        $why = 'A possible direction is forming, but LottoExpert needs more completed draw cycles before stronger narrowing guidance.';
        $next = 'Keep scoring saved runs until the same method or range repeats across more draw cycles.';
    }
    return array('label'=>$label,'key'=>$key,'why'=>$why,'next'=>$next,'cluster_support'=>$trueClusterSupport,'cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDrawSupport,'saved_scored_runs'=>$runCount,'completed_draws'=>$drawCount);
}

function mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress(array $precisionLock, array $summary, array $recommendationLevel, array $settingsAdv, array $batchTest) {
    $runCount = (int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? ($summary['total_runs'] ?? 0));
    $drawCount = (int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0);
    $clusterSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? ($precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0));
    $clusterDrawSupport = (int)($summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $hasPending = (int)($summary['pending_runs'] ?? 0);

    $defs = mleAdvisoryPrecisionMilestoneDefinitions();
    $currentIndex = 0;
    foreach ($defs as $idx => $def) {
        $meetsDraws = ((int)$drawCount >= (int)$def['draws']);
        $meetsRuns = ((int)$runCount >= (int)$def['runs']);
        $meetsClusters = ((int)$clusterSupport >= (int)$def['clusters']);
        if ($meetsDraws && $meetsRuns && $meetsClusters) { $currentIndex = (int)$idx; }
    }

    $current = $defs[$currentIndex];
    $currentKey = (string)$current['key'];
    $nextIndex = min(count($defs) - 1, $currentIndex + 1);
    $next = $defs[$nextIndex];

    $milestones = array();
    foreach ($defs as $idx => $def) {
        $status = mleAdvisoryResolvePrecisionMilestoneStatus($currentKey, $def['key']);
        $milestones[] = array(
            'key' => (string)$def['key'],
            'label' => (string)$def['label'],
            'short' => (string)$def['short'],
            'draws_required' => (int)$def['draws'],
            'runs_required' => (int)$def['runs'],
            'clusters_required' => (int)$def['clusters'],
            'status' => $status,
        );
    }

    $drawTarget = max(1, (int)$defs[count($defs)-1]['draws']);
    $drawProgressPercent = min(100, (int)round(((int)$drawCount / $drawTarget) * 100));
    $progressPercent = (int)round((($currentIndex + 1) / count($defs)) * 100);
    if ($currentIndex < (count($defs) - 1)) { $progressPercent = min(99, $progressPercent); }

    $waitingText = mleAdvisoryBuildPrecisionWaitingText($currentKey, $drawCount, $runCount, $clusterSupport);
    if ($hasPending > 0) {
        $waitingText = 'A Precision Focus test is in progress: ' . $hasPending . ' pending run' . ($hasPending === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' are waiting for the next completed draw result. After that draw posts, score the runs to move the evidence forward.';
    }

    $why = 'This stage is based primarily on completed draw cycles, with scored runs and repeated setting clusters used as support gates.';
    if ($currentKey === 'learning_stage') { $why = 'LottoExpert is collecting evidence. A batch can create several scored runs, but it still represents one target draw cycle.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'early_direction') { $why = 'A possible direction is forming across completed draw cycles. LottoExpert is not treating this as a strong narrowed range yet.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'exploratory_batch') { $why = 'Enough completed draw-cycle evidence exists to test a controlled 9-run Precision Focus batch.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'narrowing_signal') { $why = 'Repeated evidence is starting to favor a tighter range, but more completed draw cycles are needed before validation.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'validated_focus_range') { $why = 'This range has stronger repeated support across completed draw cycles and scored runs.'; }
    elseif ($currentKey === 'precision_focus_range') { $why = 'This is LottoExpert\'s strongest disciplined range, backed by many completed draw cycles and repeated scored evidence.'; }

    $achieved = $current['label'] . ' reached: ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ', ' . $runCount . ' scored run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ', and ' . $clusterSupport . ' repeated setting cluster' . ($clusterSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.';
    $evidenceLine = 'Current evidence: ' . $drawCount . ' completed draw cycle' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' - ' . $runCount . ' scored run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' - ' . $clusterSupport . ' repeated setting cluster' . ($clusterSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.';
    if ($hasPending > 0) { $evidenceLine .= ' Pending activity: ' . $hasPending . ' run' . ($hasPending === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' waiting for draw results.'; }

    return array(
        'level'=>$currentIndex + 1,
        'level_name'=>(string)$current['label'],
        'level_key'=>$currentKey,
        'progress_percent'=>$progressPercent,
        'draw_progress_percent'=>$drawProgressPercent,
        'why'=>$why,
        'next_milestone'=>$currentIndex >= (count($defs)-1) ? 'Keep validating the Settings Precision Range after future completed draws.' : ((string)$next['label'] . ' at ' . (int)$next['draws'] . ' completed draw cycles and ' . (int)$next['runs'] . ' scored runs.'),
        'achieved'=>$achieved,
        'evidence_line'=>$evidenceLine,
        'beginner_explanation'=>'Precision Progress is based primarily on completed draw cycles. A 9-run batch gives nine scored comparisons, but it counts as one completed draw cycle because all nine runs are tested against the same official result.',
        'waiting_for'=>$waitingText,
        'current_draw_cycles'=>$drawCount,
        'current_scored_runs'=>$runCount,
        'current_clusters'=>$clusterSupport,
        'current_cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDrawSupport,
        'pending_runs'=>$hasPending,
        'milestones'=>$milestones,
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildTrueSettingsClusterFromStrongRuns(array $strongRuns) {
    $settingKeys = array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','mode','run_mode','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','best_window','auto_tune','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','chain_len','burn_in');
    $clusters = array();
    foreach ($strongRuns as $run) {
        if (!is_array($run)) { continue; }
        $settings = isset($run['settings']) && is_array($run['settings']) ? $run['settings'] : array();
        $method = trim((string)($run['method_key'] ?? ''));
        if ($method === '') { $method = 'method_unknown'; }
        $parts = array('method=' . $method);
        $labelParts = array('Method ' . mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method));
        foreach ($settingKeys as $key) {
            if (!array_key_exists($key, $settings)) { continue; }
            $v = $settings[$key];
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            if (is_bool($v)) { $norm = $v ? 'On' : 'Off'; }
            elseif (is_numeric($v)) {
                $num = (float)$v;
                if (in_array($key, array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed'), true)) { $norm = (string)((int)round($num)); }
                else { $norm = rtrim(rtrim(number_format($num, 3, '.', ''), '0'), '.'); }
