            } else { $norm = trim((string)$v); }
            if ($norm === '') { continue; }
            $parts[] = $key . '=' . strtolower($norm);
            $labelParts[] = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key) . ' ' . $norm;
            if (count($parts) >= 5) { break; }
        }
        $clusterKey = implode('|', $parts);
        if (!isset($clusters[$clusterKey])) { $clusters[$clusterKey] = array('cluster_key'=>$clusterKey,'cluster_label'=>implode(', ', $labelParts),'strong_run_count'=>0,'completed_draw_dates'=>array(),'best_total_hits'=>0,'best_main_hits'=>0,'best_extra_hits'=>0,'score_sum'=>0.0,'members'=>array()); }
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['strong_run_count']++;
        $dd = trim((string)($run['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd !== '') { $clusters[$clusterKey]['completed_draw_dates'][$dd] = 1; }
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_total_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_total_hits'], (int)($run['total_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_main_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_main_hits'], (int)($run['main_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['best_extra_hits'] = max((int)$clusters[$clusterKey]['best_extra_hits'], (int)($run['extra_hits'] ?? 0));
        $clusters[$clusterKey]['score_sum'] += (float)($run['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if (!empty($run['saved_id'])) { $clusters[$clusterKey]['members'][] = (int)$run['saved_id']; }
    }
    $out = array();
    foreach ($clusters as $c) {
        $cnt = max(1, (int)$c['strong_run_count']);
        $c['completed_draw_count'] = count($c['completed_draw_dates']);
        $c['average_evidence_score'] = round(((float)$c['score_sum']) / $cnt, 2);
        unset($c['completed_draw_dates'], $c['score_sum']);
        if ($cnt >= 2) { $out[] = $c; }
    }
    usort($out, function($a, $b) {
        $as = ((int)($a['strong_run_count'] ?? 0) * 1000) + ((int)($a['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0) * 100) + (float)($a['average_evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        $bs = ((int)($b['strong_run_count'] ?? 0) * 1000) + ((int)($b['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0) * 100) + (float)($b['average_evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bs == $as) { return 0; }
        return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryEvidenceStatusLabelFromRow(array $row) {
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($row['advice_status'] ?? $row['evidence_status'] ?? $row['status'] ?? '')));
    if ($status === 'retire' || $status === 'retired' || $status === 'excluded' || $status === 'exclude' || $status === 'do_not_use') { return 'Exclude'; }
    if ($status === 'watch' || $status === 'review') { return 'Watch for Now'; }
    if ($status === 'keep' || $status === 'use' || $status === 'active' || $status === '') { return 'Use for Advice'; }
    return 'Watch for Now';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence(array $visualRows, array $savedById, $method) {
    $method = mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($method);
    $completed = array_merge((array)($visualRows['recent'] ?? array()), (array)($visualRows['older'] ?? array()));
    $evidenceRows = array();
    $allStrongSettings = array();
    $allStrongMethods = array();
    foreach ($completed as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        $savedId = (int)($row['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($savedId <= 0 || empty($savedById[$savedId]) || !is_array($savedById[$savedId])) { continue; }
        $saved = $savedById[$savedId];
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($saved);
        if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = array(); }
        $mainHits = (int)($row['main_hits'] ?? $row['hits_main'] ?? 0);
        $extraHits = (int)($row['extra_hits'] ?? $row['hits_extra'] ?? 0);
        $totalHits = (int)($row['total_hits'] ?? ($mainHits + $extraHits));
        $actualMain = (array)($row['actual'] ?? array());
        $expectedMain = count($actualMain);
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) { $expectedMain = (int)($saved['pick_count'] ?? $saved['main_count'] ?? 0); }
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) { $expectedMain = max(5, $mainHits); }
        $missing = max(0, $expectedMain - $mainHits);
        $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $avgRank = (float)($row['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 0);
        $allMain = ($expectedMain > 0 && $mainHits >= $expectedMain);
        $score = ($mainHits * 18.0) + ($extraHits * 6.0) + ($top10 * 3.0) + ($top20 * 1.5) - ($missing * 4.0);
        if ($avgRank > 0) { $score -= min(25.0, $avgRank * 0.10); }
        if ($allMain) { $score += 60.0; }
        if ($totalHits >= 4) { $score += 12.0; }
        $evidenceStatus = mleAdvisoryEvidenceStatusLabelFromRow($row);
        $group = 'Weak but Informative';
        if ($evidenceStatus === 'Exclude') { $group = 'Excluded'; }
        elseif ($allMain || $mainHits >= max(3, $expectedMain - 1) || $score >= 55.0) { $group = 'Strong Evidence'; }
        elseif ($totalHits >= 2 || $top10 > 0 || $top20 > 0) { $group = 'Useful Evidence'; }
        $settingsSummary = mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc($settings, (string)($saved['source'] ?? $method));
        $item = array(
            'saved_id' => $savedId,
            'draw_date' => (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'method_key' => (string)($row['method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? $saved['source'] ?? $method)),
            'method_label' => (string)($row['method_label'] ?? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($row['source'] ?? $saved['source'] ?? $method)),
            'main_hits' => $mainHits,
            'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
            'total_hits' => $totalHits,
            'missing_count' => $missing,
            'top10_hits' => $top10,
            'top20_hits' => $top20,
            'avg_rank' => $avgRank,
            'all_main_found' => $allMain,
            'evidence_score' => round($score, 2),
            'evidence_group' => $group,
            'evidence_status' => $evidenceStatus,
            'settings_summary' => $settingsSummary,
            'settings' => $settings
        );
        $evidenceRows[] = $item;
        if ($group === 'Strong Evidence' && $evidenceStatus !== 'Exclude') {
            $allStrongSettings[] = $settings;
            $mk = (string)$item['method_key'];
            if ($mk !== '') {
                if (!isset($allStrongMethods[$mk])) { $allStrongMethods[$mk] = array('count'=>0, 'label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($mk)); }
                $allStrongMethods[$mk]['count']++;
            }
        }
    }
    usort($evidenceRows, function($a, $b) {
        $as = (float)($a['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        $bs = (float)($b['evidence_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bs == $as) { return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? '')); }
        return ($bs > $as) ? 1 : -1;
    });
    $strong = array(); $useful = array(); $weak = array(); $excluded = array();
    foreach ($evidenceRows as $item) {
        $g = (string)($item['evidence_group'] ?? 'Weak but Informative');
        if ($g === 'Strong Evidence') { $strong[] = $item; }
        elseif ($g === 'Useful Evidence') { $useful[] = $item; }
        elseif ($g === 'Excluded') { $excluded[] = $item; }
        else { $weak[] = $item; }
    }
    $repeat = mleAdvisoryBuildSettingsRepeatReport($allStrongSettings, $allStrongMethods);
    $trueClusters = mleAdvisoryBuildTrueSettingsClusterFromStrongRuns($strong);
    $topCluster = !empty($trueClusters[0]) && is_array($trueClusters[0]) ? $trueClusters[0] : array();
    $lock = mleAdvisoryBuildCurrentLockedSettings($repeat, count($strong), $topCluster);
    return array(
        'strong_runs' => $strong,
        'useful_runs' => $useful,
        'weak_runs' => $weak,
        'excluded_runs' => $excluded,
        'strong_count' => count($strong),
        'useful_count' => count($useful),
        'weak_count' => count($weak),
        'excluded_count' => count($excluded),
        'settings_repeat' => $repeat,
        'current_locked_settings' => $lock,
        'true_clusters' => $trueClusters,
        'top_cluster' => $topCluster,
        'true_cluster_support' => (int)($topCluster['strong_run_count'] ?? 0),
        'true_cluster_draw_support' => (int)($topCluster['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0),
        'summary' => count($strong) > 0 ? ('LottoExpert found ' . count($strong) . ' strong evidence run' . (count($strong) === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' for this lottery. These runs stay in the evidence pool so repeated settings can be found.') : 'No strong evidence runs are ready yet for this lottery. Keep saving and scoring runs.'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildSettingsRepeatReport(array $strongSettings, array $strongMethods) {
    $keys = array('skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_ai_pct','ai_pct','blend_percent','blend_pct','ai_blend_pct','mode','run_mode','skai_window_size','draws_analyzed','best_window','auto_tune','diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','gap_scale','learning_rate','dropout_rate','hidden_layers','chain_len','burn_in');
    $total = count($strongSettings);
    $repeated = array();
    $notProven = array();
    foreach ($strongMethods as $methodKey => $info) {
        $cnt = (int)($info['count'] ?? 0);
        if ($cnt >= 2) {
            $repeated[] = array('key'=>'method','label'=>'Method','value'=>(string)($info['label'] ?? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($methodKey)),'count'=>$cnt,'support'=>'Appears in ' . $cnt . ' strong evidence runs.');
        }
    }
    foreach ($keys as $key) {
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($strongSettings as $settings) {
            if (!is_array($settings) || !array_key_exists($key, $settings)) { continue; }
            $v = $settings[$key];
            if ($v === '' || $v === null) { continue; }
            if (is_bool($v)) { $norm = $v ? 'On' : 'Off'; }
            elseif (is_numeric($v)) { $norm = (string)round((float)$v, 3); }
            else { $norm = trim((string)$v); }
            if ($norm === '') { continue; }
            if (!isset($vals[$norm])) { $vals[$norm] = 0; }
            $vals[$norm]++;
        }
        if (empty($vals)) { continue; }
        arsort($vals);
        $topVal = (string)key($vals);
        $topCount = (int)current($vals);
        $label = mleAdvisoryFormatSettingLabel($key);
        if ($topCount >= 2) {
            $support = 'Appears in ' . $topCount . ' strong evidence runs.';
            $repeated[] = array('key'=>$key,'label'=>$label,'value'=>$topVal,'count'=>$topCount,'support'=>$support);
        } else {
            $notProven[] = array('key'=>$key,'label'=>$label,'value'=>$topVal,'count'=>$topCount,'support'=>'This setting appeared in one strong run, but it is not proven yet.');
        }
    }
    return array(
        'total_strong_runs' => $total,
        'repeated' => $repeated,
        'not_proven' => $notProven,
        'summary' => !empty($repeated) ? 'Repeated settings are the clues. If the same setting keeps showing up in stronger runs, LottoExpert can start trusting it more.' : 'Strong runs exist, but the repeated settings pattern is still forming.'
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildCurrentLockedSettings(array $repeat, $strongCount, array $topCluster = array()) {
    $repeated = (array)($repeat['repeated'] ?? array());
    $locked = array();
    foreach ($repeated as $item) {
        if (!is_array($item)) { continue; }
        $count = (int)($item['count'] ?? 0);
        if ($count >= 2) { $locked[] = $item; }
    }
    $clusterCount = (int)($topCluster['strong_run_count'] ?? 0);
    $clusterDraws = (int)($topCluster['completed_draw_count'] ?? 0);
    $status = 'Not Ready';
    $reason = 'Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before locking a baseline.';
    if ($strongCount >= 2 && $clusterCount >= 2 && count($locked) >= 2) {
        $status = 'Candidate';
        $reason = 'These settings are candidates because they repeat across the strongest saved evidence for this lottery.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 3 && $clusterCount >= 2 && $clusterDraws >= 1 && count($locked) >= 3) {
        $status = 'Locked for Testing';
        $reason = 'These settings are the current baseline because they repeat across the strongest saved evidence for this lottery.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 5 && $clusterCount >= 3 && $clusterDraws >= 2 && count($locked) >= 4) {
        $status = 'Precision Focus Candidate';
        $reason = 'These settings have repeated cluster support across multiple strong evidence runs and can be used as the controlled baseline.';
    }
    if ($strongCount >= 8 && $clusterCount >= 4 && $clusterDraws >= 2 && count($locked) >= 5) {
        $status = 'Elite Baseline';
        $reason = 'These settings have strong repeated cluster evidence and support the current elite baseline for this lottery.';
    }
    return array('status'=>$status,'items'=>$locked,'reason'=>$reason,'last_updated'=>date('Y-m-d H:i:s'),'cluster'=>$topCluster,'cluster_support'=>$clusterCount,'cluster_draw_support'=>$clusterDraws,'has_active_lock'=>false);
}

function mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady(array $lock) {
    return in_array((string)($lock['status'] ?? ''), array('Locked for Testing','Precision Focus Candidate','Elite Baseline'), true);
}

function mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow(array $visual) {
    $recent = isset($visual['recent']) && is_array($visual['recent']) ? $visual['recent'] : array();
    if (!empty($recent) && is_array($recent[0])) { return $recent[0]; }
    $older = isset($visual['older']) && is_array($visual['older']) ? $visual['older'] : array();
    if (!empty($older) && is_array($older[0])) { return $older[0]; }
    return array();
}

function mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($dateValue) {
    $dateValue = trim((string)$dateValue);
    if ($dateValue === '') { return ''; }
    $ts = strtotime($dateValue);
    if ($ts === false) { return $dateValue; }
    return date('M j, Y', $ts);
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildWhySupportText($methodLabel, array $topMethod, array $visual, array $precisionLock, array $proof) {
    $methodLabel = trim((string)$methodLabel);
    if ($methodLabel === '') { $methodLabel = 'This method'; }
    $runCount = (int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0);
    $drawCount = (int)($topMethod['draw_count'] ?? 0);
    $proofKey = (string)($proof['level'] ?? 'too_early');
    $bestRow = mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow($visual);
    if ($drawCount <= 0 && empty($bestRow)) {
        return 'This is still early. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before it can narrow confidently.';
    }

    $parts = array();
    if ($drawCount > 0) {
        $parts[] = $drawCount . ' completed scored run' . ($drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
    }
    if ($runCount > 0) {
        $parts[] = $runCount . ' active saved run' . ($runCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
    }

    if (!empty($bestRow)) {
        $bestTotal = (int)($bestRow['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestMain = (int)($bestRow['main_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestExtra = (int)($bestRow['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestDate = mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($bestRow['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($bestTotal > 0 && $bestDate !== '') {
            $bestText = 'best result of ' . $bestTotal . ' total hit' . ($bestTotal === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' on ' . $bestDate;
            if ($bestMain > 0 || $bestExtra > 0) {
                $bestText .= ' (' . $bestMain . ' main';
                if ($bestExtra > 0) { $bestText .= ', ' . $bestExtra . ' extra'; }
                $bestText .= ')';
            }
            $parts[] = $bestText;
        }
    }

    if (!empty($precisionLock['has_range'])) {
        $rangeMin = (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0));
        $rangeMax = (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100));
        $parts[] = 'stronger results between ' . $rangeMin . ' and ' . $rangeMax;
        if (isset($precisionLock['control_label']) && trim((string)$precisionLock['control_label']) !== '') {
            $parts[] = 'measured on the ' . trim((string)$precisionLock['control_label']);
        }
    }

    $text = $methodLabel . ' is leading for this lottery because it has the strongest saved scored evidence here';
    if (!empty($parts)) {
        $text .= ': ' . implode(', ', $parts) . '.';
    } else {
        $text .= '.';
    }

    if (in_array($proofKey, array('learning_stage', 'no_clear_edge', 'early_signal', 'strategy_candidate', 'close_race'), true)) {
        $text .= ' This is still early. LottoExpert needs more saved scored runs for this lottery before it can narrow confidently.';
    }
    return $text;
}

function mleAdvisoryNumbersFromJson($raw) {
    $out = array();
    $decoded = is_string($raw) && $raw !== '' ? json_decode($raw, true) : null;
    if (is_array($decoded)) {
        $flat = array();
        $it = function($v) use (&$it, &$flat) { if (is_array($v)) { foreach ($v as $x) { $it($x); } } else { $flat[] = $v; } };
        $it($decoded);
        foreach ($flat as $n) { $n=(int)$n; if ($n > 0 && !in_array($n,$out,true)) { $out[]=$n; } }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows(array $activeRows, array $perfRows) {
    $savedById = array();
    foreach ($activeRows as $r) { $savedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }

    $rowsByKey = array();
    $usedSavedIds = array();

    $scoreRow = function(array $r) {
        $total = (int)($r['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $main = (int)($r['main_hits'] ?? 0);
        $quality = is_numeric($r['quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$r['quality_score'] : 0.0;
        $rank = is_numeric($r['avg_rank'] ?? null) ? (float)$r['avg_rank'] : 9999.0;
        $date = strtotime((string)($r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($date === false) { $date = 0; }
        return ($total * 1000000.0) + ($main * 100000.0) + ($quality * 1000.0) - $rank + ($date / 10000000000.0);
    };

    $addRow = function(array $row) use (&$rowsByKey, $scoreRow) {
        $predKey = implode(',', array_map('intval', (array)($row['predicted'] ?? array())));
        $actualKey = implode(',', array_map('intval', (array)($row['actual'] ?? array())));
        $drawDate = (string)($row['draw_date'] ?? '');
        $method = (string)($row['method'] ?? '');
        $savedId = (int)($row['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        if (!empty($row['completed'])) {
            $key = 'c|' . $savedId . '|' . $drawDate . '|' . $method . '|' . md5($predKey);
        } else {
            $key = 'u|' . $savedId . '|' . $drawDate . '|' . $method . '|' . md5($predKey);
        }
        if (!isset($rowsByKey[$key]) || $scoreRow($row) > $scoreRow($rowsByKey[$key])) {
            $rowsByKey[$key] = $row;
        }
    };

    foreach ($perfRows as $p) {
        $sid = (int)($p['__saved_id'] ?? $p['run_id'] ?? 0);
        $s = isset($savedById[$sid]) ? $savedById[$sid] : array();
        if (empty($s)) { continue; }
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow') && (mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($s) || mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($p))) { continue; }
        $__rowProvenance = function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance') ? mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance($s, $p) : array('scope'=>'user_saved_prediction','label'=>'Your Saved Prediction','trace'=>'','is_user_prediction'=>true,'is_system_learning_only'=>false);
        $__dailyViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($s);
        $__isDailyForVisual = !empty($__dailyViewForVisual['is_daily']);
        $__dailyComboStringsForVisual = array_values((array)($__dailyViewForVisual['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
        $__dailyPickSizeForVisual = (int)($__dailyViewForVisual['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $__regularViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractRegularSavedView($s);
        $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__regularViewForVisual['main'] ?? array())));
        $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__regularViewForVisual['extra'] ?? array())));
        if (empty($pred)) { $pred = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['main_numbers'] ?? '', true); }
        if (empty($predExtra)) { $predExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true); }
        if ($__isDailyForVisual) {
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits'])) {
                $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyComboStringsForVisual)) {
                $pred = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__dailyComboStringsForVisual[0]);
            }
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras']));
            }
        }
        if (empty($pred)) { $pred = mleAdvisoryNumbersFromJson($p['predicted_ranking_json'] ?? ''); }
        $__actualParts = mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual($p, $s, $pred, $predExtra);
        $actual = (array)$__actualParts['main'];
        $actualExtra = (array)$__actualParts['extra'];
        $__actualOfficialFound = !empty($__actualParts['found']);
        $__actualMissingMessage = trim((string)($__actualParts['message'] ?? ''));
        if (empty($pred)) { continue; }

        $matches = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actual, $pred));
        $extraMatches = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualExtra, $predExtra));
        $drawDate = (string)($p['draw_date'] ?? $s['target_draw_date'] ?? $s['next_draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($drawDate === '0000-00-00') { $drawDate = ''; }
        $method = (string)($p['__method_key'] ?? $s['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($s['source'] ?? $p['source'] ?? ''));
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($s, array('skai_prediction'=>'SKAI','ai_prediction'=>'Core AI','core_ai'=>'Core AI','core_ai_prediction'=>'Core AI','mcmc_prediction'=>'MCMC','skip_hit'=>'Skip Hit','strategy_set'=>'Saved Run'));
        $label = (string)($settings['label'] ?? ($s['label'] ?? 'Saved run'));
        $quality = is_numeric($p['weighted_quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$p['weighted_quality_score'] : 0.0;
        $__advStatusRaw = (string)($p['advice_status'] ?? $s['advice_status'] ?? 'use_in_advice');
        $__advStatusKey = strtolower(trim($__advStatusRaw));

        $__advStatusExplicit = (
            !empty($p['status_explicit']) ||
            !empty($s['status_explicit']) ||
            !empty($p['advice_status_updated_at']) ||
            !empty($s['advice_status_updated_at']) ||
            in_array($__advStatusKey, array('watch','review','retired','archived','excluded','exclude','do_not_use'), true)
        );
        $addRow(array(
            'saved_id'=>$sid,
            'perf_id'=>(int)($p['id'] ?? 0),

            'source_record_id'=>$sid,
            'run_uuid'=>(string)($p['run_uuid'] ?? $s['run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'snapshot_run_uuid'=>(string)($p['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? $s['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'run_identity_key'=>(string)($p['run_identity_key'] ?? ''),
            'batch_uuid'=>(string)($s['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'batch_index'=>(int)($s['batch_index'] ?? 0),
            'batch_total'=>(int)($s['batch_total'] ?? 0),

            'source_batch_id'=>(int)($s['source_batch_id'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_run_id'=>(int)($s['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_run_order'=>(int)($s['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_type'=>(string)($s['source_batch_type'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_origin'=>(string)($s['source_batch_origin'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_test_variable'=>(string)($s['source_batch_test_variable'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_test_value'=>(string)($s['source_batch_test_value'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_id'=>(string)($p['prediction_target_id'] ?? $s['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_key'=>(string)($p['prediction_target_key'] ?? $s['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
            'analysis_method_key'=>(string)($p['analysis_method_key'] ?? $s['analysis_method_key'] ?? $method),
            'origin_source'=>(string)($s['origin_source'] ?? ''),
            'source'=>(string)($s['source'] ?? $p['source'] ?? ''),
            'draw_date'=>$drawDate,
            'method'=>$method,
            'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method),
            'label'=>$label,
            'predicted'=>$pred,
            'predicted_ranking'=>$pred,
            'predicted_extra'=>$predExtra,
            'actual'=>$actual,
            'actual_extra'=>$actualExtra,
            'is_daily'=>$__isDailyForVisual,
            'pred_combo_strings'=>$__dailyComboStringsForVisual,
            'daily_pick_size'=>$__dailyPickSizeForVisual,
            'daily_ranked_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['ranked_digits'] ?? array()),
            'daily_bonus_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'] ?? array()),
            'matches'=>$matches,
            'extra_matches'=>$extraMatches,
            'main_hits'=>count($matches),
            'extra_hits'=>count($extraMatches),
            'total_hits'=>count($matches) + count($extraMatches),
            'avg_rank'=>$p['avg_winning_rank'] ?? null,
            'quality_score'=>$quality,
            'top10_hits'=>(int)($p['top10_hits'] ?? 0),
            'top20_hits'=>(int)($p['top20_hits'] ?? 0),
            'status'=>$__advStatusRaw,
            'status_explicit'=>$__advStatusExplicit,
            'actual_official_found'=>$__actualOfficialFound,
            'actual_source'=>(string)($__actualParts['source'] ?? 'official_draw_result'),
            'actual_missing_message'=>$__actualMissingMessage,
            'actual_cached_mismatch'=>!empty($__actualParts['cached_mismatch']),
            'completed'=>$__actualOfficialFound && (!empty($actual) || !empty($actualExtra)),
            'provenance_scope'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['scope'] ?? 'user_saved_prediction'),
            'provenance_label'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['label'] ?? 'Your Saved Prediction'),
            'provenance_trace'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['trace'] ?? ''),
            'provenance_explain'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['explain'] ?? ''),
            'is_user_prediction'=>(int)!empty($__rowProvenance['is_user_prediction']),
            'is_system_learning_only'=>(int)!empty($__rowProvenance['is_system_learning_only'])
        ));
        if ($sid > 0) { $usedSavedIds[$sid] = 1; }
    }

    foreach ($activeRows as $s) {
        $sid = (int)($s['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid <= 0 || isset($usedSavedIds[$sid])) { continue; }
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow') && mleAdvisoryIsSystemLearningOnlyRow($s)) { continue; }
        $__rowProvenance = function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance') ? mleAdvisoryBuildRunProvenance($s, array()) : array('scope'=>'user_saved_prediction','label'=>'Your Saved Prediction','trace'=>'','is_user_prediction'=>true,'is_system_learning_only'=>false);
        $__dailyViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($s);
        $__isDailyForVisual = !empty($__dailyViewForVisual['is_daily']);
        $__dailyComboStringsForVisual = array_values((array)($__dailyViewForVisual['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
        $__dailyPickSizeForVisual = (int)($__dailyViewForVisual['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $__regularViewForVisual = mylottoexpertExtractRegularSavedView($s);
        $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__regularViewForVisual['main'] ?? array())));
        $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__regularViewForVisual['extra'] ?? array())));
        if (empty($pred)) { $pred = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['main_numbers'] ?? '', true); }
        if (empty($predExtra)) { $predExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($s['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true); }
        if ($__isDailyForVisual) {
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits'])) {
                $pred = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['primary_combo_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyComboStringsForVisual)) {
                $pred = mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__dailyComboStringsForVisual[0]);
            }
            if (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits']));
            } elseif (!empty($__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'])) {
                $predExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras']));
            }
        }
        if (empty($pred) && empty($predExtra)) { continue; }
        $method = (string)($s['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($s['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($method === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        $settings = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($s, array('skai_prediction'=>'SKAI','ai_prediction'=>'Core AI','core_ai'=>'Core AI','core_ai_prediction'=>'Core AI','mcmc_prediction'=>'MCMC','skip_hit'=>'Skip Hit','strategy_set'=>'Saved Run'));
        $__advSavedStatusRaw = (string)($s['advice_status'] ?? 'use_in_advice');
        $__advSavedStatusKey = strtolower(trim($__advSavedStatusRaw));

        $__advSavedStatusExplicit = (
            !empty($s['status_explicit']) ||
            !empty($s['advice_status_updated_at']) ||
            in_array($__advSavedStatusKey, array('watch','review','retired','archived','excluded','exclude','do_not_use'), true)
        );
        $drawDate = (string)($s['target_draw_date'] ?? $s['next_draw_date'] ?? $s['actual_draw_date'] ?? $s['latest_draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($drawDate === '0000-00-00') { $drawDate = ''; }

        $actual = array();
        $actualExtra = array();
        $completed = false;
        $__actualParts = array(
            'found' => false,
            'source' => 'official_draw_result',
            'message' => 'Official draw result not loaded yet',
            'cached_mismatch' => false,
        );
        if ($drawDate !== '') {
            $drawTs = strtotime($drawDate);
            if ($drawTs !== false && $drawTs < time()) {
                try {
                    $__actualParts = mleAdvisoryResolveActualDrawPartsForVisual(
                        array('draw_date' => $drawDate),
                        $s, $pred, $predExtra
                    );
                    $actual = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__actualParts['main']));
                    $actualExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__actualParts['extra']));
                    if (!empty($__actualParts['found']) && (!empty($actual) || !empty($actualExtra))) {
                        $completed = true;
                    }
                } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
            }
        }
        $matches = $completed ? array_values(array_intersect($pred, $actual)) : array();
        $extraMatches = $completed ? array_values(array_intersect($predExtra, $actualExtra)) : array();
        $addRow(array(
            'saved_id'=>$sid,
            'perf_id'=>0,

            'source_record_id'=>$sid,
            'run_uuid'=>(string)($s['run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'snapshot_run_uuid'=>(string)($s['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'run_identity_key'=>'',
            'batch_uuid'=>(string)($s['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
            'batch_index'=>(int)($s['batch_index'] ?? 0),
            'batch_total'=>(int)($s['batch_total'] ?? 0),

            'source_batch_id'=>(int)($s['source_batch_id'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_run_id'=>(int)($s['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_run_order'=>(int)($s['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0),
            'source_batch_type'=>(string)($s['source_batch_type'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_origin'=>(string)($s['source_batch_origin'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_test_variable'=>(string)($s['source_batch_test_variable'] ?? ''),
            'source_batch_test_value'=>(string)($s['source_batch_test_value'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_id'=>(string)($s['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
            'prediction_target_key'=>(string)($s['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
            'analysis_method_key'=>(string)($s['analysis_method_key'] ?? $method),
            'origin_source'=>(string)($s['origin_source'] ?? ''),
            'source'=>(string)($s['source'] ?? ''),
            'draw_date'=>$drawDate,
            'method'=>$method,
            'method_label'=>mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method),
            'label'=>(string)($settings['label'] ?? ($s['label'] ?? 'Saved run')),
            'predicted'=>$pred,
            'predicted_ranking'=>$pred,
            'predicted_extra'=>$predExtra,
            'actual'=>$actual,
            'actual_extra'=>$actualExtra,
            'is_daily'=>$__isDailyForVisual,
            'pred_combo_strings'=>$__dailyComboStringsForVisual,
            'daily_pick_size'=>$__dailyPickSizeForVisual,
            'daily_ranked_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['ranked_digits'] ?? array()),
            'daily_bonus_digits'=>(array)($__dailyViewForVisual['bonus_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['extra_digits'] ?? $__dailyViewForVisual['top_extras'] ?? array()),
            'matches'=>$matches,
            'extra_matches'=>$extraMatches,
            'main_hits'=>count($matches),
            'extra_hits'=>count($extraMatches),
            'total_hits'=>count($matches) + count($extraMatches),
            'avg_rank'=>null,
            'quality_score'=>0.0,
            'top10_hits'=>0,
            'top20_hits'=>0,
            'status'=>$__advSavedStatusRaw,
            'status_explicit'=>$__advSavedStatusExplicit,
            'actual_official_found'=>!empty($__actualParts['found']),
            'actual_source'=>(string)($__actualParts['source'] ?? 'official_draw_result'),
            'actual_missing_message'=>trim((string)($__actualParts['message'] ?? '')),
            'actual_cached_mismatch'=>!empty($__actualParts['cached_mismatch']),
            'completed'=>$completed,
            'provenance_scope'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['scope'] ?? 'user_saved_prediction'),
            'provenance_label'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['label'] ?? 'Your Saved Prediction'),
            'provenance_trace'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['trace'] ?? ''),
            'provenance_explain'=>(string)($__rowProvenance['explain'] ?? ''),
            'is_user_prediction'=>(int)!empty($__rowProvenance['is_user_prediction']),
            'is_system_learning_only'=>(int)!empty($__rowProvenance['is_system_learning_only'])
        ));
    }

    $rows = array_values($rowsByKey);

    $officialByDrawDate = array();
    foreach ($rows as $__r) {
        $dd = trim((string)($__r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd === '' || empty($__r['completed'])) { continue; }
        if (!empty($__r['actual']) || !empty($__r['actual_extra'])) {
            if (!isset($officialByDrawDate[$dd])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd] = array('actual'=>array(), 'actual_extra'=>array());
            }
            if (!empty($__r['actual']) && count((array)$__r['actual']) >= count((array)$officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'] = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__r['actual']));
            }
            if (!empty($__r['actual_extra']) && count((array)$__r['actual_extra']) >= count((array)$officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'])) {
                $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'] = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__r['actual_extra']));
            }
        }
    }
    foreach ($rows as $__i => $__r) {
        $dd = trim((string)($__r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        if ($dd === '' || empty($__r['completed']) || empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd])) { continue; }

        if (!empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'])) {
            $rows[$__i]['actual'] = $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual'];
        }
        if (!empty($officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'])) {
            $rows[$__i]['actual_extra'] = $officialByDrawDate[$dd]['actual_extra'];
        }
        $rows[$__i]['matches'] = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches((array)($rows[$__i]['actual'] ?? array()), (array)($rows[$__i]['predicted'] ?? array())));
        $rows[$__i]['extra_matches'] = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches((array)($rows[$__i]['actual_extra'] ?? array()), (array)($rows[$__i]['predicted_extra'] ?? array())));
        $rows[$__i]['main_hits'] = count($rows[$__i]['matches']);
        $rows[$__i]['extra_hits'] = count($rows[$__i]['extra_matches']);
        $rows[$__i]['total_hits'] = (int)$rows[$__i]['main_hits'] + (int)$rows[$__i]['extra_hits'];
    }

    usort($rows, function($a,$b){
        if ((bool)$a['completed'] !== (bool)$b['completed']) { return $a['completed'] ? -1 : 1; }
        if ((int)$a['total_hits'] !== (int)$b['total_hits']) { return ((int)$b['total_hits'] - (int)$a['total_hits']); }
        if ((int)($a['top20_hits'] ?? 0) !== (int)($b['top20_hits'] ?? 0)) { return (int)($b['top20_hits'] ?? 0) - (int)($a['top20_hits'] ?? 0); }
        if ((int)($a['top10_hits'] ?? 0) !== (int)($b['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) { return (int)($b['top10_hits'] ?? 0) - (int)($a['top10_hits'] ?? 0); }
        $aq = (float)($a['quality_score'] ?? 0); $bq = (float)($b['quality_score'] ?? 0);
        if (abs($aq - $bq) > 0.000001) { return ($bq > $aq) ? 1 : -1; }
        return strcmp((string)$b['draw_date'], (string)$a['draw_date']);
    });

    $completed = array(); $upcoming = array();
    foreach ($rows as $r) {
        if ($r['completed']) { $completed[]=$r; } else { $upcoming[]=$r; }
    }
    if (!empty($completed)) { $completed[0]['is_best_overall'] = true; }
    return array('recent'=>array_slice($completed,0,6),'older'=>array_slice($completed,6),'upcoming'=>$upcoming);
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount')) {
    function mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount(array $row): int
    {
        $main = (array)($row['predicted'] ?? array());
        $extra = (array)($row['predicted_extra'] ?? array());
        $combos = (array)($row['pred_combo_strings'] ?? array());
        $dailyDigits = (array)($row['daily_ranked_digits'] ?? array());
        return count(array_unique(array_map('strval', array_merge($main, $extra, $combos, $dailyDigits))));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore')) {
    function mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore(array $numbers): float
    {
        $numbers = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', $numbers)));
        $numbers = array_values(array_filter($numbers, static function($v){ return $v > 0; }));
        $count = count($numbers);
        if ($count <= 1) { return 0.45; }
        sort($numbers);
        $range = max($numbers) - min($numbers);
        $avgGap = $range / max(1, $count - 1);
        $clusterPenalty = 0.0;
        for ($i = 1; $i < $count; $i++) {
            if (($numbers[$i] - $numbers[$i - 1]) <= 1) { $clusterPenalty += 0.05; }
        }
        $rangeScore = min(1.0, max(0.0, $range / max(1, max($numbers))));
        $gapScore = min(1.0, max(0.0, $avgGap / 6.0));
        return max(0.0, min(1.0, (0.65 * $rangeScore) + (0.35 * $gapScore) - $clusterPenalty));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore')) {
    function mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore(array $run, array $context, array $selectedRuns = array()): array
    {
        $score = 28.0;
        $reasons = array();
        $warnings = array();

        $scoredRuns = max(0, (int)($context['scored_runs'] ?? 0));
        $drawCycles = max(0, (int)($context['draw_cycles'] ?? 0));
        $strongCount = max(0, (int)($context['strong_count'] ?? 0));
        $method = strtolower((string)($run['method'] ?? ''));
        $methodLabel = trim((string)($run['method_label'] ?? 'Saved run'));
        $label = strtolower((string)($run['label'] ?? ''));
        $topMethod = strtolower((string)($context['top_method'] ?? ''));
        $precisionStage = strtolower((string)($context['precision_stage'] ?? ''));
        $progressKey = strtolower((string)($context['progress_key'] ?? ''));
        $predCount = mleAdvisoryRunPredictionCount($run);
        $hasNumbers = $predCount > 0;

        $score += min(16.0, $scoredRuns * 0.28);
        if ($scoredRuns >= 45) { $reasons[] = 'meaningful scored-run history'; }
        elseif ($scoredRuns >= 18) { $reasons[] = 'some scored-run history'; }
        else { $warnings[] = 'thin scored-run history'; }

        $score += min(16.0, $drawCycles * 1.25);
        if ($drawCycles >= 6) { $reasons[] = 'multiple completed draw cycles'; }
        elseif ($drawCycles >= 3) { $reasons[] = 'early draw-cycle evidence'; }
        else { $warnings[] = 'few completed draw cycles'; }

        if ($hasNumbers) { $score += 8.0; $reasons[] = 'saved numbers are present'; }
        else { $score -= 25.0; $warnings[] = 'missing saved numbers'; }

        if ($topMethod !== '' && $method !== '' && $method === $topMethod) {
            $score += 10.0;
            $reasons[] = 'matches the current leading method';
        } elseif ($method === 'skai') {
            $score += 6.0;
            $reasons[] = 'SKAI run';
        }

        if (strpos($label, 'control') !== false || strpos($label, 'current strongest') !== false) {
            $score += 8.0;
            $reasons[] = 'control/current-strongest test point';
        }
        if (strpos($label, 'precision') !== false || strpos($label, 'narrow') !== false || strpos($label, 'focus') !== false || strpos($label, 'recommended') !== false) {
            $score += 9.0;
            $reasons[] = 'tied to the Precision Focus plan';
        }
        if (strpos($label, 'divers') !== false || strpos($label, 'alternate') !== false) {
            $score += 4.0;
            $reasons[] = 'useful alternate / diversity test';
        }

        if ($strongCount >= 3) { $score += 8.0; $reasons[] = 'supported by repeated strong evidence'; }
        elseif ($strongCount >= 1) { $score += 4.0; $reasons[] = 'some strong evidence exists'; }

        if (strpos($precisionStage, 'precision') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'precision') !== false) {
            $score += 6.0;
            $reasons[] = 'higher precision-progress stage';
        } elseif (strpos($precisionStage, 'validated') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'validated') !== false) {
            $score += 5.0;
            $reasons[] = 'validated-focus progress stage';
        } elseif (strpos($precisionStage, 'narrow') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'narrow') !== false) {
            $score += 3.0;
            $reasons[] = 'narrowing signal is forming';
        }

        $spread = mleAdvisoryRunSpreadScore((array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()));
        $score += 7.0 * $spread;
        if ($spread >= 0.62) { $reasons[] = 'healthy number spread'; }
        elseif ($spread < 0.35 && $hasNumbers) { $warnings[] = 'number spread is concentrated'; }

        if (!empty($selectedRuns) && $hasNumbers) {
            $main = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($run['predicted'] ?? array()))));
            $maxOverlapRatio = 0.0;
            foreach ($selectedRuns as $sel) {
                $selMain = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)($sel['predicted'] ?? array()))));
                if (empty($main) || empty($selMain)) { continue; }
                $overlap = count(array_intersect($main, $selMain));
                $ratio = $overlap / max(1, min(count($main), count($selMain)));
                if ($ratio > $maxOverlapRatio) { $maxOverlapRatio = $ratio; }
            }
            if ($maxOverlapRatio >= 0.75) {
                $score -= 7.0;
                $warnings[] = 'high overlap with another highlighted run';
            } elseif ($maxOverlapRatio <= 0.45) {
                $score += 4.0;
                $reasons[] = 'good alternate coverage';
            }
        }

        $score = (int)round(max(0, min(100, $score)));
        $reasonText = 'Best available balance of saved numbers, evidence history, method alignment, stability, and coverage quality.';
        if (!empty($reasons)) {
            $reasonText = ucfirst(implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($reasons)), 0, 4))) . '.';
        }
        if (!empty($warnings)) {
            $reasonText .= ' Caution: ' . implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($warnings)), 0, 2)) . '.';
        }
        return array('score' => $score, 'reason' => $reasonText, 'warnings' => $warnings, 'has_numbers' => $hasNumbers, 'method_label' => $methodLabel);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryCleanHiveKey')) {
    function mleAdvisoryCleanHiveKey($value): string
    {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        $value = str_replace(array('-', '_'), ' ', $value);
        $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
        return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryHiveTextMatches')) {
    function mleAdvisoryHiveTextMatches($a, $b): bool
    {
        $a = mleAdvisoryCleanHiveKey($a);
        $b = mleAdvisoryCleanHiveKey($b);
        if ($a === '' || $b === '') { return false; }
        if ($a === $b) { return true; }
        return (strpos($a, $b) !== false || strpos($b, $a) !== false);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryPendingRunHiveRecommendationScore')) {
    function mleAdvisoryPendingRunHiveRecommendationScore(array $run, array $context): array
    {
        $score = 0.0;
        $reasons = array();
        $warnings = array();
        $sourceLabel = 'Scored evidence fallback';
        $hasHiveProfile = false;

        $method = strtolower(trim((string)($run['method'] ?? $run['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')));
        $topMethod = strtolower(trim((string)($context['top_method'] ?? '')));
        $label = strtolower(trim((string)($run['label'] ?? '')));
        $lock = is_array($context['hive_current_lock'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_current_lock'] : array();
        $precision = is_array($context['hive_precision_lock'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_precision_lock'] : array();
        $settingsAdv = is_array($context['hive_settings_advice'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_settings_advice'] : array();
        $recommendationLevel = is_array($context['hive_recommendation_level'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_recommendation_level'] : array();
        $progress = is_array($context['hive_precision_progress'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_precision_progress'] : array();

        $lockStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($lock['status'] ?? $lock['locked_status'] ?? '')));
        $lockReady = !empty($lock['has_active_lock']) || !empty($lock['persisted_lock_id']) || in_array($lockStatus, array('locked for testing','precision focus candidate','elite baseline','precision lock candidate'), true);
        $precisionStage = strtolower(trim((string)($precision['stage'] ?? $precision['stage_label'] ?? '')));
        $progressKey = strtolower(trim((string)($progress['current_key'] ?? $progress['level_key'] ?? '')));
        $precisionReady = !empty($precision['has_range']) || strpos($precisionStage, 'precision') !== false || strpos($precisionStage, 'validated') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'precision') !== false || strpos($progressKey, 'validated') !== false;
        $settingsReady = !empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']) || trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? $settingsAdv['setting_key'] ?? '')) !== '';
        $sharedProfile = is_array($context['hive_shared_profile'] ?? null) ? (array)$context['hive_shared_profile'] : array();
        $sharedAvailable = !empty($sharedProfile['available']);
        $sharedStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($sharedProfile['status'] ?? '')));
        $sharedReady = $sharedAvailable && in_array($sharedStatus, array('ready','strong','active'), true);
        $sharedEvidenceRuns = (int)($sharedProfile['evidence_runs'] ?? 0);
        $sharedEvidenceUsers = (int)($sharedProfile['evidence_users'] ?? 0);

        if ($sharedReady || $sharedEvidenceRuns > 0) {
            $hasHiveProfile = true;
            $sourceLabel = 'Hive shared learning profile';
            $score += $sharedReady ? 34.0 : 22.0;
            if ($sharedEvidenceRuns > 0) { $score += min(16.0, $sharedEvidenceRuns * 0.20); }
            if ($sharedEvidenceUsers > 1) { $score += min(8.0, $sharedEvidenceUsers * 1.5); }
            $reasons[] = 'uses the shared all-user Hive learning profile';
        }

        if ($lockReady) {
            $hasHiveProfile = true;
            if (!$sharedReady && $sharedEvidenceRuns <= 0) {
                $sourceLabel = !empty($lock['persisted_lock_id']) ? 'Hive locked settings' : 'Hive current learned settings';
            }
            $score += 30.0;
            $reasons[] = 'matches the active Hive learned-settings layer';
        } elseif ($precisionReady) {
            $hasHiveProfile = true;
            $sourceLabel = 'Hive precision progress';
            $score += 20.0;
            $reasons[] = 'uses the current Hive precision-progress profile';
        } elseif ($settingsReady) {
            $hasHiveProfile = true;
            $sourceLabel = 'Hive settings advice';
            $score += 16.0;
            $reasons[] = 'uses the current Hive settings-advice profile';
        }

        $preferredMethod = strtolower(trim((string)($lock['method'] ?? $lock['source'] ?? '')));
        if ($preferredMethod === '') { $preferredMethod = $topMethod; }
        if ($preferredMethod !== '' && $method !== '') {
            if ($method === $preferredMethod || mleAdvisoryHiveTextMatches($method, $preferredMethod)) {
                $score += 24.0;
                $reasons[] = 'matches the Hive preferred method';
            } elseif ($method === $topMethod && $topMethod !== '') {
                $score += 12.0;
                $reasons[] = 'matches the strongest scored method fallback';
            } else {
                $score -= 8.0;
                $warnings[] = 'method is not the current Hive leader';
            }
        }

        $baseRunId = (int)($lock['base_run_id'] ?? $lock['base_settings_id'] ?? 0);
        $runIds = array(
            (int)($run['saved_id'] ?? 0),
            (int)($run['source_record_id'] ?? 0),
            (int)($run['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0),
            (int)($run['source_batch_id'] ?? 0)
        );
        if ($baseRunId > 0 && in_array($baseRunId, $runIds, true)) {
            $score += 28.0;
            $reasons[] = 'directly tied to the saved Hive baseline run';
        }

        $rangeBasis = trim((string)($lock['range_basis'] ?? $precision['control_label'] ?? $settingsAdv['label'] ?? $settingsAdv['setting_label'] ?? ''));
        $settingKey = trim((string)($settingsAdv['setting'] ?? $settingsAdv['setting_key'] ?? ''));
        $testVar = trim((string)($run['source_batch_test_variable'] ?? $run['test_variable'] ?? ''));
        $testValueRaw = trim((string)($run['source_batch_test_value'] ?? $run['test_value'] ?? ''));
        $rangeMin = null;
        $rangeMax = null;
        if (isset($lock['range_min']) && isset($lock['range_max']) && is_numeric($lock['range_min']) && is_numeric($lock['range_max'])) {
            $rangeMin = (float)$lock['range_min'];
            $rangeMax = (float)$lock['range_max'];
        } elseif (isset($precision['range_min']) && isset($precision['range_max']) && is_numeric($precision['range_min']) && is_numeric($precision['range_max'])) {
            $rangeMin = (float)$precision['range_min'];
            $rangeMax = (float)$precision['range_max'];
        }

        $varMatches = false;
        if ($testVar !== '') {
            $varMatches = mleAdvisoryHiveTextMatches($testVar, $rangeBasis) || mleAdvisoryHiveTextMatches($testVar, $settingKey);
            if ($varMatches) {
                $score += 15.0;
                $reasons[] = 'tests the current Hive focus setting';
            }
        }
        if ($testValueRaw !== '' && is_numeric($testValueRaw) && $rangeMin !== null && $rangeMax !== null) {
            $testValue = (float)$testValueRaw;
            $lo = min($rangeMin, $rangeMax);
            $hi = max($rangeMin, $rangeMax);
            if ($testValue >= $lo && $testValue <= $hi) {
                $score += $varMatches ? 18.0 : 9.0;
                $reasons[] = 'inside the current Hive focus range';
            } elseif ($varMatches) {
                $score -= 6.0;
                $warnings[] = 'outside the current Hive focus range';
            }
        }

        if (strpos($label, 'control') !== false || strpos($label, 'current strongest') !== false || strpos($label, 'baseline') !== false) {
            $score += 9.0;
            $reasons[] = 'control or baseline candidate';
        }
        if (strpos($label, 'precision') !== false || strpos($label, 'focus') !== false || strpos($label, 'recommended') !== false || strpos($label, 'narrow') !== false) {
            $score += 10.0;
            $reasons[] = 'explicitly marked as a Hive/precision candidate';
        }
        if (!empty($recommendationLevel['level']) || !empty($recommendationLevel['label'])) {
            $score += 4.0;
            $reasons[] = 'supported by the current recommendation level';
        }

        $score = (int)round(max(0, min(100, $score)));
        if (!$hasHiveProfile) {
            return array(
                'has_hive_profile' => false,
                'score' => 0,
                'source' => $sourceLabel,
                'reason' => 'No active Hive learned-settings profile was available, so LottoExpert used scored evidence as the fallback.',
                'warnings' => $warnings
            );
        }

        $reasonText = 'Ranked against the current Hive learned-settings profile.';
        if (!empty($reasons)) {
            $reasonText = ucfirst(implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($reasons)), 0, 4))) . '.';
        }
        if (!empty($warnings)) {
            $reasonText .= ' Caution: ' . implode('; ', array_slice(array_values(array_unique($warnings)), 0, 2)) . '.';
        }

        return array(
            'has_hive_profile' => true,
            'score' => $score,
            'source' => $sourceLabel,
            'reason' => $reasonText,
            'warnings' => $warnings
        );
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildPendingDrawRecommendations')) {
    function mleAdvisoryBuildPendingDrawRecommendations(array $upcomingRows, array $completedRows, array $context): array
    {
        $out = array(
            'has_pending' => !empty($upcomingRows),
            'confidence' => 'not_ready',
            'confidence_label' => 'Not Ready',
            'title' => 'SKAI Pending Draw Recommendations',
            'summary' => 'No pending saved runs are available for a responsible recommendation yet.',
            'draw_date' => '',
            'top' => array(),
            'all' => array(),
            'note' => '',
        );
        if (empty($upcomingRows)) { return $out; }

        $groups = array();
        foreach ($upcomingRows as $r) {
            $dd = trim((string)($r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($dd === '' || $dd === '0000-00-00') { $dd = 'Upcoming'; }
            if (!isset($groups[$dd])) { $groups[$dd] = array(); }
            $groups[$dd][] = $r;
        }
        uksort($groups, static function($a, $b){
            if ($a === 'Upcoming') { return 1; }
            if ($b === 'Upcoming') { return -1; }
            return strcmp($a, $b);
        });
        $drawDate = (string)array_key_first($groups);
        $pendingForDraw = array_values((array)$groups[$drawDate]);

        $batchGroups = array();
        foreach ($upcomingRows as $r) {
            if (!is_array($r)) { continue; }
            $dd = trim((string)($r['draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($dd === '' || $dd === '0000-00-00') { $dd = 'Upcoming'; }
            $batchKey = trim((string)($r['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
            if ($batchKey === '') {
                $sourceBatchId = (int)($r['source_batch_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($sourceBatchId > 0) { $batchKey = 'source_batch:' . $sourceBatchId; }
            }
            if ($batchKey === '') {
                $targetKey = trim((string)($r['prediction_target_key'] ?? $r['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
                if ($targetKey !== '') { $batchKey = 'target:' . $targetKey; }
            }
            if ($batchKey === '') { continue; }
            $groupKey = $batchKey . '|draw:' . $dd;
            if (!isset($batchGroups[$groupKey])) {
                $batchGroups[$groupKey] = array('draw_date' => $dd, 'rows' => array(), 'expected_total' => 0, 'has_batch_identity' => true);
            }
            $batchGroups[$groupKey]['rows'][] = $r;
            $batchTotal = (int)($r['batch_total'] ?? 0);
            if ($batchTotal > (int)$batchGroups[$groupKey]['expected_total']) { $batchGroups[$groupKey]['expected_total'] = $batchTotal; }
        }
        $bestBatchGroup = null;
        foreach ($batchGroups as $batchGroup) {
            $rowCount = count((array)($batchGroup['rows'] ?? array()));
            $expectedTotal = (int)($batchGroup['expected_total'] ?? 0);
            $isFullExpectedBatch = ($expectedTotal >= 9 && $rowCount >= min(9, $expectedTotal));
            $isNineRunGroup = ($rowCount >= 9);
            if (!$isFullExpectedBatch && !$isNineRunGroup) { continue; }
            if ($bestBatchGroup === null) { $bestBatchGroup = $batchGroup; continue; }
            $bestCount = count((array)($bestBatchGroup['rows'] ?? array()));
            $bestExpected = (int)($bestBatchGroup['expected_total'] ?? 0);
            $score = ($isFullExpectedBatch ? 100000 : 0) + ($isNineRunGroup ? 50000 : 0) + ($rowCount * 100) + $expectedTotal;
            $bestScore = (($bestExpected >= 9 && $bestCount >= min(9, $bestExpected)) ? 100000 : 0) + ($bestCount >= 9 ? 50000 : 0) + ($bestCount * 100) + $bestExpected;
            if ($score > $bestScore) { $bestBatchGroup = $batchGroup; }
        }
        if ($bestBatchGroup !== null && !empty($bestBatchGroup['rows'])) {
            $drawDate = (string)($bestBatchGroup['draw_date'] ?? $drawDate);
            $pendingForDraw = array_values((array)$bestBatchGroup['rows']);
        }
        $out['draw_date'] = $drawDate;

        $scoredRuns = max(0, (int)($context['scored_runs'] ?? count($completedRows)));
        $drawCycles = max(0, (int)($context['draw_cycles'] ?? 0));
        $completedCount = count($completedRows);
        $hasEnoughPending = count($pendingForDraw) >= 2;
        $hasBasicHistory = ($completedCount >= 3 || $scoredRuns >= 3);
        $hasStrongHistory = ($completedCount >= 5 && $scoredRuns >= 5 && $drawCycles >= 1);

        $scored = array();
        $hasHiveRanker = false;
        foreach ($pendingForDraw as $r) {
            $eval = mleAdvisoryPendingRunEvidenceScore($r, $context, array_column($scored, 'row'));
            $hiveEval = mleAdvisoryPendingRunHiveRecommendationScore($r, $context);
            $evidenceScore = (int)$eval['score'];
            $hiveScore = (int)$hiveEval['score'];
            $isHive = !empty($hiveEval['has_hive_profile']);
            if ($isHive) { $hasHiveRanker = true; }
            $finalScore = $isHive ? (int)round(($hiveScore * 0.72) + ($evidenceScore * 0.28)) : $evidenceScore;
            $r['pending_evidence_score'] = $evidenceScore;
            $r['pending_evidence_reason'] = (string)$eval['reason'];
            $r['pending_hive_score'] = $hiveScore;
            $r['pending_hive_reason'] = (string)$hiveEval['reason'];
            $r['pending_hive_source'] = (string)$hiveEval['source'];
            $r['pending_hive_governed'] = $isHive ? 1 : 0;
            $r['pending_recommendation_score'] = $finalScore;
            $r['pending_recommendation_source'] = $isHive ? (string)$hiveEval['source'] : 'Scored evidence fallback';
            $r['pending_has_numbers'] = !empty($eval['has_numbers']);
            $scored[] = array('row' => $r, 'score' => $finalScore, 'hive_score' => $hiveScore, 'evidence_score' => $evidenceScore);
        }
        usort($scored, static function($a, $b) use ($hasHiveRanker){
            if ($hasHiveRanker) {
                if ((int)$a['score'] !== (int)$b['score']) { return (int)$b['score'] - (int)$a['score']; }
                if ((int)$a['hive_score'] !== (int)$b['hive_score']) { return (int)$b['hive_score'] - (int)$a['hive_score']; }
            } else {
                if ((int)$a['evidence_score'] !== (int)$b['evidence_score']) { return (int)$b['evidence_score'] - (int)$a['evidence_score']; }
            }
            return strcmp((string)($a['row']['label'] ?? ''), (string)($b['row']['label'] ?? ''));
        });
        $ranked = array();
        foreach ($scored as $item) { $ranked[] = $item['row']; }
        $out['all'] = $ranked;
        $out['ranking_source'] = $hasHiveRanker ? 'hive_learned_settings' : 'scored_evidence_fallback';
        $out['ranking_source_label'] = $hasHiveRanker ? 'Hive learned settings' : 'Scored evidence fallback';

        $top = array_slice($ranked, 0, 2);
        $topScore = isset($top[0]) ? (int)($top[0]['pending_recommendation_score'] ?? $top[0]['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0) : 0;
        $secondScore = isset($top[1]) ? (int)($top[1]['pending_recommendation_score'] ?? $top[1]['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0) : 0;
        $avgScore = 0.0;
        if (!empty($ranked)) {
            foreach ($ranked as $r) { $avgScore += (int)($r['pending_recommendation_score'] ?? $r['pending_evidence_score'] ?? 0); }
            $avgScore = $avgScore / max(1, count($ranked));
        }
        $marginVsSecond = $topScore - $secondScore;
        $marginVsAvg = $topScore - $avgScore;
        $allTopHaveNumbers = !empty($top);
        foreach ($top as $r) { if (empty($r['pending_has_numbers'])) { $allTopHaveNumbers = false; } }

        if (!$hasEnoughPending || !$allTopHaveNumbers || !$hasBasicHistory) {
            $out['confidence'] = 'not_ready';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Not Ready';
            $out['top'] = array();
            $out['summary'] = 'SKAI has saved pending numbers for this draw, but there is not enough completed-run evidence to responsibly choose a top two yet.';
            $out['note'] = 'You may still review all pending runs. LottoExpert recommends waiting for more completed scored runs before treating any pending set as preferred.';
            return $out;
        }

        $out['top'] = $top;
        if ($hasStrongHistory && $topScore >= 78 && ($marginVsSecond >= 5 || $marginVsAvg >= 7)) {
            $out['confidence'] = 'strong';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Strong';
            $out['summary'] = $hasHiveRanker ? 'Top 2 recommendations are selected from the current Hive learned-settings profile for this lottery.' : 'Top 2 recommendations are available for this pending draw based on the strongest available scored evidence.';
            $out['note'] = 'These are still pending predictions, not guarantees. Review them first after the draw and score the full group.';
        } else {
            $out['confidence'] = 'limited';
            $out['confidence_label'] = 'Limited';
            $out['summary'] = $hasHiveRanker ? 'Hive can rank the saved pending runs, but the evidence margin is still limited.' : 'SKAI can rank the saved pending runs, but the evidence base is still thin or the score margin is not yet strong.';
            $out['note'] = $hasHiveRanker ? 'These are the best current pending options according to the Hive profile. Use caution until more completed draw cycles confirm the margin.' : 'These are the best current options from the saved pending runs, but use caution until more completed draw cycles build up.';
        }
        return $out;
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual(array $visualRows) {
    $scored = array_merge(
        (array)($visualRows['recent'] ?? array()),
        (array)($visualRows['older'] ?? array())
    );

    $upcomingExplicit = array();
    foreach ((array)($visualRows['upcoming'] ?? array()) as $uRow) {
        if (!is_array($uRow)) { continue; }
        if (!empty($uRow['status_explicit'])) {
            $upcomingExplicit[] = $uRow;
        }
    }

    $all = $scored;

    if (empty($all) && empty($upcomingExplicit)) {
        return array('has_recommendation' => false);
    }

    if (empty($all)) {

        $all = array();
    }

    $normalizeStatus = function ($status) {
        $status = strtolower(trim((string)$status));

        if (in_array($status, array('use_in_advice', 'use', 'keep', 'active'), true)) {
            return 'keep';
        }

        if (in_array($status, array('watch', 'review', 'keep_for_review'), true)) {
            return 'review';
        }

        if (in_array($status, array('retired', 'excluded', 'exclude', 'archive', 'archived', 'do_not_use'), true)) {
            return 'archive';
        }

        return '';
    };

    $sortRuns = function (array $rows) {
        usort($rows, function ($a, $b) {
            $aHits = (int)($a['total_hits'] ?? 0);
            $bHits = (int)($b['total_hits'] ?? 0);

            if ($bHits !== $aHits) {
                return $bHits - $aHits;
            }

            $aQuality = is_numeric($a['quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$a['quality_score'] : 0.0;
            $bQuality = is_numeric($b['quality_score'] ?? null) ? (float)$b['quality_score'] : 0.0;

            if (abs($bQuality - $aQuality) > 0.00001) {
                return ($bQuality > $aQuality) ? 1 : -1;
            }

            return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        });

        return $rows;
    };

    $explicitKeep = array();
    $explicitReview = array();
    $explicitArchive = array();
    $unassigned = array();

    foreach ($all as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) {
            continue;
        }

        $statusIsExplicit = !empty($row['status_explicit']);
        $statusGroup = $statusIsExplicit ? $normalizeStatus($row['status'] ?? '') : '';

        if ($statusGroup === 'keep') {
            $explicitKeep[] = $row;
        } elseif ($statusGroup === 'review') {
            $explicitReview[] = $row;
        } elseif ($statusGroup === 'archive') {
            $explicitArchive[] = $row;
        } else {
            $unassigned[] = $row;
        }
    }

    foreach ($upcomingExplicit as $uRow) {
        $uGroup = $normalizeStatus($uRow['status'] ?? '');
        if ($uGroup === 'keep') {
            $explicitKeep[] = $uRow;
        } elseif ($uGroup === 'review') {
            $explicitReview[] = $uRow;
        } else {

            $explicitArchive[] = $uRow;
        }
    }

    $unassigned = $sortRuns($unassigned);

    $totalUnassigned = count($unassigned);
    $autoKeepCount = min(2, $totalUnassigned);
    $autoReviewCount = min(3, max(0, $totalUnassigned - $autoKeepCount));

    $autoKeep = array_slice($unassigned, 0, $autoKeepCount);
    $autoReview = array_slice($unassigned, $autoKeepCount, $autoReviewCount);
    $autoArchive = array_slice($unassigned, $autoKeepCount + $autoReviewCount);

    $isStrongLearningRun = function (array $row) {
        $mainHits = (int)($row['main_hits'] ?? 0);
        $totalHits = (int)($row['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $actualMain = (array)($row['actual'] ?? array());
        $expectedMain = count($actualMain);
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) {
            $expectedMain = (int)($row['pick_count'] ?? $row['main_count'] ?? $row['target_pick_size'] ?? 0);
        }
        if ($expectedMain <= 0) {
            $expectedMain = max(5, $mainHits);
        }
        if ($expectedMain > 0 && $mainHits >= $expectedMain) {
            return true;
        }
        if ($expectedMain >= 5 && $mainHits >= ($expectedMain - 1)) {
            return true;
        }
        if ($totalHits >= 4 && $mainHits >= 3) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    };

    if (!empty($autoArchive)) {
        $guardedReview = array();
        $safeArchive = array();
        foreach ($autoArchive as $archRow) {
            if (is_array($archRow) && $isStrongLearningRun($archRow)) {
                $archRow['auto_reason'] = 'Strong hit result kept for review instead of auto-exclude.';
                $guardedReview[] = $archRow;
            } else {
                $safeArchive[] = $archRow;
            }
        }
        if (!empty($guardedReview)) {
            $autoReview = array_merge($autoReview, $guardedReview);
        }
        $autoArchive = $safeArchive;
    }

    return array(
        'has_recommendation' => true,
        'total_runs' => count($all) + count($upcomingExplicit),
        'keep' => $sortRuns(array_merge($explicitKeep, $autoKeep)),
        'review' => $sortRuns(array_merge($explicitReview, $autoReview)),
        'archive' => $sortRuns(array_merge($explicitArchive, $autoArchive))
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendation($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    $rows = isset($active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows']) ? $active[(int)$lotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $perf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $rows);
    return mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual(mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($rows, $perf));
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadSavedSettingsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $limit = 30) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $limit = max(1, min(100, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_settings');
    if (empty($cols)) { return array(); }
    $select = array(); foreach ($cols as $c) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($c); }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        if (in_array('status', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where('LOWER(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('status') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')) NOT IN (' . $db->quote('deleted') . ',' . $db->quote('archived') . ',' . $db->quote('retired') . ')');
        }
        if (in_array('created_at', $cols, true)) {
            $q->order($db->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC');
        } else {
            $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        }
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadNumbersToPlayForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $limit = 30) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $limit = max(1, min(100, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $cols = mleAdvisoryGetTableColumnsSafe($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) { return array(); }
    $select = array(); foreach ($cols as $c) { $select[] = 'sn.' . $db->quoteName($c); }
    try {
        $heatmapSourcesSql = array(
            $db->quote('heatmap_manual'),
            $db->quote('manual_heatmap'),
            $db->quote('heatmap'),
            $db->quote('heat_map'),
            $db->quote('frequency_heatmap'),
            $db->quote('frequency_map')
        );
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', 'sn'))
            ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where('sn.' . $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->where("(sn." . $db->quoteName('source') . " = " . $db->quote('strategy_set') . " OR LOWER(COALESCE(sn." . $db->quoteName('source') . ",'')) IN (" . implode(',', $heatmapSourcesSql) . "))");
        if (in_array('save_intent', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where("(sn.save_intent IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate') OR COALESCE(sn.save_intent,'') = '')");
        }
        if (in_array('play_status', $cols, true)) {
            $q->where("LOWER(COALESCE(sn.play_status,'')) NOT IN ('deleted','archived','retired')");
        }
        $q->order('COALESCE(sn.date_saved, sn.generated_at, sn.id) DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, $limit);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryInferPickSizeFromRows(array $rows) {
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        foreach (array('target_pick_size','daily_pick_size','pick_size') as $k) {
            if (isset($row[$k]) && (int)$row[$k] > 0) { return (int)$row[$k]; }
        }
        $nums = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if (!empty($nums)) { return count($nums); }
    }
    return 0;
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadFavoriteWheelsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $activeRows, $limit = 12) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $limit = max(1, min(50, (int)$limit));
    if ($userId <= 0) { return array(); }
    $pickSize = mleAdvisoryInferPickSizeFromRows($activeRows);
    $data = mylottoexpertLoadHydratedWheelFavorites($db, $userId);
    $items = isset($data['available']) && is_array($data['available']) ? $data['available'] : array();
    if (empty($items)) {
        $catalog = mylottoexpertLoadEffectiveCatalog($db);
        $items = is_array($catalog) ? array_values($catalog) : array();
    }
    $out = array();
    foreach ($items as $item) {
        $itemPick = (int)($item['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        if ($pickSize > 0 && $itemPick > 0 && $itemPick !== $pickSize) { continue; }
        $out[] = $item;
        if (count($out) >= $limit) { break; }
    }
    return $out;
}

function mleAdvisoryFormatSavedSettingName(array $row) {
    foreach (array('setting_name','name','label','template_name') as $k) {
        if (isset($row[$k]) && trim((string)$row[$k]) !== '') { return trim((string)$row[$k]); }
    }
    return 'Saved settings #' . (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
}

function mleCoreAiIsSavedRow($row) {

    $method = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row) : '';
    return $method === 'core_ai';
}

function mleCoreAiDecodeNumbersForOverlap($row) {
    $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings') ? mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row) : array();
    foreach (array('main_display_json','regular_main_numbers_json','ranked_main_numbers_json','top20_numbers','top_numbers','main_numbers') as $k) {
        $raw = null;
        if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($k, $row)) { $raw = $row[$k]; }
        if (($raw === null || $raw === '') && is_array($settings) && array_key_exists($k, $settings)) { $raw = $settings[$k]; }
        if ($raw === null || $raw === '') { continue; }
        $numbers = function_exists('mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray') ? mylottoexpertNormalizeNumberArray($raw, false) : array();
        if (!empty($numbers)) { return array_slice(array_values($numbers), 0, 20); }
    }
    return array();
}

function mleCoreAiExtractFocusBlend($row) {
    $settings = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings') ? mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($row) : array();
    $get = function($keys, $default = '') use ($row, $settings) {
        foreach ((array)$keys as $k) {
            if (is_array($settings) && array_key_exists($k, $settings) && $settings[$k] !== '' && $settings[$k] !== null) { return $settings[$k]; }
            if (is_array($row) && array_key_exists($k, $row) && $row[$k] !== '' && $row[$k] !== null) { return $row[$k]; }
            if (is_object($row) && isset($row->$k) && $row->$k !== '' && $row->$k !== null) { return $row->$k; }
        }
        return $default;
    };

    $focus = trim((string)$get(array('focus_profile','risk_profile','profile','training_style'), 'Balanced Focus'));
    if ($focus === '') { $focus = 'Balanced Focus'; }
    $focusKey = strtolower(trim(str_replace(array('_','-'), ' ', $focus)));
    if ($focusKey === 'balanced') { $focus = 'Balanced Focus'; }
    elseif ($focusKey === 'explorative') { $focus = 'Explorative Focus'; }
    elseif ($focusKey === 'conservative') { $focus = 'Conservative Focus'; }
    else { $focus = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($focus); }

    $blendRaw = $get(array(
        'signal_blend_pct',
        'signal_blend_ai_pct',
        'core_ai_blend_pct',
        'core_ai_ai_pct',
        'ai_pct',
        'blend_ai_pct',
        'blend_percent',
        'blend_pct',
        'ai_blend_pct'
    ), null);
    $skipRaw = $get(array('signal_blend_skip_pct','core_ai_skip_pct','skip_pct','blend_skip_pct'), null);

    if ($blendRaw !== null && $blendRaw !== '') {
        $blendPct = max(0.0, min(100.0, (float)$blendRaw));
    } elseif ($skipRaw !== null && $skipRaw !== '') {
        $blendPct = max(0.0, min(100.0, 100.0 - (float)$skipRaw));
    } else {
        $blendPct = null;
    }

    $label = trim((string)$get(array('signal_blend_label','strategy_profile','strategy','blend'), ''));
    if ($label === '') {
        if ($blendPct !== null) {
            if ($blendPct >= 70) { $label = 'AI-Forward'; }
            elseif ($blendPct <= 30) { $label = 'Skip-Pattern Heavy'; }
            else { $label = 'Balanced Mix'; }
        } else {
            $label = 'Balanced Mix';
        }
    }

    $blendText = $blendPct !== null ? mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($blendPct) . '%' : 'Still forming';
    $display = $blendText;
    if ($label !== '' && $label !== 'Still forming') {
        $display .= ' - ' . $label;
    }

    return array(
        'focus'        => $focus,
        'blend_pct'    => $blendPct,
        'ai_pct'       => $blendPct,
