        'skip_pct'     => ($blendPct !== null ? 100.0 - (float)$blendPct : null),
        'label'        => $label,
        'blend_display'=> $display,
    );
}

function mleCoreAiBuildBatchSummaries(array $activeRows, array $perfRows) {
    $perfBySaved = array();
    foreach ($perfRows as $p) {
        $sid = (int)($p['__saved_id'] ?? $p['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid > 0) { $perfBySaved[$sid][] = $p; }
    }
    $groups = array();
    foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
        if (!mleCoreAiIsSavedRow($row)) { continue; }
        $batchUuid = strtolower(trim((string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? '')));
        if ($batchUuid === '') {
            $batchUuid = 'single:' . (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        }
        if (!isset($groups[$batchUuid])) {
            $groups[$batchUuid] = array(
                'batch_uuid' => $batchUuid,
                'batch_type' => (string)($row['batch_type'] ?? ''),
                'target_draw_date' => (string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? $row['next_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                'target_game_id' => (string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['mle_lottery_game_id'] ?? ''),
                'batch_total' => max(1, (int)($row['batch_total'] ?? 0)),
                'rows' => array(), 'indexes' => array(), 'saved_count'=>0, 'scored_count'=>0,
                'overlap'=>array(), 'focus_counts'=>array(), 'blend_counts'=>array(), 'best_scored'=>null
            );
        }
        $idx = (int)($row['batch_index'] ?? 0);
        if ($idx > 0) { $groups[$batchUuid]['indexes'][$idx] = 1; }
        $groups[$batchUuid]['rows'][] = $row;
        $groups[$batchUuid]['saved_count']++;
        $sid = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        $fb = mleCoreAiExtractFocusBlend($row);
        $focusKey = trim((string)$fb['focus']);
        $blendKey = trim((string)($fb['blend_display'] ?? $fb['label'] ?? ''));
        if ($focusKey !== '') { $groups[$batchUuid]['focus_counts'][$focusKey] = ($groups[$batchUuid]['focus_counts'][$focusKey] ?? 0) + 1; }
        if ($blendKey !== '') { $groups[$batchUuid]['blend_counts'][$blendKey] = ($groups[$batchUuid]['blend_counts'][$blendKey] ?? 0) + 1; }
        foreach (mleCoreAiDecodeNumbersForOverlap($row) as $n) {
            $n = (int)$n; if ($n <= 0) { continue; }
            $groups[$batchUuid]['overlap'][$n] = ($groups[$batchUuid]['overlap'][$n] ?? 0) + 1;
        }
        if ($sid > 0 && !empty($perfBySaved[$sid])) {
            $groups[$batchUuid]['scored_count'] += count($perfBySaved[$sid]);
            foreach ($perfBySaved[$sid] as $p) {
                $score = (float)($p['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0) + ((int)($p['top20_hits'] ?? 0) * 0.25) + ((int)($p['top10_hits'] ?? 0) * 0.5) - ((float)($p['avg_winning_rank'] ?? 9999) * 0.01);
                if ($groups[$batchUuid]['best_scored'] === null || $score > (float)$groups[$batchUuid]['best_scored']['_score']) {
                    $best = $fb;
                    $best['saved_id'] = $sid;
                    $best['avg_rank'] = $p['avg_winning_rank'] ?? null;
                    $best['top10_hits'] = (int)($p['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
                    $best['top20_hits'] = (int)($p['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
                    $best['_score'] = $score;
                    $groups[$batchUuid]['best_scored'] = $best;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    $out = array();
    foreach ($groups as $g) {
        $total = (int)$g['batch_total'];
        if ($total <= 1 && $g['saved_count'] >= 2) { $total = 9; }
        $missing = max(0, $total - count($g['indexes']));
        arsort($g['overlap']);
        arsort($g['focus_counts']);
        arsort($g['blend_counts']);
        $topOverlap = array();
        foreach (array_slice($g['overlap'], 0, 10, true) as $num=>$cnt) { $topOverlap[] = array('number'=>(int)$num,'count'=>(int)$cnt); }
        $out[] = array(
            'batch_uuid'=>$g['batch_uuid'],
            'batch_type'=>$g['batch_type'] !== '' ? $g['batch_type'] : 'core_ai_precision_lock_9_batch',
            'target_draw_date'=>$g['target_draw_date'],
            'target_game_id'=>$g['target_game_id'],
            'batch_total'=>$total,
            'saved_count'=>(int)$g['saved_count'],
            'missing_count'=>$missing,
            'scored_count'=>(int)$g['scored_count'],
            'status'=>$missing > 0 ? 'partial' : ((int)$g['scored_count'] > 0 ? 'scored' : 'pending'),
            'top_overlap'=>$topOverlap,
            'top_focus'=>!empty($g['focus_counts']) ? (string)key($g['focus_counts']) : 'Still forming',
            'top_blend'=>!empty($g['blend_counts']) ? (string)key($g['blend_counts']) : 'Still forming',
            'top_blend_label'=>!empty($g['blend_counts']) ? (string)key($g['blend_counts']) : 'Still forming',
            'best_scored'=>$g['best_scored'],
        );
    }
    usort($out, function($a,$b){ return strcmp((string)($b['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['target_draw_date'] ?? '')); });
    return array('has_core_ai'=>!empty($out), 'batches'=>$out, 'batch_count'=>count($out));
}

function mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($method) {
    $method = strtolower(trim((string)$method));
    if ($method === '') { return 'unknown'; }
    if (in_array($method, array('skai','skai_prediction','skai_blend'), true)) { return 'skai'; }
    if (in_array($method, array('core_ai','core-ai','core ai','core_ai_prediction','lottoexpert_core_ai','ai_prediction','ai','neural','neural_ai','neural_ai_prediction','classic_ai','classic_ai_prediction'), true)) { return 'core_ai'; }
    if (in_array($method, array('mcmc','mcmc_prediction'), true)) { return 'mcmc'; }
    if (in_array($method, array('skip','skiphit','skip_hit','skip_hit_prediction'), true)) { return 'skip_hit'; }
    if (in_array($method, array('frequency','frequency_map','heat_map','heatmap','heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','frequency_heatmap'), true)) { return 'frequency'; }
    return $method;
}

function mleAdvisoryMethodBreakdownRow($method) {
    $method = mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($method);
    $role = function_exists('mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo') ? mleAdvisoryMethodRoleInfo($method) : array();
    $label = function_exists('mleAdvisoryMethodLabel') ? mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($method) : ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $method));
    return array(
        'method' => $method,
        'label' => (string)$label,
        'role' => (string)($role['role'] ?? 'Comparison Signal'),
        'track' => (string)($role['short_track'] ?? ($role['track'] ?? 'Comparison Track')),
        'saved_count' => 0,
        'pending_count' => 0,
        'past_due_count' => 0,
        'scored_count' => 0,
        'scored_saved_count' => 0,
        'draw_count' => 0,
        'target_draws' => array(),
        'scored_draws' => array(),
        'batch_count' => 0,
        'partial_batch_count' => 0,
        'saved_ids' => array(),
        'saved_rows' => array(),
        'scored_saved_ids' => array(),
        'batch_uuids' => array(),
        'top20_total' => 0,
        'top10_total' => 0,
        'quality_total' => 0.0,
        'avg_rank_sum' => 0.0,
        'unknown_trace_rows' => array(),
        'unknown_phantom_sources' => array(),
    );
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildMethodRunBreakdown(array $activeRows, array $perfRows, array $visualRows = array()) {

    $knownOrder = array('skai','core_ai','mcmc','skip_hit','frequency');
    $rows = array();
    foreach ($knownOrder as $m) { $rows[$m] = mleAdvisoryMethodBreakdownRow($m); }

    $safeDate = function($value) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '' || strncmp($value, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { return ''; }
        $ts = strtotime($value);
        return $ts ? date('Y-m-d', $ts) : substr($value, 0, 10);
    };
    $addPendingVisual = function(&$bucket, array $vrow) use ($safeDate) {
        $label = trim((string)($vrow['label'] ?? 'Pending run'));
        if ($label === '') { $label = 'Pending run'; }
        $bucket[] = array(
            'saved_id' => (int)($vrow['saved_id'] ?? 0),
            'label' => $label,
            'draw_date' => $safeDate($vrow['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'method_label' => (string)($vrow['method_label'] ?? ''),
            'numbers_count' => count((array)($vrow['predicted'] ?? array())) + count((array)($vrow['predicted_extra'] ?? array())),
            'is_daily' => !empty($vrow['is_daily']) ? 1 : 0,
        );
    };

    $activeRowBySavedId = array();
    foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        $method = mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($row['__method_key'] ?? ($row['source'] ?? 'unknown'));
        if ($method === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        if (!isset($rows[$method])) { $rows[$method] = mleAdvisoryMethodBreakdownRow($method); }
        if ($method === 'unknown' && function_exists('mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource') && mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource($row, array())) {
            $pkey = 'active_' . count($rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources']);
            $rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources'][$pkey] = mleV69BuildUnknownSourceProvenance($row, array(), 'activeRows');
            continue;
        }
        $id = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($id > 0) { $activeRowBySavedId[$id] = $row; }
        if ($id > 0) { $rows[$method]['saved_ids'][$id] = true; }
        $targetDate = $safeDate($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ($row['next_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $savedLabel = trim((string)($row['label'] ?? 'Saved run'));
        if ($savedLabel === '') { $savedLabel = 'Saved run'; }
        if ($id > 0 && !isset($rows[$method]['saved_rows'][$id])) {
            $rows[$method]['saved_rows'][$id] = array(
                'saved_id' => $id,
                'label' => $savedLabel,
                'draw_date' => $targetDate,
                'source' => (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
                'batch_uuid' => (string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'batch_index' => (int)($row['batch_index'] ?? 0),
                'batch_total' => (int)($row['batch_total'] ?? 0),
                'status' => (string)($row['play_status'] ?? $row['status'] ?? ''),
            );
        }
        if ($method === 'unknown' && function_exists('mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow')) {
            $traceId = $id > 0 ? $id : count($rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows']) + 1;
            $rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows'][$traceId] = mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow($row);
        }
        $rows[$method]['saved_count'] = count($rows[$method]['saved_ids']);

        if ($targetDate !== '') { $rows[$method]['target_draws'][$targetDate] = true; }
        $batchUuid = strtolower(trim((string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? '')));
        if ($batchUuid !== '') { $rows[$method]['batch_uuids'][$batchUuid] = true; }
    }

    foreach ($perfRows as $perf) {
        if (!is_array($perf)) { continue; }
        $method = mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($perf['__method_key'] ?? ($perf['source'] ?? 'unknown'));
        if ($method === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        if (!isset($rows[$method])) { $rows[$method] = mleAdvisoryMethodBreakdownRow($method); }
        $sid = (int)($perf['__saved_id'] ?? $perf['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($sid > 0) { $rows[$method]['scored_saved_ids'][$sid] = true; }
        $rows[$method]['scored_count']++;
        $drawDate = $safeDate($perf['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($drawDate !== '') { $rows[$method]['scored_draws'][$drawDate] = true; }
        $rows[$method]['top20_total'] += (int)($perf['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
        $rows[$method]['top10_total'] += (int)($perf['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
        $rows[$method]['quality_total'] += (float)($perf['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0.0);
        if (isset($perf['avg_winning_rank']) && $perf['avg_winning_rank'] !== null && $perf['avg_winning_rank'] !== '') {
            $rows[$method]['avg_rank_sum'] += (float)$perf['avg_winning_rank'];
        }
    }

    $visualFlatRows = array();
    foreach ($visualRows as $__visualBucketKey => $__visualBucketRows) {
        if (!is_array($__visualBucketRows)) { continue; }

        if (array_key_exists('saved_id', $__visualBucketRows)
            || array_key_exists('predicted', $__visualBucketRows)
            || array_key_exists('method', $__visualBucketRows)
            || array_key_exists('completed', $__visualBucketRows)) {
            $visualFlatRows[] = $__visualBucketRows;
            continue;
        }
        foreach ($__visualBucketRows as $__visualCandidateRow) {
            if (is_array($__visualCandidateRow)) { $visualFlatRows[] = $__visualCandidateRow; }
        }
    }

    $pendingSeen = array();
    foreach ($visualFlatRows as $vrow) {
        if (!is_array($vrow)) { continue; }
        if (!empty($vrow['completed'])) { continue; }
        $method = mleAdvisoryNormalizeMethodBreakdownKey($vrow['method'] ?? 'unknown');
        if ($method === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
        if (!isset($rows[$method])) { $rows[$method] = mleAdvisoryMethodBreakdownRow($method); }
        $sid = (int)($vrow['saved_id'] ?? 0);
        $drawDate = $safeDate($vrow['draw_date'] ?? '');
        $key = $method . '|' . $sid . '|' . $drawDate;
        if (isset($pendingSeen[$key])) { continue; }
        if ($method === 'unknown' && function_exists('mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource')) {
            $traceSourceRow = ($sid > 0 && isset($activeRowBySavedId[$sid])) ? $activeRowBySavedId[$sid] : $vrow;
            if (mleV69IsPhantomUnknownSource($traceSourceRow, $vrow)) {
                $pkey = $key !== 'unknown||' ? $key : ('visual_' . count($rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources']));
                $rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources'][$pkey] = mleV69BuildUnknownSourceProvenance($traceSourceRow, $vrow, 'visualRows');
                $pendingSeen[$key] = true;
                continue;
            }
        }
        $pendingSeen[$key] = true;
        $__mlePastDue = ($drawDate !== '' && strtotime($drawDate) < strtotime(date('Y-m-d')));
        if ($__mlePastDue) {
            if (!isset($rows[$method]['past_due_count'])) { $rows[$method]['past_due_count'] = 0; }
            $rows[$method]['past_due_count']++;
        } else {
            $rows[$method]['pending_count']++;
        }
        if ($drawDate !== '') { $rows[$method]['target_draws'][$drawDate] = true; }
        if (!isset($rows[$method]['pending_rows']) || !is_array($rows[$method]['pending_rows'])) { $rows[$method]['pending_rows'] = array(); }
        $addPendingVisual($rows[$method]['pending_rows'], $vrow);
        if ($method === 'unknown' && function_exists('mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow')) {
            $traceSourceRow = ($sid > 0 && isset($activeRowBySavedId[$sid])) ? $activeRowBySavedId[$sid] : $vrow;
            $traceId = $sid > 0 ? $sid : ('visual_' . count($rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows']));
            $rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows'][$traceId] = mleV65BuildUnknownRunTraceRow($traceSourceRow, $vrow);
        }
    }

    foreach ($rows as $method => $row) {
        $savedIds = array_keys($row['saved_ids']);
        $scoredSavedIds = array_keys($row['scored_saved_ids']);
        $rows[$method]['saved_count'] = count($savedIds);
        $rows[$method]['scored_saved_count'] = count($scoredSavedIds);
        $rows[$method]['draw_count'] = count($row['scored_draws']);
        $rows[$method]['batch_count'] = count($row['batch_uuids']);
        $rows[$method]['saved_rows_list'] = array_values((array)$row['saved_rows']);
        usort($rows[$method]['saved_rows_list'], function($a, $b) {
            $ad = strtotime((string)($a['draw_date'] ?? '')) ?: 0;
            $bd = strtotime((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? '')) ?: 0;
            if ($ad !== $bd) { return $bd <=> $ad; }
            return ((int)($b['saved_id'] ?? 0)) <=> ((int)($a['saved_id'] ?? 0));
        });
        $rows[$method]['target_draw_list'] = array_keys($row['target_draws']);
        rsort($rows[$method]['target_draw_list']);
        $rows[$method]['scored_draw_list'] = array_keys($row['scored_draws']);
        rsort($rows[$method]['scored_draw_list']);
        $rawUnknownTraceRows = array_values((array)($rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows'] ?? array()));
        if ($method === 'unknown' && function_exists('mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity')) {
            $keptUnknownTraceRows = array();
            foreach ($rawUnknownTraceRows as $traceCandidate) {
                if (is_array($traceCandidate) && mleV69TraceHasMeaningfulIdentity($traceCandidate)) { $keptUnknownTraceRows[] = $traceCandidate; }
                else {
                    $pkey = 'trace_' . count($rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources']);
                    $rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources'][$pkey] = array(
                        'origin' => 'unknown_trace_rows',
                        'admin_message' => 'An Unknown trace candidate was suppressed because it did not include a real saved row identity or usable source data.',
                        'has_meaningful_identity' => 0,
                    );
                }
            }
            $rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows_list'] = $keptUnknownTraceRows;
        } else {
            $rows[$method]['unknown_trace_rows_list'] = $rawUnknownTraceRows;
        }
        $rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources_list'] = array_values((array)($rows[$method]['unknown_phantom_sources'] ?? array()));
        $rows[$method]['avg_top20'] = $row['scored_count'] > 0 ? round($row['top20_total'] / max(1, $row['scored_count']), 2) : null;
        $rows[$method]['avg_top10'] = $row['scored_count'] > 0 ? round($row['top10_total'] / max(1, $row['scored_count']), 2) : null;
        $rows[$method]['avg_quality'] = $row['scored_count'] > 0 ? round($row['quality_total'] / max(1, $row['scored_count']), 6) : null;
        $rows[$method]['avg_rank'] = $row['scored_count'] > 0 ? round($row['avg_rank_sum'] / max(1, $row['scored_count']), 2) : null;
        if ($rows[$method]['pending_count'] > 0 && $rows[$method]['scored_count'] > 0) { $status = 'mixed'; }
        elseif ($rows[$method]['pending_count'] > 0) { $status = 'pending'; }
        elseif ($rows[$method]['scored_count'] > 0) { $status = 'scored'; }
        elseif ($rows[$method]['saved_count'] > 0) { $status = 'saved'; }
        else { $status = 'empty'; }
        $rows[$method]['status'] = $status;
    }

    $hasAnyMethodData = false;
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        if ((int)($row['saved_count'] ?? 0) > 0 || (int)($row['scored_count'] ?? 0) > 0 || (int)($row['pending_count'] ?? 0) > 0) {
            $hasAnyMethodData = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    $items = $hasAnyMethodData ? array_values($rows) : array();
    usort($items, function($a, $b) use ($knownOrder) {
        $pa = array_search($a['method'], $knownOrder, true); if ($pa === false) { $pa = 99; }
        $pb = array_search($b['method'], $knownOrder, true); if ($pb === false) { $pb = 99; }
        if ($pa !== $pb) { return $pa <=> $pb; }
        return strcmp((string)$a['label'], (string)$b['label']);
    });
    return array(
        'has_methods' => !empty($items),
        'items' => $items,
        'pending_total' => array_sum(array_map(function($row){ return (int)($row['pending_count'] ?? 0); }, $items)),
        'past_due_total' => array_sum(array_map(function($row){ return (int)($row['past_due_count'] ?? 0); }, $items)),
        'scored_total' => array_sum(array_map(function($row){ return (int)($row['scored_count'] ?? 0); }, $items)),
        'saved_total' => array_sum(array_map(function($row){ return (int)($row['saved_count'] ?? 0); }, $items)),
        'unknown_phantom_sources' => array_values((array)($rows['unknown']['unknown_phantom_sources'] ?? array())),
        'unknown_phantom_count' => count((array)($rows['unknown']['unknown_phantom_sources'] ?? array())),
    );
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryPersistCompletedVisualRuns')) {
    function mleAdvisoryPersistCompletedVisualRuns($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $lotteryName, array $visualRows, array $savedById) {
        $result = array(
            'attempted' => 0,
            'saved' => 0,
            'skipped' => 0,
            'errors' => array(),
            'checked_at' => date('Y-m-d H:i:s')
        );
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || !function_exists('skaiUpsertPerformanceRecord')) {
            return $result;
        }
        $allRows = array();
        foreach (array('recent','older') as $bucket) {
            foreach ((array)($visualRows[$bucket] ?? array()) as $row) {
                if (is_array($row)) { $allRows[] = $row; }
            }
        }
        $seen = array();
        foreach ($allRows as $vrow) {
            if (empty($vrow['completed'])) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            $savedId = (int)($vrow['saved_id'] ?? $vrow['source_record_id'] ?? 0);
            if ($savedId <= 0) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            $drawDate = trim((string)($vrow['draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($drawDate === '' || strncmp($drawDate, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            $drawTs = strtotime($drawDate);
            if ($drawTs === false || $drawTs <= 0) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            $drawDate = date('Y-m-d', $drawTs);
            $key = $savedId . '|' . $drawDate;
            if (isset($seen[$key])) { continue; }
            $seen[$key] = true;
            $predMain = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($vrow['predicted'] ?? array())));
            $actualMain = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($vrow['actual'] ?? array())));
            if (empty($predMain) || empty($actualMain)) { $result['skipped']++; continue; }
            $savedRow = isset($savedById[$savedId]) && is_array($savedById[$savedId]) ? $savedById[$savedId] : array();
            $settings = array();
            foreach (array('settings_json','settings','params_json','params') as $jsonKey) {
                if (!empty($savedRow[$jsonKey])) {
                    $decoded = json_decode((string)$savedRow[$jsonKey], true);
                    if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($decoded)) { $settings = $decoded; break; }
                }
            }
            $targetMeta = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolvePredictionTargetMeta') ? mylottoexpertResolvePredictionTargetMeta($savedRow) : array();
            $lineageMeta = function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveRunLineageMeta') ? mylottoexpertResolveRunLineageMeta($savedRow) : array();
            $metrics = function_exists('skaiCalcWinningRankMetrics') ? skaiCalcWinningRankMetrics($predMain, $actualMain) : array(
                'avg_rank'=>null,'best_rank'=>null,'worst_rank'=>null,'median_rank'=>null,
                'weighted_score'=>0.0,'top10_hits'=>0,'top20_hits'=>0,'top30_hits'=>0,'top50_hits'=>0,'missing_count'=>0
            );
            $source = (string)($savedRow['source'] ?? $vrow['source'] ?? '');
            $methodKey = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey') ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($savedRow) : $source;
            $labels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels') ? mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($methodKey) : array('', '');
            $runDate = (string)($savedRow['generated_at'] ?? $savedRow['date_saved'] ?? '');
            $blendInfo = function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo') ? mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($savedRow, $settings) : array('ai'=>null,'skip'=>null,'strategy_label'=>'');
            $data = array(
                'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
                'lottery_name' => (string)$lotteryName,
                'draw_date' => $drawDate,
                'run_date' => $runDate,
                'run_id' => $savedId,
                'run_uuid' => (string)($lineageMeta['run_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'snapshot_run_uuid' => (string)($lineageMeta['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'run_identity_key' => (string)($lineageMeta['run_identity_key'] ?? ('rowid:' . $savedId)),
                'prediction_target_id' => (string)($targetMeta['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
                'prediction_target_key' => (string)($targetMeta['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
                'target_game_id' => (string)($targetMeta['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
                'target_lottery_id' => (int)($targetMeta['target_lottery_id'] ?? $lotteryId),
                'target_draw_date' => (string)($targetMeta['target_draw_date'] ?? $drawDate),
                'target_draw_at' => (string)($targetMeta['target_draw_at'] ?? ''),
                'target_draw_session' => (string)($targetMeta['target_draw_session'] ?? ''),
                'target_timezone_id' => (string)($targetMeta['target_timezone_id'] ?? ''),
                'target_prediction_family' => (string)($targetMeta['target_prediction_family'] ?? ''),
                'target_prediction_type' => (string)($targetMeta['target_prediction_type'] ?? ''),
                'source' => $source,
                'analysis_method_key' => (string)$methodKey,
                'analysis_engine_label' => (string)($labels[0] ?? ''),
                'analysis_track_label' => (string)($labels[1] ?? ''),
                'actual_numbers' => $actualMain,
                'predicted_ranking' => $predMain,
                'avg_winning_rank' => $metrics['avg_rank'] ?? null,
                'best_winning_rank' => $metrics['best_rank'] ?? null,
                'worst_winning_rank' => $metrics['worst_rank'] ?? null,
                'median_winning_rank' => $metrics['median_rank'] ?? null,
                'weighted_quality_score' => $metrics['weighted_score'] ?? 0.0,
                'top10_hits' => (int)($metrics['top10_hits'] ?? 0),
                'top20_hits' => (int)($metrics['top20_hits'] ?? 0),
                'top30_hits' => (int)($metrics['top30_hits'] ?? 0),
                'top50_hits' => (int)($metrics['top50_hits'] ?? 0),
                'missing_hits_count' => (int)($metrics['missing_count'] ?? 0),
                'combo_hit_summary' => array('hits_main'=>(int)($vrow['main_hits'] ?? 0),'hits_extra'=>(int)($vrow['extra_hits'] ?? 0)),
                'tail_enabled' => 0,
                'tail_active' => 0,
                'tail_promoted_count' => 0,
                'tail_promoted_hit_count' => 0,
                'calibration_enabled' => 0,
                'calibration_active' => 0,
                'shared_learning_enabled' => 0,
                'pairwise_enabled' => 0,
                'gibbs_enabled' => 0,
                'live_tuning_enabled' => 0,
                'confidence_level' => 'scored',
                'trend_bucket' => 'auto_scored_exact_draw',
                'notes' => array(
                    'auto_scored_from_visual_row' => true,
                    'scoring_rule' => 'exact_draw_saved_prediction_only',
                    'actual_source' => (string)($vrow['actual_source'] ?? 'official_draw_result'),
                    'run_ai_pct' => $blendInfo['ai'] ?? null,
                    'run_skip_pct' => $blendInfo['skip'] ?? null,
                    'run_strategy_family' => $blendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? '',
                ),
            );
            $result['attempted']++;
            try {
                if (skaiUpsertPerformanceRecord($db, $userId, $data)) { $result['saved']++; }
                else { $result['skipped']++; }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $result['errors'][] = 'Saved run ' . $savedId . ': scoring write failed.';
            }
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildScoringStatusSummary')) {
    function mleAdvisoryBuildScoringStatusSummary(array $visualRows, array $methodBreakdown, array $autoScoreResult = array()) {
        $out = array(
            'status' => 'no_runs',
            'title' => 'No saved runs yet',
            'message' => 'Save prediction runs for upcoming draws. LottoExpert will score eligible saved runs automatically after official results are available.',
            'pending_total' => (int)($methodBreakdown['pending_total'] ?? 0),
            'scored_total' => (int)($methodBreakdown['scored_total'] ?? 0),
            'saved_total' => (int)($methodBreakdown['saved_total'] ?? 0),
            'completed_visible' => 0,
            'future_waiting' => 0,
            'missing_result' => 0,
            'scoreable_pending' => 0,
            'score_action_available' => false,
            'auto_scored' => (int)($autoScoreResult['saved'] ?? 0),
            'errors' => (array)($autoScoreResult['errors'] ?? array())
        );

        $today = strtotime(date('Y-m-d'));
        foreach ((array)($visualRows['recent'] ?? array()) as $row) {
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row['completed'])) { $out['completed_visible']++; }
        }
        foreach ((array)($visualRows['older'] ?? array()) as $row) {
            if (is_array($row) && !empty($row['completed'])) { $out['completed_visible']++; }
        }
        foreach ((array)($visualRows['upcoming'] ?? array()) as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
            $dd = trim((string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? $row['draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($dd !== '' && strpos($dd, '0000-00-00') === 0) { $dd = ''; }
            $ts = $dd !== '' ? strtotime(substr($dd, 0, 10)) : false;
            $hasOfficialForThisPendingTarget = !empty($row['actual_official_found'])
                && (!empty($row['actual']) || !empty($row['actual_extra']));
            if ($hasOfficialForThisPendingTarget) {
                $out['scoreable_pending']++;
            } elseif ($ts !== false && $ts < $today) {
                $out['missing_result']++;
            } else {
                $out['future_waiting']++;
            }
        }
        if ($out['auto_scored'] > 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'scored_now';
            $out['title'] = 'Scoring updated now';
            $out['message'] = $out['auto_scored'] . ' saved run' . ($out['auto_scored'] === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' were matched to an official result and converted into scored evidence.';
        } elseif ($out['pending_total'] > 0 && $out['scoreable_pending'] > 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'scoreable';
            $out['title'] = 'Automatic scoring is ready';
            $out['message'] = 'The official result for the exact pending draw is available. LottoExpert will score the saved runs automatically and update the evidence. No user action is required.';
            $out['score_action_available'] = false;
        } elseif ($out['pending_total'] > 0 && $out['missing_result'] > 0 && $out['future_waiting'] <= 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'needs_result_or_match';
            $out['title'] = 'Waiting for exact official result match';
            $out['message'] = 'Some saved runs are past their target date, but LottoExpert has not confirmed the exact official result match yet. The system will keep checking automatically. If this persists, the admin audit can review the draw date, game id, draw session, and result import.';
        } elseif ($out['pending_total'] > 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'waiting';
            $out['title'] = 'Runs are saved and waiting for the draw';
            $out['message'] = 'Saved runs will become scored evidence automatically after the official result for the same target draw is available.';
        } elseif ($out['scored_total'] > 0 || $out['completed_visible'] > 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'scored';
            $out['title'] = 'Checked evidence is available';
            $out['message'] = 'These scored records are exact-draw comparisons. They do not pull better historical runs from other drawings.';
        } elseif ($out['saved_total'] > 0) {
            $out['status'] = 'saved_only';
            $out['title'] = 'Saved runs exist, but none are scored yet';
            $out['message'] = 'Saved runs are pre-draw predictions. LottoExpert scores them automatically after the official result is matched to their target draw.';
        }
        if (!empty($out['errors'])) {
            $out['status'] = 'error';
            $out['title'] = 'Scoring needs attention';
            $out['message'] = 'LottoExpert found runs that may be ready for automatic scoring, but one or more scoring writes failed. This is a system review item; no regular user action is required.';
        }
        return $out;
    }
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildLotteryCard($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $lotteryName = '', $preloadedActive = null) {
    $userId=(int)$userId; $lotteryId=(int)$lotteryId;
    $empty=array('lottery_id'=>$lotteryId,'game_id'=>'','target_game_id'=>'','lottery_name'=>$lotteryName,'has_data'=>false,'top_method'=>null,'leaderboard'=>array(),'settings_advice'=>array('has_advice'=>false),'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0,0),'stats'=>array(),'visual_runs'=>array('recent'=>array(),'older'=>array(),'upcoming'=>array()),'batch_cleanup'=>null,'prediction_summary'=>array(),'saved_settings'=>array(),'numbers_to_play'=>array(),'wheel_systems'=>array(),'precision_lock'=>array(),'recommendation_level'=>array(),'precision_progress'=>array(),'recommended_skai_batch_test'=>array(),'method_run_breakdown'=>array('has_methods'=>false,'items'=>array(),'pending_total'=>0,'scored_total'=>0,'saved_total'=>0),'scoring_status'=>array('status'=>'no_runs','title'=>'No saved runs yet','message'=>'Save prediction runs for upcoming draws. LottoExpert will score eligible saved runs automatically after official results are available.','pending_total'=>0,'scored_total'=>0,'saved_total'=>0),'shared_skai_learning_profile'=>array('available'=>false,'status'=>'unavailable','message'=>'Shared SKAI learning is not available yet.'),'history_window_evidence_verification'=>array('available'=>false,'reason'=>'No lottery evidence loaded yet.'),'full_skai_settings_evidence_mapper'=>array('available'=>false,'status'=>'collecting','message'=>'Full SKAI settings learning has no lottery evidence loaded yet.'),'closed_loop_skai_recommendation_intelligence'=>array('available'=>false,'status'=>'collecting','message'=>'Closed-loop SKAI intelligence has no lottery evidence loaded yet.'));
    if ($userId<=0 || $lotteryId<=0) { return $empty; }
    $activeAll=(is_array($preloadedActive)&&!empty($preloadedActive))?$preloadedActive:mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db,$userId);
    $activeRows=isset($activeAll[$lotteryId]['rows'])?$activeAll[$lotteryId]['rows']:array();
    if (empty($activeRows)) { return $empty; }

    $resolvedGameId = trim((string)($activeAll[$lotteryId]['game_id'] ?? ''));
    if ($resolvedGameId === '') {
        foreach ((array)$activeRows as $__mleGameRow) {
            foreach (array('target_game_id','game_id','mle_lottery_game_id') as $__mleGameKey) {
                $__mleGameVal = trim((string)($__mleGameRow[$__mleGameKey] ?? ''));
                if ($__mleGameVal !== '') { $resolvedGameId = $__mleGameVal; break 2; }
            }
        }
        unset($__mleGameRow, $__mleGameKey, $__mleGameVal);
    }
    $resolvedLotteryName = trim((string)$lotteryName);
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $resolvedLotteryName)) {
        $resolvedLotteryName = trim((string)($activeAll[$lotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
    }
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '' || preg_match('/^Lottery\s*(#|ID)?\s*\d+$/i', $resolvedLotteryName)) {
        $nameMap = mleAdvisoryResolveLotteryNames($db, array($lotteryId));
        if (!empty($nameMap[$lotteryId])) { $resolvedLotteryName = (string)$nameMap[$lotteryId]; }
    }
    if ($resolvedLotteryName === '') { $resolvedLotteryName = 'Lottery ID ' . $lotteryId; }

    $perf=mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db,$userId,$lotteryId,$activeRows);
    $savedById=array(); foreach($activeRows as $r){$savedById[(int)($r['id']??0)]=$r;}
    $leaderboard=mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($perf);
    $methods=$leaderboard['methods']??array();

    if (empty($methods)) {

        $pendingMethodCounts = array();
        foreach ($activeRows as $row) {
            $mk = (string)($row['__method_key'] ?? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row));
            if ($mk === '' || $mk === 'strategy_set') { continue; }
            if (!isset($pendingMethodCounts[$mk])) { $pendingMethodCounts[$mk] = 0; }
            $pendingMethodCounts[$mk]++;
        }
        $methods = array(array('method'=>'pending_evidence','method_label'=>'Pending Evidence','score'=>0,'total_hits'=>0,'avg_hits'=>0,'avg_top20'=>0,'avg_rank'=>'','run_count'=>0,'draw_count'=>0,'rank'=>1));
        $leaderboard = array('methods'=>$methods,'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0,0),'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>count($activeRows),'total_draws'=>0,'method_count'=>0,'pending_method_counts'=>$pendingMethodCounts));
    }

    $topMethod=$methods[0];
    $topLabel=mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($topMethod['method']);
    $settingsAdv=mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($perf,$savedById,$topMethod['method']);
    $proof=$leaderboard['proof_level'];
    $proofKey=$proof['level']??'too_early';
    if (in_array($proofKey, array('validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range','narrowing_signal'), true)) { $decision='Stay with '.$topLabel.' for now.'; }
    elseif (in_array($proofKey, array('strategy_candidate','early_signal','close_race'), true)) { $decision='Keep testing '.$topLabel.' while the evidence builds.'; }
    else { $decision='Keep building evidence before making a firm call.'; }
    $visual=mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($activeRows,$perf);

    $__mleAutoScoreResult = function_exists('mleAdvisoryPersistCompletedVisualRuns')
        ? mleAdvisoryPersistCompletedVisualRuns($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $resolvedLotteryName, $visual, $savedById)
        : array('attempted'=>0,'saved'=>0,'skipped'=>0,'errors'=>array());
    if (!empty($__mleAutoScoreResult['saved'])) {
        $perf=mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db,$userId,$lotteryId,$activeRows);
        $leaderboard=mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($perf);
        $methods=$leaderboard['methods']??array();
        if (empty($methods)) {
            $methods = array(array('method'=>'pending_evidence','method_label'=>'Pending Evidence','score'=>0,'total_hits'=>0,'avg_hits'=>0,'avg_top20'=>0,'avg_rank'=>'','run_count'=>0,'draw_count'=>0,'rank'=>1));
            $leaderboard = array('methods'=>$methods,'proof_level'=>mleAdvisoryGetProofLevelLabel(0,0),'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>count($activeRows),'total_draws'=>0,'method_count'=>0));
        }
        $topMethod=$methods[0];
        $topLabel=mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($topMethod['method']);
        $settingsAdv=mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($perf,$savedById,$topMethod['method']);
        $proof=$leaderboard['proof_level'];
        $proofKey=$proof['level']??'too_early';
        if (in_array($proofKey, array('validated_focus_range','precision_focus_range','narrowing_signal'), true)) { $decision='Stay with '.$topLabel.' for now.'; }
        elseif (in_array($proofKey, array('strategy_candidate','early_signal','close_race'), true)) { $decision='Keep testing '.$topLabel.' while the evidence builds.'; }
        else { $decision='Keep building evidence before making a firm call.'; }
        $visual=mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($activeRows,$perf);
    }

    $methodRunBreakdown=mleAdvisoryBuildMethodRunBreakdown($activeRows,$perf,$visual);
    $scoringStatus = function_exists('mleAdvisoryBuildScoringStatusSummary') ? mleAdvisoryBuildScoringStatusSummary($visual, $methodRunBreakdown, $__mleAutoScoreResult ?? array()) : array('status'=>'unknown','title'=>'Scoring status unavailable','message'=>'Scoring status could not be built.');
    $cleanup=mleAdvisoryBuildBatchCleanupRecommendationFromVisual($visual);
    $bestRecipe=!empty($settingsAdv['best_recipe_desc'])?(string)$settingsAdv['best_recipe_desc']:'';
    if ($bestRecipe === '' && !empty($activeRows[0])) { $bestRecipe = mleAdvisoryBuildBestRecipeDesc(mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($activeRows[0]), $activeRows[0]['source'] ?? ''); }
    $baseRunId=0; $bestScore=-PHP_FLOAT_MAX; foreach($perf as $p){$q=(float)($p['weighted_quality_score']??0)+((int)($p['top10_hits']??0))*2.0; if($q>$bestScore){$bestScore=$q;$baseRunId=(int)($p['__saved_id']??$p['run_id']??0);}}
    if ($baseRunId <= 0 && !empty($activeRows[0]['id'])) { $baseRunId = (int)$activeRows[0]['id']; }
    $methodOpinions=array(); $topScore=!empty($methods)?(float)($methods[0]['score']??0):0; foreach($methods as $i=>$m){$score=(float)($m['score']??0); $op=($i===0)?'Best direction right now':(($i===1 && $topScore>0 && ($score/$topScore)>=0.88)?'Close backup':'Not leading right now'); $methodOpinions[]=array('method_label'=>$m['method_label'],'opinion'=>$op,'method_key'=>$m['method']);}
    $precisionLock = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($perf, $savedById, $topMethod['method']);
    $horizonWindowLock = mleAdvisoryComputeHorizonWindowLockData($perf, $savedById);
    $sharedSkaiLearningProfile = function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile') ? mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile($db, $lotteryId, $activeRows) : array('available'=>false,'status'=>'unavailable','message'=>'Shared SKAI learning is not available yet.');
    $historyWindowEvidenceVerification = function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildHistoryWindowEvidenceVerification') ? mylottoexpertBuildHistoryWindowEvidenceVerification($db, $userId, $lotteryId, mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery($db, $lotteryId, $activeRows), $sharedSkaiLearningProfile) : array('available'=>false,'reason'=>'History Window verification builder is unavailable.');

    $fullSkaiSettingsEvidenceMapper = function_exists('mylottoexpertV60BuildFullSettingsEvidenceMapper') ? mylottoexpertV60BuildFullSettingsEvidenceMapper($db, $lotteryId, mylottoexpertResolveGameIdForLottery($db, $lotteryId, $activeRows), $activeRows, $perf, $savedById) : array('available'=>false,'status'=>'unavailable','message'=>'Full SKAI settings evidence mapper is unavailable.');

    $closedLoopSkaiRecommendationIntelligence = function_exists('mylottoexpertV61BuildClosedLoopRecommendation') ? mylottoexpertV61BuildClosedLoopRecommendation((array)$fullSkaiSettingsEvidenceMapper) : array('available'=>false,'status'=>'unavailable','message'=>'Closed-loop SKAI recommendation intelligence is unavailable.');
    $evidenceIntel = mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence($visual, $savedById, $topMethod['method']);

    $coreAiBatches = function_exists('mleCoreAiBuildBatchSummaries') ? mleCoreAiBuildBatchSummaries($activeRows, $perf) : array('has_core_ai'=>false,'batches'=>array(),'batch_count'=>0);
    $repeatReport = (array)($evidenceIntel['settings_repeat'] ?? array());
    $currentLockedSettings = (array)($evidenceIntel['current_locked_settings'] ?? array());
    $persistedCurrentLock = mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId);
    if (!empty($persistedCurrentLock['has_active_lock'])) {
        $currentLockedSettings['has_active_lock'] = true;
        $currentLockedSettings['persisted_lock_id'] = (int)($persistedCurrentLock['id'] ?? 0);
        $currentLockedSettings['status'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['locked_status'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['status'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['reason'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['locked_reason'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['reason'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['last_updated'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['updated_at'] ?? $currentLockedSettings['last_updated'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['settings_json'] = (string)($persistedCurrentLock['settings_json'] ?? '');
        $currentLockedSettings['settings_array'] = is_array($persistedCurrentLock['settings_array'] ?? null) ? $persistedCurrentLock['settings_array'] : array();
    }
    if (!empty($repeatReport['repeated'])) {
        $lockedLabels = array();
        foreach ((array)$repeatReport['repeated'] as $repItem) {
            if (!is_array($repItem)) { continue; }
            $lockedLabels[] = (string)($repItem['label'] ?? '') . ': ' . (string)($repItem['value'] ?? '');
            if (count($lockedLabels) >= 6) { break; }
        }
        if (!empty($lockedLabels)) { $settingsAdv['keep_same_list'] = 'Keep stable: ' . implode(', ', $lockedLabels) . '. Only test the recommended setting next.'; }
    }
    $why = mleAdvisoryBuildWhySupportText($topLabel, $topMethod, $visual, $precisionLock, $proof);
    $summary=array('total_runs'=>count($activeRows),'scored_draws'=>count(array_unique(array_filter(array_map(function($r){return (string)($r['draw_date']??'');},$perf)))),'best_analysis'=>$topLabel,'best_recipe'=>$bestRecipe,'keep_count'=>count($cleanup['keep']??array()),'watch_count'=>count($cleanup['review']??array()),'retire_count'=>count($cleanup['archive']??array()),'short_reason'=>$why,'individual_runs'=>$activeRows);
    $summary['strong_evidence_count'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['strong_count'] ?? 0);
    $summary['true_cluster_support'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0);
    $summary['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)($evidenceIntel['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0);
    $summary['pending_runs'] = count((array)($visual['upcoming'] ?? array()));
    $summary['evidence_model_summary'] = (string)($evidenceIntel['summary'] ?? '');
    $precisionLock['true_cluster_support'] = $summary['true_cluster_support'];
    $precisionLock['true_cluster_draw_support'] = $summary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
    $recommendedBatchTest = mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest($precisionLock, $settingsAdv, $summary, $currentLockedSettings);
    $recommendationLevel = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($precisionLock, $summary, $topMethod, $settingsAdv, $recommendedBatchTest);
    $precisionProgress = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($precisionLock, $summary, $recommendationLevel, $settingsAdv, $recommendedBatchTest);
    $bestVisualRow = mleAdvisoryBestVisualCompletedRow($visual);
    $bestResultText = 'No completed scored result yet.';
    if (!empty($bestVisualRow)) {
        $bestTotalHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['total_hits'] ?? 0);
        $bestDateText = mleAdvisoryFormatDateLabel($bestVisualRow['draw_date'] ?? '');
        if ($bestTotalHits > 0) {
            $bestResultText = 'Best result so far: ' . $bestTotalHits . ' total hit' . ($bestTotalHits === 1 ? '' : 's');
            if ($bestDateText !== '') { $bestResultText .= ' on ' . $bestDateText; }
            $bestMainHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['main_hits'] ?? 0);
            $bestExtraHits = (int)($bestVisualRow['extra_hits'] ?? 0);
            if ($bestMainHits > 0 || $bestExtraHits > 0) {
                $bestResultText .= ' (' . $bestMainHits . ' main';
                if ($bestExtraHits > 0) { $bestResultText .= ', ' . $bestExtraHits . ' extra'; }
                $bestResultText .= ')';
            }
            $bestResultText .= '.';
        }
    }
    $strongestRangeText = !empty($precisionLock['has_range'])
        ? ((int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0)) . ' to ' . (int)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100)))
        : 'Still forming';
    $missingEvidenceParts = array();
    if ((int)($summary['scored_draws'] ?? 0) < 3) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more completed draw dates'; }
    if ((int)($precisionLock['run_count'] ?? 0) < 20) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more saved scored runs'; }
    if ((int)($topMethod['run_count'] ?? 0) < 8) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'more repeated support for the leading method'; }
    if (!in_array((string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? ''), array('narrowing_signal', 'validated_focus_range', 'precision_focus_range'), true)) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'a tighter Settings Precision range'; }
    if (empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'a clearer repeated setting difference'; }
    if ((int)($summary['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0) < 3) { $missingEvidenceParts[] = 'true repeated cluster support'; }
    $recommendationLevel['evidence_strength'] = (string)($proof['label'] ?? 'Too Early');
    $recommendationLevel['leading_method'] = $topLabel;
    $recommendationLevel['precision_stage'] = (string)($precisionLock['stage_label'] ?? 'Broad testing');
    $recommendationLevel['next_best_action'] = !empty($recommendedBatchTest['has_recommendation']) ? 'Create Controlled SKAI Batch Test' : (!empty($settingsAdv['has_advice']) ? 'Create Recommended Next Settings Run' : 'Keep scoring saved runs');
    $recommendationLevel['strongest_range'] = $strongestRangeText;
    $recommendationLevel['consistent_settings'] = ($bestRecipe !== '' ? $bestRecipe : 'Still building a clear settings profile');
    $recommendationLevel['best_result'] = $bestResultText;
    $recommendationLevel['missing_evidence'] = !empty($missingEvidenceParts) ? ('More evidence is still needed before High Evidence Candidate: ' . implode(', ', $missingEvidenceParts) . '.') : 'Current evidence supports the present recommendation level.';
    $recommendationLevel['what_this_means'] = 'This lottery is currently at ' . $recommendationLevel['label'] . '. ' . $topLabel . ' has the strongest saved scored support so far, and the best-supported range is ' . $strongestRangeText . '.';
    $precisionProgress['beginner_explanation'] = 'Precision Progress shows how much useful evidence this lottery has built. As you save and score more runs, LottoExpert can move this lottery closer to a stronger recommendation.';
    $precisionProgress['milestone_message'] = '';
    if (!empty($recommendedBatchTest['has_recommendation'])) {
        $recommendedBatchTest['lottery_name'] = $resolvedLotteryName;
        $recommendedBatchTest['recommendation_level'] = (string)($recommendationLevel['label'] ?? '');
        $recommendedBatchTest['precision_progress_level'] = (string)($precisionProgress['level_name'] ?? '');
        $recommendedBatchTest['evidence_strength'] = (string)($proof['label'] ?? 'Too Early');
        $recommendedBatchTest['milestone_supported'] = (string)($precisionProgress['next_milestone'] ?? '');
    }
    $settingsRows = mleAdvisoryLoadSavedSettingsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, 30);
    $playRows = mleAdvisoryLoadNumbersToPlayForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, 30);
    $wheelRows = mleAdvisoryLoadFavoriteWheelsForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $activeRows, 12);

    $__mleOptimizerData = array('error'=>'Optimizer not available');
    try {
        if (function_exists('mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence') || function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot')) {
            $__enriched = array();
            foreach ($perf as $__pRow) {
                $__sid = (int)($__pRow['__saved_id'] ?? $__pRow['run_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($__sid <= 0 || empty($savedById[$__sid])) { continue; }
                $__saved  = $savedById[$__sid];
                $__merged = $__pRow;
                foreach (array('settings_json','settings','params_json','params','digit_probabilities') as $__sk) {
                    if (!isset($__merged[$__sk]) && isset($__saved[$__sk]) && $__saved[$__sk] !== '') { $__merged[$__sk] = $__saved[$__sk]; }
                }
                foreach ($__saved as $__k => $__v) { if (!isset($__merged[$__k]) && $__v !== null && $__v !== '') { $__merged[$__k] = $__v; } }
                $__enriched[] = $__merged;
            }
            if (function_exists('mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot')) {
                $__mleOptimizerData = mleOptimizerBuildSnapshot($__enriched, $topMethod['method']);
            } else {
                $__mleOptimizerData['setting_evidence'] = mleOptimizerAnalyzeSettingEvidence($__enriched, $topMethod['method']);
                $__mleOptimizerData['control_profile']  = mleOptimizerBuildControlProfile($__enriched, $topMethod['method']);
                $__mleOptimizerData['next_experiment']  = mleOptimizerSelectNextExperiment($__enriched, $topMethod['method']);
                $__mleOptimizerData['batch_plan']       = mleOptimizerBuildControlledBatchPlan($__enriched, $topMethod['method']);
            }
            unset($__enriched, $__pRow, $__saved, $__merged, $__sid, $__k, $__v, $__sk);
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__mleOptimizerErr) {
        $__mleOptimizerData = array('error'=>'Optimizer temporarily unavailable');
    }

    try {
        if (
            !empty($__mleOptimizerData) && empty($__mleOptimizerData['error'])
            && function_exists('mleOptimizerSaveSnapshot')
            && isset($db)
            && (int)$userId > 0
        ) {
            mleOptimizerSaveSnapshot($db, (int)$userId, (int)$lotteryId, (string)($topMethod['method'] ?? 'skai'), $__mleOptimizerData);
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {

    }

    return array('lottery_id'=>$lotteryId,'game_id'=>$resolvedGameId,'target_game_id'=>$resolvedGameId,'lottery_name'=>$resolvedLotteryName,'has_data'=>true,'top_method'=>$topMethod,'leaderboard'=>$methods,'method_opinions'=>$methodOpinions,'settings_advice'=>$settingsAdv,'proof_level'=>$proof,'next_step'=>!empty($settingsAdv['has_advice'])?'Create the recommended next settings run and test only one change.':'Keep saving predictions while automatic scoring builds evidence before changing settings.','what_to_do'=>'Use the visual run comparison to keep strong runs, remove noisy runs from advice, and create the next settings test.','decision'=>$decision,'why_support'=>$why,'base_run_id'=>$baseRunId,'stats'=>array('total_runs'=>$leaderboard['stats']['total_runs']??count($activeRows),'completed_draws'=>$leaderboard['stats']['total_draws']??0,'active_methods'=>$leaderboard['stats']['method_count']??0),'batch_cleanup'=>($cleanup['has_recommendation']??false)?$cleanup:null,'prediction_summary'=>$summary,'visual_runs'=>$visual,'active_rows'=>$activeRows,'saved_settings'=>$settingsRows,'numbers_to_play'=>$playRows,'wheel_systems'=>$wheelRows,'precision_lock'=>$precisionLock,'horizon_window_lock'=>$horizonWindowLock,'shared_skai_learning_profile'=>$sharedSkaiLearningProfile,'history_window_evidence_verification'=>$historyWindowEvidenceVerification,'full_skai_settings_evidence_mapper'=>$fullSkaiSettingsEvidenceMapper,'closed_loop_skai_recommendation_intelligence'=>$closedLoopSkaiRecommendationIntelligence,'recommendation_level'=>$recommendationLevel,'precision_progress'=>$precisionProgress,'recommended_skai_batch_test'=>$recommendedBatchTest,'method_run_breakdown'=>$methodRunBreakdown,'scoring_status'=>$scoringStatus,'core_ai_batches'=>$coreAiBatches,'evidence_intelligence'=>$evidenceIntel,'settings_that_repeat'=>$repeatReport,'current_locked_settings'=>$currentLockedSettings,'optimizer'=>$__mleOptimizerData);
}

function mleAdvisorySummarizeActiveLotteryBucket(array $bucket) {
    $lotteryId = (int)($bucket['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    $lotteryName = trim((string)($bucket['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
    if ($lotteryName === '') { $lotteryName = $lotteryId > 0 ? ('Lottery #' . $lotteryId) : 'Lottery'; }
    $rows = is_array($bucket['rows'] ?? null) ? $bucket['rows'] : array();
    $totalRuns = count($rows);
    $scoredRuns = 0;
    $pendingRuns = 0;
    $methodCounts = array();
    $upcomingLightRows = array();
    $upcomingDrawDate = '';
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        $methodKey = function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey')
            ? mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey((array)$row)
            : mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey((string)($row['source'] ?? ''));
        if ($methodKey === '') { $methodKey = 'pending_evidence'; }
        if (!isset($methodCounts[$methodKey])) { $methodCounts[$methodKey] = 0; }
        $methodCounts[$methodKey]++;
        $hasScore = false;
        foreach (array('evaluated_at', 'scored_at', 'last_scored_at', 'draw_date') as $scoreKey) {
            $scoreVal = trim((string)($row[$scoreKey] ?? ''));
            if ($scoreVal !== '' && strpos($scoreVal, '0000-00-00') !== 0) { $hasScore = true; break; }
        }
        if ($hasScore) {
            $scoredRuns++;
        } else {
            $pendingRuns++;
            /* [[MLE_V5_SELECTOR_UPCOMING_SCOPE_2026_06_01]]
               Carry lightweight draw-date context for pending rows so that
               mylottoexpertResolveUpcomingDrawScope() can find a date on the
               selector card. Only rows that already have a valid target_draw_date
               or next_draw_date are included. Rows with all draw-date fields NULL
               are intentionally excluded so the DB pending count is not inflated. */
            $__selUpcomingDate = '';
            foreach (array('target_draw_date', 'next_draw_date') as $__selDrawKey) {
                $__selRawDate = trim((string)($row[$__selDrawKey] ?? ''));
                if ($__selRawDate !== '' && strpos($__selRawDate, '0000-00-00') !== 0 && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/', $__selRawDate)) {
                    $__selUpcomingDate = substr($__selRawDate, 0, 10);
                    break;
                }
            }
            if ($__selUpcomingDate !== '') {
                $__selLightRow = array(
                    'id' => isset($row['id']) ? (int)$row['id'] : 0,
                    'target_draw_date' => $__selUpcomingDate,
                    'next_draw_date' => $__selUpcomingDate,
                );
                foreach (array('evaluation_status', 'play_status', 'status') as $__selStKey) {
                    $__selStVal = trim((string)($row[$__selStKey] ?? ''));
                    if ($__selStVal !== '') { $__selLightRow[$__selStKey] = $__selStVal; break; }
                }
                $upcomingLightRows[] = $__selLightRow;
                if ($upcomingDrawDate === '') { $upcomingDrawDate = $__selUpcomingDate; }
            }
        }
    }
    $topMethod = 'pending_evidence';
    $topMethodCount = 0;
    foreach ($methodCounts as $methodKey => $methodCount) {
        if ((int)$methodCount > (int)$topMethodCount) {
            $topMethod = (string)$methodKey;
            $topMethodCount = (int)$methodCount;
        }
    }
    $__selectorCard = array(
        'lottery_id' => $lotteryId,
        'game_id' => (string)($bucket['game_id'] ?? ''),
        'target_game_id' => (string)($bucket['game_id'] ?? ''),
        'lottery_name' => $lotteryName,
        'has_data' => ($totalRuns > 0),
        'top_method' => array('method' => $topMethod, 'run_count' => (int)$topMethodCount, 'draw_count' => (int)$scoredRuns),
        'stats' => array('total_runs' => (int)$totalRuns, 'completed_draws' => (int)$scoredRuns, 'active_methods' => count($methodCounts)),
        'prediction_summary' => array('total_runs' => (int)$totalRuns, 'pending_runs' => (int)$pendingRuns, 'scored_runs' => (int)$scoredRuns, 'scored_draws' => (int)$scoredRuns),
        'visual_runs' => array('recent' => array(), 'older' => array(), 'upcoming' => $upcomingLightRows),
        'precision_progress' => array('level_key' => 'learning_stage', 'level_name' => 'Learning Stage', 'current_draw_cycles' => (int)$scoredRuns),
        'recommended_skai_batch_test' => array('has_recommendation' => false),
        'settings_advice' => array('has_advice' => false),
    );
    if ($upcomingDrawDate !== '') {
        $__selectorCard['next_draw_date'] = $upcomingDrawDate;
        $__selectorCard['target_draw_date'] = $upcomingDrawDate;
    }
    return $__selectorCard;
}

function mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming($sectionName, array $context = array()) {
    $safe = array(
        'section' => (string)$sectionName,
        'elapsed_ms' => (int)($context['elapsed_ms'] ?? 0),
        'user_id' => (int)($context['user_id'] ?? 0),
        'lottery_id' => (int)($context['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
        'game_id' => (string)($context['game_id'] ?? ''),
        'row_count' => (int)($context['row_count'] ?? 0),
        'request_mode' => (string)($context['request_mode'] ?? 'first_load'),
        'first_load_start' => (int)($context['first_load_start'] ?? 0),
        'first_load_end' => (int)($context['first_load_end'] ?? 0),
        'first_load_total_elapsed_ms' => (int)($context['first_load_total_elapsed_ms'] ?? 0),
        'selected_lottery_id' => (int)($context['selected_lottery_id'] ?? 0),
        'active_lottery_count' => (int)($context['active_lottery_count'] ?? 0),
        'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => (int)($context['selected_card_elapsed_ms'] ?? 0),
        'forced_fast_mode' => !empty($context['forced_fast_mode']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
        'timeout_guard_triggered' => !empty($context['timeout_guard_triggered']) ? 'yes' : 'no',
        'ajax_mode' => (string)($context['ajax_mode'] ?? ''),
        'ajax_elapsed_ms' => (int)($context['ajax_elapsed_ms'] ?? 0),
        'ajax_rows_returned' => (int)($context['ajax_rows_returned'] ?? 0),
        'slow_query_label' => (string)($context['slow_query_label'] ?? ''),
    );
    if ($safe['elapsed_ms'] > 0) {
        error_log('[MLE PERF] ' . json_encode($safe, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES));
    }
}


if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertArrayMaxIntValue')) {
    function mylottoexpertArrayMaxIntValue(array $values)
    {
        $max = 0;
        foreach ($values as $value) {
            $value = (int)$value;
            if ($value > $max) { $max = $value; }
        }
        return $max;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveUpcomingDrawScope')) {
    function mylottoexpertResolveUpcomingDrawScope(array $card)
    {
        $date = '';
        $drawAt = '';
        foreach (array('next_draw_date','target_draw_date','upcoming_draw_date') as $key) {
            $raw = trim((string)($card[$key] ?? ''));
            if ($raw !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', substr($raw, 0, 10))) {
                $date = substr($raw, 0, 10);
                break;
            }
        }
        foreach (array('next_draw_at','target_draw_at','upcoming_draw_at') as $key) {
            $rawAt = trim((string)($card[$key] ?? ''));
            if ($rawAt !== '' && strncmp($rawAt, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) {
                $drawAt = $rawAt;
                break;
            }
        }
        $visual = is_array($card['visual_runs'] ?? null) ? (array)$card['visual_runs'] : array();
        $visualUpcoming = (isset($visual['upcoming']) && is_array($visual['upcoming'])) ? (array)$visual['upcoming'] : array();
        if ($date === '' && is_array($visualUpcoming)) {
            foreach ($visualUpcoming as $row) {
                foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','draw_date') as $drawKey) {
                    $rawDate = trim((string)($row[$drawKey] ?? ''));
                    if ($rawDate !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', substr($rawDate, 0, 10))) {
                        $date = substr($rawDate, 0, 10);
                        break 2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        if ($drawAt === '' && is_array($visualUpcoming)) {
            foreach ($visualUpcoming as $row) {
                foreach (array('target_draw_at','next_draw_at','draw_at') as $drawAtKey) {
                    $rawDrawAt = trim((string)($row[$drawAtKey] ?? ''));
                    if ($rawDrawAt !== '' && strncmp($rawDrawAt, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) {
                        $drawAt = $rawDrawAt;
                        break 2;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return array('date' => $date, 'draw_at' => $drawAt);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertDatabasePendingRunCount')) {
    /* [[MLE_V5_DB_PENDING_IDENTITY_2026_06_01]]
       $requireIdentity = true adds a saved-run identity guard to the query:
       the row must have at least one of run_uuid, batch_uuid, source_batch_id,
       source_batch_run_id, prediction_target_id, or prediction_target_key set.
       This eliminates false-pending rows produced by bucket-summary or
       advisory-summarize logic that do not represent actual saved run records.
       Passing false (default) preserves the existing behaviour for all other
       callers such as bottom-card sync. */
    function mylottoexpertDatabasePendingRunCount($db, $userId, array $card, $requireIdentity = false)
    {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        $lotteryId = (int)($card['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        $gameId = trim((string)($card['game_id'] ?? $card['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
        if (!is_object($db) || $userId <= 0 || ($lotteryId <= 0 && $gameId === '')) { return null; }

        try {
            $table = '#__user_saved_numbers';
            $colsRaw = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
            $cols = array();
            foreach ((array)$colsRaw as $ck => $cv) {
                if (is_string($ck) && $ck !== '') { $cols[$ck] = true; }
                elseif (is_object($cv) && isset($cv->Field)) { $cols[(string)$cv->Field] = true; }
            }
            if (empty($cols) || empty($cols['user_id'])) { return null; }
            $hasCol = function($name) use ($cols) { return isset($cols[(string)$name]); };
            $qn = function($name) use ($db) { return $db->quoteName((string)$name); };

            $where = array($qn('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId);
            /* [[MLE_V5_EFFECTIVE_IDENTITY_2026_06_01]]
               Normalized effective identity matching for multi-state lotteries.
               effective_lottery_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(target_lottery_id,0), NULLIF(lottery_id,0), 0)
               effective_game_id = LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(NULLIF(target_game_id,''), NULLIF(game_id,''), '')))
               lottery_id is always primary; game_id never excludes a row when lottery_id matches.
               Fallback to effective game_id match only when card has no lottery_id. */
            $__hasLotteryIdCol = $hasCol('lottery_id');
            $__hasTargetLotteryIdCol = $hasCol('target_lottery_id');
            $__hasGameIdCol = $hasCol('game_id');
            $__hasTargetGameIdCol = $hasCol('target_game_id');
            $__mleIdentityDiagEnabled = (function_exists('mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin') && mylottoexpertCurrentUserIsAdmin());
            if ($lotteryId > 0) {
                $__effLotParts = array();
                if ($__hasTargetLotteryIdCol) { $__effLotParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $qn('target_lottery_id') . ', 0)'; }
                if ($__hasLotteryIdCol)       { $__effLotParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $qn('lottery_id') . ', 0)'; }
                if (empty($__effLotParts)) { return null; }
                $__effLotExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(', ', $__effLotParts) . ', 0)';
                $where[] = '(' . $__effLotExpr . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId . ')';
                if ($__mleIdentityDiagEnabled) {
                    if (!isset($GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'])) { $GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'] = array(); }
                    $GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'][] = array(
                        'lottery_id'           => $lotteryId,
                        'card_game_id'         => $gameId,
                        'row_effective_game_id' => null,
                        'pending_count'        => null,
                        'identity_match_mode'  => 'lottery_primary',
                    );
                }
            } elseif ($gameId !== '') {
                /* No lottery_id on card: fall back to effective game_id match only. */
                $__effGameParts = array();
                if ($__hasTargetGameIdCol) { $__effGameParts[] = "NULLIF(" . $qn('target_game_id') . ", '')"; }
                if ($__hasGameIdCol)       { $__effGameParts[] = "NULLIF(" . $qn('game_id') . ", '')"; }
                if (empty($__effGameParts)) { return null; }
                $__effGameExpr = "LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(" . implode(', ', $__effGameParts) . ", '')))";
                $where[] = '(' . $__effGameExpr . ' = ' . $db->quote(strtolower(trim($gameId))) . ')';
                if ($__mleIdentityDiagEnabled) {
                    if (!isset($GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'])) { $GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'] = array(); }
                    $GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'][] = array(
                        'lottery_id'           => $lotteryId,
                        'card_game_id'         => $gameId,
                        'row_effective_game_id' => null,
                        'pending_count'        => null,
                        'identity_match_mode'  => 'game_id_only',
                    );
                }
            } else {
                return null;
            }

            $terminal = array('scored','evaluated','complete','completed','result_found','official_found','archived','deleted','discarded','inactive','retired','cancelled','canceled','failed','void','quarantined');
            foreach (array('evaluation_status','status','play_status','score_status') as $statusCol) {
                if ($hasCol($statusCol)) {
                    $quoted = array();
                    foreach ($terminal as $v) { $quoted[] = $db->quote($v); }
                    $where[] = '(' . $qn($statusCol) . ' IS NULL OR TRIM(' . $qn($statusCol) . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR LOWER(TRIM(' . $qn($statusCol) . ')) NOT IN (' . implode(',', $quoted) . '))';
                }
            }
            if ($requireIdentity && $hasCol('evaluation_status')) {
                $where[] = "(LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('evaluation_status') . ",''))) = 'pending')";
            }
            if ($requireIdentity && $hasCol('play_status')) {
                $where[] = "(LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('play_status') . ",''))) = 'draft')";
            }
            if ($hasCol('evaluated_at')) {
                $where[] = '(' . $qn('evaluated_at') . ' IS NULL OR ' . $qn('evaluated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00') . ')';
            }
            foreach (array('actual_main_numbers','actual_numbers','actual_extra_numbers','actual_draw_date') as $actualCol) {
                if ($hasCol($actualCol)) {
                    $where[] = '(' . $qn($actualCol) . ' IS NULL OR TRIM(' . $qn($actualCol) . ') = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR ' . $qn($actualCol) . ' = ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')';
                }
            }

            $upcoming = mylottoexpertResolveUpcomingDrawScope($card);
            $upcomingDate = trim((string)($upcoming['date'] ?? ''));
            if ($upcomingDate === '' || !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $upcomingDate)) { return 0; }
            $drawParts = array();
            $drawCols = $requireIdentity ? array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','latest_draw_date') : array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','latest_draw_date','draw_date');
            foreach ($drawCols as $drawCol) {
                if ($hasCol($drawCol)) { $drawParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $qn($drawCol) . ', ' . $db->quote('0000-00-00') . ')'; }
            }
            $drawExpr = !empty($drawParts) ? 'COALESCE(' . implode(',', $drawParts) . ')' : 'NULL';
            $where[] = '((' . $drawExpr . ') IS NOT NULL AND DATE(' . $drawExpr . ') = ' . $db->quote($upcomingDate) . ')';
            /* Keep valid pending rows for the target draw date even after draw_at.
               Pending status, score status, and actual-number guards above remain authoritative. */

            if ($requireIdentity) {
                /* Exclude strategy_set rows (they are strategy/play-set records, not runs). */
                if ($hasCol('source')) {
                    $where[] = '(LOWER(TRIM(' . $qn('source') . ")) <> 'strategy_set')";
                }
                /* prediction_archive is valid saved prediction data in production.
                   Exclude only training/learning/system-only intents when present. */
                if ($hasCol('save_intent')) {
                    $where[] = '('
                        . 'LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $qn('save_intent') . ",''))) NOT LIKE 'training%'"
                        . " AND LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('save_intent') . ",''))) NOT LIKE 'learning%'"
                        . " AND LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('save_intent') . ",''))) NOT LIKE 'system%'"
                        . ')';
                }
                $placeholderKinds = array('batch_header','research_queue','research_assignment','recommendation_only','needs_run_placeholder');
                foreach (array('source','origin_source','save_intent','status','play_status') as $kindCol) {
                    if ($hasCol($kindCol)) {
                        $kindQuoted = array();
                        foreach ($placeholderKinds as $kind) { $kindQuoted[] = $db->quote($kind); }
                        $where[] = '(LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(' . $qn($kindCol) . ",''))) NOT IN (" . implode(',', $kindQuoted) . '))';
                    }
                }
                /* Require at least one saved-run identity marker so that bucket-summary
                   or advisory-aggregate rows without real run identity are excluded. */
                $identityParts = array();
                if ($hasCol('run_uuid'))             { $identityParts[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('run_uuid')             . ",'')) <> '')"; }
                if ($hasCol('batch_uuid'))           { $identityParts[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('batch_uuid')           . ",'')) <> '')"; }
                if ($hasCol('source_batch_id'))      { $identityParts[] = "(COALESCE("      . $qn('source_batch_id')      . ",0) > 0)"; }
                if ($hasCol('source_batch_run_id'))  { $identityParts[] = "(COALESCE("      . $qn('source_batch_run_id')  . ",0) > 0)"; }
                if ($hasCol('prediction_target_id')) { $identityParts[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('prediction_target_id') . ",'')) <> '')"; }
                if ($hasCol('prediction_target_key')){ $identityParts[] = "(TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('prediction_target_key'). ",'')) <> '')"; }
                if (!empty($identityParts)) {
                    $where[] = '(' . implode(' OR ', $identityParts) . ')';
                } else {
                    return 0;
                }
            }

            if ($requireIdentity) {
                $identityGroupParts = array();
                if ($hasCol('run_uuid'))             { $identityGroupParts[] = "NULLIF(CONCAT('run:',TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('run_uuid') . ",''))),'run:')"; }
                if ($hasCol('batch_uuid'))           { $identityGroupParts[] = "NULLIF(CONCAT('batch:',TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('batch_uuid') . ",''))),'batch:')"; }
                if ($hasCol('source_batch_run_id'))  { $identityGroupParts[] = "CASE WHEN COALESCE(" . $qn('source_batch_run_id') . ",0) > 0 THEN CONCAT('sbr:',COALESCE(" . $qn('source_batch_run_id') . ",0)) ELSE NULL END"; }
                if ($hasCol('source_batch_id'))      { $identityGroupParts[] = "CASE WHEN COALESCE(" . $qn('source_batch_id') . ",0) > 0 THEN CONCAT('sb:',COALESCE(" . $qn('source_batch_id') . ",0)) ELSE NULL END"; }
                if ($hasCol('prediction_target_id')) { $identityGroupParts[] = "NULLIF(CONCAT('ptid:',TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('prediction_target_id') . ",''))),'ptid:')"; }
                if ($hasCol('prediction_target_key')){ $identityGroupParts[] = "NULLIF(CONCAT('ptk:',TRIM(COALESCE(" . $qn('prediction_target_key') . ",''))),'ptk:')"; }
                if ($hasCol('id'))                   { $identityGroupParts[] = "CONCAT('id:'," . $qn('id') . ')'; }
                if (empty($identityGroupParts)) { return 0; }
                $groupExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(', ', $identityGroupParts) . ')';
                $query = 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT ' . $groupExpr . ' AS ' . $qn('run_identity') . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName($table) . ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where) . ' GROUP BY ' . $qn('run_identity') . ') AS ' . $qn('mle_pending_groups');
            } else {
                $idExpr = $hasCol('id') ? 'COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $qn('id') . ')' : 'COUNT(*)';
                $query = 'SELECT ' . $idExpr . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName($table) . ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
            }
            $db->setQuery($query);
            $count = (int)$db->loadResult();
            if ($__mleIdentityDiagEnabled && !empty($GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'])) {
                $__diagIdx = count($GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag']) - 1;
                $GLOBALS['__mle_pending_identity_diag'][$__diagIdx]['pending_count'] = max(0, $count);
            }
            return max(0, $count);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return null;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCanonicalPendingRunCount')) {
    function mylottoexpertCanonicalPendingRunCount(array $card)
    {
        $visual = is_array($card['visual_runs'] ?? null) ? (array)$card['visual_runs'] : array();
        $upcoming = mylottoexpertResolveUpcomingDrawScope($card);
        $upcomingDate = trim((string)($upcoming['date'] ?? ''));
        $upcomingDrawAt = trim((string)($upcoming['draw_at'] ?? ''));
        $visualCount = 0;
        $hasVisualUpcoming = false;
        if (array_key_exists('upcoming', $visual) && is_array($visual['upcoming'])) {
            $hasVisualUpcoming = true;
            foreach ((array)$visual['upcoming'] as $vrow) {
                $drawDate = '';
                foreach (array('target_draw_date','next_draw_date','draw_date') as $drawKey) {
                    $drawRaw = trim((string)($vrow[$drawKey] ?? ''));
                    if ($drawRaw !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', substr($drawRaw, 0, 10))) { $drawDate = substr($drawRaw, 0, 10); break; }
                }
                if ($upcomingDate === '' || $drawDate !== $upcomingDate) { continue; }
                if ($upcomingDate === date('Y-m-d')) {
                    $rowDrawAt = '';
                    foreach (array('target_draw_at','next_draw_at','draw_at') as $drawAtKey) {
                        $drawAtRaw = trim((string)($vrow[$drawAtKey] ?? ''));
                        if ($drawAtRaw !== '' && strncmp($drawAtRaw, '0000-00-00', 10) !== 0) { $rowDrawAt = $drawAtRaw; break; }
                    }
                    if ($rowDrawAt === '') { $rowDrawAt = $upcomingDrawAt; }
                    if ($rowDrawAt !== '' && strtotime($rowDrawAt) && strtotime($rowDrawAt) < time()) { continue; }
                }
                $visualCount++;
            }
        }
        $dbCount = array_key_exists('mle_db_pending_runs', $card) ? (int)$card['mle_db_pending_runs'] : -1;
        $summary = is_array($card['prediction_summary'] ?? null) ? (array)$card['prediction_summary'] : array();
        $progress = is_array($card['precision_progress'] ?? null) ? (array)$card['precision_progress'] : array();
        $summaryCount = max(0, (int)($summary['pending_runs'] ?? 0));
        $progressCount = max(0, (int)($progress['pending_runs'] ?? 0));

        if ($upcomingDate === '') {
            return ($dbCount >= 0) ? max(0, $dbCount) : 0;
        }
        if ($visualCount > 0 || $dbCount > 0) {
