            return mylottoexpertArrayMaxIntValue(array($visualCount, $dbCount));
        }
        if ($dbCount === 0) { return 0; }
        if ($hasVisualUpcoming) { return $visualCount; }
        return mylottoexpertArrayMaxIntValue(array($summaryCount, $progressCount));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertSyncCardPendingCount')) {
    function mylottoexpertSyncCardPendingCount(array $card, $db = null, $userId = 0)
    {
        $dbPending = null;
        if (is_object($db) && (int)$userId > 0) {
            $dbPending = mylottoexpertDatabasePendingRunCount($db, (int)$userId, $card);
            if ($dbPending !== null) { $card['mle_db_pending_runs'] = (int)$dbPending; }
        }
        $pending = mylottoexpertCanonicalPendingRunCount($card);
        if (!isset($card['prediction_summary']) || !is_array($card['prediction_summary'])) {
            $card['prediction_summary'] = array();
        }
        if (!isset($card['precision_progress']) || !is_array($card['precision_progress'])) {
            $card['precision_progress'] = array();
        }
        $card['prediction_summary']['pending_runs'] = $pending;
        $card['precision_progress']['pending_runs'] = $pending;
        $card['mle_canonical_pending_runs'] = $pending;
        return $card;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertBriefDrawCyclePercent')) {
    function mylottoexpertBriefDrawCyclePercent($cycles, $target = 20)
    {
        $cycles = max(0, (int)$cycles);
        $target = max(1, (int)$target);
        return min(100, (int)round(($cycles / $target) * 100));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertBriefDrawCycleLabel')) {
    function mylottoexpertBriefDrawCycleLabel($cycles, $target = 20)
    {
        $cycles = max(0, (int)$cycles);
        $target = max(1, (int)$target);
        if ($cycles >= $target) {
            return (string)$target . '+ draw-cycle target met';
        }
        return (string)$cycles . '/' . (string)$target . ' draw cycles';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertBriefDrawCycleTitle')) {
    function mylottoexpertBriefDrawCycleTitle($cycles, $target = 20)
    {
        $cycles = max(0, (int)$cycles);
        $target = max(1, (int)$target);
        if ($cycles >= $target) {
            return (string)$cycles . ' completed draw cycles tracked. The ' . (string)$target . '-cycle milestone is already met.';
        }
        return (string)$cycles . ' completed draw cycles tracked toward the ' . (string)$target . '-cycle milestone.';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertResolveUserActionState')) {
    function mylottoexpertResolveUserActionState($pendingRuns, $hasRecommendedAction, $scoredRuns, $checkedRuns, $methodTrack)
    {
        $pendingRuns = max(0, (int)$pendingRuns);
        $hasRecommendedAction = !empty($hasRecommendedAction);
        $scoredRuns = max(0, (int)$scoredRuns);
        $checkedRuns = max(0, (int)$checkedRuns);
        $methodTrack = trim((string)$methodTrack);
        if ($methodTrack === '') { $methodTrack = 'selected track'; }

        if ($pendingRuns > 0) {
            return array(
                'type' => 'pending',
                'label' => 'In Progress',
                'detail' => (string)$pendingRuns . ' pending run' . ($pendingRuns === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' waiting for the next official draw result.',
                'priority' => 1000 + $pendingRuns,
                'cta' => 'Review pending runs',
                'target_kind' => 'pending'
            );
        }
        if ($hasRecommendedAction) {
            return array(
                'type' => 'action',
                'label' => 'Action Ready',
                'detail' => $methodTrack . ' has a recommended controlled test ready or forming.',
                'priority' => 850 + $scoredRuns,
                'cta' => 'Open ready action',
                'target_kind' => 'recommended'
            );
        }
        if ($checkedRuns <= 0 && $scoredRuns <= 0) {
            return array(
                'type' => 'action',
                'label' => 'Start Evidence',
                'detail' => 'No scored evidence yet. Start with regular saved runs for the active track, then score after the draw.',
                'priority' => 700,
                'cta' => 'Open first step',
                'target_kind' => 'start'
            );
        }
        return array(
            'type' => 'action',
            'label' => 'Run Next Prediction',
            'detail' => 'No runs are currently pending for the next draw. Create fresh saved runs so LottoExpert has new evidence to score after the draw.',
            'priority' => 600 + $scoredRuns,
            'cta' => 'Run next prediction',
            'target_kind' => 'run_next'
        );
    }
}


function mleAdvisoryLoadAllLotteryCards($db, $userId, $selectedLotteryId = 0, $loadAllFullCards = false) {
    $t0 = microtime(true);
    $firstLoadStartMs = (int)round($t0 * 1000);
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $selectedLotteryId = (int)$selectedLotteryId;
    $loadAllFullCards = !empty($loadAllFullCards);
    if ($userId <= 0) {
        return array('has_any_data'=>false,'cards'=>array(),'selector_cards'=>array(),'selected_card'=>array(),'selected_lottery_id'=>0,'total_lotteries'=>0);
    }
    $active = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $userId);
    if (empty($active)) {
        return array('has_any_data'=>false,'cards'=>array(),'selector_cards'=>array(),'selected_card'=>array(),'selected_lottery_id'=>0,'total_lotteries'=>0);
    }
    $selectorCards = array();
    $selectorByLottery = array();
    foreach ($active as $lid => $data) {
        $summaryCard = mleAdvisorySummarizeActiveLotteryBucket((array)$data);
        $selectorCards[] = $summaryCard;
        $selectorByLottery[(int)($summaryCard['lottery_id'] ?? 0)] = $summaryCard;
    }
    if ($selectedLotteryId <= 0 || !isset($active[$selectedLotteryId])) {
        foreach ($active as $lid => $data) { $selectedLotteryId = (int)$lid; break; }
    }
    $cards = array();
    $selectedCard = array();
    $selectedCardElapsedMs = 0;
    $timeoutGuardTriggered = false;
    $forcedFastMode = false;
    if ($loadAllFullCards) {
        foreach ($active as $lid => $data) {
            $cardStart = microtime(true);
            $card = mleAdvisoryBuildLotteryCard($db, $userId, (int)$lid, (string)($data['lottery_name'] ?? ''), $active);
            if (is_array($card) && !empty($card)) { $card = mylottoexpertSyncCardPendingCount($card, $db, $userId); }
            $cardMs = (int)round((microtime(true) - $cardStart) * 1000);
            if ($cardMs >= 5000) {
                mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('lottery_card_query', array('elapsed_ms' => $cardMs, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => (int)$lid, 'game_id' => (string)($card['game_id'] ?? ''), 'row_count' => (int)($card['stats']['total_runs'] ?? 0), 'request_mode' => 'full_workspace'));
            }
            if (!empty($card['has_data'])) {
                $cards[] = $card;
                $selectorByLottery[(int)$lid] = $card;
                foreach ($selectorCards as $__mleSelIdx => $__mleSelCard) {
                    if ((int)($__mleSelCard['lottery_id'] ?? 0) === (int)$lid) { $selectorCards[$__mleSelIdx] = $card; break; }
                }
                unset($__mleSelIdx, $__mleSelCard);
                if ((int)$lid === $selectedLotteryId) { $selectedCard = $card; }
            }
        }
    } elseif ($selectedLotteryId > 0 && isset($active[$selectedLotteryId])) {
        $selectedSummary = isset($selectorByLottery[$selectedLotteryId]) ? (array)$selectorByLottery[$selectedLotteryId] : array();
        $selectedSlowSessionKey = 'mle_fast_mode_lottery_' . (int)$selectedLotteryId;
        if (isset($_SESSION[$selectedSlowSessionKey])) { unset($_SESSION[$selectedSlowSessionKey]); }
        $forcedFastMode = false;
        $selectedStart = microtime(true);
        $selectedCard = mleAdvisoryBuildLotteryCard($db, $userId, (int)$selectedLotteryId, (string)($active[$selectedLotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? ''), $active);
        if (is_array($selectedCard) && !empty($selectedCard)) { $selectedCard = mylottoexpertSyncCardPendingCount($selectedCard, $db, $userId); }
        $selectedMs = (int)round((microtime(true) - $selectedStart) * 1000);
        $selectedCardElapsedMs = $selectedMs;
        mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('selected_lottery_card_query', array('elapsed_ms' => $selectedMs, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'game_id' => (string)($selectedCard['game_id'] ?? ''), 'row_count' => (int)($selectedCard['stats']['total_runs'] ?? 0), 'request_mode' => 'first_load', 'selected_lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'active_lottery_count' => count($selectorCards), 'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => $selectedMs));
        if ($selectedMs >= 5000) {
            mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('slow_selected_lottery_card_query', array('elapsed_ms' => $selectedMs, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'game_id' => (string)($selectedCard['game_id'] ?? ''), 'row_count' => (int)($selectedCard['stats']['total_runs'] ?? 0), 'request_mode' => 'first_load', 'selected_lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'active_lottery_count' => count($selectorCards), 'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => $selectedMs, 'timeout_guard_triggered' => false, 'slow_query_label' => 'selected_lottery_card_query_logged_only'));
        }
        if (!empty($selectedCard['has_data'])) {
            $selectedCard['mle_forced_fast_mode'] = false;
            $selectedCard['mle_timeout_guard_triggered'] = false;
            $selectedCard = mylottoexpertSyncCardPendingCount($selectedCard, $db, $userId);
            $cards[] = $selectedCard;
            $selectorByLottery[(int)$selectedLotteryId] = $selectedCard;
            foreach ($selectorCards as $__mleSelIdx => $__mleSelCard) {
                if ((int)($__mleSelCard['lottery_id'] ?? 0) === (int)$selectedLotteryId) { $selectorCards[$__mleSelIdx] = $selectedCard; break; }
            }
            unset($__mleSelIdx, $__mleSelCard);
        } else {
            $selectedCard = array();
        }
    }
    $totalMs = (int)round((microtime(true) - $t0) * 1000);
    mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('first_load_start', array('elapsed_ms' => 1, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'row_count' => count($selectorCards), 'request_mode' => $loadAllFullCards ? 'full_workspace' : 'first_load', 'first_load_start' => $firstLoadStartMs, 'selected_lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'active_lottery_count' => count($selectorCards), 'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => $selectedCardElapsedMs, 'forced_fast_mode' => $forcedFastMode, 'timeout_guard_triggered' => $timeoutGuardTriggered));
    mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('first_load_total', array('elapsed_ms' => $totalMs, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'row_count' => count($selectorCards), 'request_mode' => $loadAllFullCards ? 'full_workspace' : 'first_load', 'first_load_total_elapsed_ms' => $totalMs, 'selected_lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'active_lottery_count' => count($selectorCards), 'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => $selectedCardElapsedMs, 'forced_fast_mode' => $forcedFastMode, 'timeout_guard_triggered' => $timeoutGuardTriggered));
    mleAdvisoryLogPerfTiming('first_load_end', array('elapsed_ms' => 1, 'user_id' => $userId, 'lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'row_count' => count($selectorCards), 'request_mode' => $loadAllFullCards ? 'full_workspace' : 'first_load', 'first_load_end' => (int)round(microtime(true) * 1000), 'first_load_total_elapsed_ms' => $totalMs, 'selected_lottery_id' => $selectedLotteryId, 'active_lottery_count' => count($selectorCards), 'selected_card_elapsed_ms' => $selectedCardElapsedMs, 'forced_fast_mode' => $forcedFastMode, 'timeout_guard_triggered' => $timeoutGuardTriggered));
    return array(
        'has_any_data' => !empty($selectorCards),
        'cards' => $cards,
        'selector_cards' => $selectorCards,
        'selected_card' => $selectedCard,
        'selected_lottery_id' => (int)$selectedLotteryId,
        'total_lotteries' => count($selectorCards),
        'forced_fast_mode' => $forcedFastMode ? 1 : 0,
        'timeout_guard_triggered' => $timeoutGuardTriggered ? 1 : 0
    );
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $table = $prefix . 'mle_current_locked_settings';
    $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$table}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_name` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `method` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `base_run_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `base_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `settings_json` mediumtext,
  `locked_status` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Not Ready',
  `recommendation_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_progress_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_lock_stage` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_basis` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_min` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `range_max` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `evidence_summary` text,
  `locked_reason` text,
  `repeated_cluster_key` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `repeated_cluster_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `completed_draw_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `strong_evidence_count` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery_active` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`is_active`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
}

function mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return array(); }
    mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings'))->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')->order($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        if (!is_array($row) || empty($row)) { return array(); }
        $settings = array();
        if (isset($row['settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['settings_json']) !== '') { $tmp = json_decode((string)$row['settings_json'], true); if (is_array($tmp)) { $settings = $tmp; } }
        $row['settings_array'] = $settings;
        $row['has_active_lock'] = true;
        $row['status'] = (string)($row['locked_status'] ?? '');
        $row['reason'] = (string)($row['locked_reason'] ?? '');
        $row['last_updated'] = (string)($row['updated_at'] ?? '');
        return $row;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
}

function mleAdvisoryPersistCurrentLockedSettings($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $lotteryName, array $computedLock, array $baseSettings, $baseRunId, array $precisionLock, array $recommendationLevel, array $precisionProgress, array $evidenceIntel, $source, $method) {
    $userId = (int)$userId; $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId; $baseRunId = (int)$baseRunId;
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || empty($baseSettings) || !mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady($computedLock)) { return 0; }
    mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
    $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $cluster = is_array($computedLock['cluster'] ?? null) ? $computedLock['cluster'] : array();
    $settingsJson = json_encode($baseSettings, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings'))->set($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 0')->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)->where($db->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1');
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        $cols = array('user_id','lottery_id','lottery_name','source','method','base_run_id','base_settings_id','settings_json','locked_status','recommendation_level','precision_progress_level','precision_lock_stage','range_basis','range_min','range_max','evidence_summary','locked_reason','repeated_cluster_key','repeated_cluster_count','completed_draw_count','strong_evidence_count','is_active','created_at','updated_at');
        $vals = array((int)$userId,(int)$lotteryId,$db->quote((string)$lotteryName),$db->quote((string)$source),$db->quote((string)$method),(int)$baseRunId,(int)$baseRunId,$db->quote((string)$settingsJson),$db->quote((string)($computedLock['status'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($recommendationLevel['label'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionProgress['level_name'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionLock['stage'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($precisionLock['control_label'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)round((float)($precisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0),4)),$db->quote((string)round((float)($precisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100),4)),$db->quote((string)($evidenceIntel['summary'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($computedLock['reason'] ?? '')),$db->quote((string)($cluster['cluster_key'] ?? '')),(int)($computedLock['cluster_support'] ?? 0),(int)($computedLock['cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0),(int)($evidenceIntel['strong_count'] ?? 0),1,$db->quote($now),$db->quote($now));
        $q = 'INSERT INTO ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_current_locked_settings') . ' (`' . implode('`,`', $cols) . '`) VALUES (' . implode(',', $vals) . ')';
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        return (int)$db->insertid();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[MLE Lock] save error: ' . $e->getMessage()); return 0; }
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db) {
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    $sql1 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$headerTable}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_name` varchar(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `batch_source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'advisory',
  `batch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Precision Focus Batch',
  `source_page` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MyLottoExpert',
  `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `test_variable` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `range_min` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `range_max` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `recommended_value` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_lock_stage` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `recommendation_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `precision_progress_level` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `evidence_summary` text,
  `base_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `locked_settings_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    $sql2 = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$runTable}` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `batch_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `user_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lottery_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `run_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `run_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `is_control` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `full_settings_json` mediumtext,
  `test_variable` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `test_value` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_batch_id` (`batch_id`),
  KEY `idx_user_lottery` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci";
    try { $db->setQuery($sql1); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    try { $db->setQuery($sql2); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    try { $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__mle_skai_batch_header', false); $names = is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array(); if (!in_array('batch_type', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `batch_type` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Precision Focus Batch' AFTER `batch_source`"); $db->execute(); } if (!in_array('source_page', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `source_page` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MyLottoExpert' AFTER `batch_type`"); $db->execute(); } if (!in_array('locked_settings_id', $names, true)) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `" . $headerTable . "` ADD COLUMN `locked_settings_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `base_settings_id`"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
}

function mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, $tableName)
{
    try {
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns($tableName, false);
        return is_array($cols) ? array_keys($cols) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return array();
    }
}

function mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $rawTableName)
{
    try {
        $tables = $db->getTableList();
        return is_array($tables) && in_array($rawTableName, $tables, true);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function mylottoexpertBuildBatchSettingsSummary($settings)
{
    if (!is_array($settings) || empty($settings)) {
        return '';
    }
    $map = array(
        'skai_run_mode' => 'Mode',
        'blend' => 'Blend Setting',
        'skai_blend_ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'blend_ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'ai_pct' => 'Blend Setting',
        'skai_window_size' => 'History Window',
        'skip_window' => 'History Window',
        'draws_used' => 'Past Draws Checked',
        'best_window' => 'Best History Search',
        'auto_tune' => 'Auto Adjust',
        'training_style' => 'Training Style'
    );
    $parts = array();
    foreach ($map as $key => $label) {
        if (!array_key_exists($key, $settings) || $settings[$key] === '' || $settings[$key] === null) {
            continue;
        }
        if ($label === 'Blend Setting' && ($key === 'skai_blend_ai_pct' || $key === 'blend_ai_pct' || $key === 'ai_pct')) {
            $parts[] = $label . ': ' . mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($settings[$key]) . '%';
            continue;
        }
        $value = $settings[$key];
        if ($value === 1 || $value === '1') {
            $value = 'On';
        } elseif ($value === 0 || $value === '0') {
            $value = 'Off';
        }
        $parts[] = $label . ': ' . (string)$value;
        if (count($parts) >= 6) {
            break;
        }
    }
    return implode(' | ', $parts);
}

function mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $userId, $lotteryId)
{
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    if ($batchId <= 0 || $userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) {
        return array();
    }
    $runCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_run');
    if (empty($runCols)) {
        return array();
    }
    $selectCols = array('id', 'batch_id', 'user_id', 'lottery_id', 'run_order', 'run_name', 'is_control', 'source', 'method', 'test_variable', 'test_value', 'status', 'full_settings_json', 'settings_json');
    $select = array();
    foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $runCols, true)) {
            $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
        }
    }
    if (empty($select)) {
        return array();
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('run_order') . ' ASC');
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $rows = array();
    }
    $rows = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
    foreach ($rows as $idx => $row) {
        $jsonRaw = '';
        if (isset($row['full_settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['full_settings_json']) !== '') {
            $jsonRaw = (string)$row['full_settings_json'];
        } elseif (isset($row['settings_json']) && trim((string)$row['settings_json']) !== '') {
            $jsonRaw = (string)$row['settings_json'];
        }
        $settings = array();
        if ($jsonRaw !== '') {
            $tmp = json_decode($jsonRaw, true);
            if (is_array($tmp)) {
                $settings = $tmp;
            }
        }
        $rows[$idx]['_settings'] = $settings;
        $rows[$idx]['_summary'] = mylottoexpertBuildBatchSettingsSummary($settings);
    }
    return $rows;
}

function mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)$batchId;
    $out = array('saved_count' => 0, 'saved_run_count' => 0, 'matched_saved_ids' => array(), 'matched_run_orders' => array());
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0 || $batchId <= 0) {
        return $out;
    }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers')) {
        return $out;
    }
    $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) {
        return $out;
    }

    if (in_array('source_batch_id', $cols, true)) {
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('COUNT(*)')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $out['saved_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $out['saved_count'] = 0;
        }
        if (in_array('source_batch_run_id', $cols, true)) {
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('COUNT(DISTINCT ' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ')')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ' > 0');
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $out['saved_run_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $out['saved_run_count'] = 0;
            }
        } else {
            $out['saved_run_count'] = $out['saved_count'];
        }
    }

    if ((int)$out['saved_run_count'] <= 0) {
        $selectCols = array('id', 'label', 'settings_json', 'prediction_target_json', 'source_batch_id', 'source_batch_run_id', 'source_batch_run_order', 'origin_source', 'source');
        $select = array();
        foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
            if (in_array($col, $cols, true)) {
                $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
            }
        }
        if (!empty($select)) {
            try {
                $likeBatch = '%' . $db->escape('Batch ' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $jsonLike1 = '%' . $db->escape('"source_batch_id":' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $jsonLike2 = '%' . $db->escape('"batch_id":' . $batchId, true) . '%';
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select($select)
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
                    ->where('(' .
                        (in_array('label', $cols, true) ? $db->quoteName('label') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($likeBatch, false) : '0') .
                        (in_array('settings_json', $cols, true) ? ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('settings_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike1, false) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('settings_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike2, false) : '') .
                        (in_array('prediction_target_json', $cols, true) ? ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike1, false) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_json') . ' LIKE ' . $db->quote($jsonLike2, false) : '') .
                    ')')
                    ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                    ->setLimit(100);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $rows = array();
            }
            $rows = is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
            $runOrders = array();
            $savedIds = array();
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                $savedId = (int)($row['id'] ?? 0);
                if ($savedId > 0) { $savedIds[$savedId] = true; }
                $order = 0;
                foreach (array('source_batch_run_order', 'source_batch_run_id') as $orderCol) {
                    if (isset($row[$orderCol]) && (int)$row[$orderCol] > 0) { $order = (int)$row[$orderCol]; break; }
                }
                if ($order <= 0 && !empty($row['label']) && preg_match('/Run\s+(\d+)/i', (string)$row['label'], $m)) {
                    $order = (int)$m[1];
                }
                if ($order <= 0) {
                    foreach (array('settings_json', 'prediction_target_json') as $jsonCol) {
                        if (empty($row[$jsonCol])) { continue; }
                        $tmp = json_decode((string)$row[$jsonCol], true);
                        if (!is_array($tmp)) { continue; }
                        $tracking = array();
                        if (isset($tmp['_batch_tracking']) && is_array($tmp['_batch_tracking'])) { $tracking = $tmp['_batch_tracking']; }
                        elseif (isset($tmp['batch_tracking']) && is_array($tmp['batch_tracking'])) { $tracking = $tmp['batch_tracking']; }
                        if (!empty($tracking)) {
                            if ((int)($tracking['source_batch_id'] ?? $tracking['batch_id'] ?? 0) === $batchId) {
                                $order = (int)($tracking['source_batch_run_order'] ?? $tracking['run_order'] ?? $tracking['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0);
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if ($order > 0) { $runOrders[$order] = true; }
            }
            if (!empty($savedIds)) {
                $out['saved_count'] = max((int)$out['saved_count'], count($savedIds));
                $out['saved_run_count'] = max((int)$out['saved_run_count'], !empty($runOrders) ? count($runOrders) : count($savedIds));
                $out['matched_saved_ids'] = array_keys($savedIds);
                $out['matched_run_orders'] = array_keys($runOrders);
            }
        }
    }

    return $out;
}

function mylottoexpertReconcilePrecisionBatchStatus($db, $userId, $lotteryId, array $header, array $runs)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $batchId = (int)($header['id'] ?? 0);
    $status = strtolower(trim((string)($header['status'] ?? 'pending')));
    $runCount = count($runs);
    $generatedRunStatusCount = 0;
    $failedRunStatusCount = 0;
    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $runStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($run['status'] ?? '')));
        if (in_array($runStatus, array('generated', 'completed', 'saved', 'scored'), true)) {
            $generatedRunStatusCount++;
        } elseif (in_array($runStatus, array('failed', 'error'), true)) {
            $failedRunStatusCount++;
        }
    }
    $saveCounts = mylottoexpertCountGeneratedPrecisionBatchSaves($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $batchId);
    $savedRunCount = (int)($saveCounts['saved_run_count'] ?? 0);
    $savedCount = (int)($saveCounts['saved_count'] ?? 0);
    $effectiveGeneratedCount = max($generatedRunStatusCount, $savedRunCount);

    $computedStatus = $status !== '' ? $status : 'pending';
    if ($runCount >= 9 && $effectiveGeneratedCount >= 9) {
        $computedStatus = 'generated';
    } elseif ($effectiveGeneratedCount > 0) {
        $computedStatus = 'partially_generated';
    } elseif ($failedRunStatusCount > 0 && $failedRunStatusCount >= max(1, $runCount)) {
        $computedStatus = 'failed';
    }

    $header['_saved_count'] = $savedCount;
    $header['_saved_run_count'] = $savedRunCount;
    $header['_generated_run_status_count'] = $generatedRunStatusCount;
    $header['_effective_generated_count'] = $effectiveGeneratedCount;
    $header['_computed_status'] = $computedStatus;
    $header['_is_not_started'] = in_array($computedStatus, array('pending', 'ready'), true) && $effectiveGeneratedCount === 0;
    $header['_is_in_progress'] = ($computedStatus === 'partially_generated') || ($effectiveGeneratedCount > 0 && $effectiveGeneratedCount < 9);
    $header['_is_generated'] = in_array($computedStatus, array('generated', 'completed', 'scored'), true) || $effectiveGeneratedCount >= 9;

    if ($batchId > 0 && $computedStatus !== $status) {
        try {
            $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
            if (in_array('status', $cols, true)) {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                    ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($computedStatus))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }

    return $header;
}

function mylottoexpertLoadPrecisionLockBatchesForLottery($db, $userId, $lotteryId)
{
    $userId = (int)$userId;
    $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
    $result = array('available' => false, 'ready' => array(), 'history' => array());
    if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) {
        return $result;
    }
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $headerTable) || !mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $runTable)) {
        return $result;
    }
    $headerCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
    if (empty($headerCols)) {
        return $result;
    }
    $result['available'] = true;
    $selectCols = array('id', 'user_id', 'lottery_id', 'lottery_name', 'batch_name', 'batch_type', 'batch_source', 'source_page', 'status', 'created_at', 'test_variable', 'range_min', 'range_max', 'recommended_value', 'precision_lock_stage', 'recommendation_level', 'precision_progress_level', 'evidence_summary');
    $select = array();
    foreach ($selectCols as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $headerCols, true)) {
            $select[] = $db->quoteName($col);
        }
    }
    if (empty($select)) {
        return $result;
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($select)
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId)
            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
        $db->setQuery($q, 0, 50);
        $headers = $db->loadAssocList();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $headers = array();
    }
    $headers = is_array($headers) ? $headers : array();
    foreach ($headers as $header) {
        $batchId = (int)($header['id'] ?? 0);
        if ($batchId <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('COUNT(*)')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . $batchId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $header['run_count'] = (int)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $header['run_count'] = 0;
        }
        $header['runs'] = mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $userId, $lotteryId);
        $header = mylottoexpertReconcilePrecisionBatchStatus($db, $userId, $lotteryId, $header, $header['runs']);
        $status = strtolower(trim((string)($header['_computed_status'] ?? ($header['status'] ?? ''))));
        if (!empty($header['_is_not_started'])) {
            $result['ready'][] = $header;
        } elseif (!empty($header['_is_in_progress'])) {
            if (!isset($result['in_progress']) || !is_array($result['in_progress'])) { $result['in_progress'] = array(); }
            $result['in_progress'][] = $header;
        } else {
            $result['history'][] = $header;
        }
    }
    return $result;
}

function mleAdvisoryResolveBatchPhaseFromType($batchType)
{
    $batchType = strtolower(trim((string)$batchType));
    if ($batchType === '') {
        return 'settings';
    }
    if (strpos($batchType, 'history horizon') !== false || strpos($batchType, 'horizon') !== false || strpos($batchType, 'window') !== false) {
        return 'horizon';
    }
    if (strpos($batchType, 'settings') !== false || strpos($batchType, 'precision focus') !== false || strpos($batchType, 'next settings') !== false) {
        return 'settings';
    }
    return 'settings';
}

function mleAdvisoryBuildSequentialBatchPhaseState(array $batchQueueData, array $horizonPlan, array $settingsPlan, $topMethodKey)
{
    $topMethodKey = strtolower(trim((string)$topMethodKey));
    $state = array(
        'current_phase' => 'regular_evidence_building',
        'primary_plan' => 'regular',
        'primary_label' => 'Build regular SKAI evidence',
        'horizon_status' => 'building_evidence',
        'settings_status' => 'locked_until_horizon_scored',
        'horizon_has_ready' => false,
        'horizon_has_in_progress' => false,
        'horizon_has_generated' => false,
        'horizon_has_scored' => false,
        'settings_has_ready' => false,
        'settings_has_in_progress' => false,
        'settings_has_generated' => false,
        'settings_has_scored' => false,
        'settings_locked' => true,
        'message' => 'Run regular SKAI batches and score completed draws until the History Window test is ready.'
    );

    if ($topMethodKey !== 'skai') {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'method_learning';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'regular';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Keep building method evidence';
        $state['settings_status'] = 'not_applicable';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
        $state['message'] = 'This lottery is learning from a non-SKAI method track. Keep saving and scoring runs for this method.';
        return $state;
    }

    $groups = array('ready', 'in_progress', 'history');
    foreach ($groups as $group) {
        $items = is_array($batchQueueData[$group] ?? null) ? $batchQueueData[$group] : array();
        foreach ($items as $item) {
            $phase = mleAdvisoryResolveBatchPhaseFromType($item['batch_type'] ?? '');
            $status = strtolower(trim((string)($item['_computed_status'] ?? ($item['status'] ?? ''))));
            $isReady = !empty($item['_is_not_started']) || $group === 'ready' || in_array($status, array('pending','ready'), true);
            $isInProgress = !empty($item['_is_in_progress']) || $group === 'in_progress' || in_array($status, array('partially_generated','running','in_progress'), true);
            $isGenerated = !empty($item['_is_generated']) || in_array($status, array('generated'), true);

            $isScored = in_array($status, array('completed','scored'), true);

            if ($phase === 'horizon') {
                if ($isReady) { $state['horizon_has_ready'] = true; }
                if ($isInProgress) { $state['horizon_has_in_progress'] = true; }
                if ($isGenerated) { $state['horizon_has_generated'] = true; }
                if ($isScored) { $state['horizon_has_scored'] = true; }
            } else {
                if ($isReady) { $state['settings_has_ready'] = true; }
                if ($isInProgress) { $state['settings_has_in_progress'] = true; }
                if ($isGenerated) { $state['settings_has_generated'] = true; }
                if ($isScored) { $state['settings_has_scored'] = true; }
            }
        }
    }

    if (!empty($state['horizon_has_scored'])) {
        $state['horizon_status'] = 'scored';
        $state['settings_locked'] = false;
    } elseif (!empty($state['horizon_has_generated'])) {
        $state['horizon_status'] = 'generated_waiting_for_score';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
    } elseif (!empty($state['horizon_has_in_progress'])) {
        $state['horizon_status'] = 'in_progress';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
    } elseif (!empty($state['horizon_has_ready'])) {
        $state['horizon_status'] = 'ready_to_run';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
    } elseif (!empty($horizonPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
        $state['horizon_status'] = 'ready_to_create';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
    }

    if (!empty($state['settings_has_scored'])) {
        $state['settings_status'] = 'scored';
    } elseif (!empty($state['settings_has_generated'])) {
        $state['settings_status'] = 'generated_waiting_for_score';
    } elseif (!empty($state['settings_has_in_progress'])) {
        $state['settings_status'] = 'in_progress';
    } elseif (!empty($state['settings_has_ready'])) {
        $state['settings_status'] = 'ready_to_run';
    } elseif (empty($state['settings_locked']) && !empty($settingsPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
        $state['settings_status'] = 'ready_to_create';
    }

    if (empty($state['horizon_has_scored'])) {
        if ($state['horizon_status'] === 'ready_to_create') {
            $state['current_phase'] = 'horizon_ready';
            $state['primary_plan'] = 'horizon';
            $state['primary_label'] = 'Create History Window 9-Run Batch';
            $state['message'] = 'Run the History Window batch first so LottoExpert can identify the best history depth before testing settings.';
        } elseif ($state['horizon_status'] === 'ready_to_run') {
            $state['current_phase'] = 'horizon_ready_to_run';
            $state['primary_plan'] = 'horizon_existing';
            $state['primary_label'] = 'Run ready History Window batch in SKAI';
            $state['message'] = 'A History Window batch already exists. Run it in SKAI before creating a Settings Precision batch.';
        } elseif ($state['horizon_status'] === 'in_progress') {
            $state['current_phase'] = 'horizon_in_progress';
            $state['primary_plan'] = 'horizon_existing';
            $state['primary_label'] = 'Review History Window batch progress';
            $state['message'] = 'The History Window batch is in progress. Finish the 9 runs and wait for automatic scoring after the next draw before creating a Settings Precision batch.';
        } elseif ($state['horizon_status'] === 'generated_waiting_for_score') {
            $state['current_phase'] = 'horizon_waiting_score';
            $state['primary_plan'] = 'horizon_existing';
            $state['primary_label'] = 'History Window batch awaiting automatic scoring';
            $state['message'] = 'The History Window runs were generated. LottoExpert will score them automatically after the official draw so the best window can be selected before settings are tested.';
        } else {
            $state['current_phase'] = 'regular_evidence_building';
            $state['primary_plan'] = 'regular';
            $state['primary_label'] = 'Build regular SKAI evidence';
            $state['message'] = 'Keep running regular SKAI batches until the History Window test is ready.';
        }
        $state['settings_status'] = 'locked_until_horizon_scored';
        $state['settings_locked'] = true;
        return $state;
    }

    if (!empty($state['settings_has_ready'])) {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'settings_ready_to_run';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'settings_existing';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Run ready Settings Precision batch in SKAI';
        $state['message'] = 'The History Window phase is scored. A Settings Precision batch is ready to run.';
    } elseif (!empty($state['settings_has_in_progress'])) {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'settings_in_progress';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'settings_existing';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Review Settings Precision batch progress';
        $state['message'] = 'The Settings Precision batch is in progress. Finish the runs and wait for automatic scoring after the draw before creating another one.';
    } elseif (!empty($state['settings_has_generated'])) {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'settings_waiting_score';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'settings_existing';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Settings Precision batch awaiting automatic scoring';
        $state['message'] = 'The Settings Precision runs were generated. LottoExpert will score them automatically after the official draw before another batch is created.';
    } elseif (!empty($settingsPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'settings_ready';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'settings';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Create Settings Precision 9-Run Batch';
        $state['message'] = 'The History Window phase is scored. Now test one setting while the window baseline stays stable.';
    } else {
        $state['current_phase'] = 'settings_building_evidence';
        $state['primary_plan'] = 'regular';
        $state['primary_label'] = 'Build settings evidence';
        $state['message'] = 'The History Window phase is scored, but LottoExpert still needs a clearer one-setting recommendation.';
    }

    return $state;
}

function mleAdvisorySequentialPhaseAllowsSettings(array $phaseState)
{
    return empty($phaseState['settings_locked']) && !empty($phaseState['horizon_has_scored']);
}

function mylottoexpertEnsureBatchTrackingColumnsOnSavedPredictions($db)
{
    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $rawName = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
    $cols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    if (empty($cols)) {
        return;
    }
    $needed = array(
        'source_batch_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `origin_source`",
        'source_batch_run_id' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_run_id` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_id`",
        'source_batch_type' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_type` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source_batch_run_id`",
        'source_batch_run_order' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_run_order` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_type`",
        'source_batch_origin' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `source_batch_origin` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `source_batch_run_order`",
        'batch_control_flag' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `batch_control_flag` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `source_batch_origin`",
        'regular_main_numbers_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `regular_main_numbers_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `extra_ball_numbers`",
        'regular_extra_numbers_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `regular_extra_numbers_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `regular_main_numbers_json`",
        'main_display_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `main_display_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `regular_extra_numbers_json`",
        'extra_display_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `extra_display_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `main_display_json`",
        'canonical_main_display' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `canonical_main_display` TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `extra_display_json`",
        'canonical_extra_display' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `canonical_extra_display` TEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL AFTER `canonical_main_display`",
        'skai_top_n_numbers' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `skai_top_n_numbers` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 20 AFTER `canonical_extra_display`",
        'skai_top_n_combos' => "ALTER TABLE `{$rawName}` ADD COLUMN `skai_top_n_combos` INT(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `skai_top_n_numbers`"
    );
    foreach ($needed as $col => $sql) {
        if (in_array($col, $cols, true)) {
            continue;
        }
        try {
            $db->setQuery($sql);
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
    }
}

if ($__mleAllowMaintenance || $__mleAction !== '') {
    mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db);
    mylottoexpertEnsureCurrentLockedSettingsTable($db);
    mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db);
    if (function_exists('mleOptimizerEnsureTables')) { mleOptimizerEnsureTables($db); }
    mylottoexpertEnsurePrintManifestTable($db);
}

if ($__mleAction === 'save_print_manifest') {
    if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) !== 'POST') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'POST required.'));
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This action is not available in demo mode.'));
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
    }
    mylottoexpertEnsurePrintManifestTable($db);
    $manifestJson = trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('manifest_json', ''));
    $manifest = json_decode($manifestJson, true);
    if (json_last_error() !== JSON_ERROR_NONE || !is_array($manifest)) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid manifest payload.'));
    }
    $rows = isset($manifest['rows']) && is_array($manifest['rows']) ? $manifest['rows'] : array();
    if (empty($rows)) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'No printed rows were provided.'));
    }
    $lotteryId = (int)$app->input->post->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 && isset($manifest['lottery_id'])) {
        $lotteryId = (int)$manifest['lottery_id'];
    }
    $rowIds = array();
    $runUuids = array();
    foreach ($rows as $row) {
        if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
        foreach (array('source_record_id','saved_id','row_id') as $k) {
            if (!empty($row[$k])) {
                $v = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$row[$k]);
                if ($v !== '' && !in_array($v, $rowIds, true)) { $rowIds[] = $v; }
            }
        }
        foreach (array('run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key') as $k) {
            if (!empty($row[$k])) {
                $v = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.:]/', '', (string)$row[$k]);
                if ($v !== '' && !in_array($v, $runUuids, true)) { $runUuids[] = $v; }
            }
        }
    }
    $manifestHash = trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('manifest_hash', ''));
    $manifestHash = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', $manifestHash);
    if ($manifestHash === '') {
        $manifestHash = hash('sha256', $manifestJson);
    }
    $gameId = trim((string)($manifest['game_id'] ?? $app->input->post->getString('game_id', '')));
    $targetDrawLabel = trim((string)($manifest['target_draw_label'] ?? ''));
    $batchUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($manifest['batch_uuid'] ?? ''));
    $predictionTargetId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($manifest['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
    $predictionTargetKey = trim((string)($manifest['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''));
    $analysisMethodKey = function_exists('mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey')
        ? mleAdvisoryNormalizeAnalysisMethodKey($manifest['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')
        : strtolower(trim((string)($manifest['analysis_method_key'] ?? '')));
    $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->insert($db->quoteName('#__mle_prediction_print_manifest'))
            ->columns(array(
                $db->quoteName('user_id'), $db->quoteName('lottery_id'), $db->quoteName('game_id'),
                $db->quoteName('target_draw_label'), $db->quoteName('batch_uuid'),
                $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id'), $db->quoteName('prediction_target_key'),
                $db->quoteName('analysis_method_key'), $db->quoteName('manifest_hash'),
                $db->quoteName('row_ids_json'), $db->quoteName('run_uuids_json'),
                $db->quoteName('manifest_json'), $db->quoteName('printed_at'), $db->quoteName('created_at')
            ))
            ->values(implode(',', array(
                (int)$workspaceUserId,
                (int)$lotteryId,
                $db->quote($gameId),
                $db->quote($targetDrawLabel),
                $db->quote($batchUuid),
                $db->quote($predictionTargetId),
                $db->quote($predictionTargetKey),
                $db->quote($analysisMethodKey),
                $db->quote($manifestHash),
                $db->quote(json_encode($rowIds, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)),
                $db->quote(json_encode($runUuids, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)),
                $db->quote($manifestJson),
                $db->quote($now),
                $db->quote($now)
            )));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'manifest_id' => (int)$db->insertid(), 'manifest_hash' => $manifestHash, 'row_count' => count($rows)));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not save print manifest.'));
    }
}

if ($__mleAction === 'get_print_manifest') {
    if (strtoupper((string)$app->input->getMethod()) === 'POST' && !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
    }
    mylottoexpertEnsurePrintManifestTable($db);
    $lotteryId = (int)$app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    $gameId = trim((string)$app->input->getString('game_id', ''));
    if ($lotteryId <= 0 && $gameId === '') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Missing lottery identity.'));
    }
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_prediction_print_manifest'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
        if ($lotteryId > 0) {
            $q->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
        }
        if ($gameId !== '') {
            $q->where('(' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId) . ' OR ' . $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ')');
        }
        $q->order($db->quoteName('printed_at') . ' DESC')->setLimit(10);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        $out = array();
        foreach ((array)$rows as $row) {
            $manifest = json_decode((string)($row['manifest_json'] ?? ''), true);
            if (!is_array($manifest)) { $manifest = array(); }
            $out[] = array(
                'id' => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
                'lottery_id' => (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
                'game_id' => (string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''),
                'target_draw_label' => (string)($row['target_draw_label'] ?? ''),
                'batch_uuid' => (string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'prediction_target_id' => (string)($row['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
                'prediction_target_key' => (string)($row['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
                'analysis_method_key' => (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
                'manifest_hash' => (string)($row['manifest_hash'] ?? ''),
                'row_ids' => mylottoexpertNormalizePrintManifestIdList($row['row_ids_json'] ?? ''),
                'run_uuids' => mylottoexpertNormalizePrintManifestIdList($row['run_uuids_json'] ?? ''),
                'printed_at' => (string)($row['printed_at'] ?? ''),
                'manifest' => $manifest
            );
        }
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'manifests' => $out));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not load print manifest.'));
    }
}

if ($__mleAction === 'play_set_payload') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
    $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);

    $playSetId = $app->input->getInt('play_set_id', 0);
    if ($playSetId <= 0) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Missing play_set_id.'));
        exit;
    }

    $snCols = array();
    try {
        $snColsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $snCols = is_array($snColsRaw) ? array_keys($snColsRaw) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $snCols = array();
    }

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select('*')
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$playSetId)
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols, true)) {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')" .
            ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND (" . $db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set' OR LOWER(COALESCE(" . $db->quoteName('source') . ",'')) IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map')))" .
            ')'
        );
    } else {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
    $row = $db->loadAssoc();

    if (empty($row)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Play set not found.'));
        exit;
    }

    $meta = mylottoexpertResolvePlayIntentMeta($row);
    $main = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
    $extra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($row['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true);
    if (empty($main)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Play set has no main numbers.'));
        exit;
    }

    $__psSettingsJson = '';
    foreach (array('settings_json', 'settings', 'params_json', 'params') as $__psSKey) {
        if (isset($row[$__psSKey]) && (string)$row[$__psSKey] !== '') {
            $__psSettingsJson = (string)$row[$__psSKey];
            break;
        }
    }
    $payload = array(
        'play_set_id'                => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
        'lottery_id'                 => (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
        'target_game_id'             => trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? '')),

        'target_prediction_family'   => trim((string)($row['target_prediction_family'] ?? $row['prediction_family'] ?? '')),
        'target_prediction_type'     => trim((string)($row['target_prediction_type'] ?? $row['prediction_type'] ?? '')),
        'target_pick_size'           => (int)($row['target_pick_size'] ?? count($main)),
        'target_extra_count'         => (int)($row['target_extra_count'] ?? count($extra)),
        'main_numbers'               => $main,
        'extra_ball_numbers'         => $extra,
        'label'                      => trim((string)($row['label'] ?? '')),
        'origin_source'              => $meta['origin_source'],
        'save_intent'                => $meta['save_intent'],
        'play_status'                => $meta['play_status'],
        'settings_json'              => $__psSettingsJson,
        'risk_profile'               => trim((string)($row['risk_profile'] ?? '')),
        'strategy'                   => trim((string)($row['strategy'] ?? ''))
    );

    echo json_encode(array('ok' => true, 'payload' => $payload), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    exit;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'play_sets_list') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
    $app->setHeader('Pragma', 'no-cache', true);

    $snCols2 = array();
    try {
        $snColsRaw2 = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        $snCols2 = is_array($snColsRaw2) ? array_keys($snColsRaw2) : array();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $snCols2 = array();
    }

    $q = $db->getQuery(true)
        ->select(array(
            $db->quoteName('id'),
            $db->quoteName('label'),
            $db->quoteName('lottery_id'),
            $db->quoteName('main_numbers'),
            $db->quoteName('extra_ball_numbers'),
            $db->quoteName('date_saved'),
            $db->quoteName('source')
        ))
        ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);

    if (in_array('origin_source', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('origin_source'));
    }
    if (in_array('play_notes', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('play_notes'));
    }
    if (in_array('play_status', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->select($db->quoteName('play_status'));
        $q->where($db->quoteName('play_status') . " <> 'archived'");
    }
    if (in_array('save_intent', $snCols2, true)) {
        $q->where(
            '(' .
            $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " IN ('play_set','custom_play','wheel_candidate')" .
            ' OR (' . $db->quoteName('save_intent') . " = '' AND (" . $db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set' OR LOWER(COALESCE(" . $db->quoteName('source') . ",'')) IN ('heatmap_manual','manual_heatmap','heatmap','heat_map','frequency_heatmap','frequency_map')))" .
            ')'
        );
    } else {
        $q->where($db->quoteName('source') . " = 'strategy_set'");
    }
    $q->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
    $db->setQuery($q, 0, 50);
    $listRows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: array();

    $listSets = array();
    foreach ($listRows as $lRow) {
        $lMain = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($lRow['main_numbers'] ?? '', true);
        if (empty($lMain)) { continue; }
        $lLabel = trim((string)($lRow['label'] ?? ''));
        $lOrigin = strtolower(trim((string)($lRow['origin_source'] ?? $lRow['source'] ?? '')));
        if (function_exists('mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource') && mylottoexpertIsHeatmapSavedSource($lOrigin)) {
            $lBadge = 'From Heatmap';
        } elseif (in_array($lOrigin, array('skai_prediction', 'prediction', 'ai_prediction'), true)) {
            $lBadge = 'From Prediction';
        } elseif (in_array($lOrigin, array('strategy_builder', 'strategy_set'), true) || ($lRow['source'] ?? '') === 'strategy_set') {
            $lBadge = 'From Strategy Builder';
        } elseif (in_array($lOrigin, array('manual', 'custom'), true)) {
            $lBadge = 'Custom Selection';
        } else {
            $lBadge = 'Saved Set';
        }
        $lSavedTs = strtotime((string)($lRow['date_saved'] ?? ''));
        $lSavedLabel = $lSavedTs ? date('M j, Y', $lSavedTs) : trim((string)($lRow['date_saved'] ?? ''));
        $listSets[] = array(
            'id'                 => (int)$lRow['id'],
            'label'              => $lLabel !== '' ? $lLabel : ('Play Set #' . (int)$lRow['id']),
            'main_numbers'       => $lMain,
            'extra_ball_numbers' => mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv($lRow['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? '', true),
            'source_badge'       => $lBadge,
            'date_saved'         => $lSavedLabel,
            'notes'              => trim((string)($lRow['play_notes'] ?? '')),
        );
    }
    echo json_encode(array('ok' => true, 'sets' => $listSets), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    exit;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'wheel_favorites_list') {
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to use this feature.'));
    }
    $__wfData = mylottoexpertLoadHydratedWheelFavorites($db, $workspaceUserId);
    mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array(
        'ok'             => true,
        'favorites'      => $__wfData['available'],
        'missing'        => $__wfData['missing'],
        'favorite_ids'   => $__wfData['ids'],
        'catalog_loaded' => $__wfData['catalog_loaded'],
    ));
}

if ($__mleAction === 'save_wheel_favorite') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'POST required.'));
    }
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to save favorites.'));
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This action is not available in demo mode.'));
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
    }
    $__rawSysId = $app->input->post->getString('system_id', '');
    $__sysId    = mylottoexpertSanitizeWheelSystemId($__rawSysId);
    if ($__sysId === '') {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid system ID.'));
    }

    $__saveCatalog = mylottoexpertLoadWheelCatalogFromJson();
    if (!empty($__saveCatalog) && !isset($__saveCatalog[$__sysId])) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This wheeling system could not be verified.'));
    }
    try {

        $__now      = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDate()->toSql();
        $__wfCols   = mylottoexpertGetWheelPrefCols($db);
        $__insCols  = array('user_id', 'system_id', 'created_at');
        $__insVals  = array((int)$workspaceUserId, $db->quote($__sysId), $db->quote($__now));
        if (isset($__wfCols['date_saved'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'date_saved';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote($__now);
        }
        if (isset($__wfCols['source'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'source';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote('json_catalog');
        }
        if (isset($__wfCols['status'])) {
            $__insCols[] = 'status';
            $__insVals[] = $db->quote('active');
        }

        $__legacySafe = array(
            'pick_size'         => '0',
            'number_range'      => '0',
            'assurance_level'   => $db->quote(''),
            'numbers_to_wheel'  => $db->quote(''),
            'pool_numbers_json' => $db->quote('[]'),
        );
        foreach ($__legacySafe as $__lc => $__lv) {
            if (isset($__wfCols[$__lc])) {
                $__insCols[] = $__lc;
                $__insVals[] = $__lv;
            }
        }

        $__quotedCols = array_map(function ($c) use ($db) { return $db->quoteName($c); }, $__insCols);
        $db->setQuery(
            "INSERT IGNORE INTO " . $db->quoteName('#__user_wheeling_preferences')
          . " (" . implode(', ', $__quotedCols) . ")"
          . " VALUES (" . implode(', ', $__insVals) . ")"
        );
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $__e) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not save favorite. Please try again.'));
    }
    $__wfIds = mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $workspaceUserId);
    mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Favorite wheeling system saved.', 'favorite_ids' => $__wfIds));
}

if ($__mleAction === 'remove_wheel_favorite') {

    $__isAjax = (isset($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) && strtolower($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest');

    $__removeRedirectPath = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->getPath();

    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST') {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'POST required.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Invalid request.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if ($user->guest || $workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'login_required' => true, 'error' => 'You must be logged in to manage favorites.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('You must be logged in to manage favorites.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'This action is not available in demo mode.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('This action is not available in demo mode.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid security token. Please refresh and try again.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session has expired. Please reload the page and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    $__rawSysId2 = $app->input->post->getString('system_id', '');
    $__sysId2    = mylottoexpertSanitizeWheelSystemId($__rawSysId2);
    if ($__sysId2 === '') {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid system ID.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Invalid system ID.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    try {
        $__delQ = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->delete($db->quoteName('#__user_wheeling_preferences'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id')   . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('system_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__sysId2));
        $db->setQuery($__delQ);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $__e) {
        if ($__isAjax) {
            mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Could not remove favorite. Please try again.'));
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('Could not remove favorite. Please try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
        exit;
    }
    $__wfIds2 = mylottoexpertLoadUserWheelFavoriteIds($db, $workspaceUserId);
    if ($__isAjax) {
        mylottoexpertJsonResponse(array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Favorite wheeling system removed.', 'favorite_ids' => $__wfIds2));
    }
    $app->enqueueMessage('Favorite wheeling system removed.', 'message');
    $app->redirect($__removeRedirectPath);
    exit;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'save_advisory_recipe') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot create a recommended settings run.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to create a recommended settings run.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advLotteryId    = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    $__advMethod       = strtolower(trim($app->input->getString('method', $app->input->getString('source_method', ''))));
    $__advSettingKey   = trim($app->input->getString('setting_key', ''));
    $__advSettingLabel = trim($app->input->getString('setting_label', ''));
    $__advOldValue     = trim($app->input->getString('old_value', ''));
    $__advNewValue     = trim($app->input->getString('new_value', ''));
    $__advReason       = trim($app->input->getString('reason', ''));
    $__advProofLabel   = trim($app->input->getString('proof_label', $app->input->getString('proof_level', '')));
    $__advBaseSavedId  = $app->input->getInt('base_saved_number_id', 0);
    $__advBaseRecipeId = $app->input->getInt('base_recipe_id', 0);
    if ($__advLotteryId <= 0 || $__advMethod === '' || $__advSettingKey === '' || $__advNewValue === '' || ($__advBaseSavedId <= 0 && $__advBaseRecipeId <= 0)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advParams = array();
    try {
        if ($__advBaseSavedId > 0) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__advBaseSavedId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $__baseRow = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($__baseRow) && !empty($__baseRow)) { $__advParams = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__baseRow); }
        }
        if (empty($__advParams) && $__advBaseRecipeId > 0) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__advBaseRecipeId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $__baseRecipe = $db->loadAssoc();
            if (is_array($__baseRecipe) && !empty($__baseRecipe)) {
                foreach (array('params','saved_params','settings_json') as $__pcol) {
                    if (!empty($__baseRecipe[$__pcol])) { $d = json_decode((string)$__baseRecipe[$__pcol], true); if (is_array($d)) { $__advParams = $d; break; } }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) { $__advParams = array(); }
    if (empty($__advParams)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__advParams[$__advSettingKey] = $__advNewValue;
    $__advMethodLabel = mleAdvisoryMethodLabel($__advMethod);
    $__advRecipeName = 'Recommended Next Settings Run - ' . $__advMethodLabel;
    if ($__advSettingLabel !== '') { $__advRecipeName .= ' - ' . $__advSettingLabel; }
    try {
        $__colsRaw = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_settings', false);
        $__cols = is_array($__colsRaw) ? array_keys($__colsRaw) : array();
        $__insertCols = array(); $__insertVals = array();
        $__add = function($col, $val) use (&$__insertCols, &$__insertVals, $__cols, $db) { if (in_array($col, $__cols, true)) { $__insertCols[] = $db->quoteName($col); $__insertVals[] = ($val === null ? 'NULL' : $db->quote((string)$val)); } };
        $__add('user_id', $workspaceUserId); $__add('lottery_id', $__advLotteryId); $__add('source', $__advMethod); $__add('setting_name', $__advRecipeName); $__add('label', $__advRecipeName);
        $__json = json_encode($__advParams, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        $__add('params', $__json); $__add('saved_params', $__json); $__add('settings_json', $__json); $__add('date_saved', date('Y-m-d H:i:s')); $__add('created_at', date('Y-m-d H:i:s'));
        $__add('advisory_reason', $__advReason); $__add('advisory_old_value', $__advOldValue); $__add('advisory_new_value', $__advNewValue); $__add('advisory_setting_key', $__advSettingKey); $__add('advisory_proof_level', $__advProofLabel); $__add('advisory_method', $__advMethod);
        if (empty($__insertCols)) { throw new \RuntimeException('No insert columns.'); }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings'))->columns($__insertCols)->values(implode(',', $__insertVals));
        $db->setQuery($q); $db->execute();
        $app->enqueueMessage('Recommended next settings run created. LottoExpert copied your strongest current settings and changed only ' . ($__advSettingLabel !== '' ? $__advSettingLabel : $__advSettingKey) . '.', 'message');
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE Advisory] save_advisory_recipe error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        $app->enqueueMessage('LottoExpert could not create the recommended next settings run because the full base settings could not be found. Please save the source settings first.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'save_current_locked_settings') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
