        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) { $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Current Locked Settings were not saved.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to save Current Locked Settings.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockLotteryId = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    if ($__lockLotteryId <= 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because LottoExpert could not identify the lottery.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockActive = mleAdvisoryBuildActiveSavedEvidence($db, $workspaceUserId);
    $__lockRows = isset($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows']) && is_array($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows']) ? $__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    if (empty($__lockRows)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockSavedById = array(); foreach ($__lockRows as $__lr) { $__lockSavedById[(int)($__lr['id'] ?? 0)] = $__lr; }
    $__lockPerf = mleAdvisoryLoadMatchedPerformance($db, $workspaceUserId, $__lockLotteryId, $__lockRows);
    $__lockLeaderboard = mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($__lockPerf);
    $__lockMethods = is_array($__lockLeaderboard['methods'] ?? null) ? $__lockLeaderboard['methods'] : array();
    if (empty($__lockMethods)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs completed scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockTopMethod = $__lockMethods[0];
    $__lockVisual = mleAdvisoryBuildVisualRunRows($__lockRows, $__lockPerf);
    $__lockEvidence = mleAdvisoryBuildEvidenceIntelligence($__lockVisual, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockComputed = is_array($__lockEvidence['current_locked_settings'] ?? null) ? $__lockEvidence['current_locked_settings'] : array();
    if (!mleAdvisoryCurrentLockReady($__lockComputed)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings are not ready yet. LottoExpert needs more repeated saved scored evidence for this lottery before locking a baseline.', 'warning'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockBaseRunId = 0; $__lockBestScore = -PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
    foreach ($__lockPerf as $__lp) { $__lq = (float)($__lp['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0) + ((int)($__lp['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) * 2.0; if ($__lq > $__lockBestScore) { $__lockBestScore = $__lq; $__lockBaseRunId = (int)($__lp['__saved_id'] ?? $__lp['run_id'] ?? 0); } }
    if ($__lockBaseRunId <= 0 && !empty($__lockRows[0]['id'])) { $__lockBaseRunId = (int)$__lockRows[0]['id']; }
    $__lockBaseSettings = array(); if ($__lockBaseRunId > 0 && !empty($__lockSavedById[$__lockBaseRunId])) { $__lockBaseSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__lockSavedById[$__lockBaseRunId]); }
    if (empty($__lockBaseSettings)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because the base settings record could not be confirmed.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; }
    $__lockPrecision = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($__lockPerf, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockDates = array(); foreach ($__lockPerf as $__ld) { $__lockDates[] = (string)($__ld['draw_date'] ?? ''); }
    $__lockSummary = array('total_runs'=>count($__lockRows),'scored_draws'=>count(array_unique(array_filter($__lockDates))),'true_cluster_support'=>(int)($__lockEvidence['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0),'true_cluster_draw_support'=>(int)($__lockEvidence['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0));
    $__lockPrecision['true_cluster_support'] = (int)$__lockSummary['true_cluster_support'];
    $__lockPrecision['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)$__lockSummary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
    $__lockSettingsAdv = mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($__lockPerf, $__lockSavedById, $__lockTopMethod['method']);
    $__lockBatch = mleAdvisoryBuildRecommendedSkaiBatchTest($__lockPrecision, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockSummary, $__lockComputed);
    $__lockLevel = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($__lockPrecision, $__lockSummary, $__lockTopMethod, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockBatch);
    $__lockProgress = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($__lockPrecision, $__lockSummary, $__lockLevel, $__lockSettingsAdv, $__lockBatch);
    $__lockLotteryName = (string)($__lockActive[$__lockLotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? '');
    $__lockId = mleAdvisoryPersistCurrentLockedSettings($db, $workspaceUserId, $__lockLotteryId, $__lockLotteryName, $__lockComputed, $__lockBaseSettings, $__lockBaseRunId, $__lockPrecision, $__lockLevel, $__lockProgress, $__lockEvidence, (string)($__lockTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai'), (string)($__lockTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai'));
    if ($__lockId > 0) { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings saved. LottoExpert can use this baseline for future SKAI batches for this lottery.', 'message'); }
    else { $app->enqueueMessage('Current Locked Settings were not saved because LottoExpert could not confirm a repeated settings baseline.', 'error'); }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'get_skai_single_run_settings') {

        exit;

    echo json_encode(array(

        'best_learning_score'        => (float)($__srsResult['best_learning_score'] ?? 0.0),

    ), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);

if ($__mleAction === 'create_skai_batch') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot create a SKAI batch test.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to create a SKAI batch test.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $__batchLotteryId = $app->input->getInt('lottery_id', 0);

    if ($__batchLotteryId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify the lottery.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    if (empty($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]) || !is_array($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId])) {
        $__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId] = array(
            'lottery_id' => (int)$__batchLotteryId,
            'lottery_name' => function_exists('mylottoexpertV97ResolveLotteryDisplayName') ? mylottoexpertV97ResolveLotteryDisplayName($db, $__batchLotteryId) : ('Lottery ID ' . (int)$__batchLotteryId),

        );

    if (empty($__batchSkaiMetaCheck['ok'])) {
        error_log('[MLE 9BATCH] Missing SKAI gameId for lottery_id=' . (int)$__batchLotteryId . '; missing=' . implode(',', (array)$__batchSkaiMetaCheck['missing']) . '; meta=' . json_encode(array(
            'gameId' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gameId'] ?? ''),
            'st' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['st'] ?? ''),
            'stn' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['stn'] ?? ''),
            'gm' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gm'] ?? ''),
            'base_url' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['base_url'] ?? '')
        ), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES));
        $app->enqueueMessage('9BATCH could not open SKAI because the selected lottery is missing its unique gameId. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $__batchForceNextSettings = ((int)$app->input->getInt('mle_force_next_batch', 0) === 1);
    $__batchRequestedPlan = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->getCmd('mle_batch_plan', 'recommended')));
    $__batchPlanAliases = array(
        'precision' => 'settings',
        'regular' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'regular_batch' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'regular_skai_batch' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'regular_skai' => 'regular_9_batch',
        'regular_9_batch' => 'regular_9_batch'
    );
    if (isset($__batchPlanAliases[$__batchRequestedPlan])) {
        $__batchRequestedPlan = (string)$__batchPlanAliases[$__batchRequestedPlan];
    }
    if (!in_array($__batchRequestedPlan, array('recommended','horizon','settings','regular_9_batch'), true)) {
        $__batchRequestedPlan = 'recommended';
    }
    $__batchRows = is_array($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['rows'] ?? null) ? $__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['rows'] : array();
    $__batchTargetDrawDate = trim((string)$app->input->getString('target_draw_date', ''));
    if ($__batchTargetDrawDate !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $__batchTargetDrawDate)) {
        $__batchTargetDrawDate = '';
    }
    if ($__batchTargetDrawDate === '') {
        foreach ($__batchRows as $__batchDateRow) {
            $__batchDateCandidate = trim((string)($__batchDateRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $__batchDateRow['next_draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($__batchDateCandidate !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $__batchDateCandidate)) {
                $__batchTargetDrawDate = $__batchDateCandidate;
                break;
            }
        }
        unset($__batchDateRow, $__batchDateCandidate);
    }

    $__batchSharedProfile = function_exists('mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile') ? mylottoexpertBuildAndSaveSharedSkaiHistoryWindowProfile($db, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchRows) : array();
    $__batchGlobalIntel = is_array($__batchSharedProfile['global_settings_intelligence'] ?? null) ? $__batchSharedProfile['global_settings_intelligence'] : array();
    $__batchHasGlobalPrior = function_exists('mylottoexpertV97GlobalIntelHasUsableEvidence') ? mylottoexpertV97GlobalIntelHasUsableEvidence($__batchGlobalIntel) : !empty($__batchGlobalIntel);
    $__batchV97ResearchMode = $__batchHasPersonalSavedRows ? 'personal_plus_global' : ($__batchHasGlobalPrior ? 'global_starting_prior' : 'safe_discovery_baseline');
    $__batchSavedById = array();
    foreach ($__batchRows as $r) { $__batchSavedById[(int)($r['id'] ?? 0)] = $r; }

    $__batchLeaderboard = mleAdvisoryComputeMethodLeaderboardFromRows($__batchPerf);
    $__batchMethods = is_array($__batchLeaderboard['methods'] ?? null) ? $__batchLeaderboard['methods'] : array();
    if (empty($__batchMethods)) {

        $__batchTopMethod = array('method'=>'skai','label'=>'SKAI','count'=>0,'score'=>0);
        $__batchSettingsAdv = !empty($__batchGlobalIntel) ? mylottoexpertV80BuildSettingsAdviceFromGlobalIntel(array('has_advice'=>false), $__batchGlobalIntel) : array('has_advice'=>false);
        if (empty($__batchSettingsAdv['has_advice'])) {
            $__batchSettingsAdv = mylottoexpertV97BuildBaselineSettingsAdvice($__batchGlobalIntel);
        }
        $__batchPrecisionLock = array('has_range'=>false,'range_min'=>0,'range_max'=>100,'stage'=>'global_hive_starting_prior','true_cluster_support'=>0,'true_cluster_draw_support'=>0);
        $__batchScoredDraws = 0;
        $__batchEvidenceIntel = array('current_locked_settings'=>array(),'true_cluster_support'=>0,'true_cluster_draw_support'=>0);

        $__batchPersistedLock = array();
        $__batchSummary = array('total_runs'=>0,'scored_draws'=>0,'true_cluster_support'=>0,'true_cluster_draw_support'=>0,'global_learning_scope'=>'exact_lottery_only','v97_research_mode'=>$__batchV97ResearchMode);
    } else {
        $__batchTopMethod = $__batchMethods[0];
        $__batchSettingsAdv = mleAdvisoryComputeSettingsAdvisorFromRows($__batchPerf, $__batchSavedById, $__batchTopMethod['method']);
        $__batchPrecisionLock = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionLockData($__batchPerf, $__batchSavedById, $__batchTopMethod['method']);
        $__batchPerfDates = array();
        foreach ($__batchPerf as $__bp) { $__batchPerfDates[] = (string)($__bp['draw_date'] ?? ''); }

        unset($__batchPerfDates, $__bp);

        $__batchPersistedLock = mleAdvisoryLoadCurrentLockedSettings($db, $workspaceUserId, $__batchLotteryId);
        if (!empty($__batchPersistedLock['has_active_lock'])) { $__batchCurrentLock['has_active_lock'] = true; $__batchCurrentLock['persisted_lock_id'] = (int)($__batchPersistedLock['id'] ?? 0); $__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'] = is_array($__batchPersistedLock['settings_array'] ?? null) ? $__batchPersistedLock['settings_array'] : array(); $__batchCurrentLock['status'] = (string)($__batchPersistedLock['locked_status'] ?? ''); }
        $__batchSummary = array('total_runs' => count($__batchRows), 'scored_draws' => $__batchScoredDraws, 'true_cluster_support' => (int)($__batchEvidenceIntel['true_cluster_support'] ?? 0), 'true_cluster_draw_support' => (int)($__batchEvidenceIntel['true_cluster_draw_support'] ?? 0), 'v97_research_mode'=>$__batchV97ResearchMode);
        $__batchPrecisionLock['true_cluster_support'] = (int)$__batchSummary['true_cluster_support'];
        $__batchPrecisionLock['true_cluster_draw_support'] = (int)$__batchSummary['true_cluster_draw_support'];
        if (!empty($__batchGlobalIntel)) {
            $__batchSettingsAdv = mylottoexpertV80BuildSettingsAdviceFromGlobalIntel($__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchGlobalIntel);
        }
    }
    if (!empty($__batchGlobalIntel)) {
        $__batchSummary['global_settings_usable_rows'] = (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0);
        $__batchSummary['global_settings_users'] = (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['users'] ?? 0);
        $__batchSummary['global_settings_draws'] = (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['draws'] ?? 0);
        $__batchSummary['global_learning_scope'] = 'exact_lottery_only';

    if ($__batchUseV97GlobalResearchDirect && ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'recommended' || $__batchRequestedPlan === 'settings')) {
        $__batchRequestedPlan = 'settings';
    }
    if ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'recommended') {

        if ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'horizon_existing' || $__batchRequestedPlan === 'settings_existing') {

            $app->redirect(
                \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()
            );
            return;
        }
        if ($__batchRequestedPlan !== 'horizon' && $__batchRequestedPlan !== 'settings') {

            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    }

    if ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'regular_9_batch') {

        $__batchRegularSettingLabel = trim((string)($__batchRegularAdvice['setting_label'] ?? 'Global learning blend'));

        $__batchRegularSuggested = trim((string)($__batchRegularAdvice['suggested_value'] ?? $__batchRegularCurrent));
        $__batchRegularMin = isset($__batchRegularAdvice['range_min']) ? (float)$__batchRegularAdvice['range_min'] : 0.0;
        $__batchRegularMax = isset($__batchRegularAdvice['range_max']) ? (float)$__batchRegularAdvice['range_max'] : 100.0;

        $__batchRegularValueType = in_array($__batchRegularSettingKey, array('diversity_penalty','sampling_temperature','recency_decay','learning_rate','dropout_rate','gap_scale'), true) ? 'decimal' : 'integer';
        $__batchRegularValueResult = mleAdvisoryGenerateEightDistinctBatchValues($__batchRegularMin, $__batchRegularMax, $__batchRegularSuggested, $__batchRegularValueType);

            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        $__batchRegularValues = (array)$__batchRegularValueResult['values'];
        $__batchRegularRunValues = array($__batchRegularCurrent !== '' ? $__batchRegularCurrent : '');
        $__batchRegularRunLabels = array('Control - Current Best Global Settings');
        for ($__batchRegularIdx = 0; $__batchRegularIdx < 8; $__batchRegularIdx++) {

        }
        unset($__batchRegularIdx, $__batchRegularValueText);
        $__batchPlan = array(
            'has_recommendation' => true,
            'title' => 'Regular SKAI Global Learning 9-Run Batch',
            'summary' => 'Build a tracked regular global-learning batch from the best currently available settings for this lottery.',
            'guardrail' => 'Run and save all 9 runs, then wait for the official draw so MyLottoExpert can score and learn from this batch.',
            'evidence_line' => 'Using best available current global/Hive settings evidence for this lottery.',
            'batch_purpose' => 'Create tracked regular evidence for the next draw using one control plus eight bracketed tests.',
            'locked_settings' => 'Keep all other SKAI settings stable while this regular global-learning batch runs.',
            'test_variable' => $__batchRegularSettingLabel,
            'setting_key' => $__batchRegularSettingKey,
            'setting_key_aliases' => array($__batchRegularSettingKey),
            'control_run' => 'Control - Current Best Global Settings',
            'control_source' => (string)($__batchRegularAdvice['source'] ?? 'best_available_global_hive'),
            'batch_runs' => $__batchRegularRunLabels,
            'batch_run_values' => $__batchRegularRunValues,
            'range_basis' => $__batchRegularSettingLabel,
            'range_min' => $__batchRegularMin,
            'range_max' => $__batchRegularMax,
            'recommended_value' => $__batchRegularSuggested,
            'preferred_use' => 'Regular evidence-building batch for this lottery.',
            'milestone_supported' => 'Regular 9-run evidence cycle',
            'batch_type' => 'Regular Global Learning 9-Run Batch',
            'global_source_rows' => (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['usable_rows'] ?? 0),
            'global_source_users' => (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['users'] ?? 0),
            'global_source_draws' => (int)($__batchGlobalIntel['draws'] ?? 0),
            'source_evidence' => array(
                'settings_source' => (string)($__batchRegularAdvice['source'] ?? ''),
                'settings_source_detail' => (string)($__batchRegularAdvice['source_detail'] ?? ''),
                'confidence' => (string)($__batchRegularAdvice['confidence'] ?? ''),
                'evidence_count' => (int)($__batchRegularAdvice['evidence_count'] ?? 0),
                'hive_settings_fingerprint' => (string)($__batchRegularAdvice['hive_settings_fingerprint'] ?? '')
            )
        );
    } elseif ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'horizon') {
        $__batchPlan = $__batchHorizonPlanForPhase;
        if (empty($__batchPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
            $__historyNotReadyMessage = (string)($__batchPlan['fail_reason'] ?? 'History-window batch is not ready for this lottery yet. Run a regular 9-run batch or wait for more scored evidence.');
            $app->enqueueMessage($__historyNotReadyMessage, 'warning');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    } elseif ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'settings' || $__batchForceNextSettings) {
        if (!$__batchUseV97GlobalResearchDirect && !mleAdvisorySequentialPhaseAllowsSettings($__batchPhaseState)) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Run and score the History Window 9-Run Batch first. Settings Precision is locked until the window phase is scored.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        $__batchPlan = $__batchSettingsPlanForPhase;
        if (empty($__batchPlan['has_recommendation'])) {
            $app->enqueueMessage((string)($__batchPlan['fail_reason'] ?? 'The Settings Precision 9-Run Batch is not ready yet for this lottery.'), 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because this lottery must build regular SKAI evidence first.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101RefineBatchPlanForHive')) {
        $__batchGameIdForV101Refine = (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gameId'] ?? '');
        $__batchPlan = mylottoexpertV101RefineBatchPlanForHive($db, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchGameIdForV101Refine, $__batchPlan);
    }
    $__batchRunLabels = is_array($__batchPlan['batch_runs'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['batch_runs'] : array();
    $__batchRunValues = is_array($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['batch_run_values'] : array();
    if (count($__batchRunLabels) !== 9 || count($__batchRunValues) !== 9) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify one clean setting to test.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $__batchValueSeen = array();
    for ($__bvi = 1; $__bvi < count($__batchRunValues); $__bvi++) { $__bvk = trim((string)$__batchRunValues[$__bvi]); if ($__bvk === '' || isset($__batchValueSeen[$__bvk])) { $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not create 8 useful distinct test values from the current evidence.', 'error'); $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString()); return; } $__batchValueSeen[$__bvk] = true; }
    unset($__bvi, $__bvk, $__batchValueSeen);

    $__batchBaseRunId = 0;
    $__batchBestScore = -PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
    foreach ($__batchPerf as $__bp) {
        $__bq = (float)($__bp['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0) + ((int)($__bp['top10_hits'] ?? 0)) * 2.0;
        if ($__bq > $__batchBestScore) { $__batchBestScore = $__bq; $__batchBaseRunId = (int)($__bp['__saved_id'] ?? $__bp['run_id'] ?? 0); }
    }
    unset($__bp, $__bq);
    if ($__batchBaseRunId <= 0 && !empty($__batchRows[0]['id'])) { $__batchBaseRunId = (int)$__batchRows[0]['id']; }
    $__batchBaseSettings = array();
    if ($__batchBaseRunId > 0 && !empty($__batchSavedById[$__batchBaseRunId])) {
        $__batchBaseSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__batchSavedById[$__batchBaseRunId]);
    }
    if (!empty($__batchCurrentLock['has_active_lock']) && !empty($__batchCurrentLock['settings_array']) && is_array($__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'])) {
        $__batchBaseSettings = $__batchCurrentLock['settings_array'];
        $__batchBaseRunId = (int)($__batchPersistedLock['base_settings_id'] ?? $__batchPersistedLock['base_run_id'] ?? $__batchBaseRunId);
    }
    if (empty($__batchBaseSettings) && $__batchRequestedPlan === 'horizon') {

        $__batchBaseSettings = array(
            'skai_run_mode' => 'history_window_check',
            'profile' => 'balanced',
            'training_style' => 'balanced',
            'risk_profile' => 'balanced',
            'strategy_profile' => 'balanced',
            'skai_window_size' => (string)($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'][0] ?? '100'),
            'draws_used' => (string)($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'][0] ?? '100'),
            'skip_window' => (string)($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'][0] ?? '100'),
            'window_size' => (string)($__batchPlan['batch_run_values'][0] ?? '100'),
            'gameId' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gameId'] ?? ''),
            'st' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['st'] ?? ''),
            'stn' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['stn'] ?? ''),
            'gm' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gm'] ?? ''),
            '_mle_base_settings_fallback' => 'history_window_minimal',
        );
    }
    if (empty($__batchBaseSettings) && !empty($__batchUseV97GlobalResearchDirect)) {
        $__batchBaseSettings = mylottoexpertV97BuildGlobalPriorBaseSettings($__batchSkaiMeta, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPlan);
        $__batchBaseRunId = 0;
    }
    if (empty($__batchBaseSettings)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because the base settings record could not be confirmed. Please save one SKAI run for this lottery first, then try again.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    mylottoexpertEnsureSkaiBackTestTables($db);
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables')) { mylottoexpertV97EnsureResearchTables($db); }
    $__batchLotteryName = (string)($__batchActive[$__batchLotteryId]['lottery_name'] ?? '');
    $__batchTestVar = (string)($__batchPlan['test_variable'] ?? '');
    $__batchSettingKey = (string)($__batchPlan['setting_key'] ?? '');
    $__batchTypeLabel = (string)($__batchPlan['batch_type'] ?? ($__batchForceNextSettings ? 'Next Settings 9-Run Batch' : (($__batchRequestedPlan === 'regular_9_batch') ? 'Regular Global Learning 9-Run Batch' : 'Precision Focus Batch')));
    $__batchRangeMinForSave = array_key_exists('range_min', $__batchPlan) ? (float)$__batchPlan['range_min'] : (float)($__batchPrecisionLock['range_min'] ?? 0);
    $__batchRangeMaxForSave = array_key_exists('range_max', $__batchPlan) ? (float)$__batchPlan['range_max'] : (float)($__batchPrecisionLock['range_max'] ?? 100);
    $__batchRecommendedForSave = (string)($__batchPlan['recommended_value'] ?? ($__batchSettingsAdv['suggested_value'] ?? ''));
    $__batchNow = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $__batchGameIdForResearch = (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gameId'] ?? '');
    $__batchResearchFingerprint = mylottoexpertV97BuildSettingsFingerprint($__batchBaseSettings, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchGameIdForResearch, '', array('setting_key'=>$__batchSettingKey,'batch_type'=>$__batchTypeLabel,'run_values'=>implode('|', (array)$__batchRunValues),'research_mode'=>$__batchV97ResearchMode));
    $__batchResearchType = !empty($__batchUseV97GlobalResearchDirect) ? (string)$__batchV97ResearchMode : 'personal_plus_global';
    $__batchResearchQueueId = mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchQueueItem($db, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchGameIdForResearch, $__batchPlan, $__batchResearchFingerprint, $__batchResearchType, $__batchNow);
    if (function_exists('mylottoexpertV101UpdateQueueRefinementMeta')) {
        $__batchPlan['_mle_lottery_id'] = (int)$__batchLotteryId;
        $__batchPlan['_mle_game_id'] = (string)$__batchGameIdForResearch;
        mylottoexpertV101UpdateQueueRefinementMeta($db, $__batchResearchQueueId, $workspaceUserId, $__batchPlan, $__batchResearchType, $__batchNow);
    }
    $__batchResearchAssignmentId = 0;
    try {
        $__batchPrefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $__batchHeaderTable = $__batchPrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
        $__batchRunTable = $__batchPrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
        $__batchLevelData = mleAdvisoryComputeRecommendationLevel($__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSummary, $__batchTopMethod, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPlan);
        $__batchProgressData = mleAdvisoryComputePrecisionProgress($__batchPrecisionLock, $__batchSummary, $__batchLevelData, $__batchSettingsAdv, $__batchPlan);
        $__batchEvidenceSummary = (string)($__batchPlan['evidence_line'] ?? '');
        $__batchNamePrefix = $__batchForceNextSettings ? 'Next Settings 9-Run SKAI Batch - ' : 'SKAI Batch Test - ';
        if ($__batchTypeLabel === 'History Horizon Discovery Batch') {
            $__batchNamePrefix = 'History Horizon SKAI Batch - ';
        } elseif ($__batchTypeLabel === 'Precision Focus Batch') {
            $__batchNamePrefix = 'Precision Focus SKAI Batch - ';
        } elseif ($__batchTypeLabel === 'Regular Global Learning 9-Run Batch') {
            $__batchNamePrefix = 'Regular SKAI 9-Run Batch - ';
        }
        $db->setQuery(
            "INSERT INTO `{$__batchHeaderTable}` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`lottery_name`,`batch_name`,`batch_source`,`batch_type`,`source_page`,`status`,`test_variable`,`range_min`,`range_max`,`recommended_value`,`precision_lock_stage`,`recommendation_level`,`precision_progress_level`,`evidence_summary`,`base_settings_id`,`locked_settings_id`,`created_at`) VALUES ("
            . (int)$workspaceUserId . ','
            . (int)$__batchLotteryId . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchLotteryName) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchNamePrefix . $__batchLotteryName) . ','
            . $db->quote('advisory') . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchTypeLabel) . ','
            . $db->quote('MyLottoExpert') . ','
            . $db->quote('pending') . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchTestVar) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)round($__batchRangeMinForSave, 4)) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)round($__batchRangeMaxForSave, 4)) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchRecommendedForSave) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchPrecisionLock['stage'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchLevelData['label'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote((string)($__batchProgressData['level_name'] ?? '')) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchEvidenceSummary) . ','
            . (int)$__batchBaseRunId . ','
            . (int)($__batchCurrentLock['persisted_lock_id'] ?? 0) . ','
            . $db->quote($__batchNow)
            . ')'
        );
        $db->execute();
        $__batchHeaderId = (int)$db->insertid();
        if ($__batchHeaderId <= 0) { throw new \RuntimeException('Batch header was not saved.'); }
        $__batchResearchAssignmentId = mylottoexpertV97CreateResearchAssignment($db, $__batchResearchQueueId, $workspaceUserId, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchGameIdForResearch, $__batchHeaderId, $__batchNow);
        $__batchSource = (string)($__batchTopMethod['method'] ?? 'skai');
        $__batchRunPhase = ($__batchRequestedPlan === 'horizon') ? 'horizon' : (($__batchRequestedPlan === 'regular_9_batch') ? 'regular' : 'settings');
        foreach ($__batchRunLabels as $__batchRunIdx => $__batchRunLabel) {
            $__batchRunOrder = $__batchRunIdx + 1;
            $__batchIsControl = ($__batchRunOrder === 1) ? 1 : 0;

            $__batchRunSettings = $__batchBaseSettings;
            $__batchRunTestValue = '';
            if ($__batchIsControl) {
                $__batchRunTestValue = (string)($__batchSettingsAdv['current_value'] ?? '');
            } else {
                $__batchRunTestValue = isset($__batchRunValues[$__batchRunIdx]) ? (string)$__batchRunValues[$__batchRunIdx] : '';
                if ($__batchSettingKey !== '' && $__batchRunTestValue !== '') {
                    $__batchRunSettings[$__batchSettingKey] = $__batchRunTestValue;
                    $__batchSettingAliases = is_array($__batchPlan['setting_key_aliases'] ?? null) ? $__batchPlan['setting_key_aliases'] : array();
                    foreach ($__batchSettingAliases as $__batchAliasKey) {
                        $__batchAliasKey = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$__batchAliasKey);
                        if ($__batchAliasKey !== '') {
                            $__batchRunSettings[$__batchAliasKey] = $__batchRunTestValue;
                        }
                    }
                    unset($__batchAliasKey, $__batchSettingAliases);
                }
            }

            $__batchRunSettings = mylottoexpertApplyBatchOutputShapeSettings($__batchRunSettings);
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_batch_phase'] = $__batchRunPhase;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_evidence_display'] = 'top20_plus_playable';
            $__batchRunSettings['game_id'] = (string)$__batchGameIdForResearch;
            $__batchRunSettings['lottery_id'] = (int)$__batchLotteryId;
            $__batchRunSettings['lottery_name'] = (string)$__batchLotteryName;
            $__batchRunSettings['target_draw_date'] = (string)$__batchTargetDrawDate;
            $__batchRunSettings['source'] = 'mylottoexpert';
            $__batchRunSettings['batch_plan'] = (string)$__batchRequestedPlan;
            $__batchRunSettings['mle_required_action'] = (string)$__batchRequestedPlan;

            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_scope'] = 'exact_lottery_only';
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_objective'] = 'learn_best_complete_settings_per_lottery';
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_batch_type'] = (string)$__batchTypeLabel;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_test_variable'] = (string)$__batchTestVar;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_setting_key'] = (string)$__batchSettingKey;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_setting_family'] = (string)($__batchPlan['global_setting_family'] ?? '');
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_bracket_index'] = (int)$__batchRunOrder;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_bracket_total'] = 9;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_control_flag'] = (int)$__batchIsControl;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_source_rows'] = (int)($__batchPlan['global_source_rows'] ?? 0);
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_source_users'] = (int)($__batchPlan['global_source_users'] ?? 0);
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_global_learning_source_draws'] = (int)($__batchPlan['global_source_draws'] ?? 0);

            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_version'] = 'v97_global_hive_research_scheduler';
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_mode'] = (string)$__batchV97ResearchMode;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_type'] = (string)$__batchResearchType;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_queue_id'] = (int)$__batchResearchQueueId;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_assignment_id'] = (int)$__batchResearchAssignmentId;
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_settings_fingerprint'] = (string)($__batchResearchFingerprint['hash'] ?? '');
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_run_role'] = $__batchIsControl ? 'control' : 'explore';
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_research_duplicate_guard'] = 'exact_fingerprint_per_lottery';
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_v101_assignment_refinement'] = (string)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] ?? 'single_user_unique_first_assignment');
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] = (int)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] ?? 0);
            $__batchRunSettings['_mle_v101_duplicate_group_key'] = (string)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_duplicate_group_key'] ?? '');
            $__batchRunSettingsJson = json_encode($__batchRunSettings, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            $db->setQuery(
                "INSERT INTO `{$__batchRunTable}` (`batch_id`,`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`run_order`,`run_name`,`is_control`,`source`,`full_settings_json`,`test_variable`,`test_value`,`status`,`created_at`) VALUES ("
                . (int)$__batchHeaderId . ','
                . (int)$workspaceUserId . ','
                . (int)$__batchLotteryId . ','
                . (int)$__batchRunOrder . ','
                . $db->quote((string)$__batchRunLabel) . ','
                . (int)$__batchIsControl . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchSource) . ','
                . $db->quote((string)$__batchRunSettingsJson) . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchTestVar) . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchRunTestValue) . ','
                . $db->quote('pending') . ','
                . $db->quote($__batchNow)
                . ')'
            );
            $db->execute();
        }
        unset($__batchRunIdx, $__batchRunLabel, $__batchRunOrder, $__batchIsControl, $__batchRunSettings, $__batchRunTestValue, $__batchRunSettingsJson, $__batchRunPhase);
        $__batchOpenSkaiUrl = mleAdvisoryResolveSkaiBatchOpenUrl($db, $__batchLotteryId, $__batchHeaderId, $__batchTypeLabel);
        if (trim((string)$__batchOpenSkaiUrl) === '') {
            $__batchOpenSkaiUrl = mleAdvisoryBuildCanonicalSkaiLotteryUrl($db, $__batchLotteryId, array(
                'mle_skai_batch' => 1,
                'mle_skai_bridge' => 1,
                'mle_precision_batch' => 1,
                'batch_id' => (int)$__batchHeaderId,
                'lottery_id' => (int)$__batchLotteryId,
                'open' => 'precision_batch',
                'source' => 'mylottoexpert',
                'mle_batch_type' => strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '_', (string)$__batchTypeLabel)),
                'mle_research_queue_id' => (int)$__batchResearchQueueId,
                'mle_research_assignment_id' => (int)$__batchResearchAssignmentId,
                'mle_research_type' => (string)$__batchResearchType,
                'mle_settings_fingerprint' => (string)($__batchResearchFingerprint['hash'] ?? ''),
                'mle_assignment_policy' => (string)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] ?? 'single_user_unique_first_assignment'),
                'mle_refinement_round' => (int)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] ?? 0),
                'mle_guided_mode' => 'required',
                'mle_required_action' => 'research_batch',
                'mle_command_source' => 'mylottoexpert'
            ));
        }

        try {
            $app->setUserState('mle.skai.precision_batch.latest', array(
                'batch_id' => (int)$__batchHeaderId,
                'lottery_id' => (int)$__batchLotteryId,
                'lottery_name' => (string)$__batchLotteryName,
                'batch_type' => (string)$__batchTypeLabel,
                'created_at' => time(),
                'skai_meta' => array(
                    'gameId' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gameId'] ?? ''),
                    'st' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['st'] ?? ''),
                    'stn' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['stn'] ?? ''),
                    'gm' => (string)($__batchSkaiMeta['gm'] ?? '')
                ),
                'open_url' => (string)$__batchOpenSkaiUrl,
                'research' => array(
                    'version' => 'v97_global_hive_research_scheduler',
                    'queue_id' => (int)$__batchResearchQueueId,
                    'assignment_id' => (int)$__batchResearchAssignmentId,
                    'research_type' => (string)$__batchResearchType,
                    'settings_fingerprint' => (string)($__batchResearchFingerprint['hash'] ?? ''),
                    'decision_ladder' => (string)$__batchV97ResearchMode,
                    'assignment_policy' => (string)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_assignment_policy'] ?? 'single_user_unique_first_assignment'),
                    'refinement_round' => (int)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_refinement_round'] ?? 0),
                    'duplicate_group_key' => (string)($__batchPlan['_mle_v101_duplicate_group_key'] ?? '')
                ),
            ));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
        error_log('[MLE SKAI TRACE] response_sent action=create_skai_batch user_id=' . (int)$workspaceUserId . ' lottery_id=' . (int)$__batchLotteryId . ' batch_id=' . (int)$__batchHeaderId . ' queue_id=' . (int)$__batchResearchQueueId . ' assignment_id=' . (int)$__batchResearchAssignmentId . ' skai_url=' . (string)$__batchOpenSkaiUrl);
        $app->enqueueMessage($__batchTypeLabel . ' created. LottoExpert is opening the correct SKAI lottery page now. Research mode: ' . str_replace('_', ' ', (string)$__batchV97ResearchMode) . '.', 'message');
        $app->redirect($__batchOpenSkaiUrl);
        return;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE 9BATCH] create_skai_batch error: ' . $e->getMessage() . '; lottery_id=' . (int)$__batchLotteryId);
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch test was not created because LottoExpert could not identify one clean setting to test.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'run_skai_precision_lock_batch') {
    if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run in demo mode.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    if ($workspaceUserId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because you must be logged in.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    $batchId = $app->input->post->getInt('batch_id', 0);
    if ($batchId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because no batch was selected.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
    $headerRawTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
    $runRawTable = $prefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
    if (!mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $headerRawTable) || !mylottoexpertTableExistsByRawName($db, $runRawTable)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Precision Focus batch tables are not available yet for this account.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $headerCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_header');
    $runCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__mle_skai_batch_run');
    if (empty($headerCols) || empty($runCols)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because batch tables are not readable.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    try {
        $hq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
        $db->setQuery($hq, 0, 1);
        $header = $db->loadAssoc();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $header = array();
    }
    if (!is_array($header) || empty($header)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because this batch does not belong to your account.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $headerStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($header['status'] ?? 'pending')));
    if (!in_array($headerStatus, array('pending', 'ready', 'partially_generated', 'failed'), true)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because this batch status is not runnable right now.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $lotteryId = (int)($header['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
    if ($lotteryId <= 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because the lottery could not be found.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }
    try {
        $lq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(array($db->quoteName('lottery_id'), $db->quoteName('game_id'), $db->quoteName('name')))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . $lotteryId);
        $db->setQuery($lq, 0, 1);
        $lotteryRow = $db->loadAssoc();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $lotteryRow = array();
    }
    if (!is_array($lotteryRow) || empty($lotteryRow)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because the lottery could not be found.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $runs = mylottoexpertLoadBatchRunsForReview($db, $batchId, $workspaceUserId, $lotteryId);
    if (count($runs) !== 9) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because it does not contain exactly 9 runs.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        return;
    }

    $orderSeen = array();
    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $order = (int)($run['run_order'] ?? 0);
        if ($order < 1 || $order > 9) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because run order values must be 1 through 9.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        $orderSeen[$order] = true;
        if ((int)($run['user_id'] ?? 0) !== (int)$workspaceUserId || (int)($run['lottery_id'] ?? 0) !== (int)$lotteryId) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs do not belong to your account.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        if (!is_array($run['_settings']) || empty($run['_settings'])) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs are missing full settings.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    }
    for ($o = 1; $o <= 9; $o++) {
        if (!isset($orderSeen[$o])) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because run order values must be 1 through 9.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
    }

    mylottoexpertEnsureBatchTrackingColumnsOnSavedPredictions($db);
    $savedCols = mylottoexpertGetTableColumnNames($db, '#__user_saved_numbers');
    $runUpdatedAt = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $generatedCount = 0;
    $skippedCount = 0;
    $failedCount = 0;
    $generatorMissing = false;

    foreach ($runs as $run) {
        $runId = (int)($run['id'] ?? 0);
        $runOrder = (int)($run['run_order'] ?? 0);
        $runStatus = strtolower(trim((string)($run['status'] ?? 'pending')));
        if (in_array($runStatus, array('generated', 'completed'), true)) {
            $skippedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $alreadyGenerated = false;
        if (in_array('source_batch_run_id', $savedCols, true)) {
            try {
                $dq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('COUNT(*)')
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('source_batch_run_id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId);
                $db->setQuery($dq);
                $alreadyGenerated = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $alreadyGenerated = false;
            }
        }
        if ($alreadyGenerated) {
            $skippedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $settings = is_array($run['_settings']) ? $run['_settings'] : array();

        $settings = mylottoexpertApplyBatchOutputShapeSettings($settings);
        $predictionPayload = array();
        $generatorNames = array(
            'mylottoexpertGeneratePredictionFromSettings',
            'mylottoexpertRunSkaiPredictionFromSettings',
            'skaiGeneratePredictionFromSettings',
            'skaiRunPredictionFromSettings'
        );
        foreach ($generatorNames as $fn) {
            if (!is_callable($fn)) {
                continue;
            }
            try {
                $tmpPayload = call_user_func($fn, array(
                    'db' => $db,
                    'user_id' => (int)$workspaceUserId,
                    'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
                    'lottery' => $lotteryRow,
                    'settings' => $settings,
                    'batch_header' => $header,
                    'batch_run' => $run
                ));
                if (is_array($tmpPayload) && !empty($tmpPayload)) {
                    $predictionPayload = $tmpPayload;
                    break;
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $predictionPayload = array();
            }
        }

        if (empty($predictionPayload)) {
            $fallbackMain = array();
            $fallbackExtra = array();
            if (isset($settings['main_numbers'])) {
                $fallbackMain = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($settings['main_numbers']) ? implode(',', $settings['main_numbers']) : (string)$settings['main_numbers'], true);
            }
            if (isset($settings['extra_ball_numbers'])) {
                $fallbackExtra = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($settings['extra_ball_numbers']) ? implode(',', $settings['extra_ball_numbers']) : (string)$settings['extra_ball_numbers'], true);
            }
            if (!empty($fallbackMain)) {
                $predictionPayload = array('main_numbers' => $fallbackMain, 'extra_ball_numbers' => $fallbackExtra);
            } else {
                $generatorMissing = true;
                $failedCount++;
                if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                    try {
                        $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'failed'")
                            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                        if (in_array('updated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                            $rq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                        }
                        if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                            $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Missing server-side SKAI generation payload.'));
                        }
                        $db->setQuery($rq);
                        $db->execute();
                    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
                }
                continue;
            }
        }

        $mainNumbers = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($predictionPayload['main_numbers'] ?? null) ? implode(',', $predictionPayload['main_numbers']) : (string)($predictionPayload['main_numbers'] ?? ''), true);
        $extraNumbers = mylottoexpertParseNumberCsv(is_array($predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? null) ? implode(',', $predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers']) : (string)($predictionPayload['extra_ball_numbers'] ?? ''), true);
        if (empty($mainNumbers)) {
            $failedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        $__isDailyBatchOutput = mylottoexpertIsDailyBatchOutputContext($lotteryRow, $settings, $predictionPayload);
        $__batchPickSize = mylottoexpertResolveBatchShapePickSize($lotteryRow, $settings, $predictionPayload, $mainNumbers);
        $__rankedMainNumbers = mylottoexpertFindRankedMainCandidatesFromPayload($predictionPayload, $settings, $mainNumbers);
        $__rankedExtraNumbers = mylottoexpertFindRankedExtraCandidatesFromPayload($predictionPayload, $settings, $extraNumbers);
        $__dailyComboStrings = array();
        $__dailyDisplayPayload = array();

        if ($__isDailyBatchOutput) {
            $__dailyComboStrings = mylottoexpertFindDailyComboCandidatesFromPayload($predictionPayload, $settings, $mainNumbers, $__batchPickSize);
            $__rankedMainNumbers = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $__rankedMainNumbers)), 0, 20);
            $__rankedExtraNumbers = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $__rankedExtraNumbers)), 0, 3);
            $__dailyDisplayPayload = mylottoexpertBuildDailyBatchDisplayPayload($__dailyComboStrings, $__rankedMainNumbers, $__rankedExtraNumbers, $__batchPickSize);
            $family = 'daily';
        } else {
            if (count($__rankedMainNumbers) < count($mainNumbers)) {
                $__rankedMainNumbers = $mainNumbers;
            }
            $__rankedMainNumbers = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $__rankedMainNumbers)), 0, 20);
            $__rankedExtraNumbers = array_slice(array_values(array_map('intval', $__rankedExtraNumbers)), 0, 5);
        }

        $settings['skai_top_n_numbers'] = max(20, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_numbers'] ?? 20));
        $settings['top_n_numbers'] = max(20, (int)($settings['top_n_numbers'] ?? 20));
        $settings['skai_top_n_extra_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? 5));
        $settings['top_n_extra_numbers'] = max(5, (int)($settings['top_n_extra_numbers'] ?? 5));
        $settings['skai_top_n_combos'] = max(5, (int)($settings['skai_top_n_combos'] ?? 5));
        $settings['top_n_combos'] = max(5, (int)($settings['top_n_combos'] ?? 5));

        $drawDateRaw = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_date'] ?? $predictionPayload['next_draw_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')));
        $drawTs = strtotime($drawDateRaw);
        $drawDate = $drawTs ? date('Y-m-d', $drawTs) : date('Y-m-d');
        $drawAt = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
        $drawSession = mylottoexpertNormalizeTargetSession((string)($predictionPayload['target_draw_session'] ?? ''));
        $family = $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 'daily' : trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_prediction_family'] ?? 'regular'));
        $ptype = trim((string)($predictionPayload['target_prediction_type'] ?? $family));
        if ($__isDailyBatchOutput && $ptype === '') { $ptype = 'daily'; }

        $target = mylottoexpertBuildPredictionTarget(array(
            'game_id' => (string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? ''),
            'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
            'draw_date' => $drawDate,
            'draw_at' => $drawAt,
            'draw_session' => $drawSession,
            'timezone_id' => 'America/New_York',
            'prediction_family' => $family,
            'prediction_type' => $ptype,
            'pick_size' => count($mainNumbers),
            'extra_count' => count($extraNumbers)
        ));

        $__saveGuard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard((string)($lotteryRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
        if (!empty($__saveGuard['has_config']) && (int)$__saveGuard['main_max'] > 0) {
            $__mainFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($mainNumbers, $__saveGuard, 'main');
            $__rankFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($__rankedMainNumbers, $__saveGuard, 'main');
            $__extraFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($extraNumbers, $__saveGuard, 'extra');
            $__rankExtraFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($__rankedExtraNumbers, $__saveGuard, 'extra');
            if (!empty($__mainFit['invalid']) || !empty($__rankFit['invalid']) || (!empty($__saveGuard['has_extra']) && !empty($__extraFit['invalid'])) || (!empty($__saveGuard['has_extra']) && !empty($__rankExtraFit['invalid']))) {
                $failedCount++;
                if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                    try {
                        $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'failed'")
                            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                        if (in_array('updated_at', $runCols, true)) { $rq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt)); }
                        if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                            $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Range guard blocked this run because generated numbers did not match the selected lottery.'));
                        }
                        $db->setQuery($rq);
                        $db->execute();
                    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }
                }
                continue;
            }
            $mainNumbers = array_values($__mainFit['valid']);
            $__rankedMainNumbers = array_values($__rankFit['valid']);
            if (empty($__saveGuard['has_extra'])) {
                $extraNumbers = array();
                $__rankedExtraNumbers = array();
            } else {
                $extraNumbers = array_values($__extraFit['valid']);
                $__rankedExtraNumbers = array_values($__rankExtraFit['valid']);
            }
        }

        $batchMeta = array(
            'batch_id' => (int)$batchId,
            'batch_run_id' => (int)$runId,
            'batch_type' => (string)($header['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch'),
            'batch_run_order' => (int)$runOrder,
            'batch_control_flag' => ((int)($run['is_control'] ?? 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0,
            'test_variable' => (string)($run['test_variable'] ?? ''),
            'test_value' => (string)($run['test_value'] ?? ''),
            'origin_source' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
            'ranked_main_count' => count($__rankedMainNumbers),
            'ranked_extra_count' => count($__rankedExtraNumbers),
            'playable_main_count' => count($mainNumbers),
            'playable_extra_count' => count($extraNumbers),
            'is_daily_output' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 1 : 0,
            'daily_combo_count' => count($__dailyComboStrings),
            'required_main_pool_count' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 20 : 20,
            'required_extra_pool_count' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 3 : 5,
            'required_daily_combo_count' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 5 : 0
        );
        $settingsWithMeta = is_array($settings) ? $settings : array();
        $settingsWithMeta['_batch_tracking'] = $batchMeta;
        $settingsJson = json_encode($settingsWithMeta, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        $targetJson = json_decode((string)($target['prediction_target_json'] ?? ''), true);
        if (!is_array($targetJson)) {
            $targetJson = array();
        }
        $targetJson['batch_tracking'] = $batchMeta;
        if ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyDisplayPayload)) {
            $targetJson['daily_display'] = $__dailyDisplayPayload;
        }

        $__topCombosJsonForSave = '';
        if ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyDisplayPayload)) {
            $__topCombosJsonForSave = json_encode($__dailyDisplayPayload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        }

        $insert = array(
            'user_id' => (int)$workspaceUserId,
            'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
            'next_draw_date' => $drawDate,
            'next_draw_at' => ($target['target_draw_at'] ?? null),
            'draw_session' => ($target['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
            'source' => 'skai_prediction',
            'label' => trim((string)($header['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch')) . ' ' . (int)$batchId . ' - Run ' . (int)$runOrder . (((string)($run['test_value'] ?? '') !== '') ? (' - ' . trim((string)($run['test_variable'] ?? 'Test')) . ' ' . trim((string)($run['test_value'] ?? ''))) : ''),
            'main_numbers' => implode(',', $mainNumbers),
            'extra_ball_numbers' => implode(',', $extraNumbers),
            'regular_main_numbers_json' => json_encode(array_values($__rankedMainNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'regular_extra_numbers_json' => json_encode(array_values($__rankedExtraNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'main_display_json' => json_encode(array_values($__rankedMainNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'extra_display_json' => json_encode(array_values($__rankedExtraNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'canonical_main_display' => implode(',', $__rankedMainNumbers),
            'canonical_extra_display' => implode(',', $__rankedExtraNumbers),
            'skai_top_n_numbers' => max(20, count($__rankedMainNumbers)),
            'skai_top_n_combos' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 5 : (int)($settings['skai_top_n_combos'] ?? $settings['top_n_combos'] ?? 0),
            'prediction_family' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 'daily' : $family,
            'render_mode' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 'daily_combos' : null,
            'renderer_hint' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? 'daily_combos' : null,
            'daily_pick_size' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? (int)$__batchPickSize : null,
            'daily_primary_prediction' => ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyComboStrings)) ? (string)$__dailyComboStrings[0] : null,
            'daily_top_picks_json' => ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyComboStrings)) ? json_encode(array_values($__dailyComboStrings), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
            'daily_top_pick_strings_json' => ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyComboStrings)) ? json_encode(array_values($__dailyComboStrings), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
            'daily_bonus_digits_json' => ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__rankedExtraNumbers)) ? json_encode(array_values($__rankedExtraNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
            'daily_influential_digits_json' => $__isDailyBatchOutput ? json_encode(array_values($__rankedMainNumbers), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
            'daily_display_payload_json' => ($__isDailyBatchOutput && !empty($__dailyDisplayPayload)) ? json_encode($__dailyDisplayPayload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
            'top_combos_json' => $__topCombosJsonForSave,
            'date_saved' => $runUpdatedAt,
            'generated_at' => $runUpdatedAt,
            'run_uuid' => mylottoexpertGenerateRunUuid(),
            'snapshot_run_uuid' => mylottoexpertGenerateRunUuid(),
            'prediction_target_id' => ($target['prediction_target_id'] ?? null),
            'prediction_target_key' => ($target['prediction_target_key'] ?? null),
            'prediction_target_json' => json_encode($targetJson, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
            'target_game_id' => ($target['target_game_id'] ?? null),
            'target_lottery_id' => ($target['target_lottery_id'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_date' => ($target['target_draw_date'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_at' => ($target['target_draw_at'] ?? null),
            'target_draw_session' => ($target['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
            'target_timezone_id' => ($target['target_timezone_id'] ?? null),
            'target_prediction_family' => ($target['target_prediction_family'] ?? null),
            'target_prediction_type' => ($target['target_prediction_type'] ?? null),
            'target_pick_size' => ($target['target_pick_size'] ?? null),
            'target_extra_count' => ($target['target_extra_count'] ?? null),
            'save_intent' => 'prediction_archive',
            'origin_source' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
            'source_batch_id' => (int)$batchId,
            'source_batch_run_id' => (int)$runId,
            'source_batch_type' => (string)($header['batch_type'] ?? 'Precision Focus Batch'),
            'source_batch_run_order' => (int)$runOrder,
            'source_batch_origin' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
            'batch_control_flag' => ((int)($run['is_control'] ?? 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0,
            'settings_json' => $settingsJson
        );
        $cols = array();
        $vals = array();
        foreach ($insert as $col => $val) {
            if (!in_array($col, $savedCols, true)) {
                continue;
            }
            $cols[] = $db->quoteName($col);
            if ($val === null || $val === '') {
                $vals[] = 'NULL';
            } elseif (is_int($val) || is_float($val)) {
                $vals[] = (string)$val;
            } else {
                $vals[] = $db->quote((string)$val);
            }
        }
        if (empty($cols)) {
            $failedCount++;
            continue;
        }

        try {
            $iq = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->columns($cols)
                ->values(implode(',', $vals));
            $db->setQuery($iq);
            $db->execute();
            $savedPredictionId = (int)$db->insertid();
            $generatedCount++;

            if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                    ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'generated'")
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                    ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                if (in_array('generated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('generated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                }
                if (in_array('updated_at', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
                }
                if (in_array('generated_prediction_id', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('generated_prediction_id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedPredictionId);
                }
                if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                    $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . " = ''");
                }
                $db->setQuery($rq);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $failedCount++;
            if (in_array('status', $runCols, true)) {
                try {
                    $rq = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                        ->set($db->quoteName('status') . " = 'failed'")
                        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
                    if (in_array('error_message', $runCols, true)) {
                        $rq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Prediction save failed.'));
                    }
                    $db->setQuery($rq);
                    $db->execute();
                } catch (\Throwable $e2) {   }
            }
        }
    }

    $headerNextStatus = 'failed';
    if ($generatedCount === 9 || ($generatedCount > 0 && $failedCount === 0 && ($generatedCount + $skippedCount) >= 9)) {
        $headerNextStatus = 'generated';
    } elseif ($generatedCount > 0 || $skippedCount > 0) {
        $headerNextStatus = 'partially_generated';
    }

    try {
        $hq = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($headerNextStatus))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$batchId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$workspaceUserId);
        if (in_array('generated_at', $headerCols, true) && $headerNextStatus !== 'failed') {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('generated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
        }
        if (in_array('updated_at', $headerCols, true)) {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($runUpdatedAt));
        }
        if (in_array('error_message', $headerCols, true) && $failedCount > 0) {
            $hq->set($db->quoteName('error_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('One or more runs failed.'));
        }
        $db->setQuery($hq);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {   }

    try { mylottoexpertV99ReconcileResearchQueueFeedback($db, 20); } catch (\Throwable $__mleV99ImmediateE) {   }

    if ($generatedCount === 9 || ($generatedCount > 0 && $failedCount === 0 && ($generatedCount + $skippedCount) >= 9)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('SKAI generated 9 Precision Focus batch runs from MyLottoExpert.', 'message');
    } elseif ($generatorMissing) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because one or more runs are missing generated numbers from the server-side SKAI generator.', 'error');
    } elseif ($generatedCount > 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch run completed with partial results. Generated: ' . (int)$generatedCount . '. Skipped duplicates: ' . (int)$skippedCount . '. Failed: ' . (int)$failedCount . '.', 'warning');
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Batch could not run because no new predictions were generated.', 'error');
    }
    $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    return;
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction')) {
    function mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction($rawAction) {
        $action = strtolower(trim((string)$rawAction));
        if ($action === '') {
            return '';
        }
        $action = preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/', '', $action);

        $adminOnly = array(
            'delete_permanently',
            'permanent_delete',
            'delete',
            'quarantine',
            'quarantine_duplicate',
            'repair',
            'batch_cleanup',
            'global_apply',
            'force_reconcile'
        );
        if (in_array($action, $adminOnly, true)) {
            return ($action === 'permanent_delete' || $action === 'delete') ? 'delete_permanently' : $action;
        }

        $map = array(
            'use_future_advice' => 'consider',
            'use_for_future_advice' => 'consider',
            'future' => 'consider',
            'consider' => 'consider',
            'use' => 'consider',
            'use_future' => 'consider',
            'keep_for_review' => 'review',
            'watch' => 'review',
            'review' => 'review',
            'leave_as_is' => 'review',
            'exclude_from_advice' => 'exclude',
            'retired' => 'exclude',
            'excluded' => 'exclude',
            'exclude' => 'exclude'
        );

        return isset($map[$action]) ? $map[$action] : '';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertIsAdminOnlyAdviceAction')) {
    function mylottoexpertIsAdminOnlyAdviceAction($action) {
        $action = mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction($action);
        return in_array($action, array(
            'delete_permanently',
            'quarantine',
            'quarantine_duplicate',
            'repair',
            'batch_cleanup',
            'global_apply',
            'force_reconcile'
        ), true);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCanUserReviewOwnSavedRun')) {
    function mylottoexpertCanUserReviewOwnSavedRun($db, $userId, $savedId) {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        $savedId = (int)$savedId;
        if ($userId <= 0 || $savedId <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('1')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__myle_saved_predictions'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('is_deleted') . ' = 0')
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            return (int)$db->loadResult() === 1;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertCanPerformAdviceStatusAction')) {
    function mylottoexpertCanPerformAdviceStatusAction($db, $user, $savedId, $action) {
        $savedId = (int)$savedId;
        $normalizedAction = mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction($action);
        if ($savedId <= 0 || $normalizedAction === '') {
            return false;
        }

        $userId = 0;
        $isAdmin = false;
        if (is_object($user)) {
            try {
                $userId = (int)$user->get('id');
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $userId = 0;
            }
            try {
                $isAdmin = method_exists($user, 'authorise') && $user->authorise('core.admin');
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $isAdmin = false;
            }
        }

        if ($userId <= 0) {
            return false;
        }
        if (mylottoexpertIsAdminOnlyAdviceAction($normalizedAction)) {
            return $isAdmin;
        }
        if ($isAdmin) {
            return true;
        }
        return mylottoexpertCanUserReviewOwnSavedRun($db, $userId, $savedId);
    }
}

if ($__mleAction === 'update_advice_status') {
    $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
    if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid token.'));
        exit;
    }
    if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Demo mode.'));
        exit;
    }
    $actionUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    $actionUserId = (int)(is_object($actionUser) ? $actionUser->get('id') : 0);
    if ($actionUserId <= 0) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Not logged in.'));
        exit;
    }

    $savedId = (int)$app->input->post->getInt('run_id', 0);
    $normalizedAction = mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction($app->input->post->getString('status', ''));
    if ($savedId <= 0 || $normalizedAction === '' || mylottoexpertIsAdminOnlyAdviceAction($normalizedAction)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid status action.'));
        exit;
    }
    if (!mylottoexpertCanPerformAdviceStatusAction($db, $actionUser, $savedId, $normalizedAction)) {
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Not authorized.'));
        exit;
    }

    try {
        mleAdvisoryEnsureSchemaColumns($db);
        $targetUserId = $actionUserId;
        if (method_exists($actionUser, 'authorise') && $actionUser->authorise('core.admin')) {
            $qOwner = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select($db->quoteName('user_id'))
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__myle_saved_predictions'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedId)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($qOwner);
            $targetUserId = (int)$db->loadResult();
        }

        $statusSql = $db->quote($normalizedAction);
        $qSave = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->update($db->quoteName('#__myle_saved_predictions'))
            ->set($db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $statusSql)
            ->set($db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = NOW()')
            ->set($db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1')
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('is_deleted') . ' = 0');
        if ($targetUserId > 0) {
            $qSave->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$targetUserId);
        }
        $db->setQuery($qSave);
        $db->execute();
        if ((int)$db->getAffectedRows() < 1) {
            echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Run not found.'));
            exit;
        }

        try {
            $qLp = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->update($db->quoteName('#__myle_learning_performance'))
                ->set($db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $statusSql)
                ->set($db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = NOW()')
                ->set($db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1')
                ->where($db->quoteName('saved_prediction_id') . ' = ' . (int)$savedId);
            if ($targetUserId > 0) {
                $qLp->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$targetUserId);
            }
            $db->setQuery($qLp);
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $ignoreMirror) {
        }

        echo json_encode(array(
            'ok' => true,
            'status' => $normalizedAction,
            'stored' => $normalizedAction
        ));
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[MLE Advisory] update_advice_status error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(array('ok' => false, 'error' => 'Database error.'));
    }
    exit;
}

if ($__mleAction === 'bulk_run_selection_action') {
    $hasDecision = trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('decision', '')) !== '';
    $postedRunIds = (array)$app->input->post->get('run_ids', array(), 'array');
    $postedRunIdsCsv = trim((string)$app->input->post->getString('run_ids_csv', ''));
    if ($hasDecision || !empty($postedRunIds) || $postedRunIdsCsv !== '') {
        if ($app->input->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        if (MLE_DEMO_MODE) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Demo mode: Cannot apply bulk run selection actions.', 'warning');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        $actionUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
        $actionUserId = (int)(is_object($actionUser) ? $actionUser->get('id') : 0);
        $isActionAdmin = is_object($actionUser) && method_exists($actionUser, 'authorise') && $actionUser->authorise('core.admin');
        if ($actionUserId <= 0) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Please log in to apply bulk run selection actions.', 'warning');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }

        $normalizedAction = mylottoexpertNormalizeAdviceStatusAction($app->input->post->getString('decision', ''));
        if ($normalizedAction === '') {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Invalid bulk action.', 'warning');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }
        if (mylottoexpertIsAdminOnlyAdviceAction($normalizedAction) && !$isActionAdmin) {
            $app->enqueueMessage('Not authorized.', 'error');
            $app->redirect(\Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->toString());
            return;
        }

        $runIds = array();
        foreach ($postedRunIds as $rid) {
            $rid = (int)$rid;
            if ($rid > 0) {
                $runIds[$rid] = $rid;
            }
        }
        if ($postedRunIdsCsv !== '') {
