if (!function_exists('mleV102NormalizeNumberList')) {
    function mleV102NormalizeNumberList($values) {
        $out = array();
        foreach ((array)$values as $v) {
            if ($v === null || $v === '') { continue; }
            if (is_array($v)) { $v = reset($v); }
            if ($v === null || $v === '') { continue; }
            $str = trim((string)$v);
            if ($str === '') { continue; }
            if (preg_match('/^-?\d+$/', $str)) {
                $out[] = (int)$str;
            }
        }
        return array_values($out);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102ParseDrawResultsString')) {
    function mleV102ParseDrawResultsString($raw, $expectedExtra = 0, $pickSize = 0) {
        $raw = trim((string)$raw);
        $result = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
        if ($raw === '') { return $result; }

        $pieces = preg_split('/\+/', $raw);
        $mainPart = trim((string)array_shift($pieces));
        $main = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $mainPart, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
        if (count($main) > 1) {
            $result['main'] = array_map('intval', $main);
        } elseif ($mainPart !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{2,}$/', $mainPart) && (int)$pickSize > 1 && strlen($mainPart) == (int)$pickSize) {
            $result['main'] = array_map('intval', str_split($mainPart));
        }
        foreach ($pieces as $p) {
            $nums = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$p, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
            foreach ($nums as $n) { $result['extra'][] = (int)$n; }
        }
        if ((int)$expectedExtra <= 0) { $result['extra'] = array(); }
        elseif (count($result['extra']) > (int)$expectedExtra) { $result['extra'] = array_slice($result['extra'], 0, (int)$expectedExtra); }
        return $result;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102ExtractOfficialParts')) {
    function mleV102ExtractOfficialParts($gameId, array $row) {
        $parts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
        try {
            if (function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
                $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow((string)$gameId, $row);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $parts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
        }
        $main = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($parts['main'] ?? array());
        $extra = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($parts['extra'] ?? array());

        if (empty($main) && isset($row['draw_results'])) {
            $pickSize = 0; $extraCount = 0;
            try {
                if (function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
                    $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec((string)$gameId);
                    $cfg = isset($spec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($spec['lotteryConfig']) ? $spec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
                    $pickSize = (int)($cfg['pick_size'] ?? $cfg['daily_pick_size'] ?? $cfg['num_main_balls_drawn'] ?? 0);
                    $extraCount = (int)($cfg['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? $cfg['extra_count'] ?? 0);
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
            $fb = mleV102ParseDrawResultsString($row['draw_results'], $extraCount, $pickSize);
            $main = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($fb['main'] ?? array());
            $extra = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($fb['extra'] ?? array());
        }

        return array('main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102DirectLatestOfficialDraw')) {
    function mleV102DirectLatestOfficialDraw($db, $gameId) {
        $gameId = trim((string)$gameId);
        if ($gameId === '') { return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'no_game_id'); }
        if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) { return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'no_spec_function'); }

        try { $spec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($gameId); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { $spec = array(); }
        $tbl = trim((string)($spec['dbCol'] ?? ''));
        if ($tbl === '') { return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'no_db_table_for_game_id'); }
        $realTable = $db->replacePrefix($tbl);

        try {
            $colsMeta = $db->getTableColumns($realTable, false);
            $cols = array();
            if (is_array($colsMeta)) {
                foreach ($colsMeta as $ck => $cv) {
                    if (is_string($ck) && $ck !== '') { $cols[] = strtolower($ck); }
                    elseif (is_object($cv) && !empty($cv->Field)) { $cols[] = strtolower((string)$cv->Field); }
                }
            }
            if (!in_array('draw_date', $cols, true)) { return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'table_has_no_draw_date'); }

            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName($realTable))
                ->where('DATE(' . $db->quoteName('draw_date') . ') <= ' . $db->quote(date('Y-m-d')))
                ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC');
            if (in_array('game_id', $cols, true)) {
                $q->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId));
            }
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 60);
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rows)) { $rows = array(); }
            foreach ($rows as $row) {
                if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
                $dateRaw = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? $row['req_date'] ?? ''));
                $ts = $dateRaw !== '' ? strtotime($dateRaw) : false;
                if ($ts === false || $ts <= 0) { continue; }
                $parts = mleV102ExtractOfficialParts($gameId, $row);
                if (!empty($parts['main'])) {
                    return array(
                        'has_result' => true,
                        'date_raw'   => date('Y-m-d', $ts),
                        'date_label' => date('M j, Y', $ts),
                        'main'       => array_values($parts['main']),
                        'extra'      => array_values($parts['extra']),
                        'source'     => 'direct_db_latest_official:' . $realTable,
                        'game_id'    => $gameId,
                        'row'        => $row,
                        'ts'         => $ts,
                    );
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'direct_db_error:' . $e->getMessage());
        }
        return array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'no_completed_draw_values');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102NumbersFromJson')) {
    function mleV102NumbersFromJson($raw) {
        $raw = trim((string)$raw);
        if ($raw === '') { return array(); }
        $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
        $out = array();
        $walk = function ($v) use (&$walk, &$out) {
            if (is_array($v)) { foreach ($v as $x) { $walk($x); } return; }
            if (is_scalar($v) && trim((string)$v) !== '' && preg_match('/^-?\d+$/', trim((string)$v))) { $out[] = (int)$v; }
        };
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) { $walk($decoded); }
        if (empty($out)) {
            foreach (preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $raw, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY) as $n) { $out[] = (int)$n; }
        }
        return array_values($out);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102ActualPartsFromPerformanceRow')) {
    function mleV102ActualPartsFromPerformanceRow(array $row) {
        $main = array();
        $extra = array();
        $gameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $drawDate = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? $row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $drawSession = trim((string)($row['target_draw_session'] ?? $row['draw_session'] ?? ''));
        $drawAt = trim((string)($row['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
        if ($gameId !== '' && $drawDate !== '' && function_exists('getDrawByDate')) {
            try {
                $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
                $drawRow = getDrawByDate($gameId, $drawDate, $db, $drawSession, $drawAt);
                if (is_array($drawRow) && !empty($drawRow) && function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
                    $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($gameId, $drawRow);
                    $main = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($parts['main'] ?? array());
                    $extra = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($parts['extra'] ?? array());
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        }
        return array('main' => array_values($main), 'extra' => array_values($extra));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102NormalizeKey')) {
    function mleV102NormalizeKey($value) {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
        return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV103NormalizeDateRaw')) {
    function mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($value) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '' || strncmp($value, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0 || strtolower($value) === 'upcoming') {
            return '';
        }
        $ts = strtotime($value);
        if ($ts === false || $ts <= 0) {
            return '';
        }
        return date('Y-m-d', $ts);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV103SameNumberSet')) {
    function mleV103SameNumberSet(array $a, array $b) {
        $a = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', $a)));
        $b = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', $b)));
        sort($a); sort($b);
        return !empty($a) && !empty($b) && $a === $b;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV103BuildVisualDrawComparison')) {
    function mleV103BuildVisualDrawComparison(array $rows) {
        $todayTs = strtotime(date('Y-m-d'));
        $best = null;
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
            if (array_key_exists('actual_official_found', $row) && empty($row['actual_official_found'])) { continue; }
            $actualMain = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($row['actual'] ?? array());
            $actualExtra = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($row['actual_extra'] ?? array());
            $predicted = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($row['predicted'] ?? array());
            $predictedExtra = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($row['predicted_extra'] ?? array());

            $__mleV39VisualGameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? ''));
            if ($__mleV39VisualGameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard')) {
                $__mleV39VisualGuard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($__mleV39VisualGameId);
                if (!empty($__mleV39VisualGuard['has_config']) && (int)$__mleV39VisualGuard['main_max'] > 0) {
                    $__mleV39Fit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($actualMain, $__mleV39VisualGuard, 'main');
                    $actualMain = array_values($__mleV39Fit['valid']);
                    $__mleV39Fit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($predicted, $__mleV39VisualGuard, 'main');
                    $predicted = array_values($__mleV39Fit['valid']);
                    if (!empty($__mleV39VisualGuard['has_extra']) && (int)$__mleV39VisualGuard['extra_max'] > 0) {
                        $__mleV39Fit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($actualExtra, $__mleV39VisualGuard, 'extra');
                        $actualExtra = array_values($__mleV39Fit['valid']);
                        $__mleV39Fit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($predictedExtra, $__mleV39VisualGuard, 'extra');
                        $predictedExtra = array_values($__mleV39Fit['valid']);
                    } else {
                        $actualExtra = array();
                        $predictedExtra = array();
                    }
                    unset($__mleV39Fit, $__mleV39VisualGuard);
                }
            }
            if (empty($actualMain) && empty($actualExtra)) { continue; }
            if (empty($predicted) && empty($predictedExtra)) { continue; }

            $dateRaw = mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($row['draw_date'] ?? ($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
            $ts = $dateRaw !== '' ? strtotime($dateRaw) : 0;
            if ($ts <= 0 || ($todayTs && $ts > $todayTs + 86400)) { continue; }

            $strictCmp = mleBuildStrictRegularComparisonPayload($actualMain, $predicted, $actualExtra, $predictedExtra, $predicted);
            $matches = array_values($strictCmp['matches']);
            $extraMatches = array_values($strictCmp['extra_matches']);
            $rankingMatches = array_values($strictCmp['ranking_matches']);
            $mainHits = (int)$strictCmp['main_hits'];
            $extraHits = (int)$strictCmp['extra_hits'];
            $totalHits = (int)$strictCmp['total_hits'];
            $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
            $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
            $isBest = !empty($row['is_best_overall']) ? 1 : 0;
            $score = ($totalHits * 100000) + ($mainHits * 10000) + ($top20 * 1000) + ($top10 * 100) + ($isBest * 10);
            $candidate = array(
                'has_result' => true,
                'date_raw' => date('Y-m-d', $ts),
                'date_label' => date('M j, Y', $ts),
                'main' => $actualMain,
                'extra' => $actualExtra,
                'predicted' => $predicted,
                'predicted_extra' => $predictedExtra,
                'matches' => $matches,
                'extra_matches' => $extraMatches,
                'ranking_matches' => $rankingMatches,
                'main_hits' => $mainHits,
                'extra_hits' => $extraHits,
                'total_hits' => $totalHits,
                'ranking_hit_count' => max(count($rankingMatches), $totalHits),
                'top10_hits' => $top10,
                'top20_hits' => $top20,
                'source' => 'visual_run_comparison',
                'has_exact_prediction' => true,
                'comparison_status' => 'visual_prediction_for_displayed_draw',
                'label' => (string)($row['label'] ?? ''),
                'method' => (string)($row['method_label'] ?? ''),
                'saved_source' => (string)($row['source'] ?? $row['saved_source'] ?? ''),
                'origin_source' => (string)($row['origin_source'] ?? ''),
                'analysis_method_key' => (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? $row['method_key'] ?? ''),
                'method_key' => (string)($row['method_key'] ?? $row['analysis_method_key'] ?? ''),
                'method_label' => (string)($row['method_label'] ?? $row['analysis_engine_label'] ?? ''),
                'analysis_engine_label' => (string)($row['analysis_engine_label'] ?? ''),
                'analysis_track_label' => (string)($row['analysis_track_label'] ?? ''),
                'settings_json' => (string)($row['settings_json'] ?? ''),
                'settings' => (string)($row['settings'] ?? ''),
                'skai_run_mode' => (string)($row['skai_run_mode'] ?? ''),
                'risk_profile' => (string)($row['risk_profile'] ?? ''),
                'strategy_profile' => (string)($row['strategy_profile'] ?? ''),
                'focus_profile' => (string)($row['focus_profile'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_ai_pct' => (string)($row['signal_blend_ai_pct'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_skip_pct' => (string)($row['signal_blend_skip_pct'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_label' => (string)($row['signal_blend_label'] ?? ''),
                'run_date' => (string)($row['run_date'] ?? $row['generated_at'] ?? $row['date_saved'] ?? $row['created_at'] ?? ''),
                'target_draw_date' => (string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? $row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
                'score' => $score,
                'ts' => $ts,
            );
            if ($best === null || $candidate['ts'] > $best['ts'] || ($candidate['ts'] === $best['ts'] && $candidate['score'] > $best['score'])) {
                $best = $candidate;
            }
        }
        if ($best === null) { return array('has_result' => false); }
        unset($best['score'], $best['ts']);
        return $best;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison')) {
    function mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison(array $history, $lotteryId, array $gameIds, $lotteryName, $requiredDrawDate = '') {
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        $gameIds = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('strval', $gameIds), 'strlen')));
        $lotteryKey = mleV102NormalizeKey($lotteryName);
        $todayTs = strtotime(date('Y-m-d'));
        $requiredDrawDate = trim((string)$requiredDrawDate);
        $requiredDrawDate = ($requiredDrawDate !== '' && strtotime($requiredDrawDate) !== false) ? date('Y-m-d', strtotime($requiredDrawDate)) : '';
        $best = null;
        foreach ($history as $row) {
            if (!is_array($row)) { continue; }
            $rowLotteryId = (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            $rowTargetLotteryId = (int)($row['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            $rowGameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? ''));
            $rowNameKey = mleV102NormalizeKey($row['lottery_name'] ?? '');

            $match = false;

            if ($lotteryId > 0 && ($rowLotteryId === $lotteryId || $rowTargetLotteryId === $lotteryId)) { $match = true; }
            if (!$match && $rowGameId !== '' && in_array($rowGameId, $gameIds, true)) { $match = true; }
            if (!$match) { continue; }
            $dateRaw = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? $row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
            if ($dateRaw === '' || strncmp($dateRaw, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { continue; }
            $ts = strtotime($dateRaw);
            if ($ts === false || $ts <= 0 || ($todayTs && $ts > $todayTs + 86400)) { continue; }
            $rowDrawDate = date('Y-m-d', $ts);
            if ($requiredDrawDate !== '' && $rowDrawDate !== $requiredDrawDate) { continue; }
            $actual = mleV102ActualPartsFromPerformanceRow($row);
            $actualMain = array_values((array)($actual['main'] ?? array()));
            $actualExtra = array_values((array)($actual['extra'] ?? array()));
            if (empty($actualMain)) { continue; }
            $predictedRanking = mleV102NumbersFromJson($row['predicted_ranking_json'] ?? '');
            $__cmpGameId = $rowGameId !== '' ? $rowGameId : (!empty($gameIds) ? (string)$gameIds[0] : '');
            if ($__cmpGameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard')) {
                $__cmpGuard = mylottoexpertGetGameRangeGuard($__cmpGameId);
                if (!empty($__cmpGuard['has_config']) && (int)$__cmpGuard['main_max'] > 0) {

                    $__rankFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($predictedRanking, $__cmpGuard, 'main');
                    $predictedRanking = array_values($__rankFit['valid']);
                    $__actualFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($actualMain, $__cmpGuard, 'main');
                    $actualMain = array_values($__actualFit['valid']);
                    if (!empty($__cmpGuard['has_extra']) && (int)$__cmpGuard['extra_max'] > 0) {
                        $__extraFit = mylottoexpertFilterNumbersForGameRange($actualExtra, $__cmpGuard, 'extra');
                        $actualExtra = array_values($__extraFit['valid']);
                    } else {
                        $actualExtra = array();
                    }
                    unset($__rankFit, $__actualFit, $__extraFit);
                    if (empty($actualMain) || empty($predictedRanking)) { continue; }
                }
            }
            $pickSize = (int)($row['target_pick_size'] ?? 0);
            if ($pickSize <= 0) { $pickSize = count($actualMain); }
            $topPredicted = $pickSize > 0 ? array_slice($predictedRanking, 0, $pickSize) : $predictedRanking;

            $actualMaxVal = empty($actualMain) ? 0 : max(array_map('intval', $actualMain));
            $predictedMaxVal = empty($predictedRanking) ? 0 : max(array_map('intval', $predictedRanking));
            $isDailyDigits = ($actualMaxVal <= 9);
            $predictedHasCombos = ($predictedMaxVal >= 10);
            if ($isDailyDigits && $predictedHasCombos) {

                continue;
            }

            $matches = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualMain, $topPredicted));
            $rankingHits = array_values(mleCountDuplicateAwareMatches($actualMain, $predictedRanking));
            $mainHits = count($matches);
            $rankingHitCount = count($rankingHits);
            $top10 = (int)($row['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
            $top20 = (int)($row['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
            $weighted = (float)($row['weighted_quality_score'] ?? 0);
            $score = ($mainHits * 100000) + ($rankingHitCount * 10000) + ($top20 * 1000) + ($top10 * 100) + (int)round($weighted * 100);
            $__mleV39MethodKey = '';
            if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey')) {
                $__mleV39MethodKey = (string)mleAdvisoryResolveSavedEvidenceMethodKey($row);
            }
            if ($__mleV39MethodKey === '' && function_exists('mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey')) {
                $__mleV39MethodKey = (string)mleAdvisorySourceToMethodKey($row['source'] ?? '');
            }
            if ($__mleV39MethodKey === '') {
                $__mleV39MethodKey = strtolower(trim((string)($row['source'] ?? '')));
            }
            $__mleV39MethodLabels = function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels')
                ? (array)mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($__mleV39MethodKey)
                : array(ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $__mleV39MethodKey)), '');
            $__mleV39MethodLabel = trim((string)($__mleV39MethodLabels[0] ?? ''));
            $__mleV39TrackLabel = trim((string)($__mleV39MethodLabels[1] ?? ''));
            if ($__mleV39MethodLabel === '') { $__mleV39MethodLabel = 'Saved Prediction'; }
            $candidate = array(
                'has_result' => true,
                'date_raw' => date('Y-m-d', $ts),
                'date_label' => date('M j, Y', $ts),
                'main' => $actualMain,
                'extra' => $actualExtra,
                'predicted' => array_values(array_map('intval', $topPredicted)),
                'predicted_extra' => array(),
                'predicted_ranking' => array_values(array_map('intval', $predictedRanking)),
                'matches' => array_values(array_map('intval', $matches)),
                'extra_matches' => array(),
                'ranking_matches' => array_values(array_map('intval', $rankingHits)),
                'main_hits' => $mainHits,
                'extra_hits' => 0,
                'total_hits' => $mainHits,
                'ranking_hit_count' => $rankingHitCount,
                'top10_hits' => $top10,
                'top20_hits' => $top20,
                'source' => 'v102_exact_identity_scored_prediction_history',
                'saved_source' => (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
                'origin_source' => (string)($row['origin_source'] ?? ''),
                'analysis_method_key' => (string)($row['analysis_method_key'] ?? $__mleV39MethodKey),
                'has_exact_prediction' => true,
                'comparison_status' => 'scored_prediction_for_draw',
                'run_id' => (int)($row['run_id'] ?? 0),

                'saved_id' => (int)($row['__saved_id'] ?? $row['run_id'] ?? 0),
                'score_id' => (int)($row['id'] ?? 0),
                'run_date' => (string)($row['run_date'] ?? $row['generated_at'] ?? $row['date_saved'] ?? $row['created_at'] ?? ''),
                'target_draw_date' => (string)($row['target_draw_date'] ?? $row['draw_date'] ?? ''),
                'run_uuid' => (string)($row['run_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'snapshot_run_uuid' => (string)($row['snapshot_run_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'run_identity_key' => (string)($row['run_identity_key'] ?? ''),
                'batch_uuid' => (string)($row['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
                'batch_index' => (int)($row['batch_index'] ?? 0),
                'batch_total' => (int)($row['batch_total'] ?? 0),
                'source_batch_id' => (int)($row['source_batch_id'] ?? 0),
                'source_batch_run_id' => (int)($row['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0),
                'source_batch_run_order' => (int)($row['source_batch_run_order'] ?? 0),
                'source_batch_type' => (string)($row['source_batch_type'] ?? ''),
                'source_batch_origin' => (string)($row['source_batch_origin'] ?? ''),
                'prediction_target_id' => (string)($row['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''),
                'prediction_target_key' => (string)($row['prediction_target_key'] ?? ''),
                'provenance_label' => (string)($row['provenance_label'] ?? 'Your Saved Prediction'),
                'provenance_scope' => (string)($row['provenance_scope'] ?? 'user_saved_prediction'),
                'provenance_trace' => (string)($row['provenance_trace'] ?? ''),
                'method' => (string)($row['source'] ?? ''),
                'method_key' => $__mleV39MethodKey,
                'method_label' => $__mleV39MethodLabel,
                'track_label' => $__mleV39TrackLabel,
                'analysis_engine_label' => (string)($row['analysis_engine_label'] ?? $__mleV39MethodLabel),
                'analysis_track_label' => (string)($row['analysis_track_label'] ?? $__mleV39TrackLabel),
                'settings_json' => (string)($row['settings_json'] ?? ''),
                'settings' => (string)($row['settings'] ?? ''),
                'skai_run_mode' => (string)($row['skai_run_mode'] ?? ''),
                'risk_profile' => (string)($row['risk_profile'] ?? ''),
                'strategy_profile' => (string)($row['strategy_profile'] ?? ''),
                'focus_profile' => (string)($row['focus_profile'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_ai_pct' => (string)($row['signal_blend_ai_pct'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_skip_pct' => (string)($row['signal_blend_skip_pct'] ?? ''),
                'signal_blend_label' => (string)($row['signal_blend_label'] ?? ''),
                'score' => $score,
                'ts' => $ts
            );
            if ($best === null || $candidate['ts'] > $best['ts'] || ($candidate['ts'] === $best['ts'] && $candidate['score'] > $best['score'])) { $best = $candidate; }
        }
        if ($best === null) { return array('has_result'=>false); }
        unset($best['score'],$best['ts']); return $best;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102GameIdsForLottery')) {
    function mleV102GameIdsForLottery($db, $lotteryId, array $seedGameIds = array()) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($seedGameIds as $gid) {
            $gid = trim(html_entity_decode((string)$gid, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'));
            if ($gid !== '' && !in_array($gid, $ids, true)) { $ids[] = $gid; }
        }
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        if ($lotteryId > 0) {
            try {
                $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select(array($db->quoteName('game_id'), $db->quoteName('name')))
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                    ->setLimit(1);
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $row = $db->loadAssoc();
                if (is_array($row)) {
                    $gid = trim((string)($row['game_id'] ?? ''));
                    if ($gid !== '' && !in_array($gid, $ids, true)) { $ids[] = $gid; }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        }
        return array_values($ids);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV102ResolveLastDrawTruth')) {
    function mleV102ResolveLastDrawTruth($db, array $history, $lotteryId, array $seedGameIds, $lotteryName, array $visualRows = array()) {
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        $gameIds = mleV102GameIdsForLottery($db, $lotteryId, $seedGameIds);
        $comparison = array('has_result' => false);
        try {
            $comparison = mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison($history, $lotteryId, $gameIds, (string)$lotteryName);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $comparison = array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'comparison_error:' . $e->getMessage());
        }

        $visualComparison = array('has_result' => false);
        try {
            $visualComparison = mleV103BuildVisualDrawComparison($visualRows);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $visualComparison = array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'visual_comparison_error:' . $e->getMessage());
        }

        if (!empty($visualComparison['has_result']) && !empty($visualComparison['predicted'])) {
            if (empty($comparison['has_result'])) {
                $comparison = $visualComparison;
            } else {
                $cmpDate = mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($comparison['date_raw'] ?? '');
                $visDate = mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($visualComparison['date_raw'] ?? '');
                $cmpPredCount = count((array)($comparison['predicted'] ?? array()));
                $visPredCount = count((array)($visualComparison['predicted'] ?? array()));
                if ($visDate !== '' && ($cmpDate === '' || $visDate >= $cmpDate) && $visPredCount >= $cmpPredCount) {
                    $comparison = $visualComparison;
                }
            }
        }

        $officialBest = array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'not_checked');
        foreach ($gameIds as $gid) {
            $candidate = array('has_result' => false);
            try {
                if (function_exists('getLatestDrawing')) {
                    $row = getLatestDrawing($gid, $db);
                    if (is_array($row) && !empty($row)) {
                        $dateRaw = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? $row['req_date'] ?? ''));
                        $ts = $dateRaw !== '' ? strtotime($dateRaw) : false;
                        $parts = mleV102ExtractOfficialParts($gid, $row);
                        if ($ts !== false && $ts > 0 && !empty($parts['main'])) {
                            $candidate = array(
                                'has_result' => true,
                                'date_raw' => date('Y-m-d', $ts),
                                'date_label' => date('M j, Y', $ts),
                                'main' => array_values($parts['main']),
                                'extra' => array_values($parts['extra']),
                                'source' => 'getLatestDrawing:' . $gid,
                                'game_id' => $gid,
                                'ts' => $ts,
                            );
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { $candidate = array('has_result' => false); }
            if (empty($candidate['has_result'])) {
                $candidate = mleV102DirectLatestOfficialDraw($db, $gid);
            }
            if (!empty($candidate['has_result']) && (empty($officialBest['has_result']) || (int)$candidate['ts'] > (int)($officialBest['ts'] ?? 0))) {
                $officialBest = $candidate;
            }
        }

        $result = array('has_result' => false, 'date_raw' => '', 'date_label' => 'Not loaded yet', 'main' => array(), 'extra' => array(), 'predicted' => array(), 'predicted_extra' => array(), 'matches' => array(), 'extra_matches' => array(), 'ranking_matches' => array(), 'main_hits' => 0, 'extra_hits' => 0, 'total_hits' => 0, 'ranking_hit_count' => 0, 'top10_hits' => 0, 'top20_hits' => 0, 'source' => 'none', 'game_ids' => $gameIds, 'has_exact_prediction' => false, 'comparison_status' => 'no_official_result');

        if (!empty($officialBest['has_result'])) {
            $result['has_result'] = true;
            $result['date_raw'] = (string)$officialBest['date_raw'];
            $result['date_label'] = (string)$officialBest['date_label'];
            $result['main'] = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($officialBest['main'] ?? array());
            $result['extra'] = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($officialBest['extra'] ?? array());
            $result['source'] = (string)($officialBest['source'] ?? 'official');
        }

        if (!empty($result['has_result'])) {
            $result['comparison_status'] = 'no_prediction_for_displayed_draw';
            $displayedDrawDate = mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($result['date_raw'] ?? '');
            $exactComparison = array('has_result' => false);

            if ($displayedDrawDate !== '') {
                try {
                    $exactComparison = mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison(
                        $history,
                        $lotteryId,
                        $gameIds,
                        (string)$lotteryName,
                        $displayedDrawDate
                    );
                } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                    $exactComparison = array('has_result' => false, 'source' => 'exact_comparison_error:' . $e->getMessage());
                }

                if (!empty($visualComparison['has_result']) && !empty($visualComparison['predicted'])) {
                    $visualDate = mleV103NormalizeDateRaw($visualComparison['date_raw'] ?? '');
                    if ($visualDate !== '' && $visualDate === $displayedDrawDate) {
                        if (empty($exactComparison['has_result'])) {
                            $exactComparison = $visualComparison;
                        } else {
                            $__mleV6ExactPredCount = count((array)($exactComparison['predicted'] ?? array()));
                            $__mleV6VisualPredCount = count((array)($visualComparison['predicted'] ?? array()));
                            $__mleV6ExactRankCount = count((array)($exactComparison['predicted_ranking'] ?? array()));
                            $__mleV6VisualRankCount = count((array)($visualComparison['predicted_ranking'] ?? array()));
                            if ($__mleV6VisualPredCount > $__mleV6ExactPredCount || $__mleV6VisualRankCount > $__mleV6ExactRankCount) {
                                $exactComparison['predicted'] = array_values((array)($visualComparison['predicted'] ?? array()));
                                $exactComparison['predicted_ranking'] = array_values((array)(!empty($visualComparison['predicted_ranking']) ? $visualComparison['predicted_ranking'] : $visualComparison['predicted']));
                                $exactComparison['predicted_extra'] = array_values((array)($visualComparison['predicted_extra'] ?? ($exactComparison['predicted_extra'] ?? array())));
                                $exactComparison['source'] = (string)($exactComparison['source'] ?? 'scored_prediction_history') . '+visual_top20_display';
                                if (isset($visualComparison['saved_id'])) { $exactComparison['saved_id'] = (int)$visualComparison['saved_id']; }
                                if (isset($visualComparison['method_label'])) { $exactComparison['method_label'] = (string)$visualComparison['method_label']; }
                                if (isset($visualComparison['method_key'])) { $exactComparison['method_key'] = (string)$visualComparison['method_key']; }
                                foreach (array('saved_source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','method_label','analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','track_label','settings_json','settings','skai_run_mode','risk_profile','strategy_profile','focus_profile','signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_label','run_date','target_draw_date','date_saved','created_at','generated_at') as $__mleV5VisualMetaKey) {
                                    if (array_key_exists($__mleV5VisualMetaKey, $visualComparison)) { $exactComparison[$__mleV5VisualMetaKey] = $visualComparison[$__mleV5VisualMetaKey]; }
                                }
                                unset($__mleV5VisualMetaKey);
                            }
                            unset($__mleV6ExactPredCount, $__mleV6VisualPredCount, $__mleV6ExactRankCount, $__mleV6VisualRankCount);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if (!empty($exactComparison['has_result']) && (!empty($exactComparison['predicted']) || !empty($exactComparison['predicted_extra']))) {
                $result['predicted'] = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($exactComparison['predicted'] ?? array());
                $result['predicted_extra'] = mleV102NormalizeNumberList($exactComparison['predicted_extra'] ?? array());

                $strictCmp = mleBuildStrictRegularComparisonPayload(
                    (array)$result['main'],
                    (array)$result['predicted'],
                    (array)$result['extra'],
                    (array)$result['predicted_extra'],
                    (array)($exactComparison['predicted_ranking'] ?? array())
                );
                $result['matches'] = array_values($strictCmp['matches']);
                $result['extra_matches'] = array_values($strictCmp['extra_matches']);
                $result['ranking_matches'] = array_values($strictCmp['ranking_matches']);
                $result['main_hits'] = (int)$strictCmp['main_hits'];
                $result['extra_hits'] = (int)$strictCmp['extra_hits'];
                $result['total_hits'] = (int)$strictCmp['total_hits'];
                $result['ranking_hit_count'] = (int)$strictCmp['ranking_hit_count'];
                $result['top10_hits'] = (int)($exactComparison['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
                $result['top20_hits'] = (int)($exactComparison['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
                $result['comparison_source'] = (string)($exactComparison['source'] ?? 'scored_prediction_history');
                foreach (array('saved_source','origin_source','analysis_method_key','method_key','method','method_label','analysis_engine_label','analysis_track_label','track_label','settings_json','settings','skai_run_mode','risk_profile','strategy_profile','focus_profile','signal_blend_ai_pct','signal_blend_skip_pct','signal_blend_label','run_date','target_draw_date','date_saved','created_at','generated_at','saved_id','run_id','score_id','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_run_order','source_batch_type','source_batch_origin','prediction_target_id','prediction_target_key','run_uuid','snapshot_run_uuid','run_identity_key','provenance_label','provenance_scope','provenance_trace') as $__mleV5MetaKey) {
                    if (array_key_exists($__mleV5MetaKey, $exactComparison)) { $result[$__mleV5MetaKey] = $exactComparison[$__mleV5MetaKey]; }
                }
                unset($__mleV5MetaKey);
                $result['has_exact_prediction'] = true;
                $result['comparison_status'] = 'prediction_for_displayed_draw';
            }
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

if (!isset($__skaiPerfAllHistory) || !is_array($__skaiPerfAllHistory)) {
    try {
        $__skaiPerfAllHistory = skaiLoadPerformanceHistory($db, $workspaceUserId, 0, 1000);
    } catch (\Throwable $__mleV102HistE) {
        $__skaiPerfAllHistory = array();
    }
}
?>

<?php
$__mleVisualSort = strtolower(trim((string)$app->input->getCmd('mle_visual_sort', 'best')));
if ($__mleVisualSort !== 'newest') { $__mleVisualSort = 'best'; }
$__mleVisualPageSize = 20;
$__mleVisualPage = (int)$app->input->getInt('page', 1);
if ($__mleVisualPage < 1) { $__mleVisualPage = 1; }
$__mleVisualLimit = $__mleVisualPage * $__mleVisualPageSize;
$__mleVisualCompletedRows = array_merge(
    (array)($__advVisual['recent'] ?? array()),
    (array)($__advVisual['older'] ?? array())
);
if ($__mleVisualSort === 'newest') {
    usort($__mleVisualCompletedRows, function($a, $b) {
        $getTs = function($row) {
            foreach (array('draw_date','target_draw_date','evaluated_at','date_saved','generated_at','created_at') as $key) {
                $value = '';
                if (is_array($row) && isset($row[$key])) { $value = trim((string)$row[$key]); }
                if ($value !== '') {
                    $ts = strtotime($value);
                    if ($ts !== false) { return (int)$ts; }
                }
            }
            return 0;
        };
        $bt = $getTs($b);
        $at = $getTs($a);
        if ($bt === $at) { return 0; }
        return ($bt > $at) ? 1 : -1;
    });
}
$__mleVisualCompletedTotal = count($__mleVisualCompletedRows);
$__mleVisualRowsVisible = array_slice($__mleVisualCompletedRows, 0, $__mleVisualLimit);
$__mleVisualHasMore = ($__mleVisualCompletedTotal > count($__mleVisualRowsVisible));
$__mleVisualBuildHref = function($sort, $page) use ($__advLid, $__advVisualSectionId, $__mleVisualPageSize) {
    $uri = clone \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
    $uri->setVar('mle_lottery_id', (int)$__advLid);
    $uri->setVar('mle_visual_lottery', (int)$__advLid);
    $uri->setVar('mle_ajax', 'visual_comparison');
    $uri->setVar('page', (int)$page);
    $uri->setVar('page_size', (int)$__mleVisualPageSize);
    $uri->setVar('mle_visual_sort', (string)$sort);

    return htmlspecialchars($uri->toString() . '#' . $__advVisualSectionId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

          <ul class="mle-rs-guide__list">

        $__rsRenderRun = function(array $__r, string $__rsGroup) use ($__advLid, $__advUserCanManageLearning) {
          $__rsLabel   = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['label']        ?? 'Saved run'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsMethod  = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsDate    = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['draw_date']    ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsHits    = (int)($__r['total_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__rsMainH   = (int)($__r['main_hits']   ?? 0);
          $__rsExtraH  = (int)($__r['extra_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__rsDone    = !empty($__r['completed']);
          $__rsPerfId  = (int)($__r['perf_id']     ?? 0);
          $__rsSavedId = (int)($__r['saved_id']    ?? 0);
          $__rsNums    = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__r, false);
          $__rsActual  = ($__rsDone && (!empty($__r['actual']) || !empty($__r['actual_extra'])))
            ? mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__r, true)
            : '';
          $__rsProvScope = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['provenance_scope'] ?? 'user_saved_prediction'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsProvLabel = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['provenance_label'] ?? 'Your Saved Prediction'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsProvTrace = htmlspecialchars((string)($__r['provenance_trace'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__rsAnalysisSource = htmlspecialchars(function_exists('mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel') ? mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel($__r) : (string)($__r['method_label'] ?? 'Saved Prediction'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run" data-mle-provenance-scope="' . $__rsProvScope . '">';

          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__header">';

          $__rsCurrentStatus = ($__rsGroup === 'keep') ? 'use_in_advice' : (($__rsGroup === 'review') ? 'watch' : 'retired');
          if (!empty($__advUserCanManageLearning)) {
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__bulk-select">';
            if ($__rsSavedId > 0) {
              $__rsCheckboxId = 'mle-rs-select-' . (int)$__advLid . '-' . (int)$__rsSavedId;
              echo '<input type="checkbox" class="mle-rs-select-checkbox"'
                . ' id="' . htmlspecialchars($__rsCheckboxId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"'
                . ' name="selected_saved_ids[]" value="' . (int)$__rsSavedId . '"'
                . ' data-perf-id="' . (int)$__rsPerfId . '"'
                . ' data-current-status="' . htmlspecialchars($__rsCurrentStatus, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"'
                . ' data-group="' . htmlspecialchars($__rsGroup, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '"'
                . ' data-run-label="' . $__rsLabel . '">';
              echo '<label for="' . htmlspecialchars($__rsCheckboxId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '">Select this run</label>';
            } else {
              echo '<input type="checkbox" class="mle-rs-select-checkbox" disabled aria-disabled="true">';
              echo '<label>Select this run</label>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
          } else {
            echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__bulk-select mle-rs-run__bulk-select--system"><span>Auto-reviewed</span></div>';
          }
          echo '<div class="mle-rs-run__info">';
          echo '<strong>' . $__rsLabel . '</strong>';
          echo '<span>' . $__rsMethod . ' - Source: ' . $__rsAnalysisSource . ($__rsDate !== '' ? ' - draw ' . $__rsDate : '') . '</span>';

          if ($__rsDone) {

      <?php

        $__spUpcomingRuns  = (array)($__advVisual['upcoming'] ?? array());
        $__spCompletedRuns = array_merge(
          (array)($__advVisual['recent'] ?? array()),
          (array)($__advVisual['older']  ?? array())
        );
        $__spCompletedLimit = 5;
        $__spCompletedFirst = array_slice($__spCompletedRuns, 0, $__spCompletedLimit);
        $__spCompletedMore  = array_slice($__spCompletedRuns, $__spCompletedLimit);
        $__spTotalRuns = count($__spUpcomingRuns) + count($__spCompletedRuns);

        $__spMoreRequestedLotteryId = (int)$app->input->getInt('mle_saved_runs_more', 0);
        $__spMoreRequested = ($__spMoreRequestedLotteryId === (int)$__advLid) || ((int)$app->input->getInt('mle_full_workspace', 0) === 1);
        $__spMoreContainerId = 'mle-sp-more-container-' . (int)$__advLid;
        $__spPanelTargetId = 'mle-sp-panel-' . (int)$__advLid;
        $__spMoreUri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
        $__spMoreUri->setVar('mle_saved_runs_more', (string)(int)$__advLid);
        $__spMoreHref = htmlspecialchars($__spMoreUri->toString() . '#' . $__spPanelTargetId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $__spRenderRunCard = function(array $__spRun) {
          $__spLabel    = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['label']        ?? 'Saved run'), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spMethod   = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['method_label'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spDate     = htmlspecialchars((string)($__spRun['draw_date']    ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
          $__spSavedId  = (int)($__spRun['saved_id'] ?? 0);
          $__spHits     = (int)($__spRun['total_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__spMainHits = (int)($__spRun['main_hits']   ?? 0);
          $__spExtraHits= (int)($__spRun['extra_hits']  ?? 0);
          $__spCompleted= !empty($__spRun['completed']);
          $__spNums     = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__spRun, false);
          $__spActual   = ($__spCompleted && (!empty($__spRun['actual']) || !empty($__spRun['actual_extra'])))
            ? mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml($__spRun, true)
            : '';
          echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card' . ($__spCompleted ? ' mle-sp-run-card--scored' : '') . '">';
          echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__header"><div class="mle-sp-run-card__meta"><strong>' . $__spLabel . '</strong><span>' . $__spMethod . ($__spDate !== '' ? ' - ' . $__spDate : '') . '</span></div>';
          if ($__spCompleted) {
            echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__hits"><strong>' . (int)$__spHits . '</strong><span>Total hits</span>';
            if ($__spMainHits > 0 || $__spExtraHits > 0) {
              echo '<small>' . (int)$__spMainHits . ' main' . ($__spExtraHits > 0 ? ' + ' . (int)$__spExtraHits . ' extra' : '') . '</small>';
            }
            echo '</div>';
          } else {
            echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__hits mle-sp-run-card__hits--upcoming"><span>Upcoming</span></div>';
          }
          echo '</div>';
          echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Your numbers</span>' . $__spNums . '</div>';
          if ($__spActual !== '') {
            echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__balls"><span class="mle-visual-label">Actual draw</span>' . $__spActual . '</div>';
          }
          if (!MLE_DEMO_MODE && $__spSavedId > 0) {
            echo '<div class="mle-sp-run-card__actions"><form method="post" class="mle-inline-action mle-inline-action--delete"><input type="hidden" name="delete_set" value="' . (int)$__spSavedId . '">';
            echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
            echo '<button type="submit">Delete this run</button></form></div>';
          }
          echo '</div>';
        };
        if ($__spTotalRuns <= 0):
      ?>
        <div class="mle-visual-empty">No saved predictions for this lottery yet.</div>
      <?php else: ?>
        <div class="mle-sp-source-order-note">

            <?php foreach ($__spUpcomingRuns as $__spRun): $__spRenderRunCard((array)$__spRun); endforeach; unset($__spRun); ?>
          </div>
        </div>
        <?php endif; ?>
        <?php if (!empty($__spCompletedRuns)): ?>
        <div class="mle-sp-run-group mle-sp-run-group--completed" id="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spPanelTargetId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
          <div class="mle-sp-run-group__head"><strong>Saved predictions already drawn</strong><span>Showing <?php echo count($__spCompletedFirst); ?> of <?php echo count($__spCompletedRuns); ?></span></div>
          <div class="mle-sp-run-list">

      $__advPlayRows = (array)($__advCard['numbers_to_play'] ?? array());

    ?>

    <section class="mle-lottery-roof-section" data-mle-card-mode-section="details">

      </div>
      <div id="<?php echo $__advPlayBodyId; ?>" class="mle-section-body" data-mle-primary-section-body="1" style="display:none" aria-hidden="true">
        <?php if (empty($__advPlayRows)): ?>
          <div class="mle-visual-empty">No saved Numbers to Play for this lottery yet.</div>
        <?php else: ?>
          <div class="mle-card-list-grid">
          <?php foreach ($__advPlayRows as $__playRow):
            $__playName = htmlspecialchars((string)($__playRow['label'] ?? ('Play set #' . (int)($__playRow['id'] ?? 0))), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__playDate = htmlspecialchars((string)($__playRow['next_draw_date'] ?? $__playRow['target_draw_date'] ?? $__playRow['date_saved'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            $__playDailyView = mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView($__playRow);
            if (!empty($__playDailyView['is_daily'])) {
              $__playComboStrings = array_values((array)($__playDailyView['combo_strings'] ?? array()));
              $__playExtraDigits = !empty($__playDailyView['bonus_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['bonus_digits'] : (!empty($__playDailyView['extra_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['extra_digits'] : (array)($__playDailyView['top_extras'] ?? array()));
              $__playNums = mleAdvisoryRenderVisualRunNumbersHtml(array(
                'is_daily' => true,
                'pred_combo_strings' => $__playComboStrings,
                'predicted' => !empty($__playDailyView['primary_combo_digits']) ? (array)$__playDailyView['primary_combo_digits'] : (!empty($__playComboStrings) ? mleAdvisoryDigitArrayFromComboString((string)$__playComboStrings[0]) : array()),
                'predicted_extra' => array_values(array_map('intval', $__playExtraDigits)),
                'actual' => array(),
                'actual_extra' => array(),
                'daily_pick_size' => (int)($__playDailyView['pick_size'] ?? 0),
