        $__eliteRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__eliteRunId];
        if ((string)($__eliteRow['source'] ?? '') !== 'skai_prediction') {
            continue;
        }

        $__eliteSettings = mylottoexpertResolveEffectiveSettings($__eliteRow);
        $__eliteBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__eliteRow, $__eliteSettings);
        $__eliteAi = isset($__eliteBlendInfo['ai']) ? mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($__eliteBlendInfo['ai']) : null;
        if ($__eliteAi === null) {
            continue;
        }

        $__eliteTrainingRaw = '';
        if (!empty($__eliteSettings['training_style'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['training_style'];
        } elseif (!empty($__eliteSettings['profile'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['profile'];
        } elseif (!empty($__eliteSettings['risk_profile'])) {
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)$__eliteSettings['risk_profile'];
        } else {
            $__eliteDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__eliteRow, $__methodLabels);
            $__eliteTrainingRaw = (string)($__eliteDisp['run_mode'] ?? '');
        }

        $__eliteTrainingLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($__eliteTrainingRaw);
        if ($__eliteTrainingLabel === '') {
            $__eliteTrainingLabel = 'Not enough data yet';
        }

        $__elitePerf = 0.0;
        if (isset($__eliteRun['rank_score']) && $__eliteRun['rank_score'] !== null && $__eliteRun['rank_score'] !== '') {
            $__elitePerf += ((float)$__eliteRun['rank_score']) * 1000.0;
        }
        $__elitePerf += ((int)($__eliteRun['hits'] ?? 0)) * 100.0;
        if (isset($__eliteRun['avg_rank']) && $__eliteRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__eliteRun['avg_rank'] !== '') {
            $__elitePerf += max(0.0, 100.0 - (float)$__eliteRun['avg_rank']);
        }
        $__elitePerf += max(0, 10 - (int)($__eliteRun['missing_hits_count'] ?? 0));

        $__eliteValidRuns[] = array(
            'run_id' => $__eliteRunId,
            'ai' => (float)$__eliteAi,
            'training_style' => $__eliteTrainingLabel,
            'strategy_family' => (string)($__eliteBlendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? ''),
            'performance_score' => $__elitePerf,
        );
    }

    $__supportRuns = array();
    $__validationPreview = array();
    $__scoredRunsSorted = array_values((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()));
    usort($__scoredRunsSorted, function ($a, $b) {
        $aRank = (float)($a['rank_score'] ?? 0);
        $bRank = (float)($b['rank_score'] ?? 0);
        if ($bRank > $aRank) { return 1; }
        if ($bRank < $aRank) { return -1; }
        $aHits = (int)($a['hits'] ?? 0);
        $bHits = (int)($b['hits'] ?? 0);
        if ($bHits !== $aHits) { return $bHits <=> $aHits; }
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
    foreach ($__scoredRunsSorted as $__supportRun) {
        if (count((array)$__supportRuns) >= 5) {
            break;
        }
        $__supportRunId = (int)($__supportRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($__supportRunId <= 0 || !isset($__savedSetsById[$__supportRunId])) {
            continue;
        }
        $__supportRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__supportRunId];
        $__supportDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__supportRow, $__methodLabels);
        $__supportSettings = (array)($__supportDisp['settings'] ?? array());
        $__supportBlendInfo = mylottoexpertBuildBlendDisplayInfo($__supportRow, $__supportSettings);
        $__supportAiLabel = '';
        if (isset($__supportBlendInfo['ai']) && $__supportBlendInfo['ai'] !== null && $__supportBlendInfo['ai'] !== '') {
            $__supportAiLabel = mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($__supportBlendInfo['ai']) . '%';
        }
        $__supportTrainingRaw = '';
        if (!empty($__supportSettings['training_style'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['training_style'];
        } elseif (!empty($__supportSettings['profile'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['profile'];
        } elseif (!empty($__supportSettings['risk_profile'])) {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)$__supportSettings['risk_profile'];
        } else {
            $__supportTrainingRaw = (string)($__supportDisp['run_mode'] ?? '');
        }
        $__supportTrainingLabel = mylottoexpertBuildSimpleModeLabel($__supportTrainingRaw);
        if ($__supportTrainingLabel === '') {
            $__supportTrainingLabel = 'Not labeled yet';
        }
        $__supportRuns[] = array(
            'run_id' => $__supportRunId,
            'title' => (string)($__supportDisp['label'] ?: ('Run #' . $__supportRunId)),
            'draw_date' => (string)($__supportRun['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'hits' => (int)($__supportRun['hits'] ?? 0),
            'avg_rank' => (isset($__supportRun['avg_rank']) && $__supportRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__supportRun['avg_rank'] !== '') ? round((float)$__supportRun['avg_rank'], 1) : null,
            'ai_share' => $__supportAiLabel !== '' ? $__supportAiLabel : '-',
            'training_style' => $__supportTrainingLabel,
            'strategy_family' => (string)($__supportBlendInfo['strategy_label'] ?? 'Unclassified'),
            'source_label' => (string)($__supportDisp['base_label'] ?? '')
        );
    }
    $__recentRuns = array_values((array)($__dOpp['all_scored_runs'] ?? array()));
    usort($__recentRuns, function ($a, $b) {
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
    foreach ($__recentRuns as $__recentRun) {
        if (count((array)$__validationPreview) >= 5) {
            break;
        }
        $__recentRunId = (int)($__recentRun['run_id'] ?? 0);
        $__recentLabel = 'Run #' . $__recentRunId;
        if ($__recentRunId > 0 && isset($__savedSetsById[$__recentRunId])) {
            $__recentRow = (array)$__savedSetsById[$__recentRunId];
            $__recentDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($__recentRow, $__methodLabels);
            $__recentLabel = (string)($__recentDisp['label'] ?: $__recentLabel);
        }
        $__validationPreview[] = array(
            'draw_date' => (string)($__recentRun['draw_date'] ?? ''),
            'label' => $__recentLabel,
            'hits' => (int)($__recentRun['hits'] ?? 0),
            'avg_rank' => (isset($__recentRun['avg_rank']) && $__recentRun['avg_rank'] !== null && $__recentRun['avg_rank'] !== '') ? round((float)$__recentRun['avg_rank'], 1) : null,
            'rank_score' => (isset($__recentRun['rank_score']) && $__recentRun['rank_score'] !== null && $__recentRun['rank_score'] !== '') ? round((float)$__recentRun['rank_score'], 3) : null
        );
    }

    $__elitePrimarySignal = $__bestSetupName;
    $__eliteZoneLabel = 'Need at least 5 scored SKAI runs before this zone can be trusted';
    $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel = 'Still building enough repeated history';
    $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep saving SKAI runs across completed draws before narrowing to a final blend range.';
    $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Early read';
    $__eliteZoneSupport = 0;

    if (!empty($__eliteValidRuns)) {
        usort($__eliteValidRuns, function ($a, $b) {
            if ((float)$b['performance_score'] > (float)$a['performance_score']) { return 1; }
            if ((float)$b['performance_score'] < (float)$a['performance_score']) { return -1; }
            return (int)$b['run_id'] <=> (int)$a['run_id'];
        });

        $__eliteTopCount = count((array)$__eliteValidRuns) >= 5 ? max(3, (int)ceil(count((array)$__eliteValidRuns) * 0.5)) : count((array)$__eliteValidRuns);
        $__eliteTopRuns = array_slice($__eliteValidRuns, 0, $__eliteTopCount);
        $__eliteAiValues = array();
        $__eliteTrainingCounts = array();
        foreach ($__eliteTopRuns as $__eliteTopRun) {
            $__eliteAiValues[] = (float)$__eliteTopRun['ai'];
            $__eliteTrainingKey = trim((string)$__eliteTopRun['training_style']);
            if ($__eliteTrainingKey === '') {
                $__eliteTrainingKey = 'Unclassified';
            }
            if (!isset($__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey])) {
                $__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey] = 0;
            }
            $__eliteTrainingCounts[$__eliteTrainingKey]++;
        }

        if (!empty($__eliteAiValues)) {
            sort($__eliteAiValues);
            $__eliteZoneMin = (int)round(min($__eliteAiValues));
            $__eliteZoneMax = (int)round(max($__eliteAiValues));
            $__eliteZoneSupport = count((array)$__eliteTopRuns);
            $__eliteZoneLabel = 'AI Share ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '%';

            if ($__eliteZoneSupport >= 8) {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Strong pattern';
            } elseif ($__eliteZoneSupport >= 5) {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Building pattern';
            } else {
                $__eliteConfidenceLabel = 'Early read';
            }

            if (!empty($__eliteTrainingCounts)) {
                arsort($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingTop = (string)key($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingTopCount = (int)current($__eliteTrainingCounts);
                $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel = $__eliteTrainingTop . ' (' . $__eliteTrainingTopCount . ' of ' . $__eliteZoneSupport . ' top run' . ($__eliteZoneSupport === 1 ? '' : 's') . ')';
                $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep future testing inside ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '% AI share and prioritize ' . $__eliteTrainingTop . ' before testing outside that band.';
            } else {
                $__eliteActionLabel = 'Keep future testing inside ' . $__eliteZoneMin . '% to ' . $__eliteZoneMax . '% AI share until a stronger training-style pattern emerges.';
            }
        }
    }

    $__recommendationTone = $__mleEliteRecommendationTone($__signalScore, $__stageScore, $__eliteZoneSupport, $__bestSetupHits, $__scoredRuns, $__drawCount);

    $__priorityScore = ($__signalScore * 100) + ($__stageScore * 10) + min($__totalRuns, 9);
    $__intelligenceTotalRuns += $__totalRuns;
    $__intelligenceCards[] = array(
        'lottery_name' => $__lotteryName,
        'evidence_stage' => $__evidenceStage,
        'evidence_stage_class' => $__mleEvidenceStageClass($__evidenceStage),
        'evidence_note' => $__evidenceNote,
        'signal_strength' => $__signalStrength,
        'signal_strength_class' => $__mleSignalStrengthClass($__signalStrength),
        'signal_note' => $__signalNote,
        'recommendation' => $__recommendation,
        'summary_bullets' => $__summaryBullets,
        'next_move' => $__nextMove,
        'tweak_action' => (string)$__tweakAdvice['action'],
        'tweak_stable' => (string)$__tweakAdvice['stable'],
        'priority_score' => $__priorityScore,
        'agreement_score' => $__agreementScore,
        'agreement_numbers_display' => !empty($__agreementNumbers) ? implode(', ', array_slice($__agreementNumbers, 0, 8)) : 'No overlap cluster yet',
        'best_setup_name' => $__bestSetupName,
        'best_setup_hits' => $__bestSetupHits,
        'best_setup_scored_runs' => $__bestSetupScoredRuns,
        'repeat_pool_display' => $__repeatPoolDisplay,
        'repeat_support_label' => $__repeatSupportLabel,
        'dominant_mode_text' => $__dominantModeText,
        'dominant_mode_entries' => $__dominantModeEntries,
        'elite_primary_signal' => $__elitePrimarySignal,
        'elite_zone_label' => $__eliteZoneLabel,
        'elite_training_zone_label' => $__eliteTrainingZoneLabel,
        'elite_action_label' => $__eliteActionLabel,
        'elite_confidence_label' => $__eliteConfidenceLabel,
        'elite_zone_support' => $__eliteZoneSupport,
        'recommendation_tone_class' => (string)$__recommendationTone['class'],
        'recommendation_tone_badge' => (string)$__recommendationTone['badge'],
        'recommendation_tone_note' => (string)$__recommendationTone['note'],
        'lottery_id' => (int)$__dLid,
        'best_setup_source' => $__bestSetupSource,
        'support_runs' => $__supportRuns,
        'validation_preview' => $__validationPreview,
        'total_runs' => $__totalRuns,
        'scored_runs' => $__scoredRuns,
        'draw_count' => $__drawCount,
        'coverage_note' => $__scoredRuns . ' scored run' . ($__scoredRuns === 1 ? '' : 's') . ' across ' . $__drawCount . ' completed draw' . ($__drawCount === 1 ? '' : 's') . '.',
    );
}

usort($__intelligenceCards, function ($a, $b) {
    return (int)$b['priority_score'] <=> (int)$a['priority_score'];
});
?>

Lower is better because it means the real draw showed up closer to the top of the list.</p>

                          <td><?php $__validationRankTone = $__mleEliteRankTone($__validationRow['avg_rank']); ?><span class="mle-ci-rank-pill <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__validationRankTone['class'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>" title="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__validationRankTone['label'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>"><?php echo $__validationRow['avg_rank'] !== null ? htmlspecialchars((string)$__validationRow['avg_rank'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') : '-'; ?></span></td>

                        </tr>
                      <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                <?php else: ?>
                  <p class="mle-ci-panel__text">Once this lottery has completed scored runs, the most recent validation history will appear here before the deeper Draw Results Comparison section below.</p>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <div style="margin-top:0.75rem; color:#475569; font-size:0.84rem; line-height:1.55;">
                  <strong>How to interpret avg rank:</strong> rank 1 is the top prediction. The page averages the rank positions of the real winning numbers that were actually found in the run. Lower avg rank means the winning numbers appeared closer to the top of that prediction list. Missing winning numbers are not averaged; they are tracked separately in the missing count.
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="mle-ci-footer-grid">

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  if (window.__MLE_AJAX_LAZY_DRAW_RESULTS_V1__) { return; }
  window.__MLE_AJAX_LAZY_DRAW_RESULTS_V1__ = true;
  function byId(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
  function text(el, value){ if (el) { el.textContent = String(value || ''); } }
  function wireToggleAll(root){
    var btn = root ? root.querySelector('#mle-prc-toggle-all-btn') : byId('mle-prc-toggle-all-btn');
    if (!btn || btn.getAttribute('data-mle-lazy-toggle-wired') === '1') { return; }
    btn.setAttribute('data-mle-lazy-toggle-wired', '1');
    function syncLabel(){
      var sections = document.querySelectorAll('.prc-section');
      var anyExpanded = false;
      var i;
      for (i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
        if (String(sections[i].className || '').indexOf('collapsed') === -1) { anyExpanded = true; break; }
      }
      btn.innerHTML = anyExpanded ? 'Collapse All' : 'Expand All';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', anyExpanded ? 'true' : 'false');
    }
    btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
      var sections = document.querySelectorAll('.prc-section');
      var anyExpanded = false;
      var i;
      for (i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
        if (String(sections[i].className || '').indexOf('collapsed') === -1) { anyExpanded = true; break; }
      }
      for (i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
        if (typeof window.skaiPrcSetCollapsed === 'function') { window.skaiPrcSetCollapsed(sections[i], anyExpanded); }
        else if (anyExpanded) { sections[i].className += ' collapsed'; }
        else { sections[i].className = String(sections[i].className || '').replace(/\bcollapsed\b/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' '); }
      }
      syncLabel();
    });
    syncLabel();
  }
  function replaceWithLoadedSection(html){
    var parser = new DOMParser();
    var doc = parser.parseFromString(String(html || ''), 'text/html');
    var loaded = doc.getElementById('mle-historical-validation-wrap');
    var current = byId('mle-historical-validation-detail-wrap');
    if (!loaded || !current) { return false; }
    if (loaded.getAttribute('data-mle-draw-results-lazy') === '1') { return false; }
    current.parentNode.replaceChild(document.importNode(loaded, true), current);
    wireToggleAll(byId('mle-historical-validation-detail-wrap'));
    try { byId('mle-historical-validation-detail-wrap').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'}); } catch(e) { try { byId('mle-historical-validation-detail-wrap').scrollIntoView(true); } catch(ignore) {} }
    return true;
  }
  function loadDrawResults(btn){
    var wrap = byId('mle-historical-validation-detail-wrap');
    var href = btn ? (btn.getAttribute('data-mle-load-href') || btn.getAttribute('href') || '') : '';
    if (!wrap || !href) { return true; }
    if (!window.fetch || !window.DOMParser) { window.location.href = href; return false; }
    if (wrap.getAttribute('data-mle-loading') === '1') { return false; }
    wrap.setAttribute('data-mle-loading', '1');
    if (btn && btn.disabled !== undefined) { btn.disabled = true; }
    text(btn, 'Loading draw results...');
    fetch(href, {credentials:'same-origin', cache:'no-store'})
      .then(function(resp){ if (!resp || !resp.ok) { throw new Error('load_failed'); } return resp.text(); })
      .then(function(html){
        if (!replaceWithLoadedSection(html)) { window.location.href = href; }
      })
      .catch(function(){ window.location.href = href; });
    return false;
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
    var t = ev.target && ev.target.closest ? ev.target.closest('[data-mle-load-draw-results], #mle-load-draw-results-link') : null;
    if (!t) { return; }
    ev.preventDefault();
    loadDrawResults(t);
  }, false);
}());
</script>

$__skaiPerfByLottery = array();
foreach ($groups as $__g2) {
    $__g2Lid = (int)$__g2['lottery_id'];
    if (!isset($__skaiPerfByLottery[$__g2Lid])) {
        $__skaiPerfByLottery[$__g2Lid] = skaiLoadPerformanceHistory($db, $workspaceUserId, $__g2Lid, 100);
    }
}
unset($__g2, $__g2Lid);

$__skaiPerfAllHistory = array();
try {
    $__skaiPerfAllHistory = skaiLoadPerformanceHistory($db, $workspaceUserId, 0, 1000);
} catch (\Throwable $__mleV98AllE) {
    $__skaiPerfAllHistory = array();
}

if (!function_exists('mleV98NormalizeKey')) {
    function mleV98NormalizeKey($value) {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', ' ', $value);
        return trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value));
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV98NumbersFromJson')) {
    function mleV98NumbersFromJson($raw) {
        $raw = trim((string)$raw);
        if ($raw === '') { return array(); }
        if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryDecodeNumberPayload')) {
            try {
                $decoded = mleAdvisoryDecodeNumberPayload($raw);
                if (is_array($decoded) && !empty($decoded)) {
                    return array_values(array_map('intval', $decoded));
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        }
        $j = json_decode($raw, true);
        $out = array();
        $walk = function($v) use (&$walk, &$out) {
            if (is_array($v)) {
                foreach ($v as $vv) { $walk($vv); }
                return;
            }
            if (is_scalar($v) && trim((string)$v) !== '') {
                $out[] = (int)$v;
            }
        };
        if (is_array($j)) { $walk($j); }
        if (empty($out)) {
            $parts = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $raw, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
            $out = array_map('intval', (array)$parts);
        }
        return array_values($out);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV98ActualPartsFromPerformanceRow')) {
    function mleV98ActualPartsFromPerformanceRow(array $row) {
        $main = array();
        $extra = array();
        $gameId = trim((string)($row['target_game_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $drawDate = trim((string)($row['draw_date'] ?? $row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $drawSession = trim((string)($row['target_draw_session'] ?? $row['draw_session'] ?? ''));
        $drawAt = trim((string)($row['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
        if ($gameId !== '' && $drawDate !== '' && function_exists('getDrawByDate')) {
            try {
                $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
                $drawRow = getDrawByDate($gameId, $drawDate, $db, $drawSession, $drawAt);
                if (is_array($drawRow) && !empty($drawRow) && function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
                    $parts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($gameId, $drawRow);
                    $main = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($parts['main'] ?? array())));
                    $extra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($parts['extra'] ?? array())));
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { }
        }
        return array(
            'main' => array_values(array_filter($main, function($v) { return $v !== null && $v !== ''; })),
            'extra' => array_values(array_filter($extra, function($v) { return $v !== null && $v !== ''; })),
        );
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleV98BuildLastScoredDrawComparison')) {
    function mleV98BuildLastScoredDrawComparison(array $history, $lotteryId, array $gameIds, $lotteryName, $requiredDrawDate = '') {

        if (function_exists('mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison')) {
            return mleV102BuildLastScoredDrawComparison($history, (int)$lotteryId, $gameIds, (string)$lotteryName, (string)$requiredDrawDate);
        }
        return array('has_result' => false);
    }
}

$__byLottery = array();
$__lotteryOrder = array();
foreach ($groups as $__gKey => $__gVal) {
    $__lid = (int)$__gVal['lottery_id'];
    if (!isset($__byLottery[$__lid])) {
        $__byLottery[$__lid] = array(
            'lottery_id'   => $__lid,
            'lottery_name' => (string)$__gVal['lottery_name'],
            'groups'       => array(),
        );
        $__lotteryOrder[] = $__lid;
    }
    $__byLottery[$__lid]['groups'][$__gKey] = $__gVal;
}

foreach ($__byLottery as &$__lotRef) {
    uasort($__lotRef['groups'], function ($a, $b) {
        return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? ''));
    });
}
unset($__lotRef);

<?php foreach ($__lotteryOrder as $__outerLid):
  $__outerLot  = $__byLottery[$__outerLid];
  $__outerMeta = $lottoMetaById[$__outerLid] ?? [];
  $__outerState   = $__outerMeta['state']   ?? '';
  $__outerCountry = $__outerMeta['country'] ?? '';
  $__outerDrawCount = count((array)($__outerLot['groups'] ?? array()));
  $__outerLogo = buildLotteryLogoPath((string)$__outerState, (string)$__outerLot['lottery_name']);
  $__outerStorageKey = 'mle_outer_collapsed_' . $__outerLid;

  $__outerLastDrawInfo = array(
      'has_result' => false,
      'date_raw'   => '',
      'date_label' => 'Not posted yet',
      'main'       => array(),
      'extra'      => array(),
      'source'     => '',
  );

  $__outerGameIds = array();
  foreach ((array)($__outerLot['groups'] ?? array()) as $__outerDrawCandidate) {
      $__gid = trim((string)($__outerDrawCandidate['game_id'] ?? $__outerDrawCandidate['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
      if ($__gid !== '' && !in_array($__gid, $__outerGameIds, true)) {
          $__outerGameIds[] = $__gid;
      }
  }

  $__outerLatestRows = array();

  foreach ($__outerGameIds as $__ldGameId) {
      $__ldRow = null;
      try {
          if ($__ldGameId !== '' && function_exists('getLatestDrawing')) {
              $__ldRow = getLatestDrawing($__ldGameId, $db);
          }
      } catch (\Throwable $__ldE) {
          $__ldRow = null;
      }

      if (is_array($__ldRow) && !empty($__ldRow)) {
          $__ldDateRaw = trim((string)($__ldRow['draw_date'] ?? $__ldRow['req_date'] ?? ''));
          $__ldTs = $__ldDateRaw !== '' ? strtotime($__ldDateRaw) : false;
          if ($__ldTs !== false && $__ldTs > 0) {
              $__outerLatestRows[] = array(
                  'game_id' => $__ldGameId,
                  'row'     => $__ldRow,
                  'ts'      => $__ldTs,
                  'date'    => date('Y-m-d', $__ldTs),
                  'source'  => 'getLatestDrawing',
              );
          }
      }
  }

  if (empty($__outerLatestRows)) {
      $__outerLastDrawCandidates = array_values((array)($__outerLot['groups'] ?? array()));
      usort($__outerLastDrawCandidates, function ($a, $b) {
          return strcmp((string)($b['draw_date'] ?? $b['target_draw_date'] ?? ''), (string)($a['draw_date'] ?? $a['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
      });

      foreach ($__outerLastDrawCandidates as $__outerDrawCandidate) {
          $__ldGameId = trim((string)($__outerDrawCandidate['game_id'] ?? $__outerDrawCandidate['target_game_id'] ?? ''));
          $__ldDateRaw = trim((string)($__outerDrawCandidate['draw_date'] ?? $__outerDrawCandidate['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
          if ($__ldGameId === '' || $__ldDateRaw === '' || strncmp($__ldDateRaw, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) {
              continue;
          }
          $__ldTs = strtotime($__ldDateRaw);
          if ($__ldTs === false || $__ldTs <= 0) {
              continue;
          }
          $__ldDate = date('Y-m-d', $__ldTs);

          $__ldRow = null;
          try {
              if (function_exists('getDrawByDate')) {
                  $__ldRow = getDrawByDate(
                      $__ldGameId,
                      $__ldDate,
                      $db,
                      ($__outerDrawCandidate['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
                      ($__outerDrawCandidate['target_draw_at'] ?? null)
                  );
              }
          } catch (\Throwable $__ldE) {
              $__ldRow = null;
          }

          if (is_array($__ldRow) && !empty($__ldRow)) {
              $__outerLatestRows[] = array(
                  'game_id' => $__ldGameId,
                  'row'     => $__ldRow,
                  'ts'      => $__ldTs,
                  'date'    => $__ldDate,
                  'source'  => 'getDrawByDateFallback',
              );
              break;
          }
      }
  }

  if (!empty($__outerLatestRows)) {
      usort($__outerLatestRows, function ($a, $b) {
          return (int)($b['ts'] ?? 0) <=> (int)($a['ts'] ?? 0);
      });

      foreach ($__outerLatestRows as $__latestDrawCandidate) {
          $__ldGameId = (string)($__latestDrawCandidate['game_id'] ?? '');
          $__ldRow    = (array)($__latestDrawCandidate['row'] ?? array());
          $__ldTs     = (int)($__latestDrawCandidate['ts'] ?? 0);
          $__ldDate   = (string)($__latestDrawCandidate['date'] ?? '');

          $__ldParts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
          try {
              if (function_exists('mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow')) {
                  $__ldParts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($__ldGameId, $__ldRow);
              }
          } catch (\Throwable $__ldE2) {
              $__ldParts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
          }

          $__ldMain  = array_values((array)($__ldParts['main'] ?? array()));
          $__ldExtra = array_values((array)($__ldParts['extra'] ?? array()));

          if (empty($__ldMain) && isset($__ldRow['draw_results']) && trim((string)$__ldRow['draw_results']) !== '') {
              $__dr = trim((string)$__ldRow['draw_results']);
              if (strpos($__dr, '+') !== false) {
                  $__drPieces = explode('+', $__dr);
                  $__mainPiece = array_shift($__drPieces);
                  $__mainNums = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$__mainPiece, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
                  $__extraNums = array();
                  foreach ((array)$__drPieces as $__piece) {
                      $__extraNums = array_merge($__extraNums, preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', (string)$__piece, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY));
                  }
                  $__ldMain  = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__mainNums));
                  $__ldExtra = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$__extraNums));
              } else {
                  $__nums = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $__dr, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
                  if (count((array)$__nums) > 1) {
                      $__ldMain = array_values(array_map('intval', $__nums));
                  } elseif (preg_match('/^\d{2,}$/', $__dr)) {
                      $__ldMain = array_map('intval', str_split($__dr));
                  }
              }
          }

          $__ldMain  = array_values(array_filter($__ldMain, function ($v) { return $v !== '' && $v !== null; }));
          $__ldExtra = array_values(array_filter($__ldExtra, function ($v) { return $v !== '' && $v !== null; }));

          if (!empty($__ldMain)) {
              $__outerLastDrawInfo = array(
                  'has_result' => true,
                  'date_raw'   => $__ldDate,
                  'date_label' => $__ldTs > 0 ? date('M j, Y', $__ldTs) : $__ldDate,
                  'main'       => $__ldMain,
                  'extra'      => $__ldExtra,
                  'source'     => (string)($__latestDrawCandidate['source'] ?? 'official_draw_row'),
              );
              break;
          }
      }
  }

  if (false && empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']) && !empty($__skaiPerfByLottery[(int)$__outerLid])) {
      foreach ((array)$__skaiPerfByLottery[(int)$__outerLid] as $__pfRow) {
          if (!is_array($__pfRow)) { continue; }
          $__pfDateRaw = trim((string)($__pfRow['draw_date'] ?? $__pfRow['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
          if ($__pfDateRaw === '' || strncmp($__pfDateRaw, '0000-00-00', 10) === 0) { continue; }
          $__pfTs = strtotime($__pfDateRaw);
          if ($__pfTs === false || $__pfTs <= 0) { continue; }

          $__pfParts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
          $__pfRawActual = (string)($__pfRow['actual_numbers_json'] ?? '');
          try {
              if (function_exists('mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson')) {
                  $__pfParts = mleAdvisoryActualPartsFromJson($__pfRawActual);
              }
          } catch (\Throwable $__pfE) {
              $__pfParts = array('main' => array(), 'extra' => array());
          }

          $__pfMain = array_values((array)($__pfParts['main'] ?? array()));
          $__pfExtra = array_values((array)($__pfParts['extra'] ?? array()));

          if (empty($__pfMain) && $__pfRawActual !== '') {
              $__pfDecoded = json_decode($__pfRawActual, true);
              if (is_array($__pfDecoded)) {
                  $__pfFlat = array();
                  foreach ($__pfDecoded as $__pfVal) {
                      if (is_scalar($__pfVal) && trim((string)$__pfVal) !== '') {
                          $__pfFlat[] = (int)$__pfVal;
                      }
                  }
                  if (!empty($__pfFlat)) {
                      $__pfGameId = trim((string)($__pfRow['target_game_id'] ?? $__pfRow['game_id'] ?? ''));
                      $__pfPickSize = 0;
                      $__pfExtraCount = 0;
                      if ($__pfGameId !== '' && function_exists('mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec')) {
                          try {
                              $__pfSpec = mylottoexpertLoadLotterySpec($__pfGameId);
                              $__pfCfg = isset($__pfSpec['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($__pfSpec['lotteryConfig']) ? $__pfSpec['lotteryConfig'] : array();
                              $__pfPickSize = (int)($__pfCfg['pick_size'] ?? $__pfCfg['daily_pick_size'] ?? $__pfCfg['num_main_balls_drawn'] ?? 0);
                              $__pfExtraCount = (int)($__pfCfg['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? $__pfCfg['extra_count'] ?? 0);
                          } catch (\Throwable $__pfSpecE) { }
                      }
                      if ($__pfPickSize <= 0) { $__pfPickSize = (int)($__pfRow['target_pick_size'] ?? 0); }
                      if ($__pfExtraCount <= 0) { $__pfExtraCount = (int)($__pfRow['target_extra_count'] ?? 0); }
                      if ($__pfPickSize > 0 && count($__pfFlat) > $__pfPickSize) {
                          $__pfMain = array_slice($__pfFlat, 0, $__pfPickSize);
                          $__pfExtra = $__pfExtraCount > 0 ? array_slice($__pfFlat, $__pfPickSize, $__pfExtraCount) : array_slice($__pfFlat, $__pfPickSize);
                      } else {
                          $__pfMain = $__pfFlat;
                          $__pfExtra = array();
                      }
                  }
              }
          }

          $__pfMain = array_values(array_filter($__pfMain, function ($v) { return $v !== '' && $v !== null; }));
          $__pfExtra = array_values(array_filter($__pfExtra, function ($v) { return $v !== '' && $v !== null; }));

          if (!empty($__pfMain)) {
              $__outerLastDrawInfo = array(
                  'has_result' => true,
                  'date_raw'   => date('Y-m-d', $__pfTs),
                  'date_label' => date('M j, Y', $__pfTs),
                  'main'       => $__pfMain,
                  'extra'      => $__pfExtra,
                  'source'     => 'scored_performance_fallback',
              );
              break;
          }
      }
  }

  $__outerLastDrawComparison = array('has_result' => false);
  $__mleExactDrawDateForComparison = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawInfo['date_raw'] ?? ''));

  if (!empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']) && $__mleExactDrawDateForComparison !== '') {
      try {
          $__outerLastDrawComparison = mleV98BuildLastScoredDrawComparison(
              (array)$__skaiPerfAllHistory,
              (int)$__outerLid,
              (array)$__outerGameIds,
              (string)($__outerLot['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
              $__mleExactDrawDateForComparison
          );
      } catch (\Throwable $__mleV98CmpE) {
          $__outerLastDrawComparison = array('has_result' => false);
      }
  }

  if (false && empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']) && !empty($__outerLastDrawComparison['has_result'])) {
      $__outerLastDrawInfo = array(
          'has_result' => true,
          'date_raw'   => (string)($__outerLastDrawComparison['date_raw'] ?? ''),
          'date_label' => (string)($__outerLastDrawComparison['date_label'] ?? ''),
          'main'       => (array)($__outerLastDrawComparison['main'] ?? array()),
          'extra'      => (array)($__outerLastDrawComparison['extra'] ?? array()),
          'source'     => 'scored_prediction_history',
      );
  }

  $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader = $__outerLastDrawComparison;
  $__mleV98HeaderDate = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawInfo['date_raw'] ?? ''));
  $__mleV98CompareDate = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparison['date_raw'] ?? ''));
  if (!empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']) && !empty($__outerLastDrawComparison['has_result']) && $__mleV98HeaderDate !== '' && $__mleV98CompareDate !== '' && $__mleV98HeaderDate !== $__mleV98CompareDate) {
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader = array(
          'has_result' => false,
          'mismatch' => true,
          'date_label' => (string)($__outerLastDrawComparison['date_label'] ?? ''),
      );
  }

  if (!empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']) && !empty($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted'])) {
      $__mleV138Cmp = mleBuildStrictRegularComparisonPayload(
          (array)($__outerLastDrawInfo['main'] ?? array()),
          (array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted'] ?? array()),
          (array)($__outerLastDrawInfo['extra'] ?? array()),
          (array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted_extra'] ?? array()),
          (array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted_ranking'] ?? array())
      );
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['matches'] = array_values($__mleV138Cmp['matches']);
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['extra_matches'] = array_values($__mleV138Cmp['extra_matches']);
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['ranking_matches'] = array_values($__mleV138Cmp['ranking_matches']);
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['main_hits'] = (int)$__mleV138Cmp['main_hits'];
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['extra_hits'] = (int)$__mleV138Cmp['extra_hits'];
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['total_hits'] = (int)$__mleV138Cmp['total_hits'];
      $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['ranking_hit_count'] = (int)$__mleV138Cmp['ranking_hit_count'];
      unset($__mleV138Cmp);
  }

  unset($__outerGameIds, $__gid, $__outerLatestRows, $__latestDrawCandidate, $__outerLastDrawCandidates, $__outerDrawCandidate, $__ldGameId, $__ldDateRaw, $__ldTs, $__ldDate, $__ldRow, $__ldParts, $__ldMain, $__ldExtra, $__dr, $__drPieces, $__mainPiece, $__mainNums, $__extraNums, $__piece, $__nums, $__mleV98HeaderDate, $__mleV98CompareDate);
?>
<div class="mle-lottery-control-strip" aria-label="Controls before <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__outerLot['lottery_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
  <div class="mle-lottery-control-strip__left">
    <span class="mle-lottery-control-strip__label">Lottery controls</span>
    <a href="#my-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Back to lottery list</a>
    <a href="#top" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Top</a>
  </div>
  <div class="mle-lottery-control-strip__right">
    <span class="mle-lottery-open-state-note">Lottery cards stay open by default so actions are always visible.</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="mle-lottery-outer-<?php echo (int)$__outerLid; ?>" class="mle-lottery-outer" data-outer-lottery-id="<?php echo $__outerLid; ?>">
  <div class="mle-lottery-outer-header"
       aria-expanded="true" aria-label="<?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__outerLot['lottery_name'], ENT_QUOTES); ?> predictions">
    <?php if (!empty($__outerLogo['path'])): ?>
      <?php
        $__ini = '';
        foreach (preg_split('/\s+/', (string)$__outerLot['lottery_name']) as $__p) {
            if ($__p !== '') { $__ini .= mb_strtoupper(mb_substr($__p,0,1)); if (mb_strlen($__ini) >= 2) break; }
        }
        $__iniFallback = htmlspecialchars($__ini ?: 'LE', ENT_QUOTES);

    $__v101HasLastDraw = !empty($__outerLastDrawInfo['has_result']);
    $__v101LastDate = (string)($__outerLastDrawInfo['date_label'] ?? 'Not posted yet');
    $__v101LastMain = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawInfo['main'] ?? array()));
    $__v101LastExtra = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawInfo['extra'] ?? array()));
    $__v101Predicted = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted'] ?? array()));
    $__v101PredictedExtra = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['predicted_extra'] ?? array()));
    $__v101Matches = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['matches'] ?? array()));
    $__v101RankingMatches = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['ranking_matches'] ?? array()));
    $__v101ExtraMatches = array_values((array)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['extra_matches'] ?? array()));
    $__v101HitCount = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['main_hits'] ?? 0);
    $__v101RankingHitCount = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['ranking_hit_count'] ?? 0);
    $__v101Top10 = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['top10_hits'] ?? 0);
    $__v101Top20 = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['top20_hits'] ?? 0);
    $__v101MethodLabel = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['method_label'] ?? ''));
    $__v101MethodKey = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['method_key'] ?? ''));
    $__v101TrackLabel = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['track_label'] ?? ''));
    $__v101SourceLabel = function_exists('mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel') ? mylottoexpertAnalysisSourceLabel($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader) : ($__v101MethodLabel !== '' ? $__v101MethodLabel : 'Saved Prediction');

    $__v101SavedId = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['saved_id'] ?? $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['run_id'] ?? 0);
    $__v101ScoreId = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['score_id'] ?? 0);
    $__v101RunDateRaw = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['run_date'] ?? ''));
    $__v101RunDateTs = $__v101RunDateRaw !== '' ? strtotime($__v101RunDateRaw) : false;
    $__v101RunDateLabel = ($__v101RunDateTs !== false && $__v101RunDateTs > 0) ? date('M j, Y g:ia', $__v101RunDateTs) : ($__v101RunDateRaw !== '' ? $__v101RunDateRaw : 'not recorded');
    $__v101TargetDrawRaw = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['target_draw_date'] ?? $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['date_raw'] ?? ''));
    $__v101TargetDrawTs = $__v101TargetDrawRaw !== '' ? strtotime($__v101TargetDrawRaw) : false;
    $__v101TargetDrawLabel = ($__v101TargetDrawTs !== false && $__v101TargetDrawTs > 0) ? date('M j, Y', $__v101TargetDrawTs) : ($__v101TargetDrawRaw !== '' ? $__v101TargetDrawRaw : $__v101LastDate);
    $__v101BatchIndex = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['source_batch_run_order'] ?? $__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['batch_index'] ?? 0);
    $__v101BatchTotal = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['batch_total'] ?? 0);
    $__v101SourceBatchId = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['source_batch_id'] ?? 0);
    $__v101SourceBatchRunId = (int)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['source_batch_run_id'] ?? 0);
    $__v101BatchType = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['source_batch_type'] ?? ''));
    $__v101RunUuid = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
    $__v101PredictionTargetId = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
    $__v101ProvenanceLabel = trim((string)($__outerLastDrawComparisonForHeader['provenance_label'] ?? ''));
    if ($__v101ProvenanceLabel === '') { $__v101ProvenanceLabel = 'Your Saved Prediction'; }
    $__v101BatchLabelParts = array();
    if ($__v101BatchIndex > 0 && $__v101BatchTotal > 0) { $__v101BatchLabelParts[] = 'Batch run ' . $__v101BatchIndex . ' of ' . $__v101BatchTotal; }
    elseif ($__v101BatchIndex > 0) { $__v101BatchLabelParts[] = 'Batch run ' . $__v101BatchIndex; }
    if ($__v101SourceBatchId > 0) { $__v101BatchLabelParts[] = 'Batch ID ' . $__v101SourceBatchId; }
    if ($__v101SourceBatchRunId > 0) { $__v101BatchLabelParts[] = 'Batch run ID ' . $__v101SourceBatchRunId; }
    if ($__v101BatchType !== '') { $__v101BatchLabelParts[] = $__v101BatchType; }
    $__v101BatchLine = implode(' | ', $__v101BatchLabelParts);
    $__v101TraceParts = array();
    $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Run date: ' . $__v101RunDateLabel;
    $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Target draw: ' . $__v101TargetDrawLabel;
    if ($__v101SavedId > 0) { $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Saved ID ' . $__v101SavedId; }
    if ($__v101ScoreId > 0) { $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Score ID ' . $__v101ScoreId; }
    if ($__v101RunUuid !== '') { $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Run UUID ' . substr($__v101RunUuid, 0, 12); }
    if ($__v101PredictionTargetId !== '') { $__v101TraceParts[] = 'Target ID ' . substr($__v101PredictionTargetId, 0, 14); }
    $__v101TraceLine = implode(' | ', $__v101TraceParts);
    if ($__v101MethodLabel === '' && $__v101MethodKey !== '' && function_exists('mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels')) {
        $__v101MethodLabels = (array)mleAdvisoryAnalysisMethodLabels($__v101MethodKey);
        $__v101MethodLabel = trim((string)($__v101MethodLabels[0] ?? ''));
        $__v101TrackLabel = trim((string)($__v101MethodLabels[1] ?? $__v101TrackLabel));
    }
    if ($__v101MethodLabel === '' && !empty($__v101Predicted)) { $__v101MethodLabel = 'Saved Prediction'; }

    $__v101MainHitMap = array();
    $__v101ExtraHitMap = array();
    foreach (array_merge($__v101Matches, $__v101RankingMatches) as $__v101HitVal) {
        $__v101MainHitMap[(string)$__v101HitVal] = true;
    }
    foreach ($__v101ExtraMatches as $__v101HitVal) {
        $__v101ExtraHitMap[(string)$__v101HitVal] = true;
    }

  <?php unset($__v101HasLastDraw, $__v101LastDate, $__v101LastMain, $__v101LastExtra, $__v101Predicted, $__v101PredictedExtra, $__v101Matches, $__v101RankingMatches, $__v101ExtraMatches, $__v101HitCount, $__v101RankingHitCount, $__v101Top10, $__v101Top20, $__v101MethodLabel, $__v101MethodKey, $__v101TrackLabel, $__v101SourceLabel, $__v101MethodLabels, $__v101SavedId, $__v101ScoreId, $__v101RunDateRaw, $__v101RunDateTs, $__v101RunDateLabel, $__v101TargetDrawRaw, $__v101TargetDrawTs, $__v101TargetDrawLabel, $__v101BatchIndex, $__v101BatchTotal, $__v101SourceBatchId, $__v101SourceBatchRunId, $__v101BatchType, $__v101RunUuid, $__v101PredictionTargetId, $__v101ProvenanceLabel, $__v101BatchLabelParts, $__v101BatchLine, $__v101TraceParts, $__v101TraceLine, $__v101MainHitMap, $__v101ExtraHitMap, $__v101HitVal, $__v101Ball, $__v101ExtraBall, $__v101PredBall, $__v101PredExtraBall); ?>
  <div class="mle-lottery-outer-body">

  <div class="sdi-header lottery-header skai-card__header">
    <div class="sdi-snapshot-bar">

<?php
  $logo = ['path'=>'','exists'=>false,'alt'=>''];

      $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', (string)$g['lottery_name']);

          <?php echo \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token'); ?>

  <div class="lottery-collapsible-content">

      <?php

$methodKeys = ['skip_hit','ai_prediction','mcmc_prediction','skai_prediction','heatmap'];
        $predsBySource = [];
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__r) { $predsBySource[$__r->source][] = $__r; }

        $__fields   = getDrawFields($g['game_id']);
        $__drawRow  = getDrawByDate($g['game_id'], $g['draw_date'], $db, ($g['target_draw_session'] ?? null), ($g['target_draw_at'] ?? null));
        $__drawMain = [];
        $__drawExtra = [];
        if ($__drawRow) {
          foreach (($__fields['main'] ?? []) as $__c) {
            if (isset($__drawRow[$__c]) && $__drawRow[$__c] !== '') { $__drawMain[] = (int)$__drawRow[$__c]; }
          }
          if (!empty($__fields['extra']) && isset($__drawRow[$__fields['extra']]) && $__drawRow[$__fields['extra']] !== '') {
            $__drawExtra[] = (int)$__drawRow[$__fields['extra']];
          }

          if (empty($__drawMain)) {
              $__hmExt   = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($g['game_id'], $__drawRow);
              $__drawMain  = $__hmExt['main'];
              if (empty($__drawExtra)) { $__drawExtra = $__hmExt['extra']; }
          }
        }

        $__mode = $__drawRow ? 'post' : 'pre';

        $__maxRankMain  = 20;
        $__maxRankExtra = 5;

        $placementStats = [];
        $hitsByMethod   = [];
        $predCountByMethod = [];
        foreach ($methodKeys as $__m) {
          $placementStats[$__m] = [
            'main'  => array_fill(1, $__maxRankMain, 0),
            'extra' => array_fill(1, $__maxRankExtra, 0),
            'main_hits_total'  => 0,
            'extra_hits_total' => 0
          ];
          $hitsByMethod[$__m] = ['runs'=>0,'mainHits'=>0,'extraHits'=>0];
          $predCountByMethod[$__m] = isset($predsBySource[$__m]) ? count($predsBySource[$__m]) : 0;
        }

        $totalRuns = count((array)($g['preds'] ?? array()));
        $totalMainHits = 0;
        $totalExtraHits = 0;

        $toPositions = function (string $csv, int $limit) {
          $arr = array_values(array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $csv)), fn($v)=>$v!==''));
          $pos = [];
          foreach ($arr as $i => $n) {
            if ($i >= $limit) break;
            $num = (int)$n;
            if (!isset($pos[$num])) { $pos[$num] = $i + 1; }
          }
          return $pos;
        };

        $__heatmapBestRun = array();
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__run) {
          $src = $__run->source;
          if (!in_array($src, $methodKeys, true)) { $src = 'skip_hit'; }

          $posMain  = $toPositions((string)($__run->main_numbers ?? ''), $__maxRankMain);
          $posExtra = $toPositions((string)($__run->extra_ball_numbers ?? ''), $__maxRankExtra);

          $__rmh = 0; $__reh = 0; $__rps = 0;
          foreach ($__drawMain  as $__dh) { if (isset($posMain[$__dh]))  { $__rmh++; $__rps += $posMain[$__dh]; } }
          foreach ($__drawExtra as $__de) { if (isset($posExtra[$__de])) { $__reh++; } }
          $__rTotal = $__rmh + $__reh;
          $__runId  = (int)$__run->id;

          $__ex = $__heatmapBestRun[$src] ?? null;

          $__better = ($__ex === null)
            || ($__rTotal > $__ex['totalHits'])
            || ($__rTotal === $__ex['totalHits'] && $__rps < $__ex['posSum'])
            || ($__rTotal === $__ex['totalHits'] && $__rps === $__ex['posSum'] && $__runId > $__ex['runId']);
          if ($__better) {
            $__heatmapBestRun[$src] = [
              'run'       => $__run,
              'posMain'   => $posMain,
              'posExtra'  => $posExtra,
              'totalHits' => $__rTotal,
              'posSum'    => $__rps,
              'runId'     => $__runId,
            ];
          }
        }

        foreach ($__heatmapBestRun as $src => $__hbr) {
          $posMain  = $__hbr['posMain'];
          $posExtra = $__hbr['posExtra'];

          $hitsByMethod[$src]['runs']++;

          foreach ($__drawMain as $__hit) {
            if (isset($posMain[$__hit])) {
              $rank = (int)$posMain[$__hit];
              if ($rank >= 1 && $__maxRankMain >= $rank) {
                $placementStats[$src]['main'][$rank]++;
                $placementStats[$src]['main_hits_total']++;
                $hitsByMethod[$src]['mainHits']++;
                $totalMainHits++;
              }
            }
          }

          foreach ($__drawExtra as $__e) {
            if (isset($posExtra[$__e])) {
              $rankE = (int)$posExtra[$__e];
              if ($rankE >= 1 && $__maxRankExtra >= $rankE) {
                $placementStats[$src]['extra'][$rankE]++;
                $placementStats[$src]['extra_hits_total']++;
                $hitsByMethod[$src]['extraHits']++;
                $totalExtraHits++;
              }
            }
          }
        }

        $sweetSpots = [];
        foreach ($methodKeys as $__m) {
          $row = $placementStats[$__m]['main'];
          arsort($row);
          $tops = array_slice(array_keys($row), 0, 2);
          $tops = array_values(array_filter($tops, fn($k) => $placementStats[$__m]['main'][$k] > 0));
          $sweetSpots[$__m] = $tops;
        }

        $avgMainHitsPerRun  = $totalRuns ? round($totalMainHits / $totalRuns, 2) : 0;
        $avgExtraHitsPerRun = $totalRuns ? round($totalExtraHits / $totalRuns, 2) : 0;

        $labelShort = [
          'skip_hit'        => 'Skip & Hit',
          'ai_prediction'   => 'AI',
          'mcmc_prediction' => 'MCMC',
          'skai_prediction' => 'SKAI',
          'heatmap'         => 'Heatmap',
        ];

        $__extraLabel = 'Extra Ball';
        $__lcCfg = $configData['lotteries'][$g['game_id']]['lotteryConfig'] ?? [];
        if (!empty($__lcCfg['extra_ball_label'])) {
            $__extraLabel = (string)$__lcCfg['extra_ball_label'];
        } else {
            $__lname = strtolower((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
            if     (strpos($__lname, 'powerball')  !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Powerball';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'mega')       !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Mega Ball';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'lucky star') !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Lucky Star';
            elseif (strpos($__lname, 'bonus')      !== false) $__extraLabel = 'Bonus Ball';
        }

        $__anyExtraPred = false;
        foreach ($g['preds'] as $__xr) {
            if (!empty($__xr->extra_ball_numbers)) { $__anyExtraPred = true; break; }
        }
      ?>

  <!-- SDI: one-sentence summary -->
  <div class="sdi-summary">
    <?php
      $__mwh = 0; $__br = [];
      foreach ($methodKeys as $__sm) {
        if ($hitsByMethod[$__sm]['mainHits'] > 0) {
          $__mwh++;
          $tops = $sweetSpots[$__sm] ?? [];
          $__br = array_merge($__br, $tops);
        }
      }
      $__br = array_unique($__br); sort($__br);
      $__rct = $totalRuns === 1 ? '1 saved run' : $totalRuns . ' saved runs';
      if ($__mode === 'post') {
        if ($totalMainHits === 0) {
          $__sum = $__rct . ' saved - no main-number hits recorded yet.';
        } else {
          $__rt = !empty($__br) ? 'strongest at rank ' . implode(', ', array_slice($__br,0,3)) : 'distributed across ranks';
          $__sum = $__rct . ' - ' . $totalMainHits . ' main hit' . ($totalMainHits !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ' across ' . $__mwh . ' method' . ($__mwh !== 1 ? 's' : '') . ', ' . $__rt . '.';
        }
      } else {
        $__sum = $__rct . ' for the upcoming draw. Check the Past results tab for rank placement.';
      }
    ?>

  <!-- OVERVIEW TAB -->
  <div class="sdi-panel" data-sdi-panel="overview" role="tabpanel">
    <?php

      $__swGid        = (string)($g['game_id'] ?? '');
      $__swHasExtra   = 0; $__swMainMax = 0; $__swExtraMax = 0; $__swExtraCnt = 0;
      $__swExtraLabel = 'Extra Ball';

      if (is_file($__swCfgFile)) {

          $__swLc       = $__swCfg['lotteries'][$__swGid]['lotteryConfig'];

          $__swExtraMax = (int)($__swLc['max_extra_ball_number'] ?? 0);
          $__swExtraCnt = max(0, (int)($__swLc['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? 0));
          if (!empty($__swLc['extra_ball_label'])) { $__swExtraLabel = (string)$__swLc['extra_ball_label']; }
        }
      }
      if ($__swExtraLabel === 'Extra Ball') {
        $__swLname = strtolower((string)($g['lottery_name'] ?? ''));
        if      (strpos($__swLname, 'powerball') !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Powerball'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'mega')      !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Mega Ball'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'star')      !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Lucky Star'; }
        elseif  (strpos($__swLname, 'bonus')     !== false) { $__swExtraLabel = 'Bonus Ball'; }
      }
      $__swModMap   = [];
      foreach ($modules as $__swM2) { $__swModMap[$__swM2['key']] = $__swM2; }
      $__swPredData = [];
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__swS2) {
        $__swPredData[] = [
          'id'     => (int)$__swS2->id,
          'source' => (string)$__swS2->source,
          'label'  => (string)($__swS2->label ?? ''),

          'extras' => array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', (string)($__swS2->extra_ball_numbers ?? ''))))),
        ];
      }
      $__swModListJson = json_encode(
        array_map(function($m){ return ['key'=>$m['key'],'label'=>$m['label']]; }, $modules),
        JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP
      );
    ?>

    <?php
      $__spMainFreq = array();
      $__spSourceFreq = array();
      $__spSavedRunsLite = array();
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__spPred) {
          $__spMains = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', (string)($__spPred->main_numbers ?? '')))));
          foreach ($__spMains as $__spNum) {
              $__spMainFreq[$__spNum] = ($__spMainFreq[$__spNum] ?? 0) + 1;
          }
          $__spSource = (string)($__spPred->source ?? '');
          if ($__spSource !== '') {
              $__spSourceFreq[$__spSource] = ($__spSourceFreq[$__spSource] ?? 0) + 1;
          }
          $__spSavedRunsLite[] = array(
              'label' => trim((string)($__spPred->label ?? '')),
              'source' => $__spSource,
              'saved_at' => (string)($__spPred->generated_at ?: $__spPred->date_saved),
              'mains' => $__spMains
          );
      }
      arsort($__spMainFreq);
      arsort($__spSourceFreq);
      $__spTopNums = array_slice(array_keys($__spMainFreq), 0, 5);
      $__spTopSourceKey = !empty($__spSourceFreq) ? (string)array_key_first($__spSourceFreq) : '';
      $__spTopSourceLabel = $__swModMap[$__spTopSourceKey]['label'] ?? ($__spTopSourceKey !== '' ? ucwords(str_replace('_',' ', $__spTopSourceKey)) : 'No method yet');
      $__spCompletedProofCount = 0;
      foreach ($g['preds'] as $__spPredCheck) {
          if (!empty($__spPredCheck->draw_results) || !empty($__spPredCheck->total_hits)) { $__spCompletedProofCount++; }
      }
      $__spTrustLabel = 'Too early to trust';
      $__spTrustText = 'You are still building history. Use these saved runs as early clues only.';
      if ($totalRuns >= 10 && $__spCompletedProofCount >= 3) {
          $__spTrustLabel = 'Ready to follow';
          $__spTrustText = 'You now have enough saved history to start narrowing attention to the strongest repeated runs.';
      } elseif ($totalRuns >= 5 || $__spCompletedProofCount >= 2) {
          $__spTrustLabel = 'Starting to become useful';
          $__spTrustText = 'Some repetition is appearing, but you still need more completed draws before trusting it strongly.';
      }
      $__spNextStep = ($totalRuns < 5)
          ? 'Keep saving only your strongest run for each draw so this section becomes easier to trust.'
          : (($__spCompletedProofCount < 2)
              ? 'Wait for more completed draws, then check whether the same runs or methods keep showing up.'
              : 'Keep watching the saved runs and repeated numbers below before changing direction.');
      $__spTopRuns = array_slice($__spSavedRunsLite, 0, min(3, count($__spSavedRunsLite)));
    ?>
    <?php if ($__mleWorkspaceMode === 'beginner'): ?>
    <?php
      $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--early';
      if ($__spTrustLabel === 'Ready to follow') {
          $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--ready';
      } elseif ($__spTrustLabel === 'Starting to become useful') {
          $__spTrustClass = 'mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--building';
      }
      $__spRepeatText = !empty($__spTopNums)
          ? implode(', ', $__spTopNums)
          : 'No clear repeat pattern yet';
      $__spRepeatExplain = !empty($__spTopNums)
          ? 'These are the main numbers showing up most often across the saved runs you kept for this draw.'
          : 'Your saved runs are still too scattered to point to a clear repeating set of numbers.';
      $__spMethodExplain = ($__spTopSourceLabel !== 'Mixed')
          ? 'This method is showing up most often in the runs you decided to keep for this draw.'
          : 'No single method is dominating yet. The saved runs are still mixed.';
    ?>
    <div class="mle-sp-beginner">
      <span class="mle-sp-beginner__eyebrow">Beginner Saved Predictions View</span>
      <h3 class="mle-sp-beginner__title">The short version for this draw</h3>
      <p class="mle-sp-beginner__text">This is the beginner read for this draw. Start at the top left, move across, and finish with the next-step card so you know exactly what matters first.</p>
      <div class="mle-sp-beginner__grid">
        <div class="<?php echo $__spTrustClass; ?>">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">1. Can I trust this yet?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTrustLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTrustText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">2. What keeps repeating?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spRepeatText, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spRepeatExplain, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">3. Which style shows up most?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spTopSourceLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spMethodExplain, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
        <div class="mle-sp-beginner__card mle-sp-beginner__card--next">
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-label">4. What should I do next?</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-value">Follow the strongest repeats</span>
          <span class="mle-sp-beginner__card-sub"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__spNextStep, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <?php if (!empty($__spTopRuns)): ?>
      <div class="mle-sp-beginner__runs-wrap">

    <!-- =====================================================
         POST-DRAW OVERVIEW: Learning Center
         Preserved JS hooks: .narrative-card[data-mode],
         [data-narrative], .common-card[data-common-bar],
         all data-decision-* and data-common-* attrs.
    ===================================================== -->

    <?php

      $__postBestMethod = null;
      $__postBestHits   = 0;
      $__postActiveMethodCount = 0;
      foreach ($methodKeys as $__pbm) {

        if (isset($hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['runs']) && $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['runs'] > 0) {
          $__postActiveMethodCount++;
        }
        if (isset($hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits']) && $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits'] > $__postBestHits) {
          $__postBestHits   = $hitsByMethod[$__pbm]['mainHits'];
          $__postBestMethod = $__pbm;
        }
      }

      $__postBestRanks = array_slice($__br, 0, 3);

      $__postRankStr = '';
      if (!empty($__postBestRanks)) {
        $__brf = [];
        foreach ($__postBestRanks as $__brv) { $__brf[] = '#' . (int)$__brv; }
        $__postRankStr = implode(', ', $__brf);
      }

      if ($totalMainHits > 0) {
        $__postHeroSub = 'This draw recorded ' . (int)$totalMainHits . ' main-number match'
          . ($totalMainHits !== 1 ? 'es' : '')
          . ' across ' . (int)$__mwh . ' method'
          . ($__mwh !== 1 ? 's' : '')
          . '. Review where support was strongest and carry that evidence into the next cycle.';
      } else {
        $__postHeroSub = 'No main-number matches were recorded for this draw. This is useful baseline evidence - use it to understand which rank positions and methods need calibration before the next draw.';
      }

      if ($totalMainHits === 0) {
        $__postTakeaway = 'No main-number matches were recorded for this draw. This is useful calibration evidence - review rank placement in the Performance tab to understand where methods placed relative to the drawn numbers.';
      } elseif ($__postBestMethod !== null && $__postRankStr !== '') {
        $__ptLabel  = htmlspecialchars((string)($labelShort[$__postBestMethod] ?? $__postBestMethod), ENT_QUOTES);
        $__postTakeaway = 'Support was strongest in the ' . $__ptLabel . ' method. Rank concentration appeared at position ' . $__postRankStr . '. Carry this rank preference into the next cycle.';
      } elseif ($__postBestMethod !== null) {
        $__ptLabel  = htmlspecialchars((string)($labelShort[$__postBestMethod] ?? $__postBestMethod), ENT_QUOTES);
        $__postTakeaway = 'Support was strongest in the ' . $__ptLabel . ' method. Review the Performance tab for detailed rank placement data.';
      } else {
        $__postTakeaway = 'Review the Performance tab for detailed rank placement data relative to the drawn numbers.';
      }
    ?>

    <!-- A. Hero Strip (data-aware copy) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-hero">
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-label">After the draw</div>
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-title">How your predictions scored</div>
      <div class="skai-ov-hero-sub"><?php echo $__postHeroSub; ?></div>
    </div>

    <!-- B. KPI Signal Row (success gradient on Main Hits when confirmed matches exist) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-kpi-row">
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card<?php echo $totalMainHits > 0 ? ' skai-ov-kpi-card--success' : ''; ?>">
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-label">Main Hits</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value"><?php echo (int)$totalMainHits; ?></div>
        <?php if ($__swHasExtra): ?>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-sub"><?php echo (int)$totalExtraHits; ?> <?php echo htmlspecialchars($__swExtraLabel, ENT_QUOTES); ?> hit<?php echo $totalExtraHits !== 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></div>
        <?php endif; ?>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card">
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-label">Methods w/ Hits</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value"><?php echo (int)$__mwh; ?></div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-sub">of <?php echo (int)$__postActiveMethodCount; ?> active</div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card">
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-label">Overlap Score</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value" data-skai-kpi-overlap> - </div>
      </div>
      <div class="skai-ov-kpi-card" data-skai-kpi-conf-card>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-label">Confidence</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-kpi-value" data-skai-kpi-conf> - </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- C1. Result Recap Card (static PHP-rendered: drawn numbers, hit stats, strongest learning) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-recap-card">
      <div class="skai-ov-recap-header <?php echo $totalMainHits > 0 ? 'skai-ov-recap-header--positive' : 'skai-ov-recap-header--neutral'; ?>">
        <div class="skai-ov-recap-eyebrow">Draw result</div>
        <div class="skai-ov-recap-title"><?php echo $totalMainHits > 0 ? 'What the draw confirmed' : 'No main number matches were recorded'; ?></div>

              <?php if (!empty($__drawMain)): ?>

          </div>
          <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat">
            <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat-label">Strongest method</div>
            <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat-value<?php echo ($__postBestMethod !== null && $__postBestHits > 0) ? '' : ' skai-ov-recap-stat-value--muted'; ?>"><?php echo ($__postBestMethod !== null && $__postBestHits > 0) ? htmlspecialchars((string)($labelShort[$__postBestMethod] ?? $__postBestMethod), ENT_QUOTES) : 'None'; ?></div>
          </div>
          <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat">
            <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat-label">Best Rank<?php echo count((array)$__postBestRanks) > 1 ? 's' : ''; ?></div>
            <div class="skai-ov-recap-stat-value<?php echo $__postRankStr !== '' ? '' : ' skai-ov-recap-stat-value--muted'; ?>"><?php echo $__postRankStr !== '' ? $__postRankStr : 'None'; ?></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Strongest learning takeaway -->
        <div class="skai-ov-recap-takeaway">
          <div class="skai-ov-recap-takeaway-label">Strongest lesson</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-recap-takeaway-text"><?php echo $__postTakeaway; ?></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

            data-mode="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($__mode, ENT_QUOTES); ?>">

              data-extra-count="<?php echo (int)$__swExtraCnt; ?>"
        >
          <div class="card-header" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:flex-start;">
            <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.15rem;">
              <div style="display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:0.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">

            <!-- JS will inject overlaps here -->

                Selected: 0 mains - 0 <?php echo htmlspecialchars($__swExtraLabel, ENT_QUOTES); ?>

            <div data-decision-grid style="margin-top:0.65rem; display:grid; gap:0.65rem;">
              <!-- JS injects mains/extras pick grid here -->
            </div>

                  Tip: use this to jump to a number quickly.

          <div style="padding:0 1rem 0.85rem; border-top:1px dashed #e3e7ef; margin-top:0.15rem; font-size:0.78rem; color:#4b5563; display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem 0.75rem; align-items:center;">
            <span style="font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.04em; font-size:0.75rem; color:#6b7280;">Number Tags:</span>

            <span class="btag btag-hm">FM</span>  <span style="font-size:0.75rem;">Frequency map</span>
          </div>
        </div><!-- end common-card (post-draw) -->
      </div><!-- end skai-ov-evidence-zone (post-draw) -->

      <!-- C4: Carry Learning Forward (post-draw action rail) -->
      <div class="skai-ov-action-card">
        <div class="skai-ov-action-header">
          <div class="skai-ov-action-eyebrow">Next draw</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-action-title">Carry this learning forward</div>
        </div>
        <div class="skai-ov-action-body">
          <ul class="skai-ov-action-list">
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">1</span>
              <span>Review the rank placement in the Performance tab to see where each method placed the drawn numbers.</span>
            </li>
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">2</span>
              <span>Methods that placed drawn numbers at rank 1 - 5 carry more useful signal - weight those more heavily next cycle.</span>
            </li>
            <li class="skai-ov-action-item">
              <span class="skai-ov-action-icon skai-ov-action-icon--green">3</span>
              <span>Save a new strategy run after reviewing - carry rank evidence forward, not just top-rank number lists.</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
          <hr class="skai-ov-action-divider">
          <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#7F8DAA; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Review supporting evidence</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-tab-chips">
            <button type="button" class="skai-ov-tab-chip" data-skai-goto-tab="performance">Performance</button>
            <button type="button" class="skai-ov-tab-chip" data-skai-goto-tab="methods">Methods</button>

    <!-- D. Secondary Evidence Footer (post-draw) -->
    <div class="skai-ov-footer">
      <div class="skai-ov-footer-grid">
        <div class="skai-ov-footer-card">
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-title">Reading Rank Placement</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-text">A match at rank 1 or 2 means a method placed a drawn number at the very top of its list - that is stronger evidence than a match at rank 15. Focus on where your best matches appeared, not just the total count.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="skai-ov-footer-card">
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-title">Agreement and Validation</div>
          <div class="skai-ov-footer-card-text">When multiple methods agree on a number and that number is drawn, it validates the overlap signal. Use this draw to adjust method weights and rank focus for the next cycle - not as a guarantee of future results.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
