                  if (!empty($__dailyView['bonus_digits'])) {
                    $__dailyBonusForDisp = $__dailyView['bonus_digits'];
                  } elseif (!empty($__dailyView['extra_digits'])) {
                    $__dailyBonusForDisp = $__dailyView['extra_digits'];
                  } else {
                    $__dailyBonusForDisp = $__dailyView['top_extras'];
                  }

                  if (!empty($__dailyView['bonus_digits_display'])) {
                    $__dailyBonusDispArr = $__dailyView['bonus_digits_display'];
                  } else {
                    $__dailyBonusDispArr = array_map('mylottoexpertFormatBonusDigit', (array)$__dailyBonusForDisp);
                  }
                ?>
                <div class="mle-daily-summary">
                  <span class="mle-daily-summary__eyebrow">Daily prediction summary</span>
                  <div class="mle-daily-summary__grid">

                    <?php if (!empty($__dailyView['ranked_digits'])): ?>
                    <div class="mle-daily-summary__card">
                      <span class="mle-daily-summary__label">Most influential digits</span>
                      <div class="mle-daily-pill-row">
                        <?php foreach ($__dailyView['ranked_digits'] as $n):
                          $isHit = in_array((int)$n, $drawMain, true);
                          $cls = $isHit ? 'match-pill' : 'no-match';
                        ?>
                          <span class="<?php echo $cls; ?>"><?php echo (int)$n; ?></span>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                      </div>
                      <div class="mle-daily-summary__subtext">These digits had the strongest single-digit support and helped shape the combinations below.</div>
                    </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>

                    <?php if (!empty($__dailyView['primary_combo_digits'])): ?>
                    <div class="mle-daily-summary__card">
                      <span class="mle-daily-summary__label">Top predicted combination</span>
                      <div class="mle-daily-pill-row">
                        <?php foreach ($__dailyView['primary_combo_digits'] as $n):
                          $isHit = in_array((int)$n, $drawMain, true);
                          $cls = $isHit ? 'match-pill' : 'no-match';
                        ?>
                          <span class="<?php echo $cls; ?>"><?php echo (int)$n; ?></span>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                      </div>
                      <div class="mle-daily-summary__subtext">The highest-probability straight combination from this daily run.</div>
                    </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>

                    <?php if (!empty($__dailyCombosForDisp)): ?>
                    <div class="mle-daily-summary__card mle-daily-summary__card--full">
                      <span class="mle-daily-summary__label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__dailyCombosLabel, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                      <div class="mle-daily-combo-row">
                        <?php foreach ($__dailyCombosForDisp as $__comboIndex => $__comboString): ?>
                          <span class="mle-daily-combo-chip">
                            <span class="mle-daily-combo-chip__rank">#<?php echo (int)($__comboIndex + 1); ?></span>
                            <span><?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$__comboString, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                          </span>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                      </div>
                      <div class="mle-daily-summary__subtext">Saved daily combinations from the time this prediction was made.</div>
                    </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>

                    <?php if (!empty($__dailyBonusForDisp) && !$__dailyUseWithBonus): ?>
                    <div class="mle-daily-summary__card mle-daily-summary__card--full">
                      <span class="mle-daily-summary__label">Top bonus digits</span>
                      <div class="mle-daily-pill-row">
                        <?php foreach ($__dailyBonusDispArr as $__bonusIdx => $__bonusStr):
                          $__bonusNum = isset($__dailyBonusForDisp[$__bonusIdx]) ? (int)$__dailyBonusForDisp[$__bonusIdx] : (int)$__bonusStr;
                          $isHit = in_array($__bonusNum, $drawExtra, true);
                          $cls = $isHit ? 'match-pill extra' : 'no-match extra';
                        ?>
                          <span class="<?php echo $cls; ?>"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($__bonusStr, ENT_QUOTES); ?></span>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                      </div>
                      <div class="mle-daily-summary__subtext">Bonus digits saved alongside the daily combinations.</div>
                    </div>
                    <?php endif; ?>

                  </div>
                </div>
              <?php else: ?>
                <div>Your Numbers:
                  <?php foreach ($predMain as $n):
                    $isHit = in_array($n, $drawMain, true);
                    $cls   = $isHit ? 'match-pill' : 'no-match';
                  ?>
                    <span class="<?php echo $cls; ?>">
                      <?php echo $n; ?>
                    </span>
                  <?php endforeach; ?>

  id="settings-panel-<?php echo (int)$s->id; ?>"
  class="settings-panel"
  role="region"
  aria-label="Saved settings for <?php echo htmlspecialchars($moduleLabel, ENT_QUOTES); ?> prediction for <?php echo htmlspecialchars($g['lottery_name'] ?? '', ENT_QUOTES); ?>"

  aria-hidden="true"
>

<?php

  $src = trim((string)$s->source);

  $settingLabels = [];
  if ($src === 'ai_prediction') {
    $settingLabels = [
      'epochs'              => 'Epochs',
      'batch_size'          => 'Batch',
      'dropout_rate'        => 'Dropout',
      'learning_rate'       => 'LR',
      'activation_function' => 'ActFn',
      'hidden_layers'       => 'Layers',
      'recency_decay'       => 'Recency Decay',
    ];
  } elseif ($methodKey === 'skai') {
    $settingLabels = [

      'epochs'              => 'Epochs',
      'batch_size'          => 'Batch',
      'dropout_rate'        => 'Dropout',
      'learning_rate'       => 'Learning rate',
      'activation_function' => 'Activation',
      'hidden_layers'       => 'Hidden layers',
      'recency_decay'       => 'Recency decay',

      'skai_window_size'    => 'SKAI window',
      'skip_window'         => 'Skip window',
      'draws_used'          => 'Draws used',
      'tuned_window'        => 'Tuned window',

      'sampling_temperature'=> 'Sampling temp',
      'diversity_penalty'   => 'Diversity penalty',
      'gap_scale'           => 'Gap scale',

      'skai_run_mode'       => 'Run mode',
      'auto_tune'           => 'Auto-tune',
      'tune_used'           => 'Tune used',
      'best_window'         => 'Best window',

      'skai_top_n_numbers'  => 'Top N numbers',
      'skai_top_n_combos'   => 'Top N combos',
    ];
} elseif ($src === 'mcmc_prediction') {
    $settingLabels = [
      'walks'     => 'Walks',
      'burn_in'   => 'Burn-in',
      'laplace_k' => 'Laplace K',
      'decay'     => 'Decay',
      'chain_len' => 'Chain Len',
    ];
} elseif ($src === 'skip_hit') {
    $settingLabels = [
      'draws_analyzed' => 'Draws',
      'freq_weight'    => 'Freq Wt',
      'skip_weight'    => 'Skip Wt',
      'hist_weight'    => 'Hist Wt',

    ];
}
 elseif ($src === 'heatmap') {

    $settingLabels = [];
}

  $__ts = strtotime((string)($s->date_saved ?? ''));
  $__tsStr = $__ts ? date('c', $__ts) : (string)($s->date_saved ?? '');
  echo '<div style="margin-bottom: .3rem;" class="timestamp-container" data-timestamp="' . htmlspecialchars($__tsStr, ENT_QUOTES) . '"><em class="local-time">'
     . htmlspecialchars($__tsStr, ENT_QUOTES)
     . '</em></div>';

if (!empty($settingLabels)) {
  echo '<div class="settings-grid">';

  $__settingsDisp = mylottoexpertResolveRunDisplayInfo($s, $__methodLabels);
  $decodedSettings = is_array($__settingsDisp['settings']) ? $__settingsDisp['settings'] : [];

  foreach ($settingLabels as $prop => $settingLabel) {
    $val = array_key_exists($prop, $decodedSettings) ? $decodedSettings[$prop] : ($s->$prop ?? null);

    if ($val !== null && $val !== '' && !(($val === 0 || $val === '0') && !array_key_exists($prop, $decodedSettings))) {
      echo '<div class="setting-row">'
         . '<strong>' . htmlspecialchars($settingLabel, ENT_QUOTES) . ':</strong> '
         . htmlspecialchars((string)$val, ENT_QUOTES)
         . '</div>';
    }
  }

  if ($__settingsDisp['label'] !== '' && $__settingsDisp['label'] !== ($__settingsDisp['base_label'] ?? '')) {
    echo '<div class="setting-row">'
       . '<strong>Display label:</strong> '
       . htmlspecialchars((string)$__settingsDisp['label'], ENT_QUOTES)
       . '</div>';
  }

  if ($methodKey === 'skai') {

    $__tsRaw = isset($decodedSettings['training_style']) ? (string)$decodedSettings['training_style']
             : (isset($decodedSettings['profile'])       ? (string)$decodedSettings['profile']
             : (isset($decodedSettings['risk_profile'])  ? (string)$decodedSettings['risk_profile'] : ''));
    $__tsDisplay = $__tsRaw !== '' ? skaiLpFormatTrainingStyleLabel($__tsRaw) : '';

    $__bsAiPct = null;
    foreach (array('skai_blend_ai_pct', 'blend_ai_pct', 'ai_pct') as $__bsk) {
        if (isset($decodedSettings[$__bsk]) && $decodedSettings[$__bsk] !== '') {
            $__bsAiPct = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($decodedSettings[$__bsk]);
            break;
        }
    }
    if ($__bsAiPct === null) {
        foreach (array('skai_blend_skip_pct', 'blend_skip_pct', 'skip_pct') as $__bsk2) {
            if (isset($decodedSettings[$__bsk2]) && $decodedSettings[$__bsk2] !== '') {
                $__bsSkipFb = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($decodedSettings[$__bsk2]);
                if ($__bsSkipFb !== null) {
                    $__bsAiPct = 100.0 - $__bsSkipFb;
                }
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    $__bsRaw = ($__bsAiPct !== null) ? mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($__bsAiPct) . '%' : '';

    if ($__tsDisplay !== '' || $__bsRaw !== '') {
        if ($__tsDisplay !== '') {
            echo '<div class="setting-row">'
               . '<strong>Training Style:</strong> '
               . htmlspecialchars($__tsDisplay, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')
               . '</div>';
        }
        if ($__bsRaw !== '') {
            echo '<div class="setting-row">'
               . '<strong>Blend Strategy:</strong> '
               . htmlspecialchars($__bsRaw, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')
               . '</div>';
        }
    }
  }

  if ($src === 'skip_hit') {
    $pureMode = isset($decodedSettings['pure_mode']) ? (int)$decodedSettings['pure_mode'] : (int)($s->pure_mode ?? 0);
    echo '<div class="setting-row">'
       . '<strong>Pure Mode:</strong> '
       . ($pureMode === 1 ? 'Yes' : 'No')
       . '</div>';
  }

  echo '</div>';
} else {
  echo '<em>No advanced settings were saved for this run.</em>';
}

?>

</div>

<?php

$q = $db->getQuery(true)
    ->select([
        's.*',
        'l.name AS lottery_name',
        'l.game_id AS lottery_game_id',
        'l.lottery_urls AS lottery_page_url',
        'st.name AS state_name'
    ])
    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_settings', 's'))
    ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__lotteries', 'l') . ' ON s.lottery_id = l.lottery_id')
    ->join('LEFT', $db->quoteName('#__states', 'st') . ' ON l.state_id = st.state_id')
    ->where('s.user_id = ' . $workspaceUserId)
    ->order('s.created_at DESC');

$db->setQuery($q);
$savedSettings = $db->loadAssocList() ?: [];

?>
<?php if (!empty($savedSettings)): ?>
  <div class="card" style="margin-top:2rem;">
    <div class="card-header">
      <h3 class="title">Saved configurations</h3>
      <p style="margin:0; color:var(--skai-text-secondary); font-size:0.9rem;">Reuse your saved settings for future predictions</p>
    </div>
    <ul style="list-style:none; margin:0; padding:1rem;">
      <?php foreach ($savedSettings as $set):

        $params = json_decode($set['params'], true) ?: [];

        $__trainingStyle = '';
        foreach (['training_style', 'profile', 'risk_profile'] as $__tsk) {
            if (!empty($params[$__tsk])) { $__trainingStyle = (string)$params[$__tsk]; break; }
        }

        $__strategy = '';
        foreach (['strategy', 'blend'] as $__sk) {
            if (!empty($params[$__sk])) { $__strategy = (string)$params[$__sk]; break; }
        }

        $__mode = '';
        foreach (['skai_run_mode', 'mode', 'run_mode'] as $__mk) {
            if (!empty($params[$__mk])) { $__mode = ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', (string)$params[$__mk])); break; }
        }

        $__blendAi = null;
        foreach (array('skai_blend_ai_pct', 'blend_ai_pct', 'ai_pct') as $__bak) {
            if (isset($params[$__bak]) && $params[$__bak] !== '') {
                $__blendAi = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($params[$__bak]);
                break;
            }
        }
        if ($__blendAi === null) {
            foreach (array('skai_blend_skip_pct', 'blend_skip_pct', 'skip_pct') as $__bsk) {
                if (isset($params[$__bsk]) && $params[$__bsk] !== '') {
                    $__blendSkipFb = mylottoexpertClampBlendPercent($params[$__bsk]);
                    if ($__blendSkipFb !== null) {
                        $__blendAi = 100.0 - $__blendSkipFb;
                    }
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        $__blendDisplay = ($__blendAi !== null) ? mylottoexpertFormatPercentForLabel($__blendAi) . '%' : '';
        $__pageSavedFrom = !empty($params['page_saved_from']) ? (string)$params['page_saved_from'] : '';
      ?>
        <li style="margin-bottom:1.75rem; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0; padding-bottom:1.25rem;">
          <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:baseline;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;">
            <strong style="font-size:1rem;"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($set['setting_name'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
            <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#64748b;">
              <?php
                $sourceLabel = ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $set['source']));
                $__setDisplayMeta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta(
                    (string)($set['state_name'] ?? ''),
                    '',
                    (string)($set['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
                    ''
                );
                $state       = htmlspecialchars((string)$__setDisplayMeta['state'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                $lotteryName = htmlspecialchars((string)$__setDisplayMeta['lottery'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                $__locParts  = array_filter([$state, $lotteryName], static function($v) { return $v !== ''; });
                echo htmlspecialchars($sourceLabel, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                if (!empty($__locParts)) { echo ' - ' . implode(' - ', $__locParts); }
                if ($__pageSavedFrom !== '') { echo ' - saved from: ' . htmlspecialchars($__pageSavedFrom, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); }
              ?>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <em><?php echo date('M j, Y g:ia', strtotime($set['created_at'])); ?></em>
          </div>

          <!-- -- Identity fields: always shown first for quick recognition -- -->

            <?php if ($__trainingStyle !== ''): ?>
              <span style="background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;color:#1d4ed8;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;">

            <?php endif; ?>
          </div>

          <?php if ($params): ?>
            <div class="settings-params" style="font-size:0.82rem; color:#475569; margin-top:0.3rem;">
              <?php

                $__skipParamsDisplay = ['training_style','profile','risk_profile','strategy','blend',
                                        'skai_run_mode','mode','run_mode',
                                        'skai_blend_skip_pct','skai_blend_ai_pct','blend_skip_pct',

                  'chain_len'           => 'Chain Len',
                ];
                $parts = [];
                foreach ($params as $key => $val) {
                  if (in_array($key, $__skipParamsDisplay, true)) { continue; }
                  $lbl = $labels[$key] ?? ucwords(str_replace('_', ' ', $key));

            $drawingInfo  = getLatestDrawing($lotto['game_id'], $db);

            $url = htmlspecialchars(trim($lotto['lottery_urls']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

            $lastDraw      = 'N/A';
            $lastDrawHeld  = 'N/A';

                    ? date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['draw_date']))
                    : 'N/A';

                    isset($drawParts['main']) && is_array($drawParts['main']) ? $drawParts['main'] : array(),

                    ? implode(', ', array_map('strval', $drawnAll))
                    : 'N/A';

                $nextDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($nextDrawInfo);
            } elseif (!empty($drawingInfo['next_draw_date'])) {
                $nextDraw = date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['next_draw_date']));

            );

                $typeBadge = 'Pick 4';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'powerball') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Powerball';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'mega') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Mega Millions';
            }

<?php
$__mleWheelFavPagePath    = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance()->getPath();
$__mleWheelFavPostEndpoint = htmlspecialchars($__mleWheelFavPagePath, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
$__mleWheelFavCsrfToken   = \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::getFormToken();
$__mleWheelFavCsrfField   = '<input type="hidden" name="' . htmlspecialchars($__mleWheelFavCsrfToken, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '" value="1">';
?>
<div class="mle-wheel-fav-section" id="favorite-wheeling-systems-legacy-hidden" style="display:none;" aria-hidden="true">
  <h2>My Favorite Wheeling Systems</h2>
  <p class="mle-wheel-fav-sub">Save the wheeling systems you use most often, then open them directly in the Wheel Builder when you are ready to create combinations.</p>

  <div class="mle-section-jump" aria-label="My Favorite Wheeling Systems quick navigation">
    <span class="mle-section-jump__label">Jump to</span>
    <div class="mle-section-jump__links">
      <a href="#info-card" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Overview</a>
      <a href="#mle-historical-validation-wrap" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Draw Results</a>
      <a href="#my-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">My Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#numbers-to-play" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Numbers to Play</a>
      <a href="#favorite-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Favorite Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#favorite-wheeling-systems" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Wheeling Systems</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <?php if (!empty($wheelFavoriteData['available'])): ?>
    <div class="mle-wheel-fav-grid">
      <?php foreach ($wheelFavoriteData['available'] as $__wfItem): ?>
        <?php echo mylottoexpertRenderWheelFavoriteCard($__wfItem, $__mleWheelFavCsrfField, $__mleWheelFavPagePath); ?>
      <?php endforeach; ?>
    </div>
  <?php else: ?>
    <div class="mle-wheel-fav-empty">
      <div>You have not saved any favorite wheeling systems yet.</div>
      <a href="/all-wheeling-systems">Browse Wheeling Systems</a>
    </div>
  <?php endif; ?>

  <?php if (!empty($wheelFavoriteData['missing'])): ?>
    <div class="mle-wheel-fav-missing">
      <strong>Unavailable saved systems:</strong> These systems no longer appear in the catalog.
      <?php foreach ($wheelFavoriteData['missing'] as $__wfMissing): ?>
        <div class="mle-wheel-fav-missing-item">
          <span>System <?php echo htmlspecialchars($__wfMissing, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?> - no longer available</span>
          <form method="post" action="<?php echo $__mleWheelFavPostEndpoint; ?>" style="display:inline">
            <input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="remove_wheel_favorite">
            <input type="hidden" name="system_id" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($__wfMissing, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
            <?php echo $__mleWheelFavCsrfField; ?>
            <button type="submit" class="mle-wheel-fav-btn mle-wheel-fav-btn--remove">Remove</button>
          </form>
        </div>
      <?php endforeach; ?>
    </div>
  <?php elseif (!empty($wheelFavoriteData['ids']) && !$wheelFavoriteData['catalog_loaded']): ?>
    <div class="mle-wheel-fav-missing">
      <strong>Catalog temporarily unavailable.</strong> Your saved systems are still stored but cannot be verified right now. Please try again later.
    </div>
  <?php endif; ?>

  <div class="mle-wheel-fav-disclaimer">Wheeling systems organize number combinations. They do not predict or guarantee results.</div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- [[MLE_V98_JS_EXTERNALIZED_BLOCK_09]] moved to /media/lottoexpert/mylottoexpert_workspace/assets/js/mylottoexpert-core.js -->
<?php endif;  ?>

<?php

?>
<!-- ==================================================
     Favorite Lotteries Section
     ================================================== -->
<div id="favorite-lotteries" class="favorite-lotteries-grid">

<details open class="card favorites-wrapper">
  <summary class="card-header favorite-lotteries-header">
    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; width:100%; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
        <span class="title">Your favorite lotteries</span>
        <span class="section-badge"><?php echo count((array)$favoriteLotteries); ?></span>
      </div>
      <a href="/select-favorite-lotteries" class="btn-primary">+ Edit</a>
    </div>
  </summary>

  <p class="mle-section-explainer" style="margin:0.75rem 1rem 0;">Track your selected lotteries in one place. Use this section to confirm each lottery context and quickly open official results.</p>

  <div class="mle-section-jump" aria-label="Favorite Lotteries quick navigation" style="margin:0.75rem 1rem 0;">
    <span class="mle-section-jump__label">Jump to</span>
    <div class="mle-section-jump__links">
      <a href="#info-card" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Overview</a>
      <a href="#mle-historical-validation-wrap" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Draw Results</a>
      <a href="#my-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">My Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#numbers-to-play" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Numbers to Play</a>
      <a href="#favorite-lotteries" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Favorite Lotteries</a>
      <a href="#favorite-wheeling-systems" onclick="return mleStrategicJump(this);">Wheeling Systems</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="favorites-list">

    <?php if (!empty($favoriteLotteries)): ?>
      <div class="favorites-grid">
        <?php foreach ($favoriteLotteries as $lotto): ?>
          <?php

            $drawingInfo  = getLatestDrawing($lotto['game_id'], $db);
            $nextDrawInfo = getNextScheduledDrawing($lotto['game_id'], $db);

            $url = htmlspecialchars(trim($lotto['lottery_urls']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

            $lastDraw      = 'N/A';
            $lastDrawHeld  = 'N/A';
            $nextDraw      = 'N/A';
            $nextDrawHeld  = 'N/A';
            $drawnStr      = 'N/A';

            if (!empty($drawingInfo)) {
                $lastDraw = !empty($drawingInfo['draw_date'])
                    ? date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['draw_date']))
                    : 'N/A';
                $lastDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($drawingInfo);

                $drawParts = mylottoexpertExtractDrawNumbersFromRow($lotto['game_id'], $drawingInfo);
                $drawnAll  = array_merge(
                    isset($drawParts['main']) && is_array($drawParts['main']) ? $drawParts['main'] : array(),
                    isset($drawParts['extra']) && is_array($drawParts['extra']) ? $drawParts['extra'] : array()
                );

                $drawnStr = !empty($drawnAll)
                    ? implode(', ', array_map('strval', $drawnAll))
                    : 'N/A';
            }

            if (!empty($nextDrawInfo['draw_date'])) {
                $nextDraw = date('M j, Y', strtotime($nextDrawInfo['draw_date']));
                $nextDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($nextDrawInfo);
            } elseif (!empty($drawingInfo['next_draw_date'])) {
                $nextDraw = date('M j, Y', strtotime($drawingInfo['next_draw_date']));
                $nextDrawHeld = mylottoexpertFormatDrawHeldLabel($drawingInfo);
            }

            $typeBadge = '';
            $nameLower = mb_strtolower($lotto['lottery_name'], 'UTF-8');
            $lottoDisplayMeta = mylottoexpertResolveDisplayLocationMeta(
                (string)($lotto['state_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['country_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? '')
            );
            $lottoDisplayTitle = mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['state'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['country'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['lottery'],
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? '')
            );
            $lottoDisplayLocation = mylottoexpertFormatLotteryLocationLine(
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['state'],
                (string)$lottoDisplayMeta['country'],
                '',
                (string)($lotto['game_id'] ?? ''),
                ', '
            );
            if (strpos($nameLower, 'pick 3') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Pick 3';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'pick 4') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Pick 4';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'powerball') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Powerball';
            } elseif (strpos($nameLower, 'mega') !== false) {
                $typeBadge = 'Mega Millions';
            }
          ?>

<div class="card favorite-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <?php
      $favLogo = ['path'=>'','exists'=>false,'alt'=>''];
      if (!empty($lotto['lottery_name'])) {
          $favLogo = buildLotteryLogoPath((string)$lotto['state_name'], (string)$lotto['lottery_name']);
      }
    ?>

    <div class="lotto-title-wrap">
      <?php if (!empty($favLogo['path'])): ?>
        <?php
          $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', (string)$lotto['lottery_name']);
          $ini   = '';
          foreach ($parts as $p) { if ($p !== '') { $ini .= mb_strtoupper(mb_substr($p,0,1)); if (mb_strlen($ini) >= 2) break; } }
          $iniFallback = htmlspecialchars($ini ?: 'LE', ENT_QUOTES);
        ?>
        <img class="lotto-logo" src="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['path'], ENT_QUOTES); ?>"
              alt="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['alt'], ENT_QUOTES); ?>" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44"
              onerror="this.style.display='none';var s=this.nextElementSibling;if(s){s.style.display='';}">
        <span class="lotto-logo fallback" aria-label="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($favLogo['alt'].' (placeholder)', ENT_QUOTES); ?>" style="display:none">
          <?php echo $iniFallback; ?>
        </span>
      <?php endif; ?>

      <span class="title">
        <?php if ($lottoDisplayTitle !== ''): ?>
          <?php echo htmlspecialchars((string)$lottoDisplayTitle, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?><br>
        <?php endif; ?>
        Last completed draw: <?php echo $lastDraw; ?>
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

            <div class="lottery-details">
              Location: <?php echo htmlspecialchars($lottoDisplayLocation !== '' ? $lottoDisplayLocation : 'Not specified', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>
            </div>

            <div class="draw-info">
              Last Draw: <strong><?php echo $lastDraw; ?></strong><br>
              Held: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($lastDrawHeld, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><br>
              Next Draw: <strong><?php echo $nextDraw; ?></strong><br>
              Draw Time: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($nextDrawHeld, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong><br>
              Numbers: <strong><?php echo htmlspecialchars($drawnStr, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong>
            </div>

             <div style="margin-top:.75rem; display:flex; justify-content:flex-end;">
               <?php if ($url !== ''): ?>
                 <a href="<?php echo $url; ?>" target="_blank" class="btn-primary">View Results</a>
               <?php endif; ?>
             </div>

          </div>

        <?php endforeach; ?>
      </div>
    <?php else: ?>
      <p class="text-muted">No favorite lotteries found.</p>
    <?php endif; ?>
  </div>
</details>
</div>

          <form method="post" action="<?php echo $__mleWheelFavPostEndpoint; ?>" style="display:inline">
            <input type="hidden" name="mle_action" value="remove_wheel_favorite">
            <input type="hidden" name="system_id" value="<?php echo htmlspecialchars($__wfMissing, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?>">
            <?php echo $__mleWheelFavCsrfField; ?>
            <button type="submit" class="mle-wheel-fav-btn mle-wheel-fav-btn--remove">Remove</button>

  <?php elseif (!empty($wheelFavoriteData['ids']) && !$wheelFavoriteData['catalog_loaded']): ?>

<!-- [[MLE_V33_REMOVED_V78_CLIENT_PHASE_OVERRIDE]]
V78 was removed because it changed the run panel on the client side whenever a card had no pending runs and no result mode.
That bypassed the server-side sequential phase state and could make a lottery look ready for a 9-batch even when the History Window or Settings Precision phase was not actually ready.
The server-rendered phase state is now the source of truth.
-->

<!-- [[MLE_V98_JS_EXTERNALIZED_BLOCK_43]] moved to /media/lottoexpert/mylottoexpert_workspace/assets/js/mylottoexpert-core.js -->
<!-- /[[MLE_V104_PREVIOUS_9_RUN_REPORT_SURFACE]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V105_ELITE_BALL_VISUAL_CONSISTENCY_FIX]] -->
<!-- /[[MLE_V105_ELITE_BALL_VISUAL_CONSISTENCY_FIX]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V106_ELITE_BALL_TEXT_CONTRAST_FIX]] -->
<!-- /[[MLE_V106_ELITE_BALL_TEXT_CONTRAST_FIX]] -->

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';
  // [[MLE_V138_EXACT_DRAW_ASSET_COUNTER_FIX]]
  // Defensive display-truth reconciliation for the Exact-Draw Scored Prediction Evidence panel. Companion asset fix required in mylottoexpert-visual-scoring.js.
  // The server-rendered run rows are the source of truth. If the external visual-scoring
  // script leaves the header tiles at zero while rows are visible, repair only the displayed
  // counters and status copy. This does not change scoring math, saved rows, database rows,
  // prediction generation, ball colors, or hit calculation.
  function mleV137Text(el){ return el && el.textContent ? String(el.textContent) : ''; }
  function mleV137Norm(s){ return String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); }
  function mleV137FindExactPanel(){
    var nodes = document.querySelectorAll('section, div, article');
    var best = null;
    var bestScore = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
      var t = mleV137Text(nodes[i]);
      if (t.indexOf('Exact-Draw Scored Prediction Evidence') === -1) { continue; }
      var score = 1;
      if (t.indexOf('Latest Draw Comparison') !== -1) { score += 2; }
      if (t.indexOf('Batch Predictions Shown') !== -1) { score += 3; }
      if (t.indexOf('Best Outcome') !== -1) { score += 3; }
      if (t.indexOf('Run 1') !== -1 || t.indexOf('Total hits') !== -1) { score += 4; }
      if (!best || score > bestScore || mleV137Text(nodes[i]).length < mleV137Text(best).length) {
        best = nodes[i];
        bestScore = score;
      }
    }
    return best;
  }
  function mleV137CollectRunStats(panel){
    var stats = {shown:0, best:0, pending:0};
    if (!panel) { return stats; }
    var candidates = [];
    var all = panel.querySelectorAll('div, article, li');
    for (var i = 0; i < all.length; i++) {
      var tx = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(all[i]));
      if (!/^Run\s+\d+\b/i.test(tx)) { continue; }
      if (tx.indexOf('Predicted Main and Extra') === -1 && tx.indexOf('Total hits') === -1 && tx.indexOf('Actual Main and Extra') === -1) { continue; }
      var nested = all[i].querySelectorAll('div, article, li');
      var hasNestedRun = false;
      for (var n = 0; n < nested.length; n++) {
        if (nested[n] !== all[i] && /^Run\s+\d+\b/i.test(mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(nested[n])))) { hasNestedRun = true; break; }
      }
      if (!hasNestedRun) { candidates.push(all[i]); }
    }
    var seen = {};
    for (var c = 0; c < candidates.length; c++) {
      var text = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(candidates[c]));
      var m = text.match(/^Run\s+(\d+)\b/i);
      var key = m ? m[1] : String(c);
      if (seen[key]) { continue; }
      seen[key] = true;
      stats.shown++;
      var hit = text.match(/(\d+)\s+Total hits/i);
      if (!hit) { hit = text.match(/Total hits\s*(\d+)/i); }
      if (hit) {
        var val = parseInt(hit[1], 10);
        if (!isNaN(val) && val > stats.best) { stats.best = val; }
      }
      if (text.indexOf('Waiting for draw') !== -1 || text.indexOf('still pending') !== -1 || text.indexOf('Official draw result not loaded') !== -1) {
        stats.pending++;
      }
    }
    if (stats.shown === 0) {
      var full = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(panel));
      var runMatches = full.match(/\bRun\s+\d+\b/gi);
      if (runMatches) {
        var map = {};
        for (var r = 0; r < runMatches.length; r++) { map[runMatches[r].toLowerCase()] = true; }
        for (var k in map) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map, k)) { stats.shown++; } }
      }
      var hitMatches = full.match(/\b\d+\s+Total hits\b/gi);
      if (hitMatches) {
        for (var h = 0; h < hitMatches.length; h++) {
          var hv = parseInt(hitMatches[h], 10);
          if (!isNaN(hv) && hv > stats.best) { stats.best = hv; }
        }
      }
    }
    return stats;
  }
  function mleV137SetMetric(panel, label, value){
    var nodes = panel.querySelectorAll('div, span, strong, b, p');
    var wanted = String(label).toLowerCase();
    for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
      var nodeText = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(nodes[i])).toLowerCase();
      if (nodeText.indexOf(wanted) === -1) { continue; }
      var box = nodes[i];
      for (var up = 0; up < 4 && box && box !== panel; up++) {
        var boxText = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(box)).toLowerCase();
        if (boxText.indexOf(wanted) !== -1 && boxText.length < 120) { break; }
        box = box.parentNode;
      }
      if (!box || box === panel) { box = nodes[i].parentNode || nodes[i]; }
      var nums = box.querySelectorAll('strong, b, span, div');
      for (var j = 0; j < nums.length; j++) {
        var nt = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(nums[j]));
        if (/^\d+$/.test(nt) && mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(nums[j])).toLowerCase() !== wanted) {
          nums[j].textContent = String(value);
          return true;
        }
      }
      var children = box.childNodes;
      for (var c = 0; c < children.length; c++) {
        if (children[c].nodeType === 3 && /^\s*\d+\s*$/.test(children[c].nodeValue || '')) {
          children[c].nodeValue = String(value);
          return true;
        }
      }
    }
    return false;
  }
  function mleV137RepairMessage(panel, stats){
    if (!panel || stats.shown <= 0) { return; }
    var nodes = panel.querySelectorAll('p, div');
    for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
      var t = mleV137Norm(mleV137Text(nodes[i]));
      if (t.indexOf('No scored previous 9-run batch found yet') !== -1 || t.indexOf('Batch exists but is still pending') !== -1) {
        if (t.length < 220) {
          nodes[i].textContent = 'Scored 9-run batch evidence is visible for this draw. Review the run rows below for the exact numbers, actual result, and hit counts.';
          return;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  function mleV137RepairExactDrawEvidence(){
    var panel = mleV137FindExactPanel();
    if (!panel) { return; }
    var stats = mleV137CollectRunStats(panel);
    if (stats.shown <= 0) { return; }
    mleV137SetMetric(panel, 'Batch Predictions Shown', stats.shown);
    mleV137SetMetric(panel, 'Best Outcome', stats.best);
    mleV137SetMetric(panel, 'Pending Now', stats.pending);
    mleV137RepairMessage(panel, stats);
  }
  // [[MLE_PHASE2E_RENDER_BUDGET_2026_05_23]]
  // This exact-draw evidence repair is useful, but on the full legacy page it was
  // scanning the document several times during first load and through a document-wide
  // MutationObserver. Keep the legacy repair available, but run it only when the user
  // opens evidence/history/visual detail areas, and at most once after idle.
  function mleV137Schedule(reason){
    if (window.__mleV137RepairScheduled) { return; }
    window.__mleV137RepairScheduled = true;
    var run = function(){
      window.__mleV137RepairScheduled = false;
      try { mleV137RepairExactDrawEvidence(); } catch(e) {}
    };
    if ('requestIdleCallback' in window) { window.requestIdleCallback(run, {timeout: 1800}); }
    else { window.setTimeout(run, 500); }
  }
  window.mleV137RepairExactDrawEvidence = mleV137RepairExactDrawEvidence;
  window.mleV137ScheduleExactDrawEvidenceRepair = mleV137Schedule;
  document.addEventListener('click', function(evt){
    var t = evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('button,a,summary,[role="button"]') : null;
    if (!t) { return; }
    var label = String(t.textContent || t.getAttribute('aria-label') || t.getAttribute('title') || '').replace(/\s+/g,' ');
    var attrs = String((t.getAttribute('data-target-section') || '') + ' ' + (t.getAttribute('data-target-panel') || '') + ' ' + (t.getAttribute('href') || ''));
    if (/Full Evidence|Scored History|Visual Run Comparison|Past Predictions|Evidence|Exact Draw/i.test(label + ' ' + attrs)) {
      mleV137Schedule('user-opened-evidence');
    }
  }, true);
})();
</script>

     V108 gave v100-ball the base geometry and glossy pseudo-element but did not
     add role-specific color overrides. V107 (earlier) is therefore the last
     applied color rule for v100-ball variants and uses:
       v100-ball--extra        = soft red  (WRONG: actual extra should be bright red)
       v100-ball--hit          = flat green (should use V108 premium gradient)
       v100-ball--extra--hit   = dark red flat (should use V108 bright red gradient)
     This block adds the missing overrides so all v100 ball variants match V108 system.

<!-- Purpose: restore the Precision Focus / window narrowing section that was hidden by the user-first view-mode CSS. Ball styles and all other features are untouched. ES5-safe. ASCII-only. -->
<!-- [[MLE_V98_JS_EXTERNALIZED_BLOCK_52]] moved to /media/lottoexpert/mylottoexpert_workspace/assets/js/mylottoexpert-core.js -->

<!-- [[MLE_V128_REGULAR_SKAI_ACTION_ONLY]] -->
<!-- Purpose: Wire mle-v38-primary-action and mle-regular-skai-batch-action-btn click handlers.
     history_window_check / prediction_9_batch -> find sibling mle-v38-batch-action-form and submit it.
     regular_skai_batch / regular_skai -> open data-skai-regular-url in a new tab.
     ES5-safe. ASCII-only. Sourcerer compatible. -->
<script>
(function () {
    'use strict';
    function mleV128FindForm(btn) {
        var p = btn && btn.parentNode;
        var card;
        var holder;
        var lid;
        var nodes;
        var row;
        if (!p) { return null; }
        nodes = p.querySelectorAll('form.mle-v38-batch-action-form');
        if (nodes && nodes.length > 0) { return nodes[0]; }
        card = btn && btn.closest ? btn.closest('.mle-advisory-card') : null;
        if (!card) { return null; }
        nodes = card.querySelectorAll('form.mle-regular-batch-action-form, form[data-mle-v38-batch-action-form="regular"]');
        if (nodes && nodes.length > 0) { return nodes[0]; }
        row = card.querySelector('input[name="mle_action"][value="create_skai_batch"]');
        if (row && row.form && row.form.querySelector('input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular_9_batch"], input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular"], input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular_skai_batch"]')) {
            return row.form;
        }
        lid = String((card && card.getAttribute('data-lottery-id')) || (btn && btn.getAttribute('data-lottery-id')) || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
        if (!lid) {
            holder = btn && btn.closest ? btn.closest('.mle-lottery-outer') : null;
            lid = String((holder && holder.getAttribute('data-outer-lottery-id')) || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
        }
        if (lid) {
            holder = document.querySelector('.mle-advisory-card[data-lottery-id="' + lid + '"], [data-mle-lottery-card][data-lottery-id="' + lid + '"]');
            if (holder) {
                nodes = holder.querySelectorAll('form.mle-regular-batch-action-form, form[data-mle-v38-batch-action-form="regular"]');
                if (nodes && nodes.length > 0) { return nodes[0]; }
                row = holder.querySelector('input[name="mle_action"][value="create_skai_batch"]');
                if (row && row.form && row.form.querySelector('input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular_9_batch"], input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular"], input[name="mle_batch_plan"][value="regular_skai_batch"]')) {
                    return row.form;
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
    function mleV128WireBtn(btn) {
        var at = btn.getAttribute('data-action-target') || '';
        if (at === 'history_window_check' || at === 'prediction_9_batch') {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                var f = mleV128FindForm(btn);
                if (f) { f.submit(); }
            }, false);
        } else if (at === 'regular_skai_batch' || at === 'regular_skai') {
            btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                var f = mleV128FindForm(btn);
                if (f) {
                    try { f.setAttribute('data-mle-no-loading', '1'); } catch (e1) {}
                    if (typeof f.requestSubmit === 'function') { f.requestSubmit(); }
                    else { f.submit(); }
                    return;
                }
                if (window.alert) { window.alert('The 9-run batch form is missing. Please refresh and try again.'); }
            }, false);
        }
    }
    function mleV128Wire() {
        var btns, i;
        btns = document.querySelectorAll(
            '.mle-v38-primary-action[data-action-target],.mle-regular-skai-batch-action-btn[data-action-target]'
        );
        for (i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { mleV128WireBtn(btns[i]); }
    }
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', mleV128Wire, false);
    } else {
        mleV128Wire();
    }
}());
</script>

<!-- [[MLE_V98_JS_EXTERNALIZED_BLOCK_56]] moved to /media/lottoexpert/mylottoexpert_workspace/assets/js/mylottoexpert-core.js -->

<!-- [[MLE_V139_FINAL_VISIBLE_MATCH_RECONCILER]] -->
<!-- [[MLE_V98_JS_EXTERNALIZED_BLOCK_57]] moved to /media/lottoexpert/mylottoexpert_workspace/assets/js/mylottoexpert-core.js -->
<!-- /[[MLE_V139_FINAL_VISIBLE_MATCH_RECONCILER]] -->

<!-- [[MLE_V37_CONSOLIDATED_UI_INTERACTION_CORE]]
     Consolidates the former late V5/V7/V8/V9/V28/V30/V31 display and routing patches
     into one source-owned UI layer. This block does not alter scoring, saving,
     deletion, prediction math, MCMC handoff, database schema, or range/compliance guards.
-->
