<!-- [[MLE_ADMIN_CONTROL_CENTER_INTEGRATED_V5_2026_05_26]] Integrated Super User-only SKAI maintenance stop and duplicate-batch prediction preview. -->
<?php

endif;

defined('_JEXEC') or die;

if (!function_exists('skaiMaintEsc')) {
    function skaiMaintEsc($value) { return htmlspecialchars((string)$value, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8'); }
}
if (!function_exists('skaiMaintLockPath')) {
    function skaiMaintLockPath() { return JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR . '/logs/skai_maintenance_lock.json'; }
}
if (!function_exists('skaiMaintDefaultState')) {
    function skaiMaintDefaultState() {
        return array(
            'enabled' => 0,
            'message' => 'SKAI is temporarily paused while we complete a prediction-saving maintenance update. Your saved MyLottoExpert history remains available. Please check back shortly.',
            'admin_bypass' => 1,
            'updated_at' => '',
            'updated_by' => 0
        );
    }
}
if (!function_exists('skaiMaintReadState')) {
    function skaiMaintReadState() {
        $state = skaiMaintDefaultState();
        $path = skaiMaintLockPath();
        if (is_file($path)) {
            $raw = @file_get_contents($path);
            $decoded = json_decode((string)$raw, true);
            if (is_array($decoded)) { $state = array_merge($state, $decoded); }
        }
        $state['enabled'] = !empty($state['enabled']) ? 1 : 0;
        $state['admin_bypass'] = !empty($state['admin_bypass']) ? 1 : 0;
        $state['message'] = trim((string)($state['message'] ?? '')) !== '' ? trim((string)$state['message']) : skaiMaintDefaultState()['message'];
        return $state;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('skaiMaintWriteState')) {
    function skaiMaintWriteState(array $state) {
        $path = skaiMaintLockPath();
        $dir = dirname($path);
        if (!is_dir($dir)) { @mkdir($dir, 0755, true); }
        $payload = json_encode($state, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);
        return @file_put_contents($path, $payload, LOCK_EX) !== false;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('skaiMaintRenderPanel')) {
    function skaiMaintRenderPanel($message = '') {
        $user = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
        if ($user->guest || !$user->authorise('core.admin')) { return; }
        $state = skaiMaintReadState();
        $tokenHtml = \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
        $enabled = !empty($state['enabled']);
        echo '<style>.skai-maint-admin-note{margin:.65rem 0;padding:.75rem .85rem;border-radius:12px;background:#fff7ed;border:1px solid #fed7aa;color:#7c2d12;line-height:1.45}</style>';
        echo '<section class="mle-dbi-control-shell" id="skai-maintenance-lock-admin" aria-labelledby="skai-maint-title">';
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-control-head"><span style="font-size:.75rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">Admin Only</span><h2 id="skai-maint-title">SKAI Global Maintenance Stop</h2><p style="margin:.35rem 0 0;color:#ffedd5;">Pause all normal member SKAI run/save actions while you investigate data integrity or production issues.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-control-body">';
        if ($message !== '') { echo '<div class="mle-dbi-message" role="status">' . skaiMaintEsc($message) . '</div>'; }
        echo '<p>Status: <span class="mle-dbi-control-status ' . ($enabled ? 'is-on' : 'is-off') . '">' . ($enabled ? 'Maintenance ON' : 'Maintenance OFF') . '</span></p>';
        echo '<form method="post">';
        echo $tokenHtml;
        echo '<input type="hidden" name="skai_maintenance_admin_post" value="1">';
        echo '<label for="skai-maint-message"><strong>User-facing maintenance message</strong></label>';
        echo '<textarea id="skai-maint-message" name="skai_maintenance_message">' . skaiMaintEsc($state['message']) . '</textarea>';
        echo '<label style="display:block;margin:.45rem 0;"><input type="checkbox" name="skai_maintenance_admin_bypass" value="1" ' . (!empty($state['admin_bypass']) ? 'checked="checked"' : '') . '> Allow Super Users to bypass the lock for testing</label>';
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-actions"><button type="submit" name="skai_maintenance_action" value="enable" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--danger">Turn SKAI Maintenance ON</button><button type="submit" name="skai_maintenance_action" value="disable" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--primary">Turn SKAI Maintenance OFF</button></div>';
        echo '</form>';
        echo '<div class="skai-maint-admin-note"><strong>Important:</strong> This writes <code>' . skaiMaintEsc(skaiMaintLockPath()) . '</code>. The SKAI page must also include the maintenance-lock guard file/hotfix so normal users are blocked when this is ON.</div>';
        echo '</div></section>';
    }
}

$__skaiMaintAdminMessage = '';
try {
    $__skaiMaintApp = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
    $__skaiMaintUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if (!$__skaiMaintUser->guest && $__skaiMaintUser->authorise('core.admin') && strtoupper((string)$__skaiMaintApp->input->getMethod()) === 'POST' && (int)$__skaiMaintApp->input->post->getInt('skai_maintenance_admin_post', 0) === 1) {
        if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
            $__skaiMaintAdminMessage = 'Security token expired. Refresh and try again.';
        } else {
            $__state = skaiMaintReadState();
            $__action = strtolower(trim((string)$__skaiMaintApp->input->post->getCmd('skai_maintenance_action', '')));
            $__msg = trim((string)$__skaiMaintApp->input->post->get('skai_maintenance_message', '', 'RAW'));
            $__msg = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x08\x0B\x0C\x0E-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $__msg);
            if ($__msg === '') { $__msg = skaiMaintDefaultState()['message']; }
            $__state['message'] = mb_substr($__msg, 0, 500, 'UTF-8');
            $__state['admin_bypass'] = ((int)$__skaiMaintApp->input->post->getInt('skai_maintenance_admin_bypass', 0) === 1) ? 1 : 0;
            if ($__action === 'enable') { $__state['enabled'] = 1; }
            if ($__action === 'disable') { $__state['enabled'] = 0; }
            $__state['updated_at'] = gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
            $__state['updated_by'] = (int)$__skaiMaintUser->id;
            $__skaiMaintAdminMessage = skaiMaintWriteState($__state) ? ('SKAI maintenance is now ' . (!empty($__state['enabled']) ? 'ON.' : 'OFF.')) : 'Could not write the maintenance lock file. Check administrator/logs permissions.';
        }
    }
} catch (\Throwable $__skaiMaintEx) {
    error_log('[SKAI MAINT ADMIN] ' . $__skaiMaintEx->getMessage());
    $__skaiMaintAdminMessage = 'Maintenance control failed. Check Joomla logs.';
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiEsc')) {
    function mleDbiEsc($value) {
        return htmlspecialchars((string)$value, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiGetDb')) {
    function mleDbiGetDb() {
        return \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiNowSql')) {
    function mleDbiNowSql() {
        return gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiTableExists')) {
    function mleDbiTableExists($db, $rawTable) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote((string)$rawTable));
            return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return false;
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiGetColumns')) {
    function mleDbiGetColumns($db, $rawTable) {
        static $cache = array();
        $rawTable = (string)$rawTable;
        if (isset($cache[$rawTable])) { return $cache[$rawTable]; }
        $cols = array();
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable));
            $rows = $db->loadColumn();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $c) { $cols[(string)$c] = true; }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $cache[$rawTable] = $cols;
        return $cols;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiColExists')) {
    function mleDbiColExists($db, $rawTable, $col) {
        $cols = mleDbiGetColumns($db, $rawTable);
        return isset($cols[(string)$col]);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiEnsureColumn')) {
    function mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $rawTable, $col, $definition) {
        try {
            if (!mleDbiColExists($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $safeTable = str_replace('`', '', (string)$rawTable);
                $safeCol = str_replace('`', '', (string)$col);
                $db->setQuery('ALTER TABLE `' . $safeTable . '` ADD COLUMN `' . $safeCol . '` ' . (string)$definition);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] add column failed ' . $rawTable . '.' . $col . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiEnsureAuditSchema')) {
    function mleDbiEnsureAuditSchema($db) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $auditRaw = $prefix . 'mle_duplicate_batch_quarantine_audit';
        try {
            $db->setQuery("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$auditRaw}` (
                `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `batch_signature_hash` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `detected_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `last_seen_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `severity` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'warning',
                `user_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `target_draw_date` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `batch_key` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `batch_uuid` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `source_batch_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `row_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `unique_signature_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `duplicate_ratio` DECIMAL(8,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `affected_saved_ids` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `sample_signature` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `reason` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `action_taken` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'needs_review',
                `action_taken_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
                `action_taken_by` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `idx_mle_dbi_hash` (`batch_signature_hash`),
                KEY `idx_mle_dbi_lookup` (`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`target_draw_date`),
                KEY `idx_mle_dbi_batch_uuid` (`batch_uuid`),
                KEY `idx_mle_dbi_action` (`action_taken`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci");
            $db->execute();
            $defs = array(
                'batch_signature_hash' => "VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'detected_at' => "DATETIME NOT NULL",
                'last_seen_at' => "DATETIME NOT NULL",
                'severity' => "VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'warning'",
                'user_id' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
                'lottery_id' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
                'game_id' => "VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'target_draw_date' => "VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'batch_key' => "VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'batch_uuid' => "VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'source_batch_id' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
                'row_count' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
                'unique_signature_count' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0",
                'duplicate_ratio' => "DECIMAL(8,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000",
                'affected_saved_ids' => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL",
                'sample_signature' => "VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'reason' => "VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''",
                'action_taken' => "VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'needs_review'",
                'action_taken_at' => "DATETIME DEFAULT NULL",
                'action_taken_by' => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0"
            );
            foreach ($defs as $col => $def) { mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $auditRaw, $col, $def); }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] audit schema ensure failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
        return $auditRaw;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiEnsureStatusColumns')) {
    function mleDbiEnsureStatusColumns($db) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedRaw = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $perfRaw = $prefix . 'skai_learning_performance';
        if (mleDbiTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status', "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'use_in_advice'");
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'status_explicit', "TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0");
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at', "DATETIME DEFAULT NULL");
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $savedRaw, 'evaluation_status', "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'");
        }
        if (mleDbiTableExists($db, $perfRaw)) {
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status', "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'use_in_advice'");
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $perfRaw, 'status_explicit', "TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0");
            mleDbiEnsureColumn($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at', "DATETIME DEFAULT NULL");
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiSqlValueExpr')) {
    function mleDbiSqlValueExpr($db, $alias, $rawTable, array $candidates, $defaultSql) {
        $parts = array();
        foreach ($candidates as $col) {
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $parts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
            }
        }
        if (empty($parts)) { return $defaultSql; }
        $parts[] = $defaultSql;
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(', ', $parts) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiIntExpr')) {
    function mleDbiIntExpr($db, $alias, $rawTable, array $candidates) {
        $parts = array();
        foreach ($candidates as $col) {
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $parts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ', 0)';
            }
        }
        if (empty($parts)) { return '0'; }
        $parts[] = '0';
        return 'COALESCE(' . implode(', ', $parts) . ')';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiBuildDetectionSql')) {
    function mleDbiBuildDetectionSql($db, $severityLimit) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $savedRaw = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $alias = 's';
        $idExpr = $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('id');
        $userExpr = mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'user_id') ? ('COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ',0)') : '0';
        $lotteryExpr = mleDbiIntExpr($db, $alias, $savedRaw, array('target_lottery_id', 'lottery_id'));
        $gameExpr = mleDbiSqlValueExpr($db, $alias, $savedRaw, array('target_game_id', 'game_id'), $db->quote(''));
        $drawExpr = mleDbiSqlValueExpr($db, $alias, $savedRaw, array('target_draw_date', 'actual_draw_date', 'draw_date', 'next_draw_date'), $db->quote(''));
        $batchUuidExpr = mleDbiSqlValueExpr($db, $alias, $savedRaw, array('batch_uuid'), $db->quote(''));
        $sourceBatchExpr = mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'source_batch_id') ? ('COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ',0)') : '0';
        $batchKeyParts = array();
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_uuid')) { $batchKeyParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'source_batch_id')) { $batchKeyParts[] = 'NULLIF(CONCAT(' . $db->quote('source_batch:') . ', ' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . '), ' . $db->quote('source_batch:0') . ')'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'comparison_group_key')) { $batchKeyParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('comparison_group_key') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'prediction_target_id')) { $batchKeyParts[] = 'NULLIF(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')'; }
        $batchKeyParts[] = "CONCAT('fallback:', {$userExpr}, ':', {$lotteryExpr}, ':', {$gameExpr}, ':', {$drawExpr})";
        $batchKeyExpr = 'COALESCE(' . implode(', ', $batchKeyParts) . ')';

        $sigCols = array('regular_main_numbers_json','main_display_json','main_numbers','numbers','predicted_numbers','regular_extra_numbers_json','extra_display_json','extra_ball_numbers','bonus_numbers','extra_numbers');
        $sigParts = array();
        foreach ($sigCols as $col) {
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, $col)) {
                $sigParts[] = 'COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName($col) . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ')';
            }
        }
        if (empty($sigParts)) { $sigParts[] = 'CAST(' . $idExpr . ' AS CHAR)'; }
        $signatureExpr = 'SHA2(CONCAT_WS(' . $db->quote('|') . ', ' . implode(', ', $sigParts) . '), 256)';
        $sampleSignatureExpr = 'MIN(' . $signatureExpr . ')';
        $rowOrder = mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_index') ? ($alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('batch_index') . ', ' . $idExpr) : $idExpr;

        $whereParts = array();
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_total')) { $whereParts[] = 'COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('batch_total') . ',0) >= 3'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_uuid')) { $whereParts[] = 'COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote(''); }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'source_batch_id')) { $whereParts[] = 'COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('source_batch_id') . ',0) > 0'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'comparison_group_key')) { $whereParts[] = 'COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('comparison_group_key') . ', ' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote(''); }
        $where = empty($whereParts) ? '1=0' : '(' . implode(' OR ', $whereParts) . ')';
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'id')) { $where .= ' AND ' . $idExpr . ' > 0'; }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'deleted')) { $where .= ' AND COALESCE(' . $alias . '.' . $db->quoteName('deleted') . ',0) = 0'; }

        $groupCols = array($userExpr, $lotteryExpr, $gameExpr, $drawExpr, $batchKeyExpr);
        $having = 'row_count >= 3 AND unique_signature_count <= ' . (int)$severityLimit;

        return "SELECT
            SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|', {$userExpr}, {$lotteryExpr}, {$gameExpr}, {$drawExpr}, {$batchKeyExpr}), 256) AS batch_signature_hash,
            CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT {$signatureExpr}) <= 1 THEN 'critical' ELSE 'warning' END AS severity,
            {$userExpr} AS user_id,
            {$lotteryExpr} AS lottery_id,
            {$gameExpr} AS game_id,
            {$drawExpr} AS target_draw_date,
            {$batchKeyExpr} AS batch_key,
            {$batchUuidExpr} AS batch_uuid,
            {$sourceBatchExpr} AS source_batch_id,
            COUNT(*) AS row_count,
            COUNT(DISTINCT {$signatureExpr}) AS unique_signature_count,
            (1 - (COUNT(DISTINCT {$signatureExpr}) / COUNT(*))) AS duplicate_ratio,
            GROUP_CONCAT({$idExpr} ORDER BY {$rowOrder} SEPARATOR ',') AS affected_saved_ids,
            {$sampleSignatureExpr} AS sample_signature,
            'duplicate_prediction_signature_in_batch' AS reason
        FROM " . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers', $alias) . "
        WHERE {$where}
        GROUP BY " . implode(', ', $groupCols) . "
        HAVING {$having}";
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiRunScan')) {
    function mleDbiRunScan($db) {
        mleDbiEnsureStatusColumns($db);
        $auditRaw = mleDbiEnsureAuditSchema($db);
        $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mleDbiTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) {
            return array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'The saved numbers table was not found.', 'inserted' => 0);
        }
        $sql = mleDbiBuildDetectionSql($db, 4);
        $now = mleDbiNowSql();
        $insertSql = "INSERT INTO " . $db->quoteName('#__mle_duplicate_batch_quarantine_audit') . "
            (`batch_signature_hash`,`detected_at`,`last_seen_at`,`severity`,`user_id`,`lottery_id`,`game_id`,`target_draw_date`,`batch_key`,`batch_uuid`,`source_batch_id`,`row_count`,`unique_signature_count`,`duplicate_ratio`,`affected_saved_ids`,`sample_signature`,`reason`,`action_taken`)
            SELECT q.batch_signature_hash, " . $db->quote($now) . ", " . $db->quote($now) . ", q.severity, q.user_id, q.lottery_id, q.game_id, q.target_draw_date, q.batch_key, q.batch_uuid, q.source_batch_id, q.row_count, q.unique_signature_count, q.duplicate_ratio, q.affected_saved_ids, q.sample_signature, q.reason,
            CASE WHEN q.unique_signature_count <= 1 THEN 'needs_review' ELSE 'low_diversity_review' END
            FROM ({$sql}) q
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                `last_seen_at` = VALUES(`last_seen_at`),
                `severity` = VALUES(`severity`),
                `row_count` = VALUES(`row_count`),
                `unique_signature_count` = VALUES(`unique_signature_count`),
                `duplicate_ratio` = VALUES(`duplicate_ratio`),
                `affected_saved_ids` = VALUES(`affected_saved_ids`),
                `sample_signature` = VALUES(`sample_signature`),
                `reason` = VALUES(`reason`),
                `action_taken` = CASE
                    WHEN `action_taken` IN ('deleted_permanently','quarantined','restored') THEN `action_taken`
                    ELSE VALUES(`action_taken`)
                END";
        try {
            try { $db->setQuery('SET SESSION group_concat_max_len = 1048576'); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $_gc) { }
            $db->setQuery($insertSql);
            $db->execute();
            return array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Duplicate batch scan completed.', 'inserted' => (int)$db->getAffectedRows());
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] scan failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'Duplicate batch scan failed. Check Joomla logs.', 'inserted' => 0);
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiParseIds')) {
    function mleDbiParseIds($csv) {
        $out = array();
        foreach (explode(',', (string)$csv) as $part) {
            $id = (int)trim($part);
            if ($id > 0) { $out[$id] = $id; }
        }
        return array_values($out);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiFetchAuditRowsByIds')) {
    function mleDbiFetchAuditRowsByIds($db, array $auditIds) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($auditIds as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; } }
        if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }
        try {
            try { $db->setQuery('SET SESSION group_concat_max_len = 1048576'); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $_gc) { }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT * FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_duplicate_batch_quarantine_audit') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ')');
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return array();
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiCollectSavedIdsFromAuditRows')) {
    function mleDbiCollectSavedIdsFromAuditRows(array $rows) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            foreach (mleDbiParseIds($row['affected_saved_ids'] ?? '') as $id) { $ids[$id] = $id; }
        }
        return array_values($ids);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiFetchBatchUuidsForSavedIds')) {
    function mleDbiFetchBatchUuidsForSavedIds($db, array $savedIds) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($savedIds as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; } }
        if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }
        $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_uuid')) { return array(); }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT DISTINCT ' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ') AND COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') <> ' . $db->quote(''));
            $rows = $db->loadColumn();
            $out = array();
            if (is_array($rows)) {
                foreach ($rows as $v) { $v = trim((string)$v); if ($v !== '') { $out[$v] = $v; } }
            }
            return array_values($out);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return array(); }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiUpdateHiveByBatchUuids')) {
    function mleDbiUpdateHiveByBatchUuids($db, array $batchUuids, $mode) {
        $clean = array();
        foreach ($batchUuids as $b) {
            $b = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)$b);
            if ($b !== '') { $clean[$b] = $db->quote($b); }
        }
        if (empty($clean)) { return 0; }
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        if (!mleDbiTableExists($db, $assignRaw) || !mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'batch_uuid')) { return 0; }
        $set = array();
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'assigned_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($mode === 'restore' ? 'saved_waiting_for_draw' : 'duplicate_quarantined'); }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'result_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('result_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($mode === 'restore' ? 'waiting_for_draw' : 'duplicate_quarantined'); }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'runner_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($mode === 'restore' ? '' : 'duplicate_quarantined'); }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'runner_message')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote($mode === 'restore' ? 'Restored by Duplicate Batch Integrity Center - Prediction Preview.' : 'Quarantined by Duplicate Batch Integrity Center - Prediction Preview.'); }
        if (mleDbiColExists($db, $assignRaw, 'last_reconciled_at')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote(mleDbiNowSql()); }
        if (empty($set)) { return 0; }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $set) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $clean) . ')');
            $db->execute();
            return (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return 0; }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiApplySavedIdsAction')) {
    function mleDbiApplySavedIdsAction($db, array $auditRows, $action, $actorUserId) {
        $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $perfRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'skai_learning_performance';
        $savedIds = mleDbiCollectSavedIdsFromAuditRows($auditRows);
        if (empty($savedIds)) { return array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'No saved rows were selected.', 'count' => 0); }
        $idSql = implode(',', array_map('intval', $savedIds));
        $now = mleDbiNowSql();
        $affected = 0;
        try {
            if ($action === 'delete') {
                if (mleDbiTableExists($db, $perfRaw) && mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'run_id')) {
                    $db->setQuery('DELETE FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('run_id') . ' IN (' . $idSql . ')');
                    $db->execute();
                }
                $db->setQuery('DELETE FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . $idSql . ')');
                $db->execute();
                $affected = (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
                return array('ok' => true, 'message' => 'Selected duplicate saved rows were permanently deleted.', 'count' => $affected, 'audit_action' => 'deleted_permanently');
            }

            $set = array();
            if ($action === 'restore') {
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('use_in_advice'); }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'status_explicit')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1'; }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'evaluation_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' = CASE WHEN ' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('duplicate_quarantined') . ' THEN ' . $db->quote('pending') . ' ELSE ' . $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' END'; }
            } else {
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('retired'); }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'status_explicit')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1'; }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'evaluation_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('evaluation_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('duplicate_quarantined'); }
                if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'play_status')) { $set[] = $db->quoteName('play_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('duplicate_quarantined'); }
            }
            if (!empty($set)) {
                $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $set) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . $idSql . ')');
                $db->execute();
                $affected += (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
            }

            if (mleDbiTableExists($db, $perfRaw) && mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'run_id')) {
                $pset = array();
                if ($action === 'restore') {
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('use_in_advice'); }
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'status_explicit')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1'; }
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
                } else {
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('retired'); }
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'status_explicit')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('status_explicit') . ' = 1'; }
                    if (mleDbiColExists($db, $perfRaw, 'advice_status_updated_at')) { $pset[] = $db->quoteName('advice_status_updated_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
                }
                if (!empty($pset)) {
                    $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_performance') . ' SET ' . implode(', ', $pset) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('run_id') . ' IN (' . $idSql . ')');
                    $db->execute();
                    $affected += (int)$db->getAffectedRows();
                }
            }
            $batchUuids = mleDbiFetchBatchUuidsForSavedIds($db, $savedIds);
            $affected += mleDbiUpdateHiveByBatchUuids($db, $batchUuids, $action === 'restore' ? 'restore' : 'quarantine');
            return array('ok' => true, 'message' => ($action === 'restore' ? 'Selected batches were restored to advice eligibility.' : 'Selected batches were quarantined from learning/advice.'), 'count' => $affected, 'audit_action' => ($action === 'restore' ? 'restored' : 'quarantined'));
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] apply action failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'Action failed. Check Joomla logs.', 'count' => 0);
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiUpdateAuditAction')) {
    function mleDbiUpdateAuditAction($db, array $auditIds, $actionTaken, $actorUserId) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($auditIds as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; } }
        if (empty($ids)) { return; }
        try {
            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_duplicate_batch_quarantine_audit')
                . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('action_taken') . ' = ' . $db->quote($actionTaken)
                . ', ' . $db->quoteName('action_taken_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote(mleDbiNowSql())
                . ', ' . $db->quoteName('action_taken_by') . ' = ' . (int)$actorUserId
                . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ')');
            $db->execute();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] audit update failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiLoadAuditRows')) {
    function mleDbiLoadAuditRows($db) {
        try {
            try { $db->setQuery('SET SESSION group_concat_max_len = 1048576'); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $_gc) { }
            $db->setQuery('SELECT * FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_duplicate_batch_quarantine_audit') . ' ORDER BY FIELD(' . $db->quoteName('action_taken') . ', ' . $db->quote('needs_review') . ', ' . $db->quote('low_diversity_review') . ', ' . $db->quote('quarantined') . ', ' . $db->quote('restored') . ', ' . $db->quote('deleted_permanently') . '), ' . $db->quoteName('severity') . ' ASC, ' . $db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' DESC, ' . $db->quoteName('row_count') . ' DESC LIMIT 250');
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            return array();
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiShorten')) {
    function mleDbiShorten($value, $maxLen = 220) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        $value = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $value);
        if ($maxLen > 0 && strlen($value) > $maxLen) { return substr($value, 0, $maxLen) . '...'; }
        return $value;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiRenderPayloadValue')) {
    function mleDbiRenderPayloadValue($value) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        if ($value === '') { return ''; }
        $decoded = json_decode($value, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
            if (is_array($decoded)) {
                $parts = array();
                foreach ($decoded as $item) {
                    if (is_array($item)) {
                        if (isset($item['values']) && is_array($item['values'])) {
                            $parts[] = implode('-', array_map('strval', $item['values']));
                        } elseif (isset($item['main']) && is_array($item['main'])) {
                            $parts[] = implode('-', array_map('strval', $item['main']));
                        } elseif (isset($item['combo'])) {
                            $parts[] = (string)$item['combo'];
                        } elseif (isset($item['display'])) {
                            $parts[] = (string)$item['display'];
                        } else {
                            $flat = array();
                            foreach ($item as $sub) {
                                if (is_scalar($sub)) { $flat[] = (string)$sub; }
                            }
                            if (!empty($flat)) { $parts[] = implode('-', $flat); }
                        }
                    } elseif (is_scalar($item)) {
                        $parts[] = (string)$item;
                    }
                    if (count($parts) >= 20) { break; }
                }
                return mleDbiShorten(implode(', ', $parts), 360);
            }
            if (is_scalar($decoded)) { return mleDbiShorten((string)$decoded, 360); }
        }
        return mleDbiShorten($value, 360);
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiFirstNonEmpty')) {
    function mleDbiFirstNonEmpty(array $row, array $keys) {
        foreach ($keys as $key) {
            if (array_key_exists($key, $row)) {
                $value = trim((string)$row[$key]);
                if ($value !== '') { return $value; }
            }
        }
        return '';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiFetchSavedPredictionRows')) {
    function mleDbiFetchSavedPredictionRows($db, array $savedIds, $limit = 12) {
        $ids = array();
        foreach ($savedIds as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $ids[$id] = $id; } }
        if (empty($ids)) { return array(); }
        $ids = array_slice(array_values($ids), 0, max(1, min(50, (int)$limit)));
        $savedRaw = $db->getPrefix() . 'user_saved_numbers';
        if (!mleDbiTableExists($db, $savedRaw)) { return array(); }
        $wanted = array(
            'id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','target_game_id','target_draw_date','next_draw_date',
            'source','label','batch_uuid','batch_index','batch_total','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_run_order',
            'advice_status','evaluation_status','play_status','main_numbers','numbers','predicted_numbers','extra_ball_numbers','bonus_numbers','extra_numbers',
            'regular_main_numbers_json','regular_extra_numbers_json','main_display_json','extra_display_json','canonical_main_display','canonical_extra_display',
            'daily_primary_prediction','daily_primary_prediction_json','daily_top_picks_json','daily_top_pick_strings_json','daily_bonus_digits_json','daily_display_payload_json',
            'settings_json','settings','analysis_method_key','analysis_engine_label','created_at','date_created','created'
        );
        $select = array();
        foreach ($wanted as $col) {
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, $col)) { $select[] = $db->quoteName($col); }
        }
        if (empty($select)) { return array(); }
        try {
            $orderParts = array();
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'batch_index')) { $orderParts[] = $db->quoteName('batch_index') . ' ASC'; }
            if (mleDbiColExists($db, $savedRaw, 'source_batch_run_order')) { $orderParts[] = $db->quoteName('source_batch_run_order') . ' ASC'; }
            $orderParts[] = $db->quoteName('id') . ' ASC';
            $db->setQuery('SELECT ' . implode(',', $select) . ' FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)) . ') ORDER BY ' . implode(', ', $orderParts));
            $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
            return is_array($rows) ? $rows : array();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[MLE DBI] prediction preview fetch failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return array();
        }
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiRenderPredictionPreview')) {
    function mleDbiRenderPredictionPreview($db, $affectedIdsCsv) {
        $ids = mleDbiParseIds($affectedIdsCsv);
        $rows = mleDbiFetchSavedPredictionRows($db, $ids, 50);
        if (empty($rows)) {
            echo '<div class="mle-dbi-preview-empty">No saved prediction rows were found for these IDs. They may have already been deleted.</div>';
            return;
        }
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-preview-wrap">';
        echo '<table class="mle-dbi-preview-table"><thead><tr><th>Saved ID</th><th>Run</th><th>Status</th><th>Playable saved pick</th><th>Display/evidence pool</th><th>Daily combo view</th><th>Label/source</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        foreach ($rows as $r) {
            $runParts = array();
            foreach (array('batch_index','source_batch_run_order','batch_total') as $k) {
                if (isset($r[$k]) && trim((string)$r[$k]) !== '') { $runParts[] = $k . ': ' . (string)$r[$k]; }
            }
            $mainPlayable = mleDbiRenderPayloadValue(mleDbiFirstNonEmpty($r, array('main_numbers','numbers','predicted_numbers')));
            $extraPlayable = mleDbiRenderPayloadValue(mleDbiFirstNonEmpty($r, array('extra_ball_numbers','bonus_numbers','extra_numbers')));
            $displayMain = mleDbiRenderPayloadValue(mleDbiFirstNonEmpty($r, array('main_display_json','regular_main_numbers_json','canonical_main_display')));
            $displayExtra = mleDbiRenderPayloadValue(mleDbiFirstNonEmpty($r, array('extra_display_json','regular_extra_numbers_json','canonical_extra_display')));
            $dailyView = mleDbiRenderPayloadValue(mleDbiFirstNonEmpty($r, array('daily_top_pick_strings_json','daily_top_picks_json','daily_primary_prediction','daily_primary_prediction_json','daily_display_payload_json')));
            $statusBits = array();
            foreach (array('advice_status','evaluation_status','play_status') as $k) { if (!empty($r[$k])) { $statusBits[] = $k . ': ' . $r[$k]; } }
            $labelBits = array();
            foreach (array('source','analysis_method_key','analysis_engine_label','label') as $k) { if (!empty($r[$k])) { $labelBits[] = $r[$k]; } }
            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td><code>' . (int)($r['id'] ?? 0) . '</code></td>';
            echo '<td>' . mleDbiEsc(implode(' | ', $runParts)) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . mleDbiEsc(implode(' | ', $statusBits)) . '</td>';
            echo '<td><strong>Main:</strong> ' . mleDbiEsc($mainPlayable !== '' ? $mainPlayable : 'not stored') . '<br><strong>Extra:</strong> ' . mleDbiEsc($extraPlayable !== '' ? $extraPlayable : 'not stored') . '</td>';
            echo '<td><strong>Main pool:</strong> ' . mleDbiEsc($displayMain !== '' ? $displayMain : 'not stored') . '<br><strong>Extra pool:</strong> ' . mleDbiEsc($displayExtra !== '' ? $displayExtra : 'not stored') . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . mleDbiEsc($dailyView !== '' ? $dailyView : 'not a daily/combo row or not stored') . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . mleDbiEsc(mleDbiShorten(implode(' | ', $labelBits), 260)) . '</td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        echo '</tbody></table>';
        if (count($ids) > count($rows)) { echo '<div class="mle-dbi-preview-more">Showing ' . (int)count($rows) . ' of ' . (int)count($ids) . ' affected IDs. Use the ID list for the full set.</div>'; }
        echo '</div>';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiRenderAdminLazyPlaceholder')) {
    function mleDbiRenderAdminLazyPlaceholder($message = null) {
        $user = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
        if ($user->guest || !$user->authorise('core.admin')) { return; }
        $uri = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::getInstance();
        $loadUrl = $uri->toString(array('path','query'));
        $joiner = (strpos($loadUrl, '?') === false) ? '?' : '&';
        if (strpos($loadUrl, 'mle_dbi_load=') === false) {
            $loadUrl .= $joiner . 'mle_dbi_load=1';
        }
        $loadUrl .= '#mle-duplicate-batch-integrity-center';
        echo '<section class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin" id="mle-duplicate-batch-integrity-center" aria-labelledby="mle-dbi-lazy-title" data-mle-dbi-lazy-admin="1">';
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__head"><span class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__eyebrow">Admin Only</span><h2 id="mle-dbi-lazy-title">Duplicate Batch Integrity Center</h2><p>This admin audit can be heavy, so it is not loaded on the first workspace view. Load it only when you need to scan, quarantine, restore, delete, or inspect duplicate batch rows.</p></div>';
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__body">';
        if (is_array($message) && !empty($message['message'])) {
            echo '<div class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__message">' . htmlspecialchars((string)$message['message'], ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '</div>';
        }
        echo '<div class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__actions"><button type="button" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--primary" data-mle-dbi-lazy-load="1" data-mle-dbi-url="' . htmlspecialchars($loadUrl, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '">Load Duplicate Batch Integrity Center</button><a class="mle-dbi-btn" href="' . htmlspecialchars($loadUrl, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '">Open full admin audit</a></div>';
        echo '<p class="mle-dbi-lazy-admin__note">Normal members never receive this admin audit markup. Super Users can still load the full center on demand.</p>';
        echo '</div></section>';
    }
}

if (!function_exists('mleDbiRenderAdminCenter')) {
    function mleDbiRenderAdminCenter($message = null) {
        $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
        $user = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
        if ($user->guest || !$user->authorise('core.admin')) { return; }
        $db = mleDbiGetDb();
        mleDbiEnsureAuditSchema($db);
        mleDbiEnsureStatusColumns($db);
        $rows = mleDbiLoadAuditRows($db);
        $tokenHtml = \Joomla\CMS\HTML\HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
        $critical = 0; $warning = 0; $quarantined = 0; $deleted = 0;
        foreach ($rows as $r) {
            if (($r['action_taken'] ?? '') === 'quarantined') { $quarantined++; }
            if (($r['action_taken'] ?? '') === 'deleted_permanently') { $deleted++; }
            if (($r['severity'] ?? '') === 'critical') { $critical++; }
            if (($r['severity'] ?? '') === 'warning') { $warning++; }
        }

        <section class="mle-dbi-admin" id="mle-duplicate-batch-integrity-center" aria-labelledby="mle-dbi-title">
            <div class="mle-dbi-admin__head">
                <span class="mle-dbi-admin__eyebrow">Admin Only</span>
                <h2 class="mle-dbi-admin__title" id="mle-dbi-title">Duplicate Batch Integrity Center - Prediction Preview</h2>
                <p class="mle-dbi-admin__intro">Review SKAI/MyLottoExpert batches where the same prediction payload was repeated across multiple batch runs. Quarantine first, review second, delete only after confirmation.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="mle-dbi-admin__body">
                <?php if ($message && is_array($message)) : ?>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-message" role="status"><?php echo mleDbiEsc($message['message'] ?? 'Action completed.'); ?></div>
                <?php endif; ?>
                <div class="mle-dbi-stats" aria-label="Duplicate batch summary">
                    <div class="mle-dbi-stat"><strong><?php echo (int)$critical; ?></strong><span>Critical exact duplicates</span></div>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-stat"><strong><?php echo (int)$warning; ?></strong><span>Low-diversity warnings</span></div>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-stat"><strong><?php echo (int)$quarantined; ?></strong><span>Quarantined</span></div>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-stat"><strong><?php echo (int)$deleted; ?></strong><span>Deleted audit records</span></div>
                </div>
                <form method="post" class="mle-dbi-actions">
                    <input type="hidden" name="mle_dbi_action" value="scan" />
                    <?php echo $tokenHtml; ?>
                    <button type="submit" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--primary">Scan for duplicate batches</button>
                </form>
                <form method="post" id="mle-dbi-bulk-form">
                    <?php echo $tokenHtml; ?>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-actions" aria-label="Bulk actions">
                        <button type="submit" name="mle_dbi_action" value="quarantine" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--warn">Quarantine selected</button>
                        <button type="submit" name="mle_dbi_action" value="restore" class="mle-dbi-btn">Restore selected</button>
                        <label><span class="mle-dbi-visually-hidden">Type DELETE to permanently delete</span><input class="mle-dbi-confirm" type="text" name="mle_dbi_confirm_delete" placeholder="Type DELETE" /></label>
                        <button type="submit" name="mle_dbi_action" value="delete" class="mle-dbi-btn mle-dbi-btn--danger">Delete selected permanently</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mle-dbi-table-wrap">
                        <table class="mle-dbi-table">
                            <caption class="mle-dbi-visually-hidden">Suspected duplicate SKAI batch records</caption>
                            <thead><tr><th>Select</th><th>Severity</th><th>Status</th><th>User</th><th>Lottery</th><th>Game</th><th>Draw</th><th>Batch</th><th>Rows</th><th>Unique sets</th><th>Affected saved IDs</th></tr></thead>
                            <tbody>
                            <?php if (empty($rows)) : ?>
                                <tr><td colspan="11">No duplicate batch audit rows yet. Press Scan for duplicate batches.</td></tr>
                            <?php else : foreach ($rows as $row) :
                                $sev = (string)($row['severity'] ?? 'warning');
                                $status = (string)($row['action_taken'] ?? 'needs_review');
                                $ids = (string)($row['affected_saved_ids'] ?? '');
                                $idsShort = strlen($ids) > 140 ? substr($ids, 0, 140) . '...' : $ids;
                            ?>
                                <tr>
                                    <td><input type="checkbox" name="mle_dbi_audit_ids[]" value="<?php echo (int)($row['id'] ?? 0); ?>" aria-label="Select audit row <?php echo (int)($row['id'] ?? 0); ?>" /></td>
                                    <td><span class="mle-dbi-pill <?php echo $sev === 'critical' ? 'mle-dbi-pill--critical' : 'mle-dbi-pill--warning'; ?>"><?php echo mleDbiEsc($sev); ?></span></td>
                                    <td><span class="mle-dbi-pill <?php echo $status === 'quarantined' ? 'mle-dbi-pill--ok' : ($status === 'deleted_permanently' ? 'mle-dbi-pill--critical' : 'mle-dbi-pill--warning'); ?>"><?php echo mleDbiEsc($status); ?></span></td>
                                    <td><?php echo (int)($row['user_id'] ?? 0); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo (int)($row['lottery_id'] ?? 0); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo mleDbiEsc($row['game_id'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo mleDbiEsc($row['target_draw_date'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo mleDbiEsc($row['batch_key'] ?? ''); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo (int)($row['row_count'] ?? 0); ?></td>
                                    <td><?php echo (int)($row['unique_signature_count'] ?? 0); ?></td>
                                    <td><code><?php echo mleDbiEsc($idsShort); ?></code></td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <td colspan="11" class="mle-dbi-preview-cell">
                                        <div class="mle-dbi-preview-direct" role="region" aria-label="Actual saved predictions for affected IDs">
                                            <div class="mle-dbi-preview-direct__title">Actual saved predictions for affected IDs</div>
                                            <div class="mle-dbi-full-ids"><strong>All affected saved IDs:</strong> <code><?php echo mleDbiEsc($ids); ?></code></div>
                                            <?php mleDbiRenderPredictionPreview($db, $ids); ?>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            <?php endforeach; endif; ?>
                            </tbody>
                        </table>

                </form>
                <p class="mle-dbi-note"><strong>Learning protection:</strong> Quarantine marks affected saved rows and matching SKAI performance rows as retired/excluded from advice. Existing contaminated batches remain visible for audit until you delete them.</p>
                <p class="mle-dbi-note"><strong>Deletion policy:</strong> Delete only after backup and review. Deletion removes selected saved rows and matching SKAI learning-performance rows by saved-row ID.</p>
            </div>
        </section>
        <script>
        (function(){
            var form = document.getElementById('mle-dbi-bulk-form');
            if (!form) { return; }
            form.addEventListener('submit', function(ev){
                var submitter = ev.submitter || document.activeElement;
                var action = submitter && submitter.name === 'mle_dbi_action' ? submitter.value : '';
                var checked = form.querySelectorAll('input[name="mle_dbi_audit_ids[]"]:checked');
                if (!checked.length) { ev.preventDefault(); alert('Please select at least one audit row.'); return; }
                if (action === 'delete') {
                    var confirm = form.querySelector('input[name="mle_dbi_confirm_delete"]');
                    if (!confirm || confirm.value !== 'DELETE') { ev.preventDefault(); alert('Type DELETE before permanently deleting duplicate rows.'); return; }
                    if (!window.confirm('Permanent delete removes saved rows and matching learning rows. Continue?')) { ev.preventDefault(); return; }
                }
                if (action === 'quarantine') {
                    if (!window.confirm('Quarantine selected batches from learning and advice?')) { ev.preventDefault(); return; }
                }
                if (action === 'restore') {
                    if (!window.confirm('Restore selected batches to advice eligibility? Only do this for batches you verified are valid.')) { ev.preventDefault(); return; }
                }
            }, false);
        })();
        </script>
        <?php
    }
}

try {
    $mleDbiApp = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
    $mleDbiUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    $mleDbiMessage = null;
    if (!$mleDbiUser->guest && $mleDbiUser->authorise('core.admin')) {
        $mleDbiDb = null;
        if (strtoupper((string)$mleDbiApp->input->getMethod()) === 'POST') {
            $mleDbiAction = strtolower(trim((string)$mleDbiApp->input->post->getString('mle_dbi_action', '')));
            if ($mleDbiAction !== '') {
                $mleDbiDb = mleDbiGetDb();
                mleDbiEnsureAuditSchema($mleDbiDb);
                mleDbiEnsureStatusColumns($mleDbiDb);
                if (!\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
                    $mleDbiMessage = array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'Security token expired. Refresh and try again.');
                } elseif ($mleDbiAction === 'scan') {
                    $mleDbiMessage = mleDbiRunScan($mleDbiDb);
                } elseif (in_array($mleDbiAction, array('quarantine','restore','delete'), true)) {
                    $auditIdsRaw = $mleDbiApp->input->post->get('mle_dbi_audit_ids', array(), 'array');
                    $auditIds = array();
                    foreach ((array)$auditIdsRaw as $id) { $id = (int)$id; if ($id > 0) { $auditIds[$id] = $id; } }
                    if (empty($auditIds)) {
                        $mleDbiMessage = array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'No audit rows selected.');
                    } elseif ($mleDbiAction === 'delete' && (string)$mleDbiApp->input->post->getString('mle_dbi_confirm_delete', '') !== 'DELETE') {
                        $mleDbiMessage = array('ok' => false, 'message' => 'Delete blocked. Type DELETE to confirm.');
                    } else {
                        $auditRows = mleDbiFetchAuditRowsByIds($mleDbiDb, array_values($auditIds));
                        $result = mleDbiApplySavedIdsAction($mleDbiDb, $auditRows, $mleDbiAction, (int)$mleDbiUser->id);
                        if (!empty($result['ok']) && !empty($result['audit_action'])) {
                            mleDbiUpdateAuditAction($mleDbiDb, array_values($auditIds), $result['audit_action'], (int)$mleDbiUser->id);
                        }
                        $mleDbiMessage = $result;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        $mleDbiLoadRequested = ((int)$mleDbiApp->input->getInt('mle_dbi_load', 0) === 1);
        $mleDbiFullWorkspace = ((int)$mleDbiApp->input->getInt('mle_full_workspace', 0) === 1);
        $mleDbiAdminToolsRequested = ((int)$mleDbiApp->input->getInt('mle_admin_tools', 0) === 1);
        $mleDbiHasAction = (strtoupper((string)$mleDbiApp->input->getMethod()) === 'POST' && strtolower(trim((string)$mleDbiApp->input->post->getString('mle_dbi_action', ''))) !== '');
        if ($mleDbiLoadRequested || $mleDbiFullWorkspace || $mleDbiHasAction) {
            skaiMaintRenderPanel($__skaiMaintAdminMessage);
            mleDbiRenderAdminCenter($mleDbiMessage);
        } elseif ($mleDbiAdminToolsRequested) {
            skaiMaintRenderPanel($__skaiMaintAdminMessage);
            mleDbiRenderAdminLazyPlaceholder($mleDbiMessage);
        }
    }
} catch (\Throwable $mleDbiFatalSafe) {
    error_log('[MLE DBI] admin center fatal-safe: ' . $mleDbiFatalSafe->getMessage());
}
?>
